Matthew1:1 Littafin asalin Yesu Almasihu, ɗan Dawuda, zuriyar Ibrahim ke nan." 
Matthew1:2 Ibrahim ya haifi Ishaku, Ishaku ya haifi Yakubu, Yakubu ya haifi Yahuza da 'yan'uwansa," 
Matthew1:3 Yahuza kuwa ya haifi Feresa da Zera (uwa tasu Tamar ce), Feresa ya haifi Hesruna, Hesruna ya haifi Aram," 
Matthew1:4 Aram ya haifi Amminadab, Amminadab ya haifi Nashon, Nashon ya haifi Salmon," 
Matthew1:5 Salmon ya haifi Bo'aza (uwa tasa Rahab ce), Bo'aza ya haifi Obida (mahaifiyarsa Rut ce), Obida ya haifi Yesse," 
Matthew1:6 Yesse ya haifi sarki Dawuda. Dawuda kuma ya haifi Sulemanu (wanda uwa tasa dā matar Uriya ce)," 
Matthew1:7 Sulemanu ya haifi Rehobowam, Rehobowam ya haifi Abiya, Abiya ya haifi Asa," 
Matthew1:8 Asa ya haifi Yehoshafat, Yehoshafat ya haifi Yoram, Yoram ya haifi Azariya," 
Matthew1:9 Azariya ya haifi Yotam, Yotam ya haifi Ahaz, Ahaz ya haifi Hezekiya," 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiya ya haifi Manassa, Manassa ya haifi Amon, Amon ya haifi Yosiya." 
Matthew1:11 Yosiya ya haifi Yekoniya da 'yan'uwansa, wato, a lokacin da aka ɗebe su zuwa Babila." 
Matthew1:12 Bayan an ɗebe su zuwa Babila, sai Yekoniya ya haifi Sheyaltiyel, Shayeltiyel ya haifi Zarubabel," 
Matthew1:13 Zarubabel ya haifi Abihudu, Abihudu ya haifi Eliyakim, Eliyakim ya haifi Azuro," 
Matthew1:14 Azuro ya haifi Saduƙu, Saduƙu ya haifi Akimu, Akimu ya haifi Aliyudu," 
Matthew1:15 Aliyudu ya haifi Ele'azara, Ele'azara ya haifi Matana, Matana ya haifi Yakubu," 
Matthew1:16 Yakubu ya haifi Yusufu mijin Maryamu wadda ta haifi Yesu, wanda ake kira Almasihu." 
Matthew1:17 Wato, dukkan zuriya daga Ibrahim zuwa kan Dawuda, zuriya goma sha huɗu ce. Daga Dawuda zuwa ga ɗebe su a kai Babila kuwa, zuriya goma sha huɗu. Daga ɗebe su zuwa Babila zuwa kan Almasihu, zuriya goma sha huɗu." 
Matthew1:18 Ga yadda haihuwar Yesu Almasihu take. Sa'ad da Yusufu yake tashin Maryamu mahaifiyar Yesu, tun ba a ɗauke ta ba, sai aka ga tana da juna biyu daga Ruhu Mai Tsarki." 
Matthew1:19 Yusufu mijinta kuwa da yake shi mutumin kirki ne, ba ya kuma so ya ba ta kunya a gaban jama'a, sai ya yi niyyar rabuwa da ita a asirce." 
Matthew1:20 Amma tun yana cikin wannan tunani, sai ga wani mala'ikan Ubangiji ya bayyana a gare shi a mafarki, ya ce, “Yusufu ɗan Dawuda, kada ka ji tsoron ɗaukar Maryamu matarka, domin cikin nan nata daga Ruhu Mai Tsarki ne." 
Matthew1:21 Za ta haifi ɗa, za ka kuma sa masa suna Yesu, domin shi ne zai ceci mutanensa daga zunubansu.”" 
Matthew1:22 An yi wannan ne duk, don a cika abin da Ubangiji ya faɗa ta bakin annabin cewa," 
Matthew1:23 “Ga shi, budurwa za ta yi juna biyu, ta haifi ɗa, Za a kuma sa masa suna Immanuwel.” (Ma'anar Immanuwel kuwa itace Allah na tare da mu.)" 
Matthew1:24 Da Yusufu ya farka daga barci, sai ya bi umarnin mala'ikan Ubangiji, ya ɗauki matarsa," 
Matthew1:25 amma bai san ta ba, sai bayan da ta haifi ɗanta, ya kuma sa masa suna Yesu." 
Matthew2:1 Sa'ad da aka haifi Yesu a Baitalami ta ƙasar Yahudiya, a zamanin sarki Hirudus, sai ga waɗansu masana taurari daga gabas suka zo Urushalima, suna cewa," 
Matthew2:2 “Ina wanda aka haifa Sarkin Yahudawa? Domin mun ga tauraronsa a gabas, mun kuma zo mu yi masa sujada.”" 
Matthew2:3 Da sarki Hirudus ya ji haka, sai ya damu ƙwarai, haka kuma dukan mutanen Urushalima." 
Matthew2:4 Sai ya tara dukan manyan firistoci da malaman Attaura na jama'a, ya tambaye su inda za a haifi Almasihu." 
Matthew2:5 Sai suka ce masa, “A Baitalami ne, ta ƙasar Yahudiya, domin haka annabin ya rubuta cewa," 
Matthew2:6 ‘Ke ma Baitalami, ta kasar Yahuza, Ko kusa ba ke ce mafi ƙanƙanta a cikin manyan garuruwan Yahuza ba, Domin daga cikinki za a haifi wani mai mulki, Wanda zai zama makiyayin jama'ata, Isra'ila.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Sai Hirudus ya kira masanan nan a asirce, ya tabbata daga bakinsu ainihin lokacin da tauraron nan ya bayyana." 
Matthew2:8 Sa'an nan ya aike su Baitalami, ya ce, “Ku je ku binciko mini ɗan yaron nan sosai. In kun same shi, ku kawo mini labari, don ni ma in je in yi masa sujada.”" 
Matthew2:9 Su kuwa da suka ji maganar sarki, sai suka yi tafiyarsu. Ga shi kuwa, tauraron da suka gani a gabas yana tafe a gabansu, har ya zo ya tsaya bisa inda ɗan yaron nan yake." 
Matthew2:10 Da suka ga tauraron sai suka yi matuƙar farin ciki. 
Matthew2:11 Da suka shiga gidan kuwa, sai suka ga ɗan yaron, tare da uwa tasa Maryamu, suka fāɗi gabansa suka yi masa sujada. Sa'an nan suka kwance kayansu, suka miƙa masa gaisuwar zinariya, da lubban, da mur." 
Matthew2:12 Amma da aka gargaɗe su a mafarki kada su koma wurin Hirudus, sai suka koma ƙasarsu ta wata hanya dabam." 
Matthew2:13 Da suka tashi, sai ga wani mala'ikan Ubangiji ya bayyana ga Yusufu a mafarki, ya ce, “Tashi ka ɗauki ɗan yaron da mahaifiyarsa, ka gudu ƙasar Masar, ka zauna a can sai na faɗa maka, don Hirudus yana shirin binciko ɗan yaron yă hallaka shi.”" 
Matthew2:14 Yusufu kuwa ya tashi ya ɗauki ɗan yaron da uwa tasa da daddare, ya tafi Masar," 
Matthew2:15 ya zauna a can har mutuwar Hirudus. Wannan kuwa domin a cika abin da Ubangiji ya faɗa ne ta bakin annabin cewa, “Daga Masar na kirawo Ɗana.”" 
Matthew2:16 Da Hirudus ya ga masanan nan sun mai da shi wawa, sai ya hasala ƙwarai, ya aika a karkashe dukan 'yan yara maza da suke Baitalami da kewayenta, daga masu shekara biyu zuwa ƙasa, gwargwadon lokacin da ya tabbatar a gun masanan nan." 
Matthew2:17 A lokacin ne aka cika faɗar Annabi Irmiya cewa," 
Matthew2:18 “An ji wata murya a Rama, Ta kuka da baƙin ciki mai zafi, Rahila ce take kuka saboda 'ya'yanta. Ba za ta ta'azantu ba, don ba su.”" 
Matthew2:19 Amma bayan mutuwar Hirudus, sai ga mala'ikan Ubangiji ya bayyana ga Yusufu a mafarki a Masar, ya ce," 
Matthew2:20 “Tashi ka ɗauki ɗan yaron da uwa tasa, ka tafi ƙasar Isra'ila, don masu neman ran ɗan yaron sun mutu.”" 
Matthew2:21 Sai ya tashi, ya ɗauki ɗan yaron da uwa tasa, ya zo ƙasar Isra'ila." 
Matthew2:22 Amma da ya ji Arkilayus ya gāji ubansa Hirudus, yana mulkin ƙasar Yahudiya, sai ya ji tsoron isa can. Amma da aka yi masa gargaɗi a mafarki, sai ya ratse zuwa ƙasar Galili." 
Matthew2:23 Sai ya je ya zauna a wani gari wai shi Nazarat, domin a cika faɗar annabawa cewa, “Za a kira shi Banazare.”" 
Matthew3:1 A wannan zamani ne Yahaya Maibaftisma ya zo, yana wa'azi a jejin Yahudiya," 
Matthew3:2 yana cewa, “Ku tuba, domin Mulkin Sama ya kusato.”" 
Matthew3:3 Wannan shi ne wanda Annabi Ishaya ya yi maganarsa, ya ce, “Muryar mai kira a jeji yana cewa, ‘Ku shirya wa Ubangiji tafarki, Ku miƙe hanyoyinsa.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Yahaya kuwa yana saye da tufa ta gashin raƙumi, yana kuma ɗaure da ɗamara ta fata, abincinsa kuwa fara ce da ruwan zuma." 
Matthew3:5 Sai mutanen Urushalima, da na dukan Yahudiya, da na duk ƙasashen bakin Kogin Urdun, suka yi ta zuwa wurinsa," 
Matthew3:6 yana yi musu baftisma a Kogin Urdun, suna bayyana zunubansu." 
Matthew3:7 Amma da Yahaya ya ga Farisiyawa da Sadukiyawa da yawa, sun taho domin a yi musu baftisma, sai ya ce musu, “Ku macizai! Wa ya gargaɗe ku, ku guje wa fushin nan mai zuwa?" 
Matthew3:8 Ku yi aikin da zai nuna tubarku. 
Matthew3:9 Kada kuwa ku ɗauka a ranku cewa, Ibrahim ne ubanku, domin ina gaya muku, Allah yana da ikon ya halitta wa Ibrahim 'ya'ya da duwatsun nan." 
Matthew3:10 Koyanzu ma an ɗora bakin gatari a gindin bishiya. Saboda haka duk bishiyar da bata bada 'ya'ya masu kyau ba, sai a sare ta a jefa a wuta." 
Matthew3:11 “Ni dai, da ruwa nake muku baftisma, shaidar tubarku, amma mai zuwa bayana, ya fi ni girma, wanda ko takalmansa ma ban isa in riƙe ba. Shi ne zai yi muku baftisma da Ruhu Mai Tsarki, da kuma wuta." 
Matthew3:12 Ƙwaryar shiƙarsa na hannunsa, zai kuwa share masussukarsa sarai sarai, ya taro alkamarsa ya sa a rumbunsa, amma ɓuntun, sai ya ƙone a wutar marar kasuwa.”" 
Matthew3:13 A lokacin nan ne Yesu ya zo daga ƙasar Galili, ya je Kogin Urdun wurin Yahaya, domin ya yi masa baftisma." 
Matthew3:14 Yahaya kuwa ya so ya hana shi, ya ce, “Ni da nake bukatar kai ka yi mini baftisma, ka zo gare ni?”" 
Matthew3:15 Amma Yesu ya amsa masa ya ce, “Bari ya zama haka a yanzu, domin haka ne ya dace mu cika dukan adalci.” Sa'an nan Yahaya ya yardar masa." 
Matthew3:16 Da aka yi wa Yesu baftisma, nan da nan da ya fito daga ruwan, sai ga sama ta dāre, ya ga Ruhun Allah na saukowa kamar kurciya, har ya sauka kansa." 
Matthew3:17 Sai aka ji wata murya daga Sama ta ce, “Wannan shi ne Ɗana ƙaunataccena, wanda nake farin ciki da shi ƙwarai.”" 
Matthew4:1 Sa'an nan sai Ruhu ya kai Yesu cikin jeji, domin Iblis yă gwada shi." 
Matthew4:2 Da ya yi azumi kwana arba'in ba dare ba rana, daga baya yunwa ta kama shi." 
Matthew4:3 Sai Mai Gwadawar nan ya zo, ya ce masa, “In kai Ɗan Allah ne, ka umarci duwatsun nan su zama gurasa.”" 
Matthew4:4 Amma Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “A rubuce yake cewa, ‘Ba da gurasa kaɗai mutum zai rayu ba, Sai dai da kowace maganar da yake fitowa daga wurin Allah.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Sa'an nan Iblis ya kai shi tsattsarkan birni, ya ɗora shi can kan tsororuwar Haikali," 
Matthew4:6 ya ce masa, “In kai Ɗan Allah ne, to dira ƙasa. Don a rubuce yake cewa, ‘Zai yi wa mala'ikunsa umarni game da kai,’ da kuma ‘Za su tallafe ka, Don kada ka yi tuntuɓe da dutse.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Sai Yesu ya ce masa, “A rubuce yake kuma cewa, ‘Kada ka gwada Ubangiji Allahnka.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Har wa yau dai, sai Iblis ya kai shi kan wani dutse mai tsawo ƙwarai, ya nunnuna masa dukan mulkokin duniya da ɗaukakarsu." 
Matthew4:9 Ya kuma ce masa, “Duk waɗannan zan ba ka in ka faɗi a gabana ka yi mini sujada.”" 
Matthew4:10 Sai Yesu ya ce masa, “Tafi daga nan, kai Shaiɗan! domin a rubuce yake cewa, ‘Kă yi wa Ubangiji Allahnka sujada, Shi kaɗai za ka bauta wa.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Sa'an nan Iblis ya rabu da shi. Sai ga mala'iku sun zo suna yi masa hidima. 
Matthew4:12 To, da Yesu ya ji an tsare Yahaya, sai ya tashi zuwa ƙasar Galili." 
Matthew4:13 Ya kuma bar Nazarat, ya koma Kafarnahum da zama, can bakin teku, a kan iyakar ƙasar Zabaluna da Naftali," 
Matthew4:14 domin a cika faɗar Annabi Ishaya cewa," 
Matthew4:15 “Ƙasar Zabaluna da ƙasar Naftali, Da bakin bahar, da hayin Kogin Urdun, Da kuma ƙasar Galili ta al'ummai," 
Matthew4:16 Mazaunan duhu sun ga babban haske, Mazaunan bakin mutuwa da fargabarta, Haske ya keto musu.”" 
Matthew4:17 Tun daga lokacin nan, Yesu ya fara wa'azi, yana cewa, “Ku tuba domin Mulkin Sama ya kusato.”" 
Matthew4:18 Yana tafiya a bakin Tekun Galili ke nan, sai ya ga waɗansu 'yan'uwa biyu, Saminu da ake kira Bitrus, da ɗan'uwansa Andarawas, suna jefa taru a teku, don su masunta ne." 
Matthew4:19 Sai ya ce musu, “Ku bi ni, zan mai da ku masuntan mutane.”" 
Matthew4:20 Nan da nan, sai suka watsar da tarunansu, suka bi shi." 
Matthew4:21 Da ya ci gaba sai ya ga waɗansu mutum biyu, su kuma 'yan'uwa ne, Yakubu ɗan Zabadi, da ɗan'uwansa Yahaya, suna cikin jirgi tare da ubansu Zabadi, suna gyaran tarunansu. Sai ya kira su." 
Matthew4:22 Nan take suka bar jirgin duk da ubansu, suka bi shi." 
Matthew4:23 Sai ya zazzaga duk ƙasar Galili, yana koyarwa a majami'unsu, yana shelar bisharar Mulkin Allah, yana kuma warkar da kowace cuta da rashin lafiya na mutane." 
Matthew4:24 Ta haka ya shahara a cikin duk ƙasar Suriya. Aka kuwa kakkawo masa dukan marasa lafiya, masu fama da cuta iri iri, da masu shan azaba, da kuma masu aljannu, da masu farraɗiya, da shanyayyu, ya kuwa warkar da su." 
Matthew4:25 Taro masu yawan gaske suka bi shi daga ƙasar Galili, da Dikafolis, da Urushalima, da ƙasar Yahudiya, har ma daga hayin Kogin Urdun." 
Matthew5:1 Da Yesu ya ga taro masu yawa sai ya hau dutse. Da ya zauna, almajiransa kuma suka zo gunsa." 
Matthew5:2 Sai ya buɗe baki ya koya musu. 
Matthew5:3 “Albarka tā tabbata ga waɗanda suka san talaucinsu na ruhu, domin Mulkin Sama nasu ne." 
Matthew5:4 “Albarka tā tabbata ga masu nadāma, domin za a sanyaya musu rai." 
Matthew5:5 “Albarka tā tabbata ga masu tawali'u, domin za su gāji duniya." 
Matthew5:6 “Albarka tā tabbata ga masu kwaɗaita ga adalci, domin za a biya musu muradi." 
Matthew5:7 “Albarka tā tabbata ga majiya tausayi, domin su ma za a ji tausayinsu." 
Matthew5:8 “Albarka tā tabbata ga masu tsarkakakkiyar zuciya, domin za su ga Allah." 
Matthew5:9 “Albarka tā tabbata ga masu ƙulla zumunci, domin za a ce da su 'ya'yan Allah." 
Matthew5:10 “Albarka tā tabbata ga masu shan tsanani saboda aikata adalci, domin Mulkin Sama nasu ne." 
Matthew5:11 “Albarka tā tabbata gare ku sa'ad da mutane suka zage ku, suka tsananta muku, suka kuma ƙaga muku kowace irin mugunta, saboda ni." 
Matthew5:12 Ku yi murna da farin ciki matuƙa, domin sakamakonku mai yawa ne a Sama, gama haka aka tsananta wa annabawan da suka riga ku.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Ku ne gishirin duniya. Amma in gishiri ya sāne, da me za a daɗaɗa shi? Ba shi da sauran amfani, sai dai a zubar, mutane kuma su tattake." 
Matthew5:14 “Ku ne hasken duniya. Ai, birnin da aka gina bisa tudu ba shi ɓoyuwa." 
Matthew5:15 Ba a kunna fitila a rufe ta da masaki, sai dai a ɗora ta a kan maɗorinta, sa'an nan ta ba duk mutanen gida haske." 
Matthew5:16 To, haskenku yă riƙa haskakawa haka a gaban mutane, domin su ga kyawawan ayyukanku, su kuma ɗaukaka Ubanku da yake cikin Sama.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Kada ku yi zaton na zo ne in shafe Attaura da koyarwar annabawa. Na zo ne ba domin in shafe su ba, sai dai domin in cika su." 
Matthew5:18 Hakika ina gaya muku, kafin sararin sama da ƙasa su shuɗe, ko wasali ko ɗigo na Attaura ba za su shuɗe ba, sai an cika dukan kome." 
Matthew5:19 Don haka duk wanda ya yar da umarni ɗaya mafi ƙanƙanta daga cikin umarnan nan, har ya koya wa mutane haka, za a ce da shi mafi ƙanƙanta a Mulkin Sama. Duk wanda ya bi su kuwa, har ya koyar da su, za a ce da shi mai girma a Mulkin Sama." 
Matthew5:20 Ina dai gaya muku, in adalcinku bai fi na malaman Attaura da Farisiyawa ba, ba za ku shiga Mulkin Sama ba faufau.”" 
Matthew5:21 “Kun dai ji an faɗa wa mutanen dā, ‘Kada ka yi kisankai, kowa ya yi kisa kuwa, za a hukunta shi.’" 
Matthew5:22 Amma ni ina gaya muku, kowa yake fushi da ɗan'uwansa ma, za a hukunta shi. Kowa ya ce da ɗan'uwansa wawa, za a kai shi gaban majalisa. Kowa kuma ya ce, ‘Kai wofi!’ hakkinsa shiga Gidan Wuta." 
Matthew5:23 Saboda haka, in kana cikin miƙa sadakarka a kan bagadin hadaya, a nan kuma ka tuna ɗan'uwanka na da wata magana game da kai," 
Matthew5:24 sai ka dakatar da sadakarka a gaban bagadin hadaya tukuna, ka je ku shirya da ɗan'uwanka, sa'an nan ka zo ka miƙa sadakarka." 
Matthew5:25 Ka hanzarta shiryawa da mai ƙararka tun kuna tafiya gaban shari'a, don kada mai kararka ya bashe ka ga alƙali, alƙali kuma ya miƙa ka ga dogari, a kuma jefa ka a kurkuku." 
Matthew5:26 Hakika ina gaya maka, ba za ka fita daga nan ba, sai ka biya duk, babu sauran ko anini.”" 
Matthew5:27 “Kun dai ji an faɗa, ‘Kada ka yi zina.’" 
Matthew5:28 Amma ni ina gaya muku, kowa ya dubi mace duban sha'awa, ya riga ya yi zinar zuci ke nan da ita." 
Matthew5:29 In idonka na dama yana sa ka yi laifi, to, ƙwaƙule shi ka yar. Zai fiye maka ka rasa ɗaya daga cikin gaɓoɓinka da a jefa duk jikinka ɗungum a Gidan Wuta." 
Matthew5:30 In kuma hannunka na dama, yana sa ka yi laifi, to, yanke shi ka yar. Zai fiye maka ka rasa ɗaya daga cikin gaɓoɓinka da a jefa jikinka ɗungum a Gidan Wuta.”" 
Matthew5:31 “An kuma ce, ‘Kowa ya saki matarsa, sai ya ba ta takardar saki.’" 
Matthew5:32 Amma ni ina gaya muku, kowa ya saki matarsa, in ba a kan laifin zina ba, ya sa ta hanyar zina ke nan. Wanda kuma ya auri sakakkiya, ya yi zina.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Har wa yau dai kun ji an faɗa wa mutanen dā, ‘Kada ka rantse a kan ƙarya, sai dai ka cika wa'adin da ka ɗaukar wa Ubangiji.’" 
Matthew5:34 Amma ni ina gaya muku, kada ma ku rantse sam, ko da sama, domin ita ce kursiyin Allah," 
Matthew5:35 ko da ƙasa, domin ita ce matashin ƙafarsa, ko kuma da Urushalima, domin ita ce birnin Babban Sarki." 
Matthew5:36 Kada kuwa ka rantse da kanka, don ba za ka iya mai da ko gashi ɗaya fari ko baƙi ba." 
Matthew5:37 Abin da duk za ku faɗa ya tsaya a kan ‘I’ ko ‘A'a’ kawai. In dai ya zarce haka, to, daga Mugun ya fito.”" 
Matthew5:38 “Kun dai ji an faɗa, ‘Sakayyar ido, ido ne, sakayyar haƙori kuma haƙori ne.’" 
Matthew5:39 Amma ni ina gaya muku, kada ku ƙi a cuce ku. Amma ko wani ya mare ka a kuncin dama, to, juya masa ɗayan kuma." 
Matthew5:40 In kuwa wani ya yi ƙararka da niyyar karɓe taguwarka, to, ka bar masa mayafinka ma." 
Matthew5:41 In kuma wani ya tilasta maka ku yi tafiyar mil guda tare, to, ku yi tafiyar mil biyu ma." 
Matthew5:42 Kowa ya roƙe ka, ka ba shi, mai neman rance a wurinka kuwa, kada ka hana shi.”" 
Matthew5:43 “Kun dai ji an faɗa, ‘Ka so ɗan'uwanka, ka ƙi magabcinka.’" 
Matthew5:44 Amma ni ina gaya muku, ku ƙaunaci magabtanku, ku yi wa masu tsananta muku addu'a," 
Matthew5:45 domin ku zama 'ya'yan Ubanku wanda yake cikin Sama. Domin yakan sa rana tasa ta fito kan mugaye da kuma nagargaru, ya kuma sako ruwan sama ga masu adalci da marasa adalci." 
Matthew5:46 In masoyanku kawai kuke ƙauna, wane lada ne da ku? Ashe, ko masu karɓar haraji ma ba haka suke yi ba?" 
Matthew5:47 In kuwa 'yan'uwanku kaɗai kuke gayarwa, me kuka yi fiye da waɗansu? Ashe, ko al'ummai ma ba haka suke yi ba?" 
Matthew5:48 Saboda haka sai ku zama cikakku, kamar yadda Ubanku na Sama take cikakke.”" 
Matthew6:1 “Ku yi hankali kada ibadarku ta zama ta ganin ido. Domin in kun yi haka, ba za ku sami sakamako wurin Ubanku da yake a Sama ba." 
Matthew6:2 “Wato, in za ka yi sadaka, kada ka yi kwakwazo yadda munafukai suke yi a majami'u da kuma kan hanya don dai mutane su yabe su. Gaskiya nake faɗa muku, sun sami iyakar ladarsu ke nan." 
Matthew6:3 Amma in kana yin sadaka, kada hannunka na hagu ya san abin da hannunka na dama yake yi," 
Matthew6:4 domin sadakarka tă zama a asirce, Ubanku kuwa da yake ganin abin da ake yi a asirce, zai sāka maka.”" 
Matthew6:5 “In za ku yi addu'a, kada ku zama kamar munafukai, don sun cika son yin addu'a a tsaye a majami'u da kan hanya, wai mutane su gan su. Gaskiya nake gaya muku, sun sami iyakar ladansu." 
Matthew6:6 Amma in za ka yi addu'a, sai ka shiga lollokinka, ka rufe ƙofa, ka yi addu'a ga Ubanku wanda yake ɓoye, Ubanku kuwa da yake ganin abin da ake yi a asirce, zai sāka maka." 
Matthew6:7 “In kuwa kuna addu'a, kada ku yi ta maimaitawar banza, kamar yadda al'ummai suke yi, a zatonsu za a saurare su saboda yawan maganarsu." 
Matthew6:8 Kada ku zama kamarsu, domin Ubanku ya san bukatarku tun kafin ku roƙe shi." 
Matthew6:9 Saboda haka sai ku yi addu'a kamar haka, ‘Ya Ubanmu, wanda yake cikin Sama, A kiyaye sunanka da tsarki." 
Matthew6:10 Mulkinka yă zo, A aikata nufinka a duniya kamar yadda ake yi a Sama." 
Matthew6:11 Ka ba mu abincinmu na yau. 
Matthew6:12 Ka gafarta mana laifofinmu, Kamar yadda mu ma muke gafarta wa waɗanda suke yi mana laifi." 
Matthew6:13 Kada ka kai mu wurin jaraba, Amma ka cece mu daga Mugun.’" 
Matthew6:14 Domin in kun yafe wa mutane laifofinsu, Ubanku na Sama zai yafe muku." 
Matthew6:15 In kuwa ba ku yafe wa mutane laifofinsu ba, Ubanku ma ba zai yafe muku naku ba.”" 
Matthew6:16 “In kuma kuna yin azumi, kada ku turɓune fuska kamar munafukai, don sukan yanƙwane fuska, wai don mutane su ga suna azumi ne. Hakika, ina gaya muku, sun sami iyakar ladansu ke nan." 
Matthew6:17 Amma in kana azumi, ka shafa mai a ka, ka kuma wanke fuska," 
Matthew6:18 don kada mutane su ga alama kana azumi, sai dai Ubanku da yake ɓoye ya gani. Ubanku kuma da yake ganin abin da ake yi a asirce, zai sāka maka.”" 
Matthew6:19 “Kada ku tara wa kanku dukiya a duniya, inda asu da tsatsa suke ɓatawa, inda ɓarayi kuma suke karyawa su yi sata." 
Matthew6:20 Sai dai ku tara wa kanku dukiya a Sama, inda ba asu da tsatsa da za su ɓata, inda kuma ba ɓarayin da za su karya su yi sata." 
Matthew6:21 Domin kuwa inda dukiyarka take, a nan zuciyarka ma take.”" 
Matthew6:22 “Ido shi ne fitilar jiki. In idonka lafiyayye ne, duk jikinka ma sai ya cika da haske." 
Matthew6:23 In kuwa idonka da lahani, duk jikinka sai ya cika da duhu. To, in hasken da yake gare ka duhu ne, ina misalin yawan duhun!”" 
Matthew6:24 “Ba mai iya bauta wa iyayengiji biyu; ko dai ya ƙi ɗaya, ya so ɗaya, ko kuwa ya amince wa ɗayan, ya raina ɗayan. Ba dama ku bauta wa Allah da dukiya gaba ɗaya.”" 
Matthew6:25 “Saboda haka ina gaya muku, kada ku damu a kan rayuwarku game da abin da za ku ci, da abin da za ku sha, ko kuwa jikinku, abin da za ku yi sutura. Ashe, rai bai fi abinci ba? Jiki kuma bai fi tufafi ba?" 
Matthew6:26 Ku dubi dai tsuntsaye. Ai, ba sa shuka, ba sa girbi, ba sa kuma tarawa a rumbuna, amma kuwa Ubanku na Sama na ci da su. Ashe, ko ba ku fi martaba nesa ba?" 
Matthew6:27 Wane ne a cikinku, don damuwarsa, zai iya ƙara ko da taƙi ga tsawon rayuwarsa?" 
Matthew6:28 To, don me kuke damuwa a kan tufafi? Ku dubi dai furannin jeji, yadda suke girma, ba sa aikin fari, ba sa na baƙi," 
Matthew6:29 duk da haka ina gaya muku, ko Sulemanu ma, shi da adonsa duk, bai taɓa yin adon da ya fi na ɗayansu ba." 
Matthew6:30 To, ga shi, Allah yana ƙawata tsire-tsiren jeji ma haka, waɗanda yau suke raye, gobe kuwa a jefa su a murhu, balle ku? Ya ku masu ƙarancin bangaskiya!" 
Matthew6:31 Don haka kada ku damu, kuna cewa, ‘Me za mu ci?’ ko, ‘Me za mu sha?’ ko kuwa, ‘Me za mu sa?’" 
Matthew6:32 Ai, al'ummai ma suna ta neman duk irin waɗannan abubuwa, Ubanku na Sama kuwa ya san kuna bukatarsu duka." 
Matthew6:33 Muhimmin abu na farko, sai ku ƙwallafa rai ga al'amuran Mulkin Allah, da kuma adalcinsa, har ma za a ƙara muku dukan waɗannan abubuwa." 
Matthew6:34 “Saboda haka kada ku damu don gobe, ai, gobe ta Allah ce. Wahalce-wahalcen yau ma sun isa wahala.”" 
Matthew7:1 “Kada ku ɗora wa kowa laifi, don kada a ɗora muku." 
Matthew7:2 Don da irin hukuncin da kuka zartar, da shi za a zartar muku. Mudun da kuka auna, da shi za a auna muku." 
Matthew7:3 Don me kake duban ɗan hakin da yake idon ɗan'uwanka, amma gungumen da yake a naka ido ba ka kula ba?" 
Matthew7:4 Ko kuwa yaya za ka iya ce wa ɗan'wanka, ‘Bari in cire maka ɗan hakin daga idonka,’ alhali kuwa da gungume a naka ido?" 
Matthew7:5 Kai munafuki! Sai ka fara cire gungumen da yake idonka tukuna, sa'an nan ka gani sosai yadda za ka cire ɗan hakin daga idon ɗan'uwanka." 
Matthew7:6 “Kada ku ba karnuka abin da yake tsattsarka. Kada kuma ku jefa wa alhanzir lu'ulu'unku, don kada su tattake su, su juyo su kyakketa ku.”" 
Matthew7:7 “Ku yi ta roƙo, za a ba ku. Ku yi ta nema, za ku samu. Ku yi ta ƙwanƙwasawa, za a kuwa buɗe muku." 
Matthew7:8 Duk wanda ya roƙa, akan ba shi, mai nema yana tare da samu. Wanda ya ƙwanƙwasa kuma za a buɗe masa." 
Matthew7:9 To, wane ne a cikinku, ɗansa zai roƙe shi gurasa, ya ba shi dutse?" 
Matthew7:10 Ko kuwa ya roƙe shi kifi, ya ba shi maciji?" 
Matthew7:11 To, ku da kuke mugaye ma, kuka san yadda za ku ba 'ya'yanku kyautar kyawawan abubuwa, balle Ubanku na Sama da zai ba da abubuwan alheri ga masu roƙonsa?" 
Matthew7:12 Saboda haka duk abin da kuke so mutane su yi muku, ku ma sai ku yi musu, domin wannan shi ne Attaura da koyarwar annabawa.”" 
Matthew7:13 “Ku shiga ta ƙunƙuntar ƙofa, gama ƙofa zuwa hallaka faffaɗa ce, hanyarta mai sauƙin bi ce, masu shiga ta cikinta suna da yawa." 
Matthew7:14 Domin kuwa ƙofar zuwa rai ƙunƙunta ce, hanyarta mai wuyar bi ce, masu samunta kuwa kaɗan ne.”" 
Matthew7:15 “Ku kula da annabawan ƙarya, waɗanda sukan zo muku da siffar tumaki, amma a zuci kyarketai ne masu ƙāwa." 
Matthew7:16 Za ku gane su ta irin aikinsu. A iya ciran inabi a jikin ƙaya, ko kuwa ɓaure a jikin sarƙaƙƙiya?" 
Matthew7:17 Haka kowane itacen kirki yakan haifi kyawawan 'ya'ya. Mummunan itace kuwa yakan haifi munanan 'ya'ya. 
Matthew7:18 Kyakkyawan itace ba dama ya haifi munanan 'ya'ya. Haka kuma mummunan itace ba dama ya haifi kyawawan 'ya'ya. 
Matthew7:19 Duk itacen da ba ya 'ya'ya masu kyau, sai a sare shi a jefa a wuta." 
Matthew7:20 Don haka, da irin aikinsu za a gane su.”" 
Matthew7:21 “Ba duk mai ce mini, ‘Ya Ubangiji, ya Ubangiji,’ ne zai shiga Mulkin Sama ba, sai dai wanda ya yi abin da Ubana da yake cikin Sama yake so." 
Matthew7:22 A ranar nan da yawa za su ce mini, ‘Ya Ubangiji, ya Ubangiji, ashe, ba mu yi annabci da sunanka ba? Ba mu fitar da aljannu da sunanka ba? Ba mu kuma yi ayyukan al'ajabi masu yawa da sunanka ba?’" 
Matthew7:23 Sa'an nan zan ce musu, ‘Ni ban taɓa saninku ba. Ku rabu da ni, ku masu yin mugun aiki.’ ”" 
Matthew7:24 “Saboda haka, kowa da yake jin maganar nan tawa, yake kuma aikata ta, za a kwatanta shi da mutum mai hikima, wanda ya gina gidansa a kan fā." 
Matthew7:25 Da ruwa ya sauko, koguna suka yi cikowa, iska ta taso ta bugi gidan, amma bai faɗi ba, domin an gina shi a kan fā ne." 
Matthew7:26 Kowa ya ji maganar nan tawa, bai aikata ta kuma ba, za a misalta shi da wawan mutum, wanda ya gina gidansa a kan rairayi." 
Matthew7:27 Da ruwa ya sauko, koguna suka yi cikowa, sai iska ta taso ta bugi gidan har ya rushe, mummunar ragargajewa kuwa!”" 
Matthew7:28 Da Yesu ya gama duk wannan magana, sai taro suka yi mamakin koyarwarsa," 
Matthew7:29 domin yana koya musu da hakikancewa, ba kamar malamansu na Attaura ba." 
Matthew8:1 Da ya sauko daga dutsen, sai taro masu yawan gaske suka bi shi." 
Matthew8:2 Sai ga wani kuturu ya zo gunsa ya yi masa sujada, ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, in dai ka yarda, kana da iko ka tsarkake ni.”" 
Matthew8:3 Sai Yesu ya miƙa hannu, ya taɓa shi, ya ce, “Na yarda, ka tsarkaka.” Nan take kuturtarsa ta warke." 
Matthew8:4 Sai Yesu ya ce masa, “Ka kula fa, kada ka gaya wa kowa kome. Sai dai ka je wurin firist ya gan ka, ka kuma yi sadaka domin tabbatarwa a gare su, kamar yadda Musa ya umarta.”" 
Matthew8:5 Yana shiga Kafarnahum ke nan, sai wani jarumi ya zo gunsa ya roƙe shi," 
Matthew8:6 ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, yarona na kwance a gida, ya zama shanyayye, yana shan azaba ƙwarai.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yesu ya ce masa, “Zan zo in warkar da shi.”" 
Matthew8:8 Sai jarumin, ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ban isa har ka zo gidana ba, amma sai ka yi magana kawai, yarona kuwa zai warke." 
Matthew8:9 Don ni ma a hannun wani nake, da kuma soja a hannuna, sai in ce wa wannan, ‘Je ka,’ sai ya je, wani kuwa in ce masa, ‘Zo,’ sai ya zo, in ce wa bawana, ‘Yi abu kaza,’ sai ya yi.”" 
Matthew8:10 Da Yesu ya ji haka, sai ya yi mamaki, har ya ce wa mabiyansa, “Gaskiya, ina gaya muku, ko a cikin Isra'ila ban taɓa samun bangaskiya mai ƙarfi irin wannan ba." 
Matthew8:11 Ina kuma gaya muku, da yawa za su zo daga gabas da yamma su zauna cin abinci tare da Ibrahim, da Ishaku, da Yakubu a Mulkin Sama," 
Matthew8:12 'ya'yan Mulki kuwa sai a jefa su matsanancin duhu. Nan za su yi kuka da cizon haƙora.” 
Matthew8:13 Sai Yesu ya ce wa jarumin, “Je ka, ya zama maka gwargwadon bangaskiyar da ka yi.” Nan take yaronsa ya warke." 
Matthew8:14 Da Yesu ya shiga gidan Bitrus, sai ya ga surukar Bitrus tana kwance da zazzaɓi." 
Matthew8:15 Sai ya taɓa hannunta, zazzaɓin ya sake ta, ta kuma tashi ta yi masa hidima." 
Matthew8:16 Da maraice ya yi, sai suka kakkawo masa masu aljannu da yawa. Da magana kawai ya fitar da aljannun, ya kuma warkar da dukan marasa lafiya." 
Matthew8:17 Wannan kuwa domin a cika faɗar Annabi Ishaya ne cewa, “Da kansa ya ɗebe rashin lafiyarmu, ya ɗauke cucecucenmu.”" 
Matthew8:18 To, da Yesu ya ga taro masu yawan gaske sun kewaye shi, sai ya yi umarni a koma wancan hayi." 
Matthew8:19 Sai wani malamin Attaura ya zo ya ce masa, “Malam, zan bi ka duk inda za ka je.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yesu ya ce masa, “Yanyawa da ramummukansu, tsuntsaye kuma da sheƙunan, amma Ɗan Mutum ba shi da wurin shaƙatawa.”" 
Matthew8:21 Sai ɗaya daga almajiran ya ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, ka bar ni tukuna in je in binne tsohona.”" 
Matthew8:22 Amma Yesu ya ce masa, “Bi ni. Bari matattu su binne 'yan'uwansu matattu.”" 
Matthew8:23 Da ya shiga jirgi, almajiransa suka bi shi." 
Matthew8:24 Sai ga wani babban hadiri ya taso a teku, har raƙuman ruwa suka fara shan kan jirgin, amma yana barci." 
Matthew8:25 Sai almajiransa suka je suka tashe shi, suka ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ka cece mu, za mu hallaka!”" 
Matthew8:26 Ya ce musu, “Don me kuka firgita haka, ya ku masu ƙarancin bangaskiya?” Sa'an nan ya tashi, ya tsawata wa iskar da ruwan. Sai wurin duk ya yi tsit!" 
Matthew8:27 Mutanen suka yi al'ajabi, suka ce, “Wane irin mutum ne wannan, wanda har iska da ruwan teku ma suke masa biyayya?”" 
Matthew8:28 Da ya isa wancan hayi a ƙasar Garasinawa, mutum biyu masu aljannu suka fito daga makabarta suka tarye shi. Don kuwa su abin tsoro ne ƙwarai, har ba mai iya bi ta wannan hanya." 
Matthew8:29 Sai suka ƙwala ihu suka ce, “Ina ruwanka da mu, kai Ɗan Allah? Ka zo nan ne ka yi mana azaba tun kafin lokaci ya yi?”" 
Matthew8:30 Nesa kuma kaɗan akwai wani babban garken alade na kiwo. 
Matthew8:31 Sai aljannun suka roƙe shi, suka ce, “In ka fitar da mu, tura mu cikin garken aladen nan.”" 
Matthew8:32 Ya ce musu, “To, ku je.” Sai suka fita, suka shiga aladen. Sai kuwa duk garken suka rugungunta ta gangaren, suka faɗa tekun, suka hallaka a ruwa." 
Matthew8:33 Masu kiwon aladen suka gudu, suka shiga gari, suka yi ta ba da labarin kome da kome, da kuma abin da ya auku ga masu aljannun." 
Matthew8:34 Sai ga duk jama'ar garin sun firfito su taryi Yesu. Da suka gan shi, sai suka roƙe shi ya bar musu ƙasarsu." 
Matthew9:1 Da ya shiga jirgi, ya haye ya je garinsu." 
Matthew9:2 Sai aka kawo masa wani shanyayye, kwance a gado. Da Yesu ya ga bangaskiyarsu, sai ya ce wa shanyayyen, “Ɗana, ka yi farin ciki, an gafarta maka zunubanka.”" 
Matthew9:3 Sai waɗansu malaman Attaura suka ce a ransu, “Wannan mutum, ai, saɓo yake!”" 
Matthew9:4 Yesu kuwa, da yake ya san tunaninsu, ya ce, “Don me kuke mugun tunani a zuciyarku?" 
Matthew9:5 Wanne ya fi sauƙi, a ce, ‘An gafarta maka zunubanka,’ ko kuwa a ce, ‘Tashi ka yi tafiya’?" 
Matthew9:6 Amma domin ku sakankance Ɗan Mutum yana da ikon gafarta zunubi a duniya”–sai ya ce wa shanyayyen–“Tashi, ka ɗauki shimfiɗarka ka tafi gida.”" 
Matthew9:7 Shi kuwa ya tashi ya tafi gida. 
Matthew9:8 Da taron suka ga haka, sai tsoro ya kama su, suka ɗaukaka Allah, wanda ya ba mutane iko haka." 
Matthew9:9 Da Yesu ya yi gaba, ya ga wani mutum mai suna Matiyu a zaune, yana aiki a wurin karɓar haraji. Ya ce masa, “Bi ni.” Sai ya tashi ya bi shi." 
Matthew9:10 Sa'ad da kuwa Yesu yake cin abinci a gida, sai ga masu karɓar haraji da masu zunubi da yawa sun zo, sun zauna tare da shi da almajiransa." 
Matthew9:11 Da Farisiyawa suka ga haka, sai suka ce wa almajiransa, “Don me malaminku yake ci tare da masu karɓar haraji da masu zunubi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Amma da Yesu ya ji haka ya ce, “Ai, lafiyayyu ba ruwansu da likita, sai dai marasa lafiya." 
Matthew9:13 Sai ku fahimci ma'anar wannan tukuna, ‘Ni kam, zaman jinƙai nake nema a gare ku, ba hadaya ba.’ Ba domin in kira masu adalci na zo ba, sai dai masu zunubi.”" 
Matthew9:14 Sai almajiran Yahaya suka zo wurinsa, suka ce, “Don me mu da Farisiyawa mukan yi azumi, amma naka almajiran ba sa yi?”" 
Matthew9:15 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Abokan ango sa yi baƙin ciki tun ango yana tare da su? Ai, lokaci yana zuwa da za a ɗauke musu angon. A sa'an nan ne fa za su yi azumi." 
Matthew9:16 Ba mai mahon tsohuwar tufa da sabon ƙyalle, don mahon zai kece tsohuwar tufar, har ma ta fi dā kecewa." 
Matthew9:17 Ba kuma mai ɗura sabon ruwan inabi a tsofaffin salkuna. In ma an ɗura, sai salkunan su fashe, ruwan inabin ya zube, salkunan kuma su lalace. Sabon ruwan inabi, ai, sai sababbin salkuna. Ta haka an tserar da duka biyu ke nan.”" 
Matthew9:18 Yana cikin yi musu magana haka, sai ga wani shugaban jama'a ya zo, ya yi masa sujada, ya ce, “Yanzu yanzu 'yata ta rasu, amma ka zo ka ɗora mata hannu, za ta rayu.”" 
Matthew9:19 Sai Yesu ya tashi, ya bi shi tare da almajiransa." 
Matthew9:20 Ga kuma wata mace wadda ta shekara goma sha biyu tana zub da jini, ta raɓo ta bayansa, ta taɓa gezar mayafinsa," 
Matthew9:21 domin ta ce a ranta, “Ko da mayafinsa ma na taɓa, sai in warke.”" 
Matthew9:22 Sai Yesu ya juya, yă gan ta, ya ce, “'Yata, ki yi farin ciki, bangaskiyarki ta warkar da ke.” Nan take matar ta warke." 
Matthew9:23 Da Yesu ya isa gidan shugaban jama'ar, ya kuma ga masu busar sarewa da taro suna ta hayaniya," 
Matthew9:24 sai ya ce, “Ku ba da wuri, ai, yarinyar ba matacciya take ba, barci take yi.” Sai suka yi masa dariyar raini." 
Matthew9:25 Amma da aka fitar da taron waje, ya shiga ya kama hannunta, sai kuwa yarinyar ta tashi." 
Matthew9:26 Wannan labarin kuwa ya bazu a duk ƙasar. 
Matthew9:27 Da Yesu ya yi gaba daga nan, sai waɗansu makafi biyu suka bi shi, suna ɗaga murya suna cewa, “Ya Ɗan Dawuda, ka ji tausayinmu.”" 
Matthew9:28 Da ya shiga wani gida sai makafin suka zo gare shi. Yesu ya ce musu, “Kun gaskata ina da ikon yin haka?” Sai suka ce masa, “I, ya Ubangiji!”" 
Matthew9:29 Sa'an nan ya taɓa idanunsu, ya ce, “Yă zama muku gwargwadon bangaskiyarku.”" 
Matthew9:30 Sai idanunsu suka buɗe. Amma Yesu ya kwaɓe su ƙwarai, ya ce, “Kada fa kowa ya ji labarin.”" 
Matthew9:31 Amma suka tafi suka yi ta baza labarinsa a duk ƙasar. 
Matthew9:32 Sun tashi ke nan, sai aka kawo masa wani bebe mai aljan." 
Matthew9:33 Bayan an fitar da aljanin, sai beben ya yi magana, taron kuwa suka yi mamaki, suka ce, “Kai! Ba a taɓa ganin irin wannan a cikin Isra'ila ba.”" 
Matthew9:34 Amma sai Farisiyawa suka ce, “Ai, da ikon sarkin aljannu yake fitar da aljannu.”" 
Matthew9:35 Sai Yesu ya zazzaga dukan garuruwa da ƙauyuka, yana koyarwa a majami'unsu, yana yin bisharar Mulkin Allah, yana kuma warkar da kowace irin cuta da rashin lafiya." 
Matthew9:36 Amma da ya ga taro masu yawa sai ya ji tausayinsu, domin suna shan wahala, suna nan a warwatse kamar tumaki da ba makiyayi." 
Matthew9:37 Sai ya ce wa almajiransa, “Girbin yana da yawa, amma masu yinsa kaɗan ne." 
Matthew9:38 Saboda haka ku roƙi Ubangijin girbin ya turo masu girbi, su yi masa girbi.”" 
Matthew10:1 Sai ya kira almajiransa goma sha biyu, ya kuma ba su ikon fitar da baƙaƙen aljannu, su warkar da kowace irin cuta da rashin lafiya." 
Matthew10:2 To, ga sunayen manzannin nan goma sha biyu. Da fari, Saminu, wanda ake kira Bitrus, da ɗan'uwansa Andarawas, da Yakubu ɗan Zabadi, da ɗan'uwansa Yahaya," 
Matthew10:3 da Filibus, da Bartalamawas, da Toma, da Matiyu mai karɓar haraji, da Yakubu ɗan Halfa, da Yahuza," 
Matthew10:4 da Saminu Bakan'ane, da kuma Yahuza Iskariyoti wanda ya bashe shi." 
Matthew10:5 Su sha biyun nan ne Yesu ya aika, ya yi musu umarni, ya ce, “Kada ku shiga ƙasar al'ummai, ko kuma kowane garin Samariyawa." 
Matthew10:6 Sai dai ku je wurin batattun tumakin jama'ar Isra'ila,Irm" 
Matthew10:7 kuna tafiya, kuna wa'azi, kuna cewa, ‘Mulkin Sama ya kusato.’" 
Matthew10:8 Ku warkar da marasa lafiya, ku ta da matattu, ku tsarkake kutare, ku kuma fitar da aljannu. Kyauta kuka samu, ku kuma bayar kyauta." 
Matthew10:9 Kada ku riƙi kuɗin zinariya, ko na azurfa, ko na tagulla a ɗamararku," 
Matthew10:10 kada kuma ku ɗauki burgami a tafiyarku, ko taguwa biyu, ko takalma, ko sanda, don ma'aikaci ya cancanci hakkinsa." 
Matthew10:11 Duk gari ko ƙauyen da kuka shiga, ku nemi mai mutunci a cikinsa, ku kuma baƙunce shi har ku tashi." 
Matthew10:12 In za ku shiga gidan ku ce, ‘Salama alaiku.’" 
Matthew10:13 In gidan na kirki ne, salamarku tă tabbata a gare shi. In kuwa ba na kirki ba ne, to, tă komo muku." 
Matthew10:14 Kowa kuma ya ƙi yin na'am da ku, ko kuwa ya ƙi sauraron maganarku, da fitarku gidan ko garin, sai ku karkaɗe ƙurar ƙafafunku." 
Matthew10:15 Hakika, ina gaya muku, a Ranar Shari'a za a fi haƙurce wa ƙasar Saduma da ta Gwamrata a kan garin nan.”" 
Matthew10:16 “Ga shi, na aike ku kamar tumaki a tsakiyar kyarketai. Don haka sai ku zama masu azanci kamar macizai, da kuma marasa ɓarna kamar kurciyoyi." 
Matthew10:17 Ku yi hankali da mutane, don za su kai ku gaban majalisa, su kuma yi muku bulala a majami'arsu." 
Matthew10:18 Za su kuma ja ku gaban mahukunta da sarakuna saboda ni, domin ku ba da shaida a gabansu, a gaban al'ummai kuma." 
Matthew10:19 A lokacin da suka ba da ku, kada ku damu da yadda za ku yi magana, ko kuwa abin da za ku faɗa, domin za a ba ku abin da za ku faɗa a lokacin." 
Matthew10:20 Domin ba ku ne kuke magana ba, Ruhun Ubanku ne yake magana ta bakinku." 
Matthew10:21 'Dan'uwa zai ba da ɗan'uwansa a kashe shi, uba kuwa ɗansa. 'Ya'ya kuma za su tayar wa iyayensu, har su sa a kashe su." 
Matthew10:22 Kowa kuma zai ƙi ku saboda sunana. Amma duk wanda ya jure har ƙarshe, zai cetu." 
Matthew10:23 In sun tsananta muku a wannan gari, ku gudu zuwa na gaba. Gaskiya, ina gaya muku, kafin ku gama zazzaga dukan garuruwan Isra'ila, Ɗan Mutum zai zo." 
Matthew10:24 “Almajiri ba ya fin malaminsa, bawa kuma ba ya fin ubangijinsa." 
Matthew10:25 Ya isa wa almajiri ya zama kamar malaminsa, bawa kuma kamar ubangijinsa. In har sun kira maigida Ba'alzabul, to, mutanen gidansa kuma fa?”" 
Matthew10:26 “Don haka kada ku ji tsoronsu, domin ba abin da yake a rufe da ba zai tonu ba, ko kuwa abin da yake ɓoye da ba za a bayyana ba." 
Matthew10:27 Abin da nake gaya muku a asirce, ku faɗa a sarari. Abin da kuma kuka ji a raɗe, ku yi shelarsa daga kan soraye." 
Matthew10:28 Kada ku ji tsoron masu kisan mutum, amma ba sa iya kashe kurwarsa. Sai dai ku ji tsoron wannan da yake da ikon hallaka kurwar da jikin duka a Gidan Wuta." 
Matthew10:29 Ashe, ba gwara biyu ne kobo ba? Ba kuwa ɗayarsu da za ta mutu, ba da yardar Ubanku ba." 
Matthew10:30 Ai, ko da gashin kanku ma duk a ƙidaye yake." 
Matthew10:31 Kada ku ji tsoro. Ai, martabarku ta fi ta gwara masu yawa.”" 
Matthew10:32 “Kowa ya bayyana yarda a gare ni a gaban mutane, ni ma zan bayyana yarda a gare shi a gaban Ubana da yake cikin Sama." 
Matthew10:33 Duk wanda kuwa ya yi musun sanina a gaban mutane, ni ma zan yi musun saninsa a gaban Ubanmu da yake cikin Sama.”" 
Matthew10:34 “Kada dai ku zaci na zo ne in kawo salama a duniya. A'a, ban zo domin in kawo salama ba, sai dai takobi." 
Matthew10:35 Domin na zo ne in haɗa mutum da ubansa gāba, 'ya da uwatata, matar ɗa kuma da surukarta." 
Matthew10:36 Zai zamana kuma magabtan mutum su ne mutanen gidansa. 
Matthew10:37 Wanda duk ya fi son ubansa ko uwarsa fiye da ni, bai cancanci zama nawa ba. Wanda kuma ya fi son ɗansa ko 'yarsa fiye da ni, bai cancanci zama nawa ba." 
Matthew10:38 Wanda kuma bai ɗauki gicciyensa ya bi ni ba, bai cancanci zama nawa ba." 
Matthew10:39 Duk mai son adana ransa, zai rasa shi. Duk kuwa wanda ya rasa ransa saboda ni, adana shi yake yi.”" 
Matthew10:40 “Wanda ya yi na'am da ku, ya yi na'am da ni ke nan. Wanda ya yi na'am da ni kuwa, to, ya yi na'am da wanda ya aiko ni." 
Matthew10:41 Wanda ya yi na'am da wani annabi domin shi annabi ne, zai sami ladar annabi. Wanda kuma ya yi na'am da adali domin shi adali ne, zai sami ladar adali." 
Matthew10:42 Kowa ya ba ɗaya daga cikin 'yan yaran nan, ko da moɗa guda ta baƙin ruwa, kan shi almajirina ne, hakika, ina gaya muku, ba zai rasa ladarsa ba.”" 
Matthew11:1 Da Yesu ya gama yi wa almajiransa sha biyun nan umarni, sai ya ci gaba daga nan domin ya koyar, yă kuma yi wa'azi a garuruwansu." 
Matthew11:2 To, da Yahaya ya ji a kurkuku labarin ayyukan Almasihu, sai ya aiki almajiransa," 
Matthew11:3 su ce masa, “Kai ne mai zuwan nan, ko kuwa mu sa ido ga wani?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ku je ku gaya wa Yahaya abin da kuka ji, da abin da kuka gani." 
Matthew11:5 Makafi suna samun gani, guragu suna tafiya, ana tsarkake kutare, kurame suna ji, ana ta da matattu, ana kuma yi wa matalauta bishara." 
Matthew11:6 Albarka tā tabbata ga wanda ba ya tuntuɓe sabili da ni.” 
Matthew11:7 Sun tafi ke nan, sai Yesu ya fara yi wa taro maganar Yahaya, ya ce, “Kallon me kuka je yi a jeji? Kyauron da iska take kaɗawa?" 
Matthew11:8 To, kallon me kuka fita? Wani mai adon alharini? Ai kuwa, masu adon alharini a fada suke." 
Matthew11:9 To, don me kuka fita? Ku ga wani annabi? I, lalle kuwa, har ya fi annabi nesa." 
Matthew11:10 Wannan shi ne wanda labarinsa yake rubuce cewa, ‘Ga shi, na aiko manzona ya riga ka gaba, Wanda zai shirya maka hanya gabanninka.’" 
Matthew11:11 Hakika ina gaya muku, a cikin duk waɗanda mata suka haifa, ba wanda ya bayyana da ya fi Yahaya Maibaftisma girma. Duk da haka, wanda ya fi ƙanƙanta a Mulkin Sama ya fi shi." 
Matthew11:12 Tun daga zamanin Yahaya Maibaftisma har ya zuwa yanzu, Mulkin Sama yana shan kutse, masu kutsawa kuwa sukan riske shi." 
Matthew11:13 Domin dukan annabawa da Attaura sun yi annabci har ya zuwa kan Yahaya. 
Matthew11:14 In kuma za ku karɓa, shi ne Iliya da dā ma zai zo." 
Matthew11:15 Duk mai kunnen ji, yă ji." 
Matthew11:16 “To, da me zan kwatanta zamanin nan? Kamar yara ne da suke zaune a kasuwa, suna kiran abokan wasansu, suna cewa," 
Matthew11:17 ‘Mun busa muku sarewa, ba ku yi rawa ba, Mun yi makoki, ba ku yi kuka ba!’" 
Matthew11:18 “Ga shi, Yahaya ya zo, ya ƙi ciye-ciye da shaye-shaye, sai suka ce, ‘Ai, yana da iska.’" 
Matthew11:19 Ga Ɗan Mutum ya zo, yana ci yana sha, sai suka ce, ‘Ga mai haɗama, mashayi, abokin masu karɓar haraji da masu zunubi!’ Duk da haka hikimar Allah, ta aikinta ne ake tabbatar da gaskiyarta.”" 
Matthew11:20 Sai ya fara tsawata wa garuruwan da ya yi yawancin ayyukansa na al'ajabi a cikinsu, don ba su tuba ba." 
Matthew11:21 “Kaitonki, Korasinu! Kaitonki, Betsaida! Da mu'ujizan da aka yi a cikinku, su aka yi a Taya da Sidon, da tuni sun tuba, suna sanye da tsumma, suna hurwa da toka." 
Matthew11:22 Amma ina gaya muku, a Ranar Shari'a, za a fi haƙurce wa Taya da Sidon a kanku." 
Matthew11:23 Ke kuma Kafarnahum, ɗaukaka ki sama za a yi? A'a, ƙasƙantar da ke za a yi, har Hades. Da mu'ujizan da aka yi a cikinki, su aka yi a Saduma, da ta wanzu har ya zuwa yau." 
Matthew11:24 Amma ina gaya muku, a Ranar Shari'a, za a fi haƙurce wa Saduma a kanki.”" 
Matthew11:25 A wannan lokaci sai Yesu ya ce, “Na gode maka ya Uba, Ubangijin Sama da ƙasa, domin ka ɓoye waɗannan al'amura ga masu hikima da masu basira, ka kuma bayyana su ga jahilai." 
Matthew11:26 Hakika na gode maka ya Uba, domin wannan shi ne nufinka na alheri." 
Matthew11:27 Kowane abu Ubana ne ya mallakar mini. Ba kuwa wanda ya san Ɗan sai dai Uban, ba kuma wanda ya san Uban sai Ɗan, da kuma wanda Ɗan ya so ya bayyana wa." 
Matthew11:28 Ku zo gare ni dukanku masu wahala, masu fama da kaya, ni kuwa zan hutasshe ku." 
Matthew11:29 Ku shiga bautata, ku kuma koya a gare ni, domin ni mai tawali'u ne, marar girmankai, za ku kuwa sami kwanciyar rai." 
Matthew11:30 Domin bautata sassauƙa ce, kayana kuma marar nauyi ne.”" 
Matthew12:1 A lokacin nan a ran Asabar, Yesu yana ratsa gonakin alkama. Almajiransa kuwa suna jin yunwa, sai suka fara zagar alkamar suna ci." 
Matthew12:2 Amma da Farisiyawa suka ga haka, suka ce masa, “Ka ga! Almajiranka suna yin abin da bai halatta a yi ran Asabar ba.”" 
Matthew12:3 Sai ya ce musu, “Ashe, ba ku taɓa karanta abin da Dawuda ya yi ba sa'ad da ya ji yunwa, shi da abokan tafiyarsa?" 
Matthew12:4 Yadda ya shiga Ɗakin Allah ya ci keɓaɓɓiyar gurasar nan, wadda bai halatta ya ci ba, ko abokan tafiyarsa ma su ci ba, sai dai firistoci kaɗai?" 
Matthew12:5 Ko kuwa ba ku taɓa karantawa a Attaura ba, yadda a ran Asabar, firistoci a Haikalin sukan keta dokar Asabar, ba tare da yin wani laifi ba kuwa?" 
Matthew12:6 Ina dai gaya muku, ga wanda ya fi Haikali a nan." 
Matthew12:7 Da kun san ma'anar wannan cewa, ‘Ni kam, zaman jinƙai nake nema a gare ku, ba hadaya ba’, da ba ku ga laifin marasa laifi ba." 
Matthew12:8 Domin Ɗan Mutum shi ne Ubangijin Asabar.” 
Matthew12:9 Sai ya ci gaba daga nan ya shiga majami'arsu. 
Matthew12:10 Akwai wani mutum a nan kuwa mai shanyayyen hannu. Sai suka tambayi Yesu, suka ce, “Ya halatta a warkar a ran Asabar?” Wannan kuwa don su samu su kai ƙararsa ne." 
Matthew12:11 Ya ce musu, “Misali, wane ne a cikinku in yana da tunkiya, ta faɗa a rami ran Asabar, ba zai kama ta ya fitar da ita ba?" 
Matthew12:12 Sau nawa mutum ya fi tunkiya daraja? Domin haka ya halatta a yi alheri a ran Asabar.” 
Matthew12:13 Sa'an nan ya ce wa mutumin, “Miƙo hannunka.” Ya miƙa. Sai ya koma lafiyayye kamar ɗayan." 
Matthew12:14 Amma Farisiyawa suka fita, suka yi shawara a kansa, yadda za su hallaka shi." 
Matthew12:15 Da Yesu ya gane haka, ya tashi daga nan. Sai jama'a da yawa suka bi shi, ya kuwa warkar da su duka." 
Matthew12:16 Sai ya kwaɓe su, kada su bayyana shi." 
Matthew12:17 Wannan kuwa domin a cika faɗar Annabi Ishaya ne cewa," 
Matthew12:18 “Ga barana wanda na zaɓa! Ƙaunataccena, wanda nake farin ciki da shi ƙwarai. Zan sa masa Ruhuna, zai kuma sanar da al'ummai hanyar gaskiya." 
Matthew12:19 Ba zai yi husuma ko magana sama sama ba, Ba kuma wanda zai ji muryarsa tasa a titi." 
Matthew12:20 Kyauron da ya tanƙwasa ba zai kakkarye shi ba, Fitilar da ta yi kusan mutuwa ba zai kashe ta ba, Har ya sa gaskiya ta ci nasara." 
Matthew12:21 Al'ummai kuma za su sa zuciya ga sunansa.” 
Matthew12:22 Sai aka kawo masa wani beben makaho mai aljan, ya kuwa warkar da shi, har beben ya yi magana, ya kuma gani." 
Matthew12:23 Mutane duk suka yi al'ajabi, suka ce, “Shin, ko wannan shi ne Ɗan Dawuda?”" 
Matthew12:24 Amma da Farisiyawa suka ji haka sai suka ce, “Ai, da ikon Ba'alzabul sarkin aljannu kawai, wannan yake fitar da aljannu.”" 
Matthew12:25 Da yake Yesu ya san tunaninsu, sai ya ce musu, “Duk mulkin da ya rabu a kan gāba, zai lalace. Ba kuma gari ko gidan da ya rabu a kan gāba, yă ɗore." 
Matthew12:26 In Shaiɗan yana fitar da Shaiɗan, yā rabu a kan gāba ke nan. To, ta yaya mulkinsa zai ɗore?" 
Matthew12:27 In kuwa da ikon Ba'alzabul nake fitar da aljannu, to, 'ya'yanku fa, da ikon wa suke fitarwa? Saboda haka su ne za su zama alƙalanku." 
Matthew12:28 Ni kuwa in da ikon Ruhun Allah nake fitar da aljannu, ashe, Mulkin Allah ya zo muku ke nan." 
Matthew12:29 Yaya za a iya shiga gidan ƙaƙƙarfan mutum a washe kayansa, in ba an fara ɗaure ƙaƙƙarfan mutumin ba? Sa'an nan ne za a iya washe gidansa." 
Matthew12:30 Wanda ba nawa ba ne, gāba yake da ni. Wanda kuma ba ya taya ni tarawa, watsarwa yake yi." 
Matthew12:31 “Don haka ina gaya muku, ā gafarta wa mutane kowane zunubi da saɓo, amma wanda ya saɓi Ruhun, ba za a gafarta masa ba." 
Matthew12:32 Kowa ya aibata Ɗan Mutum, ā gafarta masa. Amma wanda ya aibata Ruhu Mai Tsarki, ba za a gafarta masa ba, duniya da lahira.”" 
Matthew12:33 “Ko dai ku ce itace kyakkyawa ne, 'ya'yansa kuma kyawawa, ko kuwa ku ce itace mummuna ne, 'ya'yansa kuma munana. Don itace, da 'ya'yansa ake gane shi." 
Matthew12:34 Ku macizai! Yaya za ku iya yin maganar kirki, alhali kuwa ku mugaye ne? Don abin da ya ci rai, shi mutum yake faɗa." 
Matthew12:35 Mutumin kirki kam, ta kyakkyawar taskar zuciya tasa yakan yi abin kirki, mugu kuwa, ta mummunar taskar zuciya tasa yakan yi mugun abu." 
Matthew12:36 Ina dai gaya muku, a Ranar Shari'a duk hululun da mutum ya yi, za a bincike shi." 
Matthew12:37 Maganarka ce za ta kuɓutar da kai, ko kuma ta hukunta ka.”" 
Matthew12:38 Waɗansu malaman Attaura da Farisiyawa suka amsa masa suka ce, “Malam, muna so mu ga wata alama daga gare ka.”" 
Matthew12:39 Sai ya amsa musu ya ce, “'Yan zamani, mugaye, maciya amana, suke nema su ga wata alama! Amma ba wata alama da za a nuna musu sai dai ta Annabi Yunusa." 
Matthew12:40 Wato, kamar yadda Yunusa ya yi kwana uku dare da rana cikin wani babban kifi, haka kuma Ɗan Mutum zai yi kwana uku dare da rana a cikin ƙasa." 
Matthew12:41 A Ranar Shari'a mutanen Nineba za su tashi tare da mutanen zamanin nan, su kā da su, don sun tuba saboda wa'azin Yunusa. Ga kuma wanda ya fi Yunusa a nan." 
Matthew12:42 A Ranar Shari'a Sarauniyar Kudu za ta tashi tare da mutanen zamanin nan, ta kā da su, don ta zo ne daga bangon duniya ta ji hikimar Sulemanu. Ga kuma wanda ya fi Sulemanu a nan." 
Matthew12:43 “Baƙin aljan in ya rabu da mutum, sai ya bi ta wurare marasa ruwa neman hutu, amma ba ya samu." 
Matthew12:44 Sa'an nan sai ya ce, ‘Zan koma gidana da na fito.’ Sa'ad da kuwa ya koma, ya tarar da gidan ba kowa a ciki, shararre, ƙawatacce." 
Matthew12:45 Daga nan ya je ya ɗebo waɗansu aljannu bakwai da suka fi shi mugunta. Sai su shiga su zauna a wurin. Wannan mutum ƙarshen zamansa ya fi na fari lalacewa. Haka zai zamar wa wannan mugun zamani.” 
Matthew12:46 Yana cikin magana da taro, sai ga Uwa tasa da 'yan'uwansa suna tsaye a waje, suna nema su yi magana da shi." 
Matthew12:47 Wani ya ce masa, “Ga tsohuwarka da 'yan'uwanka suna tsaye a waje, suna so su yi magana da kai.”" 
Matthew12:48 Sai ya amsa wa wanda ya gaya masa, ya ce, “Wace ce tsohuwata, su wane ne kuma 'yan'uwana?”" 
Matthew12:49 Sai ya miƙa hannu wajen almajiransa, ya ce, “Ga nan tsohuwata da 'yan'uwana nan!" 
Matthew12:50 Ai, kowa ya yi abin da Ubana da yake cikin Sama yake so, shi ne ɗan'uwana, shi ne 'yar'uwata, shi ne kuma tsohuwata.”" 
Matthew13:1 A ran nan Yesu ya fita daga gidan, ya je ya zauna a bakin teku." 
Matthew13:2 Taro masu yawan gaske suka haɗu a wurinsa, har ya kai shi ga shiga jirgi, ya zauna. Duk taron kuwa suka tsaya a bakin gaci." 
Matthew13:3 Sai ya gaggaya musu abubuwa da yawa da misalai, ya ce, “Wani mai shuka ya je shuka." 
Matthew13:4 Yana cikin yafa iri sai waɗansu ƙwayoyi suka faɗa a hanya, sai tsuntsaye suka zo suka tsince su." 
Matthew13:5 Waɗansu kuma suka faɗa a wuri mai duwatsu inda ba ƙasa da yawa. Nan da nan sai suka tsiro saboda rashin zurfin ƙasa. 
Matthew13:6 Da rana fa ta ɗaga, sai suka yanƙwane, da yake ba su da saiwa sosai, suka bushe." 
Matthew13:7 Waɗansu kuma suka faɗa cikin ƙaya, sai ƙaya ta tashi ta sarƙe su." 
Matthew13:8 Waɗansu kuma suka faɗa a ƙasa mai kyau, suka yi tsaba, waɗansu riɓi ɗari ɗari, waɗansu sittin sittin, waɗansu kuma talatin talatin." 
Matthew13:9 Duk mai kunnen ji, yă ji.”" 
Matthew13:10 Sai almajiran suka zo, suka ce masa, “Me ya sa kake musu magana da misalai?”" 
Matthew13:11 Ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ku kam, an yarda muku ku san asiran Mulkin Sama, amma su ba a ba su ba." 
Matthew13:12 Domin mai abu akan ƙara wa, har ya yalwata. Marar abu kuwa, ko ɗan abin da yake da shi ma, sai an karɓe masa." 
Matthew13:13 Shi ya sa nake musu magana da misalai, don ko sun duba ba sa gani, ko sun saurara ba sa ji, ba sa kuma fahimta." 
Matthew13:14 Lalle a kansu ne aka cika annabcin Ishaya cewa, ‘Za ku ji kam, amma ba za ku fahimta ba faufau, Za ku kuma gani, amma ba za ku gane ba faufau," 
Matthew13:15 Don zuciyar jama'ar nan ta yi kanta, Sun toshe kunnuwansu, Sun kuma runtse idanunsu, Don kada su gani da idanunsu, Su kuma ji da kunnuwansu, Su kuma fahimta a zuciyarsu, Har su juyo gare ni in warkar da su.’" 
Matthew13:16 Albarka tā tabbata ga idanunku domin suna gani, da kuma kunnuwanku domin suna ji." 
Matthew13:17 Hakika, ina gaya muku, annabawa da adalai da yawa sun yi ɗokin ganin abin da kuke gani, amma ba su gani ba, su kuma ji abin da kuke ji, amma ba su ji ba." 
Matthew13:18 “To, ga ma'anar misalin mai shukar nan." 
Matthew13:19 Wanda duk ya ji Maganar Mulki bai kuma fahimce ta ba, sai Mugun ya zo ya zăre abin da aka shuka a zuciyarsa. Wannan shi ne irin da ya faɗa a hanya." 
Matthew13:20 Wanda ya faɗa a wuri mai duwatsu kuwa, shi ne wanda da zarar ya ji Maganar Allah, sai ya karɓa da farin ciki." 
Matthew13:21 Amma kuwa ba shi da tushe, rashin ƙarƙo gare shi kuma, har in wani ƙunci ko tsanani ya faru saboda Maganar, sai ya yi tuntuɓe." 
Matthew13:22 Wanda ya faɗa cikin ƙaya kuwa, shi ne wanda ya ji Maganar, amma taraddadin duniya da jarabar dukiya sukan sarƙe Maganar, har ta zama marar amfani." 
Matthew13:23 Wanda aka shuka a ƙasa mai kyau kuwa, shi ne wanda yake jin Maganar, ya kuma fahimce ta. Hakika shi ne mai yin amfani har ya yi albarka, wani riɓi ɗari, wani sittin, wani kuma talatin.”" 
Matthew13:24 Ya kawo musu wani misali kuma, ya ce, “Za a kwatanta Mulkin Sama da mutumin da ya yafa iri mai kyau a gonarsa." 
Matthew13:25 Sa'ad da mutane suke barci, sai anokin gābansa ya je ya yafa irin wata ciyawa a cikin alkamar, ya tafi abinsa." 
Matthew13:26 Da shukar ta tashi, ta yi ƙwaya, sai ciyawar ta bayyana." 
Matthew13:27 Sai bayin maigidan suka zo, suka ce masa, ‘Maigida, ashe, ba kyakkyawan iri ka yafa a gonarka ba? To, ta yaya ke nan ta yi ciyawa?’" 
Matthew13:28 Sai ya ce musu, ‘Wani magabci ne ya yi wannan aiki.’ Bayin suka ce masa, ‘To, kana so mu je mu cire mu tara ta?’" 
Matthew13:29 Amma ya ce, ‘A'a, kada garin cire ciyawar ku tumɓuke har da alkamar ma." 
Matthew13:30 Ku bari su zauna tare har lokacin yanka. A lokacin yanka kuma zan gaya wa masu yankan su fara yanke ciyawar su tara, su ɗaure dami dami a ƙone, alkamar kuwa su taro ta su sa a taskata.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Ya kawo musu wani misali, ya ce, “Mulkin Sama kamar ƙwayar mastad yake, wadda wani mutum ya je ya shuka a lambunsa." 
Matthew13:32 Ita ce mafi ƙanƙanta a cikin ƙwayoyi, amma in ta girma, sai ta fi duk sauran ganyaye, har ta zama itace, har ma tsuntsaye su zo su yi sheƙarsu a rassanta.”" 
Matthew13:33 Ya kuma ba su wani misali, ya ce, “Mulkin Sama kamar yisti yake, wanda wata mace ta ɗauka ta cuɗe da mudu uku na garin alkama, har duk garin ya game da yistin.”" 
Matthew13:34 Yesu ya gaya wa taro duk waɗannan abubuwa da misalai. Ba ya faɗa musu kome sai da misali. 
Matthew13:35 Wannan kuwa domin a cika faɗar Annabi Ishaya ne cewa, “Zan yi magana da misalai, Zan sanar da abin da yake ɓoye tun farkon duniya.”" 
Matthew13:36 Sai ya bar taron, ya shiga gida. Almajiransa kuma suka zo gare shi, suka ce, “Ka fassara mana misalin nan na ciyawa a gonar.”" 
Matthew13:37 Ya amsa ya ce, “Mai yafa kyakkyawan irin nan, shi ne Ɗan Mutum." 
Matthew13:38 Gonar kuwa ita ce duniya, kyakkyawan irin nan, su ne 'ya'yan Mulkin Allah, ciyawar kuwa, 'ya'yan Mugun ne." 
Matthew13:39 Magabcin nan da ya yafa ta kuwa, Iblis ne. Lokacin yankan kuwa, ƙarshen duniya ne, masu yankan kuma, mala'iku ne." 
Matthew13:40 Kamar yadda ake tara ciyawa a ƙone ta, haka zai kasance a ƙarshen duniya." 
Matthew13:41 Ɗan Mutum zai aiko mala'ikunsa, za su tattaro duk masu sa mutane laifi, da kuma duk masu yin mugun aiki, su fitar da su daga Mulkinsa," 
Matthew13:42 su kuma jefa su cikin wuta mai ruruwa. Nan za su yi kuka da cizon haƙora. 
Matthew13:43 Sa'an nan ne masu adalci za su haskaka kamar rana a Mulkin Ubansu. Duk mai kunnen ji, yă ji.”" 
Matthew13:44 “Mulkin Sama kamar dukiya yake da take binne a gona, wadda wani ya samu, ya sāke binnewa. Yana tsaka da murna tasa, sai ya je ya sayar da dukan mallaka tasa, ya sayi gonar.”" 
Matthew13:45 “Har wa yau kuma Mulkin Sama kamar attajiri yake, mai neman lu'ulu'u masu daraja." 
Matthew13:46 Da ya sami lu'ulu'u ɗaya mai tamanin gaske, sai ya je ya sai da dukan mallaka tasa, ya saye shi.”" 
Matthew13:47 “Har wa yau kuma Mulkin Sama kamar taru yake da aka jefa a teku, ya kamo kifi iri iri." 
Matthew13:48 Da ya cika, aka jawo shi gaci, aka zauna, aka tsince kyawawan kifi, aka zuba a goruna, munanan kuwa aka watsar." 
Matthew13:49 Haka zai kasance a ƙarshen duniya. Mala'iku za su fito, su ware mugaye daga masu adalci," 
Matthew13:50 su jefa su cikin wuta mai ruruwa. Nan za su yi kuka da cizon hakora.” 
Matthew13:51 “Kun fahimci duk wannan?” Suka ce masa, “I.”" 
Matthew13:52 Sai ya ce musu, “To, duk malamin Attaura da ya zama almajirin Mulkin Sama, kamar maigida yake, wanda ya ɗebo dukiya sabuwa da tsohuwa daga taskarsa.”" 
Matthew13:53 Da Yesu ya gama waɗannan misalai, sai ya tashi daga nan." 
Matthew13:54 Da ya zo garinsu, ya koya musu a majami'arsu, har suka yi mamaki, suka ce, “Daga ina mutumin nan ya sami wannan hikima haka, da kuma mu'ujizan nan?" 
Matthew13:55 Ashe, wannan ba ɗan masassaƙin nan ba ne? Uwa tasa ba sunanta Maryamu ba? 'Yan'uwansa kuwa ba su ne Yakubu, da Yusufu, da Saminu, da kuma Yahuza ba?" 
Matthew13:56 'Yan'uwansa mata ba duk tare da mu suke ba? To a ina ne mutumin nan ya sami waɗannan abu duka?” 
Matthew13:57 Sai suka yi tuntuɓe sabili da shi. Amma Yesu ya ce musu, “Ai, annabi ba ya rasa girma sai dai a garinsu da kuma a gidansu.”" 
Matthew13:58 Bai kuma yi mu'ujizai masu yawa a can ba, saboda rashin bangaskiyarsu." 
Matthew14:1 A lokacin nan sarki Hirudus ya ji labarin shaharar Yesu. 
Matthew14:2 Sai ya ce wa barorinsa, “Wannan, ai, Yahaya Maibaftisma ne, shi aka tasa daga matattu, shi ya sa mu'ujizan nan suke aiki ta wurinsa.”" 
Matthew14:3 Don dā ma Hirudus ya kama Yahaya ya ɗaure shi, ya sa shi kurkuku saboda Hirudiya, matar ɗan'uwansa Filibus." 
Matthew14:4 Don dā ma Yahaya ya ce masa bai halatta ya zauna da ita ba. 
Matthew14:5 Ko da yake yana son kashe shi, yana jin tsoron jama'a, don sun ɗauka shi annabi ne." 
Matthew14:6 To, da ranar haihuwar Hirudus ta kewayo, sai 'yar Hirudiya ta yi rawa a gaban taron, har ta gamshi Hirudus," 
Matthew14:7 har ma ya yi mata rantsuwa zai ba ta duk abin da ta roƙa. 
Matthew14:8 Amma da uwa tasa ta zuga ta, sai ta ce, “A ba ni kan Yahaya Maibaftisma a cikin akushi yanzu yanzu.”" 
Matthew14:9 Sai sarki ya yi baƙin ciki, amma saboda rantsuwa tasa da kuma baƙinsa, ya yi umarni a ba ta." 
Matthew14:10 Ya aika aka fille wa Yahaya kai a kurkuku," 
Matthew14:11 aka kuwa kawo kan a cikin akushi, aka ba yarinyar, ita kuma ta kai wa uwa tasa." 
Matthew14:12 Almajiransa suka zo suka ɗauki gangar jikin, suka binne, suka kuma je suka gaya wa Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Da Yesu ya ji haka sai ya tashi daga nan, ya shiga jirgi zuwa wani wuri inda ba kowa, domin ya kaɗaita. Amma da taron jama'a suka ji haka, suka fito daga garuruwa suka bi shi da ƙafa." 
Matthew14:14 Da ya fita daga jirgin ya ga babban taron mutane. Sai ya ji tausayinsu, ya kuma warkar da marasa lafiya a cikinsu." 
Matthew14:15 Da maraice ya yi, almajiransa suka zo gare shi, suka ce, “Wurin nan fa ba kowa, ga shi kuwa, rana ta sunkuya. Sai ka sallami taron, su tafi ƙauyuka su saya wa kansu abinci.”" 
Matthew14:16 Yesu ya ce, “Ba lalle su tafi ba. Ku ku ba su abinci mana.”" 
Matthew14:17 Sai suka ce masa, “Ai, gurasa biyar da kifi biyu kawai muke da su a nan.”" 
Matthew14:18 Sai ya ce, “Ku kawo mini su.”" 
Matthew14:19 Sa'an nan ya umarci taron su zazzauna a ɗanyar ciyawa. Da ya ɗauki gurasa biyar ɗin da kifi biyun, sai ya ɗaga kai sama, ya yi wa Allah godiya, ya gutsuttsura gurasar, ya yi ta ba almajiransa, almajiran kuma suna bai wa jama'a." 
Matthew14:20 Duka kuwa suka ci suka ƙoshi, har suka kwashe ragowar gutsattsarin, cike da kwando goma sha biyu." 
Matthew14:21 Waɗanda suka ci kuwa misalin maza dubu biyar ne banda mata da yara. 
Matthew14:22 Sai ya sa almajiransa suka shiga jirgi su riga shi hayewa kafin ya sallami taron. 
Matthew14:23 Bayan ya sallami taron, ya hau dutse shi kaɗai domin ya yi addu'a. Har magariba ta yi yana can shi kaɗai." 
Matthew14:24 Sa'an nan kuwa jirgin yana tsakiyar teku, raƙuman ruwa mangara tasa, gama iska tana gāba da su." 
Matthew14:25 Wajen ƙarfe uku na dare sai Yesu ya nufo su, yana tafe a kan ruwan tekun." 
Matthew14:26 Sa'ad da kuwa almajiran suka gan shi yana tafiya a kan ruwan, sai suka firgita suka ce, “Fatalwa ce!” Suka yi kururuwa don tsoro." 
Matthew14:27 Sai nan da nan ya yi musu magana ya ce, “Ba kome, Ni ne, kada ku ji tsoro.”" 
Matthew14:28 Sai Bitrus ya amsa ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, in kai ne, to, ka umarce ni in zo gare ka a kan ruwan.”" 
Matthew14:29 Ya ce, “Zo mana.” Sai Bitrus ya fita daga jirgin, ya taka ruwa ya nufi gun Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Amma da ya ga iska ta yi ƙarfi sai ya ji tsoro. Da ya fara nutsewa sai ya yi kururuwa, ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ka cece ni!”" 
Matthew14:31 Nan da nan Yesu ya miƙa hannu ya kamo shi, ya ce masa, “Ya kai mai ƙarancin bangaskiya, don me ka yi shakka?”" 
Matthew14:32 Da shigarsu jirgin iska ta kwanta. 
Matthew14:33 Na cikin jirgin suka yi masa sujada, suka ce, “Hakika kai Ɗan Allah ne.”" 
Matthew14:34 Da suka haye, suka sauka a ƙasar Janisarata." 
Matthew14:35 Da mutanen garin suka shaida shi, sai suka aika ko'ina a duk karkarar, aka kakkawo masa dukan marasa lafiya," 
Matthew14:36 suka roƙe shi su taɓa ko da gezar mayafinsa ma, iyakar waɗanda suka taɓa kuwa suka warke." 
Matthew15:1 Waɗansu Farisiyawa da malaman Attaura suka zo wurin Yesu daga Urushalima, suka ce," 
Matthew15:2 “Don me almajiranka suke keta al'adun shugabanni? Domin ba sa wanke hannu kafin su ci abinci.” 
Matthew15:3 Sai ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ku kuma don me kuke keta umarnin Allah saboda al'adunku?" 
Matthew15:4 Domin Allah ya yi umarni ya ce, ‘Ka girmama mahaifinka da mahaifiyarka,’ kuma ‘Wanda ya zagi ubansa ko uwa tasa lalle a kashe shi.’" 
Matthew15:5 Amma ku kukan ce, ‘Kowa ya ce wa ubansa ko uwa tasa, “Duk abin da dā za ku samu a gare ni an ba Allah,” to, ba lalle ya girmama ubansa ba ke nan.’" 
Matthew15:6 Wato, saboda al'adunku kun bazanta Maganar Allah." 
Matthew15:7 Ku munafukai! Daidai ne Ishaya ya yi annabci a kanku, da ya ce," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Al'ummar nan a baka kawai suke girmama ni, Amma a zuci nesa suke da ni." 
Matthew15:9 A banza suke bauta mini, Don ka'idodin da suke koyarwa umarnin ɗan adam ne.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Ya kira taro ya ce musu, “Ku saurara, ku fahimta." 
Matthew15:11 Ba abin da yake shiga mutum ta baka ne yake ƙazanta shi ba, abin da yake fita ta baka yake ƙazanta mutum.”" 
Matthew15:12 Sai almajiran suka zo suka ce masa, “Ka san Farisiyawa sun ji haushi da suka ji maganan nan?”" 
Matthew15:13 Ya amsa ya ce, “Duk dashen da ba Ubana da yake Sama ne ya dasa ba, za a tumɓuke shi." 
Matthew15:14 Ƙyale su kawai, makafin jagora ne. In kuwa makaho ya yi wa makaho jagora, ai, duk biyu sai su faɗa a rami.”" 
Matthew15:15 Amma Bitrus ya ce masa, “A yi mana fassarar misalin nan.”" 
Matthew15:16 Yesu ya ce, “Ku ma, ashe, har yanzu ba ku fahimta?" 
Matthew15:17 Ashe, ba ku gane ba, kome ya shiga mutum ta baka, cikinsa ya shiga, ta haka kuma zai fice?" 
Matthew15:18 Amma abin da ya fito ta baka, daga zuci yake, shi ne kuwa yake ƙazantar da mutum." 
Matthew15:19 Don daga zuci mugayen tunani suke fitowa, kamar su kisankai, da zina, da fasikanci, da sata, da shaidar zur, da yanke." 
Matthew15:20 Waɗannan suke ƙazantar da mutum. Amma a ci da hannu marar wanki ba ya ƙazantar da mutum.” 
Matthew15:21 Yesu ya tashi daga nan, ya tafi zuwa ƙasar Taya da Sidon." 
Matthew15:22 Ga wata Bakan'aniya mutuniyar ƙasar, ta zo, ta ɗaga murya ta ce, “Ya Ubangiji, Ɗan Dawuda, ka ji tausayina. Wani aljani ya bugi 'yata, ba yadda take.”" 
Matthew15:23 Amma bai ce da ita kanzil ba. Sai almajiransa suka zo suka roƙe shi, suka ce, “Sallame ta mana, tana binmu tana cika mana kunne da kuka.”" 
Matthew15:24 Ya amsa ya ce, “Ni wurin ɓatattun tumakin jama'ar Isra'ila kaɗai aka aiko ni.”" 
Matthew15:25 Amma ta zo ta durƙusa a gabansa, ta ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ka taimake ni mana!”" 
Matthew15:26 Ya amsa ya ce, “Ai, bai kyautu a bai wa karnuka abincin 'ya'ya ba.”" 
Matthew15:27 Sai ta ce, “I, haka ne, ya Ubangiji, amma ai, karnuka sukan ci suɗin 'ya'ya.”" 
Matthew15:28 Sai Yesu ya amsa mata ya ce, “Kai, uwargida, bangaskiyarki da yawa take! Yă zamar miki yadda kike so.” Nan take 'ya tata ta warke." 
Matthew15:29 Yesu ya tashi daga nan, ya bi ta bakin Tekun Galili. Sai ya hau dutse ya zauna a can." 
Matthew15:30 Taro masu yawan gaske suka zo wurinsa, suka zazzo da guragu, da masu dungu, da makafi, da bebaye, da kuma waɗansu da yawa, suka ajiye su a gabansa, ya kuwa warkar da su." 
Matthew15:31 Har jama'ar suka yi ta al'ajabi da ganin bebaye suna magana, masu dungu sun sami gaɓoɓinsu, guragu na tafiya, makafi kuma suna gani, duk suka ɗaukaka Allah na Isra'ila." 
Matthew15:32 Yesu ya kira almajiransa, ya ce, “Ina jin tausayin wannan taro, don yau kwanansu uku ke nan a guna ba su da wani abinci. Ba na kuwa so in sallame su da yunwa haka, kada su kasa a hanya.”" 
Matthew15:33 Sai almajiran suka ce masa, “Ina za mu samo gurasa a jeji haka da za ta isa ciyar da ƙasaitaccen taro haka?”" 
Matthew15:34 Yesu ya ce musu, “Gurasa nawa suke gare ku?” Suka ce, “Bakwai, da ƙananan kifaye kaɗan.”" 
Matthew15:35 Sai ya umarci taron su zauna a ƙasa. 
Matthew15:36 Da ya ɗauki gurasa bakwai ɗin da kifayen nan, ya yi godiya ga Allah, sai ya gutsuttsura, ya yi ta ba almajiran, almajiran kuma na, bai wa jama'a." 
Matthew15:37 Duka kuwa suka ci suka ƙoshi, har suka kwashe ragowar gutsattsarin, cike da manyan kwanduna bakwai." 
Matthew15:38 Waɗanda suka ci kuwa maza dubu huɗu ne, banda mata da yara." 
Matthew15:39 Da ya sallami taron ya shiga jirgi ya tafi ƙasar Magadan. 
Matthew16:1 Farisiyawa da Sadukiyawa suka zo suka roƙe shi ya nuna musu wata alama daga Sama, domin su gwada shi." 
Matthew16:2 Ya amsa musu ya ce, “In magariba ta yi, kuka ga sama ta yi ja, kukan ce, ‘Aha, gari zai yi sarari.’" 
Matthew16:3 Da safe kuma in kun ga sama ta yi ja, ta kuma gama gari, kukan ce, ‘Yau kam, za a yi hadiri.’ Kuna iya gane yanayin sararin sama, amma ba kwa iya gane alamun zamanin nan." 
Matthew16:4 'Yan zamani, mugaye, maciya amana, suke nema su ga wata alama, amma ba wata alamar da za a nuna musu, sai dai ta Yunusa.” Sai ya bar su ya tafi." 
Matthew16:5 Da almajiran suka isa wancan ƙetare, ashe, sun manta ba su kawo gurasa ba." 
Matthew16:6 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Ku kula, ku yi hankali da yistin Farisiyawa da na Sadukiyawa.”" 
Matthew16:7 Sai suka yi magana da juna suka ce, “Ba mu kawo gurasa ba fa!”" 
Matthew16:8 Da Yesu ya lura da haka sai ya ce, “Ya ku masu ƙarancin bangaskiya, don me kuke magana da juna a kan ba ku zo da gurasa ba?" 
Matthew16:9 Ashe, har yanzu ba ku gane ba? Ba ku tuna da gurasa biyar ɗin nan na mutum dubu biyar ba? Kwando nawa kuka ɗauka?" 
Matthew16:10 Ko kuma gurasan nan bakwai na mutum dubu huɗu, manyan kwanduna nawa kuka ɗauka?" 
Matthew16:11 Yaya kuka kasa ganewa? Ba zancen gurasa na yi ba, sai dai ku yi hankali da yistin Farisiyawa da na Sadukiyawa.”" 
Matthew16:12 Sa'an nan ne fa suka fahimta cewa, ba ce musu ya yi, su yi hankali da yistin gurasa ba, sai dai su yi hankali da koyarwar Farisiyawa da ta Sadukiyawa." 
Matthew16:13 To, da Yesu ya shiga ƙasar Kaisariya Filibi, sai ya tambayi almajiransa ya ce, “Wa mutane suke cewa, Ɗan Mutum yake?”" 
Matthew16:14 Sai suka ce, “Waɗansu suna cewa, Yahaya Maibaftisma, waɗansu kuwa Iliya, waɗansu kuma Irmiya, ko kuwa ɗaya daga cikin annabawa.”" 
Matthew16:15 Ya ce musu, “Amma ku fa, wa kuke cewa, nake?”" 
Matthew16:16 Sai Bitrus ya amsa, ya ce, “Kai ne Almasihu, Ɗan Allah Rayayye.”" 
Matthew16:17 Yesu ya amsa masa ya ce, “Kai mai albarka ne, Saminu, ɗan Yunusa! Domin ba ɗan adam ne ya bayyana maka wannan ba, sai dai Ubana da yake cikin Sama." 
Matthew16:18 Ina dai gaya maka, kai ne Bitrus, a kan dutsen nan ne zan gina ikilisiyata, wadda ikon Hades ba zai rinjaye ta ba." 
Matthew16:19 Zan ba ka mabuɗan Mulkin Sama. Kome ka ƙulla a duniya, zai zama abin da aka riga ƙullewa a Sama ne. Kome ka warware a duniya, zai zama abin da aka riga warwarewa a Sama ne.”" 
Matthew16:20 Sai ya kwaɓi almajiransa ƙwarai kada su gaya wa kowa shi ne Almasihu. 
Matthew16:21 Tun daga lokacin nan Yesu ya fara bayyana wa almajiransa, lalle ne ya tafi Urushalima, ya sha wuya iri iri a hannun shugabanni da manyan firistoci da malaman Attaura, har a kashe shi, a rana ta uku kuma a tashe shi." 
Matthew16:22 Sai Bitrus ya ja shi waje ɗaya, ya fara tsawata masa, ya ce, “Allah ya sawwaƙe, ya Ubangiji! Wannan har abada ba zai same ka ba!”" 
Matthew16:23 Amma Yesu ya juya ya ce wa Bitrus, “Ka yi nesa da ni, ya Shaiɗan! Tarko kake a gare ni. Ba ka tattalin al'amuran Allah, sai dai na mutane.”" 
Matthew16:24 Sai Yesu ya ce wa almajiransa, “Duk mai son bina, sai ya ƙi kansa, ya ɗauki gicciyensa, ya bi ni." 
Matthew16:25 Duk mai son tattalin ransa, zai rasa shi. Duk kuwa wanda ya rasa ransa saboda ni, zai same shi." 
Matthew16:26 Me mutum ya amfana in ya sami duniya duka a bakin ransa? Me kuma mutum zai iya bayarwa ya fanshi ransa? 
Matthew16:27 Domin Ɗan Mutum zai zo da ɗaukakar Ubansa tare da mala'ikunsa. A sa'an nan ne zai sāka wa kowane mutum gwargwadon aikinsa. 
Matthew16:28 Hakika, ina gaya muku, akwai waɗansu tsaitsaye a nan da ba za su mutu ba, sai sun ga Ɗan Mutum yana zuwa cikin Mulkinsa.”" 
Matthew17:1 Bayan kwana shida sai Yesu ya ɗauki Bitrus, da Yakubu, da ɗan'uwansa Yahaya, ya kai su a kan wani dutse mai tsawo, su kaɗai." 
Matthew17:2 Sai kamanninsa suka sāke a gabansu, fuskarsa ta yi annuri kamar hasken rana, tufafinsa kuma suka yi fari fat suna haske." 
Matthew17:3 Ga shi, Musa da Iliya sun bayyana a gare su, suna magana da Yesu." 
Matthew17:4 Sai Bitrus ya ce wa Yesu, “Ya Ubangiji, ya kyautu da muke nan wurin. In kana so, sai in kafa bukkoki uku a nan, ɗaya taka, ɗaya ta Musa, ɗaya kuma ta Iliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Yana magana ke nan sai ga wani gajimare mai haske ya zo ya rufe su. Aka kuma ji wata murya daga cikin gajimaren, ta ce, “Wannan shi ne Ɗana ƙaunataccena, wanda nake farin ciki da shi ƙwarai. Ku saurare shi.”" 
Matthew17:6 Da almajiran suka ji haka, sai suka faɗi ƙasa, tsoro ya kama su." 
Matthew17:7 Sai Yesu ya zo ya taɓa su, ya ce, “Ku tashi, kada ku ji tsoro.”" 
Matthew17:8 Da suka ɗaga kai ba su ga kowa ba, sai Yesu kaɗai." 
Matthew17:9 Suna cikin gangarowa daga dutsen, sai Yesu ya kwaɓe su ya ce, “Kada ku gaya wa kowa abin da kuka gani, sai an ta da Ɗan Mutum daga matattu.”" 
Matthew17:10 Almajiran suka tambaye shi suka ce, “To, yaya malaman Attaura suke cewa, lalle ne Iliya ya riga zuwa?”" 
Matthew17:11 Ya amsa ya ce, “Lalle Iliya zai zo ne, zai kuwa raya dukan abubuwa." 
Matthew17:12 Amma ina gaya muku, Iliya ya riga ya zo, ba su kuwa san shi ne ba, har ma suka yi masa abin da suka ga dama. Haka kuma Ɗan Mutum zai sha wuya a hannunsu.”" 
Matthew17:13 Sa'an nan ne almajiran suka gane, ashe, zancen Yahaya Maibaftisma yake yi musu." 
Matthew17:14 Da suka isa wurin taro, sai wani mutum ya zo gare shi, ya durƙusa a gabansa, ya ce," 
Matthew17:15 “Ya Ubangiji, ka ji tausayin ɗana, yana farfaɗiya, yana shan wuya ƙwarai, sau da yawa yakan faɗa wuta da kuma ruwa." 
Matthew17:16 Na kuwa kai shi wurin almajiranka, amma ba su iya warkar da shi ba.”" 
Matthew17:17 Sai Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Ya ku marasa bangaskiya, kangararru na wannan zamani! Har yaushe zan zama da ku? Har yaushe kuma zan jure muku? Ku kawo mini shi nan.”" 
Matthew17:18 Sai Yesu ya tsawata masa, aljanin kuma ya rabu da shi. Nan take yaron ya warke." 
Matthew17:19 Sa'an nan almajiran suka zo wurin Yesu a keɓe, suka ce, “Me ya sa mu muka kasa fitar da shi?" 
Matthew17:20 Ya ce musu, “Saboda ƙarancin bangaskiyarku. Domin hakika ina gaya muku, da kuna da bangaskiya, ko misalin ƙwayar mustad, da za ku ce wa dutsen nan, ‘Kawu daga nan, ka koma can!’, sai kuwa ya kawu. Ba kuwa abin da zai gagare ku. [" 
Matthew17:21 Ai, irin wannan ba ya fita sai da addu'a da azumi.]”" 
Matthew17:22 Tun suna ƙasar Galili, sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Za a ba da Ɗan Mutum ga mutane," 
Matthew17:23 za su kuwa kashe shi, a rana ta uku kuma za a tashe shi.” Sai duk tsananin baƙin ciki ya rufe su." 
Matthew17:24 Da suka zo Kafarnahum masu karɓar rabin shekel na gudunmawar Haikali suka je wurin Bitrus, suka ce, “Malaminku yana ba da gudunmawar?”" 
Matthew17:25 Ya ce, “I, yakan bayar.” Da ya dawo gida kuma, sai Yesu ya fara yi masa magana ya ce, “Me ka gani, Bitrus? Wurin wa sarakunan duniya suke karɓar kuɗin fito ko haraji, a wurin 'ya'yansu, ko kuwa daga wurin waɗansu?”" 
Matthew17:26 Sa'ad da kuma ya ce, “Daga wurin waɗansu,” sai Yesu ya ce masa, “Wato, 'ya'yan an ɗauke musu ke nan." 
Matthew17:27 Duk da haka, don kada mu ba su haushi, ka je teku ka yi fatsa, kifin da ka fara kamawa kuwa shi za ka ɗauka. In ka buɗe bakinsa za ka sami shekel guda a ciki. To, sai ka ɗauki shekel ɗin nan ka kai musu, wato, nawa da naka.”" 
Matthew18:1 A lokacin nan almajirai suka zo wurin Yesu, suka ce, “Wa ya fi girma duka a Mulkin Sama?”" 
Matthew18:2 Sai ya kira wani ƙaramin yaro, ya sa shi a tsakiyarsu," 
Matthew18:3 ya ce, “Hakika, ina gaya muku, in ba kun juyo kun zama kamar ƙananan yara ba, har abada ba za ku shiga Mulkin Sama ba." 
Matthew18:4 Duk wanda ya ƙasƙantar da kansa kamar ɗan yaron nan, ai, shi ne mafi girma a Mulkin Sama." 
Matthew18:5 “Wanda duk ya karɓi ƙaramin yaro ɗaya kamar wannan saboda sunana, Ni ya karɓa." 
Matthew18:6 Amma fa duk wanda ya sa ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan 'yan yara masu gaskatawa da ni ya yi laifi, zai fiye masa a rataya babban dutsen niƙa a wuyarsa, a kuma nutsar da shi a zurfin teku.”" 
Matthew18:7 “Kaiton duniya saboda sanadodin tuntuɓe! Lalle sanadodin tuntuɓe ba su da makawa, duk da haka kaiton wanda shi ne sanadin!" 
Matthew18:8 In kuwa hannunka ko ƙafarka suna sa ka laifi, to, yanke shi ka yar. Zai fiye maka ka shiga rai dungu ko da gurguntaka, da a jefa ka madawwamiyar wuta da hannu biyu ko ƙafa biyu." 
Matthew18:9 In kuwa idonka yana sa ka laifi, to ƙwaƙule shi ka yar. Zai fiye maka ka shiga rai da ido ɗaya, da a jefa ka Gidan Wuta da ido biyu.”" 
Matthew18:10 “Ku dai lura, kada ku raina ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan 'yan yara. Ina gaya muku, mala'ikunsu a Sama kullum suna duban fuskar Ubana da yake cikin Sama.[" 
Matthew18:11 Domin Ɗan Mutum ya zo ne musamman ceton abin da ya ɓata.] 
Matthew18:12 To, me kuka gani? In wani na da tumaki ɗari, ɗayarsu ta băce, ashe, ba zai bar tasa'in da taran nan a gindin dutse, ya je neman wadda ta ɓăce ba?" 
Matthew18:13 In kuwa ya samo ta, labudda, ina gaya muku, ai, farin cikin da yake yi a kanta ya fi na tasa'in da taran nan da ba su taɓa ɓăcewa ba." 
Matthew18:14 Haka ma, ba nufin Ubanku da yake cikin Sama ba ne ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan 'yan yara ya hallaka.”" 
Matthew18:15 “In ɗan'uwanka ya yi maka laifi, sai ka je, ka gaya masa laifinsa, kai da shi, ku kaɗai. In ya saurare ka, to, kā maido da ɗan'uwanka ke nan." 
Matthew18:16 In kuwa bai saurare ka ba, sai ka tafi da mutum ɗaya ko biyu, don a tabbatar da kowace magana a bakin shaidu biyu ko uku." 
Matthew18:17 In kuma ya ƙi sauraronsu, sai ka shaida wa ikilisiya. In kuma har ya ƙi sauraron ikilisiyar, ka maishe shi kamar bare, ko mai karɓar haraji.”" 
Matthew18:18 “Hakika, ina gaya muku, kome kuka ƙulla a duniya, zai zama abin da aka riga ƙullewa a Sama ne. Kome kuka warware a duniya, zai zama abin da aka riga warwarewa a Sama ne." 
Matthew18:19 Har wa yau dai ina gaya muku, in mutum biyu daga cikinku, ra'ayinsu ya zo ɗaya a nan duniya a kan wani abin da za su roƙa, Ubana kuwa da yake Sama zai yi musu shi." 
Matthew18:20 Gama kuwa inda mutum biyu ko uku suka taru saboda sunana, ni ma ina nan a tsakiyarsu.”" 
Matthew18:21 Sai Bitrus ya matso ya ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, sau nawa ɗan'uwana zai yi mini laifi in yafe masa? Har sau bakwai?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu ya ce masa, “Ba sau bakwai kawai na ce maka ba, sai dai bakwai har saba'in." 
Matthew18:23 “Saboda haka za a misalta Mulkin Sama da wani sarkin da yake so ya yi ƙididdigar dukiyarsa da yake hannun bayinsa. 
Matthew18:24 Da ya fara ƙididdigar, sai aka kawo masa wanda yake bi talanti dubu goma bashi." 
Matthew18:25 Da yake ya gagara biya, sai ubangidansa ya yi umarni a sayar da shi da mata tasa da 'ya'yansa da kuma duk abin da ya mallaka, a biya kuɗin." 
Matthew18:26 Sai bawan ya faɗi a gabansa ya yi masa ladabi, ya ce, ‘Ya ubangida, ka yi mini haƙuri, zan biya ka tsaf.’" 
Matthew18:27 Saboda tausayin bawan nan ubangidansa ya sake shi, ya yafe masa bashin." 
Matthew18:28 Amma wannan bawa, da fitarsa sai ya tarar da wani abokin bautarsa, wanda yake bi dinari ɗari bashi. Ya cafi wuyarsa, ya ce, ‘Biya ni abin da nake binka.’" 
Matthew18:29 Sai abokin bautarsa ya faɗi a gabansa, ya yi ta roƙonsa ya ce, ‘Ka yi mini haƙuri, ai, zan biya ka.’" 
Matthew18:30 Amma ya ƙi, ya kuma je ya sa shi a kurkuku, har yā biya bashin." 
Matthew18:31 Da abokan bautarsa suka ga abin da ya faru, suka yi baƙin ciki gaya, har suka je suka gaya wa ubangidansu duk abin da ya gudana." 
Matthew18:32 Sai ubangiji nasa ya kira shi, ya ce masa, ‘Kai mugun bawa ne! Na yafe maka duk bashin nan saboda ka roƙe ni," 
Matthew18:33 ashe, bai kyautu kai ma ka ji tausayin abokin bautarka, kamar yadda na ji tausayinka ba?’" 
Matthew18:34 Ubangijinsa ya yi fushi, ya ba da shi ga masu azabtarwa har yă biya duk bashin da ake binsa." 
Matthew18:35 Haka kuma Ubana da yake Sama zai yi da ko wannenku, in ba ku yafe wa 'yan'uwanku da zuciya ɗaya ba.”" 
Matthew19:1 To, da Yesu ya gama duk wannan magana, sai ya bar ƙasar Galili, ya shiga ta Yahudiya, wadda take ƙetaren Kogin Urdun." 
Matthew19:2 Taro mai yawan gaske suka bi shi, ya kuwa warkar da su a can." 
Matthew19:3 Sai waɗansu Farisiyawa suka zo wurinsa su gwada shi, suka ce, “Halal ne mutum ya saki mata tasa a kan kowane dalili?”" 
Matthew19:4 Ya amsa ya ce, “Ashe, ba ku taɓa karantawa ba, cewa, wanda ya halicce su tun farko, dā ma ya yi su, namiji da tamata?”" 
Matthew19:5 Ya kuma ce, “Don haka fa sai mutum ya bar uwa tasa da ubansa, ya manne wa mata tasa. Haka su biyun nan su zama jiki guda." 
Matthew19:6 Har nan gaba su zama ba jiki biyu ba ne, ɗaya ne. Abin da Allah fa ya gama, kada mutum ya raba.”" 
Matthew19:7 Sai suka ce masa, “To, don me Musa ya yi umarni a ba da takardar kisan aure, a kuma saki matar?”" 
Matthew19:8 Ya ce musu, “Don taurinkanku ne Musa ya yardar muku ku saki matanku, amma ba haka yake ba tun farko." 
Matthew19:9 Ina kuma gaya muku, kowa ya saki mata tasa, in ba a kan laifin zina ba, ya kuma auri wata, ya yi zina ke nan. Wanda ma ya auri sakakkiya, ya yi zina.”" 
Matthew19:10 Sai almajiran suka ce masa, “In ko haka tsakanin mutum da mata tasa yake, ashe ma, rashin yin aure ya fi amfani.”" 
Matthew19:11 Amma ya ce musu, “Ba duk mutum ne zai iya ɗaukar maganar nan ba, sai dai waɗanda aka yardar wa." 
Matthew19:12 Akwai waɗanda aka haifa babanni, akwai waɗanda mutane ne suka mai da su babanni. Akwai kuma waɗanda suka mai da kansu babanni domin ƙaunar Mulkin Sama. Duk mai iya ɗaukar maganar nan, yă ɗauka.”" 
Matthew19:13 Sa'an nan aka kawo masa yara ƙanana domin ya ɗora musu hannu, ya yi musu addu'a, amma almajiran suka kwaɓe su." 
Matthew19:14 Yesu kuwa ya ce, “Ku bar yara ƙanana su zo wurina, kada ku hana su. Ai, Mulkin Sama na irinsu ne.”" 
Matthew19:15 Sai ya ɗora musu hannu ya yi tafiyarsa. 
Matthew19:16 Sai ga wani ya matso wurinsa, ya ce, “Malam, wane aiki nagari ne da lalle zan yi in sami rai madawwami?”" 
Matthew19:17 Sai ya ce masa, “Don me kake tambayata a kan abin da yake nagari? Ai, Managarci ɗaya ne. In kuwa kana so ka sami wannan rai, to, ka kiyaye umarnan nan.”" 
Matthew19:18 Sai ya ce masa, “Waɗanne?” Yesu ya ce, “Kada ka yi kisankai. Kada ka yi zina. Kada ka yi sata. Kada ka yi shaidar zur." 
Matthew19:19 Ka girmama mahaifinka da mahaifiyarka, ka kuma ƙaunaci ɗan'uwanka kamar kanka.”" 
Matthew19:20 Saurayin ya ce masa, “Ai, duk na kiyaye waɗannan, me kuma ya rage mini?”" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu ya ce masa, “In kana so ka zama kammalalle, sai ka je ka sayar da duk mallakarka, ka bai wa gajiyayyu, ka sami wadata a Sama. Sa'an nan ka zo ka bi ni.”" 
Matthew19:22 Da saurayin nan ya ji haka, sai ya tafi, yana baƙin ciki, don yana da arziki ƙwarai." 
Matthew19:23 Sai Yesu ya ce wa almajiransa, “Hakika, ina gaya muku, da wuya mai arziki ya sami shiga Mulkin Sama." 
Matthew19:24 Har wa yau ina gaya muku, zai fiye wa raƙumi sauƙi ya bi ta kafar allura, da mai arziki ya shiga Mulkin Allah.”" 
Matthew19:25 Da almajiran suka ji haka, sai suka yi mamaki ƙwarai da gaske, suka ce, “To, in haka ne, wa zai sami ceto ke nan?”" 
Matthew19:26 Amma Yesu ya dube su, ya ce musu, “Ga mutane kam, ba mai yiwuwa ba ne, amma gun Allah kowane abu mai yiwuwa ne.”" 
Matthew19:27 Sai Bitrus ya amsa ya ce, “To, ai, ga shi mun bar kome, mun bi ka. Me za mu samu ke nan?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu ya ce musu, “Hakika, ina gaya muku, a sabon zamani, sa'ad da Ɗan Mutum ya zauna a maɗaukakin kursiyinsa, ku da kuka bi ni, ku ne kuma za ku zauna a kursiyi goma sha biyu, kuna hukunta kabilan nan goma sha biyu na Isra'ila." 
Matthew19:29 Kowa ya bar gidaje, ko 'yan'uwa mata, ko 'yan'uwa maza, ko uwa, ko uba, ko 'ya'ya, ko gonaki, saboda sunana, zai sami ninkinsu ɗari, ya kuma gāji rai madawwami." 
Matthew19:30 Da yawa na farko za su koma na ƙarshe, na ƙarshe kuma za su zama na farko.”" 
Matthew20:1 “Mulkin Sama kamar wani maigida yake, wanda ya fita da sassafe ya ɗauki ma'aikata don aikin garkarsa ta inabi." 
Matthew20:2 Da ya yi lada da su a kan dinari guda a yini, sai ya tura su garkarsa." 
Matthew20:3 Wajen ƙarfe tara kuma da ya fita, sai ya ga waɗansu suna zaman banza a bakin kasuwa." 
Matthew20:4 Sai ya ce musu, ‘Ku ma ku tafi garkata, zan kuwa biya ku abin da yake daidai.’ Sai suka tafi." 
Matthew20:5 Da ya sāke fita wajen tsakar rana, da kuma azahar, ya sāke yin haka dai." 
Matthew20:6 Wajen la'asar kuma ya fita ya sami waɗansu a tsaitsaye, ya ce musu, ‘Don me kuke zaman banza yini zubur?’" 
Matthew20:7 Sai suka ce masa, ‘Don ba wanda ya ɗauke mu aiki.’ Ya ce musu, ‘Ku ma ku tafi garkata.’"
