Luke6:33 In kuma sai waɗanda suke muku alheri kawai kuke yi wa alheri, wane lada ne da ku? Ai, ko masu zunubi ma haka suke yi." 
Luke6:34 In kuma sai ga waɗanda kuke tsammani za su biya ku ne kuke ba da rance, wane lada ne da ku? Ai, ko masu zunubi ma, sukan ba masu zunubi rance, don a biya su daidai." 
Luke6:35 Amma ku ƙaunaci magabtanku, kuna yi musu alheri. Ku ba da rance, kada kuwa ku tsammaci biya. Ladanku kuma zai yi yawa, za ku kuma zama 'ya'yan Maɗaukaki, domin shi mai alheri ne ga masu butulci da kuma mugaye." 
Luke6:36 Ku kasance masu tausayi kamar yadda Ubanku yake mai tausayi.” 
Luke6:37 “Kada ku ɗora wa kowa laifi, ku ma ba za a ɗora muku ba. Kada ku yi wa kowa mugun zato, ku ma ba za a yi muku ba. Ku yafe, ku ma sai a yafe muku." 
Luke6:38 Ku bayar, ku ma sai a ba ku mudu a cike, a danƙare, har ya yi tozo, har yana zuba, za a juye muku a hannun riga. Mudun da kuka auna, da shi za a auna muku.”" 
Luke6:39 Ya kuma ba su wani misali ya ce, “Makaho yana iya yi wa makaho jagora? Ashe, dukansu biyu ba sai su fāɗa a rami ba?" 
Luke6:40 Almajiri ba ya fin malaminsa. Amma kowa aka karantar da shi sosai, sai ya zama kamar malaminsa." 
Luke6:41 Don me kake duban ɗan hakin da yake a idon ɗan'uwanka, amma gungumen da yake a naka ido ba ka kula ba?" 
Luke6:42 Ƙaƙa kuma za ka iya ce wa ɗan'uwanka, ‘Ya ɗan'uwana, bari in cire maka ɗan hakin da yake a idonka,’ alhali kuwa kai kanka ba ka ga gungumen da yake a naka ido ba? Kai munafuki! Sai ka fara cire gungumen da yake a idonka tukuna sa'an nan ka gani sosai yadda za ka cire ɗan hakin da yake a idon ɗan'uwanka.”" 
Luke6:43 “Ba kyakkyawan itace da yake haifar munanan 'ya'ya, ba kuma mummunan itace da yake haifar kyawawan 'ya'ya." 
Luke6:44 Domin kowane itace da irin 'ya'yansa ake saninsa. Ai, ba a ɗiban ɓaure a jikin ƙaya, ko kuwa inabi a jikin sarƙaƙƙiya." 
Luke6:45 Mutumin kirki kam ta kyakkyawar taskar zuciyarsa yakan yi abin kirki, mugu kuwa ta mummunar taskar zuciyarsa yakan yi mugun abu. Ai, abin da ya ci rai, shi mutum yake faɗa.”" 
Luke6:46 “Don me kuke kirana, ‘Ubangiji, Ubangiji,’ ba kwa kuwa yin abin da na faɗa muku?" 
Luke6:47 Duk mai zuwa wurina, yake jin maganata, yake kuma aikata ta, zan nuna muku kwatancinsa." 
Luke6:48 Kamar mutum yake mai gina gida, wanda ya yi haƙa mai zurfi, har ya sa harsashin ginin a kan fā. Da aka yi rigyawa, sai ruwan kogi ya bugi gidan, amma bai iya girgiza shi ba, saboda an gina shi da aminci." 
Luke6:49 Amma wanda ya ji maganata, bai kuwa aikata ba, kamar mutum yake wanda ya gina gida a kan turɓaya, ba harsashi. Ruwan kogi ya buge shi, nan da nan ya rushe. Wannan gida ya yi mummunar ragargajewa!”" 
Luke7:1 Bayan da Yesu ya ƙare jawabinsa duka a gaban jama'a, ya shiga Kafarnahum." 
Luke7:2 To, sai bawan wani jarumi, wanda Ubangijinsa yake jin daɗinsa, ya yi rashin lafiya, har ya kai ga bakin mutuwa." 
Luke7:3 Da jarumin ɗin ya ji labarin Yesu, sai ya aiki waɗansu shugabannin Yahudawa wurinsa, su roƙe shi ya zo ya warkar da bawa nasa." 
Luke7:4 Da suka isa wurin Yesu sai suka roƙe shi ƙwarai suka ce, “Ai, ya cancanci a yi masa haka," 
Luke7:5 don yana ƙaunar jama'armu, shi ne ma ya gina mana majami'armu.”" 
Luke7:6 Sai Yesu ya tafi tare da su. Da ya matso kusa da gidan, sai jarumin ɗin ya aiki aminansa wurinsa su ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, kada ka wahalar da kanka. Ban ma isa har ka zo gidana ba." 
Luke7:7 Shi ya sa ban ga ma na isa in zo wurinka ba, amma kă yi magana kawai, yarona kuwa sai ya warke." 
Luke7:8 Don ni ma a hannun wani nake, da kuma soja a hannuna, in ce wa wannan, ‘Je ka,’ sai ya je, wani kuwa in ce masa, ‘Zo,’ sai ya zo, in ce wa bawana, ‘Yi abu kaza,’ sai ya yi.”" 
Luke7:9 Da Yesu ya ji haka, ya yi mamakinsa, ya kuma juya ya ce wa taron da suke biye da shi, “Ina gaya muku, ko a cikin Isra'ila ban taɓa samun bangaskiya mai ƙarfi irin wannan ba.”" 
Luke7:10 Da waɗanda aka aika suka koma gidan, suka sami bawan garau." 
Luke7:11 Ba da daɗewa ba, Yesu ya tafi wani gari, wai shi Nayin, almajiransa da kuma babban taro suka tafi da shi." 
Luke7:12 Ya kusaci ƙofar garin ke nan, sai ga wani mamaci ana ɗauke da shi, shi kaɗai ne wajen uwa tasa, mijinta kuwa ya mutu. Mutanen gari da yawa sun rako ta." 
Luke7:13 Da Ubangiji ya gan ta, ya ji tausayinta, ya kuma ce mata, “Daina kuka.”" 
Luke7:14 Sa'an nan ya matso, ya taɓa makarar, masu ɗauka kuma suka tsaya cik. Sai Yesu ya ce, “Samari, na ce maka ka tashi.”" 
Luke7:15 Mamacin ya tashi zaune, ya fara magana. Yesu kuwa ya ba da shi ga uwa tasa." 
Luke7:16 Sai tsoro ya kama su duka, suka ɗaukaka Allah suna cewa, “Lalle, wani annabi mai girma ya bayyana a cikinmu,” da kuma, “Allah ya kula da jama'arsa.”" 
Luke7:17 Wannan labarin nasa kuwa ya bazu a dukan ƙasar Yahudiya da kewayenta. 
Luke7:18 Sai almajiran Yahaya suka gaya masa dukan abubuwan nan. 
Luke7:19 Sai Yahaya ya kira almajiransa biyu, ya aike su gun Ubangiji yana tambaya, “Kai ne mai zuwan nan, ko kuwa mu sa ido ga wani?”" 
Luke7:20 Da mutanen nan suka isa wurinsa, suka ce, “Yahaya Maibaftisma ne ya aiko mu gare ka, yana tambaya, ‘Kai ne mai zuwan nan, ko kuwa mu sa ido ga wani?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Nan take Yesu ya warkar da mutane da yawa daga rashin lafiyarsu da cuce-cucensu da kuma baƙaƙen aljannu. Makafi da yawa kuma ya yi musu baiwar gani. 
Luke7:22 Sai ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ku je ku gaya wa Yahaya abin da kuka ji da abin da kuka gani. Makafi na samun gani, guragu na tafiya, ana tsarkake kutare, kurame na ji, ana ta da matattu, ana kuma yi wa matalauta bishara." 
Luke7:23 Albarka tā tabbata ga wanda ba ya tuntuɓe sabili da ni.” 
Luke7:24 Baya jakadun Yahaya sun tafi, sai Yesu ya fara yi wa taro maganar Yahaya, ya ce, “Kallon me kuka je yi a jeji? Kyauron da iska take kaɗawa?" 
Luke7:25 To, kallon me kuka je yi? Wani mai adon alharini? Ai kuwa, masu adon gaske, masu zaman annashuwa, a fāda suke." 
Luke7:26 To, kallon me kuka je yi? Annabi? Hakika, ina gaya muku, har ya fi annabi nesa." 
Luke7:27 Wannan shi ne wanda labarinsa yake rubuce cewa, ‘Ga shi, na aiko manzona ya riga ka gaba, Wanda zai shirya maka hanya gabaninka.’" 
Luke7:28 Ina gaya muku, a cikin duk waɗanda mata suka haifa, ba wanda ya fi Yahaya girma. Duk da haka wanda ya fi ƙasƙanta a Mulkin Allah ya fi shi.”" 
Luke7:29 Da duk jama'a da masu karɓar haraji suka ji haka, suka tabbata Allah mai adalci ne, aka yi musu baftisma da baftismar Yahaya." 
Luke7:30 Amma Farisiyawa da masanan Attaura suka shure abin da Allah yake nufinsu da shi, da yake sun ƙi ya yi musu baftisma." 
Luke7:31 “To, da me zan kwatanta mutanen zamanin nan? Waɗanne iri ne su?" 
Luke7:32 Kamar yara suke da suke zaune a bakin kasuwa, suna kiran juna, suna cewa, ‘Mun busa muku sarewa, ba ku yi rawa ba, Mun yi makoki, ba ku yi kuka ba.’" 
Luke7:33 Ga shi, Yahaya Maibaftisma ya zo, ba ya cin gurasa, ba ya shan ruwan inabi, amma kuna cewa, ‘Ai, yana da iska.’" 
Luke7:34 Ga Ɗan Mutum ya zo, yana ci yana sha, kuna kuma cewa, ‘Ga mai haɗama, mashayi, abokin masu karɓar haraji da masu zunubi!’" 
Luke7:35 Duk da haka hikimar Allah, ta dukkan aikinta ne ake tabbatar da gaskiya tata.”" 
Luke7:36 Wani Bafarisiye ya kira shi cin abinci. Sai ya shiga gidan Bafarisiyen, ya ƙishingiɗa wurin cin abincin." 
Luke7:37 Sai ga wata matar garin, mai zunubi, da ta ji Yesu na cin abinci a gidan Bafarisiyen, ta kawo wani ɗan tandu na man ƙanshi," 
Luke7:38 ta tsaya a bayansa a wajen ƙafafunsa, tana kuka. Sai hawayenta ya fara zuba a ƙafafunsa, ta goge su da gashinta, ta yi ta sumbantarsu, ta shafa musu man ƙanshin." 
Luke7:39 To, da Bafarisiyen da ya kira shi ya ga haka, sai ya ce a ransa, “Da mutumin nan annabi ne, da ya san ko wace ce, da kuma ko wace irin mace ce wannan da yake taɓa shi, don mai zunubi ce.”" 
Luke7:40 Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Saminu, ina da magana da kai.” Sai shi kuma ya ce, “Malam, sai ka faɗa.”" 
Luke7:41 Yesu ya ce, “Wani yana bin mutum biyu bashi, ɗaya dinari ɗari biyar, ɗayan kuma hamsin." 
Luke7:42 Da suka gagara biya, sai ya yafe musu dukansu biyu. To, a cikinsu wa zai fi ƙaunarsa?”" 
Luke7:43 Saminu ya amsa masa ya ce, “A ganina, wanda ya yafe wa mai yawa.” Sai ya ce masa “Ka faɗa daidai.”" 
Luke7:44 Da ya waiwaya wajen matar, ya ce wa Saminu. “Ka ga matan nan? Na shigo gidanka, ba ka ba ni ruwan wanke ƙafa ba, amma ita ta zub da hawayenta a ƙafafuna, ta kuma goge su da gashinta." 
Luke7:45 Kai ba ka sumbance ni ba, ita kuwa, tun shigowata nan ba ta daina sumbantar ƙafafuna ba." 
Luke7:46 Ba ka shafa mini mai a ka ba, amma ita ta shafa man ƙanshi a ƙafafuna." 
Luke7:47 Saboda haka ina gaya maka, zunubanta masu yawan nan duk an gafarta mata, domin ta yi ƙauna mai yawa. Wanda aka gafarta wa kaɗan kuwa, ƙauna kaɗan yake yi.”" 
Luke7:48 Sai ya ce mata, “An gafarta miki zunubanki.”" 
Luke7:49 Masu ci tare da shi kuwa suka fara ce wa juna, “Wannan kuwa wane ne wanda har yake gafarta zunubai?”" 
Luke7:50 Sai Yesu ya ce wa matar, “Bangaskiyarki ta cece ki. Ki sauka lafiya.”" 
Luke8:1 Ba da daɗewa ba Yesu ya zazzaga birni da ƙauye yana wa'azi, yana yin bisharar Mulkin Allah. Sha biyun nan kuwa suna tare da shi," 
Luke8:2 da waɗansu mata da aka raba da baƙaƙen aljannu da kuma rashin lafiyarsu. Cikinsu da Maryamu mai suna Magadaliya, wadda aka fitar wa da aljannu bakwai," 
Luke8:3 da Yuwana matar Kuza, wakilin Hirudus, da Suzanatu, da kuma waɗansu da yawa da suka yi musu ɗawainiya da kayansu." 
Luke8:4 Da jama'a masu yawa suka taru, mutane suna ta zuwa gare shi gari da gari, sai ya yi musu misali ya ce." 
Luke8:5 “Wani mai shuka ya tafi shuka. Yana cikin yafa iri sai waɗansu suka fāɗi a hanya, aka tattake su, tsuntsaye suka tsince su." 
Luke8:6 Waɗansu kuma suka fāɗi a dutse. Da suka tsiro sai suka bushe, don ba danshi." 
Luke8:7 Waɗansu kuma suka fāɗi cikin ƙaya, suka tashi tare, har ƙayar ta sarƙe su." 
Luke8:8 Waɗansu kuwa suka fāɗi a ƙasa mai kyau, suka girma, suka yi ƙwaya riɓi ɗari ɗari.” Da ya faɗi haka, sai ya ta da murya ya ce, “Duk mai kunnen ji, yă ji.”" 
Luke8:9 Almajiransa suka tambaye shi ma'anar misalin. 
Luke8:10 Sai ya ce, “Ku kam, an yarda muku ku san asiran Mulkin Allah. Amma ga sauran sai da misali, don gani kam, su gani, amma ba za su gane ba. Ji kuma, su ji, amma ba za su fahimta ba." 
Luke8:11 “To, misalin shi ne, irin Maganar Allah ne." 
Luke8:12 Waɗanda suka fāɗi a hanya su ne kwatancin waɗanda suka ji Maganar Allah, sa'an nan Iblis ya zo ya ɗauke Maganar daga zuciyarsu, don kada su ba da gaskiya su sami ceto." 
Luke8:13 Na kan dutsen kuwa su ne waɗanda da zarar sun ji Maganar, sai su karɓa da farin ciki. Su kam, ba su da tushe. Sukan ba da gaskiya 'yan kwanaki kaɗan, amma a lokacin gwaji, sai su bauɗe." 
Luke8:14 Waɗanda suka fāɗi cikin ƙaya kuwa su ne waɗanda suka ji Maganar, amma a kwana a tashi, sai yawan taraddadin duniya, da dukiya, da shagalin duniya su sarƙe su, har su kasa yin amfani." 
Luke8:15 Waɗanda aka shuka a ƙasa mai kyau kuwa su ne waɗanda suka ji Maganar, suka riƙe ta kamkam da zuciya ɗaya kyakkyawa, suka jure har suka yi amfani." 
Luke8:16 “Ba mai kunna fitila ya rufe ta da masaki, ko ya ajiye ta a ƙarƙashin gado. A'a, sai dai ya ɗora ta a maɗorinta, don masu shiga su ga hasken." 
Luke8:17 Ba abin da yake a ɓoye da ba za a bayyana ba. Ba kuma asirin da ba zai tonu ya zama bayyananne ba. 
Luke8:18 Ku kula fa, ku iya ji, don mai abu akan ƙara wa. Marar abu kuwa, ko ɗan abin da yake tsammani yake da shi ma, sai a karɓe masa.”" 
Luke8:19 Uwa tasa da 'yan'uwansa suka zo wurinsa, amma suka kasa isa gunsa saboda taro." 
Luke8:20 Sai aka ce masa, “Tsohuwarka da 'yan'uwanka suna tsaye a waje, suna son ganinka.”" 
Luke8:21 Amma ya amsa musu ya ce, “Masu jin Maganar Allah, suna kuma aikata ta, ai, su ne uwata, su ne kuma 'yan'uwana.”" 
Luke8:22 Wata rana ya shiga jirgi tare da almajiransa. Ya ce musu, “Mu haye wancan hayin teku.” Sai suka tashi." 
Luke8:23 Suna cikin tafiya sai barci ya kwashe shi. Hadiri mai iska ya taso a tekun, jirginsu ya tasar wa cika da ruwa, har suna cikin hatsari." 
Luke8:24 Suka je suka tashe shi, suka ce, “Maigida, Maigida, mun hallaka!” Ya farka, ya tsawata wa iskar da kuma haukan ruwa. Sai suka kwanta, wurin ya yi tsit." 
Luke8:25 Ya ce musu, “Ina bangaskiyarku?” Suka kuwa tsorata suka yi mamaki, suna ce wa juna, “Wa ke nan kuma, har iska da ruwa ma yake yi wa umarni, suna kuwa yi masa biyayya?”" 
Luke8:26 Sai suka iso ƙasar Garasinawa wadda take hannun riga da ƙasar Galili. 
Luke8:27 Da saukarsa a gaci sai wani mai aljannu ya fito daga cikin gari ya tarye shi. Ya daɗe bai sa tufa ba, ba ya zama a gida kuwa, sai a makabarta." 
Luke8:28 Da ganin Yesu sai ya ƙwala ihu, ya faɗi a gabansa, ya ɗaga murya ya ce, “Ina ruwanka da ni, ya Yesu Ɗan Allah Maɗaukaki? Ina roƙonka, kada ka yi mini azaba.”" 
Luke8:29 Ya faɗi haka ne domin Yesu ya umarci baƙin aljanin ya rabu da mutumin. Gama sau da yawa aljanin yakan buge shi, akan kuma tsare shi, a ɗaure shi da sarƙa da mari, amma ya tsintsinka ɗaurin, aljanin ya kora shi jeji." 
Luke8:30 Sai Yesu ya tambaye shi, “Yaya sunanka?” Ya ce, “Tuli,” don aljannu da yawa sun shiga cikinsa." 
Luke8:31 Sai suka yi ta roƙansa kada ya umarce su su fāɗa a mahalaka. 
Luke8:32 To, wurin nan kuwa akwai wani babban garkin alade na kiwo a gangaren dutse, suka roƙe shi ya yardar musu su shiga cikinsu. Ya kuwa yardar musu." 
Luke8:33 Sai aljannun suka rabu da mutumin, suka shiga aladun. Garken kuwa suka rungungunta ta gangaren, suka faɗa tekun, suka halaka a ruwa." 
Luke8:34 Da 'yan kiwon aladen nan suka ga abin da ya faru, suka gudu, suka ba da labari a birni da ƙauye." 
Luke8:35 Sai jama'a suka firfito su ga abin da ya auku. Suka zo wurin Yesu, suka tarar da mutumin da aljannun suka rabu da shi, zaune gaban Yesu, saye da tufa, yana cikin hankalinsa. Sai suka tsorata." 
Luke8:36 Waɗanda aka yi abin a idonsu kuwa, suka gaya musu yadda aka warkar da mai aljannun nan." 
Luke8:37 Dukan mutanen kewayen ƙasar Garasinawa suka roƙi Yesu ya rabu da su, don tsoro mai yawa ya kama su. Sai ya shiga jirgi ya koma." 
Luke8:38 Mutumin da aljannun suka rabu da shi kuwa, ya roƙe shi izinin tafiya tare da shi. Amma ya sallame shi ya ce," 
Luke8:39 “Koma gida, ka faɗi irin manyan abubuwan da Allah ya yi maka.” Sai ya tafi ko'ina a cikin birnin yana sanar da manyan abubuwan da Yesu ya yi masa." 
Luke8:40 To, da Yesu ya komo, taron suka yi masa maraba domin ko a dā ma duk suna jiransa ne." 
Luke8:41 Sai ga wani mutum mai suna Yayirus, wani shugaban majami'a, ya zo ya fāɗi a gaban Yesu, ya roƙe shi ya je gidansa." 
Luke8:42 Yana da 'ya ɗaya tilo, mai shekara misalin goma sha biyu, tana kuma bakin mutuwa. Yana tafiya, taro masu yawa na matsa tasa," 
Luke8:43 sai ga wata mace wadda ta shekara goma sha biyu tana zub da jini, ta kuma ɓad da duk abin hannunta wajen masu magani, ba wanda ya iya warkar da ita." 
Luke8:44 Ta raɓo ta bayansa, ta taɓa gezar mayafinsa. Nan take zubar jininta ta tsaya." 
Luke8:45 Sai Yesu ya ce, “Wa ya taɓa ni?” Da kowa ya yi mūsū, Bitrus da waɗanda suke tare da shi suka ce, “Maigida, ai, taro masu yawa ne suke tutturarka, suna matsarka.”" 
Luke8:46 Amma Yesu ya ce, “An dai taɓa ni, domin na ji iko ya fita daga gare ni.”" 
Luke8:47 Da matar ta ga ba dama ta ɓuya, sai ta matso tana rawar jiki, ta fāɗi a gabansa, ta bayyana a gaban duk jama'a dalilin da ya sa ta taɓa shi, da kuma yadda ta warke nan take." 
Luke8:48 Sai ya ce mata, “'Yata, bangaskiyarki ta warkar da ke. Ki sauka lafiya.”" 
Luke8:49 Yana cikin magana, sai ga wani ya zo daga gidan shugaban majami'ar, ya ce, “Ai, 'yarka ta rasu. Kada ka ƙara wahalar da Malamin.”" 
Luke8:50 Amma da Yesu ya ji haka, ya amsa ya ce wa shugaban majami'ar, “Kada ka ji tsoro. Ka ba da gaskiya kawai, za ta kuwa warke.”" 
Luke8:51 Da ya isa gidan bai yarda kowa ya shiga tare da shi ba, sai Bitrus, da Yahaya, da Yakubu, da kuma uban yarinyar da uwa tata," 
Luke8:52 Duk kuwa ana ta kuka da kururuwa saboda ita. Amma Yesu ya ce, “Ku daina kuka. Ai, ba matacciya take ba, barci take yi.”" 
Luke8:53 Sai suka yi masa dariyar raini, don sun sani ta mutu." 
Luke8:54 Shi kuwa sai ya riƙe hannunta, ya ta da murya ya ce, “Yarinya, ki tashi.”" 
Luke8:55 Ruhunta kuwa ya dawo, nan take ta tashi. Sai ya yi umarni a ba ta abinci." 
Luke8:56 Iyayenta suka yi mamaki. Amma ya kwaɓe su kada su gaya wa kowa abin da ya faru. 
Luke9:1 Sai ya tara goma sha biyun nan ya ba su iko da izini kan dukan aljannu, su kuma warkar da cuce-cuce," 
Luke9:2 ya kuma aike su su yi wa'azin Mulkin Allah, su kuma warkar da marasa lafiya." 
Luke9:3 Ya kuma ce musu, “Kada ku ɗauki wani guzuri a tafiyarku, ko sanda, ko burgami, ko gurasa, ko kuɗi. Kada kuma ku ɗauki taguwa biyu." 
Luke9:4 Duk gidan da kuka sauka, ku zauna a nan har ku tashi." 
Luke9:5 Duk waɗanda ba su yi na'am da ku ba, in za ku bar garin, sai ku karkaɗe ƙurar ƙafafunku don shaida a kansu.”" 
Luke9:6 Sai suka tashi suka zazzaga ƙauyuka suna yin bishara, suna warkarwa a ko'ina." 
Luke9:7 To, sarki Hirudus ya ji duk abin da ake yi, ya kuwa damu ƙwarai, don waɗansu suna cewa Yahaya ne aka tasa daga matattu." 
Luke9:8 Waɗansu kuwa suka ce wai Iliya ne ya bayyana. Waɗansu kuma suka ce ɗaya daga annabawan dā ne ya tashi. 
Luke9:9 Sai Hirudus ya ce, “Yahaya kam na fille masa kai. Wa ke nan kuma da nake jin irin waɗannan abubuwa game da shi?” Sai ya nemi ganinsa." 
Luke9:10 Da manzanni suka dawo, suka gaya wa Yesu abin da suka yi. Sai ya tafi da su a keɓe zuwa wani gari wai shi Betsaida." 
Luke9:11 Ganin haka sai taro masu yawa suka bi shi. Ya kuwa yi musu maraba, ya yi musu maganar Mulkin Allah, ya kuma warkar da masu bukatar warkewa." 
Luke9:12 Da rana ta fara sunkuyawa, sha biyun suka matso, suka ce masa, “Sai ka sallami taron, su shiga ƙauyuka da karkara na kurkusa, su sauka, su nemi abinci, don inda muke ba mutane.”" 
Luke9:13 Amma ya ce musu, “Ku ku ba su abinci mana.” Suka ce, “Ai, abin da muke da shi bai fi gurasa biyar da kifi biyu ba, sai dai in za mu je mu sayo wa dukkan jama'an nan abinci ne.”" 
Luke9:14 Maza sun yi wajen dubu biyar. Sai ya ce wa almajiransa, “Ku ce musu su zazzauna ƙungiya ƙungiya, kowace ƙungiya misali hamsin hamsin.”" 
Luke9:15 Haka kuwa suka yi, suka sa dukkansu su zazzauna." 
Luke9:16 Da ya ɗauki gurasa biyar ɗin da kifi biyu, sai ya ɗaga kai sama, ya yi wa Allah godiya, ya gutsuttsura su, ya yi ta ba almajiran, suna kai wa jama'a." 
Luke9:17 Duka kuwa suka ci suka ƙoshi, har aka kwashe ragowar gutsattsarin, kwando goma sha biyu." 
Luke9:18 Wata rana yana addu'a shi kaɗai, almajiransa kuwa suka zo wurinsa. Sai ya tambaye su, ya ce, “Wa mutane suke cewa nake?”" 
Luke9:19 Suka amsa suka ce, “Yahaya Maibaftisma, waɗansu kuwa, Iliya, waɗansu kuma, ɗaya daga cikin annabawan dā ne ya tashi.”" 
Luke9:20 Ya ce musu, “Amma ku fa, wa kuke cewa nake?” Sai Bitrus ya amsa ya ce, “Almasihu na Allah.”" 
Luke9:21 Sai ya kwaɓe su gaya matuƙa kada su gaya wa kowa wannan magana. 
Luke9:22 Ya ce, “Lalle ne Ɗan mutum yă sha wuya iri iri, shugabanni da manyan firistoci da malaman Attaura su ƙi shi, har a kashe shi, a rana ta uku kuma a tashe shi.”" 
Luke9:23 Sai ya ce wa dukansu, “Duk mai son bina, sai ya ƙi kansa, ya ɗauki gicciyensa kowace rana, yă bi ni." 
Luke9:24 Duk mai son tattalin ransa, zai rasa shi. Duk kuwa wanda ya rasa ransa saboda ni, tattalinsa ya yi." 
Luke9:25 Me mutum ya amfana in ya sami duniya duka a kan hasarar ransa, ko a bakin ransa?" 
Luke9:26 Duk wanda sai ya ji kunyar shaida ni da maganata, Ɗan Mutum ma zai ji kunyar shaida shi sa'ad da ya zo da ɗaukaka tasa, da kuma ɗaukakar Uba, da ta mala'iku tsarkaka." 
Luke9:27 Amma hakika ina gaya muku, akwai waɗansu tsaitsaye a nan da ba za su mutu ba sai sun ga Mulkin Allah.”" 
Luke9:28 Bayan misalin kwana takwas da yin maganan nan, Yesu ya ɗauki Bitrus, da Yahaya, da Yakubu, ya hau wani dutse domin yin addu'a." 
Luke9:29 Yana yin addu'a, sai kama tasa ta sāke, tufafinsa kuma suka yi fari fat, har suna ɗaukar ido." 
Luke9:30 Sai ga mutum biyu na magana da shi, wato Musa da Iliya." 
Luke9:31 Sun bayyana da ɗaukaka, suna zancen ƙaura tasa ne, wadda yake gabannin yi a Urushalima." 
Luke9:32 Sai kuma Bitrus da waɗanda suke tare da shi, barci ya cika musu ido, amma da suka farka suka ga ɗaukakarsa, da kuma mutum biyun nan tsaye tare da shi." 
Luke9:33 Mutanen nan na rabuwa da shi ke nan, sai Bitrus ya ce wa Yesu, “Maigida, ya kyautu da muke nan wurin. Mu kafa bukkoki uku, ɗaya taka, ɗaya ta Musa, ɗaya kuma ta Iliya.” Bai ma san abin da yake faɗa ba." 
Luke9:34 Yana faɗar haka sai wani gajimare ya zo ya rufe su. Da kuma gajimaren ya lulluɓe su suka tsorata. 
Luke9:35 Sai aka ji wata murya daga cikin gajimaren, tana cewa, “Wannan shi ne Ɗana zaɓanɓɓena. Ku saurare shi!”" 
Luke9:36 Bayan muryar ta yi magana, aka ga Yesu shi kaɗai. Suka yi shiru. A kwanakin nan kuwa ba su gaya wa kowa abin da suka gani ba." 
Luke9:37 Kashegari da suka gangaro daga kan dutsen, wani babban taro ya tarye shi." 
Luke9:38 Sai ga wani daga cikin taron ya yi kira, ya ce, “Malam, ina roƙonka ka dubi ɗana da idon rahama, shi ne ke nan gare ni." 
Luke9:39 Ga shi, aljani yakan hau shi, yakan yi ihu ba zato ba tsammani. Aljanin yakan buge shi, jikinsa yana rawa, har bakinsa yana kumfa. Ba ya barinsa sai ya kukkuje shi ƙwarai." 
Luke9:40 Na kuwa roƙi almajiranka su fitar da shi, amma sun kasa.”" 
Luke9:41 Sai Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Ya ku tsara marasa bangaskiya, kangararru! Har yaushe zan zama da ku, ina jure muku? Kawo ɗa naka nan.”" 
Luke9:42 Yana zuwa, sai aljanin ya buge shi ƙwarai, jikinsa na rawa. Amma Yesu ya tsawata wa baƙin aljanin, ya warkar da yaron, ya kuma mayar wa ubansa da shi." 
Luke9:43 Duk aka yi mamakin girman ikon Allah. Tun dukansu suna mamakin duk abubuwan da yake yi, sai ya ce wa almajiransa," 
Luke9:44 “Maganar nan fa tă shiga kunnenku! Za a ba da Ɗan Mutum ga mutane.” 
Luke9:45 Amma ba su fahimci maganan nan ba, an kuwa ɓoye musu ita ne don kada su gane. Su kuwa suna tsoron tambayarsa wannan magana." 
Luke9:46 Sai musu ya tashi a tsakaninsu a kan ko wane ne babbansu. 
Luke9:47 Amma da Yesu ya gane tunanin zuciyarsu, ya kama hannun wani ƙaramin yaro ya ajiye shi kusa da shi." 
Luke9:48 Ya ce musu, “Duk wanda ya karɓi ƙanƙane yaro kamar wannan saboda sunana, ni ya karɓa. Wanda kuwa ya karɓe ni, ya karɓi wanda ya aiko ni ke nan. Ai, wanda yake ƙarami a cikinku shi ne babba.”" 
Luke9:49 Sai Yahaya ya amsa ya ce, “Maigida, mun ga wani yana fitar da aljannu da sunanka, mun kuwa hana shi, domin ba ya binmu.”" 
Luke9:50 Amma Yesu ya ce masa, “Kada ku hana shi. Ai, duk wanda ba ya gāba da ku, naku ne.”" 
Luke9:51 Da lokacin karɓarsa a Sama ya gabato, ya himmantu sosai ga zuwa Urushalima." 
Luke9:52 Sai ya aiki jakadu su riga shi gaba, suka kuwa tafi suka shiga wani ƙauyen Samariyawa su shisshirya masa." 
Luke9:53 Amma Samariyawa suka ƙi karɓarsa, domin niyyarsa duk a kan Urushalima take." 
Luke9:54 Da almajiransa Yakubu da Yahaya suka ga haka suka ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ko kana so mu umarci wuta ta sauko daga sama ta lashe su?”" 
Luke9:55 Amma ya juya, ya tsawata musu." 
Luke9:56 Sai suka ci gaba, suka tafi wani ƙauye." 
Luke9:57 Suna tafiya a hanya, sai wani mutum ya ce masa, “Zan bi ka duk inda za ka.”" 
Luke9:58 Yesu ya ce masa, “Yanyawa da ramummukansu, tsuntsaye kuma da wurin kwanansu, amma Ɗan Mutum ba shi da wurin shaƙatawa.”" 
Luke9:59 Ya kuma ce wa wani, “Bi ni.” Sai ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ka bar ni tukuna in je in binne tsohona.”" 
Luke9:60 Sai Yesu ya ce masa, “Bari matattu su binne 'yan'uwansu matattu. Amma kai kuwa, tafi ka sanar da Mulkin Allah.”" 
Luke9:61 Wani kuma ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, zan bi ka, amma ka bar ni tukuna in yi wa mutanen gida bankwana.”" 
Luke9:62 Yesu ya ce masa “Wanda ya fara huɗa da keken noma, yana duban baya, bai dace da Mulkin Allah ba.”" 
Luke10:1 Bayan wannan Ubangiji ya zaɓi waɗansu mutum saba'in, ya aike su biyu biyu, su riga shi gaba zuwa kowane gari da kowane wuri da shi kansa za shi." 
Luke10:2 Ya ce musu, “Girbin na da yawa, amma masu yinsa kaɗan ne. Saboda haka ku roƙi Ubangijin girbi ya turo masu girbi, su yi masa girbi." 
Luke10:3 To, sai ku tafi. Ga shi na aike ku kamar 'yan tumaki a tsakiyar kyarketai." 
Luke10:4 Kada ku ɗauki jakar kuɗi, ko burgami, ko takalma. Kada ku yi doguwar gaisuwa da kowa a hanya." 
Luke10:5 Duk gidan da kuka sauka, ku fara da cewa, ‘Salama alaikun mutanen gidan nan!’" 
Luke10:6 In akwai da ɗan salama a gidan, to, salamarku za ta tabbata a gare shi. In kuwa babu, za ta komo muku." 
Luke10:7 Ku zauna a gidan, kuna ci kuna shan duk irin abin da suka ba ku, domin ma'aikaci ya cancanci ladansa. Kada ku riƙa sāke masauki." 
Luke10:8 Duk garin da kuka shiga, in an yi na'am da ku, ku ci duk irin abin da aka kawo muku." 
Luke10:9 Ku warkar da marasa lafiya da suke cikinsa, ku kuma ce musu, ‘Mulkin Allah ya kusato ku.’" 
Luke10:10 Amma duk garin da kuka shiga ba a yi na'am da ku ba, sai ku zaga kwararo kwararo, kuna cewa," 
Luke10:11 ‘Ko da ƙurar garinku da ta ɗafe a jikin ƙafafunmu ma, mun karkaɗe muku. Amma duk da haka ku sani Mulkin Allah ya kusato.’" 
Luke10:12 Ina dai gaya muku, a ran nan, za a fi haƙurce wa Saduma a kan garin nan.”" 
Luke10:13 “Kaitonki, Korasinu! Kaitonki, Betsaida! Da mu'ujizan da aka yi a cikinku, su aka yi a Taya da Sidon, da tuni sun tuba, sun zauna sāye da tsumma, suna hurwa da toka." 
Luke10:14 Amma a Ranar Shari'a, za a fi haƙurce wa Taya da Sidon a kanku." 
Luke10:15 Ke kuma Kafarnahum, ɗaukaka ki sama za a yi? A'a, ƙasƙantar da ke za a yi har Hades." 
Luke10:16 “Duk mai sauraronku, ni yake saurare. Mai ƙinku kuma, ni yake ƙi. Duk mai ƙina kuwa, wanda ya aiko ni ne ya ƙi.”" 
Luke10:17 Sai kuma saba'in ɗin nan suka komo da farin ciki, suka ce, “Ya Ubangiji, har aljannu ma suna mana biyayya albarkacin sunanka!”" 
Luke10:18 Sai ya ce musu, “Na ga Shaiɗan ya faɗo daga sama kamar walƙiya." 
Luke10:19 Ga shi, na ba ku ikon taka macizai da kunamai, ku kuma rinjaye a kan dukan ikon Maƙiyi, ba kuwa abin da zai cuce ku ko kaɗan." 
Luke10:20 Duk da haka, kada ku yi farin ciki aljannu na yi muku biyayya, sai dai ku yi farin cikin an rubuta sunayenku a Sama.”" 
Luke10:21 A wannan lokaci ya yi farin ciki matuƙa ta Ruhu Mai Tsarki, ya ce, “Na gode maka ya Uba, Ubangijin sama da ƙasa, domin ka ɓoye waɗannan al'amura ga masu hikima da masu basira, ka kuma bayyana su ga jahilai. Hakika na gode maka ya Uba, domin wannan shi ne nufinka na alheri." 
Luke10:22 Kowane abu Ubana ne ya mallaka mini. Ba kuwa wanda ya san ko wane ne Ɗan sai dai Uban, ko kuma ya san ko wane ne Uban sai dai Ɗan, da kuma wanda Ɗan yake so ya bayyana wa.”" 
Luke10:23 Sai ya juya wajen almajiransa, ya ce musu a keɓance, “Albarka tā tabbata ga idanun da suka ga abin da kuka gani." 
Luke10:24 Ina gaya muku, annabawa da sarakuna da yawa suna son ganin abin da kuke gani, amma ba su gani ba, suna kuma so su ji abin da kuke ji, amma ba su ji ba.”" 
Luke10:25 Sai ga wani masanin Attaura ya tashi tsaye yana gwada shi, ya ce, “Malam, me zan yi in gaji rai madawwami?”" 
Luke10:26 Yesu ya ce musu, “Me yake rubuce a Attaura? Yaya kake karantawa?”" 
Luke10:27 Sai ya amsa ya ce, “Ka ƙaunaci Ubangiji Allahnka da dukkan zuciyarka, da dukkan ranka, da dukkan ƙarfinka, da dukkan hankalinka. Ka kuma ƙaunaci ɗan'uwanka kamar kanka.”" 
Luke10:28 Yesu ya ce masa, “Ka amsa daidai. Ka riƙa yin haka, za ka rayu.”" 
Luke10:29 Shi kuwa mutumin, don yana son baratar da kansa, ya ce wa Yesu, “To, wane ne ɗan'uwa nawa?”" 
Luke10:30 Sai Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Wani mutum ne ya tashi daga Urushalima za shi Yariko. Sai 'yan fashi suka fāɗa shi, suka tuɓe shi, suka yi masa mugun dūka, suka tafi suka bar shi rai ga Allah." 
Luke10:31 Daga nan ya zamana wani firist ya biyo ta wannan hanya. Da ya gan shi sai ya zaga ta ɗaya gefen, ya wuce abinsa." 
Luke10:32 Haka kuma wani Balawe, da ya iso wurin ya gan shi, shi ma ya zaga ta ɗaya gefen, ya wuce abinsa." 
Luke10:33 Ana nan sai hanya ta kawo wani Basamariye inda yake. Da ya gan shi, sai tausayi ya kama shi," 
Luke10:34 ya je wurinsa, ya ɗaɗɗaure masa raunukansa, yana zuba musu mai da ruwan inabi. Sa'an nan ya ɗora shi a kan dabbarsa, ya kai shi masauki, ya yi ta jiyyarsa." 
Luke10:35 Kashegari ya ɗebo dinari biyu ya ba maigidan, ya ce, ‘Ka yi jiyyarsa, duk kuma abin da ka ɓatar bayan wannan, in na dawo sai in biya ka.’" 
Luke10:36 To, a cikin ukun nan, wa kake tsammani ya zama ɗan'uwa ga wanda 'yan fashin suka faɗa wa?”" 
Luke10:37 Sai ya ce, “Wanda ya nuna masa jinƙai.” Sai Yesu ya ce masa, “Kai ma, ka je ka riƙa yin haka.”" 
Luke10:38 Suna tafiya, sai ya shiga wani ƙauye, wata mace kuma mai suna Marta ta sauke da shi a gidanta." 
Luke10:39 Tana kuwa da 'yar'uwa mai suna Maryamu, wadda ta zauna a gaban Ubangiji tana sauraron magana tasa." 
Luke10:40 Marta kuwa yawan hidimomi ya ɗauke mata hankali, sai ta je gunsa, ta ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ba ka kula ba, 'yar'uwata ta bar ni ina hidima ni kaɗai? Gaya mata ta taimake ni mana.”" 
Luke10:41 Amma Ubangiji ya amsa mata ya ce, “Marta, Marta! Hankalinki a tashe yake, kina kuma damuwa kan abu da yawa." 
Luke10:42 Bukatu kima ne, ta ainihi ɗaya ce. Maryamu ta zaɓi abu mai kyau, ba kuwa za a karɓe mata ba.”" 
Luke11:1 Wata rana Yesu yana addu'a a wani wuri. Bayan da ya gama, sai wani a cikin almajiransa ya ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, ka koya mana addu'a, kamar yadda Yahaya ya koya wa almajiransa.”" 
Luke11:2 Sai ya ce musu, “In kuna addu'a ku ce, ‘Ya Uba, a kiyaye sunanka da tsarki, Mulkinka yă zo," 
Luke11:3 Ka ba mu abincin yau da na kullum. 
Luke11:4 Ka gafarta mana zunubanmu, gama mu ma muna gafarta wa duk wanda yake yi mana laifi. Kada ka kai mu wurin jaraba.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 Ya kuma gaya musu, “Misali, idan waninku yana da amini, ya je wurinsa da tsakar dare ya ce masa, ‘Wāne, ranta mini gurasa uku mana," 
Luke11:6 ga shi, wani abokina matafiyi ya sauka a wurina yanzu, ba ni kuwa da abincin da zan ba shi,’" 
Luke11:7 sa'an nan aminin ya amsa masa daga ciki ya ce, ‘Kada ka dame ni, ai, an kulle ƙofa, da ni da 'ya'yana duk mun kwanta, ba zan iya tashi in ba ka wani abu ba.’" 
Luke11:8 Ina gaya muku, ko da yake ba zai tashi ya ba shi wani abu don yana amininsa ba, amma saboda nacinsa zai tashi ya ba shi ko nawa yake bukata." 
Luke11:9 Ina dai gaya muku, ku yi ta roƙo, za a ba ku. Ku yi ta nema, za ku samu. Ku yi ta ƙwanƙwasawa, za a kuwa buɗe muku." 
Luke11:10 Duk wanda ya roƙa, akan ba shi, mai nema yana tare da samu, wanda ya ƙwanƙwasa kuma za a buɗe masa." 
Luke11:11 Wane uba ne a cikinku, da ɗansa zai roƙe shi [gurasa, ya ba shi dutse? Ko ya roƙe shi] kifi, ya ba shi maciji?" 
Luke11:12 Ko kuwa ya roƙe shi ƙwai, ya ba shi kunama?" 
Luke11:13 To, ku da kuke mugaye ma kuka san yadda za ku ba 'ya'yanku kyautar kyawawan abubuwa, balle Ubanku na Sama zai ba da Ruhu Mai Tsarki ga masu roƙonsa.”" 
Luke11:14 Wata rana Yesu yana fitar da beben aljan. Da aljanin ya fita, sai beben ya yi magana, taron kuwa suka yi mamaki." 
Luke11:15 Amma waɗansunsu suka ce, “Ai, da ikon Ba'alzabul sarkin aljannu yake fitar da aljannu.”" 
Luke11:16 Waɗansu kuwa, don su gwada shi, suka nema ya nuna musu wata alama daga Sama." 
Luke11:17 Shi kuwa da ya san tunaninsu, sai ya ce musu, “Duk mulkin da ya rabu a kan gāba, zai lalace. Haka kuma, in gida ya rabu a kan gāba, zai baje." 
Luke11:18 In kuma Shaiɗan ya rabu a kan gāba, yaya mulkinsa zai ɗore? Ga shi, kun ce da ikon Ba'alzabul nake fitar da aljannu." 
Luke11:19 In kuwa da ikon Ba'alzabul nake fitar da aljannu, to, 'ya'yanku fa, da ikon wa suke fitarwa? Saboda haka, su ne za su zama alƙalanku." 
Luke11:20 Ni kuwa in da ikon Allah nake fitar da aljannu, ashe, Mulkin Allah ya zo muku ke nan." 
Luke11:21 In ƙaƙƙarfan mutum ya yi ɗamara sosai, yana tsaron gidansa, kayan gidansa lafiya suke." 
Luke11:22 In kuwa wanda ya fi shi ƙarfi ya fāɗa masa, ya kuma rinjaye shi, sai ya ƙwace duk makaman da ya dogara da su, ya kuma rarraba kayansa ganima," 
Luke11:23 Wanda ba nawa ba ne, gāba yake yi da ni. Wanda kuma ba ya taya ni tarawa, watsarwa yake yi.”" 
Luke11:24 “Baƙin aljan, in ya rabu da mutum, sai ya bi ta wurare marasa ruwa, yana neman hutawa. In ya rasa, sai ya ce, ‘Zan koma gidana da na fito.’" 
Luke11:25 Sa'ad da kuwa ya komo gidan ya tarar da shi shararre, ƙawatacce," 
Luke11:26 Daga nan sai ya je ya ɗebo waɗansu aljannu bakwai da suka fi shi mugunta. Sai su shiga su zauna a wurin. Wannan mutum kuwa ƙarshen zamansa ya fi na fari lalacewa.” 
Luke11:27 Yana faɗar haka, sai wata mace a taron ta ɗaga murya ta ce masa, “Albarka tā tabbata ga wadda ta haife ka, wadda ka sha mamanta.”" 
Luke11:28 Amma ya ce, “I, amma albarka tā fi tabbata ga waɗanda suke jin Maganar Allah, suke kuma kiyaye ta.”" 
Luke11:29 Da taro ya riƙa ƙaruwa a wurinsa, sai ya fara cewa, “Wannan zamani mugun zamani ne. Suna neman ganin wata alama, amma ba wata alamar da za a nuna musu sai dai ta Yunusa." 
Luke11:30 Wato, kamar yadda Yunusa ya zama alama ga mutanen Nineba, haka kuma, Ɗan Mutum zai zamar wa zamanin nan." 
Luke11:31 A Ranar Shari'a Sarauniyar Kudu za ta tashi tare da mutanen zamanin nan ta kā da su. Don ta zo ne daga bangon duniya tă ga hikimar Sulemanu. Ga kuma wanda ya fi Sulemanu a nan. 
Luke11:32 A Ranar Shari'a mutanen Nineba za su tashi tare da mutanen zamanin nan su kā da su. Don sun tuba saboda wa'azin Yunusa. To, ga kuma wanda ya fi Yunusa a nan.”" 
Luke11:33 “Ba mai kunna fitila ya ɓoye ta a rami, ko ya rufe ta da masaki. A'a, sai dai ya ɗora ta a maɗorinta, don masu shiga su ga hasken." 
Luke11:34 Ido shi ne fitilar jiki. In idonka lafiyayye ne, duk jikinka zai cika da haske. In kuwa idonka da lahani, sai jikinka ya cika da duhu." 
Luke11:35 Saboda haka, sai ka lura ko hasken da yake a gare ka duhu ne." 
Luke11:36 In kuwa duk jikinka ya cika da haske, ba inda ke da duhu, ai, duk sai ya haskaka gaba ɗaya, kamar yadda hasken fitila take haskaka maka.”" 
Luke11:37 Yesu yana magana, sai wani Bafarisiye ya kira shi cin abinci. Ya shiga cin abincin." 
Luke11:38 Sai Bafarisiyen ya yi mamakin ganin yadda Yesu zai ci abinci ba da fara wanke hannu ba. 
Luke11:39 Ubangiji kuwa ya ce masa, “Ku Farisiyawa kam, kukan wanke bayan ƙwarya da akushi, amma a ciki cike kuke da zalunci da mugunta." 
Luke11:40 Ku marasa azanci! Ashe, wanda ya yi bayan, ba shi ya yi cikin ba?" 
Luke11:41 Gara ku tsarkake cikin, sa'an nan kome zai tsarkaka a gare ku." 
Luke11:42 “Kaitonku, Farisiyawa! Ga shi, kuna fitar da zakkar na'ana'a da karkashi, da kuma kowane ganyen miya. Amma kun ƙi kula da aikata gaskiya da ƙaunar Allah. Waɗannan ne ya kamata ku yi, ba tare da yar da waɗancan ba." 
Luke11:43 Kaitonku, Farisiyawa! Ga shi, kuna son mafifitan mazaunai a majami'u, da kuma gaisuwa a kasuwa." 
Luke11:44 Kaitonku! Kuna kama da kaburburan da ba a gani, waɗanda mutane suke takawa da rashin sani.”" 
Luke11:45 Sai wani a cikin masanan Attaura ya amsa masa ya ce, “Malam, faɗar haka fa, mu ma, ai, ka ci mutuncinmu.”" 
Luke11:46 Sai Yesu ya ce, “Ku kuma kaitonku, masanan Attaura! Don kuna jibga wa mutane kaya masu wuyar ɗauka, ku da kanku ko ɗan yatsa ba kwa sawa ku tallafa musu!" 
Luke11:47 Kaitonku! Don kuna gina gubbobin annabawan da kakanninku suka kashe. 
Luke11:48 Wato, ku shaidu ne a kan kun yarda da ayyukan kakanninku, ga shi, su ne fa suka kashe su, ku kuwa wai har kuka gina musu gubbobin!" 
Luke11:49 Shi ya sa hikimar Allah ta ce, ‘Zan aika musu da annabawa da manzanni, su kashe waɗansu,’" 
Luke11:50 don alhakin jinin dukan annabawa da aka zubar tun daga farkon duniya, a bi shi a kan mutanen wannan zamani," 
Luke11:51 wato, tun daga jinin Habila, har ya zuwa na Zakariya, wanda aka kashe tsakanin bagaden hadaya da Wuri Mai Tsarki. Hakika, ina gaya muku, duk za a bi shi kan mutanen wannan zamani." 
Luke11:52 Kaitonku, masanan Attaura! Don kun ɗauke mabuɗin ilimi, ku kanku ba ku shiga ba, kun kuma hana masu son shiga su shiga.”" 
Luke11:53 Da ya fito daga wurin, sai malaman Attaura da Farisiyawa suka fara matsa masa ƙwarai, suna tsokanarsa ya yi maganar abubuwa da yawa," 
Luke11:54 suna haƙwansa su burma shi a cikin maganarsa. 
Luke12:1 Sa'an nan kuwa da dubban mutane suka taru har suna tattaka juna, da farko ya yi magana da almajiransa. Ya fara cewa, “Ku yi hankali da yistin Farisiyawa, wato, makirci." 
Luke12:2 Ba abin da yake rufe da ba zai tonu ba, ko kuwa abin da yake ɓoye da ba za a bayyana ba." 
Luke12:3 Don haka, kome kuka faɗa a asirce, za a ji shi a sarari. Abin kuma da kuka yi raɗa a loloki, za a yi shelarsa daga kan soraye" 
Luke12:4 “Ya ku masoyana, ina dai gaya muku, kada ku ji tsoron masu kisan mutum, bayan sun kashe kuwa, ba abin da za su iya yi." 
Luke12:5 Amma zan gaya muku wanda za ku tsorata. Ku ji tsoron wannan da in ya kashe, yana da ikon jefawa a cikin Gidan Wuta. Hakika, ina gaya muku, shi za ku ji tsoro!" 
Luke12:6 Ashe, ba gwara biyar ne kobo biyu ba? Ko ɗayarsu kuwa Allah bai manta da ita ba." 
Luke12:7 Kai! ko da gashin kanku ma duk a ƙidaye yake. Kada ku ji tsoro. Ai, martabarku ta fi ta gwara masu yawa.”" 
Luke12:8 “Ina kuma gaya muku, kowa ya bayyana yarda a gare ni a gaban mutane, Ɗan Mutum ma zai bayyana yarda a gare shi a gaban mala'ikun Allah." 
Luke12:9 Wanda kuwa ya yi musun sanina a gaban mutane, za a yi musun saninsa a gaban mala'ikun Allah." 
Luke12:10 Kowa ya kushe wa Ɗan Mutum, ā gafarta masa, amma wanda ya saɓi Ruhu Mai Tsarki, ba za a gafarta masa ba." 
Luke12:11 Sa'ad da suka kai ku gaban majami'u, da mahukunta da shugabanni, kada ku damu da yadda za ku mai da jawabi, ko kuwa abin da za ku faɗa," 
Luke12:12 domin Ruhu Mai Tsarki zai koya muku abin da ya kamata ku faɗa a lokacin.” 
Luke12:13 Sai wani a cikin taron ya ce masa, “Malam, kă ce wa ɗan'uwana ya raba gādo da ni.”" 
Luke12:14 Amma Yesu ya ce masa, “Haba kai kuwa, wa ya sa ni in zama muku alƙali, ko in raba muku gādo?”" 
Luke12:15 Ya kuma ce musu, “Ku kula fa, ku yi nesa da kowane irin kwaɗayi, don yawan kaya ba shi ne rai ba.”" 
Luke12:16 Sai ya ba su misali ya ce, “Gonar wani mai arziki ta yi albarka ƙwarai." 
Luke12:17 Sai ya ce a ransa, ‘To, ƙaƙa zan yi? Ba ni da inda zan ajiye amfanin gonata.’" 
Luke12:18 Ya kuma ce, ‘To, ga abin da zan yi. Sai in rushe rumbunana, in gina waɗansu manya, in zuba duk amfanin gonata da kayana a ciki." 
Luke12:19 Zan kuma ce wa raina, “Lalle ina da kaya masu yawa a jibge, tanadin shekara da shekaru. Bari in huta, in yi ta ci, in yi ta sha, ina shagali.” ’" 
Luke12:20 Amma Allah ya ce masa, ‘Kai marar azanci! A daren nan za a karɓi ranka. To, kayan da ka tanada, na wa za su zama?’" 
Luke12:21 Haka, wanda ya tanada wa kansa dukiya yake, ba shi kuwa da wani tanadi a gun Allah.”" 
Luke12:22 Sai ya ce wa almajiransa, “Don haka, ina gaya muku, kada ku damu da batun rayuwarku game da abin da za ku ci, ko kuma jikinku, abin da za ku yi sutura." 
Luke12:23 Domin rai ya fi abinci, jiki kuma ya fi tufafi." 
Luke12:24 Ku dubi dai hankaki! Ai, ba sa shuka, ba sa girbi, ba su da taska ko rumbu, amma kuwa Allah yana cishe su. Sau nawa martabarku ta ninka ta tsuntsaye!”" 
Luke12:25 Wane ne a cikinku don damuwarsa zai iya ƙara ko da taƙi ga tsawon rayuwarsa? 
Luke12:26 To, in ba za ku iya yin ƙaramin abu irin wannan ba, don me kuke damuwa da sauran?" 
Luke12:27 Ku dubi dai furanni yadda suke girma, ba sa aikin fari, ba sa na baƙi, duk da haka, ina gaya muku, ko Sulemanu ma, shi da adonsa duk, bai taɓa yin adon da ya fi na ɗayansu ba." 
Luke12:28 To, ga shi Allah yana ƙawata tsire-tsiren jeji ma haka, waɗanda yau suke a raye, gobe kuwa a jefa su a murhu, balle ku? Ya ku masu ƙarancin bangaskiya!" 
Luke12:29 Ku ma kada ku damu a kan abin da za ku ci, ko abin da za ku sha, kada kuwa ku yi alhini." 
Luke12:30 Ai, al'umman duniya suna ta neman duk irin waɗannan abubuwa, ku kuwa, Ubanku ya san kuna bukatarsu." 
Luke12:31 Ku ƙwallafa rai ga al'amuran Mulkin Allah, sai a ƙara muku da waɗannan abubuwa kuma." 
Luke12:32 “Ya ku ɗan ƙaramin garke, kada ku ji tsoro, domin Ubanku na jin daɗin ba ku rabo a cikin Mulkin." 
Luke12:33 Ku sayar da mallakarku, ku bayar taimako. Ku samar wa kanku jakar kuɗi da ba ta tsufa, wato, dukiya marar yankewa ke nan a Sama, inda ba ɓarawon da zai gabato, ba kuma asun da zai ɓāta," 
Luke12:34 don kuwa inda dukiyarka take, a nan zuciyarka ma take.”" 
Luke12:35 “Ku yi ɗamara, fitilunku na kunne." 
Luke12:36 Ku dai zama kamar mutane masu jiran ubangijinsu ya dawo daga gidan biki, da zarar ya ƙwanƙwasa su buɗe masa." 
Luke12:37 Albarka tā tabbata ga bayin nan waɗanda ubangijinsu da zuwansa zai same su a faɗake. Hakika, ina gaya muku, zai yi ɗamara, ya ce su zauna cin abinci, sa'an nan ya bi ta kan kowannensu yana yi masa hidima." 
Luke12:38 In kuwa ya zo da tsakar dare ne, ko kuwa bayan tsakar dare, ya same su a faɗake, bayin nan masu albarka ne." 
Luke12:39 Amma dai ku sani, da maigida zai san lokacin da ɓarawo zai zo, da ya zauna a faɗake, ya hana a shiga masa gida." 
Luke12:40 Ku ma sai ku zauna a kan shiri, domin a lokacin da ba ku zata ba Ɗan Mutum zai zo.”" 
Luke12:41 Sai Bitrus ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, mu ne kake faɗa wa wannan misali, ko kuwa na kowa da kowa ne?”" 
Luke12:42 Ubangiji ya ce, “Wane ne amintaccen wakilin nan mai hikima, da ubangidansa zai ba shi riƙon gidansa, yă riƙa ba su abincinsu a kan kari?" 
Luke12:43 Albarka tā tabbata ga bawan da, in ubangidansa ya dawo, zai samu yana yin haka." 
Luke12:44 Hakika, ina gaya muku, sai ya ɗora shi a kan dukan mallaka tasa." 
Luke12:45 In kuwa bawan nan ya ce a ransa, ‘Ubangijina ya jinkirta zuwansa,’ sa'an nan ya soma dūkan barori, maza da mata, ya shiga ci da sha har yana buguwa," 
Luke12:46 ai, ubangijin wannan bawa zai zo a ranar da bai zata ba, a lokacin kuma da bai sani ba, yă farfasa masa jiki da bulala, ya ba shi rabonsa tare da marasa riƙon amana." 
Luke12:47 Bawan nan kuma wanda ya san nufin ubangijinsa, bai yi shiri ba, bai kuma bi nufinsa ba, za a yi masa matsanancin dūka," 
Luke12:48 Wanda kuwa bai san nufin ubangijinsa ba, ya kuma yi abin da ya isa dūka, za a doke shi kaɗan. Duk wanda aka ba abu mai yawa, a gunsa za a tsammaci abu mai yawa. Wanda kuma aka danƙa wa abu mai yawa, abu mafi yawa za a nema a gare shi.”" 
Luke12:49 “Wuta ce na zo in zuba wa duniya. Sona fa? A ce ta huru! 
Luke12:50 Ina da baftismar da za a yi mini, na kuwa ɗokanta ƙwarai har a yi mini ita!" 
Luke12:51 Kuna tsammani na zo ne in kawo salama a duniya? A'a, ina gaya muku, sai dai rabuwa." 
Luke12:52 Nan gaba, a gida guda mutum biyar za su kasu biyu, uku na gāba da biyu, biyu kuma na gāba da uku." 
Luke12:53 Ta haka, za su rabu. Uba yana gāba da ɗansa, ɗan kuma yana gāba da ubansa, uwa tana gāba da 'ya tata, 'yar kuma tana gāba da uwa tata, suruka tana gāba da matar ɗanta, matar ɗan kuma tana gāba da suruka tata.”" 
Luke12:54 Ya kuma ce wa taron, “In kun ga girgije yana tasowa daga yamma, nan da nan kukan ce, ‘Za a yi ruwa.’ Sai kuwa a yi." 
Luke12:55 In kuwa kun ga iskar kudu tana busowa, kukan ce, ‘Za a yi matsanancin zafi.’ Sai kuwa a yi." 
Luke12:56 Munafukai! Kuna iya gane yanayin ƙasa da na sararin sama, amma me ya sa ba ku iya gane alamun zamanin ba?”" 
Luke12:57 “Me ya sa ku da kanku ma ba kwa iya rarrabewa da abin da yake daidai? 
Luke12:58 Misali, in kuna tafiya zuwa gaban shari'a da mai ƙararku, sai ku yi ƙoƙari ku yi jiyayya da shi tun a hanya, don kada ya ja ku zuwa gaban alƙali, alƙali kuma ya miƙa wa ɗan doka, ɗan doka kuma ya jefa ku a kurkuku." 
Luke12:59 Ina gaya muku, lalle ba za ku fita ba, sai kun biya duka, ba sauran ko anini.”" 
Luke13:1 Nan take waɗansu da suke a wurin suka ba shi labarin Galilawan da Bilatus ya sa aka kashe, har jininsu ya gauraya da na yankan da suka yi na hadaya." 
Luke13:2 Sai Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Kuna tsammani waɗannan Galilawa sun fi duk sauran Galilawa zunubi ne, don sun sha wannan azaba?" 
Luke13:3 Ina gaya muku ba haka ba ne! In kuwa ba ku tuba ba, duk za ku halaka kamarsu." 
Luke13:4 Ko kuwa goma sha takwas ɗin nan da hasumiya ta faɗo a kansu, a Siluwam, ta kashe su, kuna tsammani sun fi duk sauran mutanen Urushalima laifi ne?" 
Luke13:5 Ina gaya muku ba haka ba ne! In kuwa ba ku tuba ba, duk za ku hallaka kamarsu.”" 
Luke13:6 Sai ya ba su misalin nan ya ce, “Wani mutum yana da ɓaure a garkar inabinsa. Sai ya zo neman 'ya'ya, amma bai samu ba." 
Luke13:7 Sai ya ce wa mai kula da garkar, ‘Ka ga, yau shekara uku ke nan nake zuwa neman 'ya'yan wannan ɓaure, amma ba na samu. A sare shi. Ƙaƙa zai tsare wuri a banza?’" 
Luke13:8 Sai ya amsa masa ya ce, ‘Ubangijina, bar shi dai bana ma, in yi masa kaftu, in zuba masa taki." 
Luke13:9 In ya yi 'ya'ya, to, in kuwa bai yi ba, sai a sare.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Wata rana yana koyarwa a wata majami'a ran Asabar," 
Luke13:11 sai ga wata mace wadda inna ta shanye tun shekara goma sha takwas, duk ta tanƙware, ko kaɗan ba ta iya miƙewa." 
Luke13:12 Da Yesu ya gan ta, sai ya kira ta ya ce mata, “Uwargida, an raba ki da rashin lafiyarki!”" 
Luke13:13 Sai ya ɗora mata hannu, nan take ta miƙe, ta kuma ɗaukaka Allah." 
Luke13:14 Amma shugaban majami'a ya ji haushi, don Yesu ya warkar ran Asabar. Sai ya ce wa jama'a, “Akwai ranaku har shida da ya kamata a yi aiki. Ku zo mana a ranakun nan a warkar da ku, ba ran Asabar ba.”" 
Luke13:15 Amma Ubangiji ya amsa masa ya ce, “Munafukai! Ashe, kowannenku ba ya kwance takarkarinsa ko jakinsa a turke, ya kai shi banruwa ran Asabar?" 
Luke13:16 Ashe, bai kamata matar nan 'yar zuriyar Ibrahim, wadda Shaiɗan ya ɗaure, yau shekara goma sha takwas, a kwance ta daga wannan ƙuƙumi a ran Asabar ba?”" 
Luke13:17 Da ya faɗi haka, sai duk abokan adawarsa suka kunyata, duk taron kuwa suka yi ta farin ciki da abubuwan al'ajabi da yake yi." 
Luke13:18 Sai Yesu ya ce, “Da me Mulkin Allah yake kama? Da me kuma zan kwatanta shi?" 
Luke13:19 Kamar ƙwayar mastad yake, wadda wani mutum ya je ya shuka a lambunsa, ta kuma girma ta zama itace, har tsuntsaye suka yi sheƙarsu a rassanta.”" 
Luke13:20 Ya sāke cewa, “Da me zan kwatanta Mulkin Allah?" 
Luke13:21 Kamar yisti yake wanda wata mace ta ɗauka ta cuɗa da mudu uku na garin alkama, har duk garin ya gama da yistin.”" 
Luke13:22 Sai ya ɗauki hanyarsa ta zuwa birane da ƙauyuka, yana koyarwa, yana dosar Urushalima." 
Luke13:23 Sai wani ya ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, waɗanda za su sami ceto kam, kaɗan ne?” Sai ya ce musu," 
Luke13:24 “Ku yi famar shiga ta ƙunƙuntar ƙofa. Don ina gaya muku, mutane da yawa za su nemi shiga, amma ba su iya ba." 
Luke13:25 In dai maigida ya riga ya tashi ya rufe ƙofa, kun kuma fara tsayawa daga waje, kuna ƙwanƙwasa ƙofar, kuna cewa, ‘Ya Ubangiji, buɗe mana,’ sai ya amsa muku ya ce, ‘Ku kam, ban san daga inda kuke ba.’" 
Luke13:26 Sa'an nan za ku fara cewa, ‘Ai, mun ci mun sha a gabanka, har ka koyar a kan titi-titinmu.’" 
Luke13:27 Shi kuwa sai ya ce, ‘Ina dai gaya muku, ku kam, ban san daga inda kuke ba. Ku tafi daga wurina, dukanku ku masu aikata mugunta!’" 
Luke13:28 Sa'ad da kuka ga Ibrahim, da Ishaku, da Yakubu, da dukan annabawa a Mulkin Allah, ku kuwa ana korarku, a nan ne za ku yi kuka da cizon baki." 
Luke13:29 Za a zo daga gabas da yamma, kudu da arewa, a zauna cin abinci a Mulkin Allah." 
Luke13:30 Ga shi fa, waɗansu da suke na ƙarshe za su zama na farko, waɗansu kuwa da suke na farko za su koma na ƙarshe.”" 
Luke13:31 Nan take waɗansu Farisiyawa suka zo suka ce masa, “Ai, sai ka tashi, ka fita daga nan, gama Hirudus yana son kashe ka.”" 
Luke13:32 Sai ya ce musu, “Ku tafi ku gaya wa dilan nan cewa, ‘Ka ga, yau ina fitar da aljannu, ina warkarwa, gobe ma haka, a rana ta uku kuwa zan gama aikina." 
Luke13:33 Duk da haka, lalle ne in ci gaba da tafiyata yau da gobe, da kuma jibi, don kuwa bai dace a kashe annabi ba, in ba a Urushalima ba.’" 
Luke13:34 “Ya mutanen Urushalima! Ya mutanen Urushalima! Masu kisan annabawa, masu jifan waɗanda aka aiko gare ku! Sau nawa ne ina so in tattaro ku kamar yadda kaza take tattara 'yan tsakinta a cikin fikafikanta, amma kun ƙi!" 
Luke13:35 Ga shi, an bar muku gidanku a yashe! ina kuwa gaya muku, ba za ku ƙara ganina ba, sai ran da kuka ce, ‘Albarka ta tabbata ga mai zuwa da sunan Ubangiji.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Wata ranar Asabar, ya shiga gidan wani shugaba Farisiyawa garin cin abinci, mutane kuwa suna haƙwansa." 
Luke14:2 Sai ga wani mai ciwon fara a gabansa. 
Luke14:3 Yesu ya amsa ya ce wa masanan Attaura da Farisiyawa, “Ya halatta a warkar ran Asabar ko kuwa?”" 
Luke14:4 Sai suka yi shiru, Yesu kuwa ya riƙe shi, ya warkar da shi, ya kuma sallame shi." 
Luke14:5 Sa'an nan ya ce musu, “Misali, wane ne a cikinku in yana da jaki ko takarkari ya faɗa a rijiya ran Asabar, ba zai fitar da shi nan da nan ba?”" 
Luke14:6 Sai suka kasa ba da amsar waɗannan abubuwa. 
Luke14:7 To, ganin yadda waɗanda aka gayyato sun zaɓi mazaunan alfarma, sai ya ba su misali ya ce," 
Luke14:8 “In an gayyace ka zuwa biki, kada ka zauna a mazaunin alfarma, kada ya zamana an gayyato wani wanda ya fi ka daraja," 
Luke14:9 wanda ya gayyato ku duka biyu kuma yă zo ya ce maka, ‘Ba mutumin nan wuri.’ Sa'an nan a kunyace ka koma mazauni mafi ƙasƙanci." 
Luke14:10 Amma in an gayyace ka biki, sai ka je ka zauna a wuri mafi ƙasƙanci, don in mai gayyar ya zo, sai ya ce maka, ‘Aboki, hawo nan mana.’ Za ka sami girma ke nan a gaban dukan waɗanda kuke zaune tare." 
Luke14:11 Duk wanda ya ɗaukaka kansa, za a ƙasƙantar da shi. Mai ƙasƙantar da kansa kuma, ɗaukaka shi za a yi.”" 
Luke14:12 Ya kuma ce da mai gayyar, “In za ka kira mutum cin abinci ko biki, kada ka riƙa kiran abokanka kawai, ko 'yan'uwanka, ko danginka ko maƙwabtanka masu arziki, kada su ma su gayyace ka, su sāka maka." 
Luke14:13 Amma in za ka kira biki, sai ka gayyayo gajiyayyu, da musakai, da guragu, da makafi," 
Luke14:14 za ka kuwa sami albarka, da yake ba su da hanyar sāka maka. Sai kuwa a sāka maka ranar tashin masu adalci.”" 
Luke14:15 Da jin haka, sai ɗaya daga cikin abokan cinsa ya ce masa, “Albarka tā tabbata ga wanda zai ci abinci a Mulkin Allah.”" 
Luke14:16 Amma ya ce masa, “Wani mutum ne ya shirya babban biki ya gayyaci mutane da yawa." 
Luke14:17 Da lokacin biki ya yi, sai ya aiki bawansa yă ce wa waɗanda aka gayyata, ‘Ku zo, duk an shirya kome,’" 
Luke14:18 Sai dukansu baki ɗaya suka fara kawo hanzari. Na farko ya ce masa, ‘Na sayi gona, lalle ne in je in gano ta. Ina roƙonka ka ɗauke mini,’" 
Luke14:19 Sai wani ya ce, ‘Na sayi shanun noma guda goma, za ni in gwada su. Ina roƙonka ka ɗauke mini.’" 
Luke14:20 Wani kuma ya ce, ‘Na yi aure, don haka ba zan iya zuwa ba.’" 
Luke14:21 Bawan ya dawo ya ba ubangijinsa labari. Sai maigidan ya yi fushi, ya ce wa bawansa, ‘Fita maza, ka bi titi-titin birni da kwararo-kwararo, ka ɗebo gajiyayyu, da musakai, da makafi, da guragu.’" 
Luke14:22 Sai bawan ya ce, ‘Ya ubangiji, abin da ka umarta duk an gama, amma har yanzu da sauran wuri.’" 
Luke14:23 Sai ubangijin biki ya ce wa bawan, ‘Fita, ka bi gwadabe-gwadabe da hanyoyin karkara, ka rinjayi mutane su shigo, don a cika gidana." 
Luke14:24 Ina gaya muku, ba ko ɗaya daga cikin mutanen da na gayyata a dā da zai ɗanɗana bikina ba.’ ”" 
Luke14:25 To, taro masu yawan gaske binsa. Sai ya juya ya ce musu," 
Luke14:26 “Duk mai zuwa wurina, in bai fi ƙaunata da ubansa, da uwa tasa, da mata tasa, da 'ya'yansa, da 'yan'uwansa mata da maza, har ma ransa ba, ba zai iya zama almajirina ba." 
Luke14:27 Duk wanda bai ɗauki gicciyensa ya bi ni ba, ba zai iya zama almajirina ba." 
Luke14:28 Misali, in wani daga cikinku yana son gina soron bene, da fari ba sai ya zauna ya yi lissafin abin da zai kashe ba, ya ga ko yana da isassun kuɗi da za su ƙare aikin?" 
Luke14:29 Kada ya zamana bayan da ya sa harsashin ginin, yă kasa gamawa, har duk waɗanda suka gani, su fara yi masa ba'a," 
Luke14:30 su riƙa cewa, ‘A! Ka ga mutumin nan ya fara gini, amma ya kasa gamawa!’" 
Luke14:31 “Ko kuwa wane sarki ne, in za shi yaƙi da wani sarki, da fari ba ya zauna ya yi shawara, ya ga ko shi mai mutum dubu goma zai iya karawa da mai dubu ashirin ba?" 
Luke14:32 In kuwa ba zai iya ba, to, tun wancan yana nesa, sai ya aiki jakadu, su tambayo sharuɗan amana." 
Luke14:33 Haka ma, kowannenku in bai saki duk abin da ya mallaka ba, ba zai iya zama almajirina ba.”" 
Luke14:34 “Gishiri abu ne mai kyau, amma in gishiri ya sāne, da me za a daɗaɗa shi?" 
Luke14:35 Ba shi da wani amfani a gona, ko a taki, sai dai a zubar kawai. Duk mai kunnen ji, ya ji.”" 
Luke15:1 To, sai duk masu karɓar haraji da masu zunubi suka yi ta matsowa wurinsa su saurare shi." 
Luke15:2 Sai Farisiyawa da malaman Attaura suka riƙa gunaguni suna cewa, “Haba! Wannan mutum yana karɓar masu zunubi, har ma tare suke cin abinci!”" 
Luke15:3 Sai ya ba su wannan misali ya ce. 
Luke15:4 “In waninku yana da tumaki ɗari, ɗayarsu ta ɓace, to, ba sai ya bar tasa'in da taran nan a makiyaya, ya bi sawun wadda ta ɓata, har ya same ta ba?" 
Luke15:5 In kuwa ya same ta, sai ya saɓo ta a kafaɗa, yana farin ciki." 
Luke15:6 In ya dawo gida, sai ya tara abokansa da maƙwabta ya ce musu, ‘Ku taya ni farin ciki, don na samo tunkiyata da ta ɓata.’" 
Luke15:7 Ina dai gaya muku, haka kuma, za a yi farin ciki a Sama, a kan mai zunubi guda da ya tuba, fiye da kan adalai tasa'in da tara waɗanda ba su bukatar tuba.”" 
Luke15:8 “Ko kuwa wace mace ce, in tana da kuɗi azurfa guda goma, in ta yar da ɗaya, ba sai ta kunna fitila ta share gidan, ta yi ta nacin nemansa, har ta same shi ba?" 
Luke15:9 In kuwa ta same shi, sai ta tara ƙawayenta da maƙwabta mata, ta ce musu, ‘Ku taya ni farin ciki, don na sami kuɗin nan da na yar.’" 
Luke15:10 Haka nake gaya muku, abin farin ciki ne ga mala'ikun Allah in mai zunubi guda ya tuba.”" 
Luke15:11 Ya kuma ce, “An yi wani mutum mai 'ya'ya biyu maza." 
Luke15:12 Sai ƙaramin ya ce wa ubansa, ‘Baba, ba ni rabona na gādo.’ Sai uban ya raba musu dukiyarsa." 
Luke15:13 Bayan 'yan kwanaki kaɗan sai ƙaramin ya tattara duk mallakarsa, ya kama hanya zuwa ƙasa mai nisa. A can ya fallasar da kayansa a wajen masha'a." 
Luke15:14 Da ya ɓad da kome kakat, aka yi babbar yunwa a ƙasar, sai ya shiga fatara." 
Luke15:15 Ya je ya rāɓu da wani ɗan ƙasar, shi kuwa ya tura shi makiyayar kiwon alade." 
Luke15:16 Har ma ya so ya cika cikinsa da kwasfar da aladu suke ci, amma ba wanda ya ba shi wani abu" 
Luke15:17 Amma da ya tara hankalinsa sai ya ce, ‘Kaitona! Nawa ne daga cikin barorin ubana da suke da abinci, da yake kamar ƙasa a gare su! Ga ni a nan kuwa, yunwa tana kisana!" 
Luke15:18 Zan tashi, in tafi gun ubana, in ce masa, “Baba, na yi wa Mai Sama zunubi, na kuma saɓa maka." 
Luke15:19 Ban ma cancanci a ƙara kirana ɗanka ba. Ka mai da ni kamar ɗaya daga cikin barorinka.” ’ 
Luke15:20 Sai ya tashi, ya taho wurin ubansa. Amma tun yana daga nesa, sai ubansa ya hango shi, tausayi ya kama shi, ya yiwo gudu, ya rungume shi, ya yi ta sumbatarsa." 
Luke15:21 Sai kuma ɗan ya ce masa, ‘Baba, na yi wa Mai Sama zunubi, na kuma saɓa maka. Ban ma cancanci a ƙara kirana ɗanka ba.’" 
Luke15:22 Amma uban ya ce wa bayinsa, ‘Maza ku kawo riga mafi kyau, ku sa masa. Ku sa masa zobe da takalma," 
Luke15:23 a kuma kawo kiwataccen ɗan maraƙin nan, a yanka, mu ci, mu yi murna." 
Luke15:24 Don ɗan nan nawa dā ya mutu ne, amma a yanzu ya komo, dā ya ɓata, amma a yanzu an same shi.’ Sai suka yi ta farin ciki." 
Luke15:25 “A sa'an nan kuwa, babban ɗansa yana gona. Yana dawowa, ya yi kusa da gida ke nan, sai ya ji ana kaɗe-kaɗe da raye-raye." 
Luke15:26 Sai ya kira wani baran gidan, ya tambayi dalilin wannan abu." 
Luke15:27 Shi kuwa ya ce masa, ‘Ai, ɗan'uwanka ne ya dawo, tsohonku ya yanka kiwataccen ɗan maraƙin nan saboda ya sadu da shi lafiya ƙalau.’" 
Luke15:28 Amma wan ya yi fushi, ya ƙi shiga. Ubansa kuwa ya fito, ya yi ta rarrashinsa." 
Luke15:29 Amma ya amsa wa ubansa ya ce, ‘Dubi yawan shekarun nan da na bauta maka. Ban taɓa ta da umarninka ba. Duk da haka, ba ka taɓa ba ni ko ɗan taure ba, da za mu yi shagali tare da abokaina." 
Luke15:30 Amma da ɗan nan naka ya zo, wanda ya fallasar da dukiyarka a kan karuwai, ga shi, ka yanka masa kiwataccen ɗan maraƙin nan!’" 
Luke15:31 Sai uban ya ce masa, ‘Ya ɗana, ai, kullum kana tare da ni, duk abin da yake nawa naka ne." 
Luke15:32 Ai kuwa, daidai ne a yi ta murna da farin ciki, don ɗan'uwan nan naka dā ya mutu, a yanzu ya komo, dā ya ɓata, amma an same shi.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Ya kuma ce wa almajiransa, “An yi wani mai arziki da yake da wakili. Sai aka sari wakilin a wurinsa a kan yana fallasar masa da dukiya." 
Luke16:2 Sai ya kira shi ya ce masa, ‘Labarin me nake ji naka? Kawo lissafin wakilcinka, don ba sauran ka zama wakilina.’" 
Luke16:3 Sai wakilin ya ce a ransa, ‘Ƙaƙa zan yi, da yake maigida zai karɓe wakilci daga hannuna? Ga shi, ba ni da ƙarfin noma, in yi roƙo kuwa, ina jin kunya." 
Luke16:4 Yauwa! Na san abin da zan yi, don in an fisshe ni daga wakilcin, mutane su karɓe ni a gidajensu.’" 
Luke16:5 Sai ya kira mabartan maigidansa da ɗaya ɗaya, ya ce wa na farko, ‘Nawa maigida yake bin ka?’" 
Luke16:6 Ya ce, ‘Garwa ɗari ta mai.’ Sai ya ce masa, ‘Ga takardarka, maza ka zauna, ka rubutu hamsin,’" 
Luke16:7 Ya kuma ce wa wani, ‘Kai fa, nawa ake binka?’ Sai ya ce, ‘Buhu ɗari na alkama.’ Ya ce masa, ‘Ga takardarka, ka rubuta tamanin.’" 
Luke16:8 Sai maigidan ya yaba wa wakilin nan marar gaskiya saboda wayonsa. Don 'yan zamani a ma'ammalarsu da mutanen zamaninsu, sun fi mutanen haske wayo." 
Luke16:9 Ina gaya muku, ku yi abokai ta dukiya, ko da yake aba ce wadda take iya aikata mugunta, don sa'ad da ta ƙare su karɓe ku a gidaje masu dawwama." 
Luke16:10 “Wanda yake da aminci a ƙaramin abu, mai aminci ne a babban abu. Wanda yake marar gaskiya a ƙaramin abu, marar gaskiya ne a babban abu." 
Luke16:11 Idan fa ba ku yi aminci da dukiya ta wannan duniya ba, wa zai amince muku da dukiya ta gaskiya?" 
Luke16:12 In kuma ba ku yi aminci da kayan wani ba, wa zai ba ku halaliyarku?" 
Luke16:13 Ba baran da zai iya bauta wa iyayengiji biyu, ko dai ya ƙi ɗaya, ya so ɗaya, ko kuwa ya amince wa ɗayan, ya raina ɗayan. Ba dama ku bauta wa Allah da dukiya gaba ɗaya.”" 
Luke16:14 Farisiyawa kuwa da yake masu son kuɗi ne, da jin haka, suka yi masa tsaki." 
Luke16:15 Sai ya ce musu, “Ku ne masu baratar da kanku a gaban mutane. Amma Allah ya san zukatanku. Abin da mutane suke girmamawa ƙwarai, ai, abin ƙyama ne a gun Allah." 
Luke16:16 “Attaura da litattafan annabawa suna nan har ya zuwa ga Yahaya, daga lokacin nan kuwa ake yin bisharar Mulkin Allah, kowa kuma yana kutsawa zuwa ciki." 
Luke16:17 Duk da haka, zai fi sauƙi sararin sama da ƙasa su shuɗe, da ɗigo ɗaya na Attaura ya gushe.”" 
Luke16:18 “Kowa ya saki mata tasa ya auri wata, ya yi zina ke nan. Wanda ma ya auri sakakkiya ya yi zina.”" 
Luke16:19 “An yi wani mai arziki, mai sa tufafin jan alharini da farare masu ƙawa, yana shan daularsa a kowace rana." 
Luke16:20 An kuma ajiye wani gajiyayye a ƙofarsa, mai suna Li'azaru, wanda duk jikinsa miki ne." 
Luke16:21 Shi kuwa yana marmarin ya ƙoshi da suɗin mai arzikin nan. Har ma karnuka sukan zo suna lasar miyakunsa. 
Luke16:22 Ana nan sai gajiyayyen nan ya mutu, mala'iku kuma suka ɗauke shi, suka kai shi wurin Ibraham. Mai arzikin ma ya mutu, aka kuma binne shi." 
Luke16:23 Yana a cikin Hades yana shan azaba, sai ya ɗaga kai ya hangi Ibrahim daga nesa, da Li'azaru a wurinsa." 
Luke16:24 Sai ya yi kira ya ce, ‘Baba Ibrahim, ka ji tausayina, ka aiko Li'azaru ya tsoma kan yatsarsa a ruwa ya sanyaya harshena, don azaba nake sha a cikin wannan wuta.’" 
Luke16:25 Amma Ibraham ya ce, ‘Ɗana, ka tuna fa, a zamanka na duniya ka sha duniyarka, Li'azaru kuwa ya sha wuya. Amma yanzu daɗi ake ba shi, kai kuwa kana shan azaba." 
Luke16:26 Banda wannan ma duka, tsakaninmu da ku akwai wani gawurtaccen rami mai zurfi, zaunanne, don waɗanda suke son ƙetarewa zuwa wurinku kada su iya, kada kuma kowa ya ƙetaro zuwa wurinmu daga can.’" 
Luke16:27 Sai mai arzikin ya ce, ‘To, ina roƙonka, Baba, ka aika shi zuwa gidan ubana," 
Luke16:28 don ina da 'yan'uwa biyar maza, ya je ya yi musu gargaɗi, kada su ma su zo wurin azabar nan.’" 
Luke16:29 Amma Ibrahim ya ce, ‘Ai, suna da littattafan Musa da na annabawa, su saurare su mana.’" 
Luke16:30 Sai ya ce, ‘A'a, Baba Ibrahim, in dai wani daga cikin matattu ya je wurinsu sa tuba.’" 
Luke16:31 Ibrahim ya ce masa, ‘In dai har ba su saurari littattafan Musa da na annabawa ba, ko da wani ya tashi daga cikin matattu ma, ba za su rinjayu ba.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Sai ya ce wa almajiransa, “Sanadodin tuntuɓe ba su da makawa, duk da haka kaiton wanda shi ne sanadinsu!" 
Luke17:2 Da dai wani ya sa ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan 'yan yara ya yi laifi, zai fiye masa a rataya wani dutsen niƙa a wuyansa, a jefa shi a cikin teku." 
Luke17:3 Ku kula da kanku fa. In ɗan'uwanka ya yi laifi, ka tsauta masa. In kuwa ya tuba, ka yafe shi." 
Luke17:4 Ko ya yi maka laifi sau bakwai rana ɗaya, sa'an nan ya juyo wurinka sau bakwai ya ce, ‘Na tuba,’ sai ka yafe shi.”" 
Luke17:5 Sai manzanni suka ce wa Ubangiji, “Ka ƙara mana bangaskiya.”" 
Luke17:6 Ubangiji kuwa ya ce, “Da kuna da bangaskiya, ko da misalin ƙwayar mastad, da za ku ce wa wannan durumi, ‘Ka ciru, ka dasu cikin teku,’ sai kuwa ya bi umarninku.”" 
Luke17:7 “Misali, wane ne a cikinku in yana da bawa mai yi masa noma ko kiwon tumaki, da zarar ya dawo daga jeji, zai ce masa, ‘Maza, zo ka zauna, ka ci abinci’?" 
Luke17:8 Ashe, ba ce masa zai yi, ‘Shirya mini jibi, ka kuma yi ɗamara, ka yi mini hidima, har in gama ci da sha, daga baya kai kuma ka ci ka sha,’ ba?" 
Luke17:9 Yā gode wa bawan nan don ya bi umarni? 
Luke17:10 Haka ku ma, in kuka bi duk abin da aka umarce ku, sai ku ce, ‘Mu bayi ne marasa amfani. Mun dai yi abin da yake wajibinmu kurum.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Wata rana yana tafiya Urushalima, sai ya bi iyakar ƙasar Samariya da Galili." 
Luke17:12 Yana shiga wani ƙauye ke nan, sai waɗansu kutare maza guda goma suka tarye shi, suna tsaye daga nesa." 
Luke17:13 Sai suka ɗaga murya suka ce, “Ya Maigida Yesu, ka ji tausayinmu,”" 
Luke17:14 Da ya gan su, ya ce musu, “Ku je wurin firistoci su gan ku.” Suna tafiya ke nan, sai suka tsarkaka." 
Luke17:15 Ɗayansu kuma da ganin an warkar da shi, ya komo, yana ta ɗaukaka Allah da murya mai ƙarfi," 
Luke17:16 ya fāɗi a gaban Yesu, yana gode masa. Shi kuwa Basamariye ne." 
Luke17:17 Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Ba goma ne aka tsarkake ba? Ina taran?" 
Luke17:18 Ashe, ba wanda aka samu ya komo ya ɗaukaka Allah, sai baƙon nan kaɗai?”" 
Luke17:19 Sai Yesu ya ce masa, “Tashi, ka yi tafiyarka. Bangaskiyarka ta warkar da kai.”" 
Luke17:20 Da Farisiyawa suka tambaye shi lokacin bayyanar Mulkin Allah, ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ai, bayyanar Mulkin Allah ba ganinta ake yi da ido ba." 
Luke17:21 Ba kuwa za a ce, ‘A! Ga shi nan,’ ko kuwa, ‘Ga shi can,’ ba. Ai, Mulkin Allah a tsakaninku yake.”" 
Luke17:22 Ya kuma ce wa almajiran, “Lokaci na zuwa da za ku yi begen ganin rana ɗaya daga cikin ranakun Ɗan Mutum, amma ba za ku gani ba." 
Luke17:23 Za su ce muku, ‘A! ga shi nan,’ ko kuwa, ‘Ga shi can!’ Kada ku je, kada ku bi su." 
Luke17:24 Kamar yadda walƙiya take wulgawa walai, daga wannan bangon duniya zuwa wancan, haka ma, Ɗan Mutum zai zama a ranar bayyanarsa." 
Luke17:25 Amma lalle sai ya sha wuya iri iri tukuna, mutanen zamanin nan kuma su ƙi shi." 
Luke17:26 Kamar yadda ya faru a zamanin Nuhu, haka kuma zai faru a lokacin bayyanar Ɗan Mutum." 
Luke17:27 Ana ci, ana sha, ana aure, ana aurarwa, har ya zuwa ranar da Nuhu ya shiga jirgi, Ruwan Tsufana kuma ya zo, ya hallaka su duka." 
Luke17:28 Haka ma aka yi a zamanin Lutu, ana ci, ana sha, ana saye, ana sayarwa, ana shuke-shuke da gine-gine," 
Luke17:29 amma a ranar da Lutu ya fita daga Saduma, aka zubo wuta da duwatsun wuta daga sama, aka hallaka su duka." 
Luke17:30 Haka kuma zai zama a ranar bayyanar Ɗan Mutum. 
Luke17:31 A ran nan fa wanda yake kan soro, kayansa kuma na cikin gida, kada ya sauko garin ɗaukarsu. Haka kuma wanda yake gona, kada ya juyo." 
Luke17:32 Ku tuna fa da matar Lutu. 
Luke17:33 Duk mai son adana ransa, zai rasa shi. Duk kuwa wanda ya rasa ransa, adana shi ya yi." 
Luke17:34 Ina gaya muku, a wannan dare za a ga mutum biyu a gado ɗaya, a ɗau ɗaya, a bar ɗaya." 
Luke17:35 Za a ga mata biyu suna niƙa tare, a ɗau ɗaya, a bar ɗaya. [" 
Luke17:36 Za a ga mutum biyu a gona, a ɗau ɗaya, a bar ɗaya.]”" 
Luke17:37 Sai suka amsa suka ce, “Ina ne, ya Ubangiji?” Ya ce musu, “A inda mushe yake, ai, a nan ungulai sukan taru.”" 
Luke18:1 Ya kuma ba su wani misali cewa ya kamata kullum su yi addu'a, kada kuma su karai." 
Luke18:2 Ya ce, “A wani gari an yi wani alƙali marar tsoron Allah, marar kula da mutane." 
Luke18:3 A garin nan kuwa da wata wadda mijinta ya mutu, sai ta riƙa zuwa wurinsa, tana ce masa, ‘Ka shiga tsakanina da abokin gābana.’" 
Luke18:4 Da fari ya ƙi, amma daga baya sai ya ce a ransa, ‘Ko da yake ba na tsoron Allah, ba na kuma kula da mutane," 
Luke18:5 amma saboda gwauruwar nan ta dame ni, sai in bi mata hakkinta, don kada ta gajishe ni da yawan zuwa.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Sai Ubangiji ya ce, “Ku ji fa abin da alƙalin nan marar gaskiya ya faɗa!" 
Luke18:7 Ashe, Allah ba zai biya wa zaɓaɓɓunsa da suke yi masa kuka dare da rana hakkinsu ba? Zai yi jinkiri a wajen taimakonsu ne?" 
Luke18:8 Ina gaya muku, zai biya musu hakkinsu, da wuri kuwa. Amma kuwa sa'ad da Ɗan Mutum ya zo, zai tarar da bangaskiya a duniya ne?”" 
Luke18:9 Sai kuma ya ba da misalin nan ga waɗansu masu amince wa kansu, wai su masu adalci ne, har suna raina sauran mutane, ya ce," 
Luke18:10 “Waɗansu mutum biyu suka shiga Haikali yin addu'a, ɗaya Bafarisiye, ɗaya kuma mai karɓar haraji." 
Luke18:11 Sai Bafarisiyen ya miƙe, ya yi addu'a ga kansa ya ce, ‘Ya Allah, na gode maka, da yake ni ba kamar sauran mutane nake ba, mazambata, marasa adalci, mazinata, ko ma kamar mai karɓar harajin nan." 
Luke18:12 Duk mako ina azumi sau biyu. Kome na samu nakan fitar da zakka.’ 
Luke18:13 Mai karɓar haraji kuwa yana tsaye daga can nesa, bai yarda ya ɗaga kai sama ba, sai dai yana bugun ƙirjinsa, yana cewa, ‘Ya Allah, ka yi mini jinƙai, ni mai zunubi!’" 
Luke18:14 Ina dai gaya muku, wannan mutum ya koma gidansa baratacce, ba kamar ɗayan ba. Don duk mai ɗaukaka kansa, za a ƙasƙantar da shi. Mai ƙasƙantar da kansa kuwa, ɗaukaka shi za a yi.”" 
Luke18:15 Waɗansu suka kawo masa 'yan yaransu domin ya taɓa su. Ganin haka sai almajiransa suka kwaɓe su. 
Luke18:16 Amma Yesu ya kira 'yan yara wurinsa ya ce, “Ku bar yara ƙanana su zo wurina, kada ku hana su. Ai, Mulkin Allah na irinsu ne." 
Luke18:17 Hakika, ina gaya muku, duk wanda bai yi na'am da Mulkin Allah kamar yadda ƙaramin yaro yake yi ba, ba zai shiga Mulkin ba har abada.”" 
Luke18:18 Wani shugaban jama'a ya tambaye shi ya ce, “Malam managarci, me zan yi in gaji rai madawwami?”" 
Luke18:19 Sai Yesu ya ce masa, “Don me ka kira ni managarci? Ai, ba wani Managarci, sai Allah kaɗai." 
Luke18:20 Kā dai san umarnan nan, ‘Kada ka yi zina. Kada ka yi kisankai. Kada ka yi sata. Kada ka yi shaidar zur. Ka girmama mahaifinka da mahaifiyarka.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Sai ya ce, “Ai, duk na kiyaye waɗannan tun ƙuruciyata.”" 
Luke18:22 Da Yesu ya ji haka, ya ce masa, “Har yanzu abu guda ne kawai ya rage maka, ka sayar da duk mallakarka, ka rarraba wa gajiyayyu, za ka sami wadata a Sama. Sa'an nan ka zo ka bi ni.”" 
Luke18:23 Da jin haka, sai ya yi baƙin ciki gaya, don shi mai arziki ne da gaske." 
Luke18:24 Yesu kuwa da ya gan shi haka, ya ce, “Kai! Da ƙyar kamar me masu dukiya su shiga Mulkin Allah!" 
Luke18:25 Ai, zai fiye wa raƙumi sauƙi ya bi ta kafar allura, da mai arziki ya shiga Mulkin Allah.”" 
Luke18:26 Waɗanda suka ji wannan magana suka ce, “To, in haka ne, wa zai sami ceto ke nan?”" 
Luke18:27 Amma Yesu ya ce, “Abin da ya fi ƙarfin mutum, mai yiwuwa ne a gun Allah.”" 
Luke18:28 Sai Bitrus ya ce, “To, ai, ga shi, mun bar mallakarmu, mun bi ka.”" 
Luke18:29 Yesu ya ce musu, “Hakika, ina gaya muku, ba wanda zai bar gida, ko matarsa, ko 'yan'uwansa, ko iyayensa, ko kuma 'ya'yansa, saboda Mulkin Allah," 
Luke18:30 sa'an nan ya kasa samun ninkinsu mai yawa a yanzu, a Lahira kuma ya sami rai madawwami.”" 
Luke18:31 Sai ya keɓe sha biyun nan, ya ce musu, “Ga shi, za mu Urushalima, duk abin da yake rubuce kuma game da Ɗan Mutum, ta hannun annabawa zai tabbata." 
Luke18:32 Gama za a bāshe shi ga al'ummai, a yi masa ba'a, a wulakanta shi, a kuma tofa masa yau." 
Luke18:33 Za su yi masa bulala, su kashe shi, a rana ta uku kuma ya tashi.”" 
Luke18:34 Amma ko ɗaya ba su fahimci waɗannan abubuwa ba, domin zancen nan a ɓoye yake daga gare su, ba su ma gane abin da aka faɗa ba." 
Luke18:35 Da ya kusato Yariko, ga wani makaho zaune a gefen hanya, yana bara." 
Luke18:36 Da ya ji taro na wucewa, sai ya tambaya ko mene ne." 
Luke18:37 Suka ce masa, “Ai, Yesu Banazare ne yake wucewa.”" 
Luke18:38 Sai ya ɗaga murya ya ce, “Ya Yesu Ɗan Dawuda, ka ji tausayina!”" 
Luke18:39 Sai waɗanda suke gaba suka kwaɓe shi ya yi shiru. Amma ƙara ɗaga murya yake yi ƙwarai da gaske, yana cewa, “Ya Ɗan Dawuda, ka ji tausayina!”" 
Luke18:40 Sai Yesu ya tsaya, ya yi umarni a kawo shi wurinsa. Da ya zo kusa, ya tambaye shi," 
Luke18:41 “Me kake so in yi maka?” Ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, in sami gani!”" 
Luke18:42 Yesu ya ce masa, “Karɓi ganin gari, bangaskiyarka ta warkar da kai.”" 
Luke18:43 Nan take ya sami gani, ya bi Yesu, yana ɗaukaka Allah. Ganin haka, sai duk jama'a suka yabi Allah." 
Luke19:1 Yesu ya shiga Yariko. Yana ratsa garin," 
Luke19:2 sai wani mutum mai suna Zakka, babba ne a cikin masu karɓar haraji, mai arziki ne kuma," 
Luke19:3 ya nemi ganin ko wane ne Yesu, amma ya kasa ganinsa saboda taro, don shi gajere ne." 
Luke19:4 Sai ya yi gaba a guje, ya hau wani durumi don ya gan shi, don Yesu ta nan zai bi." 
Luke19:5 Da Yesu ya iso wurin, ya ɗaga kai ya ce masa, “Zakka, yi maza ka sauko, domin yau lalle a gidanka zan sauka.”" 
Luke19:6 Sai ya yi hanzari ya sauko, ya karɓe shi da murna." 
Luke19:7 Da suka ga haka, duk suka yi ta gunaguni, suka ce, “A! A gidan mai zunubi dai ya sauka!”" 
Luke19:8 Sai Zakka ya miƙe, ya ce wa Ubangiji, “Ya Ubangiji, ka ga, rabin mallakata zan ba gajiyayyu. Kowa na zalunta kuwa, zan mayar masa da ninki huɗu.”" 
Luke19:9 Yesu ya ce masa, “Yau kam, ceto ya sauka a gidan nan, tun da yake shi ma ɗan Ibrahim ne." 
Luke19:10 Don Ɗan Mutum ya zo ne musamman garin neman abin da ya ɓata, yă cece shi kuma.”" 
Luke19:11 Da suka ji abubuwan nan, Yesu ya ci gaba da gaya musu wani misali, gama yana kusa da Urushalima, suna kuma tsammani Mulkin Allah zai bayyana nan da nan." 
Luke19:12 Sai ya ce, “Wani mutum mai asali ya tafi wata ƙasa mai nisa neman sarauta yă dawo." 
Luke19:13 Sai ya kira bayinsa goma, ya ba su fam guda guda, ya kuma ce musu, ‘Ku yi ta jujjuya su har in dawo.’" 
Luke19:14 Amma mutanensa suka ƙi shi, har suka aiki jakadu a bayansa, cewa ba sa so ya yi mulki a kansu." 
Luke19:15 Ana nan, da ya samo sarautar ya dawo, sai ya yi umarni a kirawo bayin nan da ya bai wa kuɗin, ya ga ribar da suka ci a wajen jujjuyawar." 
Luke19:16 Sai na farko ya zo gabansa, ya ce, ‘Ya ubangiji, fam ɗinka ya jawo fam goma.’" 
Luke19:17 Sai shi kuma ya ce masa, ‘Madalla, bawan kirki! Tun da ka yi gaskiya a kan ƙaramin abu, to, na ba ka mulkin gari goma.’" 
Luke19:18 Sai na biyun ya zo, ya ce, ‘Ya ubangida, fam ɗinka ya jawo fam biyar.’" 
Luke19:19 Shi kuma ya ce masa, ‘Kai ma na ba ka mulkin gari biyar.’" 
Luke19:20 Wani kuma ya zo, ya ce, ‘Ya ubangiji, ga fam ɗinka nan! Dā ma a mayani na ƙulle shi, na ajiye." 
Luke19:21 Domin ina tsoronka, don kai mutum ne mai tsanani, son banza a gare ka, kakan girbi abin da ba kai ka shuka ba.’" 
Luke19:22 Sai ya ce masa ‘Kai mugun bawa! Zan yi maka shari'a bisa ga abin da ka faɗa da bakinka. Ashe, ka sani ni mutum ne mai tsanani, mai son banza, ina kuma girbar abin da ba ni na shuka ba?" 
Luke19:23 To, in haka ne, don me ba ka ajiye kuɗin nawa a banki ba, da dawowata in ƙarɓa, har da riba?”" 
Luke19:24 Sai ya ce wa na tsaitsaye a wurin, ‘Ku karɓe fam ɗin daga gunsa, ku bai wa mai goman nan.’" 
Luke19:25 Suka ce masa, ‘Ya ubangiji, ai, yana da fam goma.’" 
Luke19:26 ‘Ina dai gaya muku, duk mai abu a kan ƙara wa. Marar abu kuwa, ko ɗan abin da yake da shi ma, sai a karɓe masa." 
Luke19:27 Waɗannan maƙiya nawa kuwa, da ba sa so in yi mulki a kansu, ku kawo su nan a kashe su a gabana.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Da Yesu ya faɗi haka, ya yi gaba zuwa Urushalima." 
Luke19:29 Da ya kusato Betafaji da Betanya, a wajen dutsen da ake kira Dutsen Zaitun, ya aiki almajiransa biyu," 
Luke19:30 ya ce musu, “Ku shiga ƙauyen can da yake gabanku. Da shigarku za ku ga wani aholaki a ɗaure, wanda ba a taɓa hawa ba. Ku kwanto shi." 
Luke19:31 Kowa ya tambaye ku, ‘Don me kuke kwance shi?’ ku ce, ‘Ubangiji ne yake bukatarsa.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Sai waɗanda aka aika suka tafi, suka tarar kamar yadda ya faɗa musu." 
Luke19:33 Suna cikin kwance aholakin, masu shi suka ce musu, “Don me kuke kwance aholakin nan?”" 
Luke19:34 Sai suka ce, “Ubangiji ne yake bukatarsa.”" 
Luke19:35 Sai suka kawo shi wurin Yesu. Da suka shimfiɗa mayafansu a kan aholakin, suka ɗora Yesu." 
Luke19:36 Yana cikin tafiya, sai mutane suka shisshimfiɗa mayafansu a hanya." 
Luke19:37 Da ya zo gab da gangaren Dutsen Zaitun, sai duk taron almajiran suka ɗauki murna, suna yabon Allah da murya mai ƙarfi saboda duk mu'ujizan da suka gani." 
Luke19:38 Suka ce, “Albarka ta tabbata ga Sarkin nan mai zuwa da sunan Ubangiji! Salama ta tabbata a Sama, ɗaukaka kuma ga Allah!”" 
Luke19:39 Sai waɗansu Farisiyawa a cikin taron suka ce masa, “Malam, ka kwaɓi almajiranka mana!”" 
Luke19:40 Ya amsa ya ce, “Ina dai gaya muku, ko waɗannan sun yi shiru, to, duwatsu ma sai su ɗauki sowa.”" 
Luke19:41 Da ya matso kusa, ya kuma hangi birnin, sai ya yi masa kuka," 
Luke19:42 ya ce, “Da ma a ce a yanzu kun san abubuwan da suke kawo salama. Amma ga shi, a yanzu a ɓoye suke a gare ku." 
Luke19:43 Don lokaci zai auko muku da maƙiyanku za su yi muku ƙawanya, su yi muku zobe, su kuma tsattsare ku ta kowane gefe," 
Luke19:44 su fyaɗa ku a ƙasa, ku mutanen birni duka, ba kuma za su bar wani dutse a kan ɗan'uwansa ba a birninku, don ba ku fahimci lokacin da ake sauko muku da alheri ba.”" 
Luke19:45 Sai ya shiga Haikali, ya fara korar masu sayarwa," 
Luke19:46 ya ce musu, “Ai, a rubuce yake cewa, ‘Ɗakina zai kasance ɗakin addu'a.’ Amma ku kun maishe shi kogon 'yan fashi.”" 
Luke19:47 Kowace rana ya yi ta koyarwa a Haikali. Amma manyan firistoci, da malaman Attaura, da shugabannin jama'a suka nema su hallaka shi." 
Luke19:48 Suka kuwa rasa abin da za su yi, saboda maganarsa ta ɗauke wa duk jama'a hankali." 
Luke20:1 Wata rana yana koyar da mutane a Haikali, yana yi musu bishara, sai ga manyan firistoci da malaman Attaura, da shugabanni suka matso," 
Luke20:2 suka ce masa, “Gaya mana da wane izini kake yin abubuwan nan, ko kuwa wa ya ba ka izinin?”" 
Luke20:3 Sai ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ni ma zan yi muku wata tambaya. Ku gaya mini," 
Luke20:4 baftismar da Yahaya ya yi, daga Sama take, ko kuwa ta mutum ce?”" 
Luke20:5 Sai suka yi muhawwara da juna suka ce, “In mun ce, ‘Daga Sama take,’ sai ya ce, ‘To, don me ba ku gaskata shi ba?’" 
Luke20:6 In kuwa muka ce, ‘Ta mutum ce,’ sai duk jama'a su jajjefe mu, don sun tabbata Yahaya annabi ne.”" 
Luke20:7 Sai suka amsa masa, suka ce, ba su san daga inda take ba." 
Luke20:8 Yesu ya ce musu, “Haka ni kuma ba zan faɗa muku ko da wane izini nake yin abubuwan nan ba.”" 
Luke20:9 Sai ya shiga ba jama'a misalin nan, ya ce, “Wani mutum ne ya yi garkar inabi, ya ba waɗansu manoma ijararta, ya kuma tafi wata ƙasa, ya daɗe." 
Luke20:10 Da kakar inabi ta yi, ya aiki wani bawansa a gun manoman nan su ba shi gallar garkar. Amma manoman suka yi masa dūka, suka kore shi hannu wofi." 
Luke20:11 Ya kuma aiki wani bawa, shi ma suka yi masa dūka, suka wulakanta shi, suka kore shi hannu wofi." 
Luke20:12 Har wa yau dai ya aiki na uku, shi kuwa suka yi masa rauni, suka kore shi." 
Luke20:13 Sai mai garkar ya ce, ‘Me zan yi ke nan? Zan aiki ƙaunataccen ɗana. Kila sa ga girmansa.’" 
Luke20:14 Amma da manoman suka gan shi, suka yi shawara da juna suka ce, ‘Ai, wannan shi ne magajin. Mu kashe shi mana, gādon ya zama namu.’" 
Luke20:15 Sai suka jefa shi a bayan shinge, suka kashe shi. To, me ubangijin garkan nan zai yi da su?" 
Luke20:16 Sai ya zo ya hallaka manoman nan, ya ba waɗansu garkar.” Da suka ji haka, suka ce, “Allah ya sawwaƙe!”" 
Luke20:17 Amma ya dube su, ya ce, “Wannan da yake a rubuce fa cewa, ‘Dutsen da magina suka ƙi, Shi ne ya zama mafificin dutsen gini?’" 
Luke20:18 Kowa ya faɗo a kan dutsen nan, sai ya ragargaje, amma wanda dutsen nan ya faɗa wa, niƙe shi zai yi kamar gari.”" 
Luke20:19 Nan take malaman Attaura da manyan firistoci suka nema su kama Yesu, don sun lura a kansu ne ya ba da misalin, amma suna jin tsoron jama'a." 
Luke20:20 Sai suka yi ta haƙwansa, suka aiki 'yan rahoto, su kuwa suka nuna kamar su masu adalci ne, da nufin su kama shi a maganarsa, su kuma ba da shi ga mai mulki ya hukunta shi." 
Luke20:21 Suka tambaye shi suka ce, “Malam, ai, mun sani maganarka da koyarwarka duk gaskiya ne. Ka ɗauki kowa da kowa daidai, sai koyar da tafarkin Allah sosai kake yi." 
Luke20:22 Shin, daidai ne mu biya Kaisar haraji, ko kuwa babu?”" 
Luke20:23 Shi kuwa ya gane makircinsu, ya ce musu," 
Luke20:24 “Ku nuna mini dinari. Surar wa da sunan wa yake a jikinsa?” Suka ce, “Na Kaisar ne.”" 
Luke20:25 Sai ya ce musu, “To, ku ba Kaisar abin da yake na Kaisar, ku kuma ba Allah abin da yake na Allah.”" 
Luke20:26 Sai suka kasa kama shi a kan wannan magana gaban mutane. Saboda kuma mamakin amsarsa, suka yi shiru." 
Luke20:27 Sai waɗansu Sadukiyawa suka zo wurinsa (su da suke cewa, ba tashin matattu)," 
Luke20:28 suka tambaye shi suka ce, “Malam, Musa dai ya rubuta mana, cewa idan ɗan'uwan mutum ya mutu, ya bar matarsa ba ɗa, lalle mutumin ya auri matar, ya haifa wa ɗan'uwansa 'ya'ya." 
Luke20:29 To, an yi waɗansu 'yan'uwa maza guda bakwai. Na farko ya yi aure, ya mutu bai bar na baya ba." 
Luke20:30 Na biyun," 
Luke20:31 da na ukun kuma suka aure ta. Haka dai, duk bakwai ɗin suka aure ta, suka mutu, ba wanda ya bar ɗa." 
Luke20:32 Daga baya kuma ita matar ta mutu. 
Luke20:33 To, a tashin matattu, matar wa za ta zama a cikinsu? Don duk bakwai ɗin sun aure ta.”" 
Luke20:34 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Mutanen zamanin nan suna aure, suna aurarwa." 
Luke20:35 Amma waɗanda aka ga sun cancanci samun shiga wancan zamani da kuma tashin nan daga matattu, ba za su yi aure ko aurarwa ba." 
Luke20:36 Ba shi yiwuwa su sāke mutuwa, don daidai suke da mala'iku, 'ya'yan Allah ne kuwa, da yake 'ya'yan tashin matattu ne." 
Luke20:37 Game da tashin matattu kuwa, ai, Musa ma ya faɗa, a labarin kurmin, inda ya kira Ubangiji, Allahn Ibrahim, da Allahn Ishaku, da Allahn Yakubu." 
Luke20:38 Ai, waɗanda Allah shi ne Allahnsu rayayyu ne, ba matattu ba. Don a wurinsa duka rayayyu ne.”" 
Luke20:39 Sai waɗansu malaman Attaura suka amsa suka ce, “Malam, ka faɗi daidai.”" 
Luke20:40 Daga nan kuma ba su yi ƙarfin halin tambayarsa wani abu ba. 
Luke20:41 Amma ya ce musu, “Ƙaƙa za su ce Almasihu ɗan Dawuda ne?" 
Luke20:42 Domin Dawuda da kansa a Zabura ya ce, ‘Ubangiji ya ce wa Ubangijina, “Zauna a damana," 
Luke20:43 Sai na sa ka take maƙiyanka.” ’ 
Luke20:44 Dawuda ya ce shi Ubangiji ne. To, ƙaƙa zai zama ɗansa?”" 
Luke20:45 Ya ce wa almajiransa a gaban dukan jama'a," 
Luke20:46 “Ku yi hankali da malaman Attaura, masu son yawo a cikin manyan riguna, masu so a gaishe su a kasuwa, masu son mafifitan mazaunai a majami'u, da mazaunan alfarma a wurin biki." 
Luke20:47 Su ne masu cin kayan matan da mazansu suka mutu, masu yin doguwar addu'a don ɓad da sawu. Su za a yi wa hukunci mafi tsanani.”" 
Luke21:1 Yesu ya ɗaga kai ya ga waɗansu masu arziki suna saka sadakarsu a baitulmalin Haikali. 
Luke21:2 Sai ya ga wata gajiyayyiya da mijinta ya mutu ta saka rabin kobo biyu a ciki. 
Luke21:3 Sai ya ce, “Hakika, ina gaya muku, abin da gajiyayyiya gwauruwan nan ta saka a ciki, ya fi na sauran duka." 
Luke21:4 Domin duk waɗannan sun bayar daga yalwarsu ne, ita kuwa daga cikin rashinta ta ba da duk kuɗinta na abinci.”" 
Luke21:5 Waɗansu suna zancen Haikali, da yadda aka ƙawata shi da duwatsun alfarma da keɓaɓɓun kayan sadaka, sai ya ce," 
Luke21:6 “In don waɗannan abubuwa da kuke kallo ne, ai, lokaci yana zuwa da ba wani dutsen da za a bari a nan a kan ɗan'uwansa da ba a baje shi ba.”" 
Luke21:7 Sai suka tambaye shi suka ce, “Malam, a yaushe za a yi waɗannan abubuwa? Wace alama kuma za a gani sa'ad da suke shirin aukuwa?”" 
Luke21:8 Sai ya ce, “Ku kula fa kada a ɓad da ku. Don mutane da yawa za su zo da sunana, suna cewa su ne ni, suna kuma cewa, ‘Lokaci ya yi kusa.’ To, kada ku bi su." 
Luke21:9 In kuma kun ji labarin yaƙe-yaƙe da hargitsi, kada ku firgita. Lalle ne wannan ya fara aukuwa, amma ƙarshen tukuna.”" 
Luke21:10 Sa'an nan ya ce musu, “Al'umma za ta tasar wa al'umma, mulki ya tasar wa mulki."
