Luke21:11 Za a yi raurawar ƙasa manya manya, da kuma yunwa, da annoba a wurare dabam dabam. Za a kuma yi al'amura masu bantsoro da manyan alamu daga sama." 
Luke21:12 Amma kafin wannan duka, za su kama ku, su tsananta muku. Za su miƙa ku ga majami'u da kurkuku, su kuma kai ku a gaban sarakuna da mahukunta saboda sunana." 
Luke21:13 Wannan zai zama muku hanyar ba da shaida. 
Luke21:14 Saboda haka, sai ku ƙudura a ranku, a kan ba za ku damu da yadda za ku mai da jawabi ba." 
Luke21:15 Domin ni ne zan ba ku ikon hurci, da kuma hikima wadda duk abokan adawarku, ba za su iya shanyewa ko musawa ba." 
Luke21:16 Ko da iyayenku ma da 'yan'uwanku, da danginku, da abokanku, sai sun bāshe ku, su kuma sa a kashe waɗansunku." 
Luke21:17 Kowa kuma zai ƙi ku saboda sunana. 
Luke21:18 Amma ba gashin kanku ko ɗaya da zai yi ciwo. 
Luke21:19 Jurewarku ce za ta fisshe ku.” 
Luke21:20 “Sa'ad da kuka ga rundunonin yaƙi sun kewaye Urushalima, sa'an nan ku tabbata ana kusan ribɗe ta." 
Luke21:21 Sa'an nan waɗanda suke a ƙasar Yahudiya, su gudu su shiga duwatsu, na birni su fice, na ƙauye kuma kada su shiga birni." 
Luke21:22 Saboda lokacin sakamako ne, don a cika duk abin da yake rubuce." 
Luke21:23 Kaiton masu juna biyu da masu goyo a wannan lokaci! Don matsanancin ƙunci zai saukar wa ƙasar, da kuma fushin Allah ga jama'an nan." 
Luke21:24 Za a kashe waɗansu da kaifin takobi, a kuma kakkama waɗansu a kai su bauta zuwa ƙasashen al'ummai duka. Al'ummai kuma za su tattake Urushalima, har ya zuwa cikar zamaninsu.”" 
Luke21:25 “Za a kuma ga alamu a rana, da wata, da taurari, a duniya kuma al'ummai su matsu ƙwarai, suna shan damuwa saboda ƙugin teku da na raƙuman ruwa." 
Luke21:26 Mutane za su suma don tsoro, da kuma fargaban al'amuran da suke aukuwa ga duniya, don za a girgiza manyan abubuwan da suke a sararin sama." 
Luke21:27 A sa'an nan ne za su ga Ɗan Mutum yana zuwa a cikin gajimare da iko da ɗaukaka mai yawa. 
Luke21:28 Sa'ad da waɗannan al'amura suka fara aukuwa, sai ku ɗaga kai ku dubi sama, domin fansarku ta yi kusa.”" 
Luke21:29 Sai ya ba su wani misali, ya ce, “Ku dubi itacen ɓaure da dukan itatuwa," 
Luke21:30 da zarar sun fara toho, kuna gani, ku da kanku kun san damuna ta yi kusa ke nan." 
Luke21:31 Haka kuma sa'ad da kuka ga waɗannan al'amura suna aukuwa, ku sani Mulkin Allah ya gabato." 
Luke21:32 Hakika, ina gaya muku, zamanin nan ba zai shuɗe ba, sai duk abubuwan nan sun auku." 
Luke21:33 Sararin sama da ƙasa za su shuɗe, amma maganata ba za ta shuɗe ba.”" 
Luke21:34 “Ku kula da kanku fa, kada zuciyarku ta zarme da yawan shaye-shaye da buguwa, da kuma taraddadin wannan duniya, har ba labari ranan nan ta mamaye ku kamar tarko." 
Luke21:35 Don haka, za ta auka wa mazaunan duniya duk, kowa da kowa." 
Luke21:36 Koyaushe ku zauna a faɗake, kuna addu'a ku sami ikon tsere wa dukan waɗannan al'amura da za su auku, ku kuma tsaya a gaban Ɗan Mutum.”" 
Luke21:37 Kullum da rana yakan koyar a Haikali, da dare kuma yakan fita ya kwana a dutsen da ake ce da shi Dutsen Zaitun." 
Luke21:38 Da sassafe kuma dukan mutane sukan zo wurinsa a Haikali su saurare shi. 
Luke22:1 To, idin abinci marar yisti, wanda ake ce da shi Idin Ƙetarewa, ya gabato." 
Luke22:2 Sai manyan firistoci da malaman Attaura suka yi ta neman yadda za su kashe shi, amma kuwa suna tsoron jama'a." 
Luke22:3 Sai Shaiɗan ya shiga Yahuza, wanda ake kira Iskariyoti, ɗaya daga cikin sha biyun nan." 
Luke22:4 Sai ya tafi ya yi shawara da manyan firistoci da shugabannin dogaran Haikali a kan yadda zai bāshe shi a gare su. 
Luke22:5 Sai suka yi murna, suka kuma yi alkawarin ba shi kuɗi." 
Luke22:6 Shi kuwa ya yarda, ya kuma nemi hanyar bāshe shi a gare su bayan idon jama'a." 
Luke22:7 Sai ranar idin abinci marar yisti ta zo, wato, rana da ake yanka ɗan ragon Idin Ƙetarewa." 
Luke22:8 Sai Yesu ya aiki Bitrus da Yahaya, ya ce musu, “Ku je ku shirya mana Jibin Ƙetarewa mu ci.”" 
Luke22:9 Suka ce masa, “Ina kake so mu shirya?”" 
Luke22:10 Ya ce musu, “Ga shi, da shigarku gari, za ku gamu da wani mutum ɗauke da tulun ruwa. Ku bi shi har zuwa cikin gidan da ya shiga." 
Luke22:11 Ku ce wa maigidan, ‘Malam ya ce, ina masaukin da zai ci Jibin Ƙetarewa da almajiransa?’" 
Luke22:12 Shi kuwa zai nuna muku wani babban soron bene mai kaya a shirye. A nan za ku shirya mana.” 
Luke22:13 Sai suka tafi, suka kuwa tarar kamar yadda ya faɗa musu, suka shirya Jibin Ƙetarewa." 
Luke22:14 Da lokaci ya yi, sai ya zauna cin abinci, manzanninsa kuma suna tare da shi." 
Luke22:15 Ya ce musu, “Ina so ƙwarai ko dā ma in ci jibin nan na Ƙetarewa tare da ku, kafin in sha wuya." 
Luke22:16 Gama ina gaya muku ba zan ƙara cin sa ba, sai an cika shi a Mulkin Allah.”" 
Luke22:17 Sai ya karɓi ƙoƙo, bayan da ya yi godiya ga Allah, ya ce, “Ungo wannan, ku shassha." 
Luke22:18 Ina gaya muku, daga yanzu, ba zan ƙara shan ruwan inabi ba, sai Mulkin Allah ya bayyana.”" 
Luke22:19 Sai ya ɗauki gurasa, bayan da ya yi godiya ga Allah, ya gutsuttsura, ya ba su, ya ce, “Wannan jikina ne da za a bayar dominku. Ku riƙa yin haka, domin tunawa da ni.”" 
Luke22:20 Haka kuma, bayan jibi, ya ɗauki ƙoƙon, ya ce, “Ƙoƙon nan sabon alkawari ne, da aka tabbatar da jinina da za a bayar dominku." 
Luke22:21 Amma ga shi, mai bashe ni ɗin nan yana ci a akushi ɗaya da ni." 
Luke22:22 Lalle Ɗan Mutum zai ƙaura kamar yadda aka ƙaddara, duk da haka, kaiton mutumin nan da yake ba da shi!”" 
Luke22:23 Sai suka fara tambayar juna ko wane ne a cikinsu zai yi haka. 
Luke22:24 Sai musu ya tashi a tsakaninsu, a kan ko wane ne babbansu." 
Luke22:25 Sai ya ce musu, “Sarakunan al'ummai sukan nuna musu iko, mahukuntansu kuma sukan nema a ce da su, ‘Mataimakan jama'a.’" 
Luke22:26 Amma ku kam ba haka ba. Sai dai wanda yake babba a cikinku yă zama kamar ƙarami, shugaba kuwa yă zama kamar mai hidima." 
Luke22:27 Wa ya fi girma? Wanda ya zauna cin abinci, ko kuwa mai hidimar? Ashe, ba wanda ya zauna cin abinci ba ne? Ga shi kuwa, ina a cikinku kamar mai hidima." 
Luke22:28 “Ku ne kuka tsaya gare ni a gwaje-gwajen da na sha. 
Luke22:29 Kamar yadda Ubana ya ba ni mulki, haka, ni ma nake ba ku iko," 
Luke22:30 ku ci ku sha tare da ni a mulkina, ku kuma zauna a kursiyai, kuna hukunta kabilan nan goma sha biyu na Isra'ila." 
Luke22:31 “Bitrus, ya Bitrus, Shaiɗan ya nemi izinin sheƙe ku kamar alkama, ya kuwa samu." 
Luke22:32 Ni kuwa na yi maka addu'a, kada bangaskiyarka ta kāsa. Kai kuma, bayan da ka juyo, sai ka ƙarfafa 'yan'uwanka.”" 
Luke22:33 Bitrus ya ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, a shirye nake in bi ka har cikin kurkuku, ko kuma Lahira.”" 
Luke22:34 Yesu ya ce, “Ina dai gaya maka Bitrus, a yau ma, kafin carar zakara, za ka yi musun sanina sau uku.”" 
Luke22:35 Ya kuma ce musu, “Sa'ad da na aike ku ba kuɗi a ɗamararku, ba burgami, ba takalma, akwai abin da kuka rasa?” Suka ce, “Babu.”" 
Luke22:36 Ya ce musu, “Amma a yanzu duk mai jakar kuɗi yă ɗauka, haka kuma mai burgami. Wanda kuwa ba shi da takobi, ya sayar da mayafinsa ya saya." 
Luke22:37 Ina dai gaya muku, lalle ne a cika wannan Nassi a kaina cewa, ‘An lasafta shi a cikin masu laifi.’ Gama abin da aka faɗa a kaina, tabbatarsa ta zo.”" 
Luke22:38 Sai suka ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ai, ga takuba biyu.” Ya ce musu, “Ya isa.”" 
Luke22:39 Sai ya fita ya tafi Dutsen Zaitun, kamar yadda ya saba. Almajiransa kuwa suka bi shi." 
Luke22:40 Da ya iso wurin, ya ce musu, “Ku yi addu'a, kada ku faɗa ga gwaji.”" 
Luke22:41 Sai ya ɗan rabu da su misalin nisan jifa, ya durƙusa, ya yi addu'a." 
Luke22:42 Ya ce, “Ya Uba, in dai ka yarda, ka ɗauke mini ƙoƙon wahalan nan. Duk da haka dai, ba nufina ba, sai naka za a bi” [" 
Luke22:43 Sai wani mala'ika ya bayyana a gare shi daga Sama, yana ƙarfafa shi." 
Luke22:44 Domin kuma yana shan wahala gaya, sai ya ƙara himmar addu'a, har jiɓinsa yana ɗiɗɗiga ƙasa kamar manyan ɗarsashin jini.]" 
Luke22:45 Da ya tashi daga addu'a, ya koma wurin almajiran, ya tarar suna barci saboda baƙin ciki." 
Luke22:46 Sai ya ce musu, “Don me kuke barci? Ku tashi, ku yi addu'a, kada ku faɗa ga gwaji.”" 
Luke22:47 Kafin ya rufe baki, sai ga taron jama'a suka zo, mutumin da ake kira Yahuza, ɗaya daga cikin sha biyun nan, yake musu jagaba. Sai ya matso kusa da Yesu, don ya sumbace shi." 
Luke22:48 Amma Yesu ya ce masa, “Yahuza, ashe, da sumba za ka ba da Ɗan Mutum?”" 
Luke22:49 Da na kusa da shi suka ga abin da za a yi, suka ce, “Ya Ubangiji, mu yi sara da takuba ne?”" 
Luke22:50 Sai ɗayansu ya kai wa bawan babban firist sara, ya ɗauke masa kunnensa na dama." 
Luke22:51 Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Ku ƙyale su haka.” Sai ya taɓa kunnen bawan, ya warkar da shi." 
Luke22:52 Yesu kuma ya ce wa waɗanda suka tasar masa, wato, manyan firistoci da shugabannin dogaran Haikali da shugabannin jama'a, “Kun fito ne da takuba da kulake, kamar masu kama ɗan fashi?" 
Luke22:53 Sa'ad da nake tare da ku kowace rana a cikin Haikali, ba ku miƙa hannu garin ku kama ni ba. Amma wannan lokacinku ne da na ikon duhu.”" 
Luke22:54 Sai suka kama shi, suka tafi da shi, suka kai shi cikin gidan babban firist. Bitrus kuwa yana biye daga nesa nesa." 
Luke22:55 Da suka hura wuta a tsakar gida suka zazzauna, Bitrus ma ya zauna a cikinsu." 
Luke22:56 Sai wata baranya ta gan shi zaune a hasken wuta, ta zura masa ido, ta ce, “Ai, mutumin nan ma, tare da shi yake.”" 
Luke22:57 Amma ya musa ya ce, “Ke, ban ma san shi ba.”" 
Luke22:58 Bayan ɗan lokaci kaɗan kuma, sai wani ya gan shi, ya ce, “Kai ma, ai, ɗayansu ne.” Amma Bitrus ya ce, “Ya mutum, ba haka ba ne.”" 
Luke22:59 Bayan wajen sa'a guda sai wani ya nace, ya ce, “Ba shakka mutumin nan ma tare da shi yake, don Bagalile ne.”" 
Luke22:60 Amma Bitrus ya ce, “Haba, ban ma san abin da kake faɗa ba.” Nan take, kafin ya rufe baki, sai zakara ya yi cara." 
Luke22:61 Sai Ubangiji ya juya ya dubi Bitrus. Bitrus kuwa ya tuna da maganar da Ubangiji ya faɗa masa cewa, “A yau ma kafin carar zakara, za ka yi musun sanina sau uku.”" 
Luke22:62 Sai ya fita waje, ya yi ta rusa kuka." 
Luke22:63 Sai mutanen da suke riƙe da Yesu suka yi ta masa ba'a, suna dūkansa." 
Luke22:64 Suka ɗaure masa idanu, suka tambaye shi, suka ce, “Yi annabci! Wa ya buge ka?”" 
Luke22:65 Suka kuma yi ta masa baƙaƙen maganganu masu yawa, suna zaginsa." 
Luke22:66 Da gari ya waye sai majalisar shugabannin jama'a ta haɗu, da manyan firistoci da kuma malaman Attaura. Suka kai shi ɗakin majalisarsu suka ce," 
Luke22:67 “To, in kai ne Almasihu, gaya mana.” Amma ya ce musu, “Ko na gaya muku, ba za ku gaskata ba." 
Luke22:68 In kuma na yi muku tambaya, ba za ku mai da jawabi ba." 
Luke22:69 Amma nan gaba, Ɗan Mutum zai zauna dama na Allah Mai iko.”" 
Luke22:70 Duk suka ce, “Ashe, kai ɗin nan Ɗan Allah ne?” Sai ya ce musu, “Yadda kuka faɗa, ni ne.”" 
Luke22:71 Sai suka ce, “Wace shaida kuma za mu nema? Ai, mun ji da kanmu daga bakinsa.”" 
Luke23:1 Duk taronsu sai suka tashi, suka kai shi gaban Bilatus." 
Luke23:2 Sai suka fara kai ƙararsa, suna cewa, “Mun sami mutumin nan yana ɓad da jama'armu, yana hana a biya Kaisar haraji, yana cewa, shi ne Almasihu, sarki kuma.”" 
Luke23:3 Sai Bilatus ya tambaye shi ya ce, “Ashe, kai ɗin nan, kai ne Sarkin Yahudawa?” Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Yadda ka faɗa.”" 
Luke23:4 Bilatus ya ce wa manyan firistoci da taro masu yawa, “Ban sami mutumin nan da wani laifi ba.”" 
Luke23:5 Sai suka fara matsa masa lamba, suna cewa, “Yana ta da hankalin jama'a, yana koyarwa a dukan ƙasar Yahudiya, tun daga ƙasar Galili har zuwa nan.”" 
Luke23:6 Da Bilatus ya ji haka, ya tambaya ko mutumin nan Bagalile ne." 
Luke23:7 Da ya ji Yesu a ƙarƙashin mulkin Hirudus yake, sai ya aika da shi wurin Hirudus, don shi ma yana Urushalima a lokacin." 
Luke23:8 Da Hirudus ya ga Yesu, ya yi murna ƙwarai, saboda tun da daɗewa yake son ganinsa, don ya riga ya ji labarinsa, yana kuma fata ya ga wata mu'ujiza da Yesu zai yi." 
Luke23:9 Sai ya yi ta masa tambayoyi da yawa, amma bai amsa masa da kome ba." 
Luke23:10 Manyan firistoci da malaman Attaura na nan a tsaitsaye, suna tsananta kai ƙararrakinsa ainun." 
Luke23:11 Sai Hirudus da sojansa suka wulakanta shi, suka yi masa ba'a, da suka sa masa tufafi masu ƙawa kuma, suka mai da shi wurin Bilatus." 
Luke23:12 A ran nan sai Hirudus da Bilatus suka yi sulhu, don dā abokan gāba ne." 
Luke23:13 Bilatus ya tara manyan firistoci da shugabanni da kuma jama'a," 
Luke23:14 ya ce masu, “Kun kawo mini mutumin nan a kan, wai yana ɓad da jama'a, na kuwa tuhunce shi a gabanku, amma ban same shi da wani laifi a ƙararrakinsa da kuka kawo ba." 
Luke23:15 Hirudus ma bai samu ba, don ya komo mana da shi. Ga shi kuwa, bai yi wani abu da ya cancanci kisa ba." 
Luke23:16 Saboda haka, zan yi masa bulala in sake shi.”[" 
Luke23:17 A lokacin idi kuwa lalle ne ya sakar musu ɗaurarre guda.] 
Luke23:18 Amma duk suka ɗauki ihu gaba ɗaya, suna cewa, “A yi da wannan ɗin, a sakar mana Barabbas!”" 
Luke23:19 (Barabbas shi ne wani mutum da aka jefa a kurkuku, saboda wani tawayen da aka yi a birni, da kuma kisankai.)" 
Luke23:20 Sai Bilatus ya sāke yi musu magana, don yana so ya saki Yesu." 
Luke23:21 Amma suka yi ta ƙwala ihu, suna cewa, “A gicciye shi! A gicciye shi!”" 
Luke23:22 Ya sāke faɗa musu, a faɗa ta uku, “Ta wane hali? Wane mugun abu ya yi? Ai, ban sami dalilin kisa a gare shi ba. Saboda haka, zan yi masa bulala in sake shi.”" 
Luke23:23 Amma suka yi ta matsa lamba, suna ɗaga murya, suna cewa a gicciye shi, har surutunsu ya yi rinjaye." 
Luke23:24 Sai Bilatus ya zartar da hukunci a biya musu bukata. 
Luke23:25 Ya kuwa sakar musu wanda suka roƙa, wato, wanda aka jefa a kurkuku a kan laifin tawaye da kuma kisankai. Amma ya ba da Yesu, su yi masa abin da suke so." 
Luke23:26 Suna tafiya da Yesu yake nan, sai suka cafke wani, mai suna Saminu Bakurane, yana zuwa daga ƙauye, suka ɗora masa gicciye, yă ɗauka ya bi Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Sai taron mutane masu yawan gaske suka bi shi, da waɗansu mata da suke kuka, suke kuma gunji saboda shi." 
Luke23:28 Amma Yesu ya juya gare su, ya ce, “Ya ku matan Urushalima, ku bar yi mini kuka, sai dai ku yi wa kanku da kuma 'ya'yanku," 
Luke23:29 don lokaci na zuwa da za su ce, ‘Albarka tā tabbata ga matan da suke bakararru, waɗanda ba su taɓa haihuwa ba, waɗanda kuma ba a taɓa shan mamansu ba.’" 
Luke23:30 Sa'an nan ne za su fara ce wa manyan duwatsu, ‘Ku faɗo a kanmu,’ su kuma ce da tsaunuka, ‘Ku binne mu.’" 
Luke23:31 In fa irin abubuwan nan suna faruwa ga ɗanye, yaya zai zama ga ƙeƙasasshe?”" 
Luke23:32 Waɗansu mutum biyu kuma masu laifi, aka kai su a kashe su tare da shi." 
Luke23:33 Da suka isa wurin da ake ce da shi Ƙoƙwan Kai, nan suka gicciye shi, da kuma masu laifin nan, ɗaya a damansa, ɗaya a hagun." 
Luke23:34 Sai Yesu ya ce, “Ya Uba, ka yi musu gafara, don ba su san abin da suke yi ba.” Suka rarraba tufafinsa, suna kuri'a a kansu." 
Luke23:35 Mutane da suke tsaitsaye, suna kallo. Shugabanni kuma suka yi masa ba'a, suka ce, “Ya ceci waɗansu, to, ya ceci kansa mana, in shi ne Almasihu na Allah zaɓaɓɓensa!”" 
Luke23:36 Soja kuma suka yi masa ba'a, suka matso, suka miƙa masa ruwan tsami," 
Luke23:37 suna cewa, “In kai ne Sarkin Yahudawa, to, ka cece kanka mana!”" 
Luke23:38 Sama da shi kuma aka yi wani rubutu cewa, “Wannan shi ne Sarkin Yahudawa.”" 
Luke23:39 Sai ɗaya daga cikin masu laifin da aka gicciye ya yi masa baƙar magana ya ce, “Shin, ba kai ne Almasihu ba? To, ceci kanku mana, duk da mu!”" 
Luke23:40 Amma ɗayan ya amsa, ya kwaɓe shi, ya ce, “Kai ko tsoron Allah ma ba ka yi, kai, da yake hukuncinka daidai da nasa?" 
Luke23:41 Mu kam, daidai aka yi mana, don hakika sakamakon aikinmu muka samu, amma mutumin nan bai yi wani laifi ba.”" 
Luke23:42 Ya kuma ce, “Ya Yesu, ka tuna da ni, sa'ad da ka shiga sarautarka.”" 
Luke23:43 Yesu ya ce masa, “Hakika, ina gaya maka, yau ma za ka kasance tare da ni a Firdausi.”" 
Luke23:44 To, wajen tsakar rana ne kuwa, sai duhu ya rufe ƙasa duka, har zuwa ƙarfe uku na yamma." 
Luke23:45 Hasken rana ya dushe. Labulen da yake cikin Haikali ya tsage gida biyu. 
Luke23:46 Sai Yesu ya ɗaga murya da ƙarfi ya ce, “Ya Uba, na sa ruhuna a ikonka.” Da ya faɗi haka kuwa, sai ya cika." 
Luke23:47 Sa'ad da jarumin ya ga abin da ya gudana, sai ya girmama Allah ya ce, “Hakika mutumin nan marar laifi ne!”" 
Luke23:48 Sa'ad da duk taro masu yawa, waɗanda suka zo kallo suka ga abin da ya faru, suka koma, suna bugun ƙirjinsu." 
Luke23:49 Amma duk idon sani, da kuma matan da suka biyo shi, tun daga ƙasar Galili, suka tsaya daga nesa, suna duban waɗannan abubuwa." 
Luke23:50 To, akwai wani mutum mai suna Yusufu, mutumin Arimatiya, wani garin Yahudawa, shi ɗan majalisa ne, nagari ne, adali kuma." 
Luke23:51 Shi kuwa dā ma bai yarda da shawararsu, da kuma abin da suka yi ba, yana kuwa sauraron bayyanar Mulkin Allah." 
Luke23:52 Shi ne ya tafi wurin Bilatus, ya roƙa a ba shi jikin Yesu." 
Luke23:53 Sai ya sauko da shi, ya sa shi a likkafanin lilin, ya sa shi a wani kabari da aka fafe dutse aka yi, wanda ba a taɓa sa kowa ba." 
Luke23:54 Ran nan kuwa ranar shiri ce, Asabar kuma ta doso." 
Luke23:55 Matan nan kuwa da suka zo tare da shi daga ƙasar Galili, suka bi baya, suka duba kabarin da yadda kuma aka sa jikinsa." 
Luke23:56 Sai suka koma, suka shirya kayan ƙanshi da man shafawa. Ran Asabar kuwa, sai suka huta bisa ga umarni." 
Luke24:1 A ranar farko ta mako kuwa, da asussuba, suka je wurin kabarin da kayan ƙanshi da suka shirya." 
Luke24:2 Sai suka tarar an mirgine dutsen daga kabarin. 
Luke24:3 Suka shiga ciki, amma ba su sami jikin Ubangiji ba." 
Luke24:4 Tun suna cikin damuwa da abin, sai kawai ga waɗansu mutum biyu a tsaye kusa da su, saye da tufafi masu ƙyalƙyali." 
Luke24:5 Don tsoro, matan suka sunkuyar da kansu ƙasa. Mutanen suka ce musu, “Don me kuke neman rayayye a cikin matattu?" 
Luke24:6 Ai, ba ya nan, ya tashi. Ku tuna yadda ya gaya muku tun yana Galili" 
Luke24:7 cewa, ‘Lalle ne a ba da Ɗan Mutum ga mutane masu zunubi, a gicciye shi, a rana ta uku kuma ya tashi’.”" 
Luke24:8 Sai suka tuna da maganarsa. 
Luke24:9 Da suka dawo daga kabarin suka shaida wa goma sha ɗayan nan, da kuma duk sauransu, dukan waɗannan abubuwa." 
Luke24:10 To, Maryamu Magadaliya, da Yuwana, da Maryamu uwar Yakubu, da kuma sauran matan da suke tare da su, su ne suka gaya wa manzannin waɗannan abubuwa." 
Luke24:11 Su kuwa sai maganan nan ta zama musu kamar zance ne kawai, suka ƙi gaskatawa." 
Luke24:12 Amma Bitrus ya tashi, ya doshi kabarin da gudu. Ya duƙa, ya leƙa a ciki, ya ga likkafanin lilin a ajiye waje ɗaya. Sai ya koma gida yana al'ajabin abin da ya auku." 
Luke24:13 A ran nan kuma sai ga waɗansu biyu suna tafiya wani ƙauye, mai suna Imuwasu, nisansa daga Urushalima kuwa kusan mil bakwai ne." 
Luke24:14 Suna ta zance da juna a kan dukan al'amuran da suka faru. 
Luke24:15 Ya zamana tun suna magana, suna tunani tare, sai Yesu da kansa ya matso, suka tafi tare." 
Luke24:16 Amma idanunsu a rufe, har ba su gane shi ba." 
Luke24:17 Yesu ya ce musu, “Wace magana ce kuke yi da juna a tafe?” Sai suka tsaya cik, suna baƙin ciki." 
Luke24:18 Sai ɗayansu, mai suna Kiliyobas, ya amsa masa ya ce, “Ashe, kai kaɗai ne baƙo a Urushalima, da ba ka san abubuwan da suka faru a can, 'yan kwanakin nan ba?”" 
Luke24:19 Sai ya ce musu, “Waɗanne abubuwa?” Suka ce masa, “Game da Yesu Banazare ne, wanda yake annabi mai manyan ayyuka da ƙwaƙƙwarar magana a gaban Allah da dukan mutane," 
Luke24:20 da kuma yadda manyan firistoci da shugabanninmu suka ba da shi don a yi masa hukuncin kisa, suka kuwa gicciye shi." 
Luke24:21 Dā kuwa muna bege shi ne zai fanshi Isra'ila. Hakika kuma, bayan wannan duka, yau kwana uku ke nan da aukuwar wannan abu." 
Luke24:22 Har wa yau kuma, waɗansu mata na cikinmu, sun ba mu al'ajabi. Don sun je kabarin da sassafe," 
Luke24:23 da ba su sami jikinsa ba, suka komo, suka ce har ma an yi musu wahayi, sun ga mala'ikun da suka ce yana da rai." 
Luke24:24 Waɗansunsu da suke tare da mu kuma, suka je kabarin, suka tarar kamar yadda matan suka faɗa, amma shi, ba su gan shi ba.”" 
Luke24:25 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Ya ku mutane marasa fahimta, masu nauyin gaskata duk abin da annabawa suka faɗa!" 
Luke24:26 Ashe, ba wajibi ne Almasihu ya sha wuyar waɗannan abubuwa ba, ya kuma shiga ɗaukakarsa?”" 
Luke24:27 Sai ya fara ta kan littattafan Musa da na dukan annabawa, ya yi ta bayyana musu abubuwan da suka shafe shi a dukan Littattafai." 
Luke24:28 Sai suka kusato ƙauyen da za su. Ya yi kamar zai ci gaba," 
Luke24:29 suka matsa masa suka ce, “Sauka a wurinmu, ai, magariba ta doso, rana duk ta tafi.” Sai ya sauka a wurinsu." 
Luke24:30 Sa'ad da yake cin abinci tare da su, sai ya ɗauki gurasa, ya yi wa Allah godiya, ya gutsura, ya ba su." 
Luke24:31 Idonsu ya buɗe, suka kuma gane shi. Sai ya ɓace musu." 
Luke24:32 Suka ce wa juna, “Ashe, zuciyarmu ba ta yi annuri ba, sa'ad da yake a hanya, yana bayyana mana Littattafai?”" 
Luke24:33 Anan take, suka tashi suka koma Urushalima, suka sami sha ɗayan nan tare gu ɗaya, da kuma waɗanda suke tare da su," 
Luke24:34 suna cewa, “Hakika Ubangiji ya tashi, har ya bayyana ga Bitrus!”" 
Luke24:35 Su kuma suka ba da labarin abin da ya faru a hanya, da kuma yadda suka gane shi a wajen gutsura gurasa." 
Luke24:36 Suna cikin faɗar waɗannan abubuwa, sai ga Yesu da kansa tsaye a tsakiyarsu, ya ce musu, “Salama alaikun!”" 
Luke24:37 Amma suka firgita, tsoro ya kama su, suka zaci fatalwa suke gani." 
Luke24:38 Sai ya ce musu, “Don me kuka firgita, kuke kuma tantama a zuciyarku?" 
Luke24:39 Ku dubi hannuwana da ƙafafuna, ai, ni ne da kaina. Ku taɓa ni, ku ji, don fatalwa ba ta da nama da ƙashi, yadda kuke gani nake da su.”" 
Luke24:40 Da ya faɗi haka, ya nuna musu hannuwansa da ƙafafunsa." 
Luke24:41 Amma tun suna da sauran shakka saboda tsananin farin ciki da mamaki, sai ya ce musu, “Kuna da wani abinci a nan?”" 
Luke24:42 Sai suka ba shi wata tsokar gasasshen kifi. 
Luke24:43 Ya kuwa karɓa, ya ci a gabansu." 
Luke24:44 Ya kuma ce musu, “Wannan ita ce maganata da na gaya muku tun muna tare, cewa lalle ne a cika duk abin da yake rubuce game da ni a Attaura ta Musa, da littattafan annabawa, da kuma Zabura.”" 
Luke24:45 Sa'an nan ya wayar da hankalinsu su fahimci Littattafai," 
Luke24:46 ya kuma ce musu, “Haka yake a rubuce, cewa wajibi ne Almasihu ya sha wuya, a rana ta uku kuma ya tashi daga matattu," 
Luke24:47 a kuma yi wa dukan al'ummai wa'azi su tuba, a gafarta musu zunubansu saboda sunansa. Za a kuwa fara daga Urushalima." 
Luke24:48 Ku ne shaidun waɗannan abubuwa. 
Luke24:49 Ga shi, ni zan aiko muku da abin da Ubana ya alkawarta. Amma ku dakata a birni tukuna, har a yi muku baiwar iko daga Sama.”" 
Luke24:50 Sai ya kai su waje har jikin Betanya. Ya ɗaga hannuwansa ya sa musu albarka. 
Luke24:51 Yana sa musu albarka ke nan, sai ya rabu da su, aka ɗauke shi zuwa sama." 
Luke24:52 Su kuwa suka yi masa sujada, suka koma Urushalima, suna matuƙar farin ciki." 
Luke24:53 Ko yaushe kuma suna a Haikali suna yabon Allah. 
John1:1 Tun fil'azal akwai Kalma, Kalman nan kuwa tare da Allah yake, Kalman nan kuwa Allah ne." 
John1:2 Shi ne tun fil'azal yake tare da Allah. 
John1:3 Dukan abubuwa sun kasance ta gare shi ne, ba kuma abin da ya kasance na abubuwan da suka kasance, sai ta game da shi." 
John1:4 Shi ne tushen rai, wannan rai kuwa shi ne hasken mutane." 
John1:5 Haske na haskakawa cikin duhu, duhun kuwa bai rinjaye shi ba." 
John1:6 Akwai wani mutum da Allah ya aiko, mai suna Yahaya." 
John1:7 Shi fa ya zo shaida ne, domin ya shaidi hasken, kowa yă ba da gaskiya ta hanyarsa." 
John1:8 Ba shi ne hasken ba, ya zo ne domin ya shaidi hasken." 
John1:9 Akwai hakikanin haske mai shigowa duniya da yake haskaka kowane mutum. 
John1:10 Dā yana duniya, duniyar ta wurinsa ta kasance, duk da haka duniya ba ta san shi ba." 
John1:11 Ya zo ga abin mulkinsa ne, jama'a tasa kuwa ba ta karɓe shi ba." 
John1:12 Amma duk iyakar waɗanda suka karɓe shi, wato, masu gaskatawa da sunansa, ya ba su ikon zama 'ya'yan Allah," 
John1:13 wato, waɗanda aka haifa ba daga jini ba, ba daga nufin jiki ko nufin mutum ba, amma daga wurin Allah." 
John1:14 Kalman nan kuwa ya zama mutum, ya zauna a cikinmu, yana mai matuƙar alheri da gaskiya. Mun kuma dubi ɗaukakarsa, ɗaukaka ce ta makaɗaicin Ɗa daga wurin Ubansa." 
John1:15 Yahaya ya shaida shi, ya ɗaga murya ya ce, “Wannan shi ne wanda na ce, ‘Mai zuwa bayana ya zama shugabana, domin dā ma yana nan tun ba ni.’ ”" 
John1:16 Dukanmu kuwa daga falala tasa muka samu, alheri kan alheri." 
John1:17 Domin Shari'a, ta hannun Musa aka ba da ita, alheri da gaskiya kuwa ta wurin Yesu Almasihu suka kasance." 
John1:18 Ba mutumin da ya taɓa ganin Allah daɗai. Makaɗaicin Ɗa, wanda yake yadda Allah yake, wanda kuma yake a wurin Uba, shi ne ya bayyana shi." 
John1:19 Wannan kuwa ita ce shaidar Yahaya, wato, sa'ad da Yahudawa suka aiki firistoci da Lawiyawa daga Urushalima su tambaye shi, ko shi wane ne." 
John1:20 Sai ya faɗi gaskiya, bai yi musu ba, gaskiya ya faɗa ya ce, “Ba ni ne Almasihu ba.”" 
John1:21 Sai suka tambaye shi, “To, yaya, Iliya ne kai?” Ya ce, “A'a, ba shi ba ne.” Suka ce, “Kai ne annabin nan?” Ya ce, “A'a.”" 
John1:22 Sai suka ce masa, “To, wane ne kai, domin mu sami amsar da za mu mayar wa waɗanda suka aiko mu? Me kake ce da kanka?”" 
John1:23 Ya ce, “Ni murya ce ta mai kira a jeji, mai cewa, ‘Ku miƙe wa Ubangiji tafarki,’ yadda Annabi Ishaya ya faɗa.”" 
John1:24 Su kuwa, Farisiyawa ne suka aiko su." 
John1:25 Sai suka tambaye shi suka ce, “To, don me kake yin baftisma in kai ba Almasihu ba ne, ba kuwa Iliya ba, ba kuma annabin nan ba?”" 
John1:26 Sai Yahaya ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ni kam, da ruwa nake baftisma, amma da wani nan tsaye a cikinku wanda ba ku sani ba," 
John1:27 shi ne mai zuwa bayana, wanda ko maɓallin takalminsa ma, ban isa in ɓalle ba.”" 
John1:28 An yi wannan a Betanya ne, a hayin Kogin Urdun, inda Yahaya yake yin baftisma." 
John1:29 Kashegari Yahaya ya tsinkayo Yesu na nufo shi, sai ya ce, “Kun ga, ga Ɗan Rago na Allah, wanda zai ɗauke zunubin duniya!" 
John1:30 Wannan shi ne wanda na ce, ‘Wani yana zuwa bayana, wanda ya zama shugabana, domin dā ma yana nan tun ba ni.’" 
John1:31 Dā kam, ban san shi ba, sai domin a bayyana shi ga Isra'ila na zo, nake baftisma da ruwa.”" 
John1:32 Yahaya ya yi shaida ya ce, “Na ga Ruhu na saukowa kamar kurciya daga sama, ya kuma zauna a kansa." 
John1:33 Dā kam, ban san shi ba, sai dai wanda ya aiko ni in yi baftisma da ruwa, shi ne ya ce mini, ‘Wanda ka ga Ruhun na sauko masa, yana kuma kasance a kansa, shi ne mai yin baftisma da Ruhu Mai Tsarki.’" 
John1:34 Na kuwa gani, na kuma yi shaida, cewa wannan Ɗan Allah ne.”" 
John1:35 Kashegari kuma Yahaya na tsaye da almajiransa biyu. 
John1:36 Yana duban Yesu na tafiya, sai ya ce, “Kun ga, ga Ɗan Rago na Allah!”" 
John1:37 Almajiran nan biyu suka ji ya faɗi haka, sai suka bi Yesu." 
John1:38 Yesu ya waiwaya ya ga suna biye da shi, sai ya ce musu, “Me kuke nema?” Suka ce masa, “Ya Rabbi, wato Malam ke nan, ina kake da zama?”" 
John1:39 Sai ya ce musu, “Ku zo ku gani.” Sai suka je suka ga inda yake da zama, suka kuwa yini tare da shi. Wajen ƙarfe huɗu na yamma ne kuwa." 
John1:40 Ɗaya daga cikin biyun nan da suka ji maganar Yahaya suka kuma bi Yesu, Andarawas ne, ɗan'uwan Bitrus." 
John1:41 Sai ya fara samo ɗan'uwansa Bitrus, ya ce masa, “Mun sami Almasihu,” wato shafaffe." 
John1:42 Sai ya kai shi wurin Yesu. Yesu ya dube shi, ya ce, “Wato kai ne Saminu ɗan Yahaya? Za a kira ka Kefas,” wato Bitrus." 
John1:43 Kashegari Yesu ya yi niyyar zuwa ƙasar Galili. Sai ya sami Filibus, ya ce masa, “Bi ni.”" 
John1:44 Filibus kuwa mutumin Betsaida ne, garin su Andarawas da Bitrus." 
John1:45 Filibus ya sami Nata'ala, ya ce masa, “Mun sami wanda Musa ya rubuta labarinsa a Attaura, annabawa kuma suka rubuta labarinsa, wato Yesu Banazare, ɗan Yusufu.”" 
John1:46 Nata'ala ya ce masa, “A iya samun wani abin kirki a Nazarat kuwa?” Sai Filibus ya ce masa, “Taho dai, ka gani.”" 
John1:47 Yesu ya ga Nata'ala na nufo shi, sai ya yi zancensa ya ce, “Kun ga, ga Ba'isra'ile na gaske wanda ba shi da ha'inci!”" 
John1:48 Nata'ala ya ce masa, “A ina ka san ni?” Yesu ya amsa masa ya ce, “Tun kafin Filibus ya kira ka, sa'ad da kake gindin ɓaure, na gan ka.”" 
John1:49 Sai Nata'ala ya amsa masa ya ce, “Ya Shugaba, kai Ɗan Allah ne! Kai Sarkin Isra'ila ne!”" 
John1:50 Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Wato, domin na ce maka na gan ka a gindin ɓaure ne kake ba da gaskiya? Ai, za ka ga al'amuran da suka fi haka ma.”" 
John1:51 Yesu kuma ya ce masa, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, za ku ga sama ta dāre, mala'ikun Allah suna hawa da sauka ga Ɗan Mutum.”" 
John2:1 A rana ta uku sai aka yi bikin aure a Kana ta ƙasar Galili. Uwar Yesu kuwa tana nan," 
John2:2 aka kuma gayyaci Yesu da almajiransa. 
John2:3 Da ruwan inabi ya gaza, uwar Yesu ta ce masa, “Ba su da sauran ruwan inabi.”" 
John2:4 Yesu ya ce mata, “Iya, ai, wannan magana ba taki ba ce. Lokacina bai yi ba tukuna.”" 
John2:5 Sai uwa tasa ta ce wa barorin, “Duk abin da ya ce ku yi, sai ku yi.”" 
John2:6 A wurin kuwa akwai randuna shida na dutse a ajijjiye, bisa ga al'adar Yahudawa ta tsarkakewa, kowacce na cin wajen tulu shida shida." 
John2:7 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Ku cika randunan nan da ruwa.” Suka ciccika su fal." 
John2:8 Sa'an nan ya ce musu, “To, yanzu ku ɗiba, ku kai wa uban bikin.” Sai suka kai." 
John2:9 Da uban bikin ya kurɓi ruwan da yanzu aka mayar ruwan inabi, bai kuwa san inda aka samo shi ba (amma barorin da suka ɗebo ruwan sun sani), ya yi magana da ango," 
John2:10 ya ce, “Kowa, ai, kyakkyawan ruwan inabi yakan fara bayarwa, bayan mutane sun shassha, sa'an nan kuma ya kawo wanda ya gaza na farin kyau. Amma kai ka ɓoye kyakkyawan ruwan inabin sai yanzu!”" 
John2:11 Wannan ce mu'ujizar farko da Yesu ya yi, ya kuwa yi ta ne a Kana ta ƙasar Galili, ya bayyana ɗaukakarsa. Almajiransa kuma suka gaskata da shi." 
John2:12 Bayan haka sai ya tafi Kafarnahum, da shi da uwa tasa, da 'yan'uwansa, da kuma almajiransa, suka zauna a can 'yan kwanaki." 
John2:13 Idin Ƙetarewa na Yahudawa ya matso, sai Yesu ya tafi Urushalima." 
John2:14 A cikin Haikali ya sami waɗansu dillalan shanu, da na tumaki, da na tattabarai, da kuma 'yan canjin kuɗi zaune wurin aikinsu." 
John2:15 Sai ya tuka bulala mai harsuna ta igiya, ya kore su duka daga Haikalin, har da tumakin da shanun, ya kuma watsar da kuɗin 'yan canjin, ya birkice teburorinsu." 
John2:16 Ya ce da dillalan tattabarai, “Ku kwashe waɗannan daga nan, kada ku mai da Haikalin Ubana kasuwa.”" 
John2:17 Sai almajiransa suka tuna a rubuce yake cewa, “Kishin Haikalinka ya ci raina matuƙa.”" 
John2:18 Sai Yahudawa suka amsa masa suka ce, “Wace mu'ujiza za ka nuna mana da kake haka?”" 
John2:19 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ku rushe Haikalin nan, ni kuwa in ta da shi a cikin kwana uku.”" 
John2:20 Yahudawa suka ce, “Sai fa da aka shekara arba'in da shida ana ginin Haikalin nan, kai kuwa a cikin kwana uku za ka ta da shi?”" 
John2:21 Amma haikalin da Yesu ya ambata jikinsa ne. 
John2:22 Saboda haka bayan an tashe shi daga matattu, almajiransa suka tuna ya faɗi haka, suka kuma gaskata Nassi da maganar da Yesu ya faɗa." 
John2:23 To, sa'ad da yake Urushalima lokacin Idin Ƙetarewa, mutane da yawa suka gaskata da sunansa, saboda ganin mu'ujizan da ya yi." 
John2:24 Amma Yesu bai amince da su ba," 
John2:25 domin ya san zuciyar kowa, ba kuma sai wani ya shaidi mutum a wurinsa ba, domin shi kansa ya san abin da yake zuciyar ɗan adam." 
John3:1 To, akwai wani Bafarisiye, sunansa Nikodimu, wani shugaban Yahudawa." 
John3:2 Wannan mutum ya zo wurin Yesu da dad dare, ya ce masa, “Ya Shugaba, mun sani kai malami ne da ka zo daga wurin Allah, domin ba mai iya yin waɗannan mu'ujizan da kake yi, sai ko Allah yana tare da shi.”" 
John3:3 Yesu ya amsa masa ya ce, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya maka, in ba a sāke haifar mutum ba, ba zai iya ganin Mulkin Allah ba.”" 
John3:4 Nikodimu ya ce masa, “Ƙaƙa za a haifi mutum bayan ya tsufa? Wato, ya iya komawa a cikin uwa tasa ta sāke haifo shi?”" 
John3:5 Yesu ya amsa masa ya ce, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya maka, in ba an haifi mutum ta ruwa da kuma Ruhu ba, ba zai iya shiga Mulkin Allah ba." 
John3:6 Abin da mutum ya haifa mutum ne, abin kuma da Ruhu ya haifa ruhu ne." 
John3:7 Kada ka yi mamaki domin na ce maka, ‘Dole a sāke haifarku.’" 
John3:8 Iska tana busawa inda ta ga dama. Kakan ji motsinta, amma ba ka san inda ta fito da inda za ta. Haka fa yake ga duk wanda Ruhu ya haifa.”" 
John3:9 Sai Nikodimu ya amsa masa ya ce, “Ƙaƙa wannan zai yiwu?”" 
John3:10 Yesu ya amsa masa ya ce, “Ashe, kai ma da kake malamin Isra'ila, ba ka fahimci waɗannan al'amura ba?" 
John3:11 Lalle hakika, ina gaya maka, abin da muka sani shi muke faɗa, muna kuma shaidar da abin da muka gani, amma kun ƙi yarda da shaidarmu." 
John3:12 In na yi muku zancen al'amuran duniya ba ku gaskata ba, yaya za ku gaskata in na yi muku zancen al'amuran sama?" 
John3:13 Ba wanda ya taɓa hawa cikin Sama sai shi wanda ya sauko daga Sama, wato, Ɗan Mutum da yake Sama." 
John3:14 Kamar yadda Musa ya ɗaga macijin nan a jeji, haka kuma dole ne a ɗaga Ɗan Mutum," 
John3:15 domin duk wanda ya gaskata da shi, ya sami rai madawwami." 
John3:16 “Saboda ƙaunar da Allah ya yi wa duniya har ya ba da makaɗaicin Ɗansa, domin duk wanda ya gaskata da shi kada ya hallaka, sai dai ya sami rai madawwami." 
John3:17 Gama Allah bai aiko Ɗansa duniya domin yă yanke mata hukunci ba, sai dai domin duniya ta sami ceto ta wurinsa." 
John3:18 Duk wanda ya gaskata da shi, ba za a yi masa hukunci ba. Wanda kuwa bai ba da gaskiya ba, an riga an yi masa hukunci, domin bai gaskata da sunan makaɗaicin Ɗan Allah ba." 
John3:19 Hukuncin kuwa shi ne, haske ya shigo duniya, amma mutane suka fi ƙaunar duhu da hasken, don ayyukansu mugaye ne." 
John3:20 Duk mai yin rashin gaskiya yakan ƙi hasken, ba ya kuma zuwa wajen hasken, don kada ayyukansa su tonu." 
John3:21 Mai aikata gaskiya kuwa yakan zo wajen hasken, domin a bayyana ayyukansa, cewa, da taimakon Allah ne aka yi su.”" 
John3:22 Bayan haka, Yesu da almajiransa suka tafi ƙasar Yahudiya. A nan ya jima da su, yana yin baftisma." 
John3:23 Yahaya kuma yana yin baftisma a Ainon kusa da Salima, domin da ruwa da yawa a can. Mutane kuwa suka yi ta zuwa ana yi musu baftisma." 
John3:24 Domin a sa'an nan ba a sa Yahaya a kurkuku ba tukuna. 
John3:25 Sai fa almajiran Yahaya suka tasar wa wani Bayahude da muhawara a kan maganar tsarkakewa. 
John3:26 Suka kuma zo wurin Yahaya, suka ce masa, “Ya shugaba, wanda dā kuke tare a hayin Kogin Urdun, wanda kai kanka ma ka shaida shi, to, ga shi, yana yin baftisma, har kowa da kowa yana zuwa wurinsa.”" 
John3:27 Sai Yahaya ya amsa ya ce, “Ba mai iya samun kome sai ko an ba shi daga Sama." 
John3:28 Ku kanku ma shaiduna ne a kan na ce ba ni ne Almasihu ba, amma an aiko ni ne ni riga shi gaba." 
John3:29 Mai amarya shi ne ango. Abokin ango kuwa da yake tsaye, yake kuma sauraron magana tasa, yakan yi farin ciki ƙwarai da jin muryar angon. Saboda haka farin cikin nan nawa ya cika." 
John3:30 Shi kam, lalle ne ya riƙa ƙaruwa, ni kuwa in riƙa raguwa." 
John3:31 “Mai zuwa daga Sama yana Sama da kowa. Wanda yake na ƙasa asalinsa kuwa na ƙasa ne, maganar ƙasa kuma yake yi. Mai zuwan nan daga Sama yana Sama da kowa." 
John3:32 Abin da ya ji, ya kuma gani, shi yake shaidarwa, duk da haka ba wanda yake yarda da shaidarsa." 
John3:33 Duk wanda ya yarda da shaidarsa, ya haƙƙaƙe, cewa, Allah mai gaskiya ne." 
John3:34 Domin wanda Allah ya aiko, zantuttukan Allah yake faɗa, gama Allah yana ba da Ruhu ba da iyakancewa ba." 
John3:35 Uban yana ƙaunar Ɗan, ya kuma sa kome a hannunsa." 
John3:36 Wanda ya gaskata da Ɗan, yana da rai madawwami. Wanda ya ƙi bin Ɗan kuwa, ba zai sami rai ba, sai dai fushin Allah ya tabbata a gare shi.”" 
John4:1 To, da Ubangiji Yesu ya sani dai Farisiyawa sun ji labari yana samun almajirai, yana kuma yi musu baftisma fiye da Yahaya" 
John4:2 (ko da yake dai ba Yesu kansa yake yin baftisma ba, almajiransa ne)," 
John4:3 sai ya bar ƙasar Yahudiya, ya koma ƙasar Galili." 
John4:4 Lalle ne kuwa yă ratsa ƙasar Samariya. 
John4:5 Sai ya zo wani gari na ƙasar Samariya, wanda ake kira Saikar, kusa da yankin ƙasar da Yakubu ya ba ɗansa Yusufu." 
John4:6 Rijiyar Yakubu kuwa a nan take. Saboda gajiyar tafiya fa, sai Yesu ya zauna haka nan a bakin rijiyar. Wajen tsakar rana ce kuwa." 
John4:7 Sai ga wata Basamariya ta zo ɗiban ruwa. Yesu ya ce mata, “Sa mini ruwa in sha.”" 
John4:8 Almajiransa kuwa sun shiga gari sayen abinci. 
John4:9 Sai Basamariyar ta ce masa, “Ƙaƙa kai Bayahude za ka roƙe ni ruwan sha, ni da nake Basamariya?” (Don Yahudawa ba sa cuɗanya da Samariyawa)." 
John4:10 Yesu ya amsa mata ya ce, “Da kin san kyautar Allah, da kuma wanda ya ce miki, ‘Sa mini ruwa in sha,’ ai, da kin roƙe shi, shi kuwa zai ba ki ruwan rai.”" 
John4:11 Sai matar ta ce masa, “Ya Shugaba, ai, ba ka da guga, rijiyar kuwa da zurfi. To, ina ka sami ruwan nan na rai?" 
John4:12 Ashe, ka fi ubanmu Yakubu ne, wanda ya bar mana rijiyar, har shi da kansa, da 'yayansa, da dabbobinsa, suka sha ruwanta?”" 
John4:13 Yesu ya amsa mata ya ce, “Duk mai shan ruwan nan zai sāke jin ƙishirwa." 
John4:14 Amma duk wanda ya sha ruwan da zan ba shi, ba zai ƙara jin ƙishirwa ba har abada. Ruwan da zan ba shi kuwa zai zama maɓuɓɓuga a gare shi, yana ɓuɓɓugowa har ya zuwa rai madawwami.”" 
John4:15 Matar ta ce masa, “Ya Shugaba, ka ba ni ruwan nan, don kada in ƙara jin ƙishirwa, kada kuma in riƙa zuwa har nan in ɗiba.”" 
John4:16 Sai Yesu ya ce mata, “Je ki, ku zo da mijinki.”" 
John4:17 Sai matar ta amsa ta ce, “Ai, ba ni da miji.” Yesu ya ce mata, “Gaskiyarki da kika ce ba ki da miji," 
John4:18 don kin auri maza biyar, wanda kuke tare yanzu kuwa ba mijinki ba ne. A nan kam kin yi gaskiya.”" 
John4:19 Matar ta ce masa, “Ya Shugaba, na dai gane kai annabi ne." 
John4:20 Kakanninmu sun yi sujada a dutsen nan. Ku kuwa kun ce a Urushalima ne wurin da ya wajaba a yi sujada yake.” 
John4:21 Sai Yesu ya ce mata, “Uwargida, ki gaskata ni, lokaci na zuwa da ba za ku yi wa Uba sujada ba, ko a kan dutsen nan, ko a Urushalima," 
John4:22 Ku kuna yi wa abin da ba ku sani ba sujada, mu kuwa muna yi wa abin da muka sani sujada, domin ceto ta hanyar Yahudawa yake." 
John4:23 Amma lokaci na zuwa, har ma ya yi, da masu sujada na gaskiya za su yi wa Uba sujada a ruhu, da gaskiya kuma. Lalle kuwa irin waɗannan masu sujada ne Uba yake nema." 
John4:24 Allah Ruhu ne, masu yi masa sujada kuwa lalle su yi masa sujada a ruhu, da gaskiya kuma.”" 
John4:25 Sai matar ta ce masa, “Na san Masihi yana zuwa, wanda ake kira Almasihu. Sa'ad da ya zo kuwa, zai sanar da mu kome.”" 
John4:26 Yesu ya ce mata, “Ni ne, ni mai maganan nan da yake.”" 
John4:27 Nan take almajiransa suka dawo. Suka yi mamakin ganin yana magana da mace. Amma kuwa ba wanda ya ce, “Me kike bukata?” ko, “Don me kake magana da ita?”" 
John4:28 Sai matar ta bar tulunta, ta koma gari, ta ce wa mutane," 
John4:29 “Ku zo, ku ga mutumin da ya gaya mini duk abin da na taɓa yi! Shin, ko wannan shi ne Almasihu?”" 
John4:30 Sai suka fito daga garin suka nufo shi. 
John4:31 Ana cikin haka sai almajiran suka roƙe shi suka ce, “Ya shugaba, ci abinci.”" 
John4:32 Amma ya ce musu, “Ina da abincin da ba ku sani ba.”" 
John4:33 Almajiran suka ce wa juna, “Shin, wani ya kawo masa abinci ne?”" 
John4:34 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Abincina shi ne in aikata nufin wanda ya aiko ni, in kuma cika aikinsa." 
John4:35 Ba kuna cewa, kaka saura wata huɗu ba? Ina gaya muku fa, ku duba gonaki, ku gani, sun nuna sun isa girbi." 
John4:36 Mai girbi na samun lada, yana kuma tara amfani zuwa rai madawwami, domin mai shuka da mai girbi su yi farin ciki tare." 
John4:37 A nan kam, wannan karin maganar gaskiya ne cewa, ‘Wani da shuka, wani da girbi.’" 
John4:38 Na aike ku girbin abin da ba ku yi wahalarsa ba. Waɗansu sun yi wahala, ku kuwa kun mori wahalarsu.”" 
John4:39 Samariyawa da yawa na wannan gari suka gaskata da shi saboda maganar matan nan da ta ce, “Ya gaya mini duk abin da na taɓa yi.”" 
John4:40 Da Samariyawa suka iso wurinsa, suka roƙe shi ya sauka a wurinsu. Ya kuwa kwana biyu a nan." 
John4:41 Waɗansu kumma da yawa fiye da na dā suka ba da gaskiya saboda magana tasa. 
John4:42 Sa'an nan suka ce wa macen, “Yanzu kam, mun ba da gaskiya, ba don abin da kika faɗa kawai ba, domin mu ma mun ji da kanmu, mun kuma tabbata lalle wannan shi ne Mai Ceton duniya.”" 
John4:43 Bayan kwana biyun nan sai ya tashi daga nan ya tafi ƙasar Galili. 
John4:44 Domin Yesu kansa ya yi shaida cewa annabi ba shi da girma a ƙasarsu. 
John4:45 Da ya isa ƙasar Galili, sai Galilawa suka yi na'am da shi, domin sun ga duk abin da ya yi a Urushalima a lokacin idi, domin su ma sun je idin." 
John4:46 Sai ya sāke zuwa Kana ta ƙasar Galili, inda ya mai da ruwa ruwan inabi. A Kafarnahum kuwa akwai wani bafada wanda ɗansa ba shi da lafiya." 
John4:47 Da jin cewa Yesu ya fito ƙasar Yahudiya ya komo ƙasar Galili, sai ya tafi wurinsa, ya roƙe shi ya je ya warkar da ɗansa, don yana bakin mutuwa." 
John4:48 Yesu ya ce masa, “In ba mu'ujizai da abubuwan al'ajabi kuka gani ba, ba yadda za a yi ku ba da gaskiya.”" 
John4:49 Sai bafadan nan ya ce masa, “Ya Shugaba, ka zo tun ƙaramin ɗana bai mutu ba.”" 
John4:50 Yesu ya ce masa, “Yi tafiyarka, ɗanka a raye yake.” Mutumin kuwa ya gaskata maganar da Yesu ya faɗa masa, ya yi tafiyarsa." 
John4:51 Yana cikin tafiya sai ga barorinsa sun taryo shi, suka ce masa, “Ɗanka a raya yake.”" 
John4:52 Sai ya tambaye su ainihin lokacin da ya fara samun sauƙi. Suka ce masa, “Jiya da ƙarfe ɗaya na rana zazzaɓin ya sake shi.”" 
John4:53 Sai uban ya gane, daidai lokacin nan ne, Yesu ya ce masa, “Ɗanka a raye yake.” Shi da kansa kuwa ya ba da gaskiya, da jama'ar gidansa duka." 
John4:54 Wannan kuwa ita ce mu'ujiza ta biyu da Yesu ya yi, bayan Komowarsa ƙasar Galili daga ƙasar Yahudiya." 
John5:1 Bayan haka aka yi wani idi na Yahudawa, Yesu kuwa ya tafi Urushalima." 
John5:2 A Urushalima, kusa da Ƙofar Tumaki, akwai wani ruwa da ake ce da shi Betasda da Yahudanci, an kuwa kewaye shi da shirayi biyar." 
John5:3 A shirayin nan kuwa marasa lafiya da yawa sun saba kwanciya, makafi, da guragu, da shanyayyu. [Suna jira a motsa ruwan." 
John5:4 Don lokaci lokaci wani mala'ika yakan sauko cikin ruwan ya motsa shi. Duk kuwa wanda ya fara shiga bayan an motsa ruwan, sai ya warke daga duk irin cutar da yake da ita.]" 
John5:5 A nan kuwa akwai wani mutum da ya shekara talatin da takwas da rashin lafiya. 
John5:6 Da Yesu ya gan shi kwance, ya kuma sani ya daɗe da wannan hali, sai ya ce masa, “Kana so a warkar da kai?”" 
John5:7 Marar lafiyar ya amsa masa ya ce, “Ya Shugaba, ai, ba ni da wanda zai angaza ni cikin ruwan lokacin da aka motsa shi. Lokacin da na doshi ruwan kuma sai wani ya riga ni shiga.”" 
John5:8 Sai Yesu ya ce masa, “Tashi, ka ɗauki shimfiɗarka, ka yi tafiya!”" 
John5:9 Nan take mutumin ya warke, ya ɗauki shimfiɗarsa ya yi tafiya tasa. Ran nan kuwa Asabar ce." 
John5:10 Saboda haka Yahudawa suka ce da wanda aka warkar ɗin, “Ai, Asabar ce, bai kuwa halatta ka ɗauki shimfiɗarka ba.”" 
John5:11 Sai ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ai, wanda ya warkar da ni, shi ne ya ce in ɗauki shimfiɗata, in tafi.”" 
John5:12 Suka tambaye shi, “Wane mutum ne ya ce maka ka ɗauki shimfiɗarka ka tafi?”" 
John5:13 Wanda aka warkar ɗin kuwa bai san ko wane ne ba, domin Yesu ya riga ya tashi saboda taron da yake wurin." 
John5:14 Bayan haka Yesu ya same shi a Haikali, ya ce masa, “Ka ga fa, ka warke! To, ka daina yin zunubi, don kada wani abu da ya fi wannan muni ya same ka.”" 
John5:15 Sai mutumin ya tafi ya gaya wa Yahudawa, Yesu ne ya warkar da shi." 
John5:16 Saboda haka, Yahudawa suka fara tsananta wa Yesu, don yana yin irin waɗannan abubuwa ran Asabar." 
John5:17 Yesu kuwa ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ubana yana aiki har yanzu, ni ma ina yi.”" 
John5:18 Don haka, Yahudawa suka ƙara nema su kashe shi, ba don ya keta Asabar kaɗai ba, har ma domin ya ce Allah Ubansa ne, wato, yana daidaita kansa da Allah." 
John5:19 Sai Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, Ɗan ba ya yin kome shi kaɗai, sai abin da ya ga Uba yana yi. Domin duk abin da Uban yake yi, haka shi Ɗan ma yake yi." 
John5:20 Domin Uban na ƙaunar Ɗan, yana kuma nuna masa duk abin da shi kansa yake yi, har ma zai nuna masa ayyukan da suka fi waɗannan, domin ku yi al'ajabi." 
John5:21 Yadda Uba yake ta da matattu ya kuma raya su, haka Ɗan ma yake rayar da wanda ya nufa." 
John5:22 Uba ba ya hukunta kowa, sai dai yā danƙa dukkan hukunci ga Ɗan," 
John5:23 domin kowa yă girmama Ɗan, kamar yadda ake girmama Uban. Wanda ba ya girmama Ɗan, ba ya girmama Uban da ya aiko shi ke nan." 
John5:24 Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, duk mai jin maganata, yake kuma gaskata wanda ya aiko ni, yana da rai madawwami. Ba za a yi masa hukunci ba, domin ya riga ya tsere wa mutuwa, ya kai ga rai." 
John5:25 “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, lokaci na zuwa, har ma ya yi, da matattu za su ji muryar Ɗan Allah, masu ji kuwa su rayu." 
John5:26 Yadda Uba kansa yake tushen rai, haka ya sa Ɗan ya zama tushen rai." 
John5:27 Ya kuma ba shi ikon zartar da hukunci, saboda shi Ɗan Mutum ne." 
John5:28 Kada ku yi mamakin wannan, domin lokaci na zuwa da duk waɗanda suke kaburbura za su ji murya tasa," 
John5:29 su kuma fito, waɗanda suka aikata nagarta su tashi, tashin rai, waɗanda suka yi rashin gaskiya kuwa su tashi, tashin hukunci." 
John5:30 “Ba na iya yin kome ni kaɗai. Yadda nake ji, haka nake yin hukunci. Hukuncina kuwa na adalci ne, domin ba nufin kaina nake bi ba, sai dai nufin wanda ya aiko ni." 
John5:31 In na shaida kaina, shaidata ba tabbatacciya ba ce." 
John5:32 Akwai wani mashaidina dabam, na kuwa san shaidar da yake yi mini tabbatacciya ce." 
John5:33 Kun aika wajen Yahaya, shi kuma ya shaidi gaskiya." 
John5:34 Duk da haka shaidar da na dogara da ita ba ta mutum ba ce. Na dai faɗi haka ne domin ku sami ceto. 
John5:35 Yahaya fitila ne mai ci, mai haske kuma, kun kuwa yarda ku yi farin ciki matuƙa da haskensa ɗan lokaci kaɗan." 
John5:36 Amma shaidar da ni nake da ita ta fi ta Yahaya ƙarfi. Domin ayyukan da Uba ya ba ni in gama, su ainihin ayyukan nan da nake yi, ai, su ne shaidata a kan cewa, Uba ne ya aiko ni." 
John5:37 Uban kuma da ya aiko ni, shi kansa ya shaide ni. Ba ku taɓa jin muryarsa ba, ko ganin kama tasa." 
John5:38 Maganarsa kuwa ba ta zauna a zuciyarku ba, domin ba ku gaskata wanda ya aiko ni ba." 
John5:39 Kuna ta nazarin Littattafai, don a tsammaninku a cikinsu za ku sami rai madawwami, alhali kuwa su ne suke shaidata." 
John5:40 Duk da haka, kun ƙi zuwa wurina ku sami rai." 
John5:41 Ba na karɓar girma wurin mutane. 
John5:42 Amma fa na san ku, ba ku da ƙaunar Allah a zuci." 
John5:43 Ni na zo ne da sunan Ubana, ga shi, ba ku karɓe ni ba. In da wani zai zo da sunan kansa, shi za ku karɓa." 
John5:44 Ta yaya za ku ba da gaskiya, ku da kuke karɓar girma a junanku, girman da yake daga Allah Makaɗaici kuwa, ba kwa nemansa?" 
John5:45 Kada ku zaci zan yi ƙararku wurin Uba. Akwai mai yin ƙararku, shi ne Musa, wanda kuke dogara da shi." 
John5:46 Da dai kun gaskata Musa, da kun gaskata ni, domin labarina ya rubuta." 
John5:47 In kuwa ba ku gaskata abin da ya rubuta ba, ta yaya za ku gaskata maganata?”" 
John6:1 Bayan haka Yesu ya haye Tekun Galili, wato Tekun Tibariya." 
John6:2 Sai taro mai yawa suka bi shi, don sun ga mu'ujizan da yake yi ga marasa lafiya." 
John6:3 Sai Yesu ya hau dutse ya zauna a can tare da almajiransa. 
John6:4 To, Idin Ƙetarewa, wato idin Yahudawa, ya gabato." 
John6:5 Da Yesu ya ɗaga kai ya hango babban taro yana doso shi, sai ya ce wa Filibus, “Ina za mu sayo gurasar da mutanen nan za su ci?”" 
John6:6 Ya faɗi haka ne fa domin ya gwada shi, saboda shi kansa ya san abin da zai yi." 
John6:7 Filibus ya amsa ya ce, “Ai, ko gurasar dinari metan ma ba ta isa ko wannensu ya sami kaɗan ba.”" 
John6:8 Sai Andarawas ɗan'uwan Bitrus ɗaya daga cikin almajiransa, ya ce masa," 
John6:9 “Ga wani ɗan yaro nan da gurasa biyar na sha'ir, da kuma kifi biyu. Amma me waɗannan za su yi wa mutane masu yawa haka?”" 
John6:10 Yesu ya ce, “Ku ce wa mutane su zauna.” Wuri ne kuwa mai ciyawa. Sai mazaje suka zazzaune, su wajen dubu biyar." 
John6:11 Yesu ya ɗauki gurasar, bayan ya yi godiya ga Allah kuma, sai ya rarraba wa waɗanda suke zazzaune. Haka kuma ya yi da kifin, gwargwadon abin da ya ishe su." 
John6:12 Da suka ci suka ƙoshi, sai ya ce wa almajiransa, “Ku tattara gutsattsarin da suka saura, kada kome ya ɓata.”" 
John6:13 Sai suka tattara gutsattsarin gurasar nan biyar na sha'ir da suka saura bayan kowa ya ci, suka cika kwando goma sha biyu." 
John6:14 Da jama'a suka ga mu'ujizar da ya yi, suka ce, “Lalle, wannan shi ne annabin nan mai zuwa duniya.!”" 
John6:15 Da Yesu ya gane suna shirin zuwa su ɗauke shi ƙarfi da yaji su naɗa shi sarki, sai ya sāke komawa kan dutsen shi kaɗai." 
John6:16 Da magariba ta yi, sai almajiransa suka gangara teku." 
John6:17 Suka shiga jirgi suka tasar wa haye tekun zuwa Kafarnahun. A sa'an nan duhu ya yi, Yesu kuwa bai zo wurinsu ba tukuna." 
John6:18 Sai tekun ta fara hauka saboda wata riƙaƙƙiyar iska da take busowa. 
John6:19 Bayan sun yi tuƙi wajen mil uku ko huɗu, sai suka hango Yesu yana tafiya a kan ruwan, ya kusato jirgin. Sai suka firgita." 
John6:20 Amma ya ce musu, “Ni ne, kada ku ji tsoro.”" 
John6:21 Sa'an nan suka yarda suka karɓe shi a cikin jirgin. Nan da nan sai ga jirgin a gāɓar da za su. 
John6:22 Kashegari sauran taron da suka tsaya a hayin tekun suka lura ba wani jirgi a wurin, sai wani ɗan ƙarami, suka kuma lura Yesu bai shiga cikinsa tare da almajiransa ba, sai almajiran ne kaɗai suka tafi." 
John6:23 Akwai kuwa waɗansu ƙananan jirage daga Tibariya da suka iso kusa da wurin nan da taron suka ci gurasa bayan Ubangiji ya yi godiya. 
John6:24 Sa'ad da kuwa taron suka ga ba Yesu, ba almajiransa a nan, su ma suka shiga ƙananan jiragen, suka tafi Kafarnahum neman Yesu." 
John6:25 Da suka same shi a hayin tekun, suka ce masa, “Ya Shugaba, yaushe ka zo nan?”" 
John6:26 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, kuna nemana ne ba don kun ga mu'ujizai ba, sai don kun ci gurasar nan kun ƙoshi." 
John6:27 Kada ku yi wahala a kan neman abinci mai lalacewa, sai dai a kan abinci mai dawwama har ya zuwa rai madawwami, wanda Ɗan Mutum zai ba ku. Domin shi ne wanda Uba, wato Allah, ya tabbatar wa da ikon yin haka.”" 
John6:28 Sai suka ce masa, “Me za mu yi mu aikata ayyukan da Allah yake so?”" 
John6:29 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Wannan shi ne aikin da Allah yake so, wato ku gaskata da wanda ya aiko.”" 
John6:30 Sai suka ce masa, “To, wace mu'ujiza za ka yi mu gani mu gaskata ka? Me za ka yi?" 
John6:31 Kakannin kakanninmu sun ci manna a jeji, yadda yake a rubuce cewa, ‘Ya ba su gurasa daga Sama su ci.’ ”" 
John6:32 Sa'an nan Yesu ya ce musu, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, ba Musa ne ya ba ku gurasar nan daga Sama ba, Ubana ne yake ba ku hakikanin Gurasa daga Sama." 
John6:33 Ai, Gurasan Allah shi ne mai saukowa daga Sama, mai ba duniya rai.”" 
John6:34 Sai suka ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, ka riƙa ba mu irin wannan gurasa kullum!”" 
John6:35 Yesu ya ce musu, “Ni ne gurasa mai ba da rai. Wanda ya zo gare ni ba zai ji yunwa ba har abada, wanda kuma ya gaskata da ni ba zai ƙara jin ƙishirwa ba har abada." 
John6:36 Na dai gaya muku, kun gan ni, duk da haka ba ku ba da gaskiya ba." 
John6:37 Duk wanda Uba ya ba ni zai zo gare ni, wanda kuwa ya zo gare ni ba zan kore shi ba ko kaɗan." 
John6:38 Domin na sauko daga Sama, ba domin in bi nufin kaina ba, sai dai nufin wanda ya aiko ni." 
John6:39 Nufin wanda ya aiko ni kuwa, shi ne kada in yar da kowa daga cikin dukkan waɗanda ya ba ni, sai dai in tashe su a ranar ƙarshe." 
John6:40 Gama nufin Ubana, shi ne duk wanda yake duban Ɗan, yake kuma gaskatawa da shi, yă sami rai madawwani, ni kuma zan tashe shi a ranar ƙarshe.”" 
John6:41 Sai fa Yahudawa suka yi masa gunaguni, domin ya ce, “Ni ne Gurasan da ya sauko daga Sama.”" 
John6:42 Suka ce, “Ashe, wannan ba Yesu ba ne, ɗan Yusufu, wanda uwa tasa da ubansa duk mun san su? To, yaya yanzu zai ce, ‘Na sauko ne daga sama’?”" 
John6:43 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Kada ku yi gunaguni a junanku." 
John6:44 Ba mai iya zuwa wurina, sai dai in Uba wanda ya aiko ni ne ya jawo shi, ni kuwa zan tashe shi a ranar ƙarshe." 
John6:45 A rubuce yake cikin littattafan annabawa cewa, ‘Dukkansu Allah ne zai koya musu.’ To, duk wanda ya ji, ya kuma koya wurin Uba, zai zo gare ni." 
John6:46 Ba wai don wani ya taɓa ganin Uban, sai shi wanda yake daga wurin Allah, shi ne ya ga Uban." 
John6:47 Lalle hakika ina gaya muku, wanda ya ba da gaskiya, yana da rai madawwami." 
John6:48 Ni ne Gurasa mai ba da rai. 
John6:49 Kakannin kakanninku sun ci manna a jeji, amma kuwa sun mutu." 
John6:50 Ga Gurasa mai saukowa daga Sama, domin kowa yă ci, kada ya mutu." 
John6:51 Ni ne Gurasan rai da ya sauko daga Sama. Kowa ya ci Gurasan nan, zai rayu har abada. Har ma gurasar da zan bayar naman jikina ne, domin duniya ta rayu.”" 
John6:52 Sai Yahudawa suka ta da husuma a junansu, suna cewa, “Yaya mutumin nan zai iya ba mu naman jikinsa mu ci?”" 
John6:53 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, in ba ku ci naman jikin Ɗan Mutum ba, kuka kuma sha jininsa, ba rai a gare ku." 
John6:54 Duk wanda suke cin naman jikina, yake kuma shan jinina, yana da rai madawwami, ni kuwa zan tashe shi a ranar ƙarshe." 
John6:55 Domin naman jikina abinci ne na hakika, jinina kuma abin sha ne na hakika." 
John6:56 Duk wanda suke cin naman jikina, yake shan jinina, a cikina yake zaune, ni kuma a cikinsa." 
John6:57 Kamar yadda rayayyen Uba ya aiko ni, nake kuma rayuwa saboda Uban, haka ma wanda yake ni ne abincinsa zai rayu saboda ni." 
John6:58 Wannan shi ne Gurasan da ya sauko daga Sama, ba irin wadda kakannin kakanninku suka ci ba, duk da haka suka mutu. Duk mai cin Gurasan nan zai rayu har abada.”" 
John6:59 Wannan kuwa a majami'a ya faɗa, sa'ad da yake koyarwa a Kafarnahum." 
John6:60 Da jin haka, da yawa daga cikin almajiransa suka ce, “Wannan magana mai wuya ce, wa zai iya jinta?”" 
John6:61 Yesu kuwa, da yake ya sani a ransa almajiransa suna gunagunin wannan, sai ya ce musu, “Wato, wannan ne ya zamar muku abin tuntuɓe?" 
John6:62 Yaya ke nan in kuka ga Ɗan Mutum yana hawa inda yake dā? 
John6:63 Ai, Ruhu shi ne mai rayarwa, jiki kam ba ya amfana kome. Kalmomin da na faɗa muku ruhu ne, da kuma rai." 
John6:64 Amma fa akwai waɗansunku da ba su ba da gaskiya ba.” Domin tun farko Yesu ya san waɗanda ba su ba da gaskiya ba, da kuma wanda zai bāshe shi." 
John6:65 Sai ya ƙara da cewa, “Shi ya sa na gaya muku, ba mai iya zuwa gare ni, sai ko Uba ya yardar masa.”" 
John6:66 Kan wannan da yawa daga cikin almajiransa suka koma da baya, ba su ƙara tafiya tare da shi ba." 
John6:67 Sai Yesu ya ce wa goma sha biyun, “Ku ma kuna so ku tafi ne?”" 
John6:68 Bitrus ya amsa masa ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, gun wa za mu je? Kai kake da maganar rai madawwami." 
John6:69 Mu kuwa mun gaskata, mun kuma tabbata kai ne Mai Tsarkin nan na Allah.”" 
John6:70 Sai Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ba ni na zaɓe ku, ku goma sha biyu ba? To, ɗayanku Iblis ne.”" 
John6:71 Wato, yana nufin Yahuza, ɗan Saminu Iskariyoti, don shi ne zai bāshe shi, ko da yake ɗaya daga cikin goma sha biyun nan ne." 
John7:1 Bayan haka, Yesu ya riƙa zagawa a Ƙasar Galili, bai yarda ya zaga ta Yahudiya ba, don Yahudawa suna neman kashe shi." 
John7:2 Idin Bukkoki na Yahudawa kuwa ya gabato. 
John7:3 Sai 'yan'uwansa suka ce masa, “Tashi daga nan mana ka tafi ƙasar Yahudiya, almajiranka su ma su ga ayyukan da kake yi." 
John7:4 Ai, ba mai aiki a ɓoye in yana so ya shahara. Tun da yake kana yin waɗannan al'amura, to, sai ka bayyana kanka ga duniya.”" 
John7:5 Domin ko dā ma 'yan'uwansa ba su gaskata da shi ba. 
John7:6 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Lokacina bai yi ba tukuna, amma ku, koyaushe lokacinku ne." 
John7:7 Ba dama duniya ta ƙi ku, amma ni take ƙi, don na shaide ta a kan ayyukanta mugaye ne." 
John7:8 Ku dai ku tafi idin. Ni ba za ni ba yanzu, don lokacina bai yi sosai ba tukuna.”" 
John7:9 Da ya faɗa musu haka, ya dakata a ƙasar Galili." 
John7:10 Bayan 'yan'uwansa sun tafi idin kuwa, shi ma ya tafi, amma a ɓoye, ba a fili ba." 
John7:11 Yahudawa suna ta nemansa a wurin idin suna cewa, “Ina yake ne?”" 
John7:12 Taro kuma suka riƙa maganarsa a raɗe, waɗansu na cewa, “Mutum ne nagari.” Waɗansu kuma na cewa, “A'a, ai, ɓad da jama'a yake.”" 
John7:13 Amma ba wanda ya yi magana tasa a fili don tsoron Yahudawa. 
John7:14 Wajen tsakiyar idin sai Yesu ya shiga Haikali ya koyar. 
John7:15 Yahudawa suka yi mamakin abin, suka ce, “Yaya mutumin nan yake da karatu haka, ga shi kuwa, bai taɓa koyo ba?”" 
John7:16 Sai Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Koyarwata ba tawa ba ce, ta wanda ya aiko ni ce." 
John7:17 Duk mai son aikata nufin Allah zai san koyarwan nan ko ta Allah ce, ko domin kaina nake faɗa." 
John7:18 Mai magana don kansa, neman ɗaukakar kansa yake yi. Amma mai neman ɗaukakar wanda ya aiko shi, shi ne mai gaskiya, ba kuwa rashin gaskiya a gare shi." 
John7:19 Ashe, ba Musa ne ya ba ku Shari'a ba? Duk da haka ba mai kiyaye Shari'ar a cikinku. Don me kuke neman kashe ni?”" 
John7:20 Taron suka amsa suka ce, “Kana da iska! Wa yake neman kashe ka?”" 
John7:21 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Aiki ɗaya kawai na yi, dukanku kuwa kuna mamakinsa." 
John7:22 Musa ya bar muku kaciya, (ba ko shi ya fara ba, tun kakannin kakanni ne), ga shi kuma, kukan yi wa mutum kaciya ko a ran Asabar ma." 
John7:23 To, in ana yi wa mutum kaciya ran Asabar don gudun keta Shari'ar Musa, kwa yi fushi don na warkar da mutum sarai ran Asabar?" 
John7:24 Kada ku yi hukunci da zato, amma ku yi hukunci da adalci.”" 
John7:25 Sai waɗansu mutanen Urushalima suka ce, “Ashe, ba wannan ne mutumin da suke nema su kashe ba?" 
John7:26 Ga shi nan kuwa, yana magana a fili, ba su ce masa kome ba! Ya yiwu kuma shugabanni sun san lalle wannan shi ne Almasihu?" 
John7:27 Wannan kam, mun san daga inda yake, amma sa'ad da Almasihu ya zo ba wanda zai san daga inda yake.”" 
John7:28 Yesu yana koyarwa a Haikalin ke nan, sai ya ɗaga murya ya ce, “Kun dai san ni, kun kuma san daga inda nake. Ban fa zo domin kaina ba. Wanda ya aiko ni mai gaskiya ne, shi kuwa ba ku san shi ba." 
John7:29 Ni na san shi, domin daga wurinsa na fito, shi ne kuwa ya aiko ni.”" 
John7:30 Don haka suka nema su kama shi, amma ba wanda ya taɓa shi, domin lokacinsa bai yi ba tukuna." 
John7:31 Duk da haka mutane da yawa cikin taron sun gaskata da shi, suna cewa, “Sa'ad da Almasihu ya zo, zai yi mu'ujizai fiye da na mutumin nan?”" 
John7:32 Farisiyawa suka ji taro suna raɗeraɗinsa haka, sai manyan firistoci da Farisiyawa suka aiki dogaran Haikali su kamo shi." 
John7:33 Sai Yesu ya ce, “Saurana ɗan lokaci kaɗan tare da ku, sa'an nan zan koma wurin wanda ya aiko ni." 
John7:34 Za ku neme ni, amma ba za ku same ni ba. Inda nake kuwa ba za ku iya zuwa ba.”" 
John7:35 Sai Yahudawa suka ce wa juna, “Ina za shi da har ba za mu same shi ba? Za shi wurin Yahudawan da suka warwatsu a cikin al'ummai ne, ya koya wa al'umman?" 
John7:36 Me kuma yake nufi da cewa, ‘Za ku neme ni amma ba za ku same ni ba’? da kuma cewa, ‘Inda nake ba za ku iya zuwa ba’?”" 
John7:37 A ranar ƙarshe ta idin, wato babbar ranar, sai Yesu ya tsaya, ya ɗaga murya ya ce, “Duk mai jin ƙishirwa yă zo gare ni yă sha." 
John7:38 Duk mai gaskatawa da ni, kamar yadda Nassi ya ce, ‘Daga zuciyarsa ne kogunan ruwan rai za su gudana.’ ”" 
John7:39 To, wannan shi ne ya faɗa game da Ruhu, wanda masu gaskatawa da shi za su karɓa, domin har yanzu ba a ba da Ruhu ba, saboda ba a ɗaukaka Yesu ba tukuna." 
John7:40 Da jin maganan nan waɗansu daga cikin taron suka ce, “Hakika wannan annabin nan ne.”" 
John7:41 Waɗansu kuwa suka ce, “Wannan Almasihu ne.” Amma waɗansu suka ce, “Me? Ashe, Almasihu daga ƙasar Galili zai fito?" 
John7:42 Nassi ba cewa ya yi Almasihu zuriyar Dawuda ne ba, daga kuma Baitalami yake, ƙauyen da Dawuda ya zauna?”" 
John7:43 Sai kuma rabuwa ta shiga tsakaninsu a kansa. 
John7:44 Waɗansunsu suka so su kama shi, amma ba wanda ya taɓa shi." 
John7:45 Daga nan dogaran Haikali suka koma wurin manyan firistoci da Farisiyawa, su kuwa suka ce musu, “Don me ba ku kawo shi ba?”" 
John7:46 Sai dogaran suka amsa suka ce, “A'a, ba mutumin da ya taɓa magana kamar wannan!”" 
John7:47 Sai Farisiyawa suka amsa musu suka ce, “Af! Har ku ma an ɓad da ku ne?" 
John7:48 Ashe, akwai wani daga cikin shugabanni ko Farisiyawa da ya gaskata da shi?" 
John7:49 Amma wannan taro da ba su san Attaura ba, ai, la'anannu ne.”" 
John7:50 Nikodimu kuwa da ya je wurinsa dā, yana kuwa ɗaya daga cikinsu, ya ce musu," 
John7:51 “Ashe, shari'armu takan hukunta mutum tun ba a ji daga bakinsa ba, an kuma san abin da yake ciki?”" 
John7:52 Suka amsa masa suka ce, “Kai ma Bagalile ne? Bincika mana ka gani, ai, ba wani annabi da zai bayyana a ƙasar Galili.” [" 
John7:53 Sai kowa ya tafi gida. 
John8:1 Yesu kuwa ya hau Dutsen Zaitun. 
John8:2 Da sassafe kuma ya sāke shiga Haikali. Duk mutane suka zo wurinsa, ya kuwa zauna yana koya musu." 
John8:3 Sai malaman Attaura da Farisiyawa suka kawo wata mace da aka kama da zina. Da suka tsai da ita a tsaka," 
John8:4 suka ce masa, “Malam, matan nan an kama ta ne, suna cikin yin zina." 
John8:5 To, a Attaura Musa ya umarce mu mu kashe irin waɗannan da jifa, kai kuwa me ka ce?”" 
John8:6 Sun faɗi haka ne don su gwada shi, ko sa sami hanyar kai ƙararsa. Amma Yesu ya sunkuya, ya yi ta rubutu a ƙasa da yatsa." 
John8:7 Da suka dinga tambayarsa sai ya ɗaga, ya ce musu, “To, marar zunubi a cikinku ya fara jifanta da dutse.”" 
John8:8 Sai ya sāke sunkuyawa, ya yi ta rubutu a ƙasa." 
John8:9 Su kuwa da suka ji haka suka fita da ɗaya ɗaya, tun daga babbansu har ya zuwa ƙaraminsu, aka bar Yesu shi kaɗai, da matar tsaye a tsakiya." 
John8:10 Sai Yesu ya ɗaga, ya ce mata, “Uwargida, ina suke? Ba wanda ya hukunta ki?”" 
John8:11 Ta ce, “Babu, ya Ubangiji.” Sai Yesu ya ce, “Ni ma ban hukunta ki ba. Yi tafiyarki. Daga yau kada ki ƙara yin zunubi.”]" 
John8:12 Sai Yesu ya ƙara musu da cewa, “Ni ne Hasken duniya. Wanda yake bi na ba zai yi tafiya a duhu ba, amma zai sami hasken rai,”" 
John8:13 Saboda haka Farisiyawa suka ce masa, “Kanka kake wa shaida, shaidarka kuwa ba tabbatacciya ba ce.”" 
John8:14 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ko na shaidi kaina, ai, shaidata tabbatacciya ce, domin na san inda na fito, da kuma inda za ni. Amma ku ba ku san inda na fito ba, ko kuma inda za ni." 
John8:15 Ku kuna hukunci irin na duniya ne, ni kuwa ba na hukunta kowa." 
John8:16 Amma ko da zan yi hukunci, hukuncina na gaskiya ne, domin ba ni kaɗai nake ba, ni da Uba wanda ya aiko ni ne." 
John8:17 A Attaurarku ma a rubuce yake, cewa shaidar mutum biyu tabbatacciya ce." 
John8:18 Ni ne nake shaidar kaina, Uba da ya aiko ni kuma yana shaidata.”" 
John8:19 Saboda haka suka ce masa, “Ina Uban naka yake?” Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Ko ni ko Ubana, ba wanda kuka sani. Da kun san ni, da kun san Ubana ma.”" 
John8:20 Ya faɗi wannan magana ne a baitulmalin Haikali, lokacin da yake koyarwa a wurin. Duk da haka ba wanda ya kama shi, don lokacinsa bai yi ba tukuna." 
John8:21 Sai ya ƙara ce musu, “Zan yi tafiya, za ku kuwa neme ni, amma za ku mutu da zunubinku. Inda za ni kuwa ba za ku iya zuwa ba.”" 
John8:22 Saboda haka sai Yahudawa suka ce, “Wato zai kashe kansa ke nan da ya ce, ‘Inda za ni ba za ku iya zuwa ba’?”" 
John8:23 Sai ya ce musu, “Ku daga ƙasa kuke, ni kuwa daga sama nake. Ku na duniyan nan ne, ni kuwa ba na duniyar nan ba ne.”" 
John8:24 Shi ya sa na ce muku za ku mutu da zunubanku. Domin in ba ku gaskata ni ne shi ba, za ku mutu da zunubanku.”" 
John8:25 Sai suka ce masa, “Kai wane ne?” Yesu ya ce musu, “Daidai yadda na gaya muku." 
John8:26 Akwai abubuwa da yawa da zan faɗa game da ku, in kuma hukunta. Amma shi wannan da ya aiko ni mai gaskiya ne. Abin da na jiyo daga gare shi kuwa, shi nake shaida wa duniya.”" 
John8:27 Ba su gane maganar Uba yake yi musu ba. 
John8:28 Sai Yesu ya ce, “Sa'ad da kuka ɗaga Ɗan Mutum, a sa'an nan ne za ku gane ni ne shi, ba na yin kome kuma ni kaɗai, sai dai Uba ya koya mini, haka nake faɗa." 
John8:29 Wanda kuwa ya aiko ni yana tare da ni, bai bar ni ni kaɗai ba, domin koyaushe ina aikata abin da yake so.”" 
John8:30 Sa'ad da Yesu yake faɗar haka, mutane da yawa suka gaskata da shi." 
John8:31 Sai Yesu ya ce wa Yahudawan nan da suka gaskata shi, “In dai kun zauna kan maganata, hakika ku almajiraina ne." 
John8:32 Za ku san gaskiya, gaskiyar kuwa za ta 'yanta ku.”" 
John8:33 Suka amsa masa suka ce, “Ai, mu zuriyar Ibrahim ne, ba mu taɓa bauta wa kowa ba. Yaya kuma za ka ce za a 'yanta mu?”" 
John8:34 Sai Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, duk mai aikata zunubi bawan zunubi ne." 
John8:35 Ai, bawa ba ya ɗorewa a gida har abada, ɗa kuwa yana ɗorewa." 
John8:36 In kuwa Ɗan ya 'yanta ku, za ku 'yantu, 'yantuwar gaske." 
John8:37 Na san dai ku zuriyar Ibrahim ne, amma kuwa kuna neman kashe ni, don maganata ba ta shigarku." 
John8:38 Ina faɗar abin da na gani a wurin Ubana, ku kuma kuna yin abin da kuka ji daga wurin naku uba.”" 
John8:39 Suka amsa masa suka ce, “Ai, Ibrahim ne ubanmu.” Yesu ya ce musu, “Da ku 'ya'yan Ibrahim ne, da sai ku yi aikin da Ibrahim ya yi." 
John8:40 Ga shi yanzu, kuna neman kashe ni, ni mutumin da na gaya muku gaskiyar da na ji wurin Allah. Ba haka Ibrahim ya yi ba." 
John8:41 Ku kuna aikin da ubanku yake yi ne.” Suka ce masa, “Ba a haife mu daga fasikanci ba, ubanmu ɗaya ne, wato Allah.”" 
John8:42 Yesu ya ce musu, “Da Allah ne Ubanku da kun ƙaunace ni, domin daga wurin Allah na fito, ga ni nan kuwa. Ban zo domin kaina ba, shi ne ya aiko ni." 
John8:43 Don me ba kwa gane maganata? Don ba kwa iya jimirin jin maganata ne. 
John8:44 Ku na ubanku Iblis ne, niyyarku kuwa ku aikata burin ubanku. Shi dā ma tun farko mai kisankai ne, bai zauna kan gaskiya ba, don ba ruwansa da gaskiya. Duk sa'ad da yake ƙarya, cinikinsa yake yi, don shi maƙaryaci ne, uban ƙarairayi kuma." 
John8:45 Amma domin ina faɗar gaskiya, ba kwa gaskata ni." 
John8:46 A cikinku wa zai iya haƙƙaƙewa na taɓa yin zunubi? In kuwa gaskiya nake faɗa, to, don me ba kwa gaskata ni?" 
John8:47 Na Allah yakan saurari Maganar Allah. Abin da ya sa ba kwa sauraronta ke nan, don ku ba na Allah ba ne.”" 
John8:48 Yahudawa suka amsa masa suka ce, “Ashe, gaskiyarmu da muka ce kai Basamariye ne, kana kuma da iska.”" 
John8:49 Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Ni ba mai iska ba ne. Ubana nake girmamawa, ku kuwa wulakanta ni kuke yi." 
John8:50 Ba ni nake nemar wa kaina girma ba, akwai mai nemar mini, shi ne kuma mai yin shari'a." 
John8:51 Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, kowa ya kiyaye maganata ba zai mutu ba har abada.”" 
John8:52 Sai Yahudawa suka ce masa, “To, yanzu kam, mun tabbata kana da iska. Ai, Ibrahim ya mutu, haka ma annabawa, kana kuwa cewa kowa ya kiyaye maganarka ba zai mutu ba har abada." 
John8:53 Wato ka fi ubanmu Ibrahim ne, ya kuwa mutu? Annabawa ma sun mutu! Wa ka mai da kanka ne?”" 
John8:54 Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “In ma na ɗaukaka kaina, ɗaukakata ba a bakin kome take ba. Ubana shi ne mai ɗaukaka ni, wanda kuke cewa, shi ne Allahnku." 
John8:55 Ku ba ku san shi ba, amma ni na san shi. Da na ce ban san shi ba, da na zama maƙaryaci kamarku. Amma na san shi, ina kuma kiyaye magana tasa." 
John8:56 Ubanku Ibrahim ya yi farin ciki matuƙa ya sami ganin zamanina, ya kuwa gan shi, ya yi murna.”" 
John8:57 Sai Yahudawa suka ce masa, “Har yanzu ma ba ka kai shekara hamsin ba, wai kuwa har ka ga Ibrahim!”" 
John8:58 Sai Yesu ya ce musu, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, tun ba a haifi Ibrahim ba, ni ne.”" 
John8:59 Don haka suka ɗebo duwatsu su jajjefe shi. Yesu kuwa ya ɓuya, ya fita daga Haikalin." 
John9:1 Yesu na wucewa sai ya ga wani mutum da aka haifa makaho. 
John9:2 Sai almajiransa suka tambaye shi suka ce, “Ya Shugaba, wa ya yi zunubi da aka haifi mutumin nan makaho, shi, ko iyayensa?”" 
John9:3 Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Ba domin mutumin nan ko iyayensa sun yi zunubi ba, sai domin a nuna aikin Allah ne a kansa." 
John9:4 Lalle ne mu yi aikin wanda ya aiko ni tun da sauran rana. Ai, dare zai yi sa'ad da ba mai iya aiki." 
John9:5 Muddin ina duniya ni ne hasken duniya.” 
John9:6 Da ya faɗi haka sai ya tofa yau a ƙasa, ya cuɗa ƙasa, ya shafa a idanun makahon," 
John9:7 ya ce masa, “Je ka, ka wanke ido a ruwan Siluwam,” wato aikakke. Shi ke nan sai ya je ya wanke ido, ya komo yana gani." 
John9:8 Maƙwabta da waɗanda suka saba ganinsa dā yana bara, suka ce, “Ashe, ba wannan ne yakan zauna yana bara ba?”" 
John9:9 Waɗansu suka ce, “Shi ne mana.” Waɗansu kuwa suka ce, “A'a, kai dai, sun yi kama.” Shi kuwa ya ce, “Sosai ni ne!”" 
John9:10 Sai suka ce masa, “To, ƙaƙa aka yi idanunka suka buɗe?”" 
John9:11 Ya amsa ya ce, “Mutumin nan da ake kira Yesu ne ya cuɗa ƙasa ya shafa mini a idanu, ya ce mini, ‘Je ka Siluwam ka wanke ido.’ Na kuwa je na wanke, sai na sami gani.”" 
John9:12 Suka ce masa, “Ina yake?” Ya ce, “Ban sani ba.”" 
John9:13 Sai suka kai wa Farisiyawa mutumin da yake makaho a dā. 
John9:14 To, ran Asabar ne Yesu ya cuɗa ƙasar ya buɗe masa ido." 
John9:15 Farisiyawa ma suka tambaye shi ta yadda aka yi ya sami gani. Ya ce musu, “Cuɗaɗɗiyar ƙasa ya shafa a idona, na wanke, ina gani.”" 
John9:16 Saboda haka, waɗansu Farisiyawa suka ce, “Mutumin nan ba daga Allah yake ba, don ba ya kiyaye Asabar.” Waɗansu kuwa suka ce, “Yaya mutum mai zunubi zai iya yin mu'ujizai haka?” Sai rabuwa ta shiga tsakaninsu." 
John9:17 Sai suka sāke ce wa makahon, “To, kai fa, me ka gani game da shi, da yake kai ya buɗe wa ido?” Ya ce, “Ai, annabi ne.”" 
John9:18 Yahudawa kam, ba su gaskata shi makaho ne a dā ba, ya kuma sami gani, har suka kira iyayen wanda ya sami ganin," 
John9:19 suka tambaye su suka ce, “Wannan ɗanku ne da kuke cewa an haife shi makaho? To, ta yaya yake iya gani yanzu?”" 
John9:20 Sai iyayen nasa suka amsa suka ce, “Mun dai san wannan ɗanmu ne, makaho ne aka haife shi." 
John9:21 Amma ta yadda aka yi yake gani yanzu ba mu sani ba, ba mu ma san wanda ya buɗe idon ba. Ku tambaye shi, ai, ba yaro ba ne, zai faɗa da bakinsa.”" 
John9:22 Iyayensa sun faɗi haka ne don tsoron Yahudawa, don dā ma Yahudawa sun ƙulla, cewa kowa ya amsa, cewa shi ne Almasihu, za a fisshe shi daga jama'a." 
John9:23 Shi ya sa iyayensa suka ce, “Ai, ba yaro ba ne, ku tambaye shi.”" 
John9:24 Sai suka sāke kiran mutumin nan da yake makaho a dā, suka ce masa, “Ka tsoraci Allah dai! Mu kam, mun san mutumin nan mai zunubi ne.”" 
John9:25 Sai ya amsa ya ce, “Ko mai zunubi ne, ni ban sani ba. Abu ɗaya kam, na sani, dā ni makaho ne, yanzu kuwa ina gani.”" 
John9:26 Sai suka ce masa, “Shin, me ya yi maka? Ta yaya ya buɗe maka ido?”" 
John9:27 Ya amsa musu ya ce, “Na riga na faɗa muku, ba ku ji ba. Don me kuke so ku sāke ji? Ko ku ma kuna so ku zama almajiransa ne?”" 
John9:28 Sai suka fāɗa shi da zagi, suna cewa, “Kai ne dai almajirin wannan ɗin, mu kam, almajiran Musa ne." 
John9:29 Mun dai sani Allah ya yi magana da Musa, amma wannan ba mu san ta inda ya fito ba.”" 
John9:30 Sai mutumin ya amsa musu ya ce, “Yau ga abin mamaki! Ashe, ba ku san ta inda ya fito ba, ga shi kuwa, ya buɗe mini ido!" 
John9:31 Mun sani Allah ba ya sauraron masu zunubi, amma duk wanda yake mai bautar Allah, yake kuma aikata nufinsa, Allah yakan saurare shi." 
John9:32 Tun da aka fara duniya ba a taɓa jin wani ya buɗe idon wanda aka haifa makaho ba. 
John9:33 Da mutumin nan ba daga Allah ya fito ba, da ba abin da zai iya yi.”" 
John9:34 Suka amsa masa suka ce, “Kai da aka haifa a baƙin zunubi ne za ka koya mana?” Sai suka kore shi." 
John9:35 Yesu ya ji labari sun kore shi. Da ya same shi, ya ce, “Ka gaskata da Ɗan Mutum ko?”" 
John9:36 Ya amsa ya ce, “Wane ne shi, ya Shugaba, da zan gaskata da shi?”" 
John9:37 Yesu ya ce masa, “Ai, ka gan shi, shi ne ma mai magana da kai.”" 
John9:38 Sai ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, na ba da gaskiya,” ya kuma yi masa sujada." 
John9:39 Yesu ya ce, “Na shigo duniyan nan ne don rarrabewa, domin waɗanda ba sa gani su gani, waɗanda suke gani kuma su makance.”" 
John9:40 Da Farisiyawan nan da suke tare da shi suka ji haka, suka ce masa, “Wato mu ma makafi ne?”" 
John9:41 Yesu ya ce musu, “Ai, da makafi ne ku, da ba ku da zunubi. Amma da yake kun ce kuna gani, to, zunubinku ya tabbata." 
John10:1 “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, wanda bai shiga garken tumaki ta ƙofa ba, amma ya haura ta wani gu, to, shi ɓarawo ne, ɗan fashi kuma." 
John10:2 Wanda kuwa ya shiga ta ƙofar, makiyayin tumakin ne." 
John10:3 Mai tsaron ƙofar yakan buɗe masa, tumakin kuma sukan saurari murya tasa, yakan kama sunan nasa tumaki, ya kai su waje." 
John10:4 Bayan ya fitar da dukan nasa waje, sai ya shige gabansu, tumakin na biye da shi, domin sun san murya tasa." 
John10:5 Ba za su bi baƙo ba, sai dai su guje shi, don ba su san muryar baƙo ba.”" 
John10:6 Yesu ya yi musu wannan misali, amma ba su gane abin da ya faɗa musu ba." 
John10:7 Don haka Yesu ya sāke ce musu, “Lalle hakika, ina gaya muku, ni ne ƙofar tumakin." 
John10:8 Duk waɗanda suka riga ni zuwa cewa, su ne ni, ɓarayi ne, 'yan fashi kuma, amma tumakin ba su kula da su ba." 
John10:9 Ni ne ƙofar. Kowa ya shiga ta wurina zai sami ceto, ya kai ya kawo, ya kuma yi kiwo." 
John10:10 Ɓarawo yakan zo ne kawai don sata da kisa da hallakarwa. Ni kuwa na zo ne domin su sami rai, su kuma same shi a yalwace." 
John10:11 Ni ne makiyayi mai kyau. Makiyayi mai kyau kuwa shi ne mai ba da ransa domin tumakin. 
John10:12 Wanda yake ɗan asako kuwa, ba makiyayin gaske ba, tumakin kuma ba nasa ba, da ganin kyarkeci ya doso, sai ya watsar da tumakin, ya yi ta kansa, kyarkeci kuwa ya sure waɗansu, ya fasa sauran." 
John10:13 Ya gudu ne fa, don shi ɗan asako ne, ba abin da ya dame shi da tumakin." 
John10:14 Ni ne Makiyayi mai kyau. Na san nawa, nawa kuma sun san ni," 
John10:15 kamar yadda Uba ya san ni, ni kuma na san Uban. Ina ba da raina maimakon tumakin." 
John10:16 Ina kuma da waɗansu tumaki da ba na wannan garke ba ne. Su ma lalle in kawo su, za su kuwa saurari muryata, su zama garke guda, makiyayi kuma guda." 
John10:17 Domin wannan uba yake ƙaunata, domin ina ba da raina in ɗauko shi kuma." 
John10:18 Ba mai karɓe mini rai, don kaina nake ba da shi. Ina da ikon ba da shi, ina da ikon ɗauko shi kuma. Na karɓo wannan umarni ne daga wurin Ubana.”" 
John10:19 Saboda maganan nan fa, sai rabuwa ta sāke shiga tsakanin Yahudawa." 
John10:20 Da yawa daga cikinsu suka ce, “Ai, mai iska ne, haukansa kawai yake yi. Don me za ku saurare shi?”" 
John10:21 Waɗansu kuwa suka ce, “A'a, wannan magana, ai, ba ta mai iska ba ce. Ashe, iska tana iya buɗe wa makaho ido?”" 
John10:22 Lokacin idin tsarkakewa ne kuwa a Urushalima," 
John10:23 damuna ce kuma, Yesu kuwa na zagawa a Shirayin Sulemanu cikin Haikali," 
John10:24 sai Yahudawa suka kewaye shi, suka ce masa, “Har yaushe za ka bar mu da shakka? In dai kai ne Almasihun, ka gaya mana a fili.”" 
John10:25 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ai, na faɗa muku, ba ku gaskata ba. Ayyukan da nake yi da sunan Ubana, suke shaidata." 
John10:26 Amma ku ba ku gaskata ba, domin ba kwa cikin tumakina." 
John10:27 Tumakin nan nawa sukan saurari muryata, na san su, suna kuma bi na." 
John10:28 Ina ba su rai madawwami, ba kuwa za su halaka ba har abada, ba kuma mai ƙwace su daga hannuna." 
John10:29 Ubana, wanda ya ba ni su, ya fi duka girma, ba kuwa mai iya ƙwace su daga ikon Uban." 
John10:30 Ni da Uba ɗaya muke.” 
John10:31 Sai Yahudawa suka sāke ɗebo duwatsu su jajjefe shi. 
John10:32 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Na nuna muku ayyuka nagari masu yawa daga wurin Uba, a kan wanne a cikinsu za ku jajjefe ni?”" 
John10:33 Yahudawa suka amsa suka ce, “Ba don wani aiki nagari za mu jajjefe ka ba, sai don sāɓo, don kai, ga ka mutum, amma kana mai da kanka Allah.”" 
John10:34 Yesu ya amsa musu ya ce, “Ba a rubuce yake a Shari'arku ba cewa, ‘Na ce ku alloli ne’?" 
John10:35 To, in waɗanda Maganar Allah ta zo musu ya ce da su alloli (Nassi kuwa ba ya tashi)," 
John10:36 kwa ce da wanda Uba ya keɓe, ya kuma aiko duniya, ‘Sāɓo kake,’ domin na ce, ‘Ni Ɗan Allah ne’?" 
John10:37 In ba ayyukan da Ubana yake yi nake yi ba, to, kada ku gaskata ni." 
John10:38 Amma in su nake yi, ko ba ku gaskata ni ba, to, ku gaskata ayyukan, don ku sani, ku kuma gane, Uba na cikina, ni kuma ina cikin Uba.”" 
John10:39 Sai suka sāke ƙoƙarin kama shi, amma ya fita daga hannunsu." 
John10:40 Sa'an nan ya sāke komawa hayin Kogin Urdun, wurin da Yahaya ya fara yin baftisma, ya zauna a can," 
John10:41 mutane kuwa da yawa suka zo wurinsa, sai suka riƙa cewa, “Hakika, Yahaya bai yi wata mu'ujiza ba, amma duk abin da ya faɗa game da mutumin nan gaskiya ne.”" 
John10:42 Nan fa mutane da yawa suka gaskata da shi. 
John11:1 Wani mutum ne ya yi rashin lafiya, sunansa Li'azaru na Betanya, ƙauyen su Maryamu da 'yar'uwarta Marta." 
John11:2 Maryamun nan kuwa, wadda ɗan'uwanta Li'azaru ba shi da lafiya, ita ce wadda ta shafa wa Ubangiji man ƙanshi, ta kuma shafe ƙafafunsa da gashinta." 
John11:3 To, 'yan'uwan nan mata suka aika masa, suka ce, “Ya Ubangiji, ga shi, wanda kake ƙaunan nan ba shi da lafiya.”" 
John11:4 Da Yesu ya ji haka ya ce, “Wannan rashin lafiya, ƙarshensa ba mutuwa ba ne, domin a ɗaukaka Allah ne, a kuma ɗaukaka Ɗan Allah ta wurinsa.”" 
John11:5 Yesu kuwa na ƙaunar Marta da 'yar'uwarta, da kuma Li'azaru." 
John11:6 To, da ya ji Li'azaru ba shi da lafiya, sai ya ƙara kwana biyu." 
John11:7 Bayan haka ya ce wa almajiran, “Mu koma ƙasar Yahudiya.”" 
John11:8 Almajiran suka ce masa, “Ya Shugaba, kwana kwanan nan fa Yahudawa suke neman jifanka, za ka sāke komawa can?”" 
John11:9 Yesu ya amsa ya ce, “Ba sa'a goma sha biyu ce yini ɗaya ba? Kowa yake tafiya da rana ba ya tuntuɓe, don yana ganin hasken duniyan nan." 
John11:10 Amma kowa yake tafiya da dare yakan yi tuntuɓe, don ba haske a gare shi!”" 
John11:11 Ya faɗi haka, sa'an nan ya ƙara ce musu, “Amininmu Li'azaru ya yi barci, amma za ni in tashe shi.”" 
John11:12 Sai almajiran suka ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, in dai barci ne ya ɗauke shi, ai, zai warke.”" 
John11:13 Alhali kuwa, Yesu zancen mutuwar Li'azaru yake, amma su sun ɗauka yana nufin barcin hutawa ne." 
John11:14 Sai Yesu ya gaya musu a fili, ya ce, “Li'azaru dai ya mutu." 
John11:15 Ina kuwa farin ciki da ba na nan, saboda ku domin ku ba da gaskiya. Amma mu dai je wurinsa.”" 
John11:16 Sai Toma, wanda ake kira Ɗan Tagwai, ya ce wa 'yan'uwansa almajirai, “Mu ma mu tafi, mu mutu tare da shi.”" 
John11:17 Da Yesu ya isa, ya tarar Li'azaru, har ya kwana huɗu a kabari." 
John11:18 Betanya kuwa kusa da Urushalima take, misalin mil biyu." 
John11:19 Yahudawa da yawa sun zo su yi wa Marta da Maryamu ta'aziyyar ɗan'uwansu. 
John11:20 Da jin Yesu na zuwa, sai Marta ta je taryensa, Maryamu kuwa ta zauna a gida." 
John11:21 Sai Marta ta ce wa Yesu, “Ya Ubangiji, da kana nan da ɗan'uwana bai mutu ba." 
John11:22 Ko yanzu ma na sani kome ka roƙi Allah zai yi maka.” 
John11:23 Yesu ya ce mata, “Ɗan'uwanki zai tashi.”" 
John11:24 Marta ta ce masa, “Na sani zai tashi a tashin matattu a ranar ƙarshe.”" 
John11:25 Yesu ya ce mata, “Ai, ni ne tashin matattu, ni ne kuma rai. Wanda ya gaskata da ni, ko ya mutu zai rayu." 
John11:26 Wanda kuwa yake raye, yake kuma gaskatawa da ni, ba zai mutu ba har abada. Kin gaskata wannan?”" 
John11:27 Ta ce masa, “I, ya Ubangiji. Na gaskata kai ne Almasihu, Ɗan Allah, shi wannan mai zuwa duniya.”" 
John11:28 Da ta faɗi haka, ta je ta kirawo 'yar'uwa tata Maryamu, ta raɗa mata ta ce, “Ga Malam ya zo, yana kiranki.”" 
John11:29 Ita kuwa da jin haka, ta yi maza ta tashi ta nufi wurinsa." 
John11:30 Yesu dai bai iso ƙauyen ba tukuna, har yanzu yana wurin da Marta ta tarye shi." 
John11:31 Da Yahudawan da suke tare da ita a cikin gida, suna yi mata ta'aziyya, suka ga Maryamu ta yi maza ta tashi ta fita, suka bi ta, suna zaton za ta kabarin ne, ta yi kuka a can." 
John11:32 Da Maryamu ta iso inda Yesu yake, ta gan shi, sai ta faɗi a gabansa ta ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, da kana nan da dan'uwana bai mutu ba.”" 
John11:33 Da Yesu ya ga tana kuka, Yahudawan da suka zo tare da ita su ma, suna kuka, sai ya nisa a ransa, ya yi juyayi gaya." 
John11:34 Ya kuma ce, “Ina kuka sa shi?” Suka ce masa, “Ya Ubangiji, zo ka gani.”" 
John11:35 Sai Yesu ya yi hawaye. 
John11:36 Don haka Yahudawa suka ce, “Dubi yadda yake ƙaunarsa!”" 
John11:37 Amma waɗansunsu suka ce, “Ashe, wanda ya buɗe wa makahon nan ido, ba zai iya hana wannan mutum mutuwa ba?”" 
John11:38 Sai Yesu ya sāke nisawa a ransa, ya iso kabarin. Kabarin kuwa kogon dutse ne, da wani dutse kuma an rufe bakin."
