Acts8:15 Su kuwa da suka iso, suka yi musu addu'a don su sami Ruhu Mai Tsarki," 
Acts8:16 domin bai sauko wa ko wannensu ba tukuna, sai dai kawai an yi musu baftisma ne da sunan Ubangiji Yesu." 
Acts8:17 Sai suka ɗora musu hannu, suka kuwa sami Ruhu Mai Tsarki." 
Acts8:18 To, da Saminu ya ga, ashe, ta ɗora hannun manzanni ne ake ba da Ruhun, sai ya miƙa musu kuɗi," 
Acts8:19 ya ce, “Ni ma ku ba ni wannan iko, don kowa na ɗora wa hannu, yă sami Ruhu Mai Tsarki.”" 
Acts8:20 Amma Bitrus ya ce masa, “Ku hallaka, kai da kuɗinka, don ka zaci da kuɗi ne za ka sami baiwar Allah!" 
Acts8:21 Ba ruwanka da wannan al'amari sam, don zuciyarka ba ɗaya take ba a gaban Allah." 
Acts8:22 Saboda haka sai ka tuba da wannan mugun aiki naka, ka roƙi Ubangiji ko a gafarta maka abin da ka riya a zuciyarka." 
Acts8:23 Domin na ga kai tushen ɗaci ne, kana kulle a cikin mugunta.”" 
Acts8:24 Sai saminu ya amsa ya ce, “Ku roƙar mini Ubangiji kada ko ɗaya daga cikin abin da kuka faɗa ya aukar mini.”" 
Acts8:25 To, bayan manzannin sun tabbatar da Maganar Ubangiji, sun faɗe ta, suka koma Urushalima, suna yin bishara a ƙauyukan Samariyawa da yawa." 
Acts8:26 Sai wani mala'ikan Ubangiji ya ce wa Filibus, “Tashi, ka yi kudu, ka bi hanyar da ta fito daga Urushalima zuwa Gaza,” wato hanyar hamada." 
Acts8:27 Sai ya tashi ya tafi. Ga wani mutumin Habasha, wani bābā, mai babban matsayi a mulkin Kandakatu, sarauniyar Habasha, shi ne kuwa ma'ajinta, ya zo Urushalima ne yin sujada," 
Acts8:28 yana komawa gida a zaune a cikin keken dokinsa, yana karatun littafin Annabi Ishaya." 
Acts8:29 Sai Ruhu ya ce wa Filibus, “Matsa ka yi kusa da keken dokin nan.”" 
Acts8:30 Sai Filibus ya yi gudu zuwa wurinsa, ya ji shi yana karatun littafin Annabi Ishaya. Ya ce, “Kana kuwa fahimtar abin da kake karantawa?”" 
Acts8:31 Sai ya ce, “Ina fa? Sai ko wani ya fassara mini.” Sai ya roƙi Filibus ya hau su zauna tare." 
Acts8:32 Wannan kuwa shi ne nassin da yake karantawa, “An ja shi kamar tunkiya zuwa mayanka. Kamar yadda ɗan rago yake shiru a hannun mai sausayarsa, Haka, ko bakinsa bai buɗe ba." 
Acts8:33 An yi masa ƙasƙanci har an hana masa gaskiya tasa. Wa yake iya ba da labarin zamaninsa? Domin an katse ransa daga duniya.” 
Acts8:34 Sai bābān ya ce wa Filibus, “Shin kam, annabin nan, maganar wa yake yi? Tasa ko ta wani?”" 
Acts8:35 Sai Filibus ya buɗe baki ya fara da wannan Nassi, yana yi masa bisharar Yesu." 
Acts8:36 Suna cikin tafiya, suka iso wani ruwa, sai bābān ya ce, “Ka ga ruwa! Me zai hana a yi mini baftisma?”" 
Acts8:37 Filibus ya ce, “In dai ka ba da gaskiya da zuciya ɗaya, ai, sai a yi maka.” Bābān ya amsa ya ce, “Na gaskata Yesu Almasihu ɗan Allah ne.”" 
Acts8:38 Sai ya yi umarni a tsai da keken dokin. Sai dukansu biyu suka gangara cikin ruwan, Filibus da bābān, ya yi masa baftisma." 
Acts8:39 Da suka fito daga ruwan, Ruhun Ubangiji ya fauce Filibus, bābān kuma bai ƙara ganinsa ba. Sai ya yi ta tafiya tasa yana farin ciki." 
Acts8:40 Amma aka ga Filibus a Azotus. Sai ya zaga dukan garuruwa, yana yin bishara, har ya isa Kaisariya." 
Acts9:1 Shawulu kuwa yana kan tsananta kashedi da gāba da masu bin Ubangiji, cewa zai kashe su, sai ya je wurin babban firist," 
Acts9:2 ya roƙe shi ya yi masa wasiƙu zuwa majami'un Dimashƙu, don in ya sami masu bin wannan hanya, mata ko maza, yă zo da su birnin Urushalima a ɗaure." 
Acts9:3 Yana tafiya ke nan, ya yi kusa da Dimashƙu, ba zato sai ga wani haske daga sama ya haskaka kewaye da shi." 
Acts9:4 Sai ya fāɗi, ya kuma ji wata murya tana ce masa, “Shawulu, Shawulu, don me kake tsananta mini?”" 
Acts9:5 Shi kuma ya ce, “Wane ne kai, ya Ubangiji?” Sai ya ce, “Ni ne Yesu wanda kake tsananta wa." 
Acts9:6 Amma ka tashi ka shiga gari, can za a faɗa maka abin da za ka yi.”" 
Acts9:7 Abokan tafiyarsa kuwa suka rasa bakin magana, suna jin muryar, amma ba su ga kowa ba." 
Acts9:8 Sai Shawulu ya tashi, amma da ya buɗe ido ya kasa gani. Sai aka yi masa jagora, aka kai shi Dimashƙu." 
Acts9:9 Kwanansa uku ba ya gani, ba ya kuma ci, ba ya sha." 
Acts9:10 To, akwai wani mai bi a Dimashƙu, mai suna Hananiya. Ubangiji ya yi masa magana cikin wahayi ya ce, “Hananiya.” Shi kuwa ya ce, “Na'am, ya Ubangiji.”" 
Acts9:11 Sai Ubangiji ya ce masa, “Tashi ka tafi titin nan da ake kira Miƙaƙƙiye, ka tambaya a gidan Yahuza, ko akwai wani mutumin Tarsus, mai suna Shawulu, ga shi nan, yana addu'a," 
Acts9:12 har ma a cikin wahayi ya ga wani mutum, mai suna Hananiya, ya shigo ya ɗora masa hannu, don ya sāke samun ganin gari.”" 
Acts9:13 Amma Hananiya ya amsa ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, na sha jin labarin mutumin nan gun mutane da yawa, kan yawan muguntar da ya yi wa tsarkakanka a Urushalima." 
Acts9:14 Ga shi kuma manyan firistoci sun ba shi izini ya ɗaure duk mai yin addu'a da sunan har a nan ma.” 
Acts9:15 Amma Ubangiji ya ce masa, “Kai dai, je ka, domin shi ma'aikacina ne zaɓaɓɓe, domin yă sanar da sunana ga al'ummai, da sarakuna, da kuma Isra'ilawa." 
Acts9:16 Domin zan sanar da shi yawan wuyar da lalle zai sha saboda sunana.” 
Acts9:17 Sai Hananiya ya tafi, ya shiga gidan. Da ya ɗora masa hannu, ya ce, “Ya ɗan'uwana Shawulu, Ubangiji ne ya aiko ni, wato Yesu, wanda ya bayyana a gare ka a kan hanyar da ka biyo, domin ka sāke gani, a kuma cika ka da Ruhu Mai Tsarki.”" 
Acts9:18 Nan take sai wani abu kamar ɓawo ya faɗo daga idanunsa, sai ya sāke gani. Sa'an nan ya tashi, aka yi masa baftisma." 
Acts9:19 Sai ya ci abinci, ƙarfinsa kuma ya komo. Shawulu kuwa ya yi 'yan kwanaki tare da masu bi da suke Dimashƙu." 
Acts9:20 Nan da nan ya fara wa'azin Yesu a majami'unsu, cewa shi ne Ɗan Allah." 
Acts9:21 Duk waɗanda suka ji shi, suka yi ta al'ajabi, suka ce, “Ashe, ba wannan ne ya watsa masu yin addu'a da sunan nan a Urushalima ba? Ya zo nan ne ma da niyyar ya kai su gaban manyan firistoci a ɗaure.”" 
Acts9:22 Sai Shawulu ya ƙara ƙarfafa, yana ta dama hankalin Yahudawan da suke zaune a Dimashƙu, yana tabbatarwa, cewa Yesu shi ne Almasihu." 
Acts9:23 Bayan an ɗan daɗe Yahudawa suka ƙulla shawara su kashe shi. 
Acts9:24 Amma Shawulu ya sami labarin makircinsu. Dare da rana suna fako a ƙofofin gari don su kashe shi," 
Acts9:25 amma da daddare almajiransa suka tafi da shi, suka zura shi ta wata taga a jikin garu cikin babban kwando." 
Acts9:26 Da ya zo Urushalima ya yi ƙoƙarin shiga cikin masu bi, amma duk suka ji tsoronsa, don ba su gaskata shi mai bi ba ne." 
Acts9:27 Amma Barnaba ya kama hannunsa ya kai shi wurin manzannin, ya gaya musu yadda Shawulu ya ga Ubangiji a hanya, da yadda Ubangiji ya yi masa magana, da kuma yadda ya yi wa'azi gabagaɗi da sunan Yesu a Dimashƙu." 
Acts9:28 Daga nan ya yi ta cuɗanya da su a Urushalima," 
Acts9:29 yana wa'azi gabagaɗi da sunan Ubangiji. Ya kuma riƙa magana da Yahudawa masu jin Helenanci, yana muhawwara da su, amma suka yi ta neman kashe shi." 
Acts9:30 Da 'yan'uwa suka fahimci haka, suka kawo shi Kaisariya, suka aika da shi Tarsus." 
Acts9:31 Sa'an nan ne Ikkilisiyar duk ƙasar Yahudiya, da ta Galili, da ta Samariya ta sami lafiya, ta ingantu sosai, suna tafiyar da al'amuransu da tsoron Ubangiji, Ruhu Mai Tsarki na taimakonsu, har suka yawaita." 
Acts9:32 To, da Bitrus ya zazzaga lardi duka, sai kuma ya je wurin tsarkakan nan da suke zaune a Lidda." 
Acts9:33 Nan ya tarar da wani mutum, mai suna Iniyasu, wanda yake kwance a kan gado shekara takwas, yana shanyayye." 
Acts9:34 Sai Bitrus ya ce masa, “Iniyasu, Yesu Almasihu ya warkar da kai. Tashi ka kintsa gadonka.” A nan tāke ya tashi." 
Acts9:35 Duk mutanen Lidda da na ƙasar Sarona kuwa suka gan shi, suka juyo ga Ubangiji." 
Acts9:36 A Yafa kuwa akwai wata mai bi, mai suna Tabita, wato Dokas ke nan. Matar nan kuwa lazimar aiki nagari ce, da kuma gudunmawa." 
Acts9:37 A lokacin nan ta yi rashin lafiya, ta mutu. Da suka yi mata wanka, suka shimfiɗe ta a kan bene." 
Acts9:38 Da yake Lidda kusa da yafa take, da masu bi suka ji Bitrus na can, suka aiki mutum biyu wurinsa, su roƙe shi ya zo wurinsu ba da jinkiri ba." 
Acts9:39 Sai Bitrus ya tashi ya tafi tare da su. Da ya iso suka kai shi benen. Dukan mata waɗanda mazansu suka mutu suka tsaya kusa da shi, suna kuka, suna nunnuna riguna da tufafi da Dokas ta yi musu tun suna tare." 
Acts9:40 Amma Bitrus ya fitar da su duka waje, ya durƙusa, ya yi addu'a. Ya juya wajen gawar, ya ce, “Tabita, tashi.” Ta buɗe ido, da ta ga Bitrus, ta tashi zaune." 
Acts9:41 Ya kuwa miƙa mata hannu ya tashe ta. Sai ya kira tsarkaka da matan waɗanda mazansu suka mutu ya miƙa musu ita rayayyiya. 
Acts9:42 Labari ya bazu a dukan Yafa, mutane da yawa kuwa suka gaskata da Ubangiji." 
Acts9:43 To, ya zauna kwanaki da yawa a Yafa a gidan wani majemi mai suna Saminu." 
Acts10:1 An yi wani mutum a Kaisariya, mai suna Karniliyas, wani jarumi ne na ƙungiyar soja da ake kira Ƙungiyar Italiya." 
Acts10:2 Shi kuwa mutum ne mai ibada, yana tsoron Allah shi da iyalinsa duka, yana yana ba jama'a sadaka hanu sake, yana kuma addu'a ga Allah a kai a kai." 
Acts10:3 Wata rana wajen ƙarfe uku na yamma, ya ga wani mala'ikan Allah a fili cikin wahayi, ya shigo, ya ce masa, “Ya Karniliyas.”" 
Acts10:4 Shi kuwa ya zura masa ido a tsorace, ya ce, “Ya Ubangiji, mene ne?” Mala'ikan kuma ya ce masa, “Addu'arka da sadakarka sun kai har a gaban Allah, abubuwan tunawa ne kuma a gare shi." 
Acts10:5 To, yanzu, sai ka aiki mutane Yafa su kirawo Saminu, wanda ake kira Bitrus," 
Acts10:6 ya sauka a gun Saminu majemi, wanda gidansa yake a bakin bahar.”" 
Acts10:7 Da mala'ikan da ya yi masa magana ya tafi, ya kira barorinsa biyu, da kuma wani soja mai ibada daga cikin waɗanda suke yi masa hidima kullum." 
Acts10:8 Da ya ba su labarin kome, ya aike su Yafa." 
Acts10:9 Kashegari suna cikin tafiya, sun zo kusa da gari ke nan, sai Bitrus ya hau kan soro yin addu'a, wajen rana tsaka." 
Acts10:10 Yunwa ta kama shi, har ya so ya ci wani abu. Ana cikin shirya abincin, sai wahayi ya zo masa," 
Acts10:11 ya ga sama ta dare, wani abu kuma yana saukowa kamar babban mayafi, ana zuro shi ƙasa ta kusurwoyinsa huɗu." 
Acts10:12 Cikinsa akwai kowace irin dabba, da masu jan ciki, da tsuntsaye." 
Acts10:13 Sai ya ji wata murya ta ce masa, “Bitrus, tashi, ka yanka ka ci.”" 
Acts10:14 Amma Bitrus ya ce, “A'a, ya Ubangiji, don ban taɓa cin wani abu marar tsarki ko mai ƙazanta ba.”" 
Acts10:15 Sai ya sāke jin murya, ji na biyu, ta ce, “Abin da Allah ya tsarkake, kada ka ce da shi marar tsarki.”" 
Acts10:16 Da an yi wannan sau uku, nan da nan aka yi sama da abin." 
Acts10:17 Bitrus na a cikin damuwa ƙwarai a kan ko mece ce ma'anar wahayin da aka yi masa, sai ga mutanen da Karniliyas ya aiko tsaye a ƙofar zaure, sun riga sun tambayi gidan Saminu," 
Acts10:18 suna sallama, suna tambaya ko Saminu da ake kira Bitrus a nan ya sauka." 
Acts10:19 Tun Bitrus yana bibiya wahayin nan, Ruhu ya ce masa, “Ga mutum uku nan suna nemanka." 
Acts10:20 Tashi, ka sauka, ku tafi tare, ba da wata shakka ba, domin ni ne na aiko su.”" 
Acts10:21 Sai Bitrus ya sauka wurin mutanen, ya ce musu, “Ga ni, ni ne kuke nema. Wace magana yake tafe da ku?”" 
Acts10:22 Sai suka ce, “Wani jarumi ne, wai shi Karniliyas, mutumin kirki, mai tsoron Allah, wanda duk jama'ar Yahudawa suke yabo, shi ne wani tsattsarkan mala'ika ya umarce shi, ya aiko ka je gidansa, ya ji maganarka.”" 
Acts10:23 Sai Bitrus ya shigo da su, ya sauke su. Kashegari ya tashi suka tafi tare, waɗansu 'yan'uwa kuma daga Yafa suka raka shi." 
Acts10:24 Kashegari kuma suka shiga Kaisariya. Dā ma Karniliyas na tsammaninsu, har ya gayyato 'yan'uwansa da aminansa." 
Acts10:25 Bitrus na shiga gidan ke nan sai Karniliyas ya tarye shi, ya fāɗi a gabansa, ya yi masa sujada." 
Acts10:26 Amma Bitrus ya tashe shi, ya ce, “Tashi, ai, ni ma ɗan adam ne.”" 
Acts10:27 Bitrus na zance da shi, ya shiga ya tarar mutane da yawa sun taru." 
Acts10:28 Ya ce musu, “Ku da kanku kun sani, bai halatta Bayahude ya cuɗanya, ko ya ziyarci wani na wata kabila dabam ba. Amma Allah ya nuna mini kada in ce da kowa marar tsarki, ko mai ƙazanta." 
Acts10:29 Saboda haka da aka neme ni, na zo, ban ce a'a ba. To, yanzu ina so in ji abin da ya sa kuka kira ni.”" 
Acts10:30 Sai Karniliyas ya ce, “Yau kwana uku ke nan, wajen war haka, ina addu'ar ƙarfe uku na yamma a gidana, sai ga wani mutum tsaye a gabana, yana saye da tufafi masu ɗaukar ido," 
Acts10:31 ya ce, ‘Ya Karniliyas, an amsa addu'arka sadakarka kuma ta zama abar tunawa ga Allah." 
Acts10:32 Saboda haka sai ka aika Yafa a kirawo Saminu, wanda ake kira Bitrus, yă sauka a gidan Saminu majemi a bakin bahar.’" 
Acts10:33 Nan da nan kuwa na aika maka, ka kuma kyauta da ka zo. To, yanzu ga mu duk mun hallara a gaban Allah, domin mu ji duk irin abin da Ubangiji ya umarce ka.”" 
Acts10:34 Sai Bitrus ya kāda baki ya ce, “Hakika na gane lalle Allah ba ya tara," 
Acts10:35 amma a kowace al'umma duk mai tsoronsa, mai kuma aikata adalci, abin karɓuwa ne a gare shi." 
Acts10:36 Allah ya aiko wa Isra'ilawa maganarsa, ana yi musu bisharar salama ta wurin Yesu Almasihu, shi ne kuwa Ubangijin kowa." 
Acts10:37 Kun dai san labarin nan da ya bazu a duk ƙasar Yahudiya, an fara tun daga ƙasar Galili, bayan baftismar da Yahaya ya yi wa'azi," 
Acts10:38 wato labarin Yesu Banazare, yadda Allah ya shafe shi da Ruhu Mai Tsarki da kuma iko, da yadda ya riƙa zagawa na aikin alheri, yana warkar da duk waɗanda Iblis ya matsa wa, domin Allah yana tare da shi." 
Acts10:39 Mu kuwa shaidu ne ga duk abin da ya yi a ƙasar Yahudawa da Urushalima. Shi ne kuma suka kashe ta wurin kafa shi a jikin gungume. 
Acts10:40 Shi ne Allah ya tasa a rana ta uku, ya kuma yarda ya bayyana," 
Acts10:41 ba ga dukan jama'a ba, sai dai ga shaidun nan da Allah ya zaɓa tun dā, wato mu ke nan, da muka ci muka sha tare da shi, bayan ya tashi daga matattu." 
Acts10:42 Ya kuma umarce mu mu yi wa mutane wa'azi, mu kuma tabbatar cewa shi ne wanda Allah ya sa mai hukunta rayayyu da matattu." 
Acts10:43 Shi ne duk annabawa suka yi wa shaida, cewa albarkacin sunansa duk mai gaskatawa da shi zai sami gafarar zunubai.”" 
Acts10:44 Bitrus na a cikin wannan magana, sai Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya sauko wa dukan masu jinta." 
Acts10:45 Sai Yahudawa masu bi, ɗaukacin waɗanda suka zo tare da Bitrus, suka yi mamakin ganin har al'ummai ma an zubo musu baiwar Ruhu Mai Tsarki." 
Acts10:46 Domin sun ji suna magana da waɗansu harsuna, suna ta ɗaukaka Allah. Sa'an nan Bitrus ya ce," 
Acts10:47 “Akwai mai iya hana ruwan da za a yi wa mutanen nan baftisma, waɗanda suka sami Ruhu Mai Tsarki, kamar yadda mu ma muka samu?”" 
Acts10:48 Sai ya yi umarni a yi musu baftisma da sunan Yesu Almasihu. Sa'an nan suka roƙe shi ya ƙara 'yan kwanaki a gunsu. 
Acts11:1 To, manzanni da 'yan'uwan da suke a ƙasar Yahudiya suka ji, cewa al'ummai ma sun yi na'am da Maganar Allah." 
Acts11:2 Da Bitrus ya zo Urushalima, 'yan ɗariƙar masu kaciyar nan suka yi masa sūka," 
Acts11:3 suka ce, “Ga shi, ka shiga wurin marasa kaciya, har ka ci abinci tare da su!”" 
Acts11:4 Sai Bitrus ya fara, yana yi musu bayani bi da bi cewa," 
Acts11:5 “Ni dai, ina birnin Yafa ina addu'a, sai wahayi ya zo mini, na ga wani abu na saukowa kamar babban mayafi, an zuro shi daga sama ta kusurwoyinsa huɗu, har ya zo wurina." 
Acts11:6 Da na zuba masa ido, na duba na ga dabbobi, da namomin jeji, da masu jan ciki, da kuma tsuntsaye a ciki." 
Acts11:7 Sai kuma na ji wata murya ta ce mini, ‘Bitrus, ka tashi, ka yanka, ka ci.’" 
Acts11:8 Amma na ce, ‘A'a, ya Ubangiji, don ba wani abu marar tsarki ko mai ƙazanta da ya taɓa shiga bakina.’" 
Acts11:9 Sai muryar ta amsa daga Sama ta yi magana ta biyu, ta ce, ‘Abin da Allah ya tsarkake, kada ka ce da shi marar tsarki.’" 
Acts11:10 An yi wannan sau uku, sa'an nan aka janye abin sama." 
Acts11:11 Ba zato sai ga mutum uku tsaye a ƙofar gidan da muke, an aiko su wurina ne daga Kaisariya." 
Acts11:12 Sai Ruhu ya ce mini in tafi tare da su, ba tare da wata shakka ba. 'Yan'uwan nan shidda kuma suka rako ni, har muka shiga gidan mutumin nan." 
Acts11:13 Sai ya gaya mana yadda ya ga mala'ika tsaye a gidansa, yana cewa, ‘Ka aika Yafa a kirawo Saminu, wanda ake kira Bitrus," 
Acts11:14 shi zai faɗa maka maganar da za ka sami ceto game da ita, kai da jama'ar gidanka duka.’" 
Acts11:15 Da fara maganata, Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya sauko musu, daidai yadda ya sauko mana tun da farko." 
Acts11:16 Sai na tuna da Maganar Ubangiji, yadda ya ce, ‘Yahaya kam, da ruwa ya yi baftisma, amma ku da Ruhu Mai Tsarki za a yi muku baftisma.’" 
Acts11:17 Tun da yake Allah ya yi musu baiwa daidai da wadda ya yi mana, sa'ad da muka gaskata da Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu, wane ni in dage wa Allah!”" 
Acts11:18 Da suka ji haka, suka rasa ta cewa, suka kuma ɗaukaka Allah suka ce, “Ashe, har al'ummai ma Allah ya ba su tuba zuwa rai.”" 
Acts11:19 To, waɗanda suka warwatsu saboda tsananin nan da ya tashi kan sha'anin Istifanas, sun yi tafiya har ƙasar Finikiya, da tsibirin Kubrus, da birnin Antakiya, ba su yin wa'azin Maganar Allah ga kowa sai ga Yahudawa kaɗai." 
Acts11:20 Amma akwai waɗansunsu, mutanen Kubrus da na Kurane a cikinsu waɗanda da isowarsu Antakiya suka yi wa al'ummai magana, suna yi musu bisharar Ubangiji Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Ikon Ubangiji kuwa na tare da su, har mutane da yawa da suka ba da gaskiya suka juyo ga Ubangiji." 
Acts11:22 Sai labarin nan ya kai kunnen Ikkilisiyar da take Urushalima, Ikkilisiyar kuma ta aiki Barnaba can Antakiya." 
Acts11:23 Da ya iso ya kuma ga alherin da Allah ya yi musu, ya yi farin ciki, ya gargaɗe su duka su tsaya ga Ubangiji da dukan zuciyarsu," 
Acts11:24 domin shi mutum ne nagari cike da Ruhu Mai Tsarki da bangaskiya. Sai mutane masu yawan gaske suka ƙaru ga Ubangiji. 
Acts11:25 Sai Barnaba ya tafi Tarsus neman Shawulu," 
Acts11:26 bayan ya same shi kuwa, sai ya kawo shi Antakiya. Shekara sur suna taruwa da Ikkilisiya, suna koya wa mutane masu yawan gaske. A Antakiya ne aka fara kiran masu bi da suna Kirista." 
Acts11:27 To, a kwanakin nan waɗansu annabawa suka zo Antakiya daga Urushalima." 
Acts11:28 Sai ɗaya daga cikinsu, mai suna Agabas, ya miƙe tsaye, ya yi faɗi da ikon Ruhu, cewa za a yi wata babbar yunwa, a duniya duka, an yi ta kuwa a zamanin Kalaudiyas." 
Acts11:29 Sai masu bi suka ɗaura niyya, kowa gwargwadon ƙarfinsa, su aika wa yan'uwan da suke ƙasar Yahudiya gudunmawa." 
Acts11:30 Haka kuwa suka yi, suka aika wa dattawan Ikkilisiya ta hannun Barnaba da Shawulu." 
Acts12:1 A lokacin nan kuwa sarki Hirudus ya fara gwada wa waɗansu 'yan Ikkilisiya tasku," 
Acts12:2 har ma ya sare Yakubu ɗan'uwan Yahaya da takobi. 
Acts12:3 Da ya ga abin ya ƙayatar da Yahudawa, har wa yau kuma ya kama Bitrus, shi ma. Kwanakin idin abinci marar yisti ne kuwa." 
Acts12:4 Da ya kama shi, ya sa shi a kurkuku, ya danƙa shi a hannun soja hurhuɗu kashi huɗu, su yi tsaronsa, da niyyar kawo shi a gaban jama'a bayan idin." 
Acts12:5 Sai aka tsare Bitrus a kurkuku, Ikkilisiya kuwa ta himmantu ga roƙon Allah saboda shi." 
Acts12:6 A daren da in gari ya waye Hirudus yake da niyyar fito da shi a yi masa hukunci, Bitrus kuwa na barci a tsakanin soja biyu, ɗaure da sarƙa biyu, masu tsaro kuma suna bakin ƙofa suna tsaron kurkukun," 
Acts12:7 sai ga mala'ikan Ubangiji tsaye kusa da shi, wani haske kuma ya haskaka ɗakin, sa'an nan mala'ikan ya bugi Bitrus a kwiɓi, ya tashe shi, ya ce, “Maza, ka tashi.” Sai kuwa sarƙar ta zube daga hannunsa." 
Acts12:8 Mala'ikan ya ce masa, “Yi ɗamara, ka sa takalminka.” Sai ya yi. Sai ya ce masa, “Yafa mayafinka, ka biyo ni.”" 
Acts12:9 Sai ya fito ya bi shi, bai san abin da mala'ikan nan ya yi hakika ne ba, cewa yake wahayi ake yi masa." 
Acts12:10 Da suka wuce masu tsaron farko da na biyu, suka isa ƙyauren ƙarfe na ƙofar shiga gari, ƙyauren kuwa ya buɗe musu don kansa. Sai suka fita. Sun ƙure wani titi ke nan, nan da nan sai mala'ikan ya bar shi." 
Acts12:11 Da Bitrus ya koma cikin hankalinsa, ya ce, “Yanzu kam na tabbata, Ubangiji ne ya aiko mala'ikansa, ya cece ni daga hannun Hirudus, da kuma dukan mugun fatan Yahudawa.”" 
Acts12:12 Da ya gane haka, ya je gidan Maryamu, uwar Yahaya wanda ake kira Markus, inda aka taru da yawa, ana addu'a." 
Acts12:12 Da ya gane haka, ya je gidan Maryamu, uwar Yahaya wanda ake kira Markus, inda aka taru da yawa, ana addu'a." 
Acts12:13 Da ya ƙwanƙwasa ƙofar zauren, wata baranya mai suna Roda ta zo ji ko wane ne." 
Acts12:14 Da ta shaida muryar Bitrus, ba ta buɗe ƙofar ba don murna, sai ta koma ciki a guje, ta ce Bitrus na tsaye a ƙofar zaure." 
Acts12:15 Sai suka ce mata, “Ke dai akwai ruɗaɗɗiya.” Ita kuwa ta nace a kan shi ne. Su kuwa suka ce, “To, mala'ikansa ne!”" 
Acts12:16 Bitrus dai ya yi ƙwanƙwasawa, da suka buɗe suka gan shi, suka yi ta al'ajabi." 
Acts12:17 Shi kuwa ya ɗaga musu hannu su yi shiru, ya kuma bayyana musu yadda Ubangiji ya fito da shi daga kurkuku. Ya kuma ce, “Ku faɗa wa Yakubu da 'yan'uwa waɗannan abubuwa.” Sa'an nan ya tashi ya tafi wani wuri." 
Acts12:18 Da gari ya waye kuwa ba ƙaramar rigima ce ta tashi tsakanin sojan nan ba, kan abin da ya sami Bitrus." 
Acts12:19 Da Hirudus ya neme shi bai same shi ba, ya yi ta tuhumar masu tsaron, ya kuma yi umarni a kashe su. Sa'an nan ya tashi daga ƙasar Yahudiya ya tafi Kaisariya, ya yi 'yan kwanaki a can." 
Acts12:20 To, Hirudus ya yi fushi ƙwarai da mutanen Taya da na Sidon. Suka zo wurinsa da nufi ɗaya. Bayan sun rinjayi Bilastasa, sarkin fāda, suka nemi zaman lafiya, domin ga ƙasar sarkin nan suka dogara saboda abincinsu." 
Acts12:21 Ana nan a wata rana da aka shirya, Hirudus ya yi shigar sarauta, ya zauna a gadon sarauta, ya yi musu jawabi." 
Acts12:22 Taron mutane kuwa suka ɗauki sowa, suna cewa, “Kai! ka ji muryar wani Allah, ba ta mutum ba!”" 
Acts12:23 Nan take sai mala'ikan Ubangiji ya buge shi don bai ɗaukaka Allah ba. Sai tsutsotsi suka yi ta cinsa har ya mutu. 
Acts12:24 Maganar Allah kuwa sai ƙara haɓaka take yi, tana yaɗuwa." 
Acts12:25 Sai Barnaba da Shawulu suka komo daga Urushalima, bayan sun cika aiken da aka yi musu, suka kuma zo da Yahaya wanda ake kira Markus." 
Acts12:25 Sai Barnaba da Shawulu suka komo daga Urushalima, bayan sun cika aiken da aka yi musu, suka kuma zo da Yahaya wanda ake kira Markus." 
Acts13:1 To, a Ikkilisiyar da take Antakiya akwai waɗansu annabawa, da masu koyarwa, wato Barnaba, da Saminu wanda ake kira Baƙi, da Lukiyas Bakurane, da Manayan wanda aka goya tare da sarki Hirudus, da kuma Shawulu." 
Acts13:2 Sa'ad da suke yi wa Ubangiji ibada, suna kuma yin azumi, Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya ce, “Sai ku keɓe mini Barnaba da Shawulu domin aikin da na kira su a kai.”" 
Acts13:3 Bayan kuma sun yi azumi, sun kuma yi addu'a, sai suka ɗora musu hannu, suka sallame su." 
Acts13:4 Su kuwa, da Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya aike su, suka tafi Salukiya, daga can kuma suka shiga jirgin ruwa sai tsibirin Kubrus." 
Acts13:5 Da suka kai Salamis, suka sanar da Maganar Allah a majami'un Yahudawa, ga kuma Yahaya na taimakonsu." 
Acts13:6 Bayan sun zazzaga tsibirin duka har Bafusa, suka iske wani mai sihiri, annabin ƙarya, Bayahude, mai suna Bar-yashu'a," 
Acts13:7 Wanda yake tare da muƙaddas Sarjiyas Bulus, mutum mai basira. Sai muƙaddashin ya kira Barnaba da Shawulu ya nemi jin Maganar Allah." 
Acts13:8 Amma Alimas mai sihirin nan, (don wannan ita ce ma'anar sunansa), ya mūsa musu, yana neman bauɗar da muƙaddashin nan daga bangaskiya." 
Acts13:9 Shawulu kuwa, wanda kuma ake kira Bulus, cike da Ruhu Mai Tsarki, ya zuba masa ido," 
Acts13:10 ya ce, “Kai babban maha'inci, munafiƙi, ɗan Iblis, magabcin adalci duka, ba za ka daina karkata miƙaƙƙun hanyoyin Ubangiji ba?" 
Acts13:11 To, ga shi, hannun Ubangiji na kanka, za ka makance, ba za ka ga rana ba har wani lokaci.” A nan take kuwa sai wani hazo da duhu suka rufe shi, ya yi ta neman wanda zai yi masa jagora." 
Acts13:12 Da muƙaddashin ya ga abin da ya faru, sai ya ba da gaskiya, yana mamaki da koyarwar Ubangiji." 
Acts13:13 Sai Bulus da abokan tafiyarsa suka tashi daga Bafusa a jirgin ruwa, suka isa Bariyata ta ƙasar Bamfiliya. Yahaya kuwa ya bar su, ya koma Urushalima." 
Acts13:14 Amma suka wuce gaba daga Bariyata, suka tafi Antakiya ta ƙasar Bisidiya. Ran Asabar kuma sai suka shiga majami'a suka zauna." 
Acts13:15 Bayan an yi karatun Attaura da littattafan annabawa, shugabannin majami'ar suka aika musu, suka ce, “'Yan'uwa, in kuna da wata maganar gargaɗi da za ku yi wa jama'a, ai, sai ku yi.”" 
Acts13:16 Sai Bulus ya miƙe, ya ɗaga hannu a yi shiru, ya ce, “Ya ku 'yan'uwa Isra'ilawa, da sauran masu tsoron Allah, ku saurara!" 
Acts13:17 Allahn jama'ar nan Isra'ila ya zaɓi kakanninmu, ya ɗaukaka jama'ar sa'ad da suke baƙunci a ƙasar Masar, da maɗaukakin iko kuma ya fito da su daga cikinta." 
Acts13:18 Wajen shekara arba'in yake haƙuri da su cikin jeji. 
Acts13:19 Ya kuma hallaka al'umma bakwai a ƙasar Kan'ana, sai ya raba musu ƙasar tasu gādo, suka zauna har shekara arbaminya da hamsin." 
Acts13:20 Bayan haka kuma ya naɗa musu mahukunta har ya zuwa zamanin Annabi Sama'ila. 
Acts13:21 Sa'an nan suka roƙa a naɗa musu sarki, sai Allah ya ba su Saul ɗan Kish, mutumin kabilar Biliyaminu, har shekara arba'in." 
Acts13:22 Bayan da ya kawar da shi sai ya gabatar da Dawuda ya zama sarkinsu, ya kuma shaide shi da cewa, ‘Na sami Dawuda ɗan Yesse, mutum ne da nake ƙauna ƙwarai, wanda kuma zai aikata dukan nufina.’" 
Acts13:23 Daga zuriyar mutumin nan ne Allah ya kawo wa Isra'ila Mai Ceto, Yesu kamar yadda ya yi alkawari." 
Acts13:24 Kafin ya bayyana a fili kuwa, Yahaya ya yi wa duk jama'ar Isra'ila wa'azi su tuba a kuma yi musu baftisma." 
Acts13:25 Yayin da Yahaya ya kusa gama nasa zamani, sai ya ce, ‘Wa kuke tsammani nake? Ba fa ni ne shi ɗin nan ba. Amma ga shi akwai wani mai zuwa a bayana, wanda ko takalmansa ma ban isa in balle ba.’" 
Acts13:26 “Ya ku 'yan'uwa, zuriyar Ibrahim, da kuma sauran masu tsoron Allah a cikinku, mu fa aka aiko wa kalmar ceton nan." 
Acts13:27 Ga shi, mazaunan Urushalima da shugabanninsu ba su gane shi ba, sa'an nan kuma ba su fahimci maganar annabawa da ake karantawa kowace Asabar ba, har suka cika maganar nan ta annabawa, yayin da suka hukunta shi." 
Acts13:28 Ko da yake ba su same shi da wani laifin kisa ba, duk da haka suka roƙi Bilatus a kashe shi." 
Acts13:29 Da suka cikasa dukkan abin da aka rubuta game da shi, suka sauko da shi daga kan gungumen, suka sa shi a kabari." 
Acts13:30 Amma Allah ya tashe shi daga matattu. 
Acts13:31 Kwanaki da yawa kuwa yana bayyana ga waɗanda suka zo tare da shi Urushalima daga Galili, waɗanda a yanzu su ne shaidunsa ga jama'a." 
Acts13:32 Mu ma mun kawo muku albishir, cewa, alkawarin nan da Allah ya yi wa kakanninmu," 
Acts13:33 ya cika mana shi, mu zuriyarsu, da ya ta da Yesu daga matattu, yadda yake a rubuce a cikin Zabura ta biyu cewa, ‘Kai Ɗana ne, Ni Ubanka ne yau.’" 
Acts13:34 Game da ta da shi daga matattu da Allah ya yi, a kan cewa ba zai sāke komawa cikin halin ruɓa ba kuwa, ga abin da ya ce, ‘Zan yi muku tsattsarkar albarkar nan da na tabbatar wa Dawuda.’" 
Acts13:35 Domin a wata Zabura ma ya ce, ‘Ba za ka yarda Mai Tsarkinka ya ruɓa ba.’" 
Acts13:36 Dawuda kam, bayan da ya bauta wa mutanen zamaninsa bisa ga nufin Allah, ya yi barci, aka binne shi tare da kakanninsa, ya kuwa ruɓe." 
Acts13:37 Amma shi wannan da Allah ya tashe shi, bai ruɓa ba." 
Acts13:38 Saboda haka, 'yan'uwa, sai ku sani albarkacin mutumin nan ne ake sanar da ku gafarar zunubanku." 
Acts13:39 Ta gare shi kuma, duk masu ba da gaskiya suka kuɓuta daga dukan abubuwan da ba dama Shari'ar Musa ta kuɓutar da ku." 
Acts13:40 Saboda haka sai ku mai da hankali, kada abin nan da littattafan annabawa suke faɗa ya aukar muku, wato" 
Acts13:41 ‘Ga shi, ku masu rainako, Za ku ruɗe don mamaki, ku shuɗe! Domin zan yi wani aiki a zamaninku, Aikin da ba yadda za a yi ku gaskata, Ko da wani ya gaya muku.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Suna fita majami'a ke nan, sai mutane suka roƙe su su ƙara yi musu wannan magana a ran Asabar mai zuwa." 
Acts13:43 Da jama'a suka watse, Yahudawa da yawa, da kuma waɗanda suka shiga Yahudanci, masu ibada, suka bi Bulus da Barnaba. Su kuma suka yi musu magana, suna yi musu gargaɗi su zauna a cikin alherin Allah." 
Acts13:44 Da Asabar ta kewayo, kusan duk birnin, suka hallara su ji Maganar Allah." 
Acts13:45 Amma da Yahudawa suka ga taro masu yawa, suka yi kishi gaya, suka yi ta musun abubuwan da Bulus ya faɗa, suna zaginsa." 
Acts13:46 Sai Bulus da Barnaba suka yi magana gabagaɗi, suka ce, “Ku, ya wajaba a fara yi wa Maganar Allah, amma da yake kun ture ta, kun nuna ba ku cancanci samun rai madawwami ba, to, za mu juya ga al'ummai." 
Acts13:47 Domin haka ubangiji ya umarce mu, ya ce, ‘Na sa ka haske ga al'ummai, Don ka zama sanadin ceto, har ya zuwa iyakar duniya.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Da al'ummai suka ji haka, suka yi farin ciki, suka ɗaukaka Maganar Ubangiji, ɗaukacin kuma waɗanda aka ƙaddara wa samun rai madawwami suka ba da gaskiya." 
Acts13:49 Maganar Ubangiji kuwa, sai ta yi ta yaɗuwa a duk ƙasar." 
Acts13:50 Amma Yahudawa suka zuga waɗansu mata masu ibada, masu daraja, da kuma waɗansu manyan gari, suka haddasa tsanani ga Bulus da Barnaba, suka kore su daga ƙasarsu." 
Acts13:51 Su kuwa suka karkaɗe ƙurar ƙafafunsu don shaida a kansu, suka tafi Ikoniya." 
Acts13:52 Amma kuwa masu bi suna farin ciki matuƙa, suna kuma a cike da Ruhu Mai Tsarki." 
Acts14:1 To, a Ikoniya suka shiga majami'ar Yahudawa tare, suka yi wa'azi, har mutane masu yawa, Yahudawa da al'ummai, suka ba da gaskiya." 
Acts14:2 Amma Yahudawa da suka ƙi bi, suka zuga al'ummai, suka ɓata tsakaninsu da 'yan'uwa." 
Acts14:3 Sai Bulus da Barnaba suka daɗe a nan ƙwarai, suna wa'azi gabagaɗi bisa ga ikon Ubangiji, shi da ya shaida maganar alherinsa ta yarjin mu'ujizai da abubuwan al'ajabi ta hannunsu." 
Acts14:4 Amma mutanen birni suka rarrabu, waɗansu suka koma bayan Yahudawa, waɗansu kuma bayan manzannin." 
Acts14:5 Sa'ad da al'ummai da Yahudawa tare da shugabanninsu suka tasar wa manzannin, su wulakanta su, su jejjefe su da duwatsu," 
Acts14:6 suka sami labari, suka gudu zuwa biranen Likoniya wato Listira da Darba, da kuma kewayensu." 
Acts14:7 Nan suka yi ta yin bisharar. 
Acts14:8 To, a Listira akwai wani mutum a zaune, wanda ƙafafunsa ba su da ƙarfi, gurgu ne tun da aka haife shi, bai ma taɓa tafiya ba." 
Acts14:9 Yana sauraron wa'azin Bulus, sai Bulus ya zuba masa ido, da ya ga bangaskiyarsa ta isa a warkar da shi," 
Acts14:10 ya ɗaga murya ya ce, “Tashi, ka tsaya cir.” Sai wuf ya zabura, har ya yi tafiya." 
Acts14:11 Da taron suka ga abin da Bulus ya yi, suka ɗaga murya gaba ɗaya suna cewa da Likoniyanci, “Lalle, alloli sun sauko mana da siffar mutane!”" 
Acts14:12 Sai suka ce Barnaba shi ne Zafsa, Bulus kuwa don shi ne shugaban magana, wai shi ne Hamisa." 
Acts14:13 Sai sarkin tsafin Zafsa, wanda ɗakin gunkinsa yake ƙofar gari, ya kawo bajimai da tutocin furanni ƙofar gari, yana son yin hadaya tare da jama'a." 
Acts14:14 Amma da manzannin nan, Barnaba da Bulus, suka ji haka, suka kyakketa tufafinsu, suka ruga cikin taron, suna ɗaga murya suna cewa," 
Acts14:15 “Don me kuke haka? Ai, mu ma 'yan adam ne kamarku, mun dai kawo muku bishara ne, domin ku juya wa abubuwan banzan nan baya, ku juyo ga Allah Rayayye, wanda ya halicci sama, da ƙasa, teku, da kuma dukkan abin da yake a cikinsu." 
Acts14:16 Shi ne a zamanin dā, ya bar dukan al'ummai su yi yadda suka ga dama." 
Acts14:17 Duk da haka kuwa bai taɓa barin kansa, ba shaida ba, domin yana yin alheri, shi da yake yi muku ruwan sama, da damuna mai albarka, yana ƙosar da ku da abinci, yana kuma faranta muku rai.”" 
Acts14:18 Duk da waɗannan maganganu da ƙyar suka hana jama'ar nan yin hadaya saboda su. 
Acts14:19 Amma waɗansu Yahudawa suka zo daga Antakiya da Ikoniya, da suka rarrashi taron, suka jejjefe Bulus suka ja shi bayan gari, suna zato ya mutu." 
Acts14:20 Amma da masu bi suka taru a kansa, sai ya tashi ya koma garin. Kashegari kuma ya tafi Darba tare da Barnaba." 
Acts14:21 Bayan sun yi bishara a wannan gari, sun kuma sami masu bi da yawa, suka koma Listira da Ikoniya, da kuma Antakiya," 
Acts14:22 suna ƙarfafa masu bi, suna yi musu gargaɗi su tsaya ga bangaskiya, suna cewa, sai da shan wuya mai yawa za mu shiga Mulkin Allah." 
Acts14:23 Bayan kuma sun zaɓar musu dattawa a kowace Ikkilisiya, game da addu'a da azumi, suka danƙa su ga Ubangiji, wanda dā ma suka gaskata da shi." 
Acts14:24 Da suka zazzaga ƙasar Bisidiya, suka isa ƙasar Bamfiliya." 
Acts14:25 Da kuma suka faɗi Maganar a Bariyata, suka tafi Ataliya." 
Acts14:26 Daga nan kuma suka shiga jirgin ruwa sai Antakiya, inda tun dā aka yi musu addu'a alherin Allah ya kiyaye su cikin aikin nan da yanzu suka gama." 
Acts14:27 Da suka iso, suka tara jama'ar Ikkilisiya suka ba da labarin dukan abin da Allah ya aikata ta wurinsu, da kuma yadda ya buɗe wa al'ummai ƙofar bangaskiya." 
Acts14:28 Sun kuwa jima a can tare da masu bi. 
Acts15:1 Sai kuma waɗansu mutane suka zo daga Yahudiya suna koya wa 'yan'uwa, suna cewa, “In ba an yi muku kaciya kamar yadda al'adar Musa take ba, ba dama ku sami ceto.”" 
Acts15:2 A kan wannan magana kuwa ba ƙaramar gardama da muhawwara Bulus da Barnaba suka sha yi da mutanen ba. Sai aka sa Bulus da Barnaba da kuma waɗansunsu, su je Urushalima gun manzanni da dattawan Ikkilisiya a kan wannan magana." 
Acts15:3 To, da Ikkilisiya ta raka su, suka zazzaga ƙasar Finikiya da ta Samariya, suna ba da labarin tubar al'ummai, sun kuwa ƙayatar da dukan 'yan'uwa ƙwarai." 
Acts15:4 Da suka isa Urushalima, Ikkilisiya, da manzanni, da dattawan Ikkilisiya suka yi musu maraba, su kuma suka gaggaya musu dukan abin da Allah ya yi ta wurinsu." 
Acts15:5 Amma waɗansu masu ba da gaskiya, 'yan ɗariƙar Farisiyawa, suka miƙe, suka ce, “Wajibi ne a yi musu kaciya, a kuma umarce su, su bi Shari'ar Musa.”" 
Acts15:6 Sai manzannin da dattawan Ikkilisiya suka taru su duba maganar. 
Acts15:7 Bayan an yi ta muhawwara da gaske, Bitrus ya miƙe, ya ce musu, “Ya 'yan'uwa, kun sani tun farkon al'amari, Allah ya yi zaɓe a cikinku, cewa dai ta bakina ne al'ummai za su ji maganar bishara, su ba da gaskiya." 
Acts15:8 Allah kuwa, masanin zuciyar kowa, ya yi musu shaida da ya ba su Ruhu Mai Tsarki, kamar yadda ya ba mu." 
Acts15:9 Bai kuma nuna wani bambanci tsakaninmu da su ba, tun da yake ya tsarkake zukatansu saboda bangaskiyarsu." 
Acts15:10 Saboda haka, don me kuke gwada Allah, ta ɗora wa almajiran nan kayan da mu, duk da kakanninmu, muka kasa ɗauka?" 
Acts15:11 Amma mun gaskata, cewa, albarkacin alherin Ubangiji Yesu ne muka sami ceto, kamar yadda su ma suka samu.”" 
Acts15:12 Sai duk taron mutane suka yi tsit, suka saurari Barnaba da Bulus, sa'ad da suke ba da labarin mu'ujizai da abubuwan al'ajabi, da Allah ya yi ga al'ummai ta wurinsu." 
Acts15:13 Bayan sun gama jawabi, Yakubu ya amsa ya ce, “Ya ku 'yan'uwa, ku saurare ni." 
Acts15:14 Bitrus ya ba da labari yadda Allah ya fara kula da al'ummai, domin ya keɓe wata jama'a daga cikinsu ta zama tasa." 
Acts15:15 Wannan kuwa daidai yake da maganar annabawa, yadda yake a rubuce cewa," 
Acts15:16 ‘Bayan haka kuma zan komo, In sāke gina gidan Dawuda da ya rushe, In sāke ta da kangonsa, In tsai da shi," 
Acts15:17 Domin sauran mutane su nemi Ubangiji, Wato al'umman da suke nawa.’" 
Acts15:18 Haka Ubangiji ya ce, shi da ya bayyana waɗannan abubuwa tun zamanin dā." 
Acts15:19 Saboda haka, a ganina, kada mu matsa wa al'ummai waɗanda suke juyowa ga Allah," 
Acts15:20 sai dai mu rubuta musu wasiƙa, su guji abubuwan ƙazanta na game da gumaka, da fasikanci, da cin abin da aka maƙure, da kuma cin nama tare da jini." 
Acts15:21 Domin tun zamanin dā, a kowane gari akwai masu yin wa'azi da littattafan Musa, ana kuma karanta su a majami'u kowace Asabar.”" 
Acts15:22 Sai manzanni da dattawan Ikkilisiya, tare da dukan 'yan Ikkilisiya, suka ga ya kyautu su zaɓi waɗansu daga cikinsu, su aike su Antakiya tare da Bulus da Barnaba. Sai suka aiki Yahuza, wanda ake kira Barsaba, da kuma Sila, shugabanni ne cikin 'yan'uwa," 
Acts15:23 da wannan takarda cewa, “Daga 'yan'uwanku, manzanni da dattawan Ikkilisiya, zuwa ga 'yan'uwanmu na al'ummai a Antakiya da ƙasar Suriya da ta Kilikiya. Gaisuwa mai yawa." 
Acts15:24 Tun da muka sami labari, cewa waɗansu daga cikinmu sun ta da hankalinku da maganganu, suna ruɗa ku, ko da yake ba mu umarce su da haka ba," 
Acts15:25 sai muka ga ya kyautu, da yake bakinmu ya zo ɗaya, mu aiko muku waɗansu zaɓaɓɓun mutane, tare da ƙaunatattunmu Barnaba da Bulus," 
Acts15:26 waɗanda suka sayar da ransu saboda sunan Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu. 
Acts15:27 Don haka, ga shi, mun aiko muku Yahuza da Sila, su ma za su gaya muku waɗannan abubuwa da bakinsu." 
Acts15:28 Domin Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya ga ya kyautu, mu ma mun gani, kada a ɗora muku wani nauyi fiye da na waɗannan abubuwa da suke wajibi, wato" 
Acts15:29 ku guji abin da aka yanka wa gunki, da cin nama tare da jini, da cin abin da aka maƙure, da kuma fasikanci. In kun tsare kanku daga waɗannan, za ku zauna lafiya. Wassalam.”" 
Acts15:30 Su kuma da aka sallame su, suka tafi Antakiya, da suka tara jama'ar, suka ba da wasiƙar." 
Acts15:31 Da suka karanta ta, suka yi farin ciki saboda gargaɗin." 
Acts15:32 Yahuza da Sila kuma, da yake su annabawa ne, suka gargaɗi 'yan'uwa da maganganu masu yawa, suka kuma ƙarfafa su." 
Acts15:33 Bayan sun yi 'yan kwanaki a wurin, sai 'yan'uwa su sallame su lafiya, suka koma wurin waɗanda suka aiko su." 
Acts15:34 [Amma Sila ya ga ya kyautu shi ya zauna a nan.] 
Acts15:35 Bulus da Barnaba kuwa suka dakata a Antakiya, suna koyarwa suna kuma yin bisharar Maganar Ubangiji, tare da waɗansu ma da yawa." 
Acts15:36 An jima, Bulus ya ce wa Barnaba, “Bari yanzu mu koma mu dubo 'yan'uwa a kowane gari da muka sanar da Maganar Ubangiji, mu ga yadda suke.”" 
Acts15:37 Barnaba kuwa ya so su tafi da Yahaya, wanda ake kira Markus." 
Acts15:37 Barnaba kuwa ya so su tafi da Yahaya, wanda ake kira Markus." 
Acts15:38 Amma Bulus bai ga ya kyautu su tafi da wanda ya rabu da su a ƙasar Bamfiliya, ya ƙi tafiya aiki tare da su ba." 
Acts15:39 Sai matsanancin saɓanin ra'ayi ya auku, har ya kai su ga rabuwa. Barnaba ya ɗauki Markus, suka shiga jirgin ruwa zuwa tsibirin Kubrus," 
Acts15:39 Sai matsanancin saɓanin ra'ayi ya auku, har ya kai su ga rabuwa. Barnaba ya ɗauki Markus, suka shiga jirgin ruwa zuwa tsibirin Kubrus," 
Acts15:40 amma Bulus ya zaɓi Sila, bayan 'yan'uwa sun yi masa addu'a alherin Allah ya kiyaye shi, ya tafi." 
Acts15:41 Bulus ya zazzaga ƙasar Suriya da ta Kilikiya, yana ta ƙarfafa Ikilisiyoyi." 
Acts16:1 Sai kuma Bulus ya zo Darba da Listira. Akwai wani almajiri a Listira, mai suna Timoti, ɗan wata Bayahudiya mai bi, ubansa kuwa Bahelene ne." 
Acts16:2 Shi kuwa 'yan'uwan da suke Listira da Ikoniya na yabonsa. 
Acts16:3 Sai Bulus ya so Timoti ya rako shi, har ya yi masa kaciya saboda Yahudawan da suke waɗannan wurare, don duk sun san ubansa Bahelene ne." 
Acts16:4 Lokacin da suke tafiya suna bin gari gari, suka riƙa gaya wa jama'a ƙa'idodin da manzanni da dattawan Ikkilisiya suka ƙulla a Urushalima, don su kiyaye su." 
Acts16:5 Ta haka ikilisiyoyi suka ƙarfafa a cikin bangaskiya, a kowace rana suna ƙara yawa." 
Acts16:6 Sai suka zazzaga ƙasar Firijiya da ta Galatiya, saboda Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya hana su yin Maganar Ubangiji a ƙasar Asiya." 
Acts16:7 Da suka zo kan iyakar ƙasar Misiya, sai suka yi ƙoƙarin zuwa ƙasar Bitiniya, amma Ruhun Yesu bai yardar musu ba." 
Acts16:8 Suka kuwa ratsa ƙasar Misiya, suka gangara zuwa Taruwasa." 
Acts16:9 Wata rana da daddare aka yi wa Bulus wahayi, ya ga wani mutumin ƙasar Makidoniya na tsaye, yana roƙonsa yana cewa, “Ka ƙetaro Makidoniya, ka taimake mu mana.”" 
Acts16:10 Da kuwa ya ga wahayin, nan take sai muka nemi tafiya Makidoniya, muka tabbata cewa Allah ne ya kira mu mu yi musu bishara." 
Acts16:11 Shi ke nan fa, sai muka tashi a jirgin ruwa daga Taruwasa, muka miƙe sosai har zuwa tsibirin Samutaraki, kashegari kuma sai Niyabolis," 
Acts16:12 daga nan kuma sai Filibi ta ƙasar Makidoniya, wadda take babbar alkarya ce a wannan waje, birnin Romawa ne kuma. A nan birnin muka yi 'yan kwanaki." 
Acts16:13 Ran Asabar muka fita ƙofar gari, muka je bakin kogi, inda muke tsammani akwai wurin yin addu'a. Nan muka zauna, muka yi wa matan da suka taru magana." 
Acts16:14 Ɗaya daga cikin masu sauraronmu wata mace ce, mai suna Lidiya, mai sayar da jar hajja, mutuniyar Tayatira, mai ibada ce kuma. Ubangiji ya buɗe zuciyarta, har ta mai da hankali ga abin da Bulus ya faɗa." 
Acts16:15 Da aka yi mata baftisma tare da jama'ar gidanta, ta roƙe mu ta ce, “Da yake kun amince ni mai ba da gaskiya ga Ubangiji ce, to, sai ku zo gidana ku sauka.” Sai ta rinjaye mu." 
Acts16:16 Wata rana muna tafiya wurin yin addu'a, sai muka gamu da wata yarinya mai aljani mai duba, tana kuwa samo wa iyayengijinta amfani mai yawa ta wurin dubar." 
Acts16:17 Sai ta riƙa binmu, mu da Bulus, tana ihu tana cewa, “Mutanen nan fa bayin Allah Maɗaukaki ne, suna kuwa sanar da ku hanyar ceto!”" 
Acts16:18 Haka ta dinga yi kwana da kwanaki, har Bulus ya ji haushi ƙwarai, ya juya ya ce wa aljanin, “Na umarce ka da sunan Yesu Almasihu, ka rabu da ita.” Nan take kuwa ya rabu da ita." 
Acts16:19 Da iyayengijinta suka ga hanyar samunsu ta toshe, suka danƙe Bulus da Sila, suka ja su har zuwa bakin kasuwa gaban mahukunta." 
Acts16:20 Da suka kai su gaban alƙalai suka ce, “Mutanen nan suna birkita garinmu ƙwarai da gaske, Yahudawa ne kuwa." 
Acts16:21 Suna kuma koyar da al'adun da bai halatta mu karɓa ko mu bi ba, da yake mu Romawa ne.”" 
Acts16:22 Sai jama'a suka ɗungumo musu gaba ɗaya, alƙalan kuma suka yi kaca-kaca da tufafinsu, suka tuttuɓe su, suka yi umarni a bulale su da tsumagu." 
Acts16:23 Da aka bulale su da gaske, aka jefa su kurkuku, aka umarci yari ya tsare su da kyau." 
Acts16:24 Shi kuwa da ya karɓi wannan umarni, sai ya jefa su can ciki cikin kurkuku, ya sa su a turu." 
Acts16:25 A wajen tsakar dare Bulus da Sila suna addu'a suna waƙoƙin yabon Allah, 'yan sarka kuwa suna sauraronsu," 
Acts16:26 farat ɗaya, sai aka yi wata babbar rawar ƙasa, har harsashin ginin kurkuku ya raurawa. Nan da nan ƙofofin suka bubbuɗe, marin kowa kuma ya ɓalle." 
Acts16:27 Da yāri ya farka daga barci ya ga ƙofofin kurkuku a buɗe, ya zaro takobinsa, yana shirin kashe kansa, cewa yake 'yan sarƙa sun gudu." 
Acts16:28 Amma Bulus ya ɗaga murya da ƙarfi ya ce, “Kada ka cuci kanka, ai duk muna nan!”" 
Acts16:29 Sai yari ya ce a kawo fitilu, ya yi wuf ya ruga ciki, ya fāɗi gaban Bulus da Sila, yana rawar jiki don tsoro." 
Acts16:30 Sa'an nan ya fito da su waje, ya ce, “Ya shugabanni, me zan yi in sami ceto?”" 
Acts16:31 Su kuwa suka ce, “Ka gaskata da Ubangiji Yesu, za ka sami ceto, kai da iyalinka.”" 
Acts16:32 Sa'an nan suka gaya masa Maganar Ubangiji, shi da iyalinsa duka." 
Acts16:33 Nan take da daddaren nan ya ɗebe su, ya wanke musu raunukansu. Nan da nan kuwa aka yi masa baftisma da dukan iyalinsa." 
Acts16:34 Sa'an nan ya kawo su gidansa, ya kawo musu abinci, ya yi ta farin ciki matuƙa, domin shi da iyalinsa duka sun gaskata da Allah." 
Acts16:35 Amma da gari ya waye, sai alƙalan suka aiko dogarai, suka ce, “Suka ce a saki mutanen nan.”" 
Acts16:36 Yari kuwa ya shaida wa Bulus maganar, ya ce, “Alƙalai sun aiko a sake ku, saboda haka yanzu sai ku fito, ku tafi lafiya.”" 
Acts16:37 Amma Bulus ya ce musu, “Ai, a fili suka daddoke mu, ba ko bin ba'asi, mu ma da muke Romawa bisa ga 'yangaranci, suka jefa mu a kurkuku, yanzu kuma sā fitar da mu a ɓoye? Sai dai su zo da kansu su fito da mu.”" 
Acts16:38 Sai dogarai suka shaida wa alƙalan wannan magana. Su kuwa da suka ji Bulus da Sila Romawa ne suka tsorata. 
Acts16:39 Sa'an nan suka zo suka tubar musu, bayan kuma sun fito da su, suka roƙe su su bar garin." 
Acts16:40 To, da suka fita daga kurkukun, suka tafi wurin Lidiya. Bayan sun ga 'yan'uwa, suka kuma ƙarfafa musu zuciya, suka tashi." 
Acts17:1 To, da suka bi ta Amfibolis da Aboloniya, suka isa Tasalonika, inda wata majami'ar Yahudawa tāke." 
Acts17:2 Sai Bulus ya shiga wurinsu kamar yadda ya saba, Asabar uku a jere yana muhawwara da su daga cikin Littattafai," 
Acts17:3 yana yi musu bayani, yana kuma tabbatarwa, cewa lalle ne, Almasihu yă sha wuya, ya kuma tashi daga matattu. Ya kuma ce, “Yesun nan da nake sanar muku, shi ne Almasihu.”" 
Acts17:4 Sai waɗansunsu suka amince, suka koma wajen Bulus da Sila, haka kuma babban taron Helenawa masu ibada, da manyan mata ba kaɗan ba." 
Acts17:5 Amma Yahudawa, saboda kishi, suka ɗibi waɗansu ashararai, 'yan iska, suka tara jama'a suka hargitsa garin kaf, suka fāɗa wa gidan Yason, suna nemansu don su fito da su gaban taron jama'a." 
Acts17:6 Da ba su same su ba, suka jawo Yason da waɗansu 'yan'uwa, har gaban mahukuntan garin, suna ihu suna cewa, “Mutanen nan masu ta da duniya a tsaye, ga su sun zo nan ma," 
Acts17:7 har ma Yason ya sauke su! Dukansu kuwa suna saɓa dokokin Kaisar, suna cewa wani ne sarki, wai shi Yesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Da mutanen gari da mahukunta suka ji wannan, hankalinsu ya tashi." 
Acts17:9 Ba su sake su ba, sai da suka karɓi kuɗin lamuni a hannun Yason da sauransu." 
Acts17:10 Nan da nan kuwa da dare ya yi, 'yan'uwa suka sallami Bulus da Sila su tafi Biriya. Da suka isa can kuma suka shiga majami'ar Yahudawa." 
Acts17:11 To, waɗannan Yahudawa kam, sun fi na Tasalonika dattaku, domin sun karɓi Maganar hannu biyu biyu, suna ta nazarin Littattafai kowace rana, su ga ko abin haka yake." 
Acts17:12 Saboda haka da yawa daga cikinsu suka ba da gaskiya, har da waɗansu Helenawa ba kaɗan ba, mata masu daraja, da kuma maza." 
Acts17:13 Amma da Yahudawan Tasalonika suka ji labari Bulus yana sanar da Maganar Allah a Biriya ma, suka je suka zuga taro masu yawa a can ma, suna ta da hankalinsu." 
Acts17:14 Nan da nan kuwa 'yan'uwa suka tura Bulus bakin bahar, amma Sila da Timoti suka dakata a nan." 
Acts17:15 Waɗanda suka rako Bulus kuwa, sai da suka kai shi har Atina. Bayan Bulus ya yi musu saƙon umarni zuwa wurin Sila da Timoti, cewa su zo wurinsa da gaggawa, suka tafi." 
Acts17:16 To, sa'ad da Bulus yake dākonsu a Atina, ya ji haushi ƙwarai da ya ga ko'ina gumaka ne a birnin." 
Acts17:17 A kowace rana ya yi ta muhawwara a cikin majami'a da Yahudawa, da waɗansu masu ibada, da kuma waɗanda yake tararwa a bakin kasuwa." 
Acts17:18 Har wa yau kuma waɗansu Abikuriyawa da Sitokiyawa masu ilimi suka ci karo da shi. Waɗansu suka ce, “Me wannan mai surutu yake nufi?” Waɗansu kuwa suka ce “Ga alama, mai yin wa'azin bāƙin alloli ne”– domin kawai yana yin bisharar Yesu, da kuma tashi daga matattu." 
Acts17:19 Sai suka riƙe shi suka kai shi Tudun Arasa, suka ce, “Ko ka faɗa mana wace irin baƙuwar koyarwa ce wannan da kake yi?" 
Acts17:20 Domin ka kawo mana abin da yake baƙo a gare mu, muna kuwa so mu san ma'anarsa.”" 
Acts17:21 Alhali kuwa duk Atinawa da baƙinsu ba abin da suke yi, sai kashe zarafinsu wajen jin baƙon abu, ko kuma ɗorar da shi." 
Acts17:22 Sai Bulus ya miƙe a tsakiyar Tudun Arasa, ya ce, “Ya ku mutanen Atina, na dai lura, ku masoyan ibada ne ƙwarai, ta kowane fanni." 
Acts17:23 Don sa'ad da nake zagawa, na duba abubuwan da kuke yi wa ibada, har ma na tarar da wani bagadin hadaya da wannan rubutu a sama da shi cewa, ‘Saboda Allahn da ba a sani ba.’ To, shi wanda kuke yi wa sujada ba a tare da kun san shi ba, shi nake sanar muku." 
Acts17:24 Allahn da ya halicci duniya da dukkan abin da yake cikinta, shi da yake Ubangijin sama da ƙasa, ba ya zama a haikalin ginin mutum." 
Acts17:25 Haka kuma ba ya neman wani taimako gun mutum, sai ka ce wani abu yake bukata, tun da yake shi kansa ne yake ba dukkan mutane rai, da numfashi, da dukkan abubuwa." 
Acts17:26 Shi ne kuma ya halicci dukkan al'umma daga tsatso ɗaya, domin su zauna a dukan sararin duniya, ya kuma ƙayyade zamanansu da iyakokin ƙasashensu," 
Acts17:27 wato nufinsa shi ne su neme shi, ko watakila sā laluba su same shi, alhali kuwa ba ya nesa da kowane ɗayanmu." 
Acts17:28 Domin ‘Ta gare shi ne muke rayuwa, muke motsi, muka kuma kasance,’ kamar yadda waɗansu mawaƙanku ma suka ce, ‘Hakika, mu ma zuriya tasa ce.’" 
Acts17:29 To, da yake mu zuriyar Allah ne, ai, bai kamata mu tsammaci Allah na kama da wata surar zinariya, ko ta azurfa, ko ta dutse ba, wadda mutum ya ƙago ta dabararsa." 
Acts17:30 Dā kam, Allah ya kawar da kai ga zamanin jahilci, amma yanzu yana umartar dukkan mutane a ko'ina su tuba," 
Acts17:31 tun da yake ya tsai da ranar da zai yi wa duniya shari'a, shari'a adalci, ta wurin mutumin nan da ya sa, wannan kuwa ya tabbatar wa dukan mutane, da ya tashe shi daga matattu.”" 
Acts17:32 Da dai suka ji maganar tashin matattu, sai waɗansu suka yi ba'a, amma waɗansu suka ce, “Game da wannan magana kam, mā sāke jin abin da za ka faɗa.”" 
Acts17:33 Sai Bulus ya fita daga cikinsu. 
Acts17:34 Amma waɗansu mutane suka koma wajensa suka ba da gaskiya, a cikinsu har da Diyonisiyas, ɗan majalisar Tudun Arasa, da wata mace mai suna Damarisa, da waɗansu dai haka." 
Acts18:1 Bayan haka Bulus ya tashi daga Atina ya tafi Koranti. 
Acts18:2 Can ya tarar da wani Bayahude mai suna Akila, asalinsa kuwa mutumin Fantas ne, bai daɗe da zuwa daga ƙasar Italiya ba, tare da mata tasa Bilkisu, don wai Kalaudiyas ya umarci dukan Yahudawa su bar Roma. Sai Bulus ya je wurinsu." 
Acts18:3 Da yake kuma sana'arsu ɗaya ce, maɗinkan tanti ne, ya sauka a wurinsu, suka yi ta aiki tare." 
Acts18:4 Ya kuma yi ta yin muhawwara a majami'a a kowace Asabar, yana ta rinjayar Yahudawa da al'ummai." 
Acts18:5 Sa'ad da Sila da Timoti suka zo daga Makidoniya, Bulus ya dukufa a kan yin wa'azi, yana tabbatar wa Yahudawa, cewa Almasihu dai Yesu ne." 
Acts18:6 Da suka mūsa masa, suna ta zaginsa, ya karkaɗe tufafinsa ya ce musu, “Alhakinku yana a wuyanku! Ni kam na fita. Daga yau wurin al'ummai zan je.”" 
Acts18:7 Sai ya tashi daga nan ya je gidan wani mutum mai suna Titus Yustus mai ibada, gidansa kuwa gab da majami'a yake." 
Acts18:7 Sai ya tashi daga nan ya je gidan wani mutum mai suna Titus Yustus mai ibada, gidansa kuwa gab da majami'a yake." 
Acts18:8 Sai Kirisbus, shugaban majami'ar ya ba da gaskiya ga Ubangiji, shi da jama'ar gidansa duka. Korantiyawa kuma da yawa da suka ji maganar Bulus suka ba da gaskiya, aka kuwa yi musu baftisma." 
Acts18:9 Wata rana da daddare, Ubangiji ya yi wa Bulus wahayi, ya ce masa, “Kada ka ji tsoro, sai dai ka yi ta wa'azi, kada ka yi shiru," 
Acts18:10 domin ina tare da kai, ba kuma wanda zai fāɗa ka ya cuce ka, domin ina da mutane da yawa a wannan birni.”" 
Acts18:11 Sai Bulus ya zauna a nan har shekara ɗaya da wata shida, yana ta koyar da Maganar Allah a cikinsu." 
Acts18:12 Amma sa'ad da Galiyo yake muƙaddashin ƙasar Akaya, Yahudawa suka tasar wa Bulus da nufi ɗaya suka kawo shi a gaban shari'a," 
Acts18:13 suka ce, “Mutumin nan na rarrashin mutane, wai su bauta wa Allah ta hanyar da Shari'ar ta hana.”" 
Acts18:14 Bulus na shirin yin magana ke nan sai Galiyo ya ce wa Yahudawan, “Ku Yahudawa! Da ma wani laifi ya yi, ko munafunci, da sai in iya sauraronku." 
Acts18:15 Amma tun da yake gardama ce kawai a kan kalmomi, da sunaye, da kuma shari'arku, ai, sai ku ji da ita, ku da kanku. Ni kam, ba ni da niyyar yin shari'a irin waɗannan abubuwa.”" 
Acts18:16 Sai ya kore su daga ɗakin shari'a. 
Acts18:17 Sai duk suka kama Sastanisu, shugaban majami'a, suka yi masa dūka a gaban gadon shari'a. Amma Galiyo ko yă kula." 
Acts18:18 Bulus kuwa da ya ƙara kwanaki da yawa, bayan ya sausaye kansa a Kankiriya don ya cika wa'adin da ya ɗauka, ya yi bankwana da 'yan'uwa, ya shiga jirgin ruwa zuwa ƙasar Suriya, tare da Bilikisu da Akila." 
Acts18:19 Sai suka isa Afisa, a can ne kuma ya bar su, shi kuwa ya shiga majami'a ya yi muhawwara da Yahudawa." 
Acts18:20 Sai suka roƙe shi ya ƙara jimawa a wurinsu, amma bai yarda ba." 
Acts18:21 Sai dai ya yi bankwana da su, ya ce, “Zan dawo wurinku in Allah ya so.” Sa'an nan ya tashi daga Afisa a jirgin ruwa." 
Acts18:22 Da ya sauka a Kaisariya, sai ya je Urushalima, ya gaisa da Ikkilisiya, sa'an nan ya tafi Antakiya." 
Acts18:23 Bayan da ya ɗan jima a nan, ya tashi ya zazzaga ƙasar Galatiya da ta Firijiya, yana bin gari gari, yana ƙarfafa dukan masu bi." 
Acts18:24 To, wani Bayahude mai suna Afolos ya zo Afisa. Shi kuwa asalinsa mutumin Iskandariya ne, masani ne kuwa, ya san Littattafai ƙwarai da gaske." 
Acts18:25 An karantar da shi tafarkin Ubangiji, da yake kuma muhimmanci ne ƙwarai, yakan yi ta magana kan al'amuran Yesu, yana kuma koyar da su sosai, amma fa baftismar Yahaya kaɗai ya sani." 
Acts18:26 Sai ya fara wa'azi gabagaɗi a majami'a, amma da Bilkisu da Akila suka ji maganarsa, suka ja shi a jika, suka ƙara bayyana masa tafarkin Allah sosai da sosai." 
Acts18:27 Da ya so hayewa zuwa ƙasar Akaya, 'yan'uwa suka taimake shi, suka rubuta wa masu bi wasiƙa su karɓe shi hannu biyu biyu. Da kuwa ya isa, ya yi matuƙar taimako ga waɗanda suka ba da gaskiya ta wurin alherin Ubangiji," 
Acts18:28 don yā kayar da Yahudawa ƙwarai a gaban jama'a, yana tabbatar musu ta wurin Littattafai cewa Almasihu dai Yesu ne." 
Acts19:1 To, lokacin da Afolos yake Koranti, Bulus ya zazzaga ƙasar ta kan tudu, ya gangara zuwa Afisa. A can ya tarar da waɗansu masu bi," 
Acts19:2 sai ya ce musu, “Kun sami Ruhu Mai Tsarki sa'ad da kuka ba da gaskiya?” Suka ce masa, “Ba mu ma ji zuwan Ruhu Mai Tsarki ba.”" 
Acts19:3 Sai ya ce, “To, wace baftisma ke nan aka yi muku?” Suka ce, “Irin ta Yahaya ce.”" 
Acts19:4 Bulus ya ce, “Ai, Yahaya baftisma ya yi a tuba, yana faɗa wa mutane su gaskata da mai zuwa bayansa, wato Yesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Da suka ji haka, aka yi musu baftisma da sunan Ubangiji Yesu." 
Acts19:6 Da Bulus ya ɗora musu hannu, Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya sauko musu, suka kuwa yi magana da waɗansu harsuna, suna annabci." 
Acts19:7 Su wajen sha biyu ne duka duka. 
Acts19:8 Sai ya shiga majami'a yana wa'azi gabagaɗi, ya kuma yi wata uku yana muhawwara da su, yana kuma rinjayarsu a kan al'amarin Mulkin Allah." 
Acts19:9 Amma da waɗansu suka taurare, suka ƙi ba da gaskiya, suna kushen wannan hanya gaban jama'a, sai ya rabu da su, ya keɓe masu bi, yana ta muhawwara da su a kowace rana makarantar Tiranas." 
Acts19:10 Shekara biyu ana wannan, har dukan mazaunan ƙasar Asiya suka ji Maganar Ubangiji, Yahudawa da al'ummai duka." 
Acts19:11 Ta hannun Bulus kuma Allah ya yi waɗansu mu'ujizai da ba a saba gani ba," 
Acts19:12 har akan kai wa marasa lafiya adikansa, ko tufafinsa da yake sawa yana aiki, sun kuwa warke daga cuce-cucensu, baƙaƙen aljannu kuma sun rabu da su." 
Acts19:13 Sai waɗansu Yahudawa masu yawo gari gari, matsubbata, suka yi ƙoƙarin kama sunan Ubangiji Yesu ga masu baƙaƙen aljannu, suna cewa, “Mun umarce ku da sunan Yesun nan da Bulus yake wa'azi.”" 
Acts19:14 To, akwai 'ya'ya bakwai maza, na wani babban firist na Yahudawa, mai suna Siba, duk suna yin wannan abu." 
Acts19:15 Amma aljanin ya amsa musu ya ce, “Yesu dai na san shi, na kuma san Bulus, to, ku kuma ku wane ne?”" 
Acts19:16 Mutumin nan mai aljanin sai ya daka tsalle, ya fāɗa musu, ya fi ƙarfinsu dukkansu, ya ci ɗunguminsu, har suka fita daga gidan a guje, a tuɓe, suna masu rauni." 
Acts19:17 Wannan abu fa ya sanu ga dukan mazaunan Afisa, Yahudawa da al'ummai duka, duka kuma tsoro ya kama su, aka kuwa ɗaukaka sunan Ubangiji Yesu." 
Acts19:18 Da yawa kuma daga cikin waɗanda suka ba da gaskiya suka zo, suna bayyana ayyukansu a fili." 
Acts19:19 Mutane da yawa kuwa masu yin sihiri, suka tattaro littattafansu suka ƙone a gaban jama'a duka. Da suka yi wa littattafan nan kima, sai suka ga sun kai kuɗi azurfa dubu hamsin." 
Acts19:20 Sai kuma Maganar Ubangiji ta ƙara haɓaka, ta kuma fifita ƙwarai." 
Acts19:21 Bayan waɗannan al'amura Bulus ya ƙudura a ransa, cewa in ya zazzaga ƙasar Makidoniya da ta Akaya, za shi Urushalima, ya kuma ce, “Bayan na je can, lalle ne kuma in je in ga birnin Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Da ya aiki mataimakansa biyu Makidoniya, wato Timoti da Arastas, shi kuwa ya ɗan dakata a ƙasar Asiya." 
Acts19:23 A lokacin nan kuwa ba ƙaramin hargitsi aka yi game da wannan hanya ba. 
Acts19:24 Domin akwai wani maƙerin farfaru, mai suna Dimitiriyas, mai ƙera surorin haikalin Artimas da azurfa, ba kuwa ƙaramar riba yake jawo wa masu yin wannan sana'a ba." 
Acts19:25 Sai ya tara su da duk ma'aikatan irin wannan sana'a, ya ce, “Ya ku jama'a, kun sani fa da sana'ar nan muke arziki." 
Acts19:26 Kuna kuwa ji, kuna gani, ba a nan Afisa kawai ba, kusan ma a duk ƙasar Asiya, Bulus ɗin nan ya rinjayi mutane masu yawan gaske, ya juyar da su, yana cewa, allolin da mutum ya ƙera ba alloli ba ne." 
Acts19:27 Ga shi kuma, akwai hatsari, ba wai cinikinmu kawai ne zai zama wulakantacce ba, har ma haikalin nan na uwargijiya Artimas mai girma zai zama ba a bakin kome ba, har kuma a raba ta da darajarta, ita da duk ƙasar Asiya, kai, har duniya ma duka suke bauta wa.”" 
Acts19:28 Da suka ji haka suka hasala ƙwarai, suka kuma ɗaga murya gaba ɗaya suna cewa, “Girma yā tabbata ga Artimas ta Afisawa!”" 
Acts19:29 Sai garin duk ya ruɗe, jama'a suka ruga zuwa dandali da nufi ɗaya, suna jan Gayus da Aristarkus, mutanen Makidoniya, abokan tafiyar Bulus." 
Acts19:30 Bulus ya so shiga taron nan, amma masu bi suka hana shi." 
Acts19:31 Waɗansu zaɓaɓɓun mutanen ƙasar Asiya, waɗanda suke abokansa, su ma suka aika masa, suka roƙe shi kada ya kuskura ya shiga dandalin nan." 
Acts19:32 Taron kuwa, waɗansu suka ta da murya su ce kaza, waɗansu su ce kaza, don duk taron a ruɗe yake, yawancinsu ma ba su san dalilin da ya sa suka taru ba." 
Acts19:33 Da Yahudawa suka gabatar da Iskandari, waɗansu suka ɗauka a kan shi ne sanadin abin. Iskandari kuwa ya ɗaga hannu a yi shiru, don ya kawo musu hanzari," 
Acts19:34 amma da suka fahimci, cewa shi Bayahude ne, suka ɗaga murya gaba ɗaya har wajen sa'a biyu, suna cewa, “Girma yā tabbata ga Artimas ta Afisawa!”" 
Acts19:35 To, da magatakardan garin ya kwantar da hankalin jama'a, ya ce, “Ku mutanen Afisa! Wane mutum ne bai san cewa musamman birnin Afisawa ne suke kula da haikalin mai girma Artimas ba, da kuma dutsen nan da ya faɗo daga sama?" 
Acts19:36 To, da yake ba dama a yi musun waɗannan abubuwa, ai, ya kamata ku natsu, kada ku yi kome da garaje." 
Acts19:37 Ga shi, kun kawo mutanen nan, su kuwa ba su yi sata a ɗakin uwargijiya ba, ba su kuma saɓi uwargijiyarmu ba." 
Acts19:38 To, in Dimitiriyas da abokan sana'arsa suna da wata magana a game da wani, ai, ga ɗakin shari'a a buɗe, ga kuma mahukunta, sai su kai ƙara." 
Acts19:39 Amma in wani abu kuke nema dabam, to, ai, sai a daidaita a majalisa ke nan." 
Acts19:40 Hakika muna cikin hatsarin amsa ƙara a kan tawaye saboda al'amarin nan na yau, tun da yake ba za mu iya ba da wani hanzari game da taron hargitsin nan ba.”" 
Acts19:41 Da ya faɗi haka ya sallami taron. 
Acts20:1 Bayan hargowar nan ta kwanta, Bulus ya kira masu bi, bayan ya ƙarfafa musu zuciya, ya yi bankwana da su, ya tafi ƙasar Makidoniya." 
Acts20:2 Da ya zazzaga lardin nan, ya kuma ƙarfafa masu zuciya ƙwarai, ya zo ƙasar Hellas," 
Acts20:3 ya yi wata uku a nan. Da Yahudawa suka ƙulla masa makirci, a sa'ad da zai tashi a jirgin ruwa zuwa ƙasar Suriya, ya yi niyyar komawa ta ƙasar Makidoniya." 
Acts20:4 Subataras Babiriye, ɗan Burus, shi ya raka shi, tare da Aristarkus da Sakundas, mutanen Tasalonika, da Gayus Badarbe, da Timoti, har ma da Tikikus da Tarofimas, mutanen Asiya," 
Acts20:5 waɗanda suka riga tafiya suka jira mu a Taruwasa. 
Acts20:6 Mu kuwa muka tashi daga Filibi a jirgin ruwa, bayan idin abinci marar yisti, muka iske su a Taruwasa bayan kwana biyar. Nan muka zauna har kwana bakwai." 
Acts20:7 A ranar farko ta mako kuma, da muka taru don gutsuttsura gurasa, Bulus ya yi masu jawabi, don ya yi niyyar tashi kashegari, sai ya yi ta jan jawabin nasa har tsakar dare." 
Acts20:8 Akwai kuwa fitilu da yawa a benen da muka taru. 
Acts20:9 Da wani saurayi a zaune a kan taga, mai suna Aftikos, sai barci ya ci ƙarfinsa sa'ad da Bulus yake ta tsawaita jawabi, da barci mai nauyi ya kwashe shi, sai ya faɗo daga can hawa na uku, aka ɗauke shi matacce." 
Acts20:10 Amma Bulus ya sauka ƙasa, ya miƙe a kansa, ya rungume shi, ya ce, “Kada ku damu, ai, yana da rai.”" 
Acts20:11 Da Bulus ya koma sama, ya gutsuttsura gurasa ya ci, ya daɗe yana magana da su, har gari ya waye, sa'an nan ya tashi." 
Acts20:12 Sai suka tafi da saurayin nan a raye, daɗin da suka ji kuwa ba kaɗan ba ne." 
Acts20:13 Mu kuwa muka yi gaba zuwa jirgin, muka miƙe sai Asus da nufin ɗaukar Bulus daga can, don dā ma haka ya shirya, shi kuwa ya yi niyyar bi ta ƙasa." 
Acts20:14 Da ya same mu a Asus, muka ɗauke shi a jirgin, muka zo Mitilini." 
Acts20:15 Daga nan kuma muna tafe a jirgin ruwan dai, kashegari kuma sai ga mu daura da tsibirin Kiyos. Kashegari kuma, ga mu a tsibirin Samas, kashegari kuma sai Militas." 
Acts20:16 Dā ma kuwa Bulus ya ƙudura zai wuce Afisa cikin jirgin, don kada ya yi jinkiri a Asiya, domin yana sauri, in mai yiwuwa ne ma, ya kai Urushalima a ranar Fentikos." 
Acts20:17 Daga Militas ne ya aika Afisa a kira masa dattawan Ikkilisiya. 
Acts20:18 Da suka zo wurinsa sai ya ce musu, “Ku da kanku kun san irin zaman da na yi a cikinku, tun ran da na sa ƙafata a ƙasar Asiya," 
Acts20:19 ina bauta wa Ubangiji da matuƙar tawali'u, har da hawaye, da gwaggwarmaya iri iri da na sha game da makircin Yahudawa." 
Acts20:20 Kun kuma san yadda ban ji nauyin sanar da ku kowane abu mai amfani ba, ina koya muku a sarari, da kuma gida gida," 
Acts20:21 ina tabbatar wa Yahudawa da al'ummai duka sosai wajibcin tuba ga Allah, da kuma gaskatawa da Ubangijinmu Yesu." 
Acts20:22 To, ga shi kuma, yanzu zan tafi Urushalima, Ruhu yana iza ni, ban kuwa san abin da zai same ni a can ba," 
Acts20:23 sai dai Ruhu Mai Tsarki yakan riƙa tabbatar mini a kowane gari, cewa ɗauri da shan wuya na dākona." 
Acts20:24 Amma ni ban mai da raina a bakin kome ba, bai kuma dame ni ba, muddin zan iya cikasa tserena da kuma hidimar da na karɓa gun Ubangiji Yesu, in shaidar da bisharar alherin Allah." 
Acts20:25 To, ga shi, yanzu na san dukanku ba za ku ƙara ganina ba, ku da na zazzaga cikinku ina yi muku bisharar Mulkin Allah." 
Acts20:26 Saboda haka ina dai tabbatar muku a yau, cewa na kuɓuta daga hakkin kowa," 
Acts20:27 domin ban ji nauyin sanar da ku dukan nufin Allah ba. 
Acts20:28 Ku kula da kanku, da kuma duk garken da Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya sa ku ku zama masu kula da shi, kuna kiwon Ikkilisiyar Allah wadda ya sama wa kansa da jininsa." 
Acts20:29 Na sani bayan tashina waɗansu mugayen kyarketai za su shigo a cikinku, ba kuwa za su ji tausayin garken ba." 
Acts20:30 Har ma a cikinku waɗansu mutane za su taso, suna maganganun da ba sa kan hanya, don su jawo masu bi gare su." 
Acts20:31 Saboda haka sai ku zauna a faɗake, ku tuna, shekara uku ke nan ba dare ba rana, ban fasa yi wa kowa gargaɗi ba, har da hawaye." 
Acts20:32 To, yanzu na danƙa ku ga Ubangiji, maganar alherinsa kuma tă kiyaye ku, wadda ita take da ikon inganta ku, ta kuma ba ku gādo tare da dukan tsarkaka." 
Acts20:33 Ban yi ƙyashin kuɗin kowa ba, ko kuwa tufafin wani." 
Acts20:34 Ku da kanku kun sani hannuwan nan nawa su suka biya mini bukace-bukacena, da na waɗanda suke tare da ni." 
Acts20:35 Na zamar muku abin misali ta kowace hanya, cewa ta wahalar aiki haka lalle ne a taimaki masu ƙaramin ƙarfi, kuna kuma tunawa da Maganar Ubangiji Yesu da ya ce, ‘Bayarwa ta fi karɓa albarka.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Da Bulus ya faɗi haka, ya durƙusa, duka suka yi addu'a tare." 
Acts20:37 Sai duk suka fashe da kuka, suka rungume Bulus, suna ta sumbantarsa," 
Acts20:38 suna baƙin ciki tun ba ma saboda maganar da ya faɗa ba, cewa ba za su ƙara ganinsa ba. Daga nan suka rako shi har bakin jirgi." 
Acts21:1 Sa'ad da muka rabu da su da ƙyar, muka shiga jirgi muka miƙa sosai zuwa tsibirin Kos, kashegari kuma sai Rodusa, daga nan kuma sai Batara." 
Acts21:2 Da muka sami jirgi mai hayewa zuwa ƙasar Finikiya, muka shiga muka tafi." 
Acts21:3 Da muka tsinkayo tsibirin Kubrus, muka mai da shi hagun, muka ci gaba zuwa ƙasar Suriya, muka sauka a Taya, don a nan ne jirgin zai sauke kayansa." 
Acts21:4 Da muka sami inda masu bi suke, muka zauna a nan kwana bakwai. Sai Ruhu ya iza su suka gaya wa Bulus kada ya je Urushalima." 
Acts21:5 Amma da lokacin tashinmu ya yi, muka tashi muka ci gaba da tafiyarmu, dukansu kuma har da matansu da 'ya'yansu, suka raka mu bayan gari, sa'an nan muka durƙusa a kan gaci, muka yi addu'a, muka yi bankwana da juna." 
Acts21:6 Sai muka shiga jirgi, su kuma suka koma gida." 
Acts21:7 Da muka gama tafiyarmu daga Taya, muka isa Talamayas, muka gaisa da 'yan'uwa, muka kuma kwana ɗaya a wurinsu." 
Acts21:8 Kashegari muka tashi muka zo Kaisariya, muka shiga gidan Filibus mai yin bishara, wanda yake ɗaya daga cikin bakwai ɗin nan, muka sauka a wurinsa." 
Acts21:9 Shi kuwa yana da 'ya'ya huɗu 'yan mata, masu yin annabci." 
Acts21:10 To, muna nan zaune 'yan kwanaki, sai wani annabi, mai suna Agabas, ya zo daga Yahudiya." 
Acts21:11 Da ya zo gare mu, ya ɗauki ɗamarar Bulus ya ɗaure kansa sawu da hannu, ya ce, “Ga abin da Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya ce, ‘Haka Yahudawan Urushalima za su ɗaure mai wannan ɗamara, su kuma bashe shi ga al'ummai.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Da muka ji haka, mu da waɗanda suke wurin muka roƙi Bulus kada ya je Urushalima." 
Acts21:13 Sai Bulus ya amsa ya ce, “Me ke nan kuke yi, kuna kuka kuna baƙanta mini rai? Ai, ni a shirye nake, ba wai a ɗaure ni kawai ba, har ma a kashe ni a Urushalima saboda sunan Ubangiji Yesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Da dai ya ƙi rarrasuwa, muka yi shiru, muka ce, “Ubangiji ya yi yadda ya so.”" 
Acts21:15 Bayan 'yan kwanakin nan muka shirya muka tafi Urushalima. 
Acts21:16 Waɗansu masu bi daga Kaisariya suka rako mu, suka kawo mu wurin Manason, mutumin Kubrus, wani daɗaɗɗen mai bi, wanda za mu sauka a gunsa." 
Acts21:17 Da muka zo Urushalima, 'yan'uwa suka karɓe mu da murna." 
Acts21:18 Kashegari Bulus ya tafi tare da mu wurin Yakubu, dattawan Ikkilisiya kuwa duk suna nan." 
Acts21:19 Bayan da ya gaisa da su, sai ya shiga bayyana musu filla filla abubuwan da Allah ya yi a cikin al'ummai ta wurin hidimarsa." 
Acts21:20 Su kuwa da suka ji haka, suka ɗaukaka Allah. Suka ce wa Bulus, “To, kā gani ɗan'uwa, dubban mutane sun ba da gaskiya a cikin Yahudawa, dukansu kuwa masu himma ne wajen bin Shari'a." 
Acts21:21 An kuwa sha gaya musu labarinka, cewa kai ne kake koya wa dukan Yahudawan da suke cikin al'ummai su yar da Shari'ar Musa. Wai kuma kana ce musu kada su yi wa 'ya'yansu kaciya, ko kuwa su bi al'adu." 
Acts21:22 To, ƙaƙa ke nan? Lalle za su ji labarin zuwanka." 
Acts21:23 Saboda haka sai ka yi abin da za mu faɗa maka. Muna da mutum huɗu da suka ɗauki wa'adi. 
Acts21:24 Sai ka tafi da su ku tsarkaka gaba ɗaya, ka kuma biya musu kome don su samu su yi aski. Ta haka, kowa zai sani duk abin da aka gaya musu game da kai, ba wata gaskiya a ciki, kai kuma kana kiyaye Shari'a." 
Acts21:25 Amma game da al'ummai da suka ba da gaskiya, mun aika da wasiƙa a kan mun hukunta, cewa su guji cin abin da aka yanka wa gunki, da fasikanci, da cin abin da aka maƙure, da kuma cin nama tare da jini.”" 
Acts21:26 Sa'an nan Bulus ya ɗibi mutanen nan, kashegari kuma da suka tsarkaka tare, sai ya shiga Haikali domin ya sanar da ranar cikar tsarkakewar tasu, wato ranar da za a ba da sadaka saboda kowannensu." 
Acts21:27 Da kwana bakwai ɗin suka yi kusan cika, Yahudawan ƙasar Asiya suka gan shi a Haikalin, sai suka zuga taron duka, suka danƙe shi," 
Acts21:28 suna ihu suna cewa, “Ya ku 'yan'uwa Isra'ilawa, ku taimaka! Ga mutumin da yake bi ko'ina yana koya wa mutane su raina jama'armu da Shari'a, da kuma wannan wuri. Banda haka kuma har ma ya kawo al'ummai a cikin Haikalin, ya ƙazantar da wurin nan tsattsarka.”" 
Acts21:29 Don dā ma can sun ga Tarofimas Ba'afise tare da shi a cikin gari, sun kuma zaci Bulus ya kawo shi Haikalin." 
Acts21:30 Sai duk garin ya ruɗe, jama'a suka ɗungumo a guje suka danƙe Bulus, suka ja shi waje daga Haikalin, nan da nan kuma aka rufe ƙofofi." 
Acts21:31 Suna neman kashe shi ke nan, sai labari ya kai ga shugaban ƙungiyar yaƙi, wai Urushalima duk ta hargitse." 
Acts21:32 A nan tāke ya ɗibi soja da jarumawa, suka ruga zuwa wajensu. Su kuwa da ganin shugaban da soja suka daina dūkan Bulus." 
Acts21:33 Sai shugaban ya matsa kusa ya kama Bulus, ya yi umarni a ɗaure shi da sarƙa biyu, sa'an nan ya tambaya ko shi wane ne, da abin da kuma ya yi." 
Acts21:34 Taron kuwa suka ɗau kururuwa, waɗansu suka ce kaza, waɗansu suka ce kaza. Don tsananin hargowa ma har ya kasa samun ainihin tushen maganar, ya yi umarni a kai shi kagarar sojoji." 
Acts21:35 Da Bulus ya zo ga bakin matakala, sai da soja suka kinkime shi saboda haukan taron," 
Acts21:36 don taron jama'a na dannowa a bayansu, suna ihu suna cewa, “A yi da shi!”" 
Acts21:37 An yi kusan shigar da Bulus kagarar sojoji ke nan, sai ya ce wa shugaban, “Ko ka yarda in yi magana da kai?” Sai shugaban ya ce, “Ashe, ka iya Helenanci?" 
Acts21:38 Shin, ba kai ne Bamasaren nan da shekarun baya ya haddasa tawaye ba, har ya ja mutanen nan dubu huɗu masu kisankai jeji?”" 
Acts21:39 Sai Bulus ya amsa ya ce, “Ai, ni Bayahude ne na Tarsus ta ƙasar Kilikiya, ɗan shahararren birni, ina roƙonka ka bar ni in yi wa mutane jawabi.”" 
Acts21:40 Da ya ba shi izini, sai Bulus ya tsaya a kan matakala, ya ɗaga wa jama'a hannu su yi shiru. Da suka yi tsit, sai ya yi musu magana da Yahudanci." 
Acts22:1 “Ya ku 'yan'uwa da shugabanni, ku ji hanzarin da zan kawo muku a yanzu.”" 
Acts22:2 Da suka ji ya yi musu magana da Yahudanci, sai suka ƙara natsuwa. Sa'an nan ya ce," 
Acts22:3 “Ni bayahude ne, haifaffen Tarsus, ƙasar Kilikiya, amma a nan garin na girma, aka kuma karantar da ni wurin Gamaliyal, bisa ga tsarin tsanantacciyar hanyar nan ta Shari'ar kakanninmu. Ina mai himmar bauta wa Allah, kamar yadda dukanku kuke a yau," 
Acts22:4 har na tsananta wa masu bin wannan hanya, ina karkashe su, ina ɗaure mutane maza da mata, ina jefa su a kurkuku." 
Acts22:5 Babban firist ma da dukan majalisar shugabannin jama'a za su iya shaidata, daga gunsu ne kuma na karɓi wasiƙu zuwa ga 'yan'uwanmu Yahudawa, na tafi Dimashƙu, don in ɗebo waɗanda suke can ma, in zo da su Urushalima a ɗaure, a azabta su.”" 
Acts22:6 “Ina cikin tafiya, da na yi kusa da Dimashƙu, wajen rana tsaka, kwamfa sai wani matsanancin haske ya bayyano daga sama, ya haskaka kewaye da ni." 
Acts22:7 Sai na fāɗi, na kuma ji wata murya tana ce mini, ‘Shawulu, Shawulu, don me kake tsananta mini?’" 
Acts22:8 Ni kuma na amsa na ce, ‘Wane ne kai, ya Ubangiji?’ Sai ya ce mini, ‘Ni ne Yesu Banazare wanda kake tsananta wa.’" 
Acts22:9 To, waɗanda suke tare da ni sun ga hasken, amma ba su ji kalmomin mai yi mini maganar nan ba." 
Acts22:10 Sai na ce, ‘To, me zan yi, ya Ubangiji?’ Sai ubangiji ya ce mini, ‘Tashi, ka shiga Dimashƙu, a can ne za a faɗa maka duk abin da aka ɗora maka ka yi.’" 
Acts22:11 Da na kāsa gani saboda tsananin hasken nan, sai waɗanda suke tare da ni suka yi mini jagora, har na isa Dimashƙu." 
Acts22:12 “Sai kuma wani mai suna Hananiya, mai bautar Allah ne wajen bin Shari'a, wanda duk Yahudawan da suke zaune a can suke yabo," 
Acts22:13 ya zo ya tsaya a kusa da ni, ya ce mini, ‘Ya ɗan'uwana Shawulu, ganinka yă komo maka.’ Nan tāke, sai ganina ya komo, na kuwa gan shi." 
Acts22:14 Sai ya ce, ‘Allahn kakanninmu ya zaɓe ka don kă san nufinsa, ka ga Mai Adalcin nan, ka kuma ji jawabi daga bakinsa." 
Acts22:15 Don za ka zama mashaidinsa ga dukan mutane game da abin da ka gani, ka kuma ji." 
Acts22:16 To, a yanzu me kake jira? Tashi, a yi maka baftisma a wanke zunubanka ta wurin kira bisa sunansa.’ ”" 
Acts22:17 “Da na komo Urushalima, ina addu'a a Haikali, sai wahayi ya zo mini." 
Acts22:18 Na gan shi, yana ce mini, ‘Yi sauri maza ka fita daga Urushalima, don ba za su yarda da shaidarka a kaina ba.’" 
Acts22:19 Ni kuma na ce, ‘Ya Ubangiji, ai, su ma kansu sun sani a kowace majami'a na ɗaɗɗaure waɗanda suka gaskata da kai, na kuma daddoke su." 
Acts22:20 Sa'ad da kuma aka zub da jinin Istifanas, mashaidin nan naka, ni ma ina a tsaye a gun, ina goyon bayan abin da aka yi, har ma ina tsare tufafin masu kisansa.’" 
Acts22:21 Sai ya ce mini, ‘Tashi ka tafi, zan aike ka can nesa a wurin al'ummai.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Suna ta sauraronsa har ya iso kalmar nan, sai suka ɗau ihu suka ce, “A kashe shi! A raba irin mutumin nan da duniya, bai kyautu ya rayu ba!”" 
Acts22:23 Da suka dinga ihu suna kaɗa mayafansu suna ta ature da ƙura," 
Acts22:24 sai shugaba ya yi umarni a kai Bulus kagarar soja a tuhume shi da bulala, don yă san abin da ya sa suke masa ihu haka." 
Acts22:25 Bayan sun ɗaɗɗaure shi da tsirkiya, Bulus ya ce wa jarumin ɗin da yake tsaye kusa, “Ashe, ya halatta a gare ka ka yi wa mutumin da yake da 'yancin Roma bulala, ba ko bin ba'asi?”" 
Acts22:26 Da jarumin ɗin ya ji haka, sai ya je ya shaida wa shugaban, ya ce, “Me kake shirin yi ne? Mutumin nan fa Barome ne.”" 
Acts22:27 Sai shugaban ya zo ya ce wa Bulus, “Faɗa mini gaskiya, kai kuwa Barome ne?” Sai ya ce, “I”." 
Acts22:28 Sai shugaban ya amsa ya ce, “Ni fa da kuɗi masu yawa na sami 'yancin nan.” Bulus ya ce, “ni kuwa da shi aka haife ni.”" 
Acts22:29 Saboda haka, waɗanda suke shirin tuhumarsa, suka rabu da shi nan da nan. Shi ma shugaban da ya fahimci Bulus Barome ne, sai ya tsorata, ga shi kuwa, ya ɗaure shi." 
Acts22:30 Kashegari kuma da shugaban ya so sanin ainihin ƙarar da Yahudawa suke yi a kan Bulus, sai ya kwance shi, ya yi umarni manyan firistoci da dukan majalisa su taru, sa'an nan ya sauko da Bulus ya tsai da shi a gabansu." 
Acts23:1 Sai Bulus ya zuba wa majalisar ido ya ce, “Ya ku 'yan'uwa, bautar Allah nake yi da lamiri mai kyau har ya zuwa yau.”" 
Acts23:2 Sai Hananiya babban firist ya umarci waɗanda suke tsaye kusa da Bulus su buge bakinsa. 
Acts23:3 Sai Bulus ya ce masa, “Kai munafiƙi, kai ma Allah zai buge ka! Ashe, wato kana zaune kana hukunta ni bisa ga Shari'a ne, ga shi kuwa kana yin umarni a doke ni, a saɓanin Shari'a?”" 
Acts23:4 Sai waɗanda suke tsaye a wurin suka ce masa, “Babban firist na Allah za ka zaga?”" 
Acts23:5 Sai Bulus ya ce, “Ai, ban sani shi ne babban firist ba, 'yan'uwa, don a rubuce yake cewa, ‘Kada ka munana shugaban jama'a.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Amma da Bulus ya ga sashe ɗaya Sadukiyawa ne, ɗayan kuma Farisiyawa, ya ɗaga murya a majalisar ya ce, “Ya 'yan'uwa, ni ma Bafarisiye ne, ɗan Farisiyawa. Ga shi kuwa, saboda na sa zuciya ga tashin matattu ne ake yi mini shari'a.”" 
Acts23:7 Da ya faɗi haka sai gardama ta tashi a tsakanin Farisiyawa da Sadukiyawa, har taron ya rabu biyu." 
Acts23:8 Sadukiyawa sun ce, wai ba tashin matattu, ba kuma mala'iku, ko ruhu. Farisiyawa kuwa sun tsaya a kan cewa duk akwai." 
Acts23:9 Sai ƙasaitacciyar hargowa ta tashi, waɗansu malamai kuma na ɗariƙar Farisiyawa suka miƙe a tsaye, suka yi ta yin matsananciyar jayayya, suna cewa, “Mu ba mu ga laifin mutumin nan ba. In wani ruhu ne ko mala'ika ya yi masa magana fa?”" 
Acts23:10 Da gardamar ta yi tsanani, don gudun kada su yi kaca-kaca da Bulus, shugaban ya umarci sojan su sauka su ƙwato shi daga wurinsu ƙarfi da yaji, su kawo shi a kagarar soja." 
Acts23:11 Da daddare sai Ubangiji ya tsaya a kusa da Bulus, ya ce, “Ka yi ƙarfin hali, don kamar yadda ka shaide ni a Urushalima, haka kuma lalle ne ka shaide ni a Roma.”" 
Acts23:12 Da gari ya waye, Yahudawa suka gama baki suka yi rantsuwa, cewa ba za su ci ba, ba za su sha ba, sai sun kashe Bulus." 
Acts23:13 Waɗanda suka ƙulla wannan makirci kuwa sun fi mutum arba'in. 
Acts23:14 Sai suka je wurin manyan firistoci da shugabanni, suka ce, “Mun yi wata babbar rantsuwa, cewa za mu zauna ba ci ba sha sai mun kashe Bulus." 
Acts23:15 Saboda haka, yanzu ku da majalisa ku shaida wa shugaban soja ya kawo muku shi, kamar kuna so ne ku ƙara bincika maganarsa sosai, mu kuwa a shirye muke mu kashe shi kafin ya iso.”" 
Acts23:16 To, ɗan 'yar'uwar Bulus ya ji labarin farkon da za su yi, ya kuma je ya shiga kagarar soja ya gaya wa Bulus." 
Acts23:17 Bulus kuwa ya kira wani jarumi ya ce, “Ka kai saurayin nan wurin shugaba, yana da wata magana da zai faɗa masa.”" 
Acts23:18 Sai jarumin ya ɗauki saurayin ya kai shi gun shugaba, ya ce, “Ɗan sarƙan nan, Bulus, ya kira ni, ya roƙe ni in kawo saurayin nan a wurinka, don yana da wata maganar da zai gaya maka.”" 
Acts23:19 Sai shugaban ya kama hannun saurayin, ya ja shi a waje ɗaya, ya tambaye shi a keɓance, “Wace magana za ka gaya mini?”" 
Acts23:20 Yaron ya ce, “Yahudawa sun ƙulla za su roƙe ka ka kai musu Bulus majalisa gobe, kamar suna so su ƙara bincika maganarsa sosai." 
Acts23:21 Amma kada ka yardar musu, don fiye da mutum arba'in daga cikinsu suna fakonsa, sun kuma yi rantsuwa a kan ba za su ci ba, ba za su sha ba, sai sun kashe shi. Yanzu kuwa a shirye suke, yardarka kawai suka jira.”" 
Acts23:22 Sai shugaban ya sallami saurayin ya umarce shi ya ce, “Kada ka gaya wa kowa cewa ka sanar da ni maganar nan.”" 
Acts23:23 Sa'an nan ya kira jarumi biyu ya ce, “Ku shirya soja metan, da barade saba'in, da 'yan māsu metan, su tafi Kaisariya da ƙarfe tara na daren nan.”" 
Acts23:24 Ya kuma yi umarni su shirya wa Bulus dabbobin da zai hau, don su kai shi wurin mai mulki Filikus lafiya." 
Acts23:25 Ya kuma rubuta wasiƙa kamar haka: 
Acts23:26 “Daga Kalaudiyas Lisiyas zuwa ga mafifici mai mulki Filikus. Gaisuwa mai yawa. 
Acts23:27 Bayan haka mutumin nan, Yahudawa sun kama shi, suna kuma gab da kashe shi, sai na yi farat na je da soja na ƙwato shi, saboda na ji cewa shi Barome ne." 
Acts23:28 Da ina so jin laifin da suke zarginsa a kai, sai na kai shi majalisarsu." 
Acts23:29 Na kuwa tarar suna zarginsa a kan maganar Shari'arsu, amma laifin da suka ɗora masa bai kai ga kisa ko ɗauri ba." 
Acts23:30 Da aka buɗa mini cewa akwai wani makircin da aka ƙulla masa, nan da nan na aika da shi a gare ka, na kuma umarci masu ƙararsa su faɗi ƙararsu a gabanka. Wassalam.”" 
Acts23:31 Saboda haka, sojan suka ɗauki Bulus, kamar yadda aka umarce su, suka kai shi Antibatiris da daddare." 
Acts23:32 Kashegari kuma suka bar barade su ci gaba da shi, su kuwa suka koma kagarar soja." 
Acts23:33 Da baraden suka isa Kaisariya, suka ba mai mulkin wasiƙar, suka kai Bulus a gabansa." 
Acts23:34 Da ya karanta wasiƙar, ya tambayi Bulus ko shi mutumin wane lardi ne? Da ya ji daga Kilikiya yake," 
Acts23:35 ya ce, “Zan saurari maganarka duka, in masu ƙararka sun zo.” Sai kuma ya yi umarni a tsare shi a fadar Hirudus." 
Acts24:1 Bayan kwana biyar sai babban firist, Hananiya, ya zo tare da waɗansu shugabanni, da kuma wani lauya, mai suna Tartulus, suka yi ƙarar Bulus a gaban mai mulki." 
Acts24:2 Da aka kirawo Tartulus, ya shiga kai ƙarar Bulus, ya ce, “Ya mafifici Filikus, tun da yake ta gare ka ne muke zaman lafiya ƙwarai, ta tsinkayarka ne kuma ake kyautata zaman jama'armu," 
Acts24:3 kullum muna yarda da haka ƙwarai a ko'ina, tare da godiya ba iyaka." 
Acts24:4 Amma don kada in gajiyad da kai, ina roƙonka a cikin nasiharka, ka saurari ɗan taƙaitaccen jawabinmu." 
Acts24:5 Mun tarar da mutumin nan fitinanne ne, yana ta da hargitsi tsakanin Yahudawa ko'ina a duniya, shi kuma ne turun ɗariƙar Nazarawa." 
Acts24:6 Har ma yana nema ya tozarta Haikali, amma muka kama shi. [Niyyarmu ce mu hukunta shi bisa ga shari'armu." 
Acts24:7 Amma shugaba Lisiyas ya zo ya ƙwace shi daga hannunmu ƙarfi da yaji," 
Acts24:8 ya yi umarni masu ƙararsa su zo a gabanka.] In kuwa ka tuhume shi da kanka, za ka iya tabbatarwa daga bakinsa duk ƙarar da muke tāsarwa.”" 
Acts24:9 Yahudawa ma suka goyi bayan haka, suna tabbatarwa haka abin yake." 
Acts24:10 Da mai mulki ya alamta wa Bulus ya yi magana, sai ya amsa ya ce, “Tun da na sani ka yi shekaru da yawa kana yi wa jama'ar nan shari'a, da farin ciki zan kawo hanzarina." 
Acts24:11 Ai, ka iya tabbatarwa, bai fi kwana goma sha biyu ba tun da na tafi Urushalima yin sujada." 
Acts24:12 Ba su kuwa taɓa samuna ina muhawwara da kowa ba, ko kuwa ta da husuma har mutane su taru a Haikali, ko a majami'u, ko kuwa a cikin birni." 
Acts24:13 Ba kuma za su iya tabbatar maka abin da yanzu suke ƙarata a kai ba. 
Acts24:14 Amma na yarda cewa, bisa ga hanyar nan da suke kira ‘Ɗariƙa’ nake bauta wa Allahn kakanninmu, nake kuma gaskata duk abin da yake a rubuce a cikin Attaura da kuma littattafan annabawa." 
Acts24:15 Ina sa zuciya ga Allah, yadda su waɗannan ma suke sawa, wato za a ta da matattu, masu adalci da marasa adalci duka." 
Acts24:16 Saboda haka, a kullum nake himma in kasance da lamiri marar abin zargi a wurin Allah da wurin mutane." 
Acts24:17 To, bayan 'yan shekaru sai na je domin in kai gudunmawa ga jama'armu, in kuma yi sadaka." 
Acts24:18 Ina cikin yin haka sai suka same ni a tsarkake a Haikali, ba kuwa da wani taro ba, balle hargowa. Amma akwai waɗansu Yahudawa daga ƙasar Asiya–" 
Acts24:19 su ne kuwa ya kamata su zo nan a gabanka su yi ƙarata, in suna da wata magana a game da ni."
