1Corinthians1:8 wanda zai tabbatar da ku har ya zuwa ƙarshe, ku kasance marasa abin zargi a ranar Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Allah mai alkawari ne, shi ne kuma ya kira ku ga tarayya da Ɗansa Yesu Almasihu Ubangijinmu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Na roƙe ku 'yan'uwa, saboda sunan Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, cewa dukanku bakinku yă zama ɗaya, kada wata tsaguwa ta shiga a tsakaninku, sai dai ku haɗa kai, kuna da nufi ɗaya, ra'ayinku ɗaya." 
1Corinthians1:11 Don kuwa, ya 'yan'uwana, mutanen gidan Kuluwi sun ba ni labari, cewa akwai jayayya a tsakaninku." 
1Corinthians1:12 Abin da nake nufi, shi ne kowannenku yana faɗar abu dabam, “Ni na Bulus ne,” wani kuwa, “Ni na Afolos ne,” wani kuwa, “Ni na Kefas ne,” ko kuwa, “ni na Almasihu ne.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Ashe, Almasihu a rarrabe yake? Ko Bulus ne aka gicciye dominku? Ko kuwa an yi muku baftisma ne da sunan Bulus?" 
1Corinthians1:14 Na gode Allah da ban yi wa waninku baftisma ba, banda Kirisbus da Gayus," 
1Corinthians1:15 kada wani ya ce da sunana ne aka yi muku baftisma. 
1Corinthians1:16 Ai, kuwa lalle na yi wa jama'ar gidan Istifanas ma. Amma banda waɗannan ban san ko na yi wa wani baftisma ba." 
1Corinthians1:17 Ai, ba don in yi baftisma Almasihu ya aiko ni ba, sai dai in sanar da bishara, ba kuwa da gwanintar iya magana ba, domin kada a wofinta ƙarfin gicciyen Almasihu." 
1Corinthians1:18 Maganar gicciye, maganar wauta ce ga waɗanda suke hallaka, amma ƙarfin Allah ce a gare mu, mu da ake ceto." 
1Corinthians1:19 Domin a rubuce yake cewa, “Zan rushe hikimar mai hikima, Zan kuma shafe haziƙancin haziƙi.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 To, ina masu hikima suke? Ina kuma masana? Ina masu muhawwarar zamanin nan? Ashe, Allah bai fallashi hikimar duniyar nan a kan wauta ce ba?" 
1Corinthians1:21 Da yake bisa ga hikimar Allah, duniya ba ta san Allah ta wurin hikimarta ba, sai Allah ya ji daɗin ceton masu ba da gaskiya, ta wurin wautar shelar bishara." 
1Corinthians1:22 Yahudawa kam, mu'ujiza suke nema su gani, Helenawa kuwa hikima suka nema su samu," 
1Corinthians1:23 mu kuwa muna wa'azin Almasihu gicciyeyye, abin sa yin tuntuɓe ga Yahudawa, wauta kuma ga al'ummai," 
1Corinthians1:24 amma ga waɗanda suke kirayayyu, ko Yahudawa ko al'ummai duka biyu, Almasihu ikon Allah ne, da hikimar Allah." 
1Corinthians1:25 Domin abin da aka zata wauta ce ta Allah, ya fi hikimar ɗan adam, abin da kuma aka zata rauni ne na Allah, ya fi duk ƙarfin ɗan adam." 
1Corinthians1:26 Ku dubi kiranku da aka yi, ya ku 'yan'uwa, a cikinku, ai, ba a kira masu hikima irin ta duniya da yawa ba, masu iko kuma ba su da yawa, haka ma masu asali ma ba yawa." 
1Corinthians1:27 Amma Allah ya zaɓi abin da yake wauta a duniya, domin ya kunyata masu hikima. Allah ya zaɓi abin da yake rarrauna a duniya, domin ya kunyata ƙaƙƙarfa." 
1Corinthians1:28 Allah ya zaɓi abin da yake ƙasƙantacce, wulakantacce a duniya, har ma abubuwan da ba su, domin yă shafe abubuwan da suke akwai." 
1Corinthians1:29 Wannan kuwa duk don kada wani ɗan adam yă yi fariya a gaban Allah ne. 
1Corinthians1:30 Gama Allah ne ya sa kuka zama na Almasihu Yesu, Allah ne kuma ya sa Almasihu ya zama hikima a gare mu. Ta wurin Almasihu ne kuma muka sami adalci, da tsarkakewa da fansa." 
1Corinthians1:31 Saboda haka, “Duk mai yin alfarma, yă yi da Ubangiji” (abin da yake a rubuce ke nan)." 
1Corinthians2:1 Sa'ad da na zo wurinku, 'yan'uwa, ban zo ina sanar da ku asiran Allah ta wurin iya magana ko gwada hikima ba." 
1Corinthians2:2 Don na ƙudura a raina, sa'ad da nake zaune da ku, ba zan so sanin kome ba, sai dai Yesu Almasihu, shi ma kuwa gicciyeyye." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ina kuma tare da ku ne da rauni, da tsoro, da rawar jiki ƙwarai." 
1Corinthians2:4 Jawabina da wa'azina, ba su danganta ga maganar rarrashi ko ta wayo ba, sai dai ga rinjaye na ikon Ruhu," 
1Corinthians2:5 kada bangaskiyarku ta dogara ga hikimar mutane, sai ga ƙarfin Allah." 
1Corinthians2:6 Duk da haka dai muna sanar da hikima ga waɗanda suka kammala, sai dai ba hikimar wannan zamani ba, ba kuwa ta masu mulkin zamanin nan, waɗanda suke shuɗewa ba." 
1Corinthians2:7 Amma muna maganar asirtacciyar hikima ta Allah, wadda dā ɓoyayyiya ce, wato, hikimar da Allah ya ƙaddara tun gaban farkon zamanai, domin ɗaukakarmu." 
1Corinthians2:8 A cikin masu mulkin zamanin nan, ba wanda ya gane hikimar nan, don da sun gane ta, da ba su gicciye Ubangiji Maɗaukaki ba." 
1Corinthians2:9 Amma kuwa yadda yake a rubuce ke nan cewa, “Abubuwan da ido bai taɓa gani ba, Kunne bai taɓa ji ba, Zuciyar mutum kuma ba ta ko riya ba, Waɗanda Allah ya tanadar wa masu ƙaunarsa,”" 
1Corinthians2:10 mu ne Allah ya bayyana wa, ta wurin Ruhu, domin Ruhu shi yake fayyace kome, har ma zurfafan al'amuran Allah." 
1Corinthians2:11 Wane ne a cikin mutane ya san tunanin wani mutum, in ba ruhun shi mutumin ba? Haka kuma ba wanda ya san tunanin Allah, sai dai Ruhun Allah." 
1Corinthians2:12 Mu kuwa ba ruhun duniya muka samu ba, sai dai Ruhu wanda yake daga wurin Allah, domin mu fahimci abubuwan da Allah ya yi mana baiwa hannu sake." 
1Corinthians2:13 Su ne kuwa muke sanarwa ta maganar da ba hikimar ɗan adam ce ta koyar ba, sai dai wadda Ruhu ya koyar, muna bayyana al'amura masu ruhu ga waɗanda suke na ruhu." 
1Corinthians2:14 Mutumin da ba shi da Ruhu yakan ƙi yin na'am da al'amuran Ruhun Allah, don wauta ne a gare shi, ba kuwa zai iya fahimtarsu ba, domin ta wurin ruhu ne ake rarrabewa da su." 
1Corinthians2:15 Mutumin da yake na ruhu kuwa yakan rarrabe da kome, shi kansa kuma ba mai jarraba shi." 
1Corinthians2:16 “Wa ya taɓa sanin tunanin Ubangiji, har da zai koya masa?” Mu kuwa tunaninmu na Almasihu ne." 
1Corinthians3:1 Amma ni, 'yan'uwa, ban iya yi muku jawabi ba, kamar yadda nake yi wa mutanen da suke na ruhu, sai dai kamar yadda nake yi wa masu halin mutuntaka, kamar jarirai a cikin bin Almasihu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nono ne na shayar da ku, ba abinci mai tauri na ba ku ba, don ba ku isa ci ba a lokacin, ko a yanzu ma ba ku isa ba," 
1Corinthians3:3 don har a yanzu ku masu halin mutuntaka ne. Muddin akwai kishi da jayayya a tsakaninku, ashe, ku ba masu halin mutuntaka ba ne, kuna kuma aikata halin mutuntaka?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Don in wani ya ce, “Ni na Bulus ne,” wani kuma ya ce, “Ni na Afolos ne,” ashe, ba aikata halin mutuntaka kuke yi ba?" 
1Corinthians3:5 To, wane ne Afolos? wane ne Bulus kuma? Ashe, ba bayi ne kawai ba, waɗanda kuka ba da gaskiya ta wurinsu, ko wannensu kuwa gwargwadon abin da Ubangiji ya ba shi?" 
1Corinthians3:6 Ni na yi shuka, Afolos ya yi banruwa, amma Allah ne ya girmar." 
1Corinthians3:7 Don haka da mai shukar, da mai banruwan, ba a bakin kome suke ba, sai dai Allah kaɗai, shi da ya girmar." 
1Corinthians3:8 Da mai shukar, da mai banruwan, duk daidai suke, sai dai ko wanne zai sami tasa ladar gwargwadon wahalarsa," 
1Corinthians3:9 gama mu abokan aiki ne na Allah, ku kuwa gona ce ta Allah, ginin Allah kuma." 
1Corinthians3:10 Kamar gwanin magini, haka na sa harsashin gini, gwargwadon baiwar alherin da Allah ya yi mini, wani kuma yana ɗora gini a kai. Sai dai kowane mutum, yă lura da irin ginin da yake ɗorawa a kai." 
1Corinthians3:11 Harsashin kam, ba wanda yake iya sa wani dabam da wanda aka riga aka sa, wato, Yesu Almasihu." 
1Corinthians3:12 To, kowa ya yi ɗori da zinariya a kan harsashin nan, ko da azurfa, ko da duwatsun alfarma, ko da itace, ko da shuci, ko da kara," 
1Corinthians3:13 ai, aikin kowane mutum zai bayyana, domin ranar nan za ta tona shi, gama za a bayyana ta da wuta, wutar kuwa za ta gwada aikin kowa a san irinsa." 
1Corinthians3:14 In aikin da kowane mutum ya ɗora a kan harsashin nan ya tsira, to, zai sami sakamako." 
1Corinthians3:15 In kuwa aikin wani ya ƙone, to, sai yă yi hasara, ko da yake shi da kansa zai tsira, amma kamar ya bi ta wuta ne." 
1Corinthians3:16 Ashe, ba ku sani ku Haikalin Allah ne ba, Ruhun Allah kuma yana zaune a zuciyarku?" 
1Corinthians3:17 In wani ya ɓāta Haikalin Allah, Allah zai ɓāta shi. Gama Haikalin Allah tsattsarka ne, ku kanku Haikalinsa ne." 
1Corinthians3:18 Kada kowa yă ruɗi kansa. In waninku ya zaci shi mai hikima ne, yadda duniya ta ɗauki hikima, sai yă mai da kansa marar hikima, domin ya sami zama mai hikima." 
1Corinthians3:19 Gama hikimar duniyar nan wauta ce a gun Allah, domin a rubuce yake, “Yakan kama masu hikima da makircinsu.”" 
1Corinthians3:20 Har wa yau, “Ubangiji ya san tunanin masu hikima banza ne.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Saboda haka kada kowa yă yi fariya da 'yan adam. Don kuwa kome naku ne," 
1Corinthians3:22 ko Bulus, ko Afolos, ko Kefas, ko duniya, ko rai, ko mutuwa, ko abubuwan yanzu, ko da na gaba, ai, duk naku ne." 
1Corinthians3:23 Ku kuwa na Almasihu ne, Almasihu kuma na Allah ne." 
1Corinthians4:1 Ta haka ya kamata a san mu da zama ma'aikatan Almasihu, masu riƙon amanar asirtattun al'amuran Allah." 
1Corinthians4:2 Har wa yau dai, abin da ake bukata ga mai riƙon amana, a same shi amintacce." 
1Corinthians4:3 A gare ni kam, sassauƙan abu ne a ce ku ne za ku gwada ni, ko kuwa a gwada ni a gaban kowace mahukunta ta mutane. Ni ma ba na gwada kaina." 
1Corinthians4:4 Ban sani ina da wani laifi ba, amma ba don wannan na kuɓuta ba, ai, Ubangiji shi ne mai gwada ni." 
1Corinthians4:5 Don haka, kada ku yanke wani hukunci tun lokaci bai yi ba, kafin komowar Ubangiji, wanda zai tone al'amuran da suke ɓoye a duhu, ya kuma bayyana nufin zukata. A sa'an nan ne, Allah zai yaɓa wa kowa daidai gwargwado." 
1Corinthians4:6 To, 'yan'uwa, ga zancen waɗannan abubuwa, na misalta su ne ga kaina, da kuma Afolos saboda ku, don ku yi koyi da mu, cewa, kada ku zarce abin da yake a rubuce, kada kuma waninku ya yi fahariya da wani a kan wani." 
1Corinthians4:7 Wa ya fifita ka da sauran? Me kuma kake da shi, wanda ba karɓa ka yi ba? Da yake karɓa ka yi, don me kake fahariya, kamar ba karɓa ka yi ba?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Mhm, wato, har kun riga kun yi hamdala! Har kun wadata! Har ma kun yi sarauta ba tare da mu ba ma! Da ma a ce kun yi mulki mana, har mu ma mu yi tare da ku!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Don a ganina, Allah ya bayyana mu, mu manzanni, koma bayan duka ne, kamar waɗanda mutuwa yake jewa a kansu, don mun zama abin nuni ga duniya, da mala'iku duk da mutane." 
1Corinthians4:10 An ɗauke mu marasa azanci saboda Almasihu, wato, ku kuwa masu azanci cikin Almasihu! Wato, mu raunana ne, ku kuwa ƙarfafa! Ku kam, ana ganinku da martaba, mu kuwa a wulakance!" 
1Corinthians4:11 Har a yanzu haka, yunwa muke ji, da ƙishirwa, muna huntanci, ana bugunmu, kuma yawo muke yi haka, ba mu da gida." 
1Corinthians4:12 Guminmu muke ci. In an zage mu, mukan sa albarka. In an tsananta mana, mukan daure." 
1Corinthians4:13 In an ci mutuncinmu, mukan ba da haƙuri. Mun zama, har a yanzu ma, mu ne kamar jujin duniya, abin ƙyamar kowa." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ba don in kunyata ku na rubuta wannan ba, sai dai don in gargaɗe ku a kan cewa, ku 'ya'yana ne, ƙaunatattu." 
1Corinthians4:15 Ko da kuna da malamai masu ɗumbun yawa, amma ba ku da ubanni da yawa, don ni ne ubanku a cikin Almasihu ta wurin bishara." 
1Corinthians4:16 Don haka, ina roƙon ku, ku yi koyi da ni." 
1Corinthians4:17 Saboda haka, na aika muku da Timoti, wanda yake shi ne ɗana ƙaunatacce, amintacce kuma a cikin Ubangiji, zai kuwa tuna muku da ka'idodina na bin Almasihu, kamar yadda nake koyarwa a ko'ina, a kowace ikkilisiya." 
1Corinthians4:18 Waɗansu har suna ɗaga kai, kamar ba zan zo wurinku ba." 
1Corinthians4:19 Amma kuwa zan zo gare ku ba da daɗewa ba, in Ubangiji ya yarda, zan kuma bincika, in ga ƙarfin mutane masu ɗaga kan nan, ba maganganunsu ba." 
1Corinthians4:20 Domin Mulkin Allah ba ga maganar baka yake ba, sai dai ga ƙarfi." 
1Corinthians4:21 To, me kuka zaɓa, in zo muku da sanda, ko kuwa da fuskar ƙauna da lumana?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Ana ta cewa akwai fasikanci a tsakaninku, irin wanda ba a yi ko a cikin al'ummai, har wani yana zama da matar ubansa." 
1Corinthians5:2 A! Har kuwa alfarma kuke yi! Ashe, ba gwamma ku yi baƙin ciki ba, har a fitar da wanda ya yi wannan mugun aiki daga cikin jama'arku?" 
1Corinthians5:3 Ko da yake a jiki ba na nan, ai, ruhuna yana nan, kamar ma ina nan ne, har ma na riga na yanke wa mutumin da ya yi abin nan hukunci da sunan Ubangijinmu Yesu." 
1Corinthians5:4 Sa'ad da kuka hallara, ruhuna kuma yana nan, da kuma ikon Ubangijinmu Yesu," 
1Corinthians5:5 sai ku miƙa irin wannan mutum ga Shaiɗan, don yă hallaka jikinsa, ruhunsa kuma ya tsira a ranar Ubangiji Yesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Fāriyarku ba shi da kyau. Ashe, ba ku sani ba, ɗan yisti kaɗan yake game dukkan curin gurasa?" 
1Corinthians5:7 Ku fitar da tsohon yistin nan, don ku zama sabon curi, domin hakika an raba ku da yistin, da yake an riga an yanka Ɗan Ragonmu na Idin Ƙetarewa, wato, Almasihu." 
1Corinthians5:8 Saboda haka, sai mu riƙa yin idinmu, ba da gurasa mai tsohon yisti ba, ba kuwa gauraye da yisti na ƙeta da na mugunta ba, sai dai da gurasa marar yisti ta sahihanci da ta gaskiya." 
1Corinthians5:9 Na rubuta muku a cikin wasiƙata, cewa kada ku yi cuɗanya da fasikai." 
1Corinthians5:10 Ko kusa, ba na nufin fasikai marasa bi, ko makwaɗaita, da mazambata, ko matsafa, don in haka ne, sai yă zama dole ku fita daga duniya." 
1Corinthians5:11 Sai dai na rubuta muku ne, don kada ku yi cuɗanya da duk wanda ake kira ɗan'uwa, mai bi, in yana fasikanci, ko makwaɗaici, ko matsafi, ko mai zage-zage, ko mashayi, ko mazambaci, kada ku ko ci abinci da irin waɗannan." 
1Corinthians5:12 Ina ruwana da hukunta waɗanda ba namu ba? Ba waɗanda suke a cikin Ikkilisiya za ku hukunta ba? 
1Corinthians5:13 Allah ne yake hukunta waɗanda ba namu ba. Ku kori mugun nan daga cikinku. 
1Corinthians6:1 In waninku yana da wata ƙara a game da ɗan'uwansa, ashe, zai yi ƙurun kai maganar a gaban marasa adalci, ba a gaban tsarkaka ba?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Ashe, ba ku sani ba, tsarkaka ne za su yi wa duniya shari'a? In kuwa ku ne za ku yi wa duniya shari'a, ashe, ba za ku iya shari'ar ƙananan al'amura ba?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Ba ku sani ba, za mu yi wa mala'iku shari'a, balle al'amuran da suka shafi zaman duniyar nan?" 
1Corinthians6:4 In kuwa kuna da irin waɗannan ƙararraki, don me kuma kuke kai su gaban waɗanda su ba kome ba ne, a game da Ikkilisiya?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Na faɗi wannan ne don ku kunyata. Ashe, wato, ba ko mutum ɗaya mai hikima a cikinku, da zai iya sasanta tsakanin 'yan'uwa?" 
1Corinthians6:6 Amma ɗan'uwa yakan kai ƙarar ɗan'uwa, gaban marasa ba da gaskiya kuma?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Ku yi ƙarar juna ma, ai, hasara ce a gare ku. Ba gara ku haƙura a cuce ku ba? Ku kuma haƙura a zambace ku?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Amma, ga shi, ku da kanku kuna cuta, kuna zamba, har ma 'yan'uwanku kuke yi wa!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Ashe, ba ku sani ba, marasa adalci ba za su sami gādo a cikin Mulkin Allah ba? Kada fa a yaudare ku! Ba fasikai, ko matsafa, ko mazinata, ko masu luɗu da maɗugo," 
1Corinthians6:10 ko ɓarayi, ko makwaɗaita, ko mashaya, ko masu zage-zage, ko mazambata, da za su sami gādo a cikin Mulkin Allah." 
1Corinthians6:11 Waɗansunku ma dā haka suke, amma an wanke ku, an tsarkake ku, an kuma kuɓutar da ku, da sunan Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu, da kuma Ruhun Allahnmu." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Dukan abubuwa halal ne a gare ni,” amma ba dukan abubuwa ne masu amfani ba. “Abu duka halal na a gare ni,” amma ba zan zama bawan kome ba." 
1Corinthians6:13 “Abinci don ciki aka yi shi, ciki kuma don abinci”–Allah kuma zai hallaka duka biyu, wannan da wancan. Jiki kam, ba don fasikanci yake ba, sai dai domin Ubangiji, Ubangiji kuma domin jiki." 
1Corinthians6:14 Allah ya ta da Ubangiji daga matattu, haka mu ma zai ta da mu da ikonsa." 
1Corinthians6:15 Ashe, ba ku sani ba jikinku gaɓoɓin Almasihu ne? Ashe kuma, sai in ɗauki gaɓoɓin Almasihu in mai da su gaɓoɓin karuwa? Faufau!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Ashe, ba ku sani ba, duk wanda ya tara da karuwa, sun zama jiki ɗaya ke nan? Domin a rubuce yake cewa, “Su biyun za su zama jiki ɗaya.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Duk wanda kuwa yake haɗe da Ubangiji, sun zama ɗaya a ruhu ke nan." 
1Corinthians6:18 Ku guji fasikanci. Duk sauran zunubin da mutum yake yi bai shafi jikinsa ba, amma mai yin fasikanci, yana ɗaukar alhalin jikinsa ne." 
1Corinthians6:19 Ashe, ba ku sani ba, jikinku Haikali ne na Ruhu Mai Tsarki wanda yake a zuciyarku, wanda kuka kuma samu a gun Allah? Ai, ku ba mallakar kanku ba ne." 
1Corinthians6:20 Sayenku aka yi da tamani. To, sai ku ɗaukaka Allah da jikinku." 
1Corinthians7:1 To, a yanzu, a game da abin da kuka rubuto, yana da kyau mutum ya zauna ba aure." 
1Corinthians7:2 Amma don gudun fasikanci sai kowane mutum ya kasance da matarsa, kowace mace kuma da mijinta." 
1Corinthians7:3 Miji yă ba matarsa hakkinta na aure, haka kuma matar ga mijinta." 
1Corinthians7:4 Matar kuwa ba ta da iko da jikinta, sai dai mijin, haka kuma mijin ba shi da iko da jikinsa, sai dai matar." 
1Corinthians7:5 Kada ɗayanku yă ƙaurace wa ɗaya, sai ko da yardar juna zuwa wani ɗan lokaci kaza, don ku himmantu ga addu'a, sa'an nan ku sāke haɗuwa, kada Shaiɗan yă zuga ku ta wajen rashin kamewa." 
1Corinthians7:6 Na fadi wannan ne bisa ga shawara, ba bisa ga umarni ba." 
1Corinthians7:7 Da ma a ce kowa kamar ni yake mana! Sai dai kowa da irin baiwar da Allah ya yi masa, wani iri kaza, wani kuma iri kaza." 
1Corinthians7:8 Abin da na gani ga waɗanda ba su yi aure ba, da kuma mata gwauraye, ya kyautu a gare su su zauna ba aure kamar yadda nake." 
1Corinthians7:9 In kuwa ba za su iya kamewa ba, to, sai su yi aure. Ai, gwamma dai a yi aure da sha'awa ta ci rai." 
1Corinthians7:10 Masu aure kuwa ina yi musu umarni, ba kuwa ni ba, Ubangiji ne, cewa kada mace ta rabu da mijinta" 
1Corinthians7:11 (in kuwa ta rabu da shi, sai ta zauna haka ba aure, ko kuwa ta sāke shiryawa da mijinta), miji kuma kada ya saki matarsa." 
1Corinthians7:12 Ga sauran, ni nake faɗa, ba Ubangiji ba, in wani ɗan'uwa yana da mace marar ba da gaskiya, ta kuma yarda su zauna tare, to, kada yă rabu da ita." 
1Corinthians7:13 Mace kuma mai miji marar ba da gaskiya, ya kuwa yarda su zauna tare, to, kada ta rabu da shi." 
1Corinthians7:14 Don miji marar ba da gaskiya, a tsarkake yake a wajen matarsa. Mace marar ba da gaskiya kuma, a tsarkake take a wajen mijinta. In ba haka ba, zai zamana 'ya'yanku ba masu tsarki ba ne, amma ga hakika masu tsarki ne." 
1Corinthians7:15 In kuwa shi, ko ita, marar ba da gaskiya ɗin yana son rabuwa, to, sai su rabu. A wannan hali, ɗan'uwa ko 'yar'uwa mai bi, ba tilas a kansu, domin Allah ya kira mu ga zaman lafiya." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ke mace, ina kika sani ko za ki ceci mijinki? Kai miji, ina ka sani ko za ka ceci matarka?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Sai dai kowa yă yi zaman da Ubangiji ya sa masa, wanda kuma Allah ya kira shi a kai. Haka nake umarni a dukan Ikilisiyoyi." 
1Corinthians7:18 Duk wanda Allah ya kira, wanda dā ma yake da kaciya, to, kada yă nemi zama marar kaciya. Wanda kuwa ya kira yana marar kaciya, to, kada yă nema a yi masa kaciya." 
1Corinthians7:19 Don kaciya da rashin kaciya ba sa hassala kome, sai dai kiyaye umarnin Allah." 
1Corinthians7:20 Kowa yă zauna a maƙamin da Allah ya kiraye shi. 
1Corinthians7:21 In ya kira ka kana bawa, kada ka damu. In kuwa kana iya samun 'yanci, ai, sai ka samu." 
1Corinthians7:22 Wanda aka kiraye shi ga tafarkin Ubangiji yana bawa, ai, 'yantacce ne na Ubangiji. Kuma, wanda aka kira shi yana ɗa, bawa ne na Almasihu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Da tamani aka saye ku. Kada fa ku zama bayin mutane. 
1Corinthians7:24 To, 'yan'uwa, duk halin da aka kira mutum a ciki, sai yă zauna a kai, yana zama tare da Allah." 
1Corinthians7:25 A game da matan da ba su yi aure ba kuwa, ba ni da wani umarnin Ubangiji, amma ina ba da ra'ayina ne a kan ni amintacce ne, bisa ga jinƙan Ubangiji." 
1Corinthians7:26 Na dai ga ya yi kyau mutum yă zauna yadda yake, saboda ƙuncin nan da yake gabatowa." 
1Corinthians7:27 In da igiyar aure a wuyanka, to, kada ka nemi tsinkewa. In kuwa ba igiyar aure a wuyanka, to, kada ka nemi aure." 
1Corinthians7:28 Amma kuwa in ka yi aure, ba ka yi zunubi ba, ko budurwa ma ta yi aure, ba ta yi zunubi ba. Duk da haka dai, duk masu yin aure za su ji jiki, niyyata kuwa in sawwaƙe muku." 
1Corinthians7:29 Abin da nake nufi 'yan'uwa, lokacin da aka ƙayyade ya ƙure. A nan gaba masu mata su zauna kamar ba su da su," 
1Corinthians7:30 masu kuka kamar ba kuka suke yi ba, masu farin ciki ma kamar ba farin ciki suke yi ba, masu saye kuma kamar ba su riƙe da kome," 
1Corinthians7:31 masu moron duniya kuma, kada su ba da ƙarfi ga moronta. Don yayin duniyar nan mai shuɗewa ne." 
1Corinthians7:32 Ina so ku 'yantu daga damuwa. Mutum marar aure yakan tsananta kula da sha'anin Ubangiji, yadda zai faranta wa Ubangiji rai." 
1Corinthians7:33 Mutum mai aure kuwa, yakan tsananta kula da sha'anin duniya, yadda zai faranta wa matarsa rai." 
1Corinthians7:34 Hankalinsa ya rabu biyu ke nan. Mace marar aure, ko budurwa, takan tsananta kula da sha'anin Ubangiji, yadda za ta kasance tsattsarka a jiki, da kuma a rai. Mace mai aure kuwa takan tsananta kula da sha'anin duniya, yadda za ta faranta wa mijinta rai." 
1Corinthians7:35 Na faɗi haka ne, don in taimake ku, ba don in ƙuntata muku ba, sai dai don in kyautata zamanku, da nufin ku himmantu ga bautar Ubangiji ba da raba hankali ba." 
1Corinthians7:36 Ga zancen 'ya budurwa, wadda ta zarce lokacin aure, idan mahaifinta ya ga bai kyauta mata ba, in kuwa hali ya yi, sai yă yi abin da ya nufa, wato, a yi mata aure, bai yi zunubi ba." 
1Corinthians7:37 In kuwa ya zamana ba lalle ne yă yi wa 'yar tasa budurwa aure ba, amma ya tsai da shawara bisa ga yadda ya nufa, ya kuma ƙudura sosai a ransa, a kan tsare ta, to, haka daidai ne." 
1Corinthians7:38 Wato, wanda ya yi wa 'yar tasa budurwa aure, ya yi daidai, amma wanda bai aurar da ita ba, ya fi shi." 
1Corinthians7:39 Igiyar aure tana wuyan mace, muddin mijinta yana da rai. In kuwa mijinta ya mutu, to, tana da dama ta auri wanda take so, amma fa, sai mai bin Ubangiji." 
1Corinthians7:40 Amma a nawa ra'ayi, za ta fi farin ciki, in ta zauna a yadda take. A ganina kuwa ina da Ruhun Allah." 
1Corinthians8:1 To, yanzu a game da abubuwan da aka yanka wa gumaka, mun sani dukanmu muna da ilimi. Ilimi yakan kumbura mutum, ƙauna kuwa takan inganta shi." 
1Corinthians8:2 Duk mai gani ya san wani abu, ai, har a yanzu, bai san yadda ya kamata ya sani ba." 
1Corinthians8:3 In kuwa wani na ƙaunar Allah, to, Allah ya san shi." 
1Corinthians8:4 A game da cin abin da aka yanka wa gumaka kuwa, mun sani, duk duniyar nan gunki yana a matsayin abin da babu ne, da kuma, babu wani Allah sai ɗaya." 
1Corinthians8:5 Ko da yake, akwai waɗanda ake kira alloli a sama ko a ƙasa, don kuwa akwai “alloli” da “iyayengiji” da yawa," 
1Corinthians8:6 duk da haka dai, a gare mu kam, Allah ɗaya ne, wato Uba, wanda dukkan abubuwa suke daga gare shi, wanda mu kuma zamansa muke yi, Ubangiji kuma ɗaya ta gare shi muka kasance." 
1Corinthians8:7 Amma dai ba kowa ne yake da wannan sani ba. Amma waɗansu ta wurin sabawarsu da al'amuran gunki har yanzu, sukan ci naman da suka ɗauka kamar an yanka wa gunki ne. Saboda haka lamirinsu, da yake rarrauna ne, ya ƙazantu." 
1Corinthians8:8 Abinci ba zai ƙare mu a game da Allah ba. In mun ci, ba mu ƙaru ba, in kuma ba mu ci ba, ba mu ragu ba." 
1Corinthians8:9 Sai dai ku lura, kada 'yancin nan naku ya zama abin sa tuntuɓe ga waɗanda ba su tsai da zuciyarsu ba." 
1Corinthians8:10 Amma in wani mutum, wanda yake da rarraunan lamiri, ya gan ka, kai da kake da sani, kana ci a ɗakin gunki, ashe, wannan ba zai ƙarfafa lamirinsa har ya ci abincin da aka miƙa wa gunki ba?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Wato, ta sanin nan naka, sai a rushe rarraunan nan, ɗan'uwa ne kuwa wanda Almasihu ya mutu dominsa!" 
1Corinthians8:12 Ta haka ne kuke yi wa Almasihu laifi, wato ta wurin yi wa 'yan'uwanku laifi, kuna rushe rarraunan lamirinsu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Saboda haka in dai cin nama ya sa ɗan'uwana tuntuɓe, har abada ba zan ƙara cin nama ba, don kada in sa ɗan'uwana tuntuɓe." 
1Corinthians9:1 Ni ba ɗa ba ne? Ba kuma manzo ba ne? Ban ga Yesu Ubangijinmu ba ne? Ku ba aikina ba ne a cikin Ubangiji? 
1Corinthians9:2 Ai, ko waɗansu ba su ɗauke ni a kan manzo ba, lalle ku kam, ni manzo ne a gare ku, domin kuwa ku ne tabbatar manzancina a gaban Ubangiji." 
1Corinthians9:3 Wannan ita ce kariyata ga masu son tuhumata. 
1Corinthians9:4 Ashe, ba mu da iko a ba mu ci da sha?" 
1Corinthians9:5 Ba mu da ikon tafiya da matarmu ta aure mai bi, kamar yadda sauran manzanni, da 'yan'uwan Ubangiji, da kuma Kefas suke yi?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Ko kuwa dai ni da Barnaba ne kawai, ba mu da iko a ɗauke mana aikin ci da kai?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Wa yake yin aikin soja, sa'an nan yă ci da kansa? Wa zai shuka garkar inabi, yă kasa cin 'ya'yan? Wa zai yi kiwon garke, yă kasa shan nonon?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Wato, ina faɗar haka bisa ga ra'ayin mutum kawai ne? Ba haka ma Attaura ta faɗa ba?" 
1Corinthians9:9 Ai, haka yake a rubuce a Shari'ar Musa cewa, “Kada ka sa wa takarkari takunkumi a sa'ad da yake sussuka.” Da shanu ne kawai Allah yake kula?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Ba saboda mu musamman yake magana ba? Hakika saboda mu ne aka rubuta. Ai, ya kamata mai noma yă yi noma da sa zuciya, mai sussuka kuma yă yi sussuka da sa zuciya ga samun rabo daga amfanin gonar." 
1Corinthians9:11 Da yake mun shuka iri na ruhu a zuciyarku, to, wani ƙasaitaccen abu ne, in mun mori amfaninku irin na duniya?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Da yake waɗansu sun mori halaliyarsu a game da ku, ashe ba mu muka fi cancanta ba? Duk da haka ba mu mori wannan halaliya ba, sai dai muna jure wa kome, don ta koƙaƙa kada mu hana bisharar Almasihu yaɗuwa." 
1Corinthians9:13 Ashe, ba ku sani ba, masu hidima a Haikali daga nan suke samun abincinsu? Masu hidimar bagadi kuma, a nan suke samun rabo daga hadayar da aka yanka?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Haka nan kuma Ubangiji ya yi umarni, cewa, ya kamata masu sanar da bishara, a cishe su albarkacin bishara." 
1Corinthians9:15 Amma ni kam, ban mori ko ɗaya daga cikin halaliyan nan ba, ba kuma ina rubuta wannan ne, don a yi mini haka ba. Ai, gara in mutu a kan wani ya banzanta mini fahariyata." 
1Corinthians9:16 Don ko da yake ina yin bishara, ba na fahariya da haka, gama tilas ne a gare ni. Kaitona in ba na yin bishara!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Da da ra'ina nake yi, da sai a biya ni. Amma da yake ba da ra'ina ba ne, an danƙa mini amana ke nan." 
1Corinthians9:18 Ina kuma hakkina? To, ga shi. A duk lokacin da nake yin bishara, sona in yi ta a kyauta, kada in ƙurashe halaliyata a game da bishara." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ko da yake ni ba bawan kowa ba ne, na mai da kaina bawan kowa, domin in rinjayi mutane masu yawa." 
1Corinthians9:20 Ga Yahudawa, sai na zama kamar Bayahude, domin in rinjayi Yahudawa. Ga waɗanda Shari'a take iko da su, sai na zama kamar wanda Shari'a take iko da shi, ko da yake ba Shari'a take iko da ni ba, domin in rinjayi waɗanda Shari'a take iko da su ne." 
1Corinthians9:21 Ga marasa Shari'a kuwa, sai na zama kamar marar Shari'a, ba cewa ba wata shari'ar Allah da take iko da ni ba, a'a, shari'ar Almasihu na iko da ni, domin in rinjayi marasa Shari'a ne." 
1Corinthians9:22 Ga raunana, sai na zama kamar rarrauna domin in rinjayi raunana. Na zama kowane irin abu ga ko waɗanne irin mutane, domin ta ko ƙaƙa in ceci waɗansu." 
1Corinthians9:23 Na yi wannan ne duk saboda bishara, domin in sami rabo a cikin albarkarta." 
1Corinthians9:24 Ashe, ba ku sani ba, a wajen tsere dukan masu gudu suna ƙoƙarin tsere wa juna, amma ɗaya ne kaɗai yake samun kyautar ci? To, sai ku yi ta gudu haka nan, don ku ci." 
1Corinthians9:25 Duk masu wasan gasa, sukan hori kansu ta kowane hali. Su kam, suna yin haka ne, don su sami lada mai lalacewa, mu kuwa marar lalacewa." 
1Corinthians9:26 To, ni ba gudu nake yi ba wurin zuwa ba, dambena kuwa ba naushin iska nake yi ba." 
1Corinthians9:27 Amma ina azabta jikina ne, don in bautar da shi, kada bayan da na yi wa waɗansu wa'azi, ni da kaina a yar da ni." 
1Corinthians10:1 To, ina so ku sani, 'yan'uwa, dukan kakanninmu an kāre su ne a ƙarƙashin gajimare, dukansu kuma sun ratsa ta cikin bahar." 
1Corinthians10:2 Dukansu kuwa an yi musu baftisma ga bin Musa a cikin gajimaren, da kuma bahar ɗin." 
1Corinthians10:3 Duka kuwa sun ci abincin nan na ruhu," 
1Corinthians10:4 duk kuma sun sha ruwan nan na ruhu. Domin sun sha ruwa daga Dutsen nan na ruhu, wanda ya yi tafiya tare da su. Dutsen nan kuwa Almasihu ne." 
1Corinthians10:5 Duk da haka Allah bai yi murna da yawancinsu ba, har aka karkashe su a jeji." 
1Corinthians10:6 To, ai, waɗannan abubuwa gargaɗi ne a gare mu, kada mu yi marmarin mugayen abubuwa, kamar yadda suka yi." 
1Corinthians10:7 Kada fa ku zama matsafa kamar yadda waɗansunsu suke. A rubuce yake cewa, “Jama'a sun zauna garin ci da sha, suka kuma tashi suka yi ta rawa.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Kada fa mu yi fasikanci yadda waɗansunsu suka yi, har mutum dubu ashirin da uku suka zuba a rana ɗaya tak." 
1Corinthians10:9 Kada kuma mu gwada Ubangiji yadda waɗansu suka yi, har macizai suka hallaka su." 
1Corinthians10:10 Kada kuma mu yi gunaguni yadda waɗansu suka yi, har mai hallakarwa ya hallaka su." 
1Corinthians10:11 To, duk wannan ya same su ne a kan misali, an kuma rubuta shi ne don a gargaɗe mu, mu da ƙarshen zamani ya zo mana." 
1Corinthians10:12 Don haka duk wanda yake tsammani ya kahu, ya mai da hankali kada ya fāɗi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Ba wani gwajin da ya taɓa samunku, wanda ba a saba yi wa ɗan adam ba. Allah mai alkawari ne, ba zai kuwa yarda a gwada ku fin ƙarfinku ba, amma a game da gwajin sai ya ba da mafita, yadda za ku iya jure shi." 
1Corinthians10:14 Saboda haka, ya ƙaunatattuna, ku guji bautar gumaka." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ina magana da ku a kan ku mahankalta ne fa, ku duba da kanku ku ga abin da nake faɗa." 
1Corinthians10:16 Ƙoƙon nan na yin godiya, wanda muke gode wa Allah saboda shi, ashe, ba tarayya ne ga jinin Almasihu ba? Gurasar nan da muke gutsuttsurawa kuma, ashe, ba tarayya ce ga jikin Almasihu ba?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Da yake gurasar nan ɗaya ce, ashe kuwa, mu da muke da yawa jiki ɗaya ne, gama mu duk gurasa ɗaya muke ci." 
1Corinthians10:18 Ku dubi ɗabi'ar Isra'ila. Ashe, waɗanda suke ci daga hadayu, ba tarayya suke yi da bagadin hadaya ba?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Me nake nufi ke nan? Abin da aka yanka wa gumakan ne ainihin wani abu, ko kuwa gunkin ne ainihin wani abu?" 
1Corinthians10:20 A'a! Na nuna ne kawai cewa abin da al'ummai suke yankawa, ga aljannu suke yanka wa, ba Allah ba. Ba na fa so ku zama abokan tarayya da aljannu." 
1Corinthians10:21 Ba dama ku sha a ƙoƙon Ubangiji, ku kuma sha a na aljannu. Ba dama ku ci abinci a teburin Ubangiji, ku kuma ci a na aljannu." 
1Corinthians10:22 Ashe, har mā tsokani Ubangiji ya yi kishi? Mun fi shi ƙarfi ne?" 
1Corinthians10:23 “Dukan abubuwa halal ne,” amma ba dukan abubuwa ne masu amfani ba. “Dukan abubuwa halal ne,” amma ba dukan abubuwa ne suke ingantawa ba." 
1Corinthians10:24 Kada kowa ya nemi ya kyautata wa kansa, sai dai ya kyautata wa ɗan'uwansa." 
1Corinthians10:25 Ku ci kowane irin abu da ake sayarwa a mahauta, ba tare da tambaya ba saboda lamiri." 
1Corinthians10:26 Don an rubuta, “Duniya ta Ubangiji ce, da duk abin da yake cikinta.”" 
1Corinthians10:27 In wani a cikin marasa ba da gaskiya ya kira ku cin abinci, kuka kuwa yarda ku tafi, sai ku ci duk irin da aka sa a gabanku, ba tare da tambaya ba saboda lamiri." 
1Corinthians10:28 In kuwa wani ya ce muku, “An yanka wannan saboda gunki ne fa,” to, kada ku ci, saboda duban mutuncin wannan mai gaya muku, da kuma saboda lamiri," 
1Corinthians10:29 nasa lamiri fa na ce, ba naka ba. Don me fa lamirin wani zai soki 'yancina?" 
1Corinthians10:30 In na yi godiya ga Allah a kan abincina, saboda me za a zarge ni a kan abin da na ci da godiya ga Allah?" 
1Corinthians10:31 To, duk abin da kuke yi, ko ci, ko sha, ku yi kome saboda ɗaukakar Allah." 
1Corinthians10:32 Kada ku zama abin tuntuɓe ga Yahudawa ko al'ummai ko ikkilisiyar Allah," 
1Corinthians10:33 kamar dai yadda nake ƙoƙarin kyautata wa dukan mutane a cikin duk abin da nake yi, ba nema wa kaina amfani nake yi ba, sai dai in amfani mutane da yawa, don su sami ceto." 
1Corinthians11:1 Ku yi koyi da ni kamar yadda nake koyi da Almasihu. 
1Corinthians11:2 Ina yaba muku ne don kuna tunawa da ni a cikin kowace harka, kuna kuma riƙe ka'idodin nan da kyau, daidai yadda na ba ku." 
1Corinthians11:3 Amma fa ina so ku fahimci cewa, shugaban kowane mutum Almasihu ne, shugaban kowace mace kuwa mijinta ne, shugaban Almasihu kuma Allah ne." 
1Corinthians11:4 Duk mutumin da ya yi addu'a ko ya yi annabci kansa a rufe, ya wulakanta shugabansa ke nan." 
1Corinthians11:5 Amma duk matar da ta yi addu'a, ko ta yi annabci da kanta a buɗe, ta wulakanta shugabanta ke nan, duk ɗaya ne da an aske kanta ma." 
1Corinthians11:6 In mace ta ƙi rufe kanta, to, sai ta sausaye gashinta. In kuwa abin kunya ne a yi wa mace sausaye ko kundumi, to, sai ta rufe kanta." 
1Corinthians11:7 Namiji kam, bai kamata yă rufe kansa ba, tun da yake shi kamannin Allah ne, abin alfahari ga Allah kuma. Amma mace abar taƙamar namiji ce." 
1Corinthians11:8 (Don kuwa namiji ba daga jikin mace yake ba, amma matar daga jikin namiji take." 
1Corinthians11:9 Ba a kuma halicci namiji don mace ba, sai dai mace don namiji.)" 
1Corinthians11:10 Shi ya sa ya kamata mace ta rufe kanta, wato, alamar ikon namiji, saboda mala'iku." 
1Corinthians11:11 Duk da haka, a cikin Ubangiji, mace ba a rabe take da namiji ba, haka kuma namiji ba a rabe yake da mace ba." 
1Corinthians11:12 Wato, kamar yadda mace take daga namiji, haka namiji kuma haihuwar mace ne. Amma dukkan abubuwa daga Allah suke." 
1Corinthians11:13 Ku kanku ku duba fa ku gani. Ya dace da mace ke nan ta yi addu'a ga Allah da kanta a buɗe? 
1Corinthians11:14 Ashe, ko ɗabi'a ma ba ta nuna muku cewa namiji ya yi gizo, abin kunya ne ba?" 
1Corinthians11:15 In kuwa mace tana da gashi, ba alfarmarta ce ba? Gama don rufin kai ne aka yi mata gashin." 
1Corinthians11:16 In kuwa wani yana da niyyar gardama, to, mu dai ba mu san wata al'ada ba, ikilisiyoyin Allah kuma haka." 
1Corinthians11:17 A game da umarnin nan kuwa, ban yaba muku ba, taruwarku ba ta kirki ba ce, ta rashin kirki ce." 
1Corinthians11:18 To, da farko dai sa'ad da kuka taru, taron ikkilisiya, na ji har akwai rarrabuwa a tsakaninku, har na fara yarda da zancen." 
1Corinthians11:19 Don lalle ne a sami tsattsaguwa a tsakaninku, don a iya rarrabewa da waɗanda suke amintattu a cikinku." 
1Corinthians11:20 Ashe kuwa, in kun taru gu ɗaya, ba jibin Ubangiji kuke ci ba!" 
1Corinthians11:21 Domin a wajen cin abinci, kowa yakan dukufa a kan akushinsa, ga wani yana jin yunwa, ga wani kuwa ya sha ya bugu." 
1Corinthians11:22 A! Ba ku da gidajen da za ku ci ku sha a ciki ne? Ko kuwa kuna raina Ikkilisiyar Allah ne, kuna kuma muzanta waɗanda ba su da kome? To, me zan ce muku? Yaba muku zan yi a kan wannan matsala? A'a, ba zan yaba muku ba." 
1Corinthians11:23 Abin nan kuwa da na karɓa a gun Ubangiji, shi ne na ba ku, cewa Ubangiji Yesu, a daren da aka bashe shi, ya ɗauki gurasa," 
1Corinthians11:24 bayan da ya yi godiya ga Allah kuma, sai ya gutsuttsura, ya ce, “Wannan jikina ne, wanda yake saboda ku. Ku riƙa yin haka domin tunawa da ni.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Haka kuma bayan jibin, sai ya ɗauki ƙoƙo, ya ce, “Ƙoƙon nan na Sabon Alkawari ne, da aka tabbatar da shi da jinina. Ku yi haka duk a sa'ad da kuke sha, domin tunawa da ni.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Wato, duk sa'ad da kuke cin gurasar nan, kuke kuma sha a ƙoƙon nan, kuma ayyana mutuwar Ubangiji ke nan, har sai ya dawo." 
1Corinthians11:27 Saboda haka duk wanda ya ci gurasar nan, ko ya sha a ƙoƙon nan na Ubangiji da rashin cancanta, ya yi laifin wulakanta jikin Ubangiji da jininsa ke nan." 
1Corinthians11:28 Sai dai kowa ya auna kansa, sa'an nan ya ci gurasar, ya kuma sha a ƙoƙon." 
1Corinthians11:29 Kowa ya ci, ya kuma sha, ba tare da faɗaka da jikin Ubangiji ba, ya jawo wa kansa hukunci ke nan, ta wurin ci da sha da ya yi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Shi ya sa da yawa daga cikinku suke da rashin lafiya da rashin ƙarfi, har ma waɗansu da dama suka yi barci." 
1Corinthians11:31 Amma in da za mu auna kanmu sosai, da ba za a hukunta mu ba." 
1Corinthians11:32 In kuwa Ubangiji ne yake hukunta mu, to, muna horuwa ke nan, don kada a yanke mana hukunci tare da sauran duniya." 
1Corinthians11:33 Saboda haka, ya 'yan'uwana, in kuka taru don cin abinci, sai ku jiraci juna." 
1Corinthians11:34 In kuwa wani yana jin yunwa, sai yă ci a gida, kada yă zamana taronku ya jawo muku hukunci. Batun sauran abubuwa kuwa, zan ba da umarni a kai sa'ad da na zo." 
1Corinthians12:1 A yanzu kuma 'yan'uwa, a game da baye-baye na ruhu, ba na so ku rasa sani." 
1Corinthians12:2 Kun sani fa a sa'ad da kuke bin al'ummai, an juyar da ku ga bin gumakan nan marasa baki yadda aka ga dama." 
1Corinthians12:3 Don haka nake sanar da ku, cewa ba mai magana ta wurin ikon Ruhun Allah sa'an nan ya ce, “Yesu la'ananne ne!” Haka kuma ba mai iya cewa, “Yesu Ubangiji ne,” sai ta wurin ikon Ruhu Mai Tsarki." 
1Corinthians12:4 To, akwai baiwa iri iri, amma Ruhu ɗaya ne." 
1Corinthians12:5 Akwai fanni iri iri na ibada, amma Ubangiji ɗaya ne." 
1Corinthians12:6 Akwai kuma aiki iri iri, amma Allah ɗaya yake iza kowa ga yin kowannensu." 
1Corinthians12:7 An yi wa kowanne baiwa da wani buɗi na Ruhu, don kyautata wa duka." 
1Corinthians12:8 Wani an yi masa baiwa da koyar da hikima ta wurin Ruhu, wani kuma da koyar da sani ta wurin wannan Ruhu." 
1Corinthians12:9 Wani kuwa an yi masa baiwa da bangaskiya ta wurin Ruhun nan, wani kuma baiwar warkarwa ta wurin Ruhun nan," 
1Corinthians12:10 wani kuma yin mu'ujizai, wani kuma annabci, wani kuma baiwar rarrabe ruhu da aljani, wani kuma iya harshe iri iri, wani kuma fassara harsuna." 
1Corinthians12:11 Dukan waɗannan Ruhu ɗaya ne da yake iza su, yake kuma rarraba wa ko wannensu yadda ya nufa." 
1Corinthians12:12 Wato, kamar yadda jiki yake guda, yake kuma da gaɓoɓi da yawa su gaɓoɓin kuwa ko da yake suna da yawa, jiki guda ne, to, haka ga Almasihu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Dukanmu an yi mana baftisma ta wurin Ruhu guda, mu zama jiki guda, Yahudawa ko al'ummai, bayi ko 'ya'ya, dukanmu kuwa an shayar da mu Ruhu guda." 
1Corinthians12:14 Jiki ba gaba ɗaya ba ne, gaɓoɓi ne da yawa." 
1Corinthians12:15 Da ƙafa za ta ce, “Da yake ni ba hannu ba ce, ai, ni ba gaɓar jiki ba ce,” faɗar haka ba za ta raba ta da zama gaɓar jikin ba." 
1Corinthians12:16 Da kuma kunne zai ce, “Da yake ni ba ido ba ne, ai, ni ba gaɓar jiki ba ne,” faɗar haka ba za ta raba shi da zama gaɓar jikin ba." 
1Corinthians12:17 Da dukan jiki ido ne, da me za a ji? Da dukan jiki kunne ne, da me za a sansana?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Amma ga shi, Allah ya shirya gaɓoɓin jiki, kowaccensu yadda ya nufa." 
1Corinthians12:19 Da dukan jikin gaɓa ɗaya ne, da ina sauran jikin?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Amma ga shi, akwai gaɓoɓi da yawa, jiki kuwa ɗaya." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ba dama ido yă ce wa hannu, “Ba ruwana da kai,” ko kuwa kai yă ce wa ƙafafu, “Ba ruwana da ku.”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Ba haka yake ba, sai ma gaɓoɓin da ake gani kamar raunana, su ne wajibi," 
1Corinthians12:23 gaɓoɓin jiki kuma da ake gani kamar sun kasa sauran daraja, mukan fi ba su martaba. Ta haka gaɓoɓinmu marasa kyan gani, akan ƙara kyautata ganinsu." 
1Corinthians12:24 Gaɓoɓinmu masu kyan gani kuwa ba sai an yi musu kome ba. Amma Allah ya harhaɗa jiki, yana ba da mafificiyar martaba ga ƙasƙantacciyar gaɓa," 
1Corinthians12:25 kada rashin haɗa kai ya kasance ga jiki, sai dai gaɓoɓin su kula da juna, kula iri ɗaya." 
1Corinthians12:26 Ta haka, in wata gaɓa ta ji ciwo, duk sai su ji ciwo tare, in kuwa an yabi wata, duk sai su yi farin ciki tare." 
1Corinthians12:27 To, ku jikin Almasihu ne, kowannenku kuwa gaɓarsa ne." 
1Corinthians12:28 A cikin ikkilisiya, Allah ya sa waɗansu su zama, na farko manzanni, na biyu annabawa, na uku masu koyarwa, sa'an nan sai masu yin mu'ujizai, sai masu baiwar warkarwa, da mataimaka, da masu tafiyar da Ikkilisiya, da kuma masu magana da harsuna iri iri." 
1Corinthians12:29 Shin, duka manzanni ne? Ko duka annabawa ne? Ko duk masu koyarwa ne? Su duka masu yin mu'ujizai ne?" 
1Corinthians12:30 Duka ne suke da baiwar warkarwa? Duka ne suke magana da waɗansu harsuna? Ko kuwa duka ne suke fassara? 
1Corinthians12:31 Sai dai ku himmantu ga neman mafafitan bayebaye. Har ma zan nuna muku wata hanya mafificiya nesa. 
1Corinthians13:1 Ko da zan yi magana da harsunan mutane, har da na mala'iku, amma ya zamana ba ni da ƙauna, na zama ƙararrawa mai yawan ƙara ke nan, ko kuwa kuge mai amo." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ko da zan yi annabci, ina kuma fahimtar dukkan asiri, da dukkan ilimi, ko da kuma ina da matuƙar bangaskiya, har yadda zan iya kawar da duwatsu, muddin ba ni da ƙauna, to, ni ba kome ba ne." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ko da zan sadaukar da duk abin da na mallaka, in kuma ba da jikina a ƙone, in har ba ni da ƙauna, to, ban amfana da kome ba." 
1Corinthians13:4 Ƙauna tana sa haƙuri da kirki. Ƙauna ba ta sa kishi, ba ta yin kumbura." 
1Corinthians13:5 Ƙauna ba ta sa ɗaga kai ko rashin kārā, ƙauna ba ta sa sonkai, ba ta jin tsokana, ba ta riƙo." 
1Corinthians13:6 Ƙauna ba ta sa yin farin ciki da mugunta, sai dai da gaskiya." 
1Corinthians13:7 Ƙauna tana sa daurewa a cikin kowane hali, da bangaskiya a cikin kowane hali, haka kuma sa zuciya a cikin kowane hali, da jimiri a cikin kowane hali." 
1Corinthians13:8 Ƙauna ba ta ƙarewa har abada. Annabci zai shuɗe, harsuna za su ɓace, ilimi kuma zai shafe." 
1Corinthians13:9 Ai, hakika iliminmu ba cikakke ba ne, annabcinmu kuma ba cikakke ba ne." 
1Corinthians13:10 Sa'ad da kuwa cikakken ya zo, sai ɗan kiman nan yă shuɗe." 
1Corinthians13:11 Sa'ad da nake yaro, nakan yi magana irin ta ƙuruciya, nakan yi tunani irin na ƙuruciya, nakan ba da hujjojina irin na ƙuruciya. Da na isa mutum kuwa, sai na bar halin ƙuruciya." 
1Corinthians13:12 Gama yanzu kamar a madubi muke gani duhu duhu, a ranar nan kuwa za mu gani ido da ido. A yanzu sanina sama sama ne, a ranar nan kuwa zan fahimta sosai, kamar yadda aka fahimce ni sosai." 
1Corinthians13:13 To, a yanzu abubuwan nan uku sun tabbata, bangaskiya, da bege, da kuma ƙauna, amma duk mafi girma a cikinsu ita ce ƙauna." 
1Corinthians14:1 Ku nace wa ƙauna, ku kuma himmantu ga neman bayebaye na ruhu, tun ba ma na yin annabci ba." 
1Corinthians14:2 Duk wanda yake magana da wani harshe, ba da mutane yake magana ba, da Allah yake yi, ba kuwa wanda yake fahimtarsa, domin asirtattun al'amura yake ambato ta wurin Ruhu." 
1Corinthians14:3 Wanda kuwa yake yin annabci, mutane yake yi wa magana domin yă inganta su, ya ƙarfafa su, yă ta'azantar da su." 
1Corinthians14:4 Duk wanda yake magana da wani harshe, kansa yake ingantawa. Mai yin annabci kuwa, ikkilisiya yake ingantawa." 
1Corinthians14:5 To, ina so dukanku ku yi magana da waɗansu harsuna dabam, amma na fi so ku yi annabci. Wanda yake yin annabci, ya fi mai magana da waɗansu harsuna, sai ko in wani ya yi masa fassara, domin a inganta ikkilisiya." 
1Corinthians14:6 To, 'yan'uwa, in na zo muku ina magana da waɗansu harsuna, amfanin me zan yi muku in ban zo muku da wani bayani, ko ilimi, ko annabci, ko koyar da Maganar Allah ba?" 
1Corinthians14:7 In abubuwan nan marasa rai, kamar su sarewa da molo, muryarsu ba ta fita sosai ba, yaya wani zai san abin da ake busawa ko kaɗawa?" 
1Corinthians14:8 In ba a busa ƙaho sosai ba, wa zai yi shirin yaƙi?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Haka ma yake a gare ku. In kun yi magana da wani harshe, wanda ba a fahimta ba, yaya wani zai san abin da ake faɗa? Kun yi magana a banza ke nan!" 
1Corinthians14:10 Hakika akwai harsuna iri iri a duniya, ba kuwa wanda ba shi da ma'ana." 
1Corinthians14:11 In kuwa ba na jin harshen, sai in zama bare ga mai maganar, mai maganar kuma ya zama bare a gare ni." 
1Corinthians14:12 Haka ma yake a gare ku. Tun da yake kun ɗokanta da samun bayebaye na Ruhu, sai ku himmantu ku ba da ƙarfinku ga inganta ikkilisiya." 
1Corinthians14:13 Saboda haka duk mai magana da wani harshe, sai yă yi addu'a a yi masa baiwar fassara." 
1Corinthians14:14 In na yi addu'a da wani harshe, ruhuna ne yake addu'a, amma tunanina bai amfana kowa ba." 
1Corinthians14:15 To, ƙaƙa ke nan? Zan yi addu'a da ruhuna, zan kuma yi a game da tunanina. Zan yi waƙar yabon Allah da ruhuna, zan yi a game da tunanina." 
1Corinthians14:16 In ba haka ba, in ka gode wa Allah da ruhu kawai, ta yaya wanda yake jahili zai ce, “Amin,” a kan godiyar da kake yi, in bai san abin da kake faɗa ba?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Ko da yake ka gode wa Allah sosai, ai, ɗan'uwanka bai ƙaru da kome ba." 
1Corinthians14:18 Na gode Allah ina magana da waɗansu harsuna fiye da ku duka. 
1Corinthians14:19 Duk da haka dai a taron ikkilisiya na gwammace in faɗi kalmomi biyar a game da tunanina, domin in karantar da waɗansu, da in faɗi kalmomi dubu goma da wani harshe." 
1Corinthians14:20 Ya ku 'yan'uwa, kada ku yi hankali irin na yara, sai dai a wajen mugunta, ku yi halin jarirai, amma a wajen hankali ku yi dattako." 
1Corinthians14:21 A rubuce yake a cikin littattafai masu tsarki cewa, “Zan yi magana da jama'an nan ta wurin mutane masu baƙin harsuna, da kuma ta harshen baƙi, duk da haka kuwa ba za su saurare ni ba, in ji Ubangiji.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Wato, ashe, harsuna a kan alamu suke, ba ga masu ba da gaskiya ba, sai dai ga marasa ba da gaskiya. Annabci kuwa domin masu ba da gaskiya ne, ba don marasa ba da gaskiya ba." 
1Corinthians14:23 Saboda haka, in dukan ikkilisiya ta taru, kowa kuma yana magana da wani harshe dabam, waɗansu jahilai kuma ko marasa ba da gaskiya suka shigo, ashe, ba sai su ce kun ruɗe ba?" 
1Corinthians14:24 In kuwa kowa yana yin annabci, wani kuma marar ba da gaskiya ko jahili ya shigo, sai maganar kowa ta ratsa shi, ya kamu a ransa ta maganar kowa," 
1Corinthians14:25 asiran zuciyarsa kuma su tonu. Ta haka sai ya fāɗi ya yi wa Allah sujada, yana cewa lalle Allah na cikinku." 
1Corinthians14:26 To, ƙaƙa abin yake ne, 'yan'uwa? Duk sa'ad da kuka taru, wani yakan yi waƙar yabon Allah, wani kuma koyar da Maganar Allah, wani bayani, wani yin magana da wani harshe, wani kuma fassara. Sai dai a yi kome don ingantawa." 
1Corinthians14:27 In kuwa waɗansu za su yi magana da wani harshe, kada su fi mutum biyu, matuƙa uku, su ma kuwa bi da bi, wani kuma yă yi fassara." 
1Corinthians14:28 In kuwa ba mai fassara, sai kowannensu yă yi shiru a cikin taron Ikkilisiya, yă yi wa Allah magana a zuci." 
1Corinthians14:29 Masu yin annabci kuma, sai dai biyu ko uku su yi magana, saura kuwa su auna maganar." 
1Corinthians14:30 In kuwa an yi wa wani wanda yake zaune wani bayani, sai na farkon nan mai magana yă yi shiru." 
1Corinthians14:31 Dukanku kuna iya yin annabci da ɗaya ɗaya, har kowa yă koya, yă koma sami ƙarfafawa." 
1Corinthians14:32 Annabawa suna sarrafa ruhohinsu na annabci," 
1Corinthians14:33 domin Allah ba Allahn ruɗu ba ne, na salama ne. Haka yake kuwa a duk ikilisyoyin tsarkaka." 
1Corinthians14:34 Sai mata su yi shiru a cikin taron ikkilisiya, don ba a ba su izinin yin magana ba, sai dai su bi, kamar dai yadda Attaura ma ta ce." 
1Corinthians14:35 In akwai wani abin da suke so su sani, to, sai su tambayi mazansu a gida, don abin kunya ne mace ta yi magana a cikin taron ikkilisiya." 
1Corinthians14:36 A kanku ne maganar Allah ta fara, ko kuwa a gare ku kaɗai ta isa?" 
1Corinthians14:37 In wani yana zato shi annabi ne, ko kuwa mai wata baiwa ta ruhu, to, sai yă fahimta, abin nan da nake rubuto muku umarni ne na Ubangiji." 
1Corinthians14:38 In kuwa wani ya ƙi kula da wannan, shi ma sai a ƙi kula da shi." 
1Corinthians14:39 Saboda haka, 'yan'uwa, sai ku himmantu ga samun baiwar yin annabci, kada kuma ku hana yin magana da waɗansu harsuna." 
1Corinthians14:40 Sai dai a yi kome ta hanyar da ta dace, a shirye kuma." 
1Corinthians15:1 A yanzu kuma, 'yan'uwa, zan tuna muku da bisharar da na sanar da ku, wadda kuka karɓa, wadda kuke bi," 
1Corinthians15:2 wadda kuma ake cetonku da ita, muddin kun riƙe maganar da na sanar da ku da kyau, in ba sama sama ne kuka gaskata ba." 
1Corinthians15:3 Jawabi mafi muhimmanci da na sanar da ku, shi ne wanda na karɓo, cewa, Almasihu ya mutu domin zunubanmu, kamar yadda Littattafai suka faɗa," 
1Corinthians15:4 cewa an binne shi, an ta da shi a rana ta uku, kamar yadda Littattafai suka faɗa," 
1Corinthians15:5 ya kuma bayyana ga Kefas, sa'an nan ga sha biyun." 
1Corinthians15:6 Sa'an nan ya bayyana ga 'yan'uwa fiye da ɗari biyar a lokaci guda, yawancinsu kuwa suna nan har zuwa yanzu, amma waɗansu sun yi barci." 
1Corinthians15:7 Sa'an nan ya bayyana ga Yakubu, sa'an nan ga dukan manzanni." 
1Corinthians15:8 Daga ƙarshen duka ya bayyana a gare ni, ni ma da nake kasasshe, marar cancanta." 
1Corinthians15:9 Don ni ne mafi ƙanƙanta a cikin manzanni, ban ma isa a ce da ni manzo ba, saboda na tsananta wa Ikkilisiyar Allah." 
1Corinthians15:10 Amma saboda alherin Allah na zama yadda nake, alherin da ya yi mini kuwa ba a banza yake ba. Har ma na fi kowannensu aiki, ba kuwa ni ba, alherin Allah ne da yake zuciyata." 
1Corinthians15:11 To, ko ni ne dai, ko kuma su ne, haka muke wa'azi, ta haka kuma kuka gaskata." 
1Corinthians15:12 To, da yake ana wa'azin Almasihu a kan an tashe shi daga matattu, ƙaƙa waɗansunku suke cewa, babu tashin matattu?" 
1Corinthians15:13 In dai babu tashin matattu, ashe, ba a ta da Almasihu ba ke nan." 
1Corinthians15:14 In kuwa ba a ta da Almasihu ba, to, ashe, wa'azinmu a banza ne, bangaskiyarku kuma banza ce." 
1Corinthians15:15 Sai ma ya zamana mun yi wa Allah shaidar zur ke nan, domin mun shaida Allah, cewa ya ta da Almasihu, wanda kuwa bai tasar ba, in da gaskiya ne ba a ta da matattu." 
1Corinthians15:16 Don kuwa in ba a ta da matattu, ashe, Almasihu ma ba a ta da shi ba ke nan." 
1Corinthians15:17 In kuwa ba a ta da Almasihu ba, ashe, bangaskiyarku banza ce, har yanzu kuma kuna tare da zunubanku." 
1Corinthians15:18 Ashe, waɗanda suka yi barci a kan su na Almasihu, sun hallaka ke nan." 
1Corinthians15:19 Da begenmu ga Almasihu domin wannan rai ne kaɗai, ai, da mun fi kowa zama abin tausayi." 
1Corinthians15:20 Amma ga hakika an ta da Almasihu daga matattu, shi ne ma nunan fari na waɗanda suka yi barci." 
1Corinthians15:21 Tun da yake mutuwa ta wurin mutum ta faru, haka kuma tashin matattu ta wurin Mutum yake." 
1Corinthians15:22 Kamar yadda duk ake mutuwa saboda Adamu, haka duk za a rayar da su saboda Almasihu." 
1Corinthians15:23 Amma kowanne bi da bi, Almasihu ne nunan fari, sa'an nan a ranar komowarsa, waɗanda suke na Almasihu." 
1Corinthians15:24 Sa'an nan sai ƙarshen, sa'ad da zai mayar wa Allah Uba mulki, bayan ya shafe dukkan sarauta da mulki da iko." 
1Corinthians15:25 Domin kuwa lalle ne ya yi mulki, har ya take dukkan maƙiyansa." 
1Corinthians15:26 Magabciyar ƙarshe da za a shafe, ita ce mutuwa." 
1Corinthians15:27 “Gama Allah ya sarayar da kome a ƙarƙashin ikonsa.” Amma da aka ce, “An sarayar da kome karƙashin ikonsa” a fili yake shi wannan da ya sarayar da kome a ƙarƙashin ikonsa ɗin, a keɓe yake." 
1Corinthians15:28 Sa'ad da kuma aka sarayar da kome a ƙarƙashin ikonsa ɗin, sa'an nan ne Ɗan da kansa shi ma zai sarayar da kansa ga wannan da ya sarayar da kome a ƙarƙashin ikonsa, domin Allah yă tabbata shi ne kome da kome." 
1Corinthians15:29 In ba haka ba, mene ne nufin waɗanda ake yi wa baftisma saboda matattu? In ba a ta da matattu sam, don me ake yi wa waɗansu baftisma saboda su?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Don me kuma nake a cikin hatsari a kowane lokaci? 
1Corinthians15:31 Na hakikance 'yan'uwa, saboda taƙama da ku da nake yi a cikin Almasihu Yesu Ubangijinmu, a kowace rana sai na sallama raina ga mutuwa!" 
1Corinthians15:32 Idan bisa ga ra'ayin mutum ne, na yi kokawa da namomin jeji a Afisa, mece ce ribata in dai har ba a ta da matattu? “Ba sai mu yi ta ci da sha ba, da yake gobe za mu mutu?”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Kada fa a yaudare ku! “Zama da mugaye yakan ɓata halayen kirki.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Ku farka daga magagi, ku kama aikin adalci, ku daina yin zunubi. Waɗansu kam, ba su da sanin Allah. Na faɗi wannan ne don ku kunyata." 
1Corinthians15:35 Watakila wani zai yi tambaya, “Ta yaya ake ta da matattu? Da wace irin kama kuma suke fitowa?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Kai, marar azanci! Abin da ka shuka, ai, ba zai tsiro ba sai ya mutu." 
1Corinthians15:37 Abin da ka shuka kuma, ba shi ne ainihin abin da zai kasance ba, ƙwaya ce ƙawai, ko ta alkama ce, ko kuma, wata iri dabam." 
1Corinthians15:38 Amma Allah yakan ba ta kama, yadda ya nufa, kowace ƙwaya da irin tata kama." 
1Corinthians15:39 Don ba dukan tsoka ce iri ɗaya ba, mutane da irin tasu, dabbobi ma da irin tasu, tsuntsaye da irin tasu, kifaye kuma da irin tasu." 
1Corinthians15:40 Akwai halitta irin ta Sama, akwai kuma irin ta ƙasa. Amma ɗaukakar irin ta Sama dabam, ɗaukakar irin ta ƙasa kuma dabam." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ɗaukakar rana dabam, ta wata dabam, ta taurari kuma dabam. Wani tauraro kuwa yakan bambanta da wani a wajen ɗaukaka." 
1Corinthians15:42 Haka kuma yake ga tashin matattu. Akan shuka su da halin ruɓa, akan kuma ta da su da halin rashin ruɓa." 
1Corinthians15:43 Akan shuka da wulakanci, akan tasa da ɗaukaka, akan shuka da rashin ƙarfi, akan tasa da ƙarfi." 
1Corinthians15:44 Akan shuka da jikin mutuntaka, akan tasa da jiki na ruhu. Da yake akwai jiki na mutuntaka, lalle kuma akwai jiki na ruhu." 
1Corinthians15:45 Haka kuma yake a rubuce, “Mutumin farko, Adamu, ya zama rayayyen taliki,” Adamun ƙarshe kuwa Ruhu ne mai rayarwa." 
1Corinthians15:46 Amma ba shi na Ruhun nan ne ya fara bayyana ba, na mutuntaka ne, daga baya kuma sai na Ruhu." 
1Corinthians15:47 Mutumin farko daga ƙasa yake, na turɓaya ne. Na biyun kuwa daga Sama yake." 
1Corinthians15:48 Kamar yadda shi na turɓayar nan yake, haka kuma waɗanda suke na turɓaya suke. Kamar yadda shi na Saman nan yake, haka kuma waɗanda suke na Sama suke." 
1Corinthians15:49 Kamar yadda muka ɗauki siffar na turɓayar nan, haka kuma za mu ɗauki siffar na Saman nan." 
1Corinthians15:50 Ina dai gaya muku wannan 'yan'uwa, ba shi yiwuwa jiki mai tsoka da jini ya sami gādo a Mulkin Allah, haka kuma mai ruɓa ba ya gādon marar ruɓa." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ga shi, zan sanar da ku wani asiri! Ba dukanmu ne za mu yi barci ba, amma dukanmu za a sauya kamanninmu," 
1Corinthians15:52 farat ɗaya da ƙyiftawar ido, da jin busar ƙaho na ƙarshe, domin za a busa ƙaho, za a kuma ta da matattu da halin rashin ruɓa, za a kuma sauya kamanninmu." 
1Corinthians15:53 Domin lalle ne, marar ruɓa ya maye mai ruɓar nan, marar mutuwa kuma ya maye mai mutuwar nan." 
1Corinthians15:54 Sa'ad da kuma marar ruɓa ya maye mai ruɓar nan, marar mutuwa kuma ya maye mai mutuwar nan, a sa'an nan ne fa maganar nan da take a rubuce za a cika ta, cewa, “An shafe mutuwa da aka ci nasararta.”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Ke mutuwa, ina nasararki? Ke mutuwa, ina ƙarinki?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Ai, zunubi shi ne ƙarin mutuwa, Shari'a kuwa ita ce sanadin ƙarfin zunubi." 
1Corinthians15:57 Godiya tā tabbata ga Allah wanda yake ba mu nasara ta wurin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu. 
1Corinthians15:58 Don haka, ya 'yan'uwana, ƙaunatattu, ku tsaya a kafe, kullum kuna himmantuwa ga aikin Ubangiji, domin kuwa kun san famar da kuke yi saboda Ubangiji ba a banza take ba." 
1Corinthians16:1 To, a yanzu kuma ga zancen ba da gudunmawa ga tsarkaka, kamar yadda na umarci ikilisiyoyin Galatiya, haka ku ma za ku yi." 
1Corinthians16:2 A kowace ranar farko ta mako, kowannenku ya riƙa tanada wani abu, yana ajiyewa gwargwadon samunsa, kada sai na zo tukuna, a tara gudunmawa." 
1Corinthians16:3 Sa'ad da na iso, sai in aiki waɗanda kuka amince da su da wasiƙa, su kai taimakonku Urushalima." 
1Corinthians16:4 In ya kyautu ni ma in tafi, to, sai su raka ni." 
1Corinthians16:5 Zan zo gare ku bayan na zazzaga ƙasar Makidoniya, don kuwa ta Makidoniya zan bi." 
1Corinthians16:6 Watakila zan jima a wurinku, ko ma in ci damina, don ku yi mini rakiya duk in da za ni." 
1Corinthians16:7 Ba sona ne in gan ku a yanzu in wuce kawai ba, a'a, ina sa zuciya ma in yi kwanaki a wurinku, in Ubangiji ya yarda." 
1Corinthians16:8 Amma zan dakata a Afisa har ranar Fentikos. 
1Corinthians16:9 Don kuwa, an buɗe mini wata hanya mai fāɗi ta yin aiki mai amfani, akwai kuma magabta da yawa." 
1Corinthians16:10 In Timoti ya zo, ku tabbata ya sami sakewa a cikinku, domin aikin Ubangiji yake yi kamar yadda nake yi." 
1Corinthians16:11 Kada fa kowa yă raina shi. Ku raka shi lafiya, ya komo a gare ni, domin ina duban hanyarsa tare da 'yan'uwa." 
1Corinthians16:12 Ga zancen ɗan'uwanmu Afolos kuwa, na roƙe shi ƙwarai, don yă zo wurinku, tare da saurar 'yan'uwa, amma ko kusa bai yi nufin zuwa a yanzu ba. Zai zo dai sa'ad da ya ga ya dace." 
1Corinthians16:13 Ku zauna a faɗake, ku dāge ga bangaskiyarku, ku yi ƙwazo, ku yi ƙarfi." 
1Corinthians16:14 Duk abin da za ku yi, ku yi shi da ƙauna." 
1Corinthians16:15 To, 'yan'uwa, kun sani fa jama'ar gidan Istifanas su ne nunan fari a ƙasar Akaya, sun kuwa ba da kansu ga yi wa tsarkaka hidima." 
1Corinthians16:16 Ina roƙonku ku yi wa irin waɗannan mutane biyayya, har ma ga duk waɗanda suke abokan aikinmu da wahalarmu." 
1Corinthians16:17 Na yi farin ciki da zuwan Istifanas, da Fartunatas, da Akaikas, domin sun ɗebe mini kewarku." 
1Corinthians16:18 Sun dai wartsakar da ni da kuma ku. Sai ku kula da irin waɗannan mutane. 
1Corinthians16:19 Ikilisiyoyin ƙasar Asiya suna gaishe ku. Akila da Bilkisu, tare da ikkilisiyar da take taruwa a gidansu, suna gaishe ku da kyau da kyau saboda Ubangiji." 
1Corinthians16:20 Dukan 'yan'uwa suna gaishe ku. Ku gaggai da juna da tsattsarkar sumba. 
1Corinthians16:21 Ni Bulus, ni nake rubuta gaisuwar nan da hannuna." 
1Corinthians16:22 Duk wanda ba ya ƙaunar Ubangiji yă zama la'ananne. Ubangijinmu fa yana zuwa! 
1Corinthians16:23 Alherin Ubangijinmu Yesu yă tabbata a gare ku. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ina gaishe ku duka, gaisuwar ƙauna, albarkar Almasihu Yesu." 
2Corinthians1:1 Daga Bulus, manzon Almasihu Yesu da yardar Allah, da kuma ɗan'uwanmu Timoti, zuwa ga ikkilisiyar Allah da take a Koranti, tare da dukan tsarkaka na duk ƙasar Akaya." 
2Corinthians1:2 Alheri da salama na Allah Ubanmu, da na Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu su tabbata a gare ku." 
2Corinthians1:3 Godiya ta tabbata a gare shi, shi wanda yake Allah, da Uba na Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, Uba mai yawan jinƙai, Allah na dukan ta'aziyya," 
2Corinthians1:4 shi da yake yi mana ta'aziyya a dukan wahalarmu, domin mu kuma mu iya ta'azantar da masu shan kowace irin wahala, da ta'aziyyar nan da mu ma muka samu a gun Allah." 
2Corinthians1:5 Domin kuwa kamar yadda muke shan wuya ƙwarai, irin wadda Almasihu ya sha, haka kuma ake yi mana ta'aziyya ƙwarai, ta wurin Almasihu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Ko ana wahalshe mu ma, ai, saboda ta'azantuwarku ce, da kuma lafiyarku. Ko ana ta'azantar da mu, ai, saboda ta'azantuwarku ce, wadda take sa ku, ku jure wa irin wuyan nan, da muke sha." 
2Corinthians1:7 Sa zuciyarmu a kanku ƙaƙƙarfa ce, domin mun sani, kamar yadda kuka yi tarayya da mu a cikin shan wuya, haka kuma, za ku yi tarayya a cikin ta'aziyyar." 
2Corinthians1:8 'Yan'uwa, ba ma so ku jahilta da wahalar da muka sha a ƙasar Asiya, domin kuwa mun ji jiki ƙwarai da gaske, har abin ya fi ƙarfinmu, har ma muka fid da tsammanin rayuwa." 
2Corinthians1:9 Har ma muka ji kamar hukuncin kisa aka yi mana, wannan kuwa don kada mu dogara ga kanmu ne, sai dai ga Allah, mai ta da matattu." 
2Corinthians1:10 Shi ne ya kuɓutar da mu daga muguwar mutuwa a fili, zai kuwa kuɓutar da mu, ga shi kuma muke dogara yă kuɓutar da mu har ila yau." 
2Corinthians1:11 Ku ma sai ku taimake mu da addu'a, domin mutane da yawa su gode wa Allah, ta dalilinmu, saboda albarkar da aka yi mana, ta amsa addu'o'i masu yawa." 
2Corinthians1:12 Fariyarmu ke nan, lamirinmu yana ba da shaida, cewa mun yi zaman tsarki a duniya da zuciya ɗaya, tsakani da Allah, tun ba ma a gare ku ba, ba bisa ga wayo irin na ɗan adam ba, sai dai bisa ga alherin Allah." 
2Corinthians1:13 Domin wasiƙarmu zuwa gare ku, ba ta ƙunshi wani abu dabam ba, sai dai ainihin abin da kuka karanta kuka kuma fahimta, ina kuwa fata ku fahimta sosai da sosai," 
2Corinthians1:14 kamar yadda kuka riga kuka ɗan fahimce mu, cewa kwa iya yin fāriya da mu, kamar yadda mu ma za mu iya yi da ku, a ranar Ubangijinmu Yesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Saboda na amince da haka, shi ya sa na so zuwa wurinku da fari, domin ku sami albarka riɓi biyu." 
2Corinthians1:16 Wato niyyata in bi a kanku in za ni Makidoniya, in kuma komo wurinku daga Makidoniya, sa'an nan ku yi mini rakiya in zan tafi Yahudiya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Ashe, a lokacin da na yi niyyar yin haka, wato na nuna rashin tsai da zuciya ke nan? Ko kuwa shiririta nake yi kawai irin ta halin mutuntaka, in ce, “I” in koma in ce, “A'a”?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Yadda ba shakka Allah yake mai alkawari, haka ma maganar da muka yi muku, ba shiririta a ciki." 
2Corinthians1:19 Domin kuwa, Ɗan Allah, Yesu Almasihu, wanda ni, da Sila, da Timoti muka yi muku wa'azi, ai, ba shiririta a game da shi, har kullum a kan gaskiya yake." 
2Corinthians1:20 Domin dukan alkawaran Allah cikarsu a gare shi take, ta wurinsa ne kuma muke faɗar “Amin”, domin a ɗaukaka Allah." 
2Corinthians1:21 Domin kuwa, Allah shi ne mai tabbatar da mu da ku gaba ɗaya ga Almasihu, shi ne wanda ya shafe mu kuma." 
2Corinthians1:22 Ya buga mana hatiminsa cewa mu nasa ne, ya kuma yi mana baiwa da Ruhunsa a zukatanmu, domin tabbatar da abin da zai yi a nan gaba." 
2Corinthians1:23 Labudda, Allah shi ne mashaidina a kan cewa, musamman don sawwaƙe muku ne, na fāsa zuwa Koranti." 
2Corinthians1:24 Ba cewa muna nuna muku iko a kan bangaskiyarku ba ne, a'a, sai dai muna aiki tare ne, domin ku yi farin ciki, domin a game da bangaskiyarmu kam, kuna tsaye kankan." 
2Corinthians2:1 Na ƙudura a raina ba zan sāke zuwa wurinku in sa ku baƙin ciki ba. 
2Corinthians2:2 To, in na sa ku baƙin ciki, wa zai faranta mini rai, in ba wanda na sa baƙin cikin ba?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Na rubuto muku haka ne, don kada in na zo, waɗanda ya kamata su faranta mini rai, ya zamana sun sa ni baƙin ciki. Domin na amince da ku duka, cewa farin cikina naku ne ku duka." 
2Corinthians2:4 Na rubuto muku ne ina a cikin wahala da baƙin ciki gaya, har da hawaye mai yawa, ba don in sa ku baƙin ciki ba, sai dai domin ku san irin tsananin ƙaunar da nake yi muku." 
2Corinthians2:5 Amma in wani ya jawo baƙin ciki, ba ni kaɗai ya jawo wa ba, amma ga wani fanni, sai in ce dukanku ne ya jawo wa, ba tsanantawa nake yi ba." 
2Corinthians2:6 Irin mutumin nan, horon nan da galibin jama'a suka yi masa, ai, ya isa haka." 
2Corinthians2:7 Gara dai ku yafe masa, ku kuma ƙarfafa masa zuciya, don kada gāyar baƙin ciki ya sha kansa." 
2Corinthians2:8 Saboda haka, ina roƙonku ku tabbatar masa da ƙaunarku." 
2Corinthians2:9 Na rubuto muku wannan takanas, domin in jarraba ku, in ga ko kuna yin biyayya ta kowace hanya." 
2Corinthians2:10 Wanda kuka yafe wa kome, ni ma na yafe masa. Abin da na yafe kuwa, in dai har ma akwai abin yafewa, saboda ku ne na yafe masa, albarkacin Almasihu," 
2Corinthians2:11 don kada Shaiɗan ya ribace mu, gama mu ba jahilan makidodinsa ba ne." 
2Corinthians2:12 To, sa'ad da na zo Taruwasa in yi bisharar Almasihu, ko da yake an buɗe mini hanya a cikin Ubangiji," 
2Corinthians2:13 duk da haka dai hankalina bai kwanta ba, domin ban tarar da ɗan'uwana Titus a can ba, saboda haka, sai na yi bankwana da su, na zarce na tafi Makidoniya." 
2Corinthians2:13 duk da haka dai hankalina bai kwanta ba, domin ban tarar da ɗan'uwana Titus a can ba, saboda haka, sai na yi bankwana da su, na zarce na tafi Makidoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Amma godiya ta tabbata ga Allah, shi da kullum yake yi mana jagaba mu ci nasara, albarkacin Almasihu, ta wurinmu kuma yake baza ƙanshin nan, na sanin Almasihu a ko'ina." 
2Corinthians2:15 Don kuwa, a gun Allah mu ne ƙanshin Almasihu a cikin waɗanda ake ceto, da waɗanda suke a hanyar hallaka." 
2Corinthians2:16 Ga na ƙarshe ɗin, ƙanshin nan warin mutuwa ne, mai kaiwa ga hallaka, ga na farkon kuwa, ƙanshin rai ne mai kaiwa ga rai. To, wa zai iya ɗaukar nauyin waɗannan abubuwa?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Domin mu ba kamar mutane da yawa muke ba, masu yi wa Maganar Allah algus, mu kaifi ɗaya ne, kamar yadda Allah ya umarce mu, haka muke magana a gaban Allah, muna na Almasihu." 
2Corinthians3:1 Wato, har ila yau, yabon kanmu za mu fara yi kuma? Ko kuwa muna bukatar wasiƙun yabo ne zuwa gare ku, ko daga gare ku, kamar yadda waɗansu suke yi?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Ai, ku kanku ku ne wasiƙarmu ta yabo, wadda aka rubuta a zukatanku, domin kowa yă san ta, ya kuma karanta ta." 
2Corinthians3:3 A fili yake, ku wasiƙa ce ta Almasihu, ta hannunmu, ba kuwa rubutun tawada ba ne, amma na Ruhun Allah Rayayye ne, ba kuwa a kan allunan dutse aka rubuta ta ba, sai dai a zuci." 
2Corinthians3:4 Wannan ita ce irin amincewarmu ga Allah ta wurin Almasihu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Ba domin mun isar wa kanmu ba ne, har da za mu ce mu ne muke gudanar da wani abu, a'a, iyawarmu daga Allah take," 
2Corinthians3:6 domin shi ne ya iyar mana muka zama masu hidima na Sabon Alkawari, ba alkawarin rubutacciyar ka'ida ba, sai dai na Ruhu. Don kuwa rubutacciyar ka'ida, kisa take yi, Ruhu kuwa, rayarwa yake yi." 
2Corinthians3:7 Aka zana hidimar Shari'ar Musa, wadda ƙarshenta mutuwa ce, a allunan duwatsu. An bayyana hidimar nan da babbar ɗaukaka, har Isra'ilawa suka kasa duban fuskar Musa saboda tsananin haskenta (ga ta kuwa mai shuɗewa ce)." 
2Corinthians3:8 Ina misalin fifikon hidimar Ruhu mafi ɗaukaka? 
2Corinthians3:9 Gama idan hidimar da take jawo hukunci abar ɗaukakawa ce, to, lalle hidimar da take jawo samun adalcin Allah ta fi ta ɗaukaka nesa." 
2Corinthians3:10 Hakika a wannan hali, abin da dā take da ɗaukaka ya rasa ɗaukaka sam, saboda mafificiyar ɗaukakar da ta jice ta." 
2Corinthians3:11 Domin in aba mai shuɗewa an bayyana ta da ɗaukaka, ashe, abin da yake dawwamamme, lalle ne ya kasance da ɗaukakar da ta fi haka nesa." 
2Corinthians3:12 Tun da yake muna da sa zuciya irin wannan, to, muna magana ne gabanmu gaɗi ƙwarai." 
2Corinthians3:13 Ba kamar Musa muke ba, wanda ya rufe fuskarsa da mayafi, don kada Isr'ailawa su ga ƙarewar ɗaukakar nan mai shuɗewa." 
2Corinthians3:14 Amma hankalinsu ya dushe, domin har ya zuwa yau, in ana karatun Tsohon Alkawari, mayafin nan har yanzu ba a yaye yake ba, domin ba ya yayuwa sai ta wurin Almasihu kaɗai." 
2Corinthians3:15 Hakika har ya zuwa yau, duk lokacin da ake karatun littattafan Musa, sai mayafin nan yakan rufe zukatansu." 
2Corinthians3:16 Amma da zarar mutum ya juyo ga Ubangiji, akan yaye masa mayafin." 
2Corinthians3:17 To, Ubangiji fa shi ne Ruhu, a inda Ruhun Ubangiji yake kuma, a nan 'yanci yake." 
2Corinthians3:18 Mu dukanmu kuma, fuskokinmu ba lulluɓi, muna nuna ɗaukakar Ubangiji, kamar madubi, ana sauya mu mu ɗauki kamanninsa cikin ɗaukaka mai hauhawa. Ubangiji kuwa wanda yake ruhu, yana zartar da haka." 
2Corinthians4:1 Saboda haka, da yake muna da wannan hidima bisa ga jinƙan Allah, ba za mu karai ba." 
2Corinthians4:2 Ba ruwanmu da ɓoye-ɓoye na munafunci, ko makirci, ko yi wa Maganar Allah algus, amma ta wurin bayyana gaskiya a fili, sai kowane mutum ya shaidi gaskiyarmu a lamirinsa a gaban Allah." 
2Corinthians4:3 Ko da bishararmu a rufe take, ai, ga waɗanda suke hanyar hallaka kaɗai take a rufe." 
2Corinthians4:4 Su ne marasa ba da gaskiya, waɗanda sarkin zamanin nan ya makantar da hankalinsu, don kada hasken bisharar ɗaukakar Almasihu, shi da yake surar Allah, ya haskaka su." 
2Corinthians4:5 Domin ba wa'azin kanmu muke yi ba, sai dai na Yesu Almasihu a kan shi ne Ubangiji, mu kuwa bayinku ne saboda Yesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Domin shi Allah wanda ya ce, “Haske yă ɓullo daga duhu ya haskaka,” shi ne ya haskaka zukatanmu domin a haskaka mutane su san ɗaukakarsa a fuskar Yesu Almasihu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Wannan wadata da muke da ita kuwa, a cikin kasake take, wato, jikunanmu, don a nuna mafificin ikon nan na Allah ne, ba namu ba." 
2Corinthians4:8 Ana wahalshe mu ta kowace hanya, duk da haka, ba a ci ɗunguminmu ba. Ana ruɗa mu, duk da haka ba mu karai ba." 
2Corinthians4:9 Ana tsananta mana, duk da haka ba mu zama yasassu ba. Ana ta fyaɗa mu a ƙasa, duk da haka ba a hallaka mu ba." 
2Corinthians4:10 Kullum muna a cikin hatsarin kisa, irin kisan da aka yi wa Yesu, domin a bayyana rayuwar Yesu ta gare mu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Wato, muddin muna a raye, kullum zaman mutuwa muke yi saboda Yesu, domin a bayyana ran Yesu ta wurin jikin nan namu mai mutuwa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Ta haka mutuwa take aikatawa a cikinmu, ku kuwa rai a cikinku." 
2Corinthians4:13 Tun da yake muna da ruhun bangaskiya iri ɗaya da na wanda ya rubuta wannan, “Na gaskata, saboda haka na yi magana,” to, mu ma mun gaskata, saboda haka kuma muke magana." 
2Corinthians4:14 Mun sani shi wannan da ya ta da Ubangiji Yesu daga matattu, mu ma zai tashe mu albarkacin Yesu, yă kuma kawo mu a gabansa tare da ku." 
2Corinthians4:15 Duk wannan fa don amfaninku ne, domin alherin Allah ya yaɗu ga mutane masu yawa, ta haka ya zama sanadin yawaita godiya ga Allah, domin a ɗaukaka Allah." 
2Corinthians4:16 Saboda haka ba mu karai ba, ko da yake jikinmu na mutuntaka yana ta lalacewa, duk da haka, ruhunmu a kowace rana sabunta shi ake yi." 
2Corinthians4:17 Don wannan 'yar wahalar tamu, mai saurin wucewa ita take tanadar mana madawwamiyar ɗaukaka mai yawa, fiye da kwatanci." 
2Corinthians4:18 Domin ba abubuwan da ido yake gani muke dubawa ba, sai dai marasa ganuwa, gama abubuwan da ake gani, masu saurin wucewa ne, marasa ganuwa kuwa, madawwama ne." 
2Corinthians5:1 Gama mun sani in an rushe jikinmu na wannan duniya, Allah ya tanadar mana jiki a Sama, wato, wanda shi kansa ya yi, wanda zai dawwama." 
2Corinthians5:2 A jikin nan muna ajiyar zuciya, mun ƙosa mu samu a suturta mu da jiki namu na Sama," 
2Corinthians5:3 gama in aka suturta mu da shi, ba za a same mu tsirara ba." 
2Corinthians5:4 Sa'ad da muke zaune a cikin jikin nan na duniya, nishi muke domin matsuwar da muke sha, ba domin muna so mu rabu da jikinmu na wannan duniya ba ne, amma don so muke yi a suturta mu da na Sama, domin mai rai ya shafe mai mutuwa." 
2Corinthians5:5 Allah kuwa shi ya tanadar mana wannan sākewar, shi da ya ba mu Ruhunsa, domin tabbatar da abin da zai yi a nan gaba." 
2Corinthians5:6 Saboda haka, kullum muke da ƙarfin zuciya, mun kuma sani, muddin muna tare da wannan jiki, a rabe muke da Ubangiji," 
2Corinthians5:7 domin zaman bangaskiya muke yi, ba na ganin ido ba." 
2Corinthians5:8 Hakika muna da ƙarfin zuciya, mun kuma gwammace mu rabu da jikin nan, mu zauna a gun Ubangiji." 
2Corinthians5:9 Saboda haka, ko muna gunsa, ko muna a rabe da shi, burinmu shi ne mu faranta masa zuciya." 
2Corinthians5:10 Don lalle ne a gabatar da mu duka, a gaban kursiyin shari'a na Almasihu, domin kowa yă sami sakamakon abin da ya yi tun yana tare da wannan jiki, ko mai kyau ne, ko kuma marar kyau." 
2Corinthians5:11 Da yake muna tsoron Ubangiji, shi ya sa muke ƙoƙarin rinjayar mutane. Yadda muke kuwa, ai, sananne ne ga Allah, muna fata ku ma haka abin yake a lamirinku." 
2Corinthians5:12 Har wa yau kuma, ba yabon kanmu muke yi a gare ku ba, sai dai muna ba ku hanyar yin taƙama da mu, don ku sami yadda za ku mai da jawabi ga waɗanda suke fariya da maƙaminsu, ba da halinsu ba." 
2Corinthians5:13 In hankalinmu ya fita, ai, saboda Allah ne, in kuwa a cikin hankalinmu muke, ai, ribarku ce." 
2Corinthians5:14 Ƙaunar Almasihu a gare mu, ita take mallakarmu, saboda haka mun tabbata, da yake wani ya mutu saboda dukan mutane, ashe kuwa, mutuwarsu ce dukansu." 
2Corinthians5:15 Ya kuwa mutu ne saboda dukan mutane, domin waɗanda suke a raye, kada su yi zaman ganin dama a nan gaba, sai dai su yi zaman wannan da ya mutu saboda su, aka kuma tashe shi saboda su." 
2Corinthians5:16 Saboda haka, a nan gaba ba mā ƙara duban kowane mutum bisa ga ɗabi'ar jiki kawai, domin ko da yake mun taɓa duban Almasihu bisa ga ɗabi'ar jiki, yanzu ba ma ƙara dubansa haka." 
2Corinthians5:17 Saboda haka, duk wanda yake na Almasihu sabuwar halitta ne, tsohon al'amari duk ya shuɗe, ga shi, kome ya zama sabo." 
2Corinthians5:18 Duk wannan kuwa yin Allah ne, shi da ya sulhunta mu da kansa ta wurin Almasihu, ya kuma ba mu aikin shelar sulhuntawar," 
2Corinthians5:19 wato, Allah ne, ta wurin Almasihu, yake sulhunta 'yan adam da shi kansa, ba ya kuwa lasafta laifofinsu a kansu ba, ya kuma danƙa mana maganar nan ta sulhuntawa." 
2Corinthians5:20 Saboda haka, mu jakadu ne na Almasihu, wato, Allah na neman mutane ta wurinmu. Muna roƙonku a madadin Almasihu, ku sulhuntu da Allah." 
2Corinthians5:21 Shi da bai san zunubi ba, Allah ya mai da shi zunubi saboda mu, domin mu mu sami adalcin Allah ta wurinsa." 
2Corinthians6:1 Da yake kuma muna aiki tare da Allah, muna roƙonku kada ku yi na'am da alherin Allah a banza." 
2Corinthians6:2 Domin ya ce, “Na saurare ka a lokacin samun karɓuwa, Na kuma taimake ka a ranar ceto.” Ga shi, yanzu ne lokacin samun karɓuwa! Ga shi kuma, yau ce ranar ceto!" 
2Corinthians6:3 Ba ma zamar wa kowa sanadin tuntuɓe, don kada a aibata aikinmu," 
2Corinthians6:4 Amma ta kowace hanya muna bayyana gaskiyarmu, a kan bayin Allah muke, ta matuƙar jurewa, da shan wahala, da ƙuntata, da masifu," 
2Corinthians6:5 da shan dūka, da shan ɗauri, da yawan hargitsi, da yawan fama, da rasa barci, da kuma rasa abinci." 
2Corinthians6:6 Muna kuma bayyana gaskiyarmu ta halin tsarkaka, da sani, da haƙuri, da kirki, da Ruhu Mai Tsarki, da sahihiyar ƙauna," 
2Corinthians6:7 da maganar gaskiya, da kuma ikon Allah. Muna riƙe da makaman adalci dama da hagu." 
2Corinthians6:8 Ana ɗaukaka mu, ana kuma wulakanta mu, ana yabonmu, ana kuma kushenmu. An ɗauke mu kamar mayaudara, mu kuwa masu gaskiya ne." 
2Corinthians6:9 Kamar ma ba a san mu ba, an kuwa san mu sarai, kamar a bakin mutuwa muke, ga shi kuwa, muna a raye, ana ta horonmu, duk da haka ba a kashe mu ba," 
2Corinthians6:10 kamar muna baƙin ciki, kullum kuwa farin ciki muke yi, kamar matalauta muke, duk da haka kuwa muna arzuta mutane da yawa, kamar ba mu da kome, alhali kuwa kome namu ne." 
2Corinthians6:11 Ya ku Korantiyawa, ba mu ɓoye muku kome ba, mun saki zuciya da ku ƙwarai." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ai, ba wata rashin yarda a zuciyarmu, sai dai a taku." 
2Corinthians6:13 Ina roƙonku kamar 'ya'yana, ku ma ku saki zuciya da mu." 
2Corinthians6:14 Kada ku yi cuɗanya marar dacewa da marasa ba da gaskiya. To, me ya haɗa aikin adalci da na mugunta? Ko kuwa me ya haɗa haske da duhu?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Ina kuma jiyayyar Almasihu da iblis? Me kuma ya haɗa mai ba da gaskiya da marar ba da gaskiya? 
2Corinthians6:16 Wace yarjejeniya ce take a tsakanin Haikalin Allah da gumaka? Domin mu haikali ne na Allah Rayayye. Yadda Allah ya ce, “Zan zauna tare da su, in yi yawo a tsakaninsu, Zan kuma kasance Allahnsu, Su kuma su kasance jama'ata." 
2Corinthians6:17 Saboda haka, sai ku fito daga cikinsu, Ku keɓe, in ji Ubangiji, Kada ku ko taɓa wani abu marar tsarki, Ni kuwa in yi na'am da ku," 
2Corinthians6:18 In kasance Uba a gare ku, Ku kuma ku kasance 'ya'yana, maza da mata, In ji Ubangiji Maɗaukaki.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Ya ku ƙaunatattu, tun da aka yi mana waɗannan alkawarai, sai mu tsarkake kanmu daga kowace irin ƙazanta ta jiki ko ta zuci, da bangirma ga Allah mu kamalta a cikin tsarki." 
2Corinthians7:2 Ku saki zuciya da mu, ai, ba mu cuci kowa ba, ba mu ɓata kowa ba, ba mu zambaci kowa ba." 
2Corinthians7:3 Ba don in sa muku laifi na faɗi haka ba, don dā ma na gaya muku, abin ƙauna kuke a gare mu ƙwarai, ko a mace ko a raye, ba mu rabuwa." 
2Corinthians7:4 Na amince da ku ƙwarai, ina kuma taƙama da ku gaya. Zuciyata ta ƙarfafa ƙwarai. Duk da wahalce-wahalcenmu dai ina farin ciki ƙwarai da gaske." 
2Corinthians7:5 Ko a lokacin da muka zo ƙasar Makidoniya ma, ba mu sami shaƙatawa ba, ana ta wahalshe mu ta kowace hanya, a waje ga husuma, a zukatanmu kuma ga fargaba." 
2Corinthians7:6 Amma Allah, shi da yake ƙarfafa wa ƙasƙantattu zuciya, sai ya ƙarfafa mana zuciya da zuwan Titus," 
2Corinthians7:6 Amma Allah, shi da yake ƙarfafa wa ƙasƙantattu zuciya, sai ya ƙarfafa mana zuciya da zuwan Titus," 
2Corinthians7:7 ba kuwa da zuwan Titus kawai ba, har ma a game da ƙarfafa zuciyar nan da ya samu a wurinku, a yayin da ya gaya mana yadda kuke begena, kuna nadama, kuna kuma himmantuwa ga goyan bayana, har ma na ƙara farin ciki ƙwarai." 
2Corinthians7:7 ba kuwa da zuwan Titus kawai ba, har ma a game da ƙarfafa zuciyar nan da ya samu a wurinku, a yayin da ya gaya mana yadda kuke begena, kuna nadama, kuna kuma himmantuwa ga goyan bayana, har ma na ƙara farin ciki ƙwarai." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ko da na ɓata muku rai a game da wasiƙar da dā na rubuto muku, ba na baƙin ciki da haka, ko da yake dā kam na yi baƙin ciki, don na lura wasiƙar nan ta ɓata muku rai, ko da yake dai zuwa ɗan lokaci kaɗan ne." 
2Corinthians7:9 Amma a yanzu kam, ina farin ciki, ba don kun yi baƙin ciki ba, sai dai don baƙin cikinmu ya sa ku tuba, don kun yi baƙin ciki irin wanda Allah yake so. Saboda haka, ba ku yi hasarar kome a sanadinmu ba." 
2Corinthians7:10 Don baƙin ciki irin wanda Allah yake sawa, shi ne yake biyarwa zuwa ga tuba, da kuma samun ceto, ba ya kuma sa “da na sani”. Amma baƙin ciki a kan al'amarin duniya, yakan jawo mutuwa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Ku dubi fa irin himmar da baƙin cikin nan, da Allah yake so ya sa a zukatanku, da irin ɗokin da kuka yi na gyara al'amuranku, da irin haushin da kuka ji, da irin tsoron da kuka ji, da irin begen da kuka yi, da irin himmar da kuka yi, da kuma irin niyyarku ta horo. A game da wannan sha'ani kam, lalle ta kowace hanya kun nuna cewa ba ku da laifi." 
2Corinthians7:12 To, ko da yake na rubuto muku wasiƙa, ba musamman a kan wanda ya yi laifin ba ne, ba kuwa a kan wanda aka cutar ba, sai dai domin a bayyana muku a gaban Allah tsananin kula da kuke yi mana." 
2Corinthians7:13 Saboda haka ne zukatanmu suka ƙarfafa. Banda ƙarfafa zukatanmu kuma, har wa yau mun ƙara farin ciki ƙwarai, saboda farin cikin Titus, don dukanku kun wartsakar da shi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Saboda haka ne zukatanmu suka ƙarfafa. Banda ƙarfafa zukatanmu kuma, har wa yau mun ƙara farin ciki ƙwarai, saboda farin cikin Titus, don dukanku kun wartsakar da shi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Don ko da na gaya masa cewa, ina 'yar taƙama da ku, ban kunyata ba. Kamar yadda duk abin da muka gaya muku gaskiya ne, haka kuma taƙamarmu da ku a idon Titus ma ta zama gaskiya." 
2Corinthians7:14 Don ko da na gaya masa cewa, ina 'yar taƙama da ku, ban kunyata ba. Kamar yadda duk abin da muka gaya muku gaskiya ne, haka kuma taƙamarmu da ku a idon Titus ma ta zama gaskiya." 
2Corinthians7:15 Ransa kuma yana a gare ku fiye da dā ƙwarai, duk sa'ad da yake tunawa da biyayyarku, ku duka, da kuma yadda kuka yi na'am da shi a cikin halin bangirma tare da matsananciyar kula." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ina farin ciki ne don na amince da ku ƙwarai da gaske. 
2Corinthians8:1 To, 'yan'uwa, muna so mu sanar da ku alherin Allah da ya bayar a cikin ikilisiyoyin Makidoniya," 
2Corinthians8:2 wato, ko da yake an gwada su da matsananciyar wahala, suna kuma a cikin baƙin talauci, duk da haka, yawan farin cikinsu, har ya kai su ga yin alheri ƙwarai da gaske." 
2Corinthians8:3 Domin na tabbata daidai ƙarfinsu suka bayar, har ma fiye da ƙarfinsu ne, da ra'insu kuma." 
2Corinthians8:4 Sun roƙe mu ƙwarai da gaske mu yi musu alheri su ma, a sa su a cikin masu yi wa tsarkaka gudunmawa," 
2Corinthians8:5 har ma suka bayar fiye da yadda muka zata, amma sai da suka fara miƙa kansu ga Ubangiji da a gare mu kuma, bisa ga nufin Allah." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ganin haka sai muka roƙi Titus, da yake shi ne ya riga ya tsiro da wannan aikin alheri a cikinku, sai yă ƙarasa shi." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ganin haka sai muka roƙi Titus, da yake shi ne ya riga ya tsiro da wannan aikin alheri a cikinku, sai yă ƙarasa shi." 
2Corinthians8:7 To, da yake kun fifita a kowane abu, wato, a cikin bangaskiya, da magana, da sani, da matuƙar himma, da kuma ƙaunar da kuke yi mana, to, sai ku fifita a wannan aikin alheri ma." 
2Corinthians8:8 Ba kallafa muku wannan nake yi ba, sai dai ta nuna himmar waɗansu, in tabbata ƙaunarku ma sahihiya ce." 
2Corinthians8:9 Domin kun san alherin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, ko da yake shi mawadaci ne, sai ya zama matalauci sabili da ku, domin ta wurin talaucinsa ku wadata." 
2Corinthians8:10 A wannan al'amari, ga shawarata. Ai, ya fiye muku a yanzu ku ƙarasa abin da kuka fara yi a bara, har kuka yi da ra'inku." 
2Corinthians8:11 To, sai ku ƙarasa aikin da irin ra'in da kuka fara, gwargwadon ikonku."
