2Corinthians8:12 Domin mutum yana da niyyar bayarwa, bayarwarsa za ta zama abar karɓa ce, bisa ga yawan abin da yake da shi, ba bisa ga abin da ba shi da shi ba." 
2Corinthians8:13 Ba nufi nake yi a sawwaƙe wa waɗansu, ku kuwa a jibga muku nauyin ba." 
2Corinthians8:14 Amma don a raba daidai wa daida, sai ku taimake su a yanzu da yalwarku saboda rashinsu, don wata rana su ma su taimake ku da yalwarsu saboda rashinku, don a daidaita al'amari." 
2Corinthians8:15 Yadda yake a rubuce cewa, “Wanda ya tara mai yawa, bai fi bukatarsa ba, wanda ya tara kaɗan kuwa, ba abin da ya gaza masa.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Godiya tā tabbata ga Allah wanda ya sa tsananin kula da ku a zuciyar Titus, kamar yadda nake yi." 
2Corinthians8:16 Godiya tā tabbata ga Allah wanda ya sa tsananin kula da ku a zuciyar Titus, kamar yadda nake yi." 
2Corinthians8:17 Ba kuwa na'am da roƙonmu kaɗai ya yi ba, har ma saboda tsananin himma tasa yana zuwa wurinku da ra'in kansa." 
2Corinthians8:18 Ga shi, mun aiko ɗan'uwan nan tare da shi, wanda ya yi suna wajen yin bishara a dukan ikilisiyoyi," 
2Corinthians8:19 ba kuwa haka kaɗai ba, har ma ikilisiyoyi sun zaɓe shi ya riƙa tafiya tare da mu kan wannan aikin alheri da muke yi saboda ɗaukakar Ubangiji, da kuma nuna kyakkyawar niyyarmu." 
2Corinthians8:20 Wato, muna gudun kada kowa yă zarge mu a kan kyautan nan da ake yi hannu sake, wadda muke kasaftawa." 
2Corinthians8:21 Niyyarmu ce mu yi abubuwan da suke daidai, ba wai a gaban Ubangiji kaɗai ba, har ma a gaban mutane." 
2Corinthians8:22 Muna kuma aiko da ɗan'uwanmu tare da su, wanda sau da yawa muka tabbatar da himma tasa ta hanya iri iri, yanzu kuma ya fi koyaushe himma, domin amincewa da ku da yake yi ƙwarai da gaske." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus kuwa, ai, abokin tarayyata ne, abokin aikina kuma game da al'amuranku. 'Yan'uwan nan namu kuwa, ai, manzanni ne na ikilisiyoyi, masu ɗaukaka Almasihu." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus kuwa, ai, abokin tarayyata ne, abokin aikina kuma game da al'amuranku. 'Yan'uwan nan namu kuwa, ai, manzanni ne na ikilisiyoyi, masu ɗaukaka Almasihu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Saboda haka sai ku tabbatar wa waɗannan mutane a gaban ikilisiyoyi irin ƙaunarku, da kuma cewa taƙama da ku da muke yi gaskiya ce." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ba sai lalle na rubuto muku zancen gudunmawa ga tsarkaka ba," 
2Corinthians9:2 domin na san niyyarku, har ma ina taƙama da ku gun mutanen Makidoniya a kan haka, ina ce musu Ikkilisiyar Akaya ta yi shiri tun bara, ƙwazonku kuwa ya ta da yawancinsu." 
2Corinthians9:3 Amma ma aiko da 'yan'uwan nan, don kada gadarar da muke yi da ku a wannan al'amari ta zama banza, domin ku zauna a kan shiri, kamar yadda dā na ce za ku zauna." 
2Corinthians9:4 Don kada ya zamana in waɗansu mutanen Makidoniya sun zo tare da ni, suka tarar ba ku shirya ba, kunya ta ishe mu, balle fa ku, saboda amincewa da muke yi da ku." 
2Corinthians9:5 Saboda haka, na dai ga lalle ne in roƙi 'yan'uwan nan su riga ni zuwa a gare ku, su tanada baiwar nan da kuka yi alkawari kafin in zo, domin a same ta a shirye, ba tare da matsawa ba, sai dai kyautar sa kai." 
2Corinthians9:6 Abin la'akari fa, shi ne wanda ya yi ƙwauron yafa iri, gonarsa za ta yi masa ƙwauron amfani, wanda kuwa ya yafa a yalwace, sai ya girba a yalwace." 
2Corinthians9:7 Sai kowa yă bayar yadda ya yi niyya, ba tare da ɓacin rai ko tilastawa ba, domin Allah yana son mai bayarwa da daɗin rai." 
2Corinthians9:8 Allah kuwa yana da iko yă ba ku fiye da bukatarku, domin kullum ku wadata da kome ta kowace hanya, kuna ta bayarwa hannu sake, kowane irin kyakkyawan aiki." 
2Corinthians9:9 Kamar yadda yake a rubuce cewa, “Ya ba gajiyayyu hannu sake, Ayyukansa na alheri madawwama ne.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Shi da yake ba mai shuka iri, yake kuma ba da abinci a ci, shi ne zai ba ku irin shukawa, ya riɓanya shi, ya kuma yawaita albarkar ayyukanku na alheri." 
2Corinthians9:11 Za a wadata ku ta kowace hanya, domin ku riƙa bayarwa a yalwace, bayarwar nan kuwa da za ku yi, za ta zama sanadin godiya ga Allah ta wurinmu." 
2Corinthians9:12 Domin aikin nan na alheri, ba biyan bukatar tsarkaka kaɗai yake yi ba, har ma yana ƙara yawaita godiya ga Allah ƙwarai da gaske." 
2Corinthians9:13 Aikin nan naku na alheri tabbatar bangaskiyarku ne, za a kuwa ɗaukaka Allah saboda kun bayyana yarda, cewa kun yi na'am da bisharar Almasihu, saboda kuma gudunmawa da kuka yi musu da saura duka, hannu sake." 
2Corinthians9:14 Su kuwa za su yi muku addu'a, su yi ɗokin ganinku saboda alherin Allah marar misaltuwa da ya yi muku." 
2Corinthians9:15 Godiya tā tabbata ga Allah saboda baiwarsa da ta fi gaban a faɗa. 
2Corinthians10:1 Ni Bulus da kaina, ina roƙonku albarkacin tawali'u da sanyin hali na Almasihu, ni da ake yi wa kirari “marar tsanani” ne a cikinku, amma “mai matsawa” ne sa'ad da nake rabe da ku," 
2Corinthians10:2 ina roƙonku kada ku tilasta ni in matsa muku sa'ad da na zo, gama na tabbata zan iya tsaya wa waɗanda suka ce abin da muke yi sha'anin duniya ne." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ko da yake a cikin jiki muke tafiya, famarmu ba irin na mutuntaka ba ne." 
2Corinthians10:4 Don kuwa makamanmu na fama ba na mutuntaka ba ne, na ikon Allah ne, masu rushe maƙamai masu ƙarfi." 
2Corinthians10:5 Muna ka da masu hujjoji a cikin zace-zacensu, muna rushe kowace ganuwar alfarma mai tare sanin Allah, muna kuma jan hankalin kowa ga bautar Almasihu." 
2Corinthians10:6 A shirye muke kuma mu hori kowane marar biyayya, muddin biyayyarku ta tabbata." 
2Corinthians10:7 Ku dubi abin da yake bayyane mana! in dai wani ya amince na Almasihu ne, to, ya ƙara tunawa, wato kamar yadda yake shi na Almasihu ne, mu ma haka muke." 
2Corinthians10:8 Ko da zan yi gadara fiye da kima a game da izinin nan namu, wanda Ubangiji ya bayar saboda inganta ku, ba don rushe ku ba, ba zan kunyata ba." 
2Corinthians10:9 Kada fa a ga kamar ina tsorata ku da wasiƙu ne. 
2Corinthians10:10 Don waɗansu suna cewa, “Wasiƙunsa masu ratsa jiki ne, masu ƙarfi, amma kuwa in ka gan shi ba shi da kwarjini, maganarsa kuma ba wata magana ba ce.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Irin mutanen nan dai su fahimci yadda abin da muke faɗa a cikin wasiƙa sa'ad da ba ma nan, shi muke aikatawa sa'ad da muke nan." 
2Corinthians10:12 Wane mu mu daidaita kanmu, ko mu gwada kanmu da waɗansu masu yabon kansu! Ashe, waɗannan mutane masu auna kansu da juna, suna kuma neman bambanci a tsakaninsu da juna, ba su da basira." 
2Corinthians10:13 Amma dai ba za mu yi alfarma fiye da yadda ya kamata ba, sai dai mu tsaya a kan iyakar da Allah ya yanke mana, wadda ta game har da ku." 
2Corinthians10:14 Ai, ba mu wuce gona da iri ba, kamar ba a hannunmu kuke ba, domin mu ne muka fara shan nisa, muka je a gare ku da bisharar Almasihu." 
2Corinthians10:15 Fahariyarmu ba fiye da yadda ya kamata take ba, ba ta kuma shafi aikin waɗansu ba. Amma muna sa zuciya bangaskiyarku ta riƙa ƙaruwa, ta haka kuma fagen aikinmu a cikinku ya riƙa ƙaruwa ƙwarai da gaske," 
2Corinthians10:16 har ma mu samu mu yi bishara a ƙasashen da suke a gaba da ku, ba tare da wata fahariya da aikin da wani ya riga ya yi a fagensa ba." 
2Corinthians10:17 Amma, “Duk mai yin fahariya, ya yi fahariya da Ubangiji.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Ai, ba mai yabon kansa ake yarda da shi ba, sai dai wanda Ubangiji ya yaba wa." 
2Corinthians11:1 Da ma a ce ku jure 'yar wautata. Ku dai yi haƙuri da ni! 
2Corinthians11:2 Ina kishi a kanku saboda Allah. Gama na bashe ku ga Almasihu, domin in miƙa ku kamar amarya tsattsarka ga makaɗaicin mijinta." 
2Corinthians11:3 Amma ina tsoro kada yă zamana, kamar yadda maciji ya yaudari Hawwa'u da makircinsa, ku ma a bauɗar da hankalinku daga sahihiyar biyayya amintacciya ga Almasihu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Don in wani ya zo yana wa'azin wani Yesu dabam da wanda muka yi wa'azi, ko kuma in kun sami wani ruhu dabam da Ruhun da kuka samu, ko wata bishara dabam da wadda kuka yi na'am da ita, ashe, har kuna saurin yin na'am da irinsu ke nan!" 
2Corinthians11:5 A ganina ban kasa mafifitan manzannin nan da kome ba. 
2Corinthians11:6 Ko da yake ni bāmi ne a wajen yin magana, a wajen sani kam, ba haka ba ne, mun kuwa bayyana wannan sarai ta kowace hanya a cikin dukan sha'aninmu da ku." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ashe, laifi na yi da na ƙasƙantar da kaina, don a ɗaukaka ku, wato, saboda na yi muku bisharar Allah a kyauta?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Waɗansu ikilisiyoyi na biyan hakkina, sai ka ce ina yi musu ƙwace domin in yi muku hidima." 
2Corinthians11:9 Sa'ad da nake a wurinku kuma nake zaman rashi, ban nauyaya wa kowa ba, domin 'yan'uwan da suka zo daga Makidoniya su ne suka biya mini bukata. Saboda haka, na ƙi nauyaya muku ta kowace hanya, ba kuwa zan nauyaya muku ba." 
2Corinthians11:10 Albarkacin gaskiyar Almasihu da yake tare da ni, ba mai hana ni fahariyar nan tawa a lardin Akaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 To, don me? Domin ba na ƙaunarku ne? Allah dai ya sani ina ƙaunarku." 
2Corinthians11:12 Abin da nake yi kuwa, shi zan riƙa yi, domin in toshe kafar mutanen nan da suke fariya, suna nema mu daidaita da su." 
2Corinthians11:13 Irin waɗannan mutane manzannin ƙarya ne, mayaudaran ma'aikata, suna mai da kansu kamar su manzannin Almasihu ne." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ba abin mamaki ba ne kuwa, domin ko Shaiɗan ma da kansa, yakan mai da kansa kamar shi mala'ikan haske ne." 
2Corinthians11:15 Don haka, ba abin mamaki ba ne in bayinsa ma sun mai da kansu kamar su bayi ne na aikin adalci. A ƙarshe za a saka musu gwargwadon ayyukansu." 
2Corinthians11:16 Ina sāke faɗa, kada wani ya zaci ni wawa ne. In kuwa kun zaci haka nake, to, ku ji ni wawa ne, don ni ma in samu in taɓa 'yar taƙama kaɗan." 
2Corinthians11:17 Abin nan da nake faɗa fa, ba bisa ga umarnin Ubangiji nake faɗa ba, sai dai magana ce irin ta wawa, wadda yake yi gabagaɗi, yana fariya," 
2Corinthians11:18 da yake mutane da yawa suna fariya irin ta 'yan adam kawai, ni ma zan yi." 
2Corinthians11:19 Ai, ku kam, hikimarku har ta kai ga jure wa wawaye da murna!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Don in wani ya sa ku bauta, kukan jure masa, ko ya yi muku ƙwace, ko ya more ku, ko ya nuna muka isa, ko kuwa ya mare ku." 
2Corinthians11:21 Mu kam, saboda rauninmu, wane mu da yin haka! Amma ta ko yaya wani yake ƙarfin halin yin fariya, ina magana a kan ni wawa ne fa! to, ni ma sai in yi." 
2Corinthians11:22 In su Ibraniyawa ne, ni ma haka. In su Isra'ilawa ne, ni ma haka. In su zuriyar Ibrahim ne, ni ma haka." 
2Corinthians11:23 In su bayin Almasihu ne, ni na fi su ma, ina magana kamar ruɗaɗɗe ne fa! ai, na fi su shan fama ƙwarai da gaske, da shan ɗauri, na sha dūka marar iyaka, na sha hatsarin mutuwa iri iri." 
2Corinthians11:24 Sau biyar Yahudawa suka yi mini bulala arba'in ɗaya babu. 
2Corinthians11:25 Sau uku aka bulale ni da tsumagu, sau ɗaya har aka jejjefe ni da dutse. Sau uku jirgi ya ragargaje ina ciki, na kwana na yini ruwan bahar yana tafiya da ni." 
2Corinthians11:26 Na yi tafifiya da yawa, na sha hatsari a koguna, na sha hatsarin 'yan fashi, na sha hatsari a hannun kabilarmu, na sha hatsari a hannun al'ummai, na sha hatsari a birane, na sha hatsari a jeji, na sha hatsari a bahar, na kuma sha hatsarin 'yan'uwa na ƙarya." 
2Corinthians11:27 Na sha fama, na sha wuya, na sha rashin barci, na sha yunwa da ƙishirwa, sau da yawa na rasa abinci, na sha sanyi da huntanci." 
2Corinthians11:28 Banda waɗansu abubuwa dabam kuma, kowace rana ina a matse da matsananciyar kula saboda dukan ikilisiyoyi." 
2Corinthians11:29 Wane ne ya raunana da ban raunana ba? Wane ne aka sa tuntuɓe, ban ji zafin ba?" 
2Corinthians11:30 In ma lalle ne in yi gadara, to, sai in yi taƙama da abubuwan da suke nuna raunanata." 
2Corinthians11:31 Allahn Ubangiji Yesu, wato Ubansa, wanda ya yabo ya tabbata a gare shi har abada, ya sani ba ƙarya nake yi ba." 
2Corinthians11:32 A Dimashƙu gwamnan da yake ƙarƙashin sarki Aretis ya tsare ƙofofin birnin Dimashƙu don ya kama ni," 
2Corinthians11:33 amma sai aka zura ni a cikin babban kwando ta tagar garu, na kuɓuce masa." 
2Corinthians12:1 An tilasta mini ne in yi gadara, ko da yake ba ta amfane ni da kome ba. Amma zan ci gaba da zancen ruya da wahayi da Ubangiji ya yi mini." 
2Corinthians12:2 Na san wani mutum wanda yau shekara goma sha huɗu ke nan, aka ɗauke shi zuwa Sama ta uku bisa ga ikon Almasihu, ko yana a cikin jiki ne, ko ba a cikin jiki ba, ban sani ba, Allah ne masani." 
2Corinthians12:3 Na kuma san mutumin nan, an ɗauke shi zuwa Firdausi, ko yana a cikin jiki ne, ko ba a cikin jiki ba, ban sani ba, Allah ne masani," 
2Corinthians12:4 ya kuma ji waɗansu maganganu, waɗanda ba dama a faɗa, irin ma waɗanda ɗan adam ba shi da izinin faɗa." 
2Corinthians12:5 Zan yi gadara da mutumin nan kam, amma ba zan yi gadara da kaina ba, sai dai ko da raunanata." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ko da zan so yin gadara ma, ba zan zama wawa ba, gama gaskiya zan faɗa. Amma na bar zancen haka, don kada wani ya ɗauke ni fiye da yadda yake ganina, ko yadda yake jin maganata." 
2Corinthians12:7 Don kada kaina yă kumbura kuma saboda mafifitan wahayan da aka yi mini, sai aka saka mini wata cuta, wadda ta zama mini ƙaya, jakadan Shaiɗan, don yă riƙa wahalshe ni, don kada kaina ya kumbura." 
2Corinthians12:8 Sau uku nake roƙon Ubangiji a kan wannan abu ya rabu da ni," 
2Corinthians12:9 amma ya ce mini, “Alherina yā isa, domin ta wajen rashin ƙarfi ake ganin cikar ikona.” Saboda haka sai ma in ƙara yin alfarma da raunanata da farinciki fiye da na da, domin ikon Almasihu ya zauna a tare da ni." 
2Corinthians12:10 Saboda haka, ina murna da raunanata, da cin mutuncin da ake yi mini, da shan wuya, da shan tsanani, da masifu saboda Almasihu, don sa'ad da nake rarrauna, a sa'an nan ne nake da ƙarfi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Na yi wauta kam, amma ku ne kuke tilasta mini, ku ne kuwa ya kamata ku yaba mini, domin ba inda na kasa waɗannan mafifitan manzanni, ko da yake ni ba kome ba ne." 
2Corinthians12:12 An gudanar da tabbatattun alamun manzo a cikinku ta matuƙar jimiri, da alamu da abubuwan al'ajabi da mu'ujizai." 
2Corinthians12:13 Ta wace hanya ce kuka kasa sauran ikkilisiyoyi? Ko kuwa domin dai ni ban nauyaya muku ba? To, ku yafe mini wannan laifi!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Ga shi, na yi shirin zuwa wurinku, zuwa na uku, ba kuwa zan nauyaya muku ba, don ba abinku nake nema ba, ku nake nema, domin ba yara ne da ɗaukar nauyin iyayensu ba, sai dai iyaye ne da ɗaukar nauyin yaran." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ni kam, zan kashe dukan abin hannuna da dukan zarafina da matuƙar farin ciki saboda ranku. In na ƙara ƙaunarku, ashe, sai a rage ƙaunata?" 
2Corinthians12:16 To, a ce ban nauyaya muku ba ɗin, ashe, sai ku ce dabara na yi muku, na shawo kanku ta hanyar yaudara!" 
2Corinthians12:17 Na cuce ku ne ta wurin wani daga cikin waɗanda na aiko a gare ku? 
2Corinthians12:18 Na roƙi Titus ya je, na kuma aiko ɗan'uwan nan tare da shi. To, Titus ya cuce ku ne? Ashe, ba Ruhu ɗaya yake bi da mu ba, ni da shi? Ba kuma hanya ɗaya muke bi ba?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Na roƙi Titus ya je, na kuma aiko ɗan'uwan nan tare da shi. To, Titus ya cuce ku ne? Ashe, ba Ruhu ɗaya yake bi da mu ba, ni da shi? Ba kuma hanya ɗaya muke bi ba?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Ashe, tun dā tsammani kuke yi muna kawo hanzarinmu a gare ku ne? A'a, a gaban Allah muke magana, muna na Almasihu, wannan kuwa duk domin inganta ku ne, ya ku ƙaunatattu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ina tsoro kada watakila in na zo in same ku ba a yadda nake so ba, ku kuma ku gan ni ba a yadda kuke so ba, ko ma a tarar da jayayya, da kishi, da fushi, da sonkai, da yanke, da tsegunguma, da girmankai, da tashin hankali." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ina tsoro kada in na sāke zuwa, Allahna ya ƙasƙanta ni a gabanku, in kuma yi baƙin ciki saboda waɗansu da yawa da suka yi zunubi a dā, ba su kuwa tuba da aikinsu na lalata ba, da fasikancinsu, da fajircinsu da suka aikata." 
2Corinthians13:1 Wannan shi ne zai zama zuwana na uku a gare ku. Lalle ne kuwa a tabbatar da kowace magana a bakin shaidu biyu ko uku. 
2Corinthians13:2 Na gargaɗi waɗanda suka yi zunubi a dā, da kuma saura duka, a yanzu kuma da ba na nan ina yi musu gargaɗi, kamar yadda na yi sa'ad da nake nan a zuwana na biyu, cewa in na sāke zuwa ba zan sawwaƙe musu ba." 
2Corinthians13:3 In dai nema kuke yi ku tabbata, cewa da izinin Almasihu nake magana, to, ai, shi ba rarrauna ba ne a gare ku, amma ƙaƙƙarfa ne a cikinku." 
2Corinthians13:4 Ko da yake an gicciye shi ne da rashin ƙarfi, duk da haka a raye yake ta ikon Allah. Mu ma marasa ƙarfi ne kamarsa, amma a game da al'amuranku da za mu zartar, a raye muke tare da shi, ta ikon Allah." 
2Corinthians13:5 Ku jarraba kanku ku gani, ko har yanzu kuna a raye da bangaskiya. Ku riƙa auna kanku. Ashe, ba ku tabbata Almasihu yana a cikinku ba? Sai ko in kun kasa ga gwajin!" 
2Corinthians13:6 Muna fata ku gane, mu ba mu kāsa ba." 
2Corinthians13:7 Amma muna roƙon Allah kada ku yi wani mugun abu, ba don mu mu zama kamar mun ci gwajin kawai ba, sai dai domin ku yi abin da yake daidai, ko da yake za ku ga kamar mun kāsa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Domin ba dama mu sāɓa wa gaskiya, sai dai mu bi bayan gaskiyar." 
2Corinthians13:9 Gama farin ciki muke yi in muna raunana, ku kuna ƙarfafa. Addu'armu ita ce ku kammala." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ina rubuta wannan ne sa'ad da ba na tare da ku, domin sa'ad da na zo, kada ya zama mini tilas in yi muku tsanani a game da nuna ikon nan da Ubangiji ya ba ni saboda ingantawa, ba saboda rushewa ba." 
2Corinthians13:11 Daga ƙarshe kuma, 'yan'uwa, sai wata rana. Ku kammala halinku. Ku kula da roƙona, ku yi zaman lafiya da juna, ku yi zaman salama, Allah mai zartar da ƙauna da salama kuwa zai kasance a tare da ku." 
2Corinthians13:12 Ku gaggai da juna da tsattsarkar sumba. 
2Corinthians13:13 Dukan tsarkaka suna gaishe ku. 
2Corinthians13:14 Alherin Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu, da ƙaunar Allah, da zumuntar Ruhu Mai Tsarki su tabbata a gare ku duka." 
Galatians1:1 Daga Bulus, manzo, ba kuwa manzon mutum ba, ba kuma ta wurin wani mutum ba, sai dai ta wurin Yesu Almasihu, da Allah Uba, wanda ya tashe shi daga matattu," 
Galatians1:2 da kuma dukan 'yan'uwa da suke tare da ni, zuwa ga ikilisiyoyin ƙasar Galatiya." 
Galatians1:3 Alheri da salama na Allah Uba su tabbata a gare ku, da na Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu," 
Galatians1:4 wanda ya ba da kansa saboda zunubanmu, domin yă cece mu daga mugun zamanin nan, bisa ga nufin Allahnmu, wato Ubanmu." 
Galatians1:5 Ɗaukaka tā tabbata a gare shi har abada abadin. Amin. 
Galatians1:6 Na yi mamaki yadda nan da nan kuke ƙaurace wa wanda ya kira ku, bisa ga alherin Almasihu, har kuna koma wa wata baƙuwar bishara," 
Galatians1:7 alhali kuwa ba wata bishara dabam, sai dai akwai waɗansu da suke ta da hankalinku, suna son jirkitar da bisharar Almasihu." 
Galatians1:8 Amma ko mu, ko kuma wani mala'ika daga sama, in waninmu zai yi muku wata bishara dabam da wadda muka yi muku, to, ya zama la'ananne!" 
Galatians1:9 Kamar yadda muka faɗa a dā, haka yanzu ma nake sāke faɗa, cewa kowa ya yi muku wata bishara dabam da wadda kuka karɓa, to, yă zama la'ananne!" 
Galatians1:10 To, wato ni son mutane nake nema ne, ko kuwa na Allah? Ko kuwa ƙoƙari nake yi in faranta wa mutane zuciya? Da har yanzu mutane nake faranta wa zuciya, ai, da ban zama bawan Almasihu ba." 
Galatians1:11 Ina so in sanar da ku, 'yan'uwa, bisharar nan da na sanar ba ta ɗan adam ba ce," 
Galatians1:12 domin ba daga wurin mutum na samo ta ba, ba kuma koya mini ita aka yi ba, sai dai ta wurin bayyanar Yesu Almasihu a gare ni ne na same ta." 
Galatians1:13 Kun dai ji irin zamana na dā a cikin addinin yahudanci, yadda na riƙa tsananta wa Ikkilisiyar Allah ƙwarai da gaske, har ina ta watsa ta," 
Galatians1:14 yadda kuma a cikin addinin Yahudanci har na tsere wa yawancin tsararrakina a cikin mutanenmu, na himmantu ƙwarai da gaske ga bin al'adun kakanninmu." 
Galatians1:15 Amma sa'ad da shi wannan da ya keɓe ni tun kafin a haife ni, ya kuma kira ni bisa ga alherinsa, ya ji daɗin" 
Galatians1:16 bayyana Ɗansa a gare ni, domin in sanar da shi ga al'ummai, ban yi shawara da ɗan adam ba," 
Galatians1:17 ban kuma je Urushalima wurin waɗanda suka riga ni zama manzanni ba, sai nan da nan na je ƙasar Larabawa, sa'an nan na komo Dimashƙu." 
Galatians1:18 Bayan shekara uku kuma sai na tafi Urushalima ganin Kefas, na kuwa kwana goma sha biyar a gunsa." 
Galatians1:19 Amma ban ga ko ɗaya a cikin sauran manzanni ba, sai dai Yakubu ɗan'uwan Ubangiji." 
Galatians1:20 Abin nan da nake rubuto muku fa, ba ƙarya nake yi ba, a gaban Allah nake faɗa." 
Galatians1:21 Daga baya kuma, na tafi ƙasar Suriya da ta Kilikiya." 
Galatians1:22 Amma kuwa ikilisiyoyin Almasihu da suke a ƙasar Yahudiya, ba su san ni ido da ido ba tukuna." 
Galatians1:23 Sai dai kawai sun ji an ce, “Wanda dā yake tsananta mana, ga shi, a yanzu yana sanar da bangaskiyar nan da dā yake ta rusawa!”" 
Galatians1:24 Sai suka ɗaukaka Allah saboda ni. 
Galatians2:1 Bayan shekara goma sha huɗu na sāke komawa Urushalima tare da Barnaba, na kuma ɗauki Titus." 
Galatians2:1 Bayan shekara goma sha huɗu na sāke komawa Urushalima tare da Barnaba, na kuma ɗauki Titus." 
Galatians2:2 Da umarnin wahayi ne na tafi, har na rattaba musu bisharar da nake yi a cikin al'ummai, amma a keɓance a gaban waɗansu shugabannin ikkilisiya, kada himmar da nake yi, ko wadda na riga na yi, ta zamana ta banza ce." 
Galatians2:3 Kai, ko Titus ma da yake a tare da ni, ba a tilasta masa yin kaciya ba, ko da yake shi Bahelene ne." 
Galatians2:3 Kai, ko Titus ma da yake a tare da ni, ba a tilasta masa yin kaciya ba, ko da yake shi Bahelene ne." 
Galatians2:4 Maganar nan ta tashi saboda 'yan'uwan ƙaryar nan ne, da aka shigo da su a asirce, waɗanda suka saɗaɗo su yi ganganen 'yancinmu da muke da shi ta wurin Almasihu Yesu, don dai su sa mu bauta." 
Galatians2:5 Amma ko kaɗan ba mu sakar musu ba, ko da taƙi, domin gaskiyar bishara tă zaune muku." 
Galatians2:6 Waɗanda kuma aka ɗauka a dā a kan su wani abu ne (ko su wane ne, ai, duk ɗaya ne a guna, domin Allah ba ya tāra), ina dai gaya muku waɗannan da suke wani abu ne a dā, ba su ƙare ni da kome ba." 
Galatians2:7 Amma da suka ga an amince mini in yi wa marasa kaciya bishara, kamar yadda aka amince wa Bitrus ya yi wa masu kaciya bishara," 
Galatians2:8 (domin shi da ya yi aiki a zuciyar Bitrus ya sa shi manzo ga masu kaciya, shi ne kuma ya yi aiki a zuciyata, ya sa ni manzo ga al'ummai)," 
Galatians2:9 sai Yakubu da Kefas da Yahaya, su da suke shahararrun ginshiƙan ikkilisiya, da suka ga alherin da Allah ya yi mini, sai suka karɓe mu, ni da Barnaba, hannu biyu biyu, domin mu mu je wurin al'ummai, su kuwa gun masu kaciya." 
Galatians2:10 Sai dai kuma suna so mu tuna matalauta, wannan kuwa ko dā ma ina da himmar yi ƙwarai." 
Galatians2:11 Amma da Kefas ya zo Antakiya, sai na tsaya masa fuska da fuska don laifinsa a fili yake." 
Galatians2:12 Don kafin waɗansu su zo daga wurin Yakubu, yakan ci abinci da al'ummai. Amma da suka zo, ya janye jiki ya ware kansa, yana tsoron ɗariƙar masu kaciyar nan." 
Galatians2:13 Haka ma sauran Yahudawa masu bi suka nuna fuska biyu kamarsa, ko da Barnaba ma sai da suka ciwo kansa da munafuncinsu." 
Galatians2:14 Amma da na ga dai ba sa bin gaskiyar bishara sosai, na ce wa Kefas a gaban idon kowa, “Kai da kake Bayahude, in ka bi al'adar al'ummai ba ta Yahudawa ba, yaya kake tilasta wa al'ummai su bi al'adar Yahudawa?" 
Galatians2:15 “Mu da aka haifa Yahudawa, ba al'ummai masu zunubi ba," 
Galatians2:16 da yake mun sani mutum ba ya samun kuɓuta ga Allah ta wurin bin Shari'a, sai dai ta wurin gaskatawa ga Yesu Almasihu kaɗai, mu ma mun gaskata da Almasihu Yesu, domin mu sami kuɓuta ga Allah ta wurin bangaskiya ga Almasihu, ba ta wurin bin Shari'a ba, don ba ɗan adam ɗin da zai sami kuɓuta ga Allah ta hanyar bin Shari'a." 
Galatians2:17 In kuwa ya zamana, sa'ad da muke neman kuɓuta ga Allah ta wurin Almasihu, an tarar har mu kanmu ma masu zunubi ne, ashe, Almasihu yana hidimar zunubi ne? A'a, ko kusa!" 
Galatians2:18 Amma in na sāke ginin abin da dā na rushe, na tabbata mai laifi ke nan." 
Galatians2:19 Gama ni ta wurin Shari'a matacce ne ga Shari'a domin in rayu ga Allah. 
Galatians2:20 An gicciye ni tare da Almasihu. Yanzu ba ni ne kuma nake a raye ba, Almasihu ne yake a raye a cikina. Rayuwar nan kuma da nake yi ta jiki, rayuwa ce ta wurin bangaskiya ga Ɗan Allah, wanda ya ƙaunace ni, har ya ba da kansa domina." 
Galatians2:21 Ba na tozarta alherin Allah. Don da ta wurin bin Shari'a ake samun adalcin Allah, ashe, da Almasihu ya mutu a banza ke nan.”" 
Galatians3:1 Ya ku Galatiyawa marasa azanci! Wa ya ɗauke hankalinku? Ku da aka bayyana muku Yesu Almasihu gicciyeyye sosai. 
Galatians3:2 Abu ɗaya kaɗai zan tambaye ku. Kun sami Ruhu saboda bin Shari'a ne, ko kuwa saboda gaskatawa ga maganar da kuka ji?" 
Galatians3:3 Ashe, rashin azancinku har ya kai ga haka? Da kuka fara da Ruhu, ashe, a yanzu kuma da halin mutuntaka za ku ƙarasa?" 
Galatians3:4 Ashe, a banza kuka sha wuya iri iri? In dai har a banzan ne!" 
Galatians3:5 Wato, shi da yake yi muku baiwar Ruhu, yake kuma yin mu'ujizai a cikinku, saboda kuna bin Shari'a ne yake yin haka, ko kuwa saboda gaskatawa da maganar da kuka ji?" 
Galatians3:6 Haka ma Ibrahim “ya gaskata Allah, bangaskiyan nan tasa kuma, aka lasafta ta adalci ce a gare shi.”" 
Galatians3:7 Wato kun ga ashe, masu bangaskiya su ne 'ya'yan Ibrahim." 
Galatians3:8 A cikin Nassi kuwa an hango, cewa Allah zai kuɓutar da al'ummai ta wurin bangaskiya, wato, dā ma can an yi wa Ibrahim bishara cewa, “Ta wurinka za a yi wa dukkan al'ummai albarka.”" 
Galatians3:9 To, ashe, masu bangaskiya su ne aka yi wa albarka a game da Ibrahim mai bangaskiyar nan." 
Galatians3:10 Gama duk waɗanda suke dogara da bin Shari'a la'anannu ne, don a rubuce yake cewa, “Duk wanda bai tsaya ga aikata duk abin da yake rubuce a littafin Shari'a ba, la'ananne ne.”" 
Galatians3:11 To, a fili yake, ba mai samun kuɓuta ga Allah ta wurin bin Shari'a, domin “Wanda yake da adalci ta wurin bangaskiya zai rayu.”" 
Galatians3:12 Shari'a kuwa ba ta dangana ga bangaskiya ba, domin ta ce, “Wanda ya aikata ta, ta gare ta ne zai rayu.”" 
Galatians3:13 Almasihu ya fanso mu daga la'anar nan ta Shari'a, da ya zama abin la'ana saboda mu, domin a rubuce yake cewa, “Duk wanda aka kafa a jikin itace, la'ananne ne.”" 
Galatians3:14 An yi wannan kuwa domin albarkar nan da aka yi wa Ibrahim ta saukar wa al'ummai ta wurin Almasihu Yesu, mu kuma ta hanyar bangaskiya mu sami Ruhun nan da aka yi alkawari." 
Galatians3:15 To, 'yan'uwa, bari in yi muku misali. Ko alkawari na mutum ne kawai, in dai an riga an tabbatar da shi, ba mai soke shi, ba kuma mai ƙara wani abu a kai." 
Galatians3:16 To, alkawaran nan, an yi wa Ibrahim ne, da kuma wani a zuriyarsa. Ba a ce, “Da zuriya” ba, kamar suna da yawa. A'a, sai dai ɗaya kawai, aka ce, “Wani a zuriyarka,” wato Almasihu." 
Galatians3:17 Ga abin da nake nufi. Shari'ar nan, wadda ta zo shekara arbaminya da talatin daga baya, ba ta shafe alkawarin nan da Allah ya tabbatar tun tuni ba, har da za ta wofinta shi." 
Galatians3:18 Don da gādon nan ta hanyar Shari'a yake samuwa, ashe, da ba zai zama na alkawarin ke nan ba. Amma Allah ya bai wa Ibrahim ta wurin alkawari ne." 
Galatians3:19 To, mece ce manufar Shari'a? Ƙari aka yi da ita don fitowa da laifi fili, har kafin na zuriyar nan ya zo, wanda aka yi wa alkawarin, an kuma ba da ita ta wurin mala'iku ne, ta hannun matsakanci." 
Galatians3:20 Matsakanci fa ba domin ɗaya ba ne. Amma Allah ɗaya yake. 
Galatians3:21 Wato, Shari'a ta zama saɓanin alkawaran Allah ke nan? A'a, ko kusa! Domin da an ba da wata shari'a mai iya ba da rai, da sai a sami adalcin Allah ta hanyar bin Shari'ar nan." 
Galatians3:22 Amma Nassi ya kulle kowa a cikin zunubi, don albarkar da aka yi alkawari saboda gaskatawa da Yesu Almasihu, a ba da ita ga masu ba da gaskiya." 
Galatians3:23 Tun kafin bangaskiya ta zo, a cikin ƙangin Shari'a muke a kulle, sai a lokacin da bangaskiya ta bayyana." 
Galatians3:24 Ashe kuwa, Shari'a ta zama uwargijiyarmu da ta kai mu ga Almasihu, domin mu sami kuɓuta ga Allah ta wurin bangaskiya." 
Galatians3:25 A yanzu kuwa da bangaskiya ta zo, ba sauran zamanmu a hannun wata uwargijiya." 
Galatians3:26 Domin dukanku 'ya'yan Allah ne, ta wurin bangaskiya ga Almasihu Yesu." 
Galatians3:27 Duk ɗaukacinku da aka yi wa baftisma ga bin Almasihu, kun ɗauki halin Almasihu ke nan." 
Galatians3:28 Ba sauran cewa Bayahude ko Ba'al'umme, ko ɗa, ko bawa, ko namiji ko mace. Ai, dukkanku ɗaya kuke, na Almasihu Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 In kuwa ku na Almasihu ne, ashe, ku zuriyar Ibrahim ne, magāda ne kuma bisa ga alkawarin nan." 
Galatians4:1 Ana nufin, magaji, muddin yana yaro bai fi bawa ba, ko da yake yana da mallakar dukkan kome." 
Galatians4:2 A hannun iyayen goyo da wakilai yake har zuwa ranar da mahaifinsa ya sa. 
Galatians4:3 Haka yake a gare mu, wato sa'ad da muke kamar yara, a cikin ƙangin bautar al'adun duniya muke." 
Galatians4:4 Amma da lokaci ya yi sosai, sai Allah ya aiko Ɗansa, haifaffen mace, haifaffe kuma a ƙarƙashin Shari'a," 
Galatians4:5 domin ya fanso waɗanda suke a ƙarƙashin Shari'a, a mai da mu a matsayin 'ya'yan Allah." 
Galatians4:6 Tun da yake ku 'ya'ya ne, sai Allah ya aiko da Ruhun Ɗansa a cikin zukatanmu, yana kira, “Ya Abba! Uba!”" 
Galatians4:7 Don haka, kai ba bawa ba ne kuma, amma ɗa ne. Da yake ɗa ne kuma, to, magāji ne bisa ga ikon Allah." 
Galatians4:8 Dā da ba ku san Allah ba, kuna bauta wa waɗansu gumaka, waɗanda ga ainihi ba a bakin kome suke ba." 
Galatians4:9 Amma a yanzu da kuka san Allah, ko ma dai a ce Allah ya san ku, ta yaya za ku sāke komawa a kan raunanan al'adu marasa biyan bukata, har kuna neman komawa ga bautarsu?" 
Galatians4:10 Ga shi, al'adun ranaku, da na watanni, da na lokatai, da na shekaru ba sa wuce ku!" 
Galatians4:11 Amma kun ba ni tsoro, kada ya zamana na yi wahala a kanku a banza!" 
Galatians4:12 Ina roƙonku, ya ku 'yan'uwana, ku zama kamar yadda nake, domin ni ma in zama kamar yadda kuke. Ba ku taɓa yi mini wani laifi ba." 
Galatians4:13 Kun dai sani a dalilin rashin lafiyata ne na yi muku bishara a zuwana na fari. 
Galatians4:14 Ko da yake rashin lafiyata ta hana ku sukuni, duk da haka ba ku nuna mini raini ko ƙyama ba, sai dai kuka yi na'am da ni kamar wani mala'ikan Allah, ko ma Almasihu Yesu kansa." 
Galatians4:15 To, ina daɗin nan da kuka ji a game da ni? Don na shaide ku a kan lalle da mai yiwuwa ne da kun ƙwaƙule idanunku kun ba ni!" 
Galatians4:16 Ashe, wato na zama abokin gābarku ne don na gaya muku gaskiya?" 
Galatians4:17 Waɗannan suna habahaba da ku, amma ba da kyakkyawar niyya ba. Niyyarsu su raba ku da mu, don su ma ku yi habahaba da su." 
Galatians4:18 Ai, in da kyakkyawar niyya, abu ne mai kyau koyaushe a yi habahaba da mutum, ba sai ina tare da ku kaɗai ba." 
Galatians4:19 Ya ku 'ya'yana ƙanana, ina sāke shan wahalar naƙudarku, har Almasihu ya siffatu a zuciyarku!" 
Galatians4:20 Da ma a ce ina tare da ku a yanzu in sauya muryata! Gama na ruɗe a kan sha'aninku. 
Galatians4:21 Ku gaya mini, ku da kuke son Shari'a ta yi iko da ku, ba kwa sauraron Sharia ne?" 
Galatians4:22 Domin a rubuce yake, Ibrahim yana da 'ya'ya biyu maza, ɗaya ɗan kuyanga, ɗaya kuma ɗan 'ya." 
Galatians4:23 Ɗan kuyangar nan, an haife shi ne bisa ga ɗabi'a, ɗan 'yar kuwa ta cikar alkawarin ne." 
Galatians4:24 Wannan kuwa duk don ishara ne, wato matan nan a kan alkawari biyu suke. Ɗaya tushensa Dutsen Sina'i, mai haihuwar bayi, wato Hajaratu ke nan." 
Galatians4:25 To, ai, Hajaratu Dutsen Sina'i ce a ƙasar Larabawa. Ita ce kwatancin Urushalima ta yanzu, don ita da 'ya'yanta duk a bauta suke." 
Galatians4:26 Amma Urushalima ta sama, ai 'ya ce, ita ce kuma uwarmu." 
Galatians4:27 Domin a rubuce yake cewa, “ki yi farin ciki, ya ke bakarariya da ba kya haihuwa, Ki ɗauki sowa, ke da ba kya naƙuda, Don yasasshiya ta fi mai miji yawan 'ya'ya.”" 
Galatians4:28 To, 'yan'uwa, mu ma 'ya'yan alkawari ne kamar Ishaku." 
Galatians4:29 Kamar yadda dā, shi da aka haifa bisa ga ɗabi'a ya tsananta wa wanda aka haifa bisa ga ikon Ruhun, haka a yanzu ma yake." 
Galatians4:30 Amma me Nassin ya ce? “Ka kori kuyangar da ɗanta, don ko kaɗan ɗan kuyangar ba zai ci gādo tare da ɗan 'ya ba.”" 
Galatians4:31 Saboda haka 'yan'uwa, mu ba 'ya'yan kuyanga ba ne, na 'ya ne." 
Galatians5:1 Almasihu ya 'yanta mu, 'yantawar gaske. Don haka sai ku dāge, kada ku sāke sarƙafewa a cikin ƙangin bauta." 
Galatians5:2 To, ni Bulus, ina gaya muku, in kuna yarda a yi muku kaciya, Almasihu ba zai amfane ku kome ba ke nan." 
Galatians5:3 Ina sāke tabbatar wa duk wanda ya yarda a yi masa kaciya, cewa wajibi ne ya bi dukkan Shari'a." 
Galatians5:4 Ku da kuke neman kuɓuta ga Allah ta wurin bin Shari'a, kun katse daga Almasihu ke nan, kun noƙe daga alherin Allah." 
Galatians5:5 Gama mu, ta wurin ikon Ruhu, muke ɗokin cikar begen nan namu na samun adalcin Allah saboda bangaskiya." 
Galatians5:6 In muna a cikin Almasihu Yesu, kaciya da rashin kaciya ba a bakin kome suke ba. Bangaskiya mai aikata ƙauna ita ce wani abu." 
Galatians5:7 Dā, ai, kuna ci gaba sosai. Wane ne ya hana ku bin gaskiya?" 
Galatians5:8 Wannan rarrashin da ake muku ba daga wanda ya kira ku ba ne. 
Galatians5:9 Ai, ɗan yisti kaɗan, yake game dukkan curin gurasa." 
Galatians5:10 Na dai amince da ku a cikin Ubangiji, ba za ku bi wani ra'ayi dabam da nawa ba. Wannan da yake ta da hankalinku kuwa zai sha hukunci, ko shi wane ne." 
Galatians5:11 Amma 'yan'uwa, in da har yanzu wa'azin yin kaciya nake yi, to, don me har yanzu ake tsananta mini? In da haka ne, ashe, an kawar da hamayyar da gicciyen Almasihu yake sawa ke nan!" 
Galatians5:12 Da ma a ce masu ta da hankalinku ɗin nan su mai da kansu babanni! 
Galatians5:13 Ya ku 'yan'uwa, don 'yanci musamman aka kira ku, amma kada ku mai da 'yancin nan naku hujjar biye wa halin mutuntaka, sai dai ku bauta wa juna da ƙauna." 
Galatians5:14 Don duk Shari'a an ƙunshe ta ne a kalma guda, wato, “Ka ƙaunaci maƙwabcinka kamar kanka.”" 
Galatians5:15 Amma in kuna cin naman juna, ku mai da hankali fa, hanyar hallaka juna ke nan." 
Galatians5:16 Maganata ita ce, ku yi zaman Ruhu, ba kuwa za ku biye wa halin mutuntaka ba." 
Galatians5:17 Don halin mutuntaka gāba yake yi da Ruhu, Ruhu kuma yana gāba da halin mutuntaka. Waɗannan biyu gāba suke yi da juna, har ba kwa iya yin abin da kuke so." 
Galatians5:18 In Ruhu ne yake bi da ku, ashe, Shari'a ba ta da iko da ku, ke nan." 
Galatians5:19 Aikin halin mutuntaka a fili yake, wato, fasikanci, da aikin lalata, da fajirci," 
Galatians5:20 da bautar gumaka, da sihiri, da gāba, da jayayya, da kishi, da fushi, da sonkai, da tsaguwa, da hamayya," 
Galatians5:21 da hassada, da buguwa, da shashanci, da kuma sauran irinsu. Ina faɗakar da ku kamar yadda na faɗakar da ku a dā, cewa masu yin irin waɗannan abubuwa, ba za su sami gādo a Mulkin Allah ba." 
Galatians5:22 Albarkar Ruhu kuwa ita ce ƙauna, da farin ciki, da salama, da haƙuri, da kirki, da nagarta, da aminci," 
Galatians5:23 da tawali'u da kuma kamunkai. Masu yin irin waɗannan abubuwa, ba dama shari'a ta kama su." 
Galatians5:24 Waɗanda kuwa suke su na Almasihu Yesu ne, sun gicciye halin mutuntaka da mugayen sha'awace-sha'awace iri iri." 
Galatians5:25 In dai rayuwar tamu ta Ruhu ce, to, sai mu tafiyar da al'amuranmu ta wurin ikon Ruhu." 
Galatians5:26 Kada mu zama masu homa, muna tsokanar juna, muna yi wa juna hassada." 
Galatians6:1 Ya ku 'yan'uwa, in an kama mutum yana a cikin yin laifi, ku da kuke na ruhu, sai ku komo da shi a kan hanya da tawali'u, kowa yana kula da kansa kada shi ma ya burmu." 
Galatians6:2 Ku ɗauki wahalar juna, ta haka za ku cika shari'ar Almasihu." 
Galatians6:3 Kowa ya zaci shi wani abu ne, alhali kuwa shi ba kome ba ne, ya ruɗi kansa ke nan." 
Galatians6:4 Kowa yă auna aikinsa ya gani, sa'an nan ne zai iya gadara da maƙaminsa shi da kansa, ba sai ya gwada kansa da wani ba." 
Galatians6:5 Lalle kowa yă ji da kayansa. 
Galatians6:6 Duk wanda aka koya wa Maganar, yă ci moriyar abubuwansa na alheri tare da mai koyarwa." 
Galatians6:7 Kada fa a yaudare ku, ai, ba a iya zambatar Allah. Duk abin da mutum ya shuka, shi zai girba." 
Galatians6:8 Wanda ya yi shuka a kwaɗayin son zuciyarsa, ta wurin son zuciya zai girbi ruɓa. Wanda ya yi shuka a Ruhu, ta wurin Ruhu zai girbi rai madawwami." 
Galatians6:9 Kada mu yi sanyi da yin aiki nagari, don za mu yi girbi a kan kari, in ba mu karai ba." 
Galatians6:10 To, saboda haka, in hali ya yi, sai mu kyautata wa kowa, tun ba ma waɗanda suke jama'ar masu ba da gaskiya ba." 
Galatians6:11 Ku dubi irin rubutu gwada-gwada da nake muku da hannuna! 
Galatians6:12 To, mutanen nan masu son nuna bijinta cikin jiki, su ne masu son tilasta muku yin kaciya, don gudun shan wuya saboda gicciyen Almasihu." 
Galatians6:13 Ai, ko waɗanda aka yi wa kaciya ma ba sa kiyaye Shari'a. Sonsu ne a yi muku kaciya, don su yi fāriya da ku a kan an yi muku kaciya." 
Galatians6:14 Amma ni ko kusa ba zan yi fariya ba, sai dai a game da gicciyen Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, wanda ta albarkacin mutuwarsa a kan gicciye ne na yar da sha'anin duniya, duniya kuma ta yar da sha'anina." 
Galatians6:15 Kaciya da rashin kaciya ba a bakin kome suke ba, sai dai sabuwar halitta ita ce wani abu." 
Galatians6:16 Salama da jinƙai su tabbata ga duk masu bin ka'idar nan, wato Isra'ilar gaske ta Allah." 
Galatians6:17 Daga nan gaba kada kowa ya ƙara damuna, domin a jikina ina da tabbai masu nuna ni bawan Ubangiji Yesu ne." 
Galatians6:18 Alherin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu yă tabbata a gare ku, 'yan'uwa. Amin." 
Ephesians1:1 Daga Bulus, manzon Almasihu Yesu da yardar Allah, zuwa ga mutanensa tsarkaka da suke a Afisa, amintattu a cikin Almasihu Yesu." 
Ephesians1:2 Alheri da salama na Allah ubanmu, da na Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu su tabbata a gare ku." 
Ephesians1:3 Yabo yā tabbata ga Allahn Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, da Ubansa kuma, wanda ya yi mana albarka da kowace albarka ta Ruhu, basamaniya, a cikin Almasihu," 
Ephesians1:4 domin kuwa ya zaɓe mu a cikin Almasihu tun ba a halicci duniya ba, mu zama tsarkaka, marasa aibu a gabansa." 
Ephesians1:5 Ya ƙaddara mu mu zama 'ya'yansa ta wurin Yesu Almasihu, bisa ga nufinsa na alheri," 
Ephesians1:6 domin mu yabi ɗaukakar alherinsa wanda ya ba mu kyauta hannu sake saboda Ƙaunataccensa. 
Ephesians1:7 Ta gare shi ne muka sami fansa albarkacin jininsa, wato yafewar laifofinmu, bisa ga yalwar alherin Allah," 
Ephesians1:8 wanda ya falala mana. Da matuƙar hikima da basira 
Ephesians1:9 ya sanasshe mu asirin nufinsa, bisa ga kyakkyawan nufinsa da ya nufa ya cika ta wurin Almasihu." 
Ephesians1:10 Duk wannan kuwa shiri ne, domin a cikar lokaci a harhaɗa dukkan abubuwa ta wurin Almasihu, wato abubuwan da suke sama, da abubuwan da suke a ƙasa." 
Ephesians1:11 A cikinsa ne aka maishe mu abin gādo na Allah, an kuwa ƙaddara mu ga haka bisa ga nufin wannan da yake zartar da dukkan abubuwa yadda ya yi nufi yă yi," 
Ephesians1:12 domin mu da muka fara kafa bege ga Almasihu mu yi zaman yabon ɗaukakarsa. 
Ephesians1:13 A cikinsa ne ku kuma da kuka ji maganar gaskiya, wato, bisharar cetonku, a cikinsa, sa'ad da kuka ba da gaskiya kuma, aka hatimce ku da Ruhu Mai Tsarki wanda aka alkawarta." 
Ephesians1:14 Shi ne kuwa tabbatawar gādonmu har kafin mu kai ga samunsa, wannan kuma domin yabon ɗaukakarsa ne." 
Ephesians1:15 Saboda haka da yake na ji labarin bangaskiyarku ga Ubangiji Yesu, da kuma ƙaunarku ga dukan tsarkaka," 
Ephesians1:16 ban fāsa gode wa Allah saboda ku ba, duk sa'ad da nake yi muku addu'a," 
Ephesians1:17 da nufin cewa Allah na Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, Uba Maɗaukaki, yă ba ku Ruhu mai ba da hikima da bayani ga sanin Allah," 
Ephesians1:18 a kuma sa ku ku waye ta idon zuci, domin ku san ko mene ne begen nan da ya kira ku a kai, da kuma ko mene ne yalwar gādonsa mai ɗaukaka a game da tsarkaka," 
Ephesians1:19 da kuma ko mene ne girman ikonsa marar misaltuwa da yake zartarwa a gare mu, mu masu ba da gaskiya, wato zartarwar ƙarfin ikon nan nasa," 
Ephesians1:20 wanda ya zartar ga Almasihu sa'ad da ya tashe shi daga matattu, ya kuma ba shi wurin zama a damansa a samaniya," 
Ephesians1:21 a can a birbishin dukkan sarauta da iko, da ƙarfi, da mulki, a birbishin kowane suna da za a sa, ba ma a duniyar nan kawai ba, har ma a lahira ma." 
Ephesians1:22 Allah kuma ya sarayar da kome a ƙarƙashin ikon Almasihu, ya kuma ba da shi ga Ikkilisiya ya zama Kai mai mallakar abu duka." 
Ephesians1:23 Ikkilisiya ita ce jikin Almasihu, cikar mai cika dukkan abu." 
Ephesians2:1 Ku kuma yā raya ku sa'ad da kuke matattu ta wurin laifofinku da zunubanku," 
Ephesians2:2 waɗanda dā kuke a ciki, kuna biye wa al'amarin duniyar nan, kuna bin sarkin masu iko a sararin sama, wato iskar nan da take zuga zuciyar kangararru a yanzu." 
Ephesians2:3 Dukkanmu dā mun zauna a cikinsu, muna biye wa sha'awoyin halin mutuntaka, muna aikata abin da jiki da zuciya suke buri, har ma ga ɗabi'a wajibi ne fushin Allah ya bayyana a kanmu, kamar sauran 'yan adam." 
Ephesians2:4 Amma Allah da yake mai yalwar jinƙai ne, saboda matsananciyar ƙaunar da yake yi mana," 
Ephesians2:5 ko a sa'ad da muke matattu ma ta wurin laifofinmu, sai ya rayar da mu tare da Almasihu (ta wurin alheri an cece ku)," 
Ephesians2:6 a cikin Almasihu Yesu kuma ya tashe mu tare, har ya ba mu wurin zama tare a samaniya." 
Ephesians2:7 Allah ya yi wannan kuwa domin a zamani mai zuwa ya bayyana yalwar alherinsa marar misaltuwa, ta wajen nuna mana alheri ta wurin Almasihu Yesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Domin ta wurin alheri ne aka cece ku saboda bangaskiya, wannan kuwa ba ƙoƙarin kanku ba ne, baiwa ce ta Allah," 
Ephesians2:9 ba kuwa saboda da aikin lada ba, kada wani ya yi fariya." 
Ephesians2:10 Ai, mu aikinsa ne, an sāke halittarmu a cikin Almasihu Yesu musamman domin mu yi kyawawan ayyuka, waɗanda Allah ya tanadar mana tun da fari, mu yi." 
Ephesians2:11 Saboda haka, ku tuna dā ku al'ummai ne bisa ɗabi'a, ga waɗanda ake kira masu kaciyar nan kuwa, sukan kira ku marasa kaciya (ga shi kuwa, kaciyar nan ta jiki ce, wadda ake yi da hannu)." 
Ephesians2:12 Ku kuma tuna a lokacin nan a rabe kuke da Almasihu, bare ne ga jama'ar Isra'ila, bāƙi ne ga alkawaran nan da Allah ya yi, marasa bege, marasa Allah kuma a duniya." 
Ephesians2:13 Amma a yanzu, a cikin Almasihu, ku da dā kuke can nesa, an kawo ku kusa ta wurin jinin Almasihu." 
Ephesians2:14 Domin Almasihu shi ne salamarmu, shi wanda ya mai da Yahudawa da al'ummai ɗaya, wato ya rushe katangar nan da ta raba su a kan gāba." 
Ephesians2:15 Har ya soke Shari'ar nan mai umarni da dokoki, ta wurin ba da jikinsa, domin ta gare shi yă halicci sabon mutum guda daga mutanen nan biyu, ta haka yă kawo salama," 
Ephesians2:16 yă kuma sulhunta su duka biyu ga Allah, su zama jiki ɗaya ta wurin gicciye, ta haka yă kashe gābar." 
Ephesians2:17 Ya kuwa zo ya yi muku albishirin salama, ku da kuke nesa, ya kuma yi wa waɗanda suke kusa." 
Ephesians2:18 Domin ta gare shi ne dukanmu biyu muka sami isa gun Uba ta hanyar Ruhu guda. 
Ephesians2:19 Wato ashe, ku ba baƙi ba ne kuma, ko kuwa bāre, ai, ku abokan 'yanci ne na tsarkaka, iyalin Allah kuma," 
Ephesians2:20 waɗanda aka gina bisa tushen manzanni da annabawa, Almasihu Yesu kansa kuwa shi ne mafificin dutsen ginin," 
Ephesians2:21 dukan wanda aka haɗa tsarin ginin a cikinsa, yana kuma tashi ya zama haikali tsattsarka na Ubangiji." 
Ephesians2:22 A cikinsa ne ku kuma aka gina ku, ku zama mazaunin Allah ta wurin Ruhu." 
Ephesians3:1 Domin haka, ni Bulus, ɗan sarƙa saboda Almasihu Yesu domin amfanin ku al'ummai," 
Ephesians3:2 in dai kun ji labarin mai da ni mai hidimar alherin Allah wanda aka yi mini baiwa saboda ku," 
Ephesians3:3 wato yadda aka sanar da ni asirin Ubangiji ta wahayi, kamar yadda na riga na rubuta a taƙaice." 
Ephesians3:4 A yayin da kuka karanta wannan, za ku iya gane basirata saboda asirin Almasihu," 
Ephesians3:5 wanda a zamanin dā ba a sanar da 'yan adam ba, kamar yadda a yanzu aka bayyana wa manzanninsa tsarkaka da annabawa, ta wurin Ruhu," 
Ephesians3:6 wato, yadda ta wurin bishara al'ummai da suke abokan gādo da mu, gaɓoɓin jiki guda, abokan tarayya kuma ga alkawaran nan a cikin Almasihu Yesu." 
Ephesians3:7 An kuwa sa ni mai hidimar wannan bishara, a bisa ga baiwar alherin Allah da aka yi mini ta ƙarfin ikonsa." 
Ephesians3:8 Ko da yake ni ne mafi ƙanƙantar tsarkaka duka, ni aka ba wannan alheri in yi wa al'ummai bishara a kan yalwar Almasihu marar ƙididdiguwa," 
Ephesians3:9 in kuma bayyana wa dukan mutane shirin asirin nan wanda shekara da shekaru yake a ɓoye a gun Allah, wanda ya halicci dukkan abubuwa." 
Ephesians3:10 An yi wannan ne kuwa domin a yanzu a sanar da hikimar Allah iri iri ga manyan mala'iku da masu iko a samaniya, ta hanyar Ikkilisiya." 
Ephesians3:11 Wannan kuwa bisa ga dawwamammen nufin nan ne da Allah ya zartar a cikin Almasihu Yesu Ubangijinmu. 
Ephesians3:12 A cikinsa muke da gabagaɗin isa ga Allah, da amincewa, ta wurin bangaskiyarmu a gare shi." 
Ephesians3:13 Saboda haka, ina roƙonku kada ku karai da ganin wahalar da nake sha dominku, wannan kuwa ɗaukakarku ce." 
Ephesians3:14 Saboda haka, nake durƙusawa a gaban Uban," 
Ephesians3:15 shi da yake sa wa kowace kabila ta sama da ta ƙasa suna," 
Ephesians3:16 ina addu'a ya yi muku baiwa bisa ga yalwar ɗaukakarsa, ku ƙarfafa matuƙa a birnin zuciyarku ta wurin Ruhunsa," 
Ephesians3:17 har ma Almasihu yă zauna a zukatanku ta wurin bangaskiyarku, domin ƙauna ta kahu da gindinta sosai a zukatanku," 
Ephesians3:18 har ku sami kaifin basira tare da dukan tsarkaka, ku fahimci ko mene ne fāɗin ƙaunar Almasihu, da tsawonta da zacinta, da kuma zurfinta," 
Ephesians3:19 ku kuma san ƙaunar da Almasihu yake yi mana, wadda ta fi gaban sani, domin a cika ku da dukan falala ta Allah." 
Ephesians3:20 Ɗaukaka tā tabbata ga wannan da yake da ikon aikatawa fiye da dukkan abin da za mu roƙa, ko za mu zata nesa, wato, aikatawa ta ƙarfin ikonsa da yake aiki a zuciyarmu." 
Ephesians3:21 Ɗaukaka tă tabbata a gare shi a cikin Ikkilisiya ta wurin Almasihu Yesu, har ya zuwa dukkan zamanai har abada abadin. Amin." 
Ephesians4:1 Don haka, ni ɗan sarƙa saboda Ubangiji, ina roƙonku ku yi zaman da ya cancanci kiran da aka yi muku," 
Ephesians4:2 da matuƙar tawali'u, da salihanci, da haƙuri, kuna jure wa juna saboda ƙauna." 
Ephesians4:3 Da ƙwazo ku kiyaye ɗayantuwar da Ruhu yake zartarwa, kuna a haɗe a cikin salama." 
Ephesians4:4 Jiki guda ne, Ruhu kuma guda, kamar yadda aka kira ku a kan begen nan guda, wanda yake game da kiran nan." 
Ephesians4:5 Ubangiji guda ne, bangaskiya guda, da kuma baftisma guda." 
Ephesians4:6 Allah ɗaya ne, Ubanmu duka, wanda yake bisa duka, ta wurin duka, a cikin duka kuma." 
Ephesians4:7 Amma an ba kowannenmu alheri gwargwadon baiwar Almasihu. 
Ephesians4:8 Saboda haka, Nassi ya ce, “Sa'ad da ya hau Sama ya bi da rundunar kamammu, Ya kuma yi wa 'yan adam baye-baye.”" 
Ephesians4:9 (Wato, da aka ce “ya hau” ɗin, me aka fahimta, in ba cewa dā ya sauka a can ƙasa ba?" 
Ephesians4:10 Shi wanda ya sauka ɗin, shi ne kuma ya hau a can birbishin dukkan sammai, domin yă cika kome.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Ya kuma yi wa waɗansu baiwa su zama manzanni, waɗansu annabawa, waɗansu masu yin bishara, waɗansu makiyaya masu koyarwa," 
Ephesians4:12 domin tsarkaka su samu, su iya aikin hidimar Ikkilisiya, domin a inganta jikin Almasihu," 
Ephesians4:13 har mu duka mu riski haɗa kan nan na bangaskiya ga Ɗan Allah, da kuma saninsa, mu kai maƙamin cikakken mutum, mu kuma kai ga matsayin nan na falalar Almasihu." 
Ephesians4:14 An yi wannan kuwa don kada mu sāke zama kamar yara, waɗanda suke jujjuyawa, iskar kowace koyarwa tana ɗaukar hankalinsu, bisa ga wayon mutane da makircinsu da kissoshinsu." 
Ephesians4:15 A maimakon haka, sai mu faɗi gaskiya game da ƙauna, muna girma a cikinsa ta kowace hanya, wato Almasihu, shi da yake shugabanmu." 
Ephesians4:16 Domin ta gare shi ne dukkan jiki yake a game, yake kuma a haɗe, ta wurin gudunmawar kowace gaɓa, ta wurin kuma aikin kowace gaɓa daidai jikin yake ƙara girma, yana kuma ingantuwa da halin ƙauna." 
Ephesians4:17 To, ina dai faɗa muku, ina kuma nace faɗa muku a cikin Ubangiji, cewa kada ku sāke yin zama irin na al'ummai, masu azancin banza da wofi." 
Ephesians4:18 Duhun zuciya yake a gare su, bare suke ga rai wanda Allah yake bayarwa, sabili da jahilcin da yake a gare su, saboda taurin kansu." 
Ephesians4:19 Zuciyarsu ta yi kanta, sun dulmiya a cikin fajirci, sun ɗokanta ido a rufe ga yin kowane irin aikin lalata." 
Ephesians4:20 Ba haka kuka koyi al'amarin Almasihu ba," 
Ephesians4:21 in da a ce kun saurare shi, an kuma koya muku ta gare shi ne, wato yadda gaskiya ta Yesu take." 
Ephesians4:22 Ku yar da halinku na dā, wanda dā kuke a ciki, wanda yake lalacewa saboda sha'awoyinsa na yaudara," 
Ephesians4:23 ku kuma sabunta ra'ayin hankalinku," 
Ephesians4:24 ku ɗauki sabon halin nan da aka halitta bisa ga kamannin Allah da hakikanin adalci da tsarki. 
Ephesians4:25 Saboda haka, sai ku watsar da ƙarya, kowa yă riƙa faɗar gaskiya ga maƙwabcinsa, gama mu gaɓoɓin juna ne." 
Ephesians4:26 In kun husata, kada ku yi zunubi, kada ma fushinku ya kai faɗuwar rana," 
Ephesians4:27 kada kuma ku bar wa Iblis wata ƙofa. 
Ephesians4:28 Kada ɓarawo ya ƙara yin sata, a maimakon haka sai ya motsa jiki yana aikin gaskiya da hannunsa, har da zai sami abin da zai ba matalauta." 
Ephesians4:29 Kada wata alfasha ta fita daga bakinku, sai dai irin maganar da ta kyautu domin ingantawa, a kuma yi ta a kan kari, domin ta sa alheri ga masu jinta." 
Ephesians4:30 Ku kuma kula, kada fa ku ɓata wa Ruhu Mai Tsarki na Allah rai, wanda aka hatimce ku da shi, cewa ku nasa ne a ranar fansa." 
Ephesians4:31 Ku rabu da kowane irin ɗacin rai, da hasala, da fushi, da tankiya, da yanke, da kowace irin ƙeta." 
Ephesians4:32 Ku yi wa juna kirki, kuna tausayi, kuna yafe wa juna kamar yadda Allah ya yafe muku ta wurin Almasihu." 
Ephesians5:1 Saboda haka sai ku zama masu koyi da Allah, in ku ƙaunatattun 'ya'yansa ne." 
Ephesians5:2 Ku yi zaman ƙauna kamar yadda Almasihu ya ƙaunace mu, ya kuma ba da kansa dominmu, sadaka mai ƙanshi, hadaya kuma ga Allah." 
Ephesians5:3 Kada ma a ko ambaci fasikanci, da kowane irin aikin lalata ko kwaɗayi a tsakaninku, domin kuwa bai dace da tsarkaka ba." 
Ephesians5:4 Haka ma alfasha, da zancen banza da wauta, don bai kamata ba, sai dai a maimakon haka ku riƙa gode wa Allah." 
Ephesians5:5 Kun dai tabbata, ba wani fasiki, ko mai aikin lalata, ko mai kwaɗayi (wanda shi da mai bautar gumaka duk ɗaya ne), da yake da gādo a mulkin Almasihu da na Allah." 
Ephesians5:6 Kada wani ya hilace ku da maganar wofi, gama sabili da waɗannan zunubai ne fushin Allah yake aukawa a kan kangararru." 
Ephesians5:7 Saboda haka, kada ku yi cuɗanya da su," 
Ephesians5:8 domin dā ku duhu ne, amma a yanzu ku haske ne a cikin Ubangiji. Ku yi zaman mutanen haske," 
Ephesians5:9 domin haske shi ne yake haifar duk abin da yake nagari, na adalci, da na gaskiya." 
Ephesians5:10 Ku dai tabbata abin zai gamshi Ubangiji. 
Ephesians5:11 Ku yi nesa da ayyukan duhu na banza da wofi, sai dai ku tona su." 
Ephesians5:12 Gama abin kunya ne a ma faɗi abubuwan da suke yi a asirce. 
Ephesians5:13 Duk abin da aka kawo a gaban haske a san ainihinsa, gama duk abin da aka san ainihinsa ya haskaka." 
Ephesians5:14 Saboda haka aka ce, “Farka, ya kai mai barci, ka tashi daga matattu. Almasihu kuwa zai haskaka ka.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Saboda haka, sai ku mai da hankali ƙwarai ga zamanku, kada ku zama kamar marasa hikima, sai dai masu hikima." 
Ephesians5:16 Ku yi matuƙar amfani da lokaci don kwanaki mugaye ne. 
Ephesians5:17 Don haka kada ku zama marasa azanci, sai dai ku fahimci abin da yake nufin Ubangiji." 
Ephesians5:18 Kada kuma ku bugu da giya, hanyar masha'a ke nan. Sai dai ku cika da Ruhu," 
Ephesians5:19 kuna zance da junanku da kalmomin zabura, da waƙoƙin yabo, da waƙoƙi na ruhu, kuna raira waƙoƙi da zabura ga Ubangiji da yabo a zukatanku." 
Ephesians5:20 Kullum ku riƙa gode wa Allah Uba da sunan Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu a kan ko mene ne. 
Ephesians5:21 Ku bi juna saboda ganin girman Almasihu. 
Ephesians5:22 Ku matan aure, ku yi biyayya ga mazanku, Ubangiji ke nan kuke yi wa." 
Ephesians5:23 Don miji shi ne shugaban matarsa, kamar yadda Almasihu yake shugaban Ikkilisiya, wato, jikinsa, shi kansa kuma shi ne Mai Ceton jikin." 
Ephesians5:24 Kamar yadda Ikkilisiya take bin Almasihu, haka kuma mata su bi mazansu ta kowane hali." 
Ephesians5:25 Ku maza, ku ƙaunaci matanku kamar yadda Almasihu ya ƙaunaci ikkilisiya, har ya ba da kansa dominta," 
Ephesians5:26 domin ya miƙa ta ga Allah, tsarkakakkiya bayan da ya wanke ta da ruwa ta wurin Kalma," 
Ephesians5:27 domin shi kansa yă ba kansa Ikkilisiya da ɗaukakarta, ba tare da tabo ko tamoji ba, ko wani irin abu haka, tă dai zamo tsattsarka marar aibu." 
Ephesians5:28 Ta haka ya wajaba maza su ƙaunaci matansu, jikinsu ke nan suke yi wa. Ai, wanda ya ƙaunaci matarsa, ya ƙaunaci kansa ke nan." 
Ephesians5:29 Domin ba wanda ya taɓa ƙin jikinsa, sai dai ya rene shi, ya yi tattalinsa, kamar yadda Almasihu yake yi wa Ikkilisiya," 
Ephesians5:30 domin mu gaɓoɓin jikinsa ne. 
Ephesians5:31 “Saboda haka ne, mutum sai ya bar mahaifinsa da mahaifiyarsa, ya manne wa matarsa, su biyu su zama jiki guda.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Wannan asiri muhimmi ne, ni kuwa ina nufin Almasihu ne da ikkilisiya." 
Ephesians5:33 Duk da haka dai, sai kowane ɗayanku ya ƙaunaci matarsa kamar kansa, ita matar kuwa ta yi wa mijinta ladabi." 
Ephesians6:1 Ku 'ya'ya, ku yi wa iyayenku biyayya tsakani da Ubangiji, domin wannan shi ne daidai." 
Ephesians6:2 Wannan shi ne umarnin farko mai alkawari, cewa, “ka girmama mahaifinka da mahaifiyarka," 
Ephesians6:3 don al'amarinka ya kyautatu, ka kuma yi tsawon rai a duniya.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Ku ubanni, kada ku sa 'ya'yanku su yi fushi, sai dai ku goye su da tarbiyya, da kuma gargaɗi ta hanyar Ubangiji." 
Ephesians6:5 Ku bayi, ku yi biyayya ga iyayengijinku na duniya, da hali bangirma tare da matsananciyar kula da zuciya ɗaya, Almasihu kuke yi wa ke nan," 
Ephesians6:6 ba aikin ganin ido ba, kamar masu son faranta wa mutane rai, sai dai kamar bayin Almasihu masu aikata abin da Allah yake so, da zuciya ɗaya," 
Ephesians6:7 kuna bauta da kyakkyawar niyya domin Ubangiji kuke yi wa, ba mutane ba." 
Ephesians6:8 Kun sani, kowane alherin da mutum ya yi, ko shi ɗa ne ko bawa, Ubangiji zai sāka masa shi." 
Ephesians6:9 Ku iyayengiji, ku ma ku yi musu haka, ku bar tsorata su, ku sani, shi wanda yake Ubangijinsu da ku duka, yana Sama, shi kuwa ba ya zaɓe." 
Ephesians6:10 A ƙarshe kuma, ku ƙarfafa ga Ubangiji, ga ƙarfin ikonsa." 
Ephesians6:11 Ku yi ɗamara da dukan makamai na Allah, don ku iya dagewa gāba da kissoshin Iblis." 
Ephesians6:12 Ai, famarmu ba da 'yan adam muke yi ba, amma da mugayen ruhohi ne na sararin sama, masarauta, masu iko, da waɗanda ragamar mulkin zamanin nan mai duhu take hannunsu." 
Ephesians6:13 Saboda haka, sai ku ɗauki dukan makamai na Allah, domin ku iya dagewa a muguwar ranar nan, bayan kuma kun gama kome duka, ku dage." 
Ephesians6:14 Saboda haka fa ku dage, gaskiya ta zama ɗamararku, adalci ya zama sulkenku," 
Ephesians6:15 shirin kai bisharar salama ya zama kamar takalmi a ƙafafunku. 
Ephesians6:16 Banda waɗannan kuma, ku ɗauki garkuwar bangaskiya, wadda za ku iya kashe dukan kiban wutar Mugun nan da ita." 
Ephesians6:17 Ku kuma ɗauki kwalkwalin ceto, da takobin Ruhu, wato Maganar Allah," 
Ephesians6:18 a koyaushe kuna addu'a da roƙo ta wurin ikon Ruhu ba fāsawa. A kan wannan manufa ku tsaya da kaifinku da matuƙar naci, kuna yi wa dukan tsarkaka addu'a." 
Ephesians6:19 Ni ma ku yi mini, domin in sami baiwar yin hurci, in yi magana gabagaɗi, in sanar da asirin bishara," 
Ephesians6:20 wadda ni jakadanta ne, ɗaurarre. Ku dai yi mini addu'a, duk sa'ad da nake yin bisharar, in bayyana ta gabagaɗi, kamar yadda ya kamata in yi." 
Ephesians6:21 A yanzu kuwa, don ku ma ku san lafiyata, da kuma halin da nake a ciki, ga Tikikus, ƙaunataccen ɗan'uwa, amintaccen mai hidimar Ubangiji, zai sanar da ku kome." 
Ephesians6:22 Na aiko shi gare ku musamman domin ku san yadda muke, ya kuma ƙarfafa muku zuciya." 
Ephesians6:23 Salamar Allah Uba da ta Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu su tabbata ga 'yan'uwa, tare da ƙauna game da bangaskiya." 
Ephesians6:24 Alheri yă tabbata ga dukkan masu ƙaunar Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu da ƙauna marar ƙarewa. 
Philippians1:1 Daga Bulus da Timoti, bayin Almasihu Yesu, zuwa ga dukan tsarkaka a cikin Almasihu Yesu waɗanda suke a Filibi, tare da masu kula da ikkilisiya da kuma masu hidimarta." 
Philippians1:2 Alheri da salama na Allah ubanmu, da na Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu, su tabbata a gare ku." 
Philippians1:3 Ina gode Allahna duk sa'ad da nake tunawa da ku," 
Philippians1:4 a kullum kuwa a kowace addu'a da nake muku duka, da farin ciki nake yi." 
Philippians1:5 Ina godiya saboda tarayyarku da ni wajen yaɗa bishara, tun daga ranar farko har ya zuwa yanzu." 
Philippians1:6 Na tabbata shi wanda ya fara kyakkyawan aiki a gare ku, zai ƙarasa shi, har ya zuwa ranar Yesu Almasihu." 
Philippians1:7 Daidai ne kuwa a gare ni in riƙa tunaninku haka, ku duka, domin kuna a cikin zuciyata, domin dukanku abokan tarayya ne da ni da alherin Allah, ta wajen ɗaure ni da aka yi, da kuma ta yin kāriyar bishara da tabbatar da ita." 
Philippians1:8 Domin Allah shi ne mashaidina a kan yadda nake begenku duka, da irin ƙaunar da Almasihu Yesu yake yi." 
Philippians1:9 Addu'ata ita ce, ƙaunarku ta riƙa haɓaka da sani da matuƙar ganewa," 
Philippians1:10 domin ku zaɓi abubuwa mafifita, ku zama sahihai, marasa abin zargi, har ya zuwa ranar Almasihu," 
Philippians1:11 kuna da cikakken sakamakon aikin adalci da yake samuwa ta wurin Yesu Almasihu, wannan kuwa duk domin ɗaukakar Allah ne, da yabonsa." 
Philippians1:12 'Yan'uwa, ina so ku sani, al'amuran nan da suka auku a gare ni, har ma sun yi amfani wajen yaɗa bishara," 
Philippians1:13 har dai ya zama sananne ga dukan sojan fāda da sauran jama'a, cewa ɗaurina saboda Almasihu ne." 
Philippians1:14 Har ma galibin 'yan'uwa cikin Ubangiji suka ƙarfafa saboda ɗaurina, sun kuma ƙara fitowa gabagaɗi, su faɗi Maganar Allah ba tare da tsoro ba." 
Philippians1:15 Lalle waɗansu suna wa'azin Almasihu saboda hassada da husuma, amma waɗansu kam, saboda kyakkyawar niyya ne." 
Philippians1:16 Waɗannan suna yi ne a kan ƙauna, sun sani, an sa ni nan ne domin kāriyar bishara." 
Philippians1:17 Waɗancan kuwa suna shelar Almasihu saboda sonkai ne, ba da zuciya ɗaya ba, a sonsu, su wahalar da ni a cikin ɗaurina." 
Philippians1:18 Me kuma? Ta ko yaya dai, ko da gangan, ko da gaske, ana shelar Almasihu, na kuma yi farin ciki da haka. I, zan yi farin ciki kuwa." 
Philippians1:19 Domin na san duk wannan zai zama sanadin lafiyata, ta wurin addu'arku da taimakon Ruhun Yesu Almasihu." 
Philippians1:20 Don kuwa ina ɗoki, ina kuma sa zuciya, ko kaɗan ba zan kunyata ba, sai dai zan yi ƙarfin hali matuƙa a yanzu kamar koyaushe, a girmama Almasihu a jikina, ko ta wurin rayuwata, ko ta wurin mutuwata." 
Philippians1:21 Domin ni, a gare ni, rai Almasihu ne, mutuwa kuwa riba ce." 
Philippians1:22 In ya zamanto rayuwa zan yi a cikin jiki, to, zan yi aiki mai amfani ke nan. Amma na rasa abin da zan zaɓa." 
Philippians1:23 Duka biyu suna jan hankalina ƙwarai. Burina in ƙaura in zauna tare da Almasihu, domin wannan shi ne ya fi kyau nesa." 
Philippians1:24 Amma in wanzu a cikin jiki, shi ya fi wajabta saboda ku." 
Philippians1:25 Na tabbata haka ne, na kuwa sani zan wanzu in zauna tare da ku duka, domin ku ci gaba, bangaskiyarku tana sa ku yin farin ciki," 
Philippians1:26 ku kuma sami ƙwaƙƙwaran dalilin yin taƙama da Almasihu ta wurina, saboda sāke komowata gare ku." 
Philippians1:27 Sai dai ku yi zaman da ya cancanci bisharar Almasihu, domin ko na zo na gan ku, ko kuwa ba na nan, in ji labarinku, cewa kun dage, nufinku ɗaya, ra'ayinku ɗaya, kuna fama tare saboda bangaskiyar da bishara take sawa," 
Philippians1:28 ba kwa kuwa jin tsoron magabtanku sam. Wannan kuwa ishara ce a gare su ta hallakarsu, ku kuwa ta cetonku, isharar kuwa daga Allah take." 
Philippians1:29 Gama an yi muku alheri, cewa ba gaskatawa da Almasihu kawai za ku yi ba, har ma za ku sha wuya dominsa," 
Philippians1:30 kuna shan fama irin nawa wanda kuka gani, wanda kuke ji nake sha har yanzu." 
Philippians2:1 In akwai ƙarfafawa a cikin Almasihu, in dai da ƙarfin rinjaye na ƙauna, in har da tarayyarku ga Ruhu, da soyayyarku da kuma tausayinku," 
Philippians2:2 to, albarkacinsu ku cikasa farin cikina da zamanku lafiya da juna, kuna ƙaunar juna, nufinku ɗaya, ra'ayinku ɗaya." 
Philippians2:3 Kada ku yi kome da sonkai ko girmankai, sai dai da tawali'u, kowa yana mai da ɗan'uwansa ya fi shi." 
Philippians2:4 Kowannenku kada ya kula da harkar kansa kawai, sai dai ya kula har da ta ɗan'uwansa ma." 
Philippians2:5 Ku ɗauki halin Almasihu Yesu," 
Philippians2:6 wanda, ko da yake a cikin surar Allah yake, bai mai da daidaitakar nan tasa da Allah abar da zai riƙe kankan ce ba," 
Philippians2:7 sai ma ya mai da kansa baya matuƙa ta ɗaukar surar bawa, da kuma kasancewa da kamannin ɗan adam." 
Philippians2:8 Da ya bayyana da siffar mutum, sai ya ƙasƙantar da kansa ta wurin yin biyayya, har wadda ta kai shi ga mutuwa, mutuwar ma ta gicciye." 
Philippians2:9 Saboda haka ne kuma Allah ya ɗaukaka shi mafificiyar ɗaukaka, ya kuma yi masa baiwa da sunan nan da yake birbishin kowane suna," 
Philippians2:10 domin dai kowace gwiwa sai ta rusuna wa sunan nan na Yesu, a Sama da ƙasa, da kuma can ƙarƙashin ƙasa," 
Philippians2:11 kowane harshe kuma yă shaida Yesu Almasihu Ubangiji ne, domin ɗaukaka Allah Uba." 
Philippians2:12 Saboda haka, ya ƙaunatattuna, kamar yadda a kullum kuke biyayya, haka kuma yanzu, ku yi ta yin aikin ceton nan naku da halin bangirma tare da matsananciyar kula, ba ma sai ina nan kawai ba, har ma fiye da haka in ba na nan." 
Philippians2:13 Domin Allah shi ne mai aiki a zukatanku, ku nufi abin da yake kyakkyawan nufinsa, ku kuma aikata shi." 
Philippians2:14 Kome za ku yi, kada ku yi da gunaguni, ko gardama," 
Philippians2:15 don ku zama marasa abin zargi, sahihai, 'ya'yan Allah marasa aibu, a zamanin mutane karkatattu, kangararru, waɗanda kuke haskakawa a cikinsu kamar fitilu a duniya," 
Philippians2:16 kuna riƙe da maganar rai kankan, har a ranar bayyanar Almasihu in yi taƙama, cewa himmata da famana ba a banza suke ba." 
Philippians2:17 Ko da za a tsiyaye jinina a kan hadaya da hidima na bangaskiyarku, sai in yi farin ciki, in kuma taya ku farin ciki, ku duka." 
Philippians2:18 Haka ku ma, ya kamata ku yi farin ciki, ku kuma taya ni farin ciki." 
Philippians2:19 Ina sa zuciya ga Ubangiji Yesu in aika muku da Timoti da wuri, don ni ma in ƙarfafa da samun labarinku." 
Philippians2:20 Ba ni da wani kamarsa, wanda da sahihanci zai tsananta kula da zamanku lafiya." 
Philippians2:21 Dukansu sha'anin gabansu kawai suke yi, ba na Yesu Almasihu ba." 
Philippians2:22 Amma, ai, kun san darajar Timoti yadda muka yi bautar bishara tare, kamar ɗa da mahaifinsa." 
Philippians2:23 Shi ne nake fata in aiko, da zarar na ga yadda al'amarina yake gudana." 
Philippians2:24 Na kuma amince har ga Ubangiji, ni ma da kaina ina zuwa ba da daɗewa ba." 
Philippians2:25 Amma na ga lalle ne in aiko muku da Abafaroditas ɗan'uwana, abokin aikina, abokin famana kuma, wanda kuka aiko ya yi mini ɗawainiya." 
Philippians2:26 Yana begenku ku duka, har ma ya damu ƙwarai don kun ji ba shi da lafiya." 
Philippians2:27 Lalle ya yi rashin lafiya, har ya yi kusan mutuwa. Amma Allah ya ji tausayinsa, ba kuwa shi kaɗai ba, har ni ma, don kada in yi baƙin ciki a kan baƙin ciki." 
Philippians2:28 Saboda haka na ɗokanta ƙwarai in turo shi domin ku yi farin cikin sāke ganinsa, ni kuma in rage baƙin cikina." 
Philippians2:29 Don haka sai ku karɓe shi da matuƙar farin ciki saboda Ubangiji, ku kuma girmama irin waɗannan mutane," 
Philippians2:30 domin ya kusa ya mutu saboda aikin Almasihu, yana sai da ransa domin ya cikasa ɗawainiyarku gare ni." 
Philippians3:1 A ƙarshe kuma 'yan'uwa, ku yi farin ciki da Ubangiji. Sāke rubuto muku waɗannan abubuwa bai gundure ni ba, ga shi kuwa, domin lafiyarku ne." 
Philippians3:2 Ku yi hankali da karnukan nan! Ku yi hankali da mugayen ma'aikatan nan! Ku yi hankali da masu yankan jikin nan! 
Philippians3:3 Don mu ne masu kaciyar ainihi, masu bauta wa Allah ta wurin Ruhu, masu taƙama da Almasihu Yesu, ba mu kuma dogara da al'amuran ganin ido," 
Philippians3:4 ko da yake ni ina iya dogara da al'amuran ganin ido, in dai nake so. In kuma akwai wanda yake tsammani yana iya dogara ga al'amuran ganin ido, to, ni na fi shi." 
Philippians3:5 An yi mini kaciya a rana ta takwas, asalina Isra'ila ne, na kabilar Biliyaminu, Ba'ibrane ɗan Ibraniyawa, bisa ga Shari'a kuwa ni Bafarisiye ne," 
Philippians3:6 a wajen himma kuwa mai tsananta wa Ikkilisiya ne ni, wajen aikin adalci kuwa bisa ga tafarkin Shari'a, marar abin zargi nake." 
Philippians3:7 Amma dai kowace irin riba na taɓa ci, na ɗauka hasara ce saboda Almasihu." 
Philippians3:8 Dahir na ɗauki dukkan abubuwa hasara ne, a kan mafificiyar darajar sanin da nake yi na Almasihu Yesu Ubangijina. Saboda shi ne na zaɓi yin hasarar dukkan abubuwa, har ma na mai da su tozari domin Almasihu yă zama nawa," 
Philippians3:9 a kuma same ni a cikinsa, ba da wani adalcin kaina ba, wanda ya danganta da bin Shari'a, sai dai da adalcin nan wanda yake tsirowa daga bangaskiya ga Almasihu, wato, da adalcin nan wanda yake samuwa daga Allah ta wurin bangaskiya." 
Philippians3:10 Muradina ke nan, in san Almasihu, in san ikon tashinsa daga matattu, in yi tarayya da shi a shan wuyarsa, in kuma zama kamarsa a wajen mutuwarsa," 
Philippians3:11 domin ta ko ƙaƙa in kai ga tashin nan daga matattu. 
Philippians3:12 Ba cewa, na riga na kai ga waɗannan ba ne, ko kuwa na zama kammalalle, a'a. sai dai ina nacewa ne, in riƙi abin nan da Almasihu Yesu ma ya riƙe ni saboda shi." 
Philippians3:13 Ya 'yan'uwa, ban ɗauka a kan cewa na riga na riƙi abin ba, amma abu guda kam ina yi, ina mantawa da abin da yake baya, ina kutsawa zuwa ga abin da yake gaba." 
Philippians3:14 Ina nacewa gaba gaba zuwa manufar nan, domin in sami ladar kiran nan zuwa sama, da Allah ya yi mini ta wurin Almasihu Yesu." 
Philippians3:15 Saboda haka ɗaukacin waɗanda suka kammala a cikinmu, sai su bi wannan ra'ayi. In kuwa a game da wani abu ra'ayinku ya sha bambam, to, Allah zai bayyana muku wannan kuma." 
Philippians3:16 Sai dai a duk inda muka kai, mu ci gaba da haka." 
Philippians3:17 Ya ku 'yan'uwa, ku yi koyi da ni dukanku baki ɗaya, ku kuma dubi waɗanda zamansu yake daidai da gurbin da muka bar muku." 
Philippians3:18 Domin da yawa waɗanda na sha gaya muku, yanzu kuma nake gaya muku, har da hawaye, suna bin Yesu, in ji su, amma su magabtan gicciyen Almasihu ne." 
Philippians3:19 Ƙarshensu hallaka ne, Allahnsu ciki ne, rashin kunyarsu ita ce abar taƙamarsu, sun ƙwallafa ransu a kan al'amuran duniya." 
Philippians3:20 Mu kuwa 'yan Mulkin Sama ne, daga can ne kuma muke ɗokin zuwan Mai Ceto, Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu," 
Philippians3:21 wanda zai sāke jikin nan namu na ƙasƙanci, ya mai da shi kamar jikin nan nasa na ɗaukaka, da ikon nan nasa na sarayar da dukkan abubuwa a gare shi." 
Philippians4:1 Saboda haka ya 'yan'uwana, ƙaunatattuna, waɗanda nake bege, ku da kuke abin farin cikina da abin taƙamata kuma, ku dage ga Ubangiji, ya ku ƙaunatattuna." 
Philippians4:2 Na gargaɗi Afodiya, na kuma gargaɗi Sintiki, su yi zaman lafiya da juna saboda su na Ubangiji ne." 
Philippians4:3 Ya kai abokin bautata na hakika, ina roƙonka, ka taimaki matan nan, don sun yi fama tare da ni a al'amarin bishara, haka ma Kilemas da sauran abokan aikina, waɗanda sunayensu suke a rubuce a cikin Littafin Rai." 
Philippians4:4 A kullum ku yi farin ciki da Ubangiji, har wa yau ina dai ƙara gaya muku, ku yi farin ciki." 
Philippians4:5 Bari kowa ya san jimirinku. Ubangiji ya yi kusan zuwa. 
Philippians4:6 Kada ku damu da kome, sai dai a kowane hali ku sanar da Allah bukatunku, ta wurin yin addu'a da roƙo, tare da gode wa Allah." 
Philippians4:7 Ta haka salamar Allah, wadda ta fi gaban dukkan fahimta, za ta tsai da zukatanku da tunaninku ga Almasihu Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Daga ƙarshe kuma, 'yan'uwa, ko mene ne yake na gaskiya, ko mene ne abin girmamawa, ko mene ne daidai, ko mene ne tsattsarka, ko mene ne abin ƙauna, ko mene ne daɗɗaɗar magana, in ma da wani abu mafifici, ko abin da ya cancanci yabo, a kan waɗannan abubuwa za ku yi tunani." 
Philippians4:9 Abin da kuka koya, kuka yi na'am da shi, abin kuma da kuka ji kuka gani a gare ni, sai ku aikata. Ta haka Allah mai zartar da salama zai kasance tare da ku." 
Philippians4:10 Na yi farin ciki da Ubangiji ƙwarai da yake a yanzu kam, kularku gare ni ta farfaɗo, ko dā ma kuna kula da ni, dama ce ba ku samu ba." 
Philippians4:11 Ba cewa, ina kukan rashi ba ne, domin na koyi yadda zan zauna da wadar zuci a cikin kowane irin hali da nake." 
Philippians4:12 Na san yadda zan yi in yi zaman ƙunci, na kuma san yadda zan yi in yi zaman yalwa. A kowane irin hali duka na horu da ƙoshi da yunwa, yalwa da rashi." 
Philippians4:13 Zan iya yin kome albarkacin wannan da yake ƙarfafa ni. 
Philippians4:14 Amma kuwa kun kyauta da kuka taya ni cikin ƙuntatata. 
Philippians4:15 Ku kuma Filibiyawa, ku kanku kun sani tun da aka fara yin bishara, sa'ad da na bar ƙasar Makidoniya, ba wata ikkilisiyar da ta yi tarayya da ni wajen hidimar bayarwa da karɓa, sai dai ku kaɗai." 
Philippians4:16 Ko sa'ad da nake Tasalonika ma, kun aiko mini da taimako ba sau ɗaya ba, ba sau biyu ba." 
Philippians4:17 Ba cewa, don ina neman kyautarku ba ne, a'a, nemar muku amfani nake yi, a ƙara a kan ribarku." 
Philippians4:18 An biya ni sarai, har fi. Bukatata ta biya, da na karɓi kyautar da kuka aiko mini ta hannun Abafaroditas, baiwa mai ƙanshi, hadaya abar karɓa, mai faranta wa Allah rai." 
Philippians4:19 Allahna kuma zai biya muku kowace bukatarku daga cikin yalwar ɗaukakarsa da take ga Almasihu Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Ɗaukaka tā tabbata ga Allahnmu, Ubanmu, har abada abadin. Amin! Amin!" 
Philippians4:21 Ku gai da kowane tsattsarka cikin Almasihu Yesu. 'Yan'uwan da suke tare da ni suna gai da ku. 
Philippians4:22 Dukan tsarkaka suna gai da ku, tun ba ma na fadar Kaisar ba." 
Philippians4:23 Alherin Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu yă tabbata a zukatanku. 
Colossians1:1 Daga Bulus, manzon Almasihu Yesu da yardar Allah, tare da Timoti, ɗan'uwanmu," 
Colossians1:2 zuwa ga tsarkaka da amintattun 'yan'uwa cikin Almasihu da suke a Kolosi. Alheri da salamar Allah Ubanmu su tabbata a gare ku. 
Colossians1:3 A kullum muna gode wa Allah, Uban Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, duk sa'ad da muke yi muku addu'a," 
Colossians1:4 saboda mun ji labarin bangaskiyarku ga Almasihu Yesu, da kuma ƙaunar da kuke yi wa dukan tsarkaka," 
Colossians1:5 saboda bege ga abin da aka tanadar muku a sama. Kun riga kun ji labarin wannan a maganar gaskiya," 
Colossians1:6 wato, bisharar da ta zo muku, kamar yadda ta zo wa duniya duka, tana hayayyafa, tana kuma ƙara yaɗuwa, kamar yadda take yi a tsakaninku tun daga ranar da kuka ji, kuka kuma fahimci alherin Allah na hakika." 
Colossians1:7 Haka ma kuka koya wurin Abafaras, ƙaunataccen abokin bautarmu. Shi amintaccen mai hidima ne na Almasihu a madadinmu," 
Colossians1:8 ya kuma sanasshe mu ƙaunar da kuke yi cikin Ruhu. 
Colossians1:9 Shi ya sa tun a ran da muka ji labarin, ba mu fāsa yi muku addu'a ba, muna roƙo a cika ku da sanin nufin Allah da matuƙar hikima da fahimta na ruhu," 
Colossians1:10 domin ku yi zaman da ya cancanci bautar Ubangiji, kuna faranta masa ta kowane fanni, kuna ba da amfani a kowane aiki nagari, kuna ƙaruwa da sanin Allah." 
Colossians1:11 Allah yă dai ƙarfafa ku da matuƙar ƙarfi bisa ga ƙarfin ɗaukakarsa, domin ku jure matuƙa a game da haƙuri da farin ciki," 
Colossians1:12 kuna gode wa Uba, wanda ya maishe mu mu isa samun rabo cikin gādon tsarkakan da suke a cikin haske." 
Colossians1:13 Ya tsamo mu daga mulkin duhu, ya maishe mu ga mulkin ƙaunataccen Ɗansa," 
Colossians1:14 wanda ta gare shi ne muka sami fansa, wato, gafarar zunubanmu." 
Colossians1:15 Shi ne surar Allah marar ganuwa, magāji ne tun ba a halicci kome ba," 
Colossians1:16 don ta gare shi ne aka halicci dukkan kome, abubuwan da suke a sama da abubuwan da suke a ƙasa, masu ganuwa da marasa ganuwa, ko kursiyai, ko masu mulki, ko masarauta, ko masu iko, wato, dukkan abubuwa an halicce su ne ta wurinsa, shi ne kuma makomarsu." 
Colossians1:17 Shi ne a gaba da dukkan abubuwa, dukkan abubuwa kuma shi ne yake riƙe da su." 
Colossians1:18 Shi ne kai ga jikin nan, wato Ikilisiya. Shi ne tushe, na farko a cikin masu tashi daga matattu, domin ta wurin kowane abu ya zama shi ne mafifici." 
Colossians1:19 A gare shi dukkan cikar Allah ta tabbata, domin Allah yana farin ciki da haka," 
Colossians1:20 da nufin ta wurinsa, Allah yă sulhunta dukkan abubuwa da shi kansa, na ƙasa ko na sama, yana ƙulla zumunci ta wurin jininsa na gicciye." 
Colossians1:21 Ku kuma dā a rabe kuke da Allah, maƙiyansa a zuci, masu mugun aiki." 
Colossians1:22 Amma a yanzu ya sulhunta ku ta hanyar jikinsa na mutuntaka, wato, ta wurin mutuwarsa, domin ya miƙa ku tsarkakakku, marasa aibu, marasa abin zargi kuma a gabansa." 
Colossians1:23 Sai dai fa ku nace wa bangaskiya, zaunannu, kafaffu, ba tare da wata ƙaura daga begen nan na bishara wadda kuka ji ba, wadda aka yi wa dukkan talikan da suke a duniya, wadda kuma ni Bulus na zama mai hidimarta." 
Colossians1:24 To, a yanzu ina farin ciki saboda wuyar da nake sha dominku, a jikina kuma ina cikasa abin da ya saura ga wahalar Almasihu, da aka aza mini saboda jikinsa, wato Ikilisiya," 
Colossians1:25 wadda na zama mai hidimarta bisa ga aikin nan da Allah ya ba ni amana saboda ku, domin in sanar da Maganar Allah sosai," 
Colossians1:26 wato, asirin nan da yake a ɓoye tun zamanai masu yawa, amma a yanzu an bayyana shi ga tsarkakansa." 
Colossians1:27 Su ne Allah ya so ya sanar da yadda irin yalwar ɗaukakar asirin nan take a cikin al'ummai, asirin nan kuwa shi ne Almasihu a cikinku, begen ɗaukakar da za a bayyana." 
Colossians1:28 Shi ne kuwa muke sanarwa, muna yi wa kowane mutum gargaɗi, muna kuma koya wa kowane mutum da matuƙar hikima, da nufin mu miƙa kowane mutum cikakke a cikin Almasihu." 
Colossians1:29 Saboda wannan nake shan wahala, nake fama da matuƙar himma, wadda yake sa mini ta ƙarfin ikonsa." 
Colossians2:1 To, ina so ku san irin yawan shan faman da nake yi dominku, da waɗanda suke a Lawudikiya, da kuma duk waɗanda ba su taɓa ganina ba." 
Colossians2:2 Sona a ƙarfafa musu zuciya, ƙauna tana haɗa su, har su sami dukkan mayalwaciyar fahimta tabbatacciya, da sanin asirin nan na Allah, wato Almasihu," 
Colossians2:3 wanda shi ne taska, wato maɓoyar dukkan mafifitan hikima da sani." 
Colossians2:4 Na faɗi wannan ne don kada kowa ya hilace ku da maganar yaudara. 
Colossians2:5 Don ko da yake a jiki ba na nan, ai, ruhuna yana nan tare da ku, ina kuwa farin cikin ganin kyakkyawan tsarinku, da dagewarku a kan bangaskiyarku ga Almasihu." 
Colossians2:6 Da yake kun yi na'am da Almasihu Yesu Ubangiji, to, sai ku tsaya a gare shi," 
Colossians2:7 kuna kafaffu, kuna ginuwa a cikinsa, kuna tsayawa da bangaskiya gaba gaba, daidai yadda aka koya muku, kuna gode wa Allah a koyaushe." 
Colossians2:8 Ku lura fa, kada kowa ya ribace ku ta hanyar iliminsa na yaudarar wofi, bisa ga al'adar mutane kawai, wato, bisa ga al'adun duniyar nan, ba bisa ga koyarwar Almasihu ba." 
Colossians2:9 Domin a cikinsa ne cikin jiki dukkan cikar Allahntaka take tabbata. 
Colossians2:10 A gare shi ne aka kammala ku, wanda yake shi ne shugaban dukkan sarauta da iko." 
Colossians2:11 A cikinsa ne kuma aka yi muku kaciya, ba kuwa yin mutum ba, amma wadda Almasihu ya yi muku ce, ta wurin tuɓe halinku na mutuntaka." 
Colossians2:12 An kuma binne ku tare da shi a wajen baftisma, inda kuma aka tashe ku tare da shi saboda bangaskiyarku ga ikon Allah, wanda ya tashe shi daga matattu." 
Colossians2:13 Ku kuma da kuke matattu saboda laifofinku, marasa kaciya ta jiki, Allah ya raya ku tare da Almasihu, ya yafe mana dukkan laifofinmu," 
Colossians2:14 ya kuma yanke igiyar nan ta Shari'a da ta ɗaure mu da dokokinta, ya ɗauke ta, ya kafe ta da ƙusa a jikin gicciyensa." 
Colossians2:15 Ya ƙwace makaman masarauta da na masu iko, ya kunyata su a fili, da ya yi nasara a kansu a kan gicciyen." 
Colossians2:16 Saboda haka, kada ku damu in wani ya zarge ku a kan abin da kuke ci, ko abin da kuke sha, ko kuwa kan rashin kiyayewar wani idi, ko tsayawar wata, ko Asabar." 
Colossians2:17 Waɗannan kam, isharori ne kawai na abin da zai auku, amma Almasihu shi ne ainihinsu." 
Colossians2:18 Kada ku yarda kowane mutum ya ɓata ku, da cewa shi wani abu ne saboda, ya ga wahayi, ya kuma lazamta da yin tawali'un ƙarya, in ji shi kuma yana yi wa mala'iku sujada. Irin wannan mutum kumbura kansa yake yi ba dalili, sai ta son zuciya irin na halin mutuntaka," 
Colossians2:19 bai kuwa manne wa kan ba, wanda ta gare shi ne dukkan jiki yake amfana, yake kuma a haɗe, ta wurin gaɓoɓi da jijiyoyi, yake kuma girma da girman da Allah yake sawa." 
Colossians2:20 Idan mutuwarku tare da Almasihu ta 'yanta ku daga al'adun duniyar nan, me ya sa kuke zama har yanzu kamar ku na duniya ne? Don me kuke bin dokokin da aka yi bisa ga umarnin 'yan adam da koyarwarsu," 
Colossians2:21 kamar su, “Kada ka kama, kada ka ɗanɗana, kada ka taɓa”?" 
Colossians2:22 (Wato, ana nufin abubuwan da, in an ci su sukan ruɓa duka)." 
Colossians2:23 Irin waɗannan dokoki kam, lalle suna da'awar hikima ta wajen yin ibadar da aka ƙago, ta wurin yin tawali'un ƙarya da kuma wahalar da jiki, amma ko ɗaya ba su da wata daraja ga sarrafar halin mutuntaka." 
Colossians3:1 To, da yake an tashe ku tare da Almasihu, sai ku nemi abubuwan da suke a Sama, inda Almasihu yake, a zaune a dama ga Allah." 
Colossians3:2 Ku ƙwallafa ranku a kan abubuwan da suke Sama, ba a kan abubuwan da suke a ƙasa ba." 
Colossians3:3 Gama kun mutu, ranku kuwa a ɓoye yake a gun Almasihu cikin Allah." 
Colossians3:4 Sa'ad da Almasihu wanda yake shi ne ranmu ya bayyana, sai ku ma ku bayyana tare da shi a cikin ɗaukaka." 
Colossians3:5 Saboda haka, sai ku kashe zukatanku ga sha'awace-sha'wacen duniya, wato fasikanci, da aikin lalata, da muguwar sha'awa, da mummunan buri, da kuma kwaɗayi, wanda shi ma bautar gumaka ne." 
Colossians3:6 Saboda waɗannan abubuwa ne fushin Allah yake sauka a kan kangararru. 
Colossians3:7 A dā kuna bin waɗannan sa'ad da suke jiki a gare ku. 
Colossians3:8 Amma yanzu sai ku yar da duk waɗannan ma, wato fushi, da hasala, da ƙeta, da yanke, da alfasha." 
Colossians3:9 Kada ku yi wa juna ƙarya, da yake kun yar da halinku na dā, da ayyukansa," 
Colossians3:10 kun ɗauki sabon halin nan da ake sabuntawa ga sani, bisa ga kamannin Mahaliccinsa." 
Colossians3:11 A nan kam, ba hanyar nuna bambanci a tsakanin Ba'al'umme da Bayahude, ko mai kaciya da marar kaciya, ko bare da baubawa, ko ɗa da bawa, sai dai Almasihu shi ne kome, shi kuma yake cikinmu duka." 
Colossians3:12 Saboda haka, sai ku ɗauki halin tausayi, da kirki, da tawali'u, da salihanci, da haƙuri, idan ku zaɓaɓɓu ne na Allah, tsarkaka, ƙaunatattu," 
Colossians3:13 kuna jure wa juna, in kuma wani yana da ƙara game da wani, sai su yafe wa juna. Kamar yadda Ubangiji ya yafe muku, ku kuma sai ku yafe." 
Colossians3:14 Fiye da waɗannan duka, ku ɗau halin ƙauna, wadda dukkan kammala take ƙulluwa a cikinta." 
Colossians3:15 Salamar Almasihu kuma tă mallaki zuciyarku, domin lalle ga haka aka kira ku in kuna jiki guda, ku kuma kasance masu gode wa Allah." 
Colossians3:16 Maganar Almasihu tă kahu a cikin zuciyarku a yalwace, kuna koya wa juna, kuna yi wa juna gargaɗi da matuƙar hikima ta wurin rairar waƙoƙin Zabura da na yabon Allah, kuna kuma raira waƙa ga Allah, kuna gode masa tun daga zuci." 
Colossians3:17 Kome kuke yi, a game da magana ko aikatawa, ku yi duka da sunan Ubangiji Yesu, kuna gode wa Allah Uba ta wurinsa." 
Colossians3:18 Ku matan aure, ku bi mazanku yadda ya dace a cikin Ubangiji." 
Colossians3:19 Ku maza, ku ƙaunaci matanku, kada kuma ku yi musu kaushin hali." 
Colossians3:20 Ku 'ya'ya, ku yi wa iyayenku biyayya ta kowane hali, domin haka Ubangiji yake so." 
Colossians3:21 Ku ubanni, kada ku ƙuntata wa 'ya'yanku, domin kada su karai." 
Colossians3:22 Ku bayi, ku yi biyayya ga waɗanda suke iyayengijinku na duniya ta kowace hanya, ba da aikin ganin ido ba, kamar masu son faranta wa mutane rai, sai dai da zuciya ɗaya, kuna tsoron Ubangiji." 
Colossians3:23 Kome za ku yi, ku yi shi da himma kuna bauta wa Ubangiji ne, ba mutum ba,"
