Colossians3:24 da yake kun sani Ubangiji zai ba ku gādo sakamakonku. Ubangiji Almasihu fa kuke bauta wa! 
Colossians3:25 Mai mugun aiki kuwa za a sāka masa da mugun aikin da ya yi, babu kuma tāra." 
Colossians4:1 Ku iyayengiji kuma, ku riƙi bayinku da gaskiya da daidaita, da yake kun sani ku ma kuna da Ubangiji a Sama." 
Colossians4:2 Ku lazamci yin addu'a, kuna zaune a faɗake a kanta sosai, tare da gode wa Allah," 
Colossians4:3 mu ma ku yi mana addu'a Allah ya buɗe mana hanyar yin Maganarsa, mu sanar da asirin Almasihu, wanda saboda shi ne nake a ɗaure," 
Colossians4:4 domin in bayyana shi sosai, kamar yadda ya kamata in faɗa." 
Colossians4:5 Ku tafiyar da al'amuranku da hikima a cikin zamanku tare da marasa bi, kuna matuƙar amfani da lokaci." 
Colossians4:6 A kullum maganarku ta zama mai ƙayatarwa, mai daɗin ji, domin ku san irin amsar da ta dace ku ba kowa." 
Colossians4:7 Tikikus zai sanar da ku duk abin da nake ciki. Shi ƙaunataccen ɗan'uwa ne, amintaccen mai hidima, abokin bautarmu kuma a cikin Ubangiji." 
Colossians4:8 Na aiko shi a gare ku musamman, domin ku san yadda muke, yă kuma ƙarfafa muku zuciya." 
Colossians4:9 Ga kuma Unisimas a nan tare da shi, amintaccen ɗan'uwa ƙaunatacce, wanda shi ma a cikinku yake. Su za su gaya muku duk abin da ya faru a nan." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarkus, abokin ɗaurina, yana gaishe ku, haka kuma Markus, wanda kakansu ɗaya ne da Barnaba. Shi ne aka riga aka yi muku umarni a game da shi. In dai ya zo wurinku, ku karɓe shi." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarkus, abokin ɗaurina, yana gaishe ku, haka kuma Markus, wanda kakansu ɗaya ne da Barnaba. Shi ne aka riga aka yi muku umarni a game da shi. In dai ya zo wurinku, ku karɓe shi." 
Colossians4:11 Yasuwa kuma da ake kira Yustus yana gaishe ku. Wato, cikin abokan aikina ga Mulkin Allah, waɗannan su kaɗai ne daga cikin Yahudawa masu bi, sun kuwa sanyaya mini zuciya." 
Colossians4:12 Abafaras wanda yake ɗaya daga cikinku, bawan Almasihu Yesu, yana gaishe ku, a kullum yana yi muku addu'a da himma, ku dage, kuna cikakku, masu haƙƙaƙewa cikin dukkan nufin Allah." 
Colossians4:13 Na shaide shi, lalle ya yi muku aiki ƙwarai da gaske, da kuma waɗanda suke na Lawudikiya da na Hirafolis." 
Colossians4:14 Luka, ƙaunataccen likitan nan, da Dimas suna gaishe ku." 
Colossians4:15 A gayar mini da 'yan'uwa na Lawudikiya, da kuma Nimfa da ikilisiyar da take taruwa a gidanta." 
Colossians4:16 Sa'ad da aka karanta wasiƙar nan a gabanku, ku sa a karanta ta kuma a gaban ikilisiyar da take a Lawudikiya, ku kuma ku karanta tasu, wato ta Lawudikiyawa." 
Colossians4:17 Ku kuma faɗa wa Arkibus ya mai da hankali ya cika hidimar da Ubangiji ya sa shi. 
Colossians4:18 Ni Bulus, ni nake rubuta gaisuwar nan da hannuna. Ku tuna da ɗaurina. Alheri yă tabbata a gare ku." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Daga Bulus, da Sila, da Timoti, zuwa ga Ikkilisiyar Tasalonikawa, wadda take ta Allah uba da Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu. Alheri da salama su tabbata a gare ku." 
1Thessalonians1:2 A kullum muna gode wa Allah saboda ku duka, koyaushe muna ambatonku a cikin addu'armu," 
1Thessalonians1:3 ba ma fāsa tunawa da aikinku na bangaskiya a gaban Allahnmu, Ubanmu, da famar da kuke yi domin ƙauna, da kuma begen ku mara gushewa ga Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Domin mun sani, 'yan'uwa, ƙaunatattu na Allah, shi ya zaɓe ku," 
1Thessalonians1:5 domin bishararmu ba da magana kawai ta zo muku ba, amma da iko, da Ruhu Mai Tsarki, da kuma matuƙar tabbatarwa. Kun dai san irin zaman da muka yi a cikinku domin ku amfana," 
1Thessalonians1:6 har kuka zama masu koyi da mu, da kuma Ubangiji, kuka kuma karɓi Maganar Allah game da farin cikin da Ruhu Mai Tsarki yake sawa, ko da yake ta jawo muku tsananin wahala." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Ku ma har kuka zama abin koyi ga dukan masu ba da gaskiya a ƙasar Makidoniya da ta Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Domin daga gare ku ne aka baza Maganar Ubangiji, ba ma a ƙasar Makidoniya da ta Akaya kaɗai ba, har ma a ko'ina bangaskiyarku ga Allah ta shahara, har ma ya zamana, ba sai lalle mun faɗa ba." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Domin su da kansu suke ba da labarin irin ziyartarku da muka yi, da kuma yadda kuka rabu da gumaka, kuka juyo ga Allah, domin ku bauta wa Allah Rayayye na gaskiya," 
1Thessalonians1:10 ku kuma saurari komowar Ɗansa daga Sama, wanda ya tasa daga matattu, wato Yesu, mai kuɓutar da mu daga fushin nan mai zuwa." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Ai, ku da kanku kun sani, 'yan'uwa, ziyartarku da muka yi, ba a banza take ba." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Amma ko da yake dā ma can mun sha wuya, an kuma wulakanta mu a Filibi, kamar yadda kuka sani, duk da haka da taimakon Allahnmu muka sanar da ku bisharar Allah gabagaɗi, amma sai da matsanancin fama." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ai, gargaɗin da muke yi muku babu bauɗewa ko munafunci a ciki, balle yaudara," 
1Thessalonians2:4 sai dai kamar yadda Allah ya yarda da mu, ya damƙa mana amanar bishara, haka muke sanar da ita, ba domin mu faranta wa mutane rai ba, sai dai domin mu faranta wa Allah, shi da yake jarraba zukatanmu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Yadda kuka sani, ba mu taɓa yin daɗin baki ko kwaɗayi ba. Allah kuwa shi ne shaida." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Ba mu kuwa taɓa neman girma ga mutane ba, ko a gare ku, ko ga waɗansu, ko da yake da muna so, da mun mori ikon nan namu na manzannin Almasihu." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Amma mun nuna taushin hali a cikinku, kamar yadda mai goyo take kula da goyonta." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Saboda kuma muna Kaunarku ƙwarai da gaske ne shi ya sa muke jin daɗin ba da har rayukanmu ma saboda ku, ba yi muku bisharar Allah kaɗai ba, don kun shiga ranmu da gaske." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Ya ku 'yan'uwa, kuna iya tunawa da wahala da famar da muka sha, har muna aiki dare da rana, don kada mu nauyaya wa kowane ɗayanku, duk sa'ad da muke yi muku bisharar Allah." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Ku shaidu ne, haka kuma Allah, game da irin halin da muka nuna muku, ku masu ba da gaskiya, wato halin tsarki da na adalci da na rashin aibu." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Domin kun san yadda muka yi wa kowannenku gargaɗi kamar uba da 'ya'yansa ne, muna ta'azantar da ku, muna kuma ƙarfafa muku umarnin, cewa" 
1Thessalonians2:12 ku yi zaman da ya cancanci bautar Allah, wanda yake kiranku ga mulkinsa da ɗaukakarsa." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Saboda wannan ne kuma muke gode wa Allah ba fasawa, domin sa'ad da kuka karɓi Maganar Allah ta bakinmu, ba ku karɓe ta kamar maganar mutum ce ba, sai dai ainihin yadda take, Maganar Allah, wadda take aiki a cikin zuciyarku, ku masu ba da gasikya." 
1Thessalonians2:14 'Yan'uwa, ku ne kuka zama masu koyi da ikilisiyoyin Allah da suke na Almasihu Yesu, waɗanda suke a ƙasar Yahudiya, don ku ma kun sha wuya a hannun mutanen ƙasarku, kamar yadda ikilisiyoyin nan ma suka sha a hannun Yahudawa," 
1Thessalonians2:15 waɗanda suka kashe Ubangiji Yesu da annabawa, suka kuma kore mu, ba sa yin aikin da Allah yake so, masu gāba ne kuma da dukan mutane," 
1Thessalonians2:16 suna hana mu yi wa al'ummai wa'azi, don kada su sami ceto. Ta haka a kullum suke cika mudun zunubansu. Amma fa fushin Allah ya aukar musu." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Ya ku 'yan'uwa, ko da yake mun yi kewarku saboda an raba mu a ɗan lokaci kaɗan, duk da haka kuna cikin zukatanmu, mun kuwa ƙara ɗokanta mu gan ku ido da ido, matuƙar ɗoki." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Mun dai yi niyyar zuwa wurinku, ni Bulus, ba sau ɗaya ba, ba sau biyu ba, amma Shaidan ya hana." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Su wane ne abin sa zuciyarmu, da abin farin cikinmu, da kuma abin taƙamarmu a gaban Ubangiji Yesu a ranar komowarsa, in ba ku ba?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ai, ku ne abin taƙamarmu, da abin farin cikinmu." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Saboda haka, da muka kasa daurewa, sai muka ga ya kyautu a bar mu a Atina mu kaɗai," 
1Thessalonians3:2 muka kuma aiki Timoti ɗan'uwanmu, bawan Allah kuma na al'amarin bisharar Almasihu, ya kafa ku, ya kuma ƙarfafa ku a kan al'amarin bangaskiyarku," 
1Thessalonians3:3 don kada kowa ya raurawa a cikin tsananin wahalar nan. Ai, ku kanku kun sani an nufe mu da haka ne." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Domin dā ma sa'ad da muke tare, mun gaya muku tun da wuri, cewa za mu sha wahala. Haka kuwa ya auku, kamar yadda kuka sani." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Saboda haka, ni ma da na kasa daurewa, sai na aika in sami labarin bangaskiyarku, da fatan kada ya zamana mai ruɗin nan ya riga ya ruɗe ku, famarmu kuma yă zama banza." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Amma ga shi, a yanzu da Timoti ya dawo daga wurinku, ya yi mana albishir a kan bangaskiyarku da ƙaunarku, da kuma yadda kuke tunawa da mu da alheri a koyaushe, har kuna begen ganinmu, kamar yadda mu ma muke yi." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Saboda haka 'yan'uwa, cikin dukan wahala da ƙuncin da muka sha, an sanyaya mana zuciya a game da ku, albarkacin bangaskiyarku." 
1Thessalonians3:8 A yanzu kam a raye muke, in dai kun tsaya ga Ubangiji." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Wace irin godiya za mu yi wa Allah saboda ku, a kan matuƙar farin cikin da muke yi a gaban Allahnmu ta dalilinku!" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Dare da rana muna nacin addu'a ƙwarai mu sami ganinku ido da ido, mu kuma cikasa abin da ya gaza wajen bangaskiyarku." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Muna fata dai Allahnmu, ubanmu, shi kansa, da kuma Ubangijinmu Yesu, ya kai mu gare ku." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Ku kuma, Ubangiji ya sa ku ƙaru, ku kuma yalwata da ƙaunar juna da dukan mutane, kamar yadda muke yi muku," 
1Thessalonians3:13 har ya tsai da zukatanku ku zama marasa abin zargi cikin tsarki a gaban Allahnmu, Ubanmu, a ranar komowar Ubangijinmu Yesu, tare da dukan tsarkakansa." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Daga ƙarshe kuma 'yan'uwa, muna roƙonku, muna kuma yi muku gargaɗi saboda Ubangiji Yesu, cewa kamar yadda kuka koya a wurinmu, irin zaman da ya dace da ku, ku faranta wa Allah rai, kamar yadda yanzu ma kuke yi, to, sai ku ƙara yin haka ƙwarai da gaske," 
1Thessalonians4:2 domin kun san umarnin nan da muka yi muku da iznin Ubangiji Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Gama wannan shi ne nufin Allah, wato ku yi zaman tsarki, ku guje wa fasikanci," 
1Thessalonians4:4 kowannenku kuma ya san yadda zai auro matarsa da tsarki da mutunci," 
1Thessalonians4:5 ba ta muguwar sha'awa ba, yadda al'ummai suke yi, waɗanda ba su san Allah ba." 
1Thessalonians4:6 A cikin wannan al'amari kuwa kada kowa ya keta haddi, har ya cuci ɗan'uwansa, domin Ubangiji mai sakamako ne a kan dukkan waɗannan abubuwa, kamar yadda muka gargaɗe ku, muka tabbatar muku tun da wuri." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Ai, ba a zaman ƙazanta ne Allah ya kira mu ba, amma ga zaman tsarki ne." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Saboda haka, kowa ya ƙi yarda da wannan, ba mutum ya ƙi ba, amma Allah ya ƙi, shi da yake ba ku Ruhunsa Mai Tsarki." 
1Thessalonians4:9 A game da ƙaunar 'yan'uwa kuma, ba lalle sai wani ya rubuto muku ba. Ai, ku kanku ma, Allah ya koya muku ku ƙaunaci juna." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Hakika kuwa kuna ƙaunar dukan 'yan'uwa a duk ƙasar Makidoniya. Sai dai muna muku gargaɗi, 'yan'uwa, ku ƙara yin haka ƙwarai da gaske," 
1Thessalonians4:11 kuna himmantuwa ga zaman lafiya, kuna kula da sha'anin gabanku kawai, kuna kuma aiki da hannunku, kamar yadda muka umarce ku," 
1Thessalonians4:12 domin ku zama masu mutunci ga waɗanda ba masu bi ba, kada kuma ku rataya a jikin kowa." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Amma 'yan'uwa, ba mu so ku jahilta game da waɗanda suka yi barci, don kada ku yi baƙin ciki kamar yadda sauran suke yi, marasa bege." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Tun da muka gaskata Yesu ya mutu, ya kuwa tashi, haka kuma albarkacin Yesu, Allah zai kawo waɗanda suka yi barci su zo tare da shi." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Muna kuwa shaida muku bisa ga faɗar Ubangiji, cewa mu da muka wanzu, muke kuma a raye har ya zuwa komowar Ubangiji ko kaɗan ba za mu riga waɗanda suka yi barci tashi ba," 
1Thessalonians4:16 domin Ubangiji kansa ma zai sauko daga Sama, da kira mai ƙarfi, da muryar babban mala'ika, da kuma busar ƙahon Allah. Waɗanda suka mutu suna na Almasihu, su ne za fara tashi," 
1Thessalonians4:17 sa'an nan sai mu da muka wanzu, muke a raye, za a ɗauke mu tare da su ta cikin gajimare, mu sadu da Ubangiji a sararin sama, sai kuma kullum mu kasance tare da Ubangiji." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Saboda haka, sai ku yi wa juna ta'aziyya da wannan magana." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Amma ga zancen ainihin lokaci ko rana, ba lalle sai an rubuto muku kome ba." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Domin ku da kanku kun sani sarai, ranar Ubangiji za ta zo ne kamar ɓarawo da dare." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Lokacin da mutane suke cewa, “Muna zaman salama da zaman lafiya,” wuf; sai halaka ta auko musu, kamar yadda naƙuda take kama mace mai ciki, ba kuwa hanyar tsira." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Amma, ai, ba a cikin duhu kuke ba, 'yan'uwa, har da ranar nan za ta mamaye ku kamar ɓarawo." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Domin duk mutanen haske kuke, na rana kuma. Mu ba na dare ko na duhu ba ne." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Ashe, saboda haka kada mu yi barci yadda waɗansu suke yi, sai dai mu zauna a faɗake, da natsuwa." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Don masu barci da daddare suke barci, masu sha su bugu ma da daddare suke sha su bugu." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Amma da yake mu na rana ne, sai mu natsu, muna saye da sulken bangaskiya da ƙauna, muna begen samun ceto, shi ne kuma kwalkwakinmu." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Allah bai ƙaddara mu ga fushinsa ba, sai dai ga samun ceto ta wurin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 wanda ya mutu saboda mu, domin ko muna a raye, ko muna barci, mu zama muna tare da shi." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Saboda haka, sai ku ƙarfafa wa juna zuciya, kuna riƙa inganta juna, kamar dai yadda kuke yi." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Amma muna roƙonku 'yan'uwa, ku girmama masu fama da aiki a cikinku, wato waɗanda suke shugabanninku cikin Ubangiji, suke kuma yi muku gargaɗi." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Ku riƙe su da mutunci ƙwarai game da ƙauna saboda aikinsu. Ku yi zaman lafiya da juna. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Muna kuma yi muku gargaɗi, 'yan'uwa, ku tsawata wa malalata, ku ƙarfafa masu rarraunar zuciya, ku taimaki marasa tsayayyiyar zuciya, ku yi haƙuri da kowa da kowa." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Ku lura fa, kada kowa ya rama mugunta da mugunta. Sai dai kullum ku nace yi wa juna aiki nagari, da kuma dukkan mutane." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Ku riƙa yin farin ciki a kullum. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Ku riƙa yin addu'a ba fāsawa. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Ku godiya ga Allah a kowane hali, domin shi ne nufin Allah a game da ku ta wurin Almasihu Yesu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Kada ku danne maganar Ruhu. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Kada ku raina annabci," 
1Thessalonians5:21 sai dai ku jarraba kome, ku riƙi abin da yake nagari kankan." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Ku yi nesa da kowace irin mugunta. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Allah kansa, mai zartar da salama, yă tsarkake ku sarai, ya kuma kiyaye ruhunku da ranku da jikinku ƙalau, ku kasance marasa abin zargi a ranar komowar Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Wanda yake kiranku ɗin nan mai alkawari ne, zai kuwa zartar." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Ya ku 'yan'uwa, ku yi mana addu'a." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Ku gai da dukkan 'yan'uwa da tsattsarkar sumba. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Na gama ku da Ubangiji, a karanta wa dukkan 'yan'uwa wasiƙar nan." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Alherin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu yă tabbata a gare ku. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Daga Bulus, da Sila, da Timoti, zuwa ga Ikkilisiyar Tasalonikawa, wadda take ta Allah ubanmu da Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Alheri da salama na Allah Uba, da na Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu su tabbata a gare ku." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Lalle ne a kullum mu gode wa Allah saboda ku, 'yan'uwa, haka kuwa ya kyautu, da yake bangaskiyarku haɓaka take yi ƙwarai da gaske, har ma ƙaunar kowane ɗayanku ga juna ƙaruwa take yi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Saboda haka, mu kanmu ma taƙama muke yi da ku a cikin ikilisiyoyin Allah, saboda jimirinku, da bangaskiyarku a cikin yawan tsananin da kuke sha, da ƙuncin da kuke a ciki." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Wannan kuwa ita ce tabbatar hukunci mai adalci na Allah, domin a lasafta ku a cikin waɗanda suka cancanci zama a Mulkin Allah, wanda kuke shan wuya dominsa," 
2Thessalonians1:6 domin kuwa Allah ya ga adalci ne, yă yi sakamokon ƙunci ga waɗanda suke ƙuntata muku," 
2Thessalonians1:7 yă kuma ba ku hutu har da mu ma, ku da ake ƙuntata wa ɗin, a ranar bayyanar Ubangiji Yesu daga Sama tare da manyan mala'ikunsa, a cikin wuta mai ruruwa," 
2Thessalonians1:8 yana ta sāka wa waɗanda suke ƙi sanin Allah, da kuma waɗanda suka ƙi bin bisharar Ubangijinmu Yesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Za su sha hukuncin madawwamiyar hallaka, suna a ware da zatin Ubangiji, da kuma, maɗaukakin ikonsa," 
2Thessalonians1:10 wato, a lokacin da ya dawo, tsarkakansa su ɗaukaka shi, duk masu ba da gaskiya kuma su yi al'ajabinsa a ranar nan, don kun gaskata shaidar da muka yi muku." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Da wannan maƙasudi, a kullum muke yi muku addu'a, Allahnmu yă sa ku cancanci kiransa, ya biya muku duk muradinku na yin nagarta, da aikin bangaskiya ta wurin ƙarfin ikonsa," 
2Thessalonians1:12 don a ɗaukaka sunan Ubangijinmu Yesu a cikinku, ku kuma a cikinsa, bisa ga alherin Allahnmu, da na Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 To, a game da komowar Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, da kuma taruwarmu mu sadu da shi, muna roƙonku 'yan'uwa," 
2Thessalonians2:2 kada ku yi saurin jijiguwa a zukatanku, ko kuwa hankalinku yă tashi, saboda faɗar wani ruhu, ko wani jawabi, ko wata wasiƙa a kan cewa daga gare mu suke, cewa ranar Ubangiji ta zo." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Kada ku yarda kowa yă yaudare ku ko ta halin ƙaƙa, domin wannan rana ba za ta zo ba, sai an yi fanɗarewar nan, sarkin tawaye kuma ya bayyana, wato, hallakakken nan." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Shi ne magabci, mai ɗaukaka kansa, yana gāba da duk abin da ya shafi sunan Allah, ko kuma wanda ake yi wa ibada. Har ma yakan zauna a Haikalin Allah, yana cewa, shi ne Allah." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Ashe, ba ku tuna ba, nakan gaya muku haka tun muna tare?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 To, a yanzu dai kun san abin da yake tare shi, don kada ya bayyana kafin lokacinsa." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ko a yanzu ma tawayen nan, wanda ba shi fahimtuwa, an fara shi, amma farawar abin da zai faru, sai an ɗauke wanda yake hana shi tukuna." 
2Thessalonians2:8 A sa'an nan ne fa sarkin tawayen zai bayyana, Ubangiji Yesu kuwa zai hallaka shi da hucin bakinsa, ya kuma shafe shi da bayyanarsa a ranar komowarsa." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Mai tawayen nan kuwa, zai zo ne bisa ga ikon Shaiɗan, yana aikata abubuwan al'ajabi, da alamu, da aikin dabo na ƙarya iri iri," 
2Thessalonians2:10 yana kuma yaudarar waɗanda suke a hanyar hallaka, muguwar yaudara, domin sun ƙi ƙaunar gaskiya har yadda za su sami ceto." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Saboda haka, Allah zai auko musu da wata babbar ɓatan basira don su gaskata ƙarya," 
2Thessalonians2:12 don duk a hukunta waɗanda suka ƙi gaskata gaskiya, suke kuma jin daɗin mugunta." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Ya ku 'yan'uwa, ƙaunatattun Ubangiji, lalle ne kullum mu gode wa Allah saboda ku, domin Allah ya zaɓe ku, don ku fara samun ceto ta wurin tsarkakewar Ruhu, da kuma amincewarku da gasikya." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Domin wannan maƙasudi ya kira ku, ta wurin bishararmu, domin ku sami ɗaukakar Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Saboda haka, 'yan'uwa, sai ku dage, ku kuma riƙi ka'idodin da muka koya muku kankan, ko da baka ko ta wurin wasiƙa." 
2Thessalonians2:16 To, Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu kansa, da kuma Allah Ubanmu, wanda ya ƙaunace mu, ya kuma ba mu madawwamiyar ta'aziyya da kyakkyawan bege ta wurin alherinsa," 
2Thessalonians2:17 yă ta'azantar da ku, ya kuma ƙarfafa ku ga yin kowane kyakkyawan aiki da magana." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Daga ƙarshe kuma 'yan'uwa, ku yi mana addu'a, Maganar Ubangiji ta yi saurin yaɗuwa, ta sami ɗaukaka, kamar yadda ta samu a gare ku," 
2Thessalonians3:2 a kuma cece mu daga fanɗararrun mutane, mugaye. Don ba duka ne suke da bangaskiya ba." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Amma Ubangiji mai alkawari ne, zai kuwa kafa ku, ya tsare ku daga Mugun nan." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Mun kuma amince da ku a game da Ubangiji, cewa kuna bin umarnin da muka yi muku, za ku kuma riƙa bi." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ubangiji yă tattaro hankalinku a kan ƙaunar nan ta Allah, da kuma jimirin nan na Almasihu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 To, 'yan'uwa, muna yi muku umarni da sunan Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, ku fita daga sha'anin kowane ɗan'uwa malalaci, wanda ba ya bin ka'idodin da kuka samu a wurinmu." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ai, ku kanku kun san yadda ya kamata ku yi koyi da mu, domin sa'ad da muke a tare, ba mu nuna muku lalaci ba," 
2Thessalonians3:8 ba mu kuwa ci abincin kowa a banza ba, sai dai mun sha wahala da fama, muna aiki dare da rana, don kada mu nawaita wa kowane ɗayanku." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Ba don ba mu da halaliya a wurinku ba ne, a'a, sai dai don mu zama abin misali a gare ku kawai, don ku yi koyi da mu." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ai, ko dā ma, sa'ad da muke a tare, mun yi muku wannan umarni, cewa duk wanda ya ƙi yin aiki, kada a ba shi abinci." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Gama mun ji labari cewa waɗansunku malalata ne kawai, ba sa aikin kome, masu shisshigi ne kurum." 
2Thessalonians3:12 To, irin waɗannan mutane muna yi musu umarni, muna kuma gargaɗinsu da izinin Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu, su riƙa aiki da natsuwa, suna ci da kansu." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Amma ku 'yan'uwa, kada ku gaji da yin aiki nagari." 
2Thessalonians3:14 In wani ya ƙi bin abin da muka faɗa a wasiƙar nan, sai fa ku lura da shi, kada ma ku yi cuɗanya da shi, don yă kunyata." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Amma kada ku ɗauke shi a kan abokin gāba, sai dai ku gargaɗe shi a kan shi ɗan'uwa ne." 
2Thessalonians3:16 To, Ubangiji kansa, mai zartar da salama, yă ba ku salama a koyaushe a kowane hali. Ubangiji ya kasance tare da ku duka." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ni Bulus, ni nake rubuto wannan Gaisuwa da hannuna. Ita ce kuwa shaidar kowace wasiƙata. Rubutun hannuna ke nan." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Alherin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu yă tabbata a gare ku duka. 
1Timothy1:1 Daga Bulus, manzon Almasihu Yesu bisa ga umarnin Allah Mai Cetonmu, da kuma na Almasihu Yesu abin begenmu," 
1Timothy1:2 zuwa ga Timoti, ɗana na hakika, ta wajen bangaskiya. Alheri, da jinƙai, da salama na Allah Uba, da na Almasihu Yesu Ubangijinmu su tabbata a gare ka." 
1Timothy1:3 Kamar yadda na roƙe ka, ka dakata a Afisa sa'ad da za ni ƙasar Makidoniya, ka gargaɗi waɗansu mutane kada su koyar da wata koyarwa dabam," 
1Timothy1:4 kada kuma su ɓata zarafinsu a wajen almara da yawan ƙididdigar asali marar iyaka, waɗanda sukan haddasa gardandami, a maimakon riƙon amanar al'amuran Allah da bangaskiya." 
1Timothy1:5 Alhali kuwa manufar gargaɗinmu ƙauna ce, wadda take bulbulowa daga tsarkakakkiyar zuciya, da lamiri mai kyau, da kuma sahihiyar bangaskiya." 
1Timothy1:6 Waɗansu sun kauce wa waɗannan al'amura, har sun bauɗe, sun shiga zancen banza." 
1Timothy1:7 Suna burin zama masanan Attaura, ba tare da fahimtar abin da suke faɗa ba, balle matsalar da suke taƙamar haƙiƙicewa a kai." 
1Timothy1:8 To, mun san Shari'a aba ce mai kyau, in mutum ya yi aiki da ita yadda ya wajaba," 
1Timothy1:9 yana kuma tunawa, cewa ita Shari'a ba a kafa ta domin masu adalci ba, sai dai kangararru, da marasa biyayya, da marasa bin Allah, da masu zunubi, da marasa tsarkaka, da masu saɓon Allah, da masu kashe iyaye maza da mata, da masu kisankai," 
1Timothy1:10 da fasikai, da masu luɗu, da masu sace mutane, da maƙaryata, da masu shaidar zur, da kuma duk sauran abin da ya sāɓa sahihiyar koyarwar nan," 
1Timothy1:11 bisa ga bishara mai daraja ta Allah abar yabo, wadda aka danƙa mini." 
1Timothy1:12 Ina gode wa Almasihu Yesu Ubangijinmu, wanda ya ƙarfafa ni, saboda ya amince da ni, har ya sa ni aikinsa," 
1Timothy1:13 ko da yake dā can sāɓo nake yi, ina tsanantarwa, ina wulakantarwa, duk da haka, sai dai aka yi mini jinƙai, domin na yi haka ne da jahilci saboda rashin bangaskiya." 
1Timothy1:14 Alherin Ubangijinmu kuma ya kwararo mini ƙwarai da gaske, a game da bangaskiya, da kuma ƙaunar da take ga Almasihu Yesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Maganar nan tabbatacciya ce, ta kuma cancanci a karɓe ta ɗungum cewa, “Almasihu Yesu ya shigo duniya ne domin ceton masu zunubi,” ni ne kuwa babbansu." 
1Timothy1:16 Duk da haka an yi mini jinƙai musamman, don ta kaina, ni babbansu, Yesu Almasihu yă nuna cikakken haƙurinsa, in zama gurbi ga waɗanda a nan gaba za su gaskata da shi su sami rai madawwami." 
1Timothy1:17 Girma da ɗaukaka su tabbata ga Sarkin zamanai, marar mutuwa, marar ganuwa, Allah Makaɗaici, har abada abadin. Amin, amin." 
1Timothy1:18 Na danƙa maka wannan umarni, ya ɗana Timoti, bisa ga annabce-annabcen da dā aka faɗa a kanka, domin ka ƙarfafu ta wurinsu, ka yi yaƙi mai kyau," 
1Timothy1:19 kana riƙe da bangaskiya da lamiri mai kyau. Gama waɗansu mutane, saboda ƙin kasa kunne ga lamirinsu, suka lalatar da bangaskiyarsu." 
1Timothy1:20 Cikinsu har da Himinayas da Askandari, waɗanda na miƙa wa Shaiɗan, don su horo su bar yin sāɓo." 
1Timothy2:1 Da farko dai ina gargaɗi, cewa a yi ta roƙon Allah, ana addu'a, ana godo, ana gode wa Allah saboda dukkan mutane," 
1Timothy2:2 da sarakuna da kuma duk waɗanda suke a manyan maƙamai, don mu zauna lafiya, rai a kwance, muna bin Allah sosai a cikin natsuwa." 
1Timothy2:3 Wannan kyakkyawan abu ne, kuma abin karɓa ne a gun Allah Mai Cetonmu," 
1Timothy2:4 wanda yake son dukkan mutane su sami ceto, su kuma kai ga sanin gaskiya." 
1Timothy2:5 Domin Allah ɗaya ne, matsakanci kuma ɗaya ne, a tsakanin Allah da mutane, Almasihu Yesu, mutum," 
1Timothy2:6 wanda ya ba da kansa fansa saboda kowa da kowa. An kuwa yi shaidar wannan a daidai lokacinsa. 
1Timothy2:7 Don haka ne aka sa ni mai wa'azi, da manzo kuma (gasikya nake faɗa, ba ƙarya ba), mai koya wa al'ummai al'amarin bangaskiya da kuma na gaskiya." 
1Timothy2:8 Saboda haka, a kowane wuri ina so maza su yi addu'a, suna ɗaga hannuwa tsarkakakku, ba tare da fushi ko jayayya ba." 
1Timothy2:9 Mata kuma su riƙa sa tufafin da suka dace da su saboda kunya da kamunkai, ba adon kitso, ko kayan zinariya, ko lu'ulu'u, ko tufafi masu tsada ba," 
1Timothy2:10 sai dai su yi aiki nagari, yadda ya dace da mata masu bayyana shaidar ibadarsu." 
1Timothy2:11 Mace ta riƙa koyo da kawaici da matuƙar biyayya. 
1Timothy2:12 Ban yarda mace ta koyar, ko kuma ta yi iko da maza ba, sai dai ta zama shiru." 
1Timothy2:13 Ai, Adamu aka fara halitta, sa'an nan Hawwa'u." 
1Timothy2:14 Ba kuma Adamu aka yaudara ba, amma matar ce aka yaudara, har ta keta umarni." 
1Timothy2:15 Duk da haka kuwa, ta wurin haifar 'ya'ya sai ta kai ga kammala, muddin ta nace wa bangaskiya, da ƙauna, da zama a tsarkake, da kuma kamunkai." 
1Timothy3:1 Maganar nan tabbatacciya ce, cewa duk mai burin aikin kula da ikkilisiya, yana burin yin aiki mai kyau ke nan." 
1Timothy3:2 To, lalle ne mai kula da ikkilisiya yă zama marar abin zargi, yă zama mai mace ɗaya, mai kamunkai, natsattse, kintsattse, mai yi wa baƙi alheri, gwanin koyarwa kuma." 
1Timothy3:3 Ba mashayi ba, ba mai saurin dūka ba, amma salihi, ba kuma mai husuma ba, ba kuwa mai son kuɗi ba." 
1Timothy3:4 Lalle ne yă iya sarrafa iyalinsa da kyau, yana kuma kula da 'ya'yansa, su yi biyayya da matuƙar ladabi." 
1Timothy3:5 Don kuwa in mutum bai san yadda zai sarrafa iyalinsa ba, ta ƙaƙa zai iya kula da ikkilisiyar Allah?" 
1Timothy3:6 Lalle ne kuma, kada yă zama sabon tuba, don kada yă daga kai yă burmu a cikin hukuncin da aka yi wa Iblis." 
1Timothy3:7 Banda haka kuma, lalle ne yă zama mai mutunci ga waɗanda ba su a cikinmu, don kada yă zama abin zargi, yă faɗa a cikin tarkon Iblis." 
1Timothy3:8 Haka kuma masu hidimar ikkilisiya, lalle ne su zama natsattsu, ba masu baki biyu ba, ko mashaya, ko masu kwaɗayin ƙazamar riba." 
1Timothy3:9 Lalle ne su riƙi asirin bangaskiya da lamiri mai tsabta. 
1Timothy3:10 Sai an gwada su tukuna, in kuma an tabbata ba su da wani abin zargi, to, sai su kama aikin hidimar." 
1Timothy3:11 Haka kuma matan, lalle su zama natsattsu, ba masu yanke ba, amma masu kamunkai, masu aminci ta kowace hanya." 
1Timothy3:12 Masu hidima kuma su zama masu mata ɗaya ɗaya, masu sarrafa 'ya'yansu da sauran iyalinsu da kyau." 
1Timothy3:13 Masu hidimar da suke aikinsu sosai, suna samar wa kansu kyakkyawan suna, da kuma ƙaƙƙarfar amincewa ga bangaskiyarsu ga Almasihu Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Ina sa zuciya in zo a wurinka ba da daɗewa ba, amma ina rubuto maka waɗannan abubuwa." 
1Timothy3:15 don in ya zamana na yi jinkiri, za ka san irin zaman da ya kamata a yi a jama'ar Allah, wadda take ita ce Ikkilisiyar Allah Rayayye, jigon gaskiya da kuma ginshiƙinta." 
1Timothy3:16 Ba shakka, asirin addininmu muhimmi ne ƙwarai, An bayyana shi da jiki, Ruhu ya nuna shi adali ne, Mala'iku sun gan shi, An yi wa al'ummai wa'azinsa, An gaskata da shi a duniya, An ɗauke shi Sama wurin ɗaukaka." 
1Timothy4:1 To, Ruhu musamman ya ce, a can wani zamani waɗansu za su fanɗare wa bangaskiya, su mai da hankali ga aljannu masu ruɗi, da kuma koyarwar aljannu," 
1Timothy4:2 ta wurin makircin waɗansu maƙaryata, waɗanda aka yi wa lamirinsu lalas." 
1Timothy4:3 Su ne masu hana aure da cin abinci iri iri, waɗanda Allah ya halitta don waɗanda suka ba da gaskiya, suka kuma san gaskiya, su karɓa da godiya." 
1Timothy4:4 Domin duk abin da Allah ya halitta kyakkyawa ne, kada kuma a ƙi kome muddin an karɓe shi da godiya," 
1Timothy4:5 gama an tsarkake shi ta wurin Maganar Allah da addu'a 
1Timothy4:6 In kana tuna wa 'yan'uwa wadannan abubuwa, za ka zama amintaccen bawan Almasihu Yesu, wanda aka goya da maganar bangaskiya, da kuma sahihiyar koyarwar nan wadda ka bi har ya zuwa yau." 
1Timothy4:7 Ka ƙi tatsuniyoyin saɓo da na banza da wofi. Ka hori kanka ga bin Allah. 
1Timothy4:8 Horon jiki yana da ɗan amfaninsa, amma bin Allah yana da amfani ta kowace hanya, da yake shi ne da alkawarin rai na a yanzu da na nan gaba." 
1Timothy4:9 Maganar nan tabbatacciya ce, ta kuma cancanci a karɓe ta ɗungum." 
1Timothy4:10 Saboda wannan maƙasudi muke wahala, muke ta fama, domin mun dogara ne ga Allah Rayayye, wanda yake Mai Ceton dukan mutane, musamman masu ba da gaskiya." 
1Timothy4:11 Ka yi umarni da waɗannan abubuwa, ka kuma koyar da su." 
1Timothy4:12 Kada ka yarda kowa yă raina ƙuruciyarka, sai dai ka zama gurbi ga masu ba da gaskiya ta wurin magana, da hali, da ƙauna, da bangaskiya, da kuma tsarkaka." 
1Timothy4:13 Kafin in zo, ka lazamci karanta wa mutane Littattafai, da yin gargaɗi, da kuma koyarwa." 
1Timothy4:14 Kada ka shagala da baiwar da aka yi maka, wadda aka ba ka ta wurin annabci, sa'ad da dattawan ikkilisiya suka ɗora maka hannu." 
1Timothy4:15 Ka himmantu ga waɗannan abubuwa, ka kuma lazamce su ƙwarai, don kowa yă ga ci gaban da kake yi." 
1Timothy4:16 Ka kula da kanka da kuma koyarwarka. Ka nace da haka, domin ta yin haka za ka ceci kanka da masu sauraronka." 
1Timothy5:1 Kada ka tsauta wa dattijo, sai dai ka roƙe shi kamar mahaifinka. Samari kuma ka ɗauke su kamar 'yan'uwanka," 
1Timothy5:2 tsofaffi mata kuma kamar uwayenka, 'yan mata kuwa kamar 'yan'uwanka, da matuƙar tsarkaka." 
1Timothy5:3 Ka girmama gwauraye mata, waɗanda ba sa da mataimaka." 
1Timothy5:4 In wata gwauruwa tana da 'ya'ya ko jikoki, sai su koya, ya wajaba su fara nuna wa danginsu bautar Allah da suke yi, su kuma sāka wa iyayensu da alheri. Wannan abin karɓa ne a gun Allah." 
1Timothy5:5 Gwauruwa marar mataimaki kuwa, mai zaman kaɗaici, ta dogara ga Allah ke nan, tana nacewa ga roƙon Allah, tana addu'a dare da rana." 
1Timothy5:6 Amma wadda take zaman annashuwa kuwa, kamar matacciya take, ko da tana a raye." 
1Timothy5:7 Ka umarce su a game da waɗannan abubuwa, don su kasance marasa abin zargi." 
1Timothy5:8 Duk wanda bai kula da danginsa ba, tun ba ma iyalinsa ba, ya mūsa wa bangaskiya ke nan, ya kuma fi marar ba da gaskiya mugunta." 
1Timothy5:9 Kada a lasafta gwauruwa a cikin gwauraye, sai dai ta kai shekara sittin, ba ta yi aure fiye da ɗaya ba," 
1Timothy5:10 wadda ake yabo a kan kyawawan ayyukanta, wadda kuma ta goyi 'ya'ya sosai, ta yi wa baƙi karamci, ta wanke ƙafafun tsarkaka, ta taimaki ƙuntatattu, ta kuma nace wa yin kowane irin aiki nagari." 
1Timothy5:11 Amma kada ka lasafta gwauraye masu ƙuruciya waɗanda mazansu suka mutu, a cikin gwaurayen, don in zuciyarsu ta kasa daurewa a game da wa'adin da suka yi da Almasihu, sai su so yin aure," 
1Timothy5:12 hukunci yā kama su ke nan, tun da yake sun ta da wa'adinsu na farko." 
1Timothy5:13 Banda haka kuma sukan koyi zaman banza, suna zirga-zirga gida gida. Ba ma kawai masu zaman banza za su zama ba, har ma sai su zama matsegunta, masu shishigi, suna faɗar abin da bai kamata ba." 
1Timothy5:14 Saboda haka, ina so gwauraye masu ƙuruciya waɗanda mazansu suka mutu su yi aure, su haifu, su tafiyar da al'amuran gida, kada su ba magabci hanyar zarginmu." 
1Timothy5:15 Gama waɗansu ma har sun bauɗe, sun bi Shaiɗan." 
1Timothy5:16 Duk mace mai bi, da take da dangi gwauraye mata, sai ta taimake su, kada a nauwaita wa ikkilisiya, don ikkilisiyar ta samu ta taimaki gwauraye marasa mataimaka." 
1Timothy5:17 Dattawan ikkilisiya da suke a riƙe da al'amura sosai, a girmama su ninkin ba ninkin, tun ba ma waɗanda suke fama da yin wa'azi da koyarwa ba." 
1Timothy5:18 Domin Nassi ya ce, “Kada ka sa wa takarkari takunkumi sa'ad da yake sussuka.” Ya kuma ce, “Ma'aikaci ya cancanci ladarsa.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Kada ka yarda in an kawo ƙarar wani dattijon ikkilisiya, sai dai da shaidu biyu ko uku." 
1Timothy5:20 Masu yin zunubi kuwa, sai ka tsawata musu a gaban dukkan jama'a, don saura su tsorata." 
1Timothy5:21 Na gama ka da Allah, da Almasihu Yesu, da kuma zaɓaɓɓun mala'iku, ka kiyaye waɗannan abubuwa ƙwarai da gaske, kada ka yi kome da tāra." 
1Timothy5:22 Kada ka yi garajen ɗora wa kowa hannu, kada kuwa zunuban waɗansu su shafe ka. Ka tsare kanka a tsarkake." 
1Timothy5:23 A nan gaba ba ruwa kaɗai za ka sha ba, sai dai ka sha ruwan inabi kaɗan saboda cikinka, da kuma yawan laulayinka." 
1Timothy5:24 Zunuban waɗansu mutane a fili suke, tun ba a kai gaban shari'a ba. Zunuban waɗansu kuwa, sai daga baya suke bayyana." 
1Timothy5:25 Haka kuma, kyawawan ayyukan waɗansu a fili suke, waɗanda ba haka suke ba, ba za su tabbata a ɓoye ba." 
1Timothy6:1 Duk ɗaukacin masu igiyar bauta a wuyansu, su ɗauki iyayengijinsu a kan sun cancanci a girmama su matuƙa, don kada a ɓata sunan Allah da kuma koyarwar nan." 
1Timothy6:2 Waɗanda suke da iyayengiji masu ba da gaskiya, kada su raina su, domin su 'yan'uwa ne a gare su. Sai ma su ƙara bauta musu, tun da yake waɗanda suke moron aikin nan nasu masu ba da gaskiya ne, ƙaunatattu kuma a gare su. Ka koyar da waɗannan abubuwa, ka kuma yi gargaɗinsu." 
1Timothy6:3 Duk wanda yake wata koyarwa dabam, bai kuwa yarda da sahihiyar maganar Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, da kuma koyarwar da ta dace da bautar Allah ba," 
1Timothy6:4 girmankai ya ciccika shi ke nan, bai san kome ba, yana da muguwar jarabar gardama da jayayya a kan maganganu kawai, waɗanda suke jawo hassada, da husuma, da yanke, da mugayen zace-zace," 
1Timothy6:5 da kuma yawan tankiya a cikin mutane masu ɓataccen hankali, waɗanda har gaskiya ta ƙaurace musu, suna tsammani bin Allah hanya ce ta samu." 
1Timothy6:6 Bin Allah a game da wadar zuci kuwa riba ce mai yawa. 
1Timothy6:7 Don ba mu zo duniya da kome ba, ba kuwa za mu iya fita da kome ba." 
1Timothy6:8 To, in muna da abinci da sutura, ai, sai mu dangana da su." 
1Timothy6:9 Masu ɗokin yin arziki kuwa, sukan zarme da jaraba, su fāɗa a cikin tarko, suna mugayen sha'awace-sha'awace iri iri na wauta da cutarwa, irin waɗanda suke dulmuyar da mutane, su kai ga lalacewa da hallaka." 
1Timothy6:10 Ai, son kuɗi shi ne tushen kowane irin mugun abu. Don tsananin jarabar kuɗi kuwa waɗansu mutane, har sun bauɗe wa bangaskiya, sun jawo wa kansu baƙin ciki iri iri masu sukar rai." 
1Timothy6:11 Amma, ya kai, bawan Allah, ka guje wa waɗannan abubuwa, ka dimanci aikin adalci, da bin Allah, da bangaskiya, da ƙauna, da jimiri, da kuma tawali'u." 
1Timothy6:12 Ka yi fama, famar gaske saboda bangaskiya, ka riƙi rai madawwamin nan, wanda aka kira ka saboda shi, sa'ad da ka bayyana yarda, kyakkyawar bayyana yarda, a gaban shaidu masu yawa." 
1Timothy6:13 Na gama ka da Allah mai raya kome, na kuma gama ka da Almasihu Yesu, wanda ya yi shaida, kyakkyawar shaidar nan, a gaban Buntus Bilatus," 
1Timothy6:14 ka bi umarninsa, ba tare da wani aibi ko zargi ba, har ya zuwa bayyanar Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu," 
1Timothy6:15 wannan kuwa makaɗaicin mamallaki, abin yabo, Sarkin sarakuna. Ubangijin iyayengiji zai bayyana shi a lokacinsa." 
1Timothy6:16 Shi ne kaɗai marar mutuwa, yake kuma zaune a cikin hasken da ba ya kusatuwa. Shi kuwa ba mutumin da ya taɓa ganinsa, ko kuwa zai iya ganinsa. Girma da madawwamin mulki su tabbata a gare shi. Amin, amin." 
1Timothy6:17 Masu dukiyar duniyar nan kuwa ka gargaɗe su kada su nuna alfarma, kada kuwa su dogara da dukiya marar tabbata, sai dai ga Allah, wanda yake ba mu kome a yalwace don mu ji daɗinsa." 
1Timothy6:18 Sai dai su yi nagarta da bijinta a wajen aiki nagari, su kasance masu hannu sake, suna alheri." 
1Timothy6:19 Ta haka suke kafa wa kansu kyakkyawan tushe don nan gaba, domin su riƙi rai wanda yake na hakika." 
1Timothy6:20 Ya Timoti, ka kiyaye abin da aka ba ka amana. Ka yi nesa da masu maganganun sāɓo na banza da wofi, da yawan musu da ake ƙarya, ake ce da shi ilimi." 
1Timothy6:21 Waɗansu kuwa, a garin taƙama, da haka har sun kauce wa bangaskiya. Alheri yă tabbata a gare ku." 
2Timothy1:1 Daga Bulus, manzon Almasihu Yesu da yardar Allah, don sanar da alkawarin nan na rai wanda yake ga Almasihu Yesu," 
2Timothy1:2 zuwa ga Timoti ƙaunataccen ɗana. Alheri, da jinƙai, da salama na Allah Uba, da na Almasihu Yesu Ubangijinmu su tabbata a gare ka." 
2Timothy1:3 Ina gode wa Allah, wanda nake bauta wa da lamiri mai tsabta, kamar yadda kakannina suka yi, duk sa'ad da nake tunawa da kai a cikin addu'ata ba fāsawa." 
2Timothy1:4 Sa'ad da nake tunawa da hawayenka, nakan yi began ganinka dare da rana, domin in yi farin ciki matuƙa." 
2Timothy1:5 Ina tunawa da sahihiyar bangaskiyarka, wadda da farko take tare da kakarka Loyis, da mahaifiyarka Afiniki, a yanzu kuma na tabbata tana tare da kai." 
2Timothy1:6 Saboda haka, ina so in faɗakar da kai, ka lura baiwar nan ta Allah, wadda take tare da kai ta wurin ɗora maka hannuwana." 
2Timothy1:7 Ai, Allah ba halin tsoro ya ba mu ba, hali mai ƙarfi ne, mai ƙauna, da kuma kamunkai." 
2Timothy1:8 Saboda haka, kada ka ji kunyar ba da shaidar Ubangijinmu, da kuma tawa, ni da nake ɗan sarƙa saboda shi, sai dai mu jure wa shan wuya tare, saboda bishara, bisa ga ikon Allah," 
2Timothy1:9 wanda ya cece mu, ya kuma kira mu da kira mai tsarki, ba don wani aikin lada da muka yi ba, sai dai domin nufinsa, da kuma alherinsa, da aka yi mana baiwa tun fil'azal, a cikin Almasihu Yesu," 
2Timothy1:10 wadda a yanzu aka bayyana ta bayyanar Mai Cetonmu Almasihu Yesu, wanda ya shafe mutuwa, ya kuma bayyana rai da rashin mutuwa, ta wurin bishara." 
2Timothy1:11 A wannan bishara an sa ni mai wa'azi, da kuma manzonta, da mai koyarwarta kuma." 
2Timothy1:12 Saboda haka, ne nake shan wuya haka. Duk da haka, ban kunyata ba, domin na san wanda na gaskata da shi, na kuma tabbata yana da iko ya kiyaye abin da na danƙa masa, har ya zuwa waccan rana." 
2Timothy1:13 Ka yi koyi da sahihiyar maganar da ka ji daga gare ni, da bangaskiya da ƙauna da take ga Almasihu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Kyakkyawan abin nan da aka ba ka amana, ka kiyaye shi ta wurin Ruhu Mai Tsarki, wanda yake zaune a zuciyarmu." 
2Timothy1:15 Ka dai sani duk waɗanda suke ƙasar Asiya sun juya mini baya, a cikinsu kuwa har da Fijalas da kuma Harmajanas." 
2Timothy1:16 Ubangiji yă yi wa iyalin Onisifaras jinƙai, don sau da yawa yake sanyaya mini zuciya, bai kuwa ji kunyar ɗaurina da aka yi ba." 
2Timothy1:17 Har ma da ya zo Roma, sai ya neme ni ido a rufe, ya kuwa same ni." 
2Timothy1:18 Ubangiji ya yi masa jinƙai a waccan rana. Ka dai sani sarai yadda ya yi ɗawainiya mai yawa a Afisa. 
2Timothy2:1 Saboda haka, ya kai ɗana, sai ka ƙarfafa da alherin da yake ga Almasihu Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Abin da ka ji a guna a gaban shaidu masu yawa kuwa, sai ka danƙa wa amintattun mutane, waɗanda su ma za su koya wa waɗansu." 
2Timothy2:3 Kai kuma ka jure wa shan wuya, kana amintaccen sojan Almasihu Yesu." 
2Timothy2:4 Ai, ba sojan da yake a bakin dāga da ransa zai sarƙafe da sha'anin duniya, tun da yake burinsa shi ne yă faranta wa wanda ya ɗauke shi soja." 
2Timothy2:5 Mai wasan guje-guje da tsalle-tsalle, ba zai sami ɗaukaka ba, sai ko ya bi dokokin wasan." 
2Timothy2:6 Ma'aikaci, ai, shi ya kamata yă fara cin amfanin gonar." 
2Timothy2:7 Ka yi tunani a kan abin da nake faɗa, Ubangiji kuwa zai ba ka fahimtar kome." 
2Timothy2:8 Ka tuna da Yesu Almasihu fa, shi da aka tashe shi daga matattu, na zuriyar Dawuda bisa ga bisharata," 
2Timothy2:9 wadda nake shan wuya saboda ita, har nake ɗaure kamar mai laifi. Amma Maganar Allah ba a ɗaure take ba." 
2Timothy2:10 Don haka nake jure kome saboda zaɓaɓɓu, domin su ma su sami ceton nan da yake samuwa ta wurin Almasihu, a game da madawwamiyar ɗaukaka." 
2Timothy2:11 Maganar nan tabbatacciya ce, “In mun mutu tare da shi, za mu rayu ma tare da shi," 
2Timothy2:12 In mun jure, za mu yi mulki ma tare da shi, In mun yi musun saninsa, shi ma zai yi musun saninmu," 
2Timothy2:13 In ba mu da aminci, shi kam ya tabbata mai aminci, Domin ba zai yi musun kansa ba.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Ka riƙa tuna musu da haka, ka kuma gama su da Ubangiji, kada su yi jayayya a kan maganganu, don ba ta da wani amfani, sai ɓad da masu ji kawai take yi." 
2Timothy2:15 Ka himmantu, ka miƙa kanka yardajje ga Allah, ma'aikaci wanda ba hanya ya kunyata, mai kuma fassara Maganar gaskiya daidai." 
2Timothy2:16 Ka yi nesa da masu maganganun banza na sāɓo. Sai daɗa jan mutane zuwa ga rashin bin Allah suke yi," 
2Timothy2:17 maganarsu takan haɓaka kamar gyambo. A cikinsu har da Himinayas da Filitas," 
2Timothy2:18 waɗanda suka bauɗe wa gaskiya suna cewa tashin matattu ya riga ya wuce, suna jirkitar da bangaskiyar waɗansu." 
2Timothy2:19 Duk da haka, ƙaƙƙarfan harsashin ginin nan na Allah ya tabbata, hatimin nan kuwa yana jikinsa cewa, “Ubangiji ya san nasa,” da kuma, “Duk wanda ya bayyana yarda ga sunan Ubangiji, to, yă yi nesa da aikata mugunta.”" 
2Timothy2:20 A babban gida, ba kayan zinariya da na azurfa ne kawai ba, har ma da na itace da na yumɓu, waɗansu don aikin ɗaukaka, waɗansu kuwa don ƙasƙantaccen aiki." 
2Timothy2:21 Kowa yă tsarkake kansa daga ayyukan nan ƙasƙantattu, zai zama ma'aikaci mai daraja, tsarkakakke, mai amfani ga Ubangiji, shiryayye ga kowane kyakkyawan aiki." 
2Timothy2:22 Don haka, sai ka guje wa mugayen sha'awace-sha'awacen ƙuruciya, ka dimanci aikin adalci, da bangaskiya, da ƙauna, da kuma salama, tare da waɗanda suke roƙon Ubangiji da zuciya tsarkakakkiya." 
2Timothy2:23 Ka ƙi gardandamin banza marasa ma'ana, ka san lalle suna jawo husuma." 
2Timothy2:24 Bawan Ubangiji kuwa lalle ba zai zama mai husuma ba, sai dai ya zama salihi ga kowa, gwanin koyarwa, mai haƙuri," 
2Timothy2:25 mai sa abokan hamayyarsa a kan hanya da tawali'u, ko Allah zai sa su tuba, su kai ga sanin gaskiya," 
2Timothy2:26 su kuɓuce wa tarkon Iblis, su bi nufin Allah, bayan da Iblis ya tsare su." 
2Timothy3:1 Amma ka fahimta, a zamanin ƙarshe za a sha wuya ƙwarai." 
2Timothy3:2 Mutane za su zama masu sonkai, da masu son kuɗi, da masu ruba, da masu girmankai, da masu zagezage, da marasa bin iyayensu, da masu butulci, da marasa tsarkaka," 
2Timothy3:3 da marasa ƙauna, da masu riƙo a zuci, da masu yanke, da fajirai, da maƙetata, da maƙiyan nagarta," 
2Timothy3:4 da maciya amana, da masu taurinkai, da masu homa, da masu son annashuwa fiye da son Allah," 
2Timothy3:5 suna riƙe da siffofin ibada, amma suna sāɓa wa ikonta. Ka yi nesa da irin waɗannan mutane." 
2Timothy3:6 A cikinsu kuwa akwai masu saɗaɗawa su shiga gidajen mutane, suna rinjayar mata marasa wayo, waɗanda zunubi ya sha kansu, muguwar sha'awa iri iri kuma ta ɗauke musu hankali," 
2Timothy3:7 kullum suna koyo, amma kullum sai su kāsa kaiwa ga sanin gaskiya." 
2Timothy3:8 Kamar yadda Yanisu da Yambirisu suka tayar wa Musa, haka mutanen nan kuma suke tayar wa gaskiya, mutane ne masu ɓataccen hankali ƙwarai, bangaskiyarsu kuwa ta banza ce." 
2Timothy3:9 Amma ba za su yi nisa ba, don rashin hankalinsu zai bayyana ga kowa, kamar na mutanen nan biyu." 
2Timothy3:10 Kai kam, ka riga ka kiyaye koyarwata, da halina, da niyyata, da bangaskiyata, da haƙurina, da ƙaunata, da jimirina," 
2Timothy3:11 da kuma yawan tsanani, da wuyar da na sha, da suka same ni a Antakiya, da Ikoniya, da Listira, wato irin tsanance-tsanancen da na jure. Amma Ubangiji ya kuɓutar da ni daga cikinsu duka." 
2Timothy3:12 Labudda, duk masu niyyar zaman tsarkaka, suna ga Almasihu Yesu, za su sha tsanani." 
2Timothy3:13 Mugayen mutane da masu ruɗi kuwa, ƙara muni za su riƙa yi, suna yaudara, ana kuma yaudararsu." 
2Timothy3:14 Amma kai kuwa, ka zauna a kan abin da ka koya, ka kuma haƙƙaƙe, gama ka san wurin waɗanda ka koye su," 
2Timothy3:15 da kuma yadda tun kana ɗan ƙaramin yaro ka san Littattafai masu tsarki, waɗanda suke koya maka hanyar samun ceto ta dalilin bangaskiya ga Almasihu Yesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Kowane Nassi hurarre na Allah ne, mai amfani ne kuma wajen koyarwa, da tsawatarwa, da gyaran hali, da kuma tarbiyyar aikin adalci," 
2Timothy3:17 domin bawan Allah yă zama cikakke, shiryayye sosai ga kowane kyakkyawan aiki." 
2Timothy4:1 Na gama ka da Allah, da kuma Almasihu Yesu, wanɗa zai yi wa rayayyu da matattu shari'a, na kuma gargaɗe ka saboda bayyanarsa da kuma mulkinsa," 
2Timothy4:2 ka yi wa'azin Maganar Allah, ka dimanta a kai ko da yaushe, kana shawo kan mutane, kana tsawatarwa, kana ƙarfafa zukata, a game da matuƙar haƙuri da kuma koyarwa." 
2Timothy4:3 Don lokaci zai zo da mutane ba za su jure sahihiyar koyarwa ba, amma saboda kunnensu yana ƙaiƙayi, sai su taro masu koyarwa da za su biya musu muradinsu." 
2Timothy4:4 Za su toshe kunnensu ga jin tatsuniyoyi. 
2Timothy4:5 Kai kuwa, sai ka natsu a cikin kowane hali, ka jure wa shan wuya, kana aikin mai bishara, ka cika hidimarka." 
2Timothy4:6 Ni fa tsiyaye ni ake yi kamar hadaya, lokacin ƙauracewata kuma ya gabato." 
2Timothy4:7 Na sha fama, famar gaske, na gama tseren, na riƙe bangaskiya." 
2Timothy4:8 Saura kuwa, sai sakamakon nan na aikin adalci, da aka tanadar mini, wanda Ubangiji, mahukunci mai adalci, zai ba ni a ranar nan, ba kuwa ni kaɗai ba, har da duk waɗanda suke ɗokin ganin bayyanarsa." 
2Timothy4:9 Ka yi matuƙar ƙoƙari ka zo wurina da hanzari," 
2Timothy4:10 domin Dimas, saboda ƙaunar duniyar nan, ya yashe ni, ya tafi Tasalonika. Karaska ya tafi ƙasar Galatiya, Titus kuma ya tafi ƙasar Dalmatiya." 
2Timothy4:10 domin Dimas, saboda ƙaunar duniyar nan, ya yashe ni, ya tafi Tasalonika. Karaska ya tafi ƙasar Galatiya, Titus kuma ya tafi ƙasar Dalmatiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ne kaɗai yake tare da ni. Ka ɗauko Markus ku zo tare, gama yana da amfani a gare ni a wajen yi mini hidima." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ne kaɗai yake tare da ni. Ka ɗauko Markus ku zo tare, gama yana da amfani a gare ni a wajen yi mini hidima." 
2Timothy4:12 Tikikus kuwa na aike shi Afisa. 
2Timothy4:13 Sa'ad da za ka taho, ka zo da alkyabbar nan da na bari a wurin Karbus a Taruwasa, da kuma littattafan nan, tun ba ma fatun nan masu rubutu ba." 
2Timothy4:14 Iskandari maƙerin farfarun nan ya yi mini mugunta ƙwarai, Ubangiji zai yi masa sakayyar aikinsa." 
2Timothy4:15 Kai ma, ka mai da hankali da shi, gama ya hauri maganarmu, mummunan hauri." 
2Timothy4:16 A lokacin da na ba da hanzarina na farko, ba wanda ya goyi bayana, sai duk suka yashe ni. Ina fata ba za a lasafta wannan laifi a kansu ba." 
2Timothy4:17 Amma Ubangiji ya tsaya tare da ni, ya ba ni ƙarfin sanar da bishara sosai da sosai, domin duk al'ummai su ji, aka kuwa cece ni daga bakin zaki." 
2Timothy4:18 Ubangiji zai cece ni daga kowane mugun abu, ya kuma kiyaye ni, ya kai ni ga Mulkinsa na Sama. Ɗaukaka tă tabbata a gare shi har abada abadin. Amin! Amin!" 
2Timothy4:19 Ka gayar mini da Bilkisu da Akila, da mutanen gidan Onisifaras." 
2Timothy4:20 Aratas ya dakata a Koranti. Tarofimas kuwa na bar shi a Militas, ba shi da lafiya." 
2Timothy4:21 Ka yi matuƙar ƙoƙari ka zo kafin damuna. Aubulus yana gaishe ka, da Budis, da Linas, da Kalaudiya, da kuma dukkan 'yan'uwa." 
2Timothy4:22 Ubangiji yă kasance a zuciyarka. alheri yă tabbata a gare ku. 
Titus1:1 Daga Bulus, bawan Allah, kuma manzon Yesu Almasihu, saboda bangaskiyar zaɓaɓɓun Allah, da kuma inganta sanin gaskiyar ibadarmu," 
Titus1:2 duk wannan kuwa saboda begen nan ne ga rai madawwami da Allah ya yi alkawari tun fil'azal, shi wanda ƙarya ba ta a gare shi," 
Titus1:3 ya kuwa bayyana maganarsa a lokacin da ya ƙayyade, ta wa'azin da shi Allah Mai Cetonmu ya amince mini in yi, bisa ga umarninsa," 
Titus1:4 zuwa ga Titus, ɗana na hakika ta wajen bangaskiyarmu mu duka. Alheri da salama na Allah Uba, da na Almasihu Yesu Mai Cetonmu su tabbata a gare ka." 
Titus1:5 Wannan shi ya sa na bar ka a Karita, musamman domin ka ƙarasa daidaita al'amuran da suka saura, ka kuma kafa dattawan ikkilisiya a kowane gari, kamar yadda na nushe ka," 
Titus1:6 sai wanda ya kasance marar abin zargi, mai mace ɗaya, wanda 'ya'yansa suke masu ba da gaskiya, waɗanda ba a zarginsu da aikin masha'a ko na kangara." 
Titus1:7 Lalle ne kuwa, kowane mai kula da ikkilisiya, da yake shi mai riƙon amana saboda Allah ne, yă zama marar abin zargi, ba mai taurinkai ba, ko mai saurin fushi, ko mashayi, ko mai saurin dūka, ko mai kwaɗayin ƙazamar riba." 
Titus1:8 Amma yă kasance mai yi wa baƙi alheri, mai son abu nagari, natsattse, mai kirki, tsarkakakke, mai kamunkai," 
Titus1:9 mai riƙe da tabbatacciyar maganar nan kankan, daidai yadda aka koya masa, domin yă iya ƙarfafa wa waɗansu zuciya da sahihiyar koyarwa, ya kuma ƙaryata waɗanda suka yi musunta." 
Titus1:10 Don kuwa akwai kangararrun mutane da yawa, da masu surutan banza, da masu ruɗi, tun ba ma ɗariƙar masu kaciyar nan ba." 
Titus1:11 Lalle ne a kwaɓe su, tun da yake suna jirkitar da jama'a gida gida, ta wurin koyar da abin da bai kamata ba, don neman ƙazamar riɓa." 
Titus1:12 Wani annabi na Karitawa ya ce, “Karitawa a kullum maƙaryata ne, mugayen dabbobi, ragwaye, haɗamammu.”" 
Titus1:13 Shaidar nan tasa kuwa gaskiya ce. Saboda haka, dai ka tsawata musu da gaske, domin su zama sahihai a wajen bangaskiya," 
Titus1:14 a maimakon su mai da hankali ga almarar Yahudawa, ko kuwa dokokin mutane masu ƙin gaskiya." 
Titus1:15 Ga masu tsarkin rai duk al'amarinsu mai tsarki ne, marasa tsarkin rai kuwa marasa ba da gaskiya, ba wani al'amarinsu da yake mai tsarki, da zuciyarsu da lamirinsu duka marasa tsarki ne." 
Titus1:16 Suna cewa sun san Allah, amma suna sāɓa masa ta wurin aikinsu. Abin ƙyama ne su, kangararru, ko kaɗan ba su da wani amfani a wajen yin aiki nagari." 
Titus2:1 Amma kai kam, sai ka faɗi abin da ya dace da sahihiyar koyarwa." 
Titus2:2 Dattawa su kasance masu kamunkai, natsattsu, mahankalta, masu sahihiyar bangaskiya, da ƙauna, da kuma jimiri." 
Titus2:3 Haka kuma, manyan mata su kasance masu keɓaɓɓen hali, ba masu yanke, ko masu jarabar giya ba, su zamana masu koyar da kyakkyawan abu," 
Titus2:4 ta haka su koya wa mata masu ƙuruciya su so mazansu da 'ya'yansu," 
Titus2:5 su kuma kasance natsattsu, masu tsarkin rai, masu kula da gida, masu alheri, masu biyayya ga mazansu, don kada a kushe Maganar Allah." 
Titus2:6 Haka kuma, ka gargaɗi samari su yi kamunkai." 
Titus2:7 Kai ma sai ka zama gurbi na aiki nagari ta kowace hanya, da koyarwarka kana nuna rashin jirkituwa, da natsuwa," 
Titus2:8 da kuma sahihiyar maganar da ba za a kushe mata ba, don a kunyata abokan hamayya, su rasa hanyar zarginmu." 
Titus2:9 Bayi su yi biyayya ga iyayengijinsu, su kuma gamsar da su ta kowane hali. Kada su yi tsayayya," 
Titus2:10 ko taɓe-taɓe, sai dai su riƙi amana sosai, don su ƙawatar da koyarwar Allah Mai Cetonmu ta kowane hali." 
Titus2:11 Alherin Allah ya bayyana saboda ceton dukkan mutane," 
Titus2:12 yana koya mana mu ƙi rashin bin Allah da mugayen sha'awace-sha'awacen duniya, mu kuma yi zamanmu a duniyar nan da natsuwa, da adalci, da kuma bin Allah," 
Titus2:13 muna sauraron cikar begen nan mai albarka, wato bayyanar ɗaukakar Allahnmu Mai Girma, Mai Cetonmu Yesu Almasihu," 
Titus2:14 wanda ya ba da kansa dominmu, domin ya fanso mu daga dukan mugun aiki, ya kuma tsarkake jama'a su zama abin mulkinsa, masu himmar yin kyakkyawan aiki." 
Titus2:15 Ka yi ta sanar da waɗannan abubuwa, kana gargaɗar da su, kana tsawatarwa da ƙaƙƙarfan umarni. Kada ka yarda kowa yă raina ka." 
Titus3:1 Ka riƙa tuna musu su yi wa mahukunta da shugabanni ladabi, suna yi musu biyayya, suna kuma zaune da shirinsu na yin kowane irin kyakkyawan aiki." 
Titus3:2 Kada su ci naman kowa, kada su yi husuma, sai dai su zama salihai, suna yi wa dukan mutane matuƙar tawali'u." 
Titus3:3 Mu kanmu ma dā can mun yi wauta, mun kangare, an ɓad da mu, mun jarabta da muguwar sha'awa da nishaɗi iri iri, mun yi zaman ƙeta da hassada, mun zama abin ƙi, mu kuma mun ƙi waɗansu." 
Titus3:4 Amma sa'ad da alherin Allah Mai Cetonmu da ƙaunarsa ga 'yan adam suka bayyana," 
Titus3:5 sai ya cece mu, ba don wani aikin adalci da mu muka yi ba, a'a, sai dai domin jinƙan nan nasa, albarkacin wankan nan na sāke haihuwa, da kuma sabuntawar nan ta Ruhu Mai Tsarki," 
Titus3:6 wanda ya zubo mana a yalwace ta wurin Yesu Almasihu Mai Cetonmu. 
Titus3:7 Wannan kuwa domin a kuɓutar da mu bisa ga alherinsa ne, mu kuma zama magāda masu bege ga rai madawwami." 
Titus3:8 Maganar nan tabbatacciya ce. Ina so ka ƙarfafa waɗannan abubuwa ƙwarai, don waɗanda suka ba da gaskiya ga Allah su himmantu ga aiki nagari, waɗannan abubuwa kuwa masu kyau ne, masu amfani kuma ga mutane." 
Titus3:9 Amma ka yi nesa da gardandamin banza, da ƙididdigar asali, da husuma, da jayayya a kan Shari'a, domin ba su da wata riba, aikin banza ne kuma." 
Titus3:10 Mutumin da yake sa tsattsaguwa kuwa, in ya ƙi kula da gargaɗinka na farko da na biyu, to, sai ka fita sha'aninsa." 
Titus3:11 Ka dai sani irinsa ɓatacce ne, mai yin zunubi, shi kansa ma ya sani haka yake." 
Titus3:12 Sa'ad da na aiko Artimas ko Tikikus zuwa wurinka, sai ka yi matuƙar, ƙoƙari ka zo wurina a Nikafolis, don na yi niyyar cin damuna a can." 
Titus3:13 Ka yi himmar taimakon Zinas, masanin shari'a, da Afolos, su kamo hanya, ka kuma tabbata ba abin da ya gaza musu." 
Titus3:14 Jama'armu su koyi himmantuwa ga aikin kirki don biyan bukatun matsattsu, kada su zama marasa amfani." 
Titus3:15 Duk waɗanda suke tare da ni suna gaishe ka. Ka gayar mini da masoyanmu, masu bangaskiya. Alheri yă tabbata a gare ku, ku duka." 
Philemon1:1 Daga Bulus, ɗan sarƙa saboda Almasihu Yesu, da kuma Timoti ɗan'uwanmu, zuwa ga Filiman ƙaunataccen abokin aikinmu," 
Philemon1:2 da Aufiya 'yar'uwarmu, da Arkibus abokin famanmu, da kuma ikkilisiyar da take taruwa a gidanka." 
Philemon1:3 Alheri da salama na Allah Ubanmu, da na Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu su tabbata a gare ku." 
Philemon1:4 A kullum ina gode wa Allahna duk sa'ad da nake yi maka addu'a," 
Philemon1:5 saboda nakan ji labarin ƙauna da bangaskiya da kake yi wa Ubangiji Yesu da dukkan tsarkaka. 
Philemon1:6 Ina addu'a bangaskiyar nan da ta haɗa ku, tă kasance mai ƙwazo a wajen ciyar da sanin dukkan kyawawan abubuwan da suke namu, saboda Almasihu." 
Philemon1:7 Na yi farin ciki ƙwarai, zuciyata kuma ta ƙarfafa saboda ƙaunar da kake yi, yă kai 'dan'uwana, domin zukatan tsarkaka sun wartsake ta dalilinka." 
Philemon1:8 Saboda haka, ko da yake saboda Almasihu ina iya umartarka gabagaɗi, ka yi abin da ya wajaba," 
Philemon1:9 duk da haka saboda ƙauna, na fi so in roƙe ka, ni Bulus tsoho, a yanzu kuma ga ni ɗan sarƙa saboda Almasihu Yesu," 
Philemon1:10 ina roƙonka saboda ɗana Unisimas, wanda na zama ubansa ina ɗaure." 
Philemon1:11 Dā kam, ba shi da wani amfani a wurinka, amma a yanzu, hakika yana da amfani a gare mu, ni da kai." 
Philemon1:12 Ga shi nan, na komo maka da shi kamar gudan zuciyata." 
Philemon1:13 Dā kam sona in riƙe shi a wurina, yă riƙa yi mini hidima a madadinka, muddin ina ɗaure saboda bishara." 
Philemon1:14 Amma ba na so in yi kome ba tare da yardarka ba, don kada alherinka yă zamana na tilas ne, ba na ganin dama ba." 
Philemon1:15 Watakila shi ya sa kuka ɗan rabu, don kă same shi har abada," 
Philemon1:16 ba kuma a kan bawa ba, sai dai a kan abin da ya fi bawa, wato 'dan'uwa abin ƙauna, tun ba ma a gare ni ba, balle fa a gare ka, ta wajen al'amarin jiki da kuma wajen al'amarin Ubangiji." 
Philemon1:17 Saboda haka in ka ɗauke ni a kan abokin tarayya, to, sai ka karɓe shi kamar yadda za ka karɓe ni." 
Philemon1:18 Ko ma ya yi maka wani laifi, ko kuwa kana binsa wani abu, sai ka mai da shi a kaina." 
Philemon1:19 Ni Bulus, ni nake rubuto wannan da hannuna, ni kuwa zan biya, kada ma a yi zancen ranka da na fanso maka!" 
Philemon1:20 Ya ɗan'uwana, ka yarda in sami wata fa'ida a gare ka saboda Ubangiji! Ka sanyaya mini zuciya saboda Almasihu." 
Philemon1:21 Don na tabbatar da biyayyarka, shi ya sa na rubuto maka, don na sani za ka yi, har fiye da abin da na faɗa." 
Philemon1:22 Har wa yau kuma, ka shirya mini masauki, domin ina sa zuciya a ba ni yarjin zuwa gare ku albarkacin addu'arku." 
Philemon1:23 Abafaras, abokin ɗaurina saboda Almasihu Yesu, yana gaishe ka," 
Philemon1:24 haka kuma Markus, da Aristarkus, da Dimas, da Luka, abokan aikina, suna gaishe ka." 
Philemon1:24 haka kuma Markus, da Aristarkus, da Dimas, da Luka, abokan aikina, suna gaishe ka." 
Philemon1:25 Alherin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu yă tabbata a zukatanku. 
Hebrews1:1 A zamanin dā, Allah ya yi wa kakannin kakanninmu magana ta hanyoyi masu yawa iri iri, ta bakin annabawa," 
Hebrews1:2 amma a zamanin nan na ƙarshe, sai ya yi mana magana ta wurin Ɗansa, wanda ya sa magājin kome, wanda ta wurinsa ne kuma ya halicci duniya." 
Hebrews1:3 Shi ne hasken ɗaukakar Allah, ainihin kamannin zatinsa kuma, shi kuma yana a riƙe da dukan abubuwa ta ikon faɗarsa. Bayan da ya tsarkake zunubanmu, sai ya zauna a dama da Maɗaukaki a can Sama." 
Hebrews1:4 Ta haka yake da fifiko a kan mala'iku, kamar yadda sunansa da ya gāda yake da fifiko nesa a kan nasu." 
Hebrews1:5 Domin kuwa wane ne a cikin mala'iku Allah ya taɓa ce wa, “Kai Ɗana ne, Ni Ubanka ne yau”? da kuma, “Zan kasance Uba a gare shi, Shi kuma, zai kasance Ɗa a gare ni”?" 
Hebrews1:6 Amma da zai sāke shigo da magāji a duniya, sai ya ce, “Dukkan mala'ikun Allah su yi masa sujada.”" 
Hebrews1:7 A game da mala'iku kuma sai ya ce, “Yakan mai da mala'ikunsa ruhohi, Masu hidimarsa kuma harsunan wuta.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Amma a game da ɗan, sai ya ce, “Kursiyinka, ya Allah, na har abada abadin ne, Sandar sarautarka sanda ce ta tsantsar gaskiya." 
Hebrews1:9 Kā ƙaunaci aikin adalci, kā ƙi aikin sāɓo. Saboda haka Allah, wato, Allahnka, ya shafe ka Da man farin ciki fiye da tsararrakinka.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Da kuma, “Ya ubangiji, kai ne ka halicci duniya tun farko, Sammai kuma aikinka ne." 
Hebrews1:11 Su za su hallaka, amma kai madawwami ne. Duk za su tsufa kamar tufa," 
Hebrews1:12 Za ka naɗe su kamar mayafi, Za su kuma sauya, Amma kai kana nan ba sākewa, Har abada shekarunka ba za su ƙare ba.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Amma wane ne a cikin mala'iku Allah ya taɓa ce wa, “Zauna a damana, Sai na sa ka take maƙiyanka”?" 
Hebrews1:14 Ashe, dukan mala'iku ba ruhohi masu hidima ba ne, waɗanda Allah yakan aika, don su yi wa waɗanda za su gāji ceto hidima?" 
Hebrews2:1 Saboda haka, lalle ne mu ƙara mai da hankali musamman ga abubuwan da muka ji, don kada mu yi sakaci, su sulluɓe mana." 
Hebrews2:2 In kuwa maganar nan da aka faɗa ta bakin mala'iku ta zama tabbatacciya, har kowane keta umarni da rashin biyayya, suka gamu da sakamakonsu wanda ya kamace su," 
Hebrews2:3 to, ta ƙaƙa mu za mu tsira, in mun ƙi kula da ceto mai girma haka? Domin Ubangiji kansa, shi ne ya fara sanar da shi, waɗanda suka saurare shi kuma suka tabbatar mana da shi," 
Hebrews2:4 sa'an nan kuma Allah ya haɗa shaidarsa, da tasu a kan ceton, ta alamu da abubuwan al'ajabi da mu'ujizai iri iri, da kuma baiwar Ruhu Mai Tsarki dabam dabam da ya rarraba kamar yadda ya nufa." 
Hebrews2:5 Ai, ba ga mala'iku ba ne Allah ya sa mulkin duniyar da za a yi, wanda muke zance." 
Hebrews2:6 Amma wani ya tabbatar a wani wuri cewa, “Mutum ma mene ne, har da za ka tuna da shi? Ko ɗan mutum ma, har da za ka kula da shi?" 
Hebrews2:7 Kā sa shi ya gaza mala'iku a ɗan lokaci kaɗan, Kā naɗa shi da ɗaukaka da girma, Kā ɗora shi a kan dukkan halittarka." 
Hebrews2:8 Kā sarayar da kome a ƙarƙashin ikonsa.” To, a wajen sarayar da dukkan abubuwa a ƙarƙashinsa ɗin nan, Allah bai bar kome a keɓe ba. Amma kuwa har a yanzu ba mu ga yana sarrafa dukkan abubuwa ba." 
Hebrews2:9 Amma muna ganin Yesu, wanda a ɗan lokaci aka sa shi ya gaza mala'iku, an naɗa shi da ɗaukaka da girma, saboda shan wuyarsa ta mutuwa. Wannan kuwa duk ta wurin alherin Allah ne Yesu ya mutu saboda kowa." 
Hebrews2:10 Saboda haka, ya dace da Allah, shi da dukkan abubuwa suka kasance dominsa, ta gare shi ne kuma dukkan abubuwa suka samu, yă kammala shugaban cetonsu ta wurin shan wuya, a wajen kawo 'ya'ya masu yawa ga samun ɗaukaka." 
Hebrews2:11 Domin da shi mai tsarkakewar da kuma waɗanda aka tsarkaken, duk tushensu ɗaya ne. Shi ya sa ba ya jin kunyar kiransu 'yan'uwansa," 
Hebrews2:12 da ya ce, “Zan sanar da sunanka ga 'yan'uwana, A tsakiyar ikilisiya zan yabe ka da waƙa.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Har wa yau, ya ce, “Zan dogara a gare shi.” Da kuma, “Ga ni nan, ni da 'ya'yan da Allah ya ba ni.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Wato tun da yake 'ya'yan duk suna da nama da jini, shi ma sai ya ɗauki kamannin haka, domin ya hallakar da mai ikon mutuwa, wato iblis, ta wurin mutuwarsa," 
Hebrews2:15 yă kuma 'yanta duk waɗanda tun haihuwarsu suke zaman bauta saboda tsoron mutuwa. 
Hebrews2:16 Don hakika ba mala'iku yake taimako ba, a'a, zuriyar Ibrahim ne yake taimako." 
Hebrews2:17 Saboda haka, lalle ne yă zama kamar 'yan'uwansa ta kowane hali, domin yă zama Babban Firist, mai jinƙai, mai aminci kuma na al'amarin Allah, yă kuma miƙa hadayar sulhu ta gafarta zunuban jama'a." 
Hebrews2:18 Tun da yake shi ma ya sha wuya, sa'ad da aka gwada shi, ashe, zai taimaki waɗanda ake yi wa gwaji." 
Hebrews3:1 Saboda haka, ya ku 'yan'uwa tsarkaka, ku da kuke da rabo a kiran nan basamaniya, sai ku tsai da zuciya ga Yesu, Manzo, da kuma Babban Firist na bangaskiyar da muke shaidawa," 
Hebrews3:2 shi da yake mai aminci ga wannan da ya sa shi, kamar yadda Musa ya yi ga duk jama'ar Allah." 
Hebrews3:3 Amma kuwa an ga Yesu ya cancanci ɗaukaka fiye da ta Musa nesa, kamar yadda mai gina gida ya fi gidan martaba." 
Hebrews3:4 Kowane gida ai, da wanda ya gina shi, amma maginin dukkan abubuwa Allah ne." 
Hebrews3:5 To, shi Musa mai aminci ne ga dukkan jama'ar Allah a kan shi bara ne, saboda shaida a kan al'amuran da za a yi maganarsu a nan gaba," 
Hebrews3:6 amma Almasihu mai aminci ne, yana mulkin jama'ar Allah a kan shi Ɗa ne, mu ne kuwa jama'arsa, muddin mun tsaya gabanmu gaɗi, muna gadara da begenmu ƙwarai." 
Hebrews3:7 Saboda haka, kamar yadda Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya ce, “Yau in kun ji muryarsa," 
Hebrews3:8 Kada ku taurare zukatanku kamar a lokacin tawayen nan, Wato, ranar gwaji a jeji," 
Hebrews3:9 A inda kakanninku suka gwada ni, suka jarraba ni, Suna ganin ayyukana har shekara arba'in." 
Hebrews3:10 Saboda haka ne, na yi fushi da mutanen wannan zamani, Har na ce, ‘A kullum zuciyarsu a karkace take, Ba su kuwa san hanyoyina ba.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Sai na yi rantsuwa da fushina, na ce, ‘Ba za su shiga inuwata ba sam.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Ku kula fa, 'yan'uwa, kada wata muguwar zuciyar marar gaskatawa ta wakana ga waninku, wadda za ta bauɗar da ku daga wurin Allah Rayayye." 
Hebrews3:13 Sai dai kowace rana ku ƙarfafa wa juna zuciya muddin akwai “Yau”, don kada kowannenku ya taurare, ta yaudarar zunubi." 
Hebrews3:14 Don kuwa mun zama masu tarayya da Almasihu, muddin muna tsaye da ƙarfi a kan amincewar nan tamu ta fari, har zuwa ƙarshe." 
Hebrews3:15 Domin kuwa an ce, “Yau in kun ji muryarsa, Kada ku taurare zukatanku kamar a lokacin tawayen nan.”" 
Hebrews3:16 To, su wane ne suka ji, duk da haka suka yi tawaye? Ashe, ba duk waɗanda suka fito daga ƙasar Masar ba ne, waɗanda Musa ya shugabantar?" 
Hebrews3:17 Da su wa kuma ya yi fushi har shekara arba'in? Ashe, ba da waɗanda suka yi zunubi ba ne, waɗanda gawawwakinsu suka fādi a jeji?" 
Hebrews3:18 Su wa kuma ya rantse wa, cewa ba za su shiga inuwarsa ba, in ba marasa biyayyar nan ba?" 
Hebrews3:19 Sai muka ga, ashe, saboda rashin bangaskiyarsu ne suka kāsa shiga." 
Hebrews4:1 Saboda haka tun alkawarin shiga inuwarsa tana nan, sai mu yi tsananin kula, kada ya zamana waninku ya kāsa shiga." 
Hebrews4:2 Ai kuwa, an yi mana albishir kamar yadda aka yi musu, sai dai maganar da aka yi musu ba ta amfane su da kome ba, don kuwa ba ta gamu da bangaskiya ga majiyanta ba." 
Hebrews4:3 Mu kuwa da muka ba da gaskiya, muna shiga inuwar, yadda ya ce, “Sai na yi rantsuwa da fushina, na ce, ‘ba za su shiga inuwata ba sam,’ ” ko da yake ayyukan Allah gamammu ne tun daga farkon duniya." 
Hebrews4:4 Domin a wani wuri ya yi maganar rana ta bakwai cewa, “A rana ta bakwai Allah ya huta daga ayyukansa duka.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Amma a wannan wuri kuwa sai ya ce, “Ba za su shiga inuwata ba sam.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Wato, tun da yake har yanzu dai da sauran dama waɗansu su shiga, su kuwa waɗanda aka fara yi wa albishirin nan sun kāsa shiga saboda rashin biyayya," 
Hebrews4:7 to, sai ya sāke sa wata rana, ya ce, “Yau,” yana magana ta bakin Dawuda bayan da aka daɗe, kamar an riga an faɗa cewa, “Yau in kun ji muryarsa, kada ku taurare zukatanku.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Da dai a ce Joshuwa ya kai su cikin inuwar Allah, da Allah bai yi maganar wata rana nan gaba ba," 
Hebrews4:9 wato, har yanzu dai akwai sauran wani hutun Asabar ga jama'ar Allah," 
Hebrews4:10 domin kuwa duk wanda ya shiga inuwar Allah, ya huta ke nan daga ayyukansa, kamar yadda Allah yă huta daga nasa." 
Hebrews4:11 Saboda haka, sai mu yi himmar shiga inuwar nan, kada wani yă kāsa shiga, saboda irin wannan rashin biyayya." 
Hebrews4:12 Domin Maganar Allah rayayyiya ce, mai ƙarfin aiki, ta fi kowane irin takobi kaifi, har tana ratsa rai da ruhu, da kuma gaɓoɓi, har ya zuwa cikin ɓargo, tana kuma iya rarrabe tunanin zuciya da manufarta." 
Hebrews4:13 Ba wata halittar da za ta iya ɓuyar masa, amma kowane abu a fili yake, a shanye sosai a gaban idon wannan da za mu ba da lissafi a gabansa." 
Hebrews4:14 To, tun da yake muna da Babban Firist mai girma, wanda ya ratsa sammai, wato Yesu Ɗan Allah, sai mu tsaya a kan abin da muka bayyana yarda a gare shi." 
Hebrews4:15 Gama Babban Firist da muke da shi ba marar juyayin kasawarmu ba ne, a'a, shi ne wanda aka jarabce shi ta kowace hanya da aka jarabce mu, amma bai yi zunubi ba." 
Hebrews4:16 Saboda haka, sai mu kusaci kursiyin Allah na alheri da amincewa, domin a yi mana jinƙai, a kuma yi mana alherin da zai taimake mu a kan kari." 
Hebrews5:1 Kowane babban firist, da yake an zaɓe shi ne daga cikin mutane, akan sa shi yă wakilci mutane ga al'amarin Allah, don yă miƙa sadakoki da kuma hadayu domin kawar da zunubai." 
Hebrews5:2 Yă kuma zamana wanda zai iya tafiyar da jahilai da sangartattu a cikin salihanci, tun da yake rarrauna ne shi ta ko'ina." 
Hebrews5:3 Saboda haka, wajibi ne yă miƙa hadayu, ba saboda kawar da zunuban jama'a kaɗai ba, har ma don nasa." 
Hebrews5:4 Ba wanda zai kai kansa wannan matsayi mai girma, sai dai Allah ya yi kiransa ga haka, kamar yadda aka kirayi Haruna." 
Hebrews5:5 Haka kuma, Almasihu, ba shi ya ɗaukaka kansa ya zama Babban Firist ba, sai dai wannan ne ya sa shi, wanda ya ce da shi, “Kai Ɗana ne, Ni Ubanka ne yau.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Kamar dai yadda a wani wuri kuma ya ce, “Kai firist ne na har abada, Kwatancin ɗabi'ar Malkisadik.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Almasihu, a lokacin zamansa a duniya, ya yi addu'o'i da roƙe-roƙe, tare da kuka mai tsanani, har da hawaye, ga wannan da yake da ikon cetonsa daga mutuwa, aka kuwa saurare shi saboda tsananin miƙa kansa." 
Hebrews5:8 Ko da yake shi Ɗa ne, ya koyi biyayya ta wurin wuyar da ya sha," 
Hebrews5:9 da ya kai ga kammala, sai ya zama tushen madawwamin ceto ga dukkan waɗanda suke masa biyayya," 
Hebrews5:10 gama Allah yana kiransa Babban Firist, kwatancin ɗabi'ar Malkisadik." 
Hebrews5:11 Muna da abu da yawa da za mu faɗa a game da shi kuwa, amma zai yi wuyar bayani, da yake basirarku ta dushe." 
Hebrews5:12 Ko da yake kamar a yanzu kam, ai, ya kamata ku zama masu koyarwa, duk da haka, ashe, ba ku wuce wani ya sāke koya muku jigajigan farko na Maganar Allah ba, har ya zamana sai an ba ku nono, ba abinci mai tauri ba." 
Hebrews5:13 Ai, duk wanda yake nono ne abincinsa, bai ƙware da maganar adalci ba, kamar jariri yake." 
Hebrews5:14 Amma abinci mai tauri, ai, na manya ne, wato waɗanda hankalinsu ya horu yau da kullum, su rarrabe nagarta da mugunta." 
Hebrews6:1 Saboda haka, sai mu ci gaba a kan ka'idodin farko na al'amarin Almasihu, har ya zuwa kammala, ba wai mu sāke koyar da jigajigan nan na tuba da ibada marar tasiri ba, da na gaskatawa da Allah," 
Hebrews6:2 da kuma na koyarwa a kan wanke-wanke, da ɗora hannu, da tashin matattu, da dawwamammen hukunci." 
Hebrews6:3 Za mu kuwa ci gaba in Allah ya yarda. 
Hebrews6:4 Domin waɗanda aka haskaka zukatansu sarai, har suka ɗanɗana baiwar nan ta Basamaniya, suka kuma sami rabo na ruhu mai tsarki," 
Hebrews6:5 har suka ɗanɗana daɗin Maganar Allah, da ikon zamani mai zuwa," 
Hebrews6:6 sa'an nan kuma suka ridda, ba mai yiwuwa ba ne a sāke jawo su ga tuba, tun da yake sāke gicciye Ɗan Allah suke yi, su da kansu, suka kuma wulakanta shi a sarari." 
Hebrews6:7 Ƙasa ma da take shanye ruwan da ake yi mata a kai a kai, take kuma fid da tsire-tsire masu amfani ga waɗanda ake noma ta dominsu, Allah yakan sa mata albarka." 
Hebrews6:8 Amma tsire-tsirenta ƙaya ne da kashin yawo, ba ta da amfani ke nan, tana kuma gab da la'antarwa, ƙarshenta dai ƙonewa ne." 
Hebrews6:9 Ko da yake mun faɗi haka, a game da ku kam, ya ƙaunatattu, mun tabbata kuna a kan abubuwa mafiya kyau na zancen ceto." 
Hebrews6:10 Gama Allah ba marar adalci ba ne, har da zai ƙi kula da aikinku, da kuma ƙaunar sunansa da kuka yi, wajen yi wa tsarkaka hidima, har yanzu ma kuna yi." 
Hebrews6:11 Muna dai bukata ƙwarai kowannenku ya nuna irin wannan himma ga yin cikkaken bege, tabbatacce, har ya zuwa ƙarshe," 
Hebrews6:12 don kada ku yi ragwanci, sai dai ku yi koyi da waɗanda suka karɓi cikar alkawaran nan, ta wurin bangaskiyarsu da haƙurinsu." 
Hebrews6:13 Sa'ad da Allah ya yi wa Ibrahim alkawari, da yake ba wani wanda ya fi shi girma da zai rantse da shi, sai ya rantse da kansa," 
Hebrews6:14 ya ce, “Hakika zan yi maka albarka, in kuma riɓanya zuriyarka.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Ta haka Ibrahim, bayan da ya jure da haƙuri, ya karɓi cikar alkawarin." 
Hebrews6:16 Hakika mutane sukan rantse da abin da ya fi su, rantsuwa kuma ita ce abar da take tabbatarwa a duk lokacin gardama." 
Hebrews6:17 Don haka, sa'ad da Allah yake son ƙara tabbatar wa magādan alkawarin nan dahir, cewa nufinsa ba mai sākewa ba ne sam, sai ya haɗa da rantsuwa," 
Hebrews6:18 domin albarkacin abubuwa guda biyun nan marasa sākewa, masu nuna, cewa ba shi yiwuwa Allah ya yi ƙarya, mu da muka gudu muka sami mafaka, mu ƙarfafa ƙwarai mu riski abin da muka kafa bege a kai." 
Hebrews6:19 Begen nan kuwa da muke da shi, kamar anka yake ga rai, kafaffe, tabbatacce, shi ne kuma yake shiga har can ciki bayan labulen," 
Hebrews6:20 a inda saboda mu ne Yesu ya riga mu shiga, da yake ya zama Babban Firist na har abada, kwatancin ɗabi'ar Malkisadik." 
Hebrews7:1 Shi wannan Malkisadik, Sarkin Urushalima, firist na Allah Maɗaukaki, ya gamu da Ibrahim a lokacin da Ibrahim yake dawowa daga kisan sarakuna, ya sa masa albarka." 
Hebrews7:2 Shi ne kuwa Ibrahim ya ba shi ushirin kome. Da farko dai, kamar yadda ma'anar sunansa take, shi sarkin adalci ne, sa'an nan kuma Sarkin Urushalima ne, wato, sarkin salama." 
Hebrews7:3 Shi ba shi da uwa ko uba, ba a kuma san asalinsa ba. Ba shi da ranar haihuwa balle ranar mutuwa, yana dai kama da Ɗan Allah, firist ne har abada." 
Hebrews7:4 Kai, ku dubi irin girmansa! Har kakanmu Ibrahim ma ya ba shi ushirin ganima!" 
Hebrews7:5 Ga shi kuma, waɗansu na zuriyar Lawi, in sun sami matsayin firist, akan umarce su bisa ga Shari'a su karɓi ushiri a gun jama'a, wato a gun 'yan'uwansu, ko da yake su ma zuriyar Ibrahim ne." 
Hebrews7:6 Amma wannan, wanda ma ba a asalin Lawi yake ba, ya karɓi ushiri a gun Ibrahim, har ya sa masa albarka, shi ma da aka yi wa alkawarai." 
Hebrews7:7 Ai, ba abin musu ba ne, cewa na gaba shi yake sa wa na baya albarka." 
Hebrews7:8 Ga shi, a nan masu karɓar ushiri, mutane ne masu mutuwa, a can kuwa mai karɓar wanda aka shaida shi, rayayye ne." 
Hebrews7:9 A ma iya cewa ko Lawi ma da kansa, mai karɓar ushiri, ya ba da ushiri ta wurin Ibrahim," 
Hebrews7:10 don shi Lawi yana daga tsatson kakansa Ibrahim, sa'ad da Ibrahim ɗin ya gamu da Malkisadik." 
Hebrews7:11 Gama da a ce kammala tana samuwa ta wurin firistoci na zuriyar Lawi (don ta gare su ne jama'a suka karɓi shari'a), wace bukata kuma ake da ita ta wani firist dabam ya bayyana kwatancin ɗabi'ar Malkisadik, wanda za a ambata ba kwatancin ɗabi'ar Haruna ba?" 
Hebrews7:12 Domin in an sauya matsayin firistoci, sai tilas a sauya Shari'a kuma." 
Hebrews7:13 Domin kuwa shi wannan da aka faɗi waɗannan abubuwa a game da shi, ai, na wata kabila ne dabam, wadda ba waninta da ya taɓa hidimar bagadin hadaya." 
Hebrews7:14 Tabbatacce ne, cewa Ubangijinmu ya fito daga zuriyar Yahuza ne, Musa kuwa bai ce kome ba a game da kabilar nan a kan zancen firistoci." 
Hebrews7:15 Wannan kuma ya ƙara fitowa fili sosai, sa'ad da wani firist dabam ya bayyana kamar Malkisadik," 
Hebrews7:16 wanda kuwa ya zama firist, ba bisa ga wata ka'ida ta al'adar 'yan adam ba, sai dai ta wurin ikon rai marar gushewa." 
Hebrews7:17 Domin an shaide shi da cewa, “Kai firist ne na har abada, Kwatancin ɗabi'ar Malkisadik.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Ta wani hali an soke wani umarni ta dā saboda rauninsa da kuma rashin amfaninsa," 
Hebrews7:19 don Shari'a ba ta kammala kome ba, ta wani hali kuma an shigo da wani bege wanda yake mafi kyau, ta wurinsa kuwa muke kusatar Allah." 
Hebrews7:20 Ba kuwa da rashin rantsuwa aka yi haka ba. 
Hebrews7:21 Waɗancan sun zama firistoci, ba tare da an yi musu rantsuwa ba, amma wannan kam, sai da aka yi masa rantsuwa, da Allah ya ce masa, “Ubangiji ya rantse, Ba kuwa zai ta da maganarsa ba cewa, ‘Kai firist ne har abada.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 A sanadin wannan ne Yesu ya zama lamunin alkawarin da ya fi wancan nesa. 
Hebrews7:23 Waɗancan firistoci, an yi su da yawa, domin mutuwa ta hana su tabbata a aikin." 
Hebrews7:24 Amma shi da yake madawwami ne, yana da matsayinsa na firist wanda ba ya komawa hannun wani." 
Hebrews7:25 Saboda haka, yana da ikon ceton masu kusatowa ga Allah ta wurinsa, matuƙar ceto, tun da yake kullum a raye yake saboda yi musu addu'a." 
Hebrews7:26 Irin babban firist wanda muke bukata ke nan, mai tsarki, marar aibu, marar cikas, keɓaɓɓe daga masu zunubi, ɗaukakke kuma birbishin sammai." 
Hebrews7:27 Ba zai miƙa hadaya kowace rana kumar waɗancan manyan firistocin ba, wato, da farko saboda zunubansa, sa'an nan kuma saboda na jama'a. Wannan ya yi ta ne sau ɗaya tak, lokacin da ya miƙa kansa hadaya." 
Hebrews7:28 Wato shari'a tana sa mutane su zama manyan firistoci duk da rauninsu, amma maganar nan ta rantsuwa da ta sauko bayan Shari'a, ta sa Ɗa wanda yake kammalalle har abada." 
Hebrews8:1 Wato, duk manufar maganarmu ita ce wannan. Shi ne irin babban firist wanda muke da shi, wato wanda ya zauna a dama da kursiyin Maɗaukaki a can sammai," 
Hebrews8:2 mai hidima a Wuri Mafi Tsarki, da kuma masujada ta gaskiya, wadda Ubangiji ya kafa, ba mutum ba." 
Hebrews8:3 Kowane babban firist akan sa shi domin ya miƙa sadakoki da hadayu, saboda haka wajibi ne wannan shi ma, ya zamanto yana da abin da zai miƙa." 
Hebrews8:4 To, ashe, da har yanzu yana duniya, da bai zama firist ba ke nan, tun da yake akwai firistocin da suke miƙa sadakoki bisa ga Shari'a." 
Hebrews8:5 Suna bauta wa makamantan abubuwan Sama da kuma ishararsu, kamar yadda Allah ya gargaɗi Musa sa'ad da yake shirin kafa alfarwar nan, da ya ce, “Ka lura fa, ka shirya kome da kome daidai yadda aka nuna maka a kan dutsen.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Amma ga ainihi, Almasihu ya sami hidima wadda take mafificiya, kamar yadda alkawarin nan,wanda shi ne matsakancinsa, yake da fifiko nesa, tun da yake an kafa shi ne a kan mafifitan alkawarai." 
Hebrews8:7 Domin da wancan alkawari na farko bai gaza da kome ba, da ba sai an sāke neman na biyu ba." 
Hebrews8:8 Gama ya ga laifinsu da ya ce, “Lokaci yana zuwa, in ji Ubangiji, Da zan tsara sabon alkawari da jama'ar Isra'ila, Da kuma zuriyar Yahuza." 
Hebrews8:9 Ba irin alkawarin da na yi da kakanninsu ba, A ranar da na kama hannunsu Domin in fito da su daga ƙasar Masar. Saboda ba su tsaya ga alkawarina ba, Shi ya sa na ƙyale su, in ji Ubangiji." 
Hebrews8:10 Wannan shi ne alkawarin da zan yi da jama'ar Isra'ila, Bayan kwanakin nan, in ji Ubangiji, Wato, zan sa shari'una a birnin zuciyarsu, In kuma rubuta su a allon zuciyarsu. Zan kasance Allahnsu, Su kuma su kasance jama'ata." 
Hebrews8:11 Ba kuma sai sun koya wa ɗan garinsu ba, Balle wani ya ce ɗan'uwansa, ‘Kă san Ubangiji!’ Domin kowa zai san ni, Daga ƙaraminsu, har ya zuwa babbansu." 
Hebrews8:12 Domin zan yi musu jinƙai a kan muguntarsu, Ba kuwa zan ƙara tunawa da zunubansu ba.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Da ya ce sabon alkawari, ashe kuwa, ya mai da na farkon tsoho ke nan. Abin da yake tsufa, yana kuwa daɗa tsofewa, lalle ya yi kusan shuɗewa ke nan." 
Hebrews9:1 Alkawarin farko yana da ka'idodinsa na yin sujada, da kuma wurin yinta tsattsarka wanda mutane suka shirya." 
Hebrews9:2 Wato, an kafa alfarwa wadda sashinta na farko yake da fitila, da tebur, da kuma keɓaɓɓiyar gurasa. Ana kiran wannan sashi Wuri Mai Tsarki." 
Hebrews9:3 Bayan labule na biyu kuma, akwai sashin alfarwa da ake kira Wuri Mafi Tsarki." 
Hebrews9:4 A cikinsa kuwa da faranti na zinariya domin ƙona turare, da kuma akwatin alkawari da aka yi masa laffa da zinariya ta kowane gefe. A cikinsa kuwa akwai tasar zinariya da manna a ciki, da sandar Haruna wadda ta yi toho, da kuma allunan dutse na alkawarin nan." 
Hebrews9:5 A bisa akwatin alkawari kuma akwai kerubobin nan na ɗaukakar Allah, waɗanda suka yi wa murfin akwatin nan laima. Ba za mu iya yin maganar waɗannan abubuwa filla filla ba a yanzu." 
Hebrews9:6 In an gama waɗannan shirye-shirye haka, sai firistoci kullum su riƙa shiga sashin farko an alfarwar, suna hidimarsu ta ibada." 
Hebrews9:7 Amma na biyun, sai babban firist kaɗai yake shiga, shi ma kuwa sai sau ɗaya a shekara, sai kuma da jini wanda yakan miƙa saboda kansa, da kuma kurakuran jama'a." 
Hebrews9:8 Ta haka Ruhu Mai Tsarki yake yin ishara, cewa ba a buɗe hanyar shiga Wuri Mafi Tsarki ba tukuna, muddin alfarwa tana nan a tsaye," 
Hebrews9:9 wadda take ishara ce ga wannan zamani. Bisa ga wannan ishara akan yi miƙa sadaka da hadaya, amma ba sa iya kammala lamirin mai ibadar," 
Hebrews9:10 tun da yake ci da sha da wankewanke iri iri kaɗai suke shafa, ka'idodi ne a game da jiki kurum, waɗanda aka sa kafin a daidaita al'amari." 
Hebrews9:11 Amma Almasihu ya riga ya zo, yana babban firist na kyawawan abubuwan da suke akwai. Masujadar da yake hidima a ciki mafi ɗaukaka ce, mafi kammala kuwa (wadda ba yin mutum ba ce, wato, ba ta wannan halittacciyar duniya ba ce)." 
Hebrews9:12 Almasihu ya shiga Wuri Mafi Tsarki sau ɗaya tak, ba ƙari, ba kuwa ta wurin jinin awaki ko na 'yan maruƙa ya shiga ba, sai dai ta wurin nasa jini, ya samo mana madawwamiyar fansa." 
Hebrews9:13 To, jinin awaki ne fa da na bijimai, da kuma tokar karsana da ake yayyafa wa waɗanda suka ƙazantu, suke tsarkake su da tsabtacewar jiki," 
Hebrews9:14 balle fa jinin Almasihu wanda ya miƙa kansa marar aibu ga Allah, ta wurin Madawwamin Ruhu, lalle zai tsarkake lamirinmu daga barin ibada marar tasiri, domin mu bauta wa Allah Rayayye." 
Hebrews9:15 Saboda haka, shi ne matsakancin sabon alkawari, domin waɗanda aka kira su karɓi dawwamammen gādon da aka yi musu alkawari, tun da yake an yi wata mutuwa mai fansar waɗanda suke keta umarni a game da alkawarin farko." 
Hebrews9:16 A game da al'amarin wasiyya, lalle ne a tabbatar da mutuwar wanda ya yi ta tukuna." 
Hebrews9:17 Domin ba a zartar da wasiyya sai bayan an mutu, tun da yake ba a yin aiki da ita muddin wanda ya yi ta yana a raye." 
Hebrews9:18 Ashe kuwa, mun ga alkawarin nan na farko, ba a tabbatar da shi ba, sai a game da jini." 
Hebrews9:19 Don bayan Musa ya sanar da kowane umarnin Shari'a ga dukan jama'a, sai ya ɗebi jinin 'yan maruƙa da na awaki, tare da ruwa, da jan ulu, da kuma ganyen izob, ya yayyafa wa Littafin kansa, da kuma duk jama'a,"
