Hebrews9:20 yana cewa, “Wannan shi ne jini na tabbatar alkawarin nan, da Allah ya yi umarni a game da ku.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Haka kuma, ya yayyafa jinin ga alfarwar nan, da dukan kayanta na yin hidima." 
Hebrews9:22 Hakika, bisa ga Shari'a, kusan kowane abu da jini ake tsarkake shi, in ba a game da zubar da jini ba kuwa, to, ba gafara." 
Hebrews9:23 Da waɗannan abubuwa ne, ya wajaba a tsarkake makamantan abubuwan da suke a Sama, sai dai ainihin abubuwan Sama za a tsarkake su ne da hadayar da ta fi waɗannan kyau." 
Hebrews9:24 Domin Almasihu bai shiga wani wuri tsattsarka da mutum ya yi ba, wanda yake sura ne kawai na gaskataccen, a'a Sama kanta ya shiga, domin yă bayyana a gaban zatin Allah a yanzu saboda mu." 
Hebrews9:25 Ba kuwa domin ya riƙa miƙa kansa hadaya a kai a kai ba ne, kamar yadda babban firist yake shiga Wuri Mafi Tsarki a kowace shekara da jinin da ba nasa ba ne." 
Hebrews9:26 In da haka ne, ashe, da sai lalle ya yi ta shan wuya a kai a kai ke nan, tun daga farkon duniya. Amma a yanzu ya bayyana sau ɗaya tak, a ƙarshen zamanai, domin ya kawar da zunubi ta wurin miƙa kansa hadaya." 
Hebrews9:27 Tun da yake an ƙaddara wa ɗan adam ya mutu sau ɗaya ne, bayan haka kuma sai shari'a," 
Hebrews9:28 shi Almasihu ma, da aka miƙa shi hadaya sau ɗaya tak, domin ya ɗauke zunuban mutane da yawa, zai sāke bayyana, bayyana ta biyu, ba a kan maganar kawar da zunubi ba, sai dai domin yă ceci waɗanda suke ɗokin zuwansa." 
Hebrews10:1 To, tun da yake Shari'a ishara ce kawai ta kyawawan abubuwan da suke a gaba, ba ainihin siffarsu ba, ashe, har abada ba za ta iya kammala waɗanda suke kusatar Allah ta wurin waɗannan hadayu ba, waɗanda ake yi a kai a kai kowace shekara." 
Hebrews10:2 In haka ne kuwa, ashe, ba sai a daina yin hadayar ba? Da an taɓa tsarkake masu ibadar nan sarai, ai, da ba su ƙara damuwa da zunubai ba." 
Hebrews10:3 Amma a game da irin waɗannan hadayu, akan tuna da zunubai a kowace shekara," 
Hebrews10:4 domin ba mai yiwuwa ba ne jinin bijimai da na awaki ya ɗauke zunubi. 
Hebrews10:5 Shi ya sa da Almasihu zai shigo duniya, sai ya ce, “Hadaya da sadaka kam, ba ka so, Amma kā tanadar mini jiki." 
Hebrews10:6 Ba ka farin ciki da hadayar ƙonewa, da kuma hadayar kawar da zunnbai." 
Hebrews10:7 Sa'an nan na ce, ‘Ga ni, na zo in aikata nufinka, ya Allah,’ Kamar yadda yake a rubuce a game da ni a Littafi.”" 
Hebrews10:8 Sa'ad da ɗazu ya ce, “Ba ka son hadaya, da sadaka, da hadayar ƙonewa, da hadayar kawar da zunubai, ba ka kuwa jin daɗinsu,” wato, irin waɗanda ake miƙawa ta hanyar Shari'a," 
Hebrews10:9 sai kuma ya ƙara da cewa, “Ga ni, na zo in aikata nufinka.” Ya kawar da na farkon ne, don yă kafa na biyun." 
Hebrews10:10 Ta nufin nan ne aka tsarkake mu, ta wurin miƙa jikin Yesu Almasihu hadaya sau ɗaya tak, ba ƙari." 
Hebrews10:11 Har wa yau kuma, kowane firist yakan tsaya a kan hidimarsa kowace rana, yana miƙa hadaya iri ɗaya a kai a kai, waɗanda har abada ba za su iya ɗauke zunubai ba." 
Hebrews10:12 Amma shi Almasihu da ya miƙa hadaya guda ta har abada domin kawar da zunubai, sai ya zauna a dama ga Allah," 
Hebrews10:13 tun daga lokacin nan yana jira, sai an sa ya take maƙiyansa." 
Hebrews10:14 Gama ta hadaya guda kawai ya kammala waɗanda aka tsarkake har abada. 
Hebrews10:15 Ruhu Mai Tsarki ma yana yi mana shaida haka, domin bayan ya ce," 
Hebrews10:16 “Wannan shi ne alkawarin da zan yi da su, Bayan kwanakin nan, in ji Ubangiji, Zan sa shari'una a birnin zuciyarsu, In kuma rubuta su a allon zuciyarsu,”" 
Hebrews10:17 sai kuma ya ƙara cewa, “Ba kuma zan ƙara tunawa da zunubansu da laifofinsu ba.”" 
Hebrews10:18 To, a inda aka sami gafarar waɗannan, ba sauran wata hadaya domin kawar da zunubi." 
Hebrews10:19 Saboda haka, ya 'yan'uwa, tun da muke da amincewar shiga Wuri Mafi Tsarki, ta wurin jinin Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 ta wurin sabuwar hanya, rayayyiya wadda ya buɗe mana ta labulen nan, wato jikinsa," 
Hebrews10:21 da yake kuma muna da Firist mai girma, mai mulkin jama'ar Allah," 
Hebrews10:22 sai mu matsa kusa, da zuciya ɗaya, da cikakkiyar bangaskiya tabbatacciya, da zukatunmu tsarkakakku daga mugun lamiri, jikinmu kuma wankakke da tsattsarkan ruwa." 
Hebrews10:23 Sai mu tsaya da ƙarfi a kan bayyana yarda ga begen nan namu, domin shi mai yin alkawarin nan amintacce ne," 
Hebrews10:24 mu kuma riƙa kula da juna, ta yarda za mu ta da juna a tsimi mu mu yi ƙauna da aika nagari." 
Hebrews10:25 Kada mu bar yin taronmu, yadda waɗansu suke yi, sai dai mu ƙarfafa wa juna zuciya, tun ba ma da kuka ga ranar nan tana kusatowa ba." 
Hebrews10:26 In kuwa mun ci gaba da yin zunubi da gangan, bayan mun yi na'am da sanin gaskiya, to, ba fa sauran wata hadaya domin kawar da zunubai," 
Hebrews10:27 sai dai matsananciyar fargabar hukunci, da kuma wuta mai tsananin zafi, wadda za ta cinye maƙiyan Allah." 
Hebrews10:28 Kowa ya yar da Shari'ar Musa, akan kashe shi ba tausayi, a kan shaidu biyu ko uku." 
Hebrews10:29 To mutumin da ya raina Ɗan Allah, ya kuma tozarta jinin nan na tabbatar alkawari, wanda aka tsarkake shi da shi, har ya wulakanta Ruhun alheri, wane irin hukunci mafi tsanani kuke tsammani ya cancanta fiye da wancan?" 
Hebrews10:30 Domin mun san shi, shi wanda ya ce, “Ramuwa tawa ce, ni zan sāka.” Da kuma, “Ubangiji zai yi wa jama'arsa hukunci.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Abu ne fa mai matuƙar bantsoro a fāɗa a cikin hukuncin Allah Rayayye. 
Hebrews10:32 Amma dai ku tuna, a shekarun baya, bayan da aka haskaka zukatanku, kun jure tsananin fama da shan wuya," 
Hebrews10:33 wata rana ana zaginku, ana ta wahalshe ku, ana wulakanta ku a gaban jama'a, wata rana kuma kuna mai da kanku ɗaya da waɗanda aka yi wa haka," 
Hebrews10:34 domin kun ji tausayin ɗaurarru, kun kuma yarda da daɗin rai da wason da aka yi muku, tun da yake kun sakankance kuna da mallaka mafi kyau, mai tabbata kuwa." 
Hebrews10:35 Saboda haka, kada ku yar da amincewar nan taku, domin tana da sakamako mai yawa." 
Hebrews10:36 Gama yin jimiri ya kama ku, domin bayan da kun aikata nufin Allah, ku sami abin da aka yi muku alkawari." 
Hebrews10:37 “Sauran lokaci kaɗan, Mai zuwan nan zai zo, ba kuwa zai yi jinkiri ba." 
Hebrews10:38 Amma adalina, ta wurin bangaskiya zai rayu. Amma in ya ja da baya, ba zan yi farin ciki da shi ba.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Amma mu ba a cikin waɗanda suke ja da baya su hallaka muke ba, mu a cikin masu bangaskiya muke, mai kai mu ga ceton rayukanmu." 
Hebrews11:1 To, bangaskiya kuwa ita ce haƙƙaƙewar abubuwan da ake bege, a kai, ita ce kuma tabbatawar abubuwan da ba a gani ba." 
Hebrews11:2 Domin ta gare ta ne shugabannin dā suka sami yardar Allah. 
Hebrews11:3 Ta wurin bangaskiya muka fahimta, cewa ta faɗar Allah ce aka tsara duniya, har ma abubuwan da ake gani, daga abubuwan da ba a gani ne, suka kasance." 
Hebrews11:4 Ta wurin bangaskiya Habila ya miƙa wa Allah hadaya mafi kyau a kan Kayinu, ta wurin wannan bangaskiya ce ya kuma sami yardar Allah a kan shi mai adalci ne domin Allah ma ya shaide shi, da ya karɓi abubuwan da ya bayar. Ya mutu kam, amma ta wurin bangaskiyar nan tasa har ya zuwa yanzu yana magana." 
Hebrews11:5 Saboda bangaskiya ce aka ɗauke Anuhu, shi ya sa bai mutu ba, ba a kuwa same shi ba, domin Allah ya ɗauke shi. Tun kafin a ɗauke shi ma, an shaide shi a kan ya faranta wa Allah rai." 
Hebrews11:6 In ba a game da bangaskiya ba kuwa, ba shi yiwuwa a faranta masa rai. Domin duk wanda zai kusaci Allah, lalle ne ya gaskata cewa, akwai shi, yana kuma sakamako ga masu nemansa." 
Hebrews11:7 Ta wurin bangaskiya Nuhu, da Allah ya yi masa gargaɗi a kan al'amuran da ba a gani ba a lokacin, yana tsoron Allah, ya sassaƙa jirgi, don ceton iyalin gidansa, ta wurin bangaskiya kuma ya tabbatar wa duniya laifinta, har ya zama magājin adalcin Allah, wanda yake samuwa ta wurin bangaskiya." 
Hebrews11:8 Ta wurin bangaskiya Ibrahim ya yi biyayya, sa'ad da aka kira shi ya fita zuwa wata ƙasa da zai karɓa gādo. Ya kuwa fita, bai ma san inda za shi ba." 
Hebrews11:9 Ta wurin bangaskiya kuma ya yi baƙunci a ƙasar alkawari, kamar dai a ƙasar bare, suna zaune a cikin alfarwai, shi da Ishaku da Yakubu, abokan tarayya ga gādon alkawarin nan." 
Hebrews11:10 Yana ta jiran birnin nan mai tushe, wanda mai fasalta shi, mai gina shi kuma, Allah ne." 
Hebrews11:11 Ta wurin bangaskiya Saratu da kanta ta sami ikon yin ciki, ko da yake ta wuce lokacin haihuwa, tun da dai ta amince, cewa shi mai yin alkawarin nan amintacce ne." 
Hebrews11:12 Saboda haka, daga mutum ɗaya, wanda dā shi ma da matacce kusan ɗaya ne, aka haifi zuriya masu yawa kamar taurari, kamar yashi kuma dangam a bakin teku." 
Hebrews11:13 Waɗannan duka sun mutu cikin bangaskiyarsu, ba su kuwa sami abubuwan da aka yi musu alkawari ba, amma da suka tsinkato su, sai suka yi ta murna da ganinsu, suna kuma yarda su baƙi ne, bare kuma a duniya." 
Hebrews11:14 Mutane masu irin wannan magana, ai, sun bayyana a fili, suna neman wata ƙasa ta kansu ne." 
Hebrews11:15 Da suna marmarin ƙasar nan da suka baro ne, da sun sami damar komawa." 
Hebrews11:16 Amma bisa ga hakika sun ɗokanta ne a kan wata ƙasa mafi kyau, wato ta Sama. Saboda haka ne, Allah ba ya jin kunya a ce da shi Allahnsu, don kuwa ya shirya musu birni." 
Hebrews11:17 Ta wurin bangaskiya Ibrahim, sa'ad da aka gwada shi, ya miƙa Ishaku hadaya, wato shi da ya yi na'am da alkawaran nan, ya yi shirin miƙa makaɗaicin ɗansa," 
Hebrews11:18 wanda a kansa aka yi faɗi cewa, “Ta wurin Ishaku ne za a lasafta zuriyarka.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Ya amince da cewa, ko daga matattu Allah yana da iko yă ta da mutum. Ai kuwa, bisa ga misali, sai a ce daga matattu ne ya sāke samun Ishaku." 
Hebrews11:20 Ta wurin bangaskiya Ishaku ya sa wa Yakubu da Isuwa albarka a kan al'amuran da za su zo. 
Hebrews11:21 Ta wurin bangaskiya Yakubu, sa'ad da yake bakin mutuwa, ya sa wa 'ya'yan Yusufu albarka dukkansu biyu, ya kuma yi sujada, yana sunkuye a kan sandarsa." 
Hebrews11:22 Ta wurin bangaskiya Yusufu, da ajalinsa ya yi, ya yi maganar ƙaurar Isra'ilawa, har ya yi wasiyya a game da ƙasusuwansa." 
Hebrews11:23 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne, sa'ad da aka haifi Musa, iyayensa suka ɓoye shi har wata uku, domin sun ga yaron kyakkyawa ne, ba su kuma ji tsoron umarnin sarki ba." 
Hebrews11:24 Ta wurin bangaskiya Musa, sa'ad da ya girma, ya ƙi yarda a kira shi ɗan 'yar Fir'auna," 
Hebrews11:25 ya gwammaci ya jure shan wuya tare da jama'ar Allah, da ya mori romon zunubi, mai saurin wucewa." 
Hebrews11:26 Ya amince, cewa wulakanci saboda Almasihu wadata ce a gare shi, fiye da dukiyar ƙasar Masar, domin ya sa ido a kan sakamakon." 
Hebrews11:27 Ta wurin bangaskiya ya bar Masar, bai ji tsoron fushin sarki ba, ya kuwa jure saboda yana ganin wannan da ba ya ganuwa." 
Hebrews11:28 Ta wurin bangaskiya ya ci Jibin Ƙetarewa, ya yayyafa jini, domin kada mai hallakar da 'ya'yan fari ya taɓa Isra'ilawa." 
Hebrews11:29 Ta wurin bangaskiya suka haye Bahar Maliya ta busasshiyar ƙasa, amma da Masarawa suka yi ƙoƙarin yin haka, sai aka dulmuyar da su." 
Hebrews11:30 Ta wurin bangaskiya garun Yariko ya rushe, bayan an yi ta kewaya shi har kwana bakwai." 
Hebrews11:31 Ta wurin bangaskiya Rahab karuwar nan ba ta hallaka tare da maƙiya biyayya ba, ta karɓi 'yan ganganimar nan kamar aminai." 
Hebrews11:32 Me kuma zan ƙara cewa? Ai, lokaci zai ƙure mini a wajen ba da labarin su Gidiyon, da Barak, da Samson, da Yefta, da Dawuda, da Sama'ila, da kuma sauran annabawa," 
Hebrews11:33 waɗanda ta wurin bangaskiya suka ci masarautai, suka aikata adalci, suka sami cikar alkawarai, suka rurrufe bakunan zakoki," 
Hebrews11:34 suka i, wa ikon wuta, suka tsere wa kaifin takobi, suna marasa ƙarfi sai suka zama masu ƙarfi, suka yi jaruntaka a wajen yaƙi, suka fatattaka rundunar waɗansu ƙasashe." 
Hebrews11:35 Aka mayar wa mata da matattunsa da aka tasar. Waɗansu mutane kuma an azabta su har suka mutu, amma sun ƙi yarda da irin 'yancin da za a ba su, domin a tashe su su rayu da rayuwa mafi kyau." 
Hebrews11:36 Har wa yau kuma, waɗansu suka sha ba'a da bulala, har ma da ɗauri da jefawa a cikin kurkuku." 
Hebrews11:37 Aka jejeffe su da duwatsu, an gwada su, aka raba su biyu da zarto, aka sare su da takobi. Sun yi yawo saye da buzun tumaki da na awaki, suka yi zaman rashi, da ƙunci, da wulakanci." 
Hebrews11:38 Su kam, duniya ba ta ma cancanci su zama a cikinta ba. Sun yi yawo a jazza da a kan duwatsu, suna kwana a cikin kogwanni da ramummuka." 
Hebrews11:39 Waɗannan duka, ko da yake Allah ya shaide su saboda bangaskiyarsu, duk da haka, ba su sami cikar alkawarin ba," 
Hebrews11:40 tun da Allah ya shirya mana wani abu mafi kyau, sai kuwa tare da mu ne za a kammala su." 
Hebrews12:1 Saboda haka, tun da taron shaidu masu ɗumbun yawa suka kewaye mu haka, sai mu ma mu yar da dukkan abin da ya nauyaya mana, da kuma zunubin da ya ɗafe mana, mu kuma yi tseren nan da yake gabanmu tare da jimiri," 
Hebrews12:2 muna zuba ido ga Yesu, shi da yake shugaban bangaskiyarmu, da kuma mai kammala ta, wanda domin farin cikin da aka sa a gabansa ya daure wa gicciye, bai mai da shi wani abin kunya ba, a yanzu kuma a zaune yake a dama ga kursiyin Allah." 
Hebrews12:3 Ku fa, dubi wannan da ya jure irin gābar nan da masu zunubi suka sha yi da shi, don kada ku gaji, ko kuwa ku karai." 
Hebrews12:4 Famarku da zunubi ba ta kai har yadda za a kashe ku ba. 
Hebrews12:5 Kun kuma mance da gargaɗin nan da Allah ya yi muku a kan ku 'ya'yansa ne, wato “Ya ɗana, kada ka raina horon Ubangiji, Kada kuma ka karai, in ya kwaɓe ka." 
Hebrews12:6 Domin Ubangiji, wanda yake ƙauna, shi yake horo, Yakan kuma hori duk ɗan da ya karɓa.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Shan wuyar da kuke jurewa, ai, duk don horo ne. Allah ya riƙe ku, ku 'ya'yansa ne. To, wane ɗa ne mahaifinsa ba ya horonsa?" 
Hebrews12:8 In kuwa ba ku da horo irin horon da ake yi wa kowa, to, ashe, kun zama shegu ke nan, ba 'yan halal ba." 
Hebrews12:9 Har wa yau kuma, ai, muna da ubanninmu na jiki da suke hore mu, mun kuwa yi musu ladabi. Ashe, ba za mu fi yi wa Uban ruhohinmu biyayya ƙwarai ba, mu rayu?" 
Hebrews12:10 Su kam, sun hore mu a ɗan lokaci kaɗan don ganin damarsu, amma shi, don amfanin kanmu ne yake horonmu, domin mu zama abokan tarayya a cikin tsarkinsa." 
Hebrews12:11 Ai, kowane irin horo, a lokacin shansa, abu ne mai baƙin ciki, ba na farin ciki ba. Amma daga baya waɗanda suka horu ta haka sukan sami kwanciyar rai wadda aikin adalci yake bayarwa." 
Hebrews12:12 Domin wannan, ku miƙe hannuwanku da suke reto, da gwiwoyinku marasa ƙarfi." 
Hebrews12:13 Ku bi miƙaƙƙun hanyoyi ɗoɗar, don kada mai ɗingishi ya gulle, a maimakon ya warke." 
Hebrews12:14 Ku himmantu ga zaman lafiya da kowa, ku kuma zama a tsarkake, in banda shi kuwa, ba wanda zai ga Ubangiji." 
Hebrews12:15 Ku kula fa, kada kowa yă kāsa samun alherin Allah, kada kuma wani tushen ɗacin rai ya tabbata, ya haddasa ɓarna, har ya ɓata mutane masu yawa ta haka," 
Hebrews12:16 kada kuma wani yă zama fasiki, ko mai sāɓon Allah, kamar isuwa, wanda ya sayar da hakkinsa na ɗan fari a kan cimaka a ɗaya tak." 
Hebrews12:17 Kun dai sani daga baya, da ya so yă gāji albarkar nan, sai aka ƙi shi, domin bai sami hanyar tuba ba, ko da yake ya yi ta nemanta har da hawaye." 
Hebrews12:18 Ai, ba ga abin da za a taɓa ne, kuka iso ba, ko wuta mai ruruwa, ko baƙin duhu duhu ƙirin, ko hadiri," 
Hebrews12:19 ko ƙarar ƙaho, ko wata murya, wadda har masu jin maganarta suka yi roƙo kada su ƙara ji," 
Hebrews12:20 don ba su iya jure umarnin da aka yi musu ba cewa, “Ko da dabba ce ta taɓa dutsen, sai a kashe ta da jifa.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Amma ganin wannan abu da matuƙar bantsoro yake! Har ma Musa ya ce, “Ina rawar jiki don matuƙar tsoro.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Amma ku kun iso Ɗutsen Sihiyona ne, da birnin Allah Rayayye, Urushalima ta Sama, wurin dubban mala'iku." 
Hebrews12:23 Kun iso taron farin ciki na kirayayyun 'ya'yan fari na Allah, waɗanda sunayensu suke a rubuce a Sama. Kun iso wurin Allah, wanda yake shi ne mai yi wa kowa shari'a, da kuma wurin ruhohin mutane masu adalci, waɗanda aka kammala." 
Hebrews12:24 Kun iso wurin Yesu, matsakancin sabon alkawari, da kuma wurin jinin nan na tsarkakewa, wanda yake yin mafificiyar magana fiye da na Habila." 
Hebrews12:25 Ku kula fa, kada ku ƙi mai maganar nan. Domin in waɗanda suka ƙi jin mai yi musu gargaɗi a duniya ba su tsira ba, to, ƙaƙa mu za mu tsira, in mun ƙi jin wannan da yake yi mana gargaɗi ma daga Sama?" 
Hebrews12:26 A lokacin nan muryarsa ta girgiza duniya, amma a yanzu ya yi alkawari cewa, “Har wa yau dai sau ɗaya tak, ba duniya kaɗai zan girgiza ba, amma har sama ma.”" 
Hebrews12:27 To, wannan cewa, “Har wa yau dai sau ɗaya tak,” ya nuna kawar da abubuwan da aka girgiza, wato abubuwan da aka halitta, don abubuwan da ba sa girgizuwa su wanzu." 
Hebrews12:28 Saboda haka, sai mu yi godiya domin mun sami mulkin da ba ya girgizuwa, ta haka kuma mu yi wa Allah sujada abar karɓa, tare da tsoro da tsananin girmamawa," 
Hebrews12:29 domin Allahnmu wuta ne mai cinyewa. 
Hebrews13:1 Sai ku nace da ƙaunar 'yan'uwa. 
Hebrews13:2 Kada ku daina yi wa baƙi alheri, gama ta haka ne waɗansu suka sauki mala'iku ba da sani ba." 
Hebrews13:3 Ku riƙa tunawa da waɗanda suke kurkuku, kamar tare kuke a ɗaure, da kuma waɗanda ake gwada wa wuya, kamar ku ake yi wa." 
Hebrews13:4 Kowa yă girmama aure, Gădon aure kuwa yă zauna marar dauɗa, don fasikai da mazinata Allah zai hukunta su," 
Hebrews13:5 Kada halinku ya zama na son kuɗi. Ku dangana da abin da kuke da shi, gama Allah kansa ya ce, “Har abada ba zan bar ka ba. Har abada kuma ba zan yashe ka ba.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Saboda haka, ma iya fitowa gabagaɗi, mu ce, “Ubangiji shi ne mataimakina, Ba zan ji tsoro ba. Me mutum zai iya yi mini?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Ku tuna da shugabanninku na dā, waɗanda suka faɗa muku Maganar Allah. Ku dubi ƙarshensu, ku kuma yi koyi da bangaskiyarsu." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Almasihu ba ya sākewa, shi ne a jiya, da yau, hakika har abada ma." 
Hebrews13:9 Kada baƙuwar koyarwa iri iri ta bauɗar da ku, ai, abu ne mai kyau alherin Allah ya zamana shi yake ƙarfafa zuciya, ba abinci iri iri ba, waɗanda ba su amfani ga masu dogara da su." 
Hebrews13:10 Muna da bagadin hadaya, wanda masu ibada a alfarwar nan ba su da izini su ci abincin wurin," 
Hebrews13:11 domin naman dabbobin da babban firist yake ɗiban jininsu yă kai Wuri Mafi Tsarki domin kawar da zunubai, akan ƙone shi ne a bayan zango." 
Hebrews13:12 Haka ma, Yesu ya sha wuya a waje bayan birni, domin yă tsarkake jama'a da nasa jini." 
Hebrews13:13 Saboda haka, sai mu fita mu je a gare shi a bayan zango, muna shan irin wulakancin da aka yi masa." 
Hebrews13:14 Domin ba mu da wani dawwamammen birni a nan, birnin nan mai zuwa muke nema." 
Hebrews13:15 To, a koyaushe, sai mu yi ta yabon Allah ta wurinsa, sadakar da muke miƙawa ke nan, wato mu yabe shi, muna ta ɗaukaka sunansa." 
Hebrews13:16 Kada kuwa ku daina yin alheri da gudunmawa, domin irin waɗannan su ne suke faranta wa Allah rai." 
Hebrews13:17 Ku yi wa shugabanninku biyayya, ku bi umarnansu, don su ne masu kula da rayukanku, su ne kuma za su yi lissafin aikinsu, don su yi haka da farin ciki, ba da baƙin ciki ba, don in sun yi da baƙin ciki ba zai amfane ku ba." 
Hebrews13:18 Ku yi mana addu'a, gama mun tabbata muna da lamiri mai kyau, muna kuwa so mu tafiyar da al'amuranmu da halin kirki ne." 
Hebrews13:19 Musamman nake tsananta roƙonku ku yi haka, don a hanzarta a komo da ni a gare ku." 
Hebrews13:20 Allah mai zartar da salama, wanda ya ta da Ubangijinmu Yesu, Makiyayin tumaki mai girma, daga matattu, albarkacin jinin nan na tabbatar madawwamin alkawari," 
Hebrews13:21 yă kamala ku da kowane irin kyakkyawan abu, domin ku aikata nufinsa, yă kuma aikata a cikinmu abin da yake faranta masa rai ta wurin Yesu Almasihu. Ɗaukaka tā tabbata a gare shi har abada abadin. Amin, Amin." 
Hebrews13:22 To, ina roƙonku, 'yan'uwa, ku yi haƙuri da gargaɗina, don taƙaice na rubuto muku." 
Hebrews13:23 Ku sani, an sāki ɗanuwanmu Timoti, da shi ma za mu gan ku, in ya zo da wuri." 
Hebrews13:24 Ku gai da dukan shugabanninku, da kuma dukan tsarkaka. Waɗanda suke daga ƙasar Italiya suna gaishe ku." 
Hebrews13:25 Alharin Ubangiji yă tabbata a gare ku, ku duka. Amin." 
James1:1 Daga Yakubu, bawan Allah, da kuma na Ubangiji Yesu Almasihu, zuwa ga kabilan nan goma sha biyu da suke a warwatse a duniya. Gaisuwa mai yawa." 
James1:2 Ya ku 'yan'uwana, duk sa'ad da gwaje-gwaje iri iri suka same ku, ku mai da su abin farin ciki ƙwarai." 
James1:3 Domin kun san jarrabawar bangaskiyarku takan haifi jimiri. 
James1:4 Sai kuma jimiri ya yi cikakken aikinsa, domin ku zama kamilai cikakku kuma, ba ku gaza da kome ba." 
James1:5 In waninku ya rasa hikima, sai ya roƙi Allah, mai ba kowa hannu sake, ba tare da gori ba, sai kuwa a ba shi." 
James1:6 Amma fa sai ya roƙa da bangaskiya, ba tare da shakka ba. Don mai shakka kamar raƙuman ruwan teku yake, waɗanda iska take korawa tana tuttunkuɗawa." 
James1:7 Kada irin mutumin nan mai zuciya biyu, wanda bai tsai da zuciyarsa a gu ɗaya a dukan al'amuransa ba, ya sa rai da wani abu a gun Ubangiji." 
James1:8  
James1:9 Ƙasƙantaccen ɗan'uwa yă yi taƙama da ɗaukakarsa. 
James1:10 Mai arziki kuma yă yi alfarma da ƙasƙancinsa, gama zai shuɗe kamar hudar ciyawa." 
James1:11 In rana ta tāke da ƙunarta, sai ciyawa ta bushe, hudarta ta kaɗe, kyanta kuma ya gushe. Haka ma mai arziki zai gushe yana a cikin tsakiyar harkarsa." 
James1:12 Albarka tā tabbata ga mai jimirin gwaji, domin in ya jure gwajin, sai ya sami kambin rai, wanda Ubangiji ya yi wa masu ƙaunarsa alkawari." 
James1:13 Duk wanda ake jarabta, kada ya ce Allah ne yake jarabtarsa, gama ba shi yiwuwa a jarabci Allah da mugunta, shi kansa kuwa ba ya jarabtar kowa." 
James1:14 Amma kowane mutum yakan jarabtu in mugun burinsa ya ruɗe shi, ya kuma yaudare shi." 
James1:15 Mugun buri kuma in ya yi ciki, yakan haifi zunubi. Zunubi kuma in ya balaga, yakan jawo mutuwa." 
James1:16 Kada fa a yaudare ku, ya 'yan'uwana ƙaunatattu." 
James1:17 Kowace kyakkyawar baiwa, da kowace cikakkiyar kyauta, daga Sama suke, sun sauko ne daga wurin Uban haskoki, wanda ba sauyawa ko wata alamar sākewa a gare shi faufau." 
James1:18 Bisa ga nufinsa ya kawo mu ta maganar gaskiya, domin mu zama kamar nunan fari na halittarsa." 
James1:19 Ya 'yan'uwana ƙaunatattu, ku san wannan, wato, kowa yă yi hanzarin kasa kunne, da jinkirin yin magana, da kuma jinkirin yin fushi," 
James1:20 don fushin mutum ba ya aikata adalci. 
James1:21 Saboda haka, sai ku yar da kowane irin aikin ƙazanta da ƙeta iri iri, maganar nan da aka dasa a zuciyarku, ku yi na'am da ita a cikin halin tawali'u, domin ita ce mai ikon ceton rayukanku." 
James1:22 Amma ku zama masu aikata maganar, ba masu ji kawai, kuna yaudarar kanku ba." 
James1:23 Don duk wanda yake mai jin maganar ne kawai, ba mai aikatawa ba, kamar mutum yake mai duba fuskarsa a madubi," 
James1:24 don yakan dubi fuskarsa ne kawai ya tafi, nan da nan kuwa sai ya mance kamanninsa." 
James1:25 Amma duk mai duba cikakkiyar ka'idar nan ta 'yanci, ya kuma nace a kanta, ya zama ba mai ji ne kawai ya mance ba, sai dai mai aikatawa ne ya zartar, to wannan shi za a yi wa albarka a cikin abin da yake aikatawa." 
James1:26 In wani yana zaton shi mai addini ne, amma bai kame bakinsa ba, sai dai ya yaudari kansa, to, addinin mutumin nan na banza ne." 
James1:27 Addini sahihi kuma marar aibu a gaban Allah Ubanmu, shi ne a kula da gwauraye mata, da marayu a cikin ƙuntatarsu, a kuma a keɓe kai marar aibi daga duniya." 
James2:1 Ya ku 'yan'uwana, kada ku nuna bambanci muddin kuna riƙe da bangaskiyarku ga Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, Ubangiji Maɗaukaki." 
James2:2 Misali, in mutum mai zobban zinariya da tufafi masu ƙawa ya halarci taronku, wani matalauci kuma ya shigo a saye da tsummoki," 
James2:3 sa'an nan kuka kula da mai tufafi masu ƙawar nan, har kuka ce masa, “Ga mazauni mai kyau a nan,” matalaucin nan kuwa kuka ce masa, “Tsaya daga can,” ko kuwa, “Zauna a nan ƙasa a gabana,”" 
James2:4 ashe, ba ku nuna bambanci a tsakaninku ba ke nan, kuna zartar da hukunci da mugayen tunani?" 
James2:5 Ku saurara, ya 'yan'uwana ƙaunatattu. Ashe, Allah bai zaɓi matalautan duniyar nan su wadata da bangaskiya, har su sami gado a cikin mulkin nan da ya yi wa masu ƙaunarsa alkawari ba?" 
James2:6 Amma, kun wulakanta matalauta! Ashe, ba masu arzikin ne suke matsa muku ba? Ba su ne kuwa suke janku zuwa gaban shari'a ba?" 
James2:7 Ba kuma su ne kuke saɓon sunan nan mai girma da ake kiranku da shi ba? 
James2:8 Idan lalle kun cika muhimmin umarni yadda Nassi ya ce, “Ka ƙaunaci maƙwabcinka kamar kanka,” to, madalla." 
James2:9 Amma in kun nuna bambanci, kun yi zunubi ke nan, Shari'a kuma ta same ku da laifin keta umarni." 
James2:10 Duk wanda yake kiyaye dukkan Shari'a, amma ya saɓa a kan abu guda, ya saɓi Shari'a gaba ɗaya ke nan." 
James2:11 Domin shi wannan da ya ce, “Kada ka yi zina,” shi ne kuma ya ce, “Kada ka yi kisankai.” To, in ba ka yi zina ba amma ka yi kisankai, ai, ka zama mai keta Shari'a ke nan." 
James2:12 Saboda haka, maganarku da aikinku su kasance irin na mutanen da za a yi wa shari'a bisa ga ka'idar 'yanci." 
James2:13 Gama Shari'a marar jinƙai ce ga wanda ba ya nuna jinƙai. Amma jinƙai yana rinjayar hukunci. 
James2:14 Ya ku 'yan'uwana, ina amfani mutum ya ce yana da bangaskiya, alhali kuwa ba ya aikin da zai nuna ta? Anya, bangaskiyar nan tāsa ta iya cetonsa?" 
James2:15 Misali, in wani ɗan'uwa ko 'yar'uwa suna zaman huntanci, kullum kuma abinci bai wadace su ba," 
James2:16 waninku kuma ya ce musu, “To, ku sauka lafiya, Allah ya ba ci, da sha, da tufatarwa” ba tare da kun biya musu bukata ba, ina amfanin haka?" 
James2:17 Haka ma, bangaskiya ita kaɗai, ba tare da aikin da ya nuna ta ba, banza ce." 
James2:18 To, amma wani zai ce, “Ai, kai kana da bangaskiya, ni kuwa sai aikatawa.” To, nuna mini bangaskiya, taka ba tare da aikatawa ba, ni kuma in nuna maka aikatawata, tabbatar bangaskiyata." 
James2:19 Ka gaskata Allah ɗaya ne? To, madalla. Ai, ko aljannu ma sun gaskata, amma suna rawar jiki don tsoro." 
James2:20 Kai marar azanci! Wato sai an nuna maka, bangaskiya ba tare da aikatawa ba, wofiya ce?" 
James2:21 Sa'ad da kakanmu Ibrahim ya miƙa ɗansa Ishaku a bagadin hadaya, ashe, ba ta wurin aikatawa ne ya barata ba?" 
James2:22 Ka gani, ashe, bangaskiyarsa da aikatawarsa duka yi aiki tare, har ta wurin aikatawar nan bangaskiyarsa ta kammala." 
James2:23 Aka kuma cika Nassin nan da ya ce, “Ibrahim ya gaskata Allah, bangaskiyar nan tasa kuma aka lasafta ta adalci ce a gare shi,” aka kuma kira shi aminin Allah." 
James2:24 Kun ga, ashe, Allah yana kuɓutar da mutum saboda aikatawarsa ne, ba saboda bangaskiya ita kaɗai ba." 
James2:25 Ashe, ba haka kuma Rahab karuwar nan ta sami kuɓuta saboda aikatawarta ba? Wato, sa'ad da ta sauki jakadun nan, ta fitar da su ta wata hanya dabam?" 
James2:26 To, kamar yadda jiki ba numfashi matacce ne, haka ma bangaskiya ba aikatawa matacciya ce." 
James3:1 Ya ku 'yan'uwana, kada yawancinku su zama masu koyarwa, domin kun sani, mu da muke koyarwa za a yi mana shari'a da ƙididdiga mafi tsanani." 
James3:2 Domin dukanmu muna yin kuskure da yawa. In kuwa mutum ba ya shirme a maganarsa, to, shi cikakken mutum ne, yana kuwa iya kame duk sauran gaɓoɓinsa ma." 
James3:3 Ga misali, idan mun sa linzami a bakin doki, don mu bi da shi, mukan sarrafa dukan jikinsa ma." 
James3:4 Ku dubi jiragen ruwa kuma, ko da yake suna da girma haka ƙaƙƙarfar iska kuma tana kora su, duk da haka, da ɗan ƙaramin ƙarfe ne matuƙi yake juya su duk inda ya nufa." 
James3:5 Haka ma harshe yake, ga shi, ɗan ƙaramin abu ne, sai manyan fariya! Ku dubi yadda ɗan ƙaramin ƙyastu yake kunna wa babban jeji wuta!" 
James3:6 Harshe ma wuta ne fa! A cikin duk gaɓoɓinmu, harshe shi ne tushen kowace irin mugunta, mai ɓata dukan jiki, mai zuga zuciyar mutum ta tafasa, shi kuwa Gidan Wuta ne yake zuga shi." 
James3:7 Don kuwa ana iya sarrafa kowace irin dabba, da tsuntsu, da masu jan ciki, da halittar ruwa, ɗan adam har yā sarrafa su ma," 
James3:8 amma ba ɗan adam ɗin da zai iya sarrafa harshe, ai, mugunta ne da ba ta hanuwa, a cike yake da dafi mai kashewa." 
James3:9 Da shi muke yabon Ubangiji Uba, da shi kuma muke zagin mutane waɗanda aka halitta da kamannin Allah." 
James3:10 Da baki ɗaya ake yabo, ake kuma zagi. 'Yan'uwana, ai, wannan bai kamata ba!" 
James3:11 Ashe, marmaro ɗaya ya iya ɓuɓɓugowa da ruwan daɗi da na zartsi ta ido guda?" 
James3:12 Ya 'yan'uwana, ashe, ɓaure yana iya haifar zaitun? Ko kuwa inabi ya haifi ɓaure? Haka kuma, ba dama a sami ruwan daɗi a idon ruwan zartsi." 
James3:13 Ina mai hikima da fahimi a cikinku? To, ta kyakkyawan zamansa sai ya nuna aikinsa da halin tawali'u da hikima suke sawa." 
James3:14 Amma in kuna da matsanancin kishi da sonkai a zuciyarku, kada ku yi alwashi da haka, kuna saɓa wa gaskiya." 
James3:15 Wannan hikima ba irin wadda take saukowa daga Sama ba ce, ta duniya ce, ta son zuciya, ta Shaiɗan kuma." 
James3:16 A duk inda kishi da sonkai suke, a nan hargitsi da kowane irin mugun aiki ma suke." 
James3:17 Amma hikimar nan ta Sama, da farko dai tsattsarka ce, mai lumana ce, saliha ce, mai sauƙin kai, mai tsananin jinƙai, mai yawan alheri, mai kaifi ɗaya, sahihiya kuma." 
James3:18 Daga irin salama wanda masu sulhuntawa suke shukawa akan girbe adalci. 
James4:1 Me yake haddasa gāba da husuma a tsakaninku? Ashe, ba sha'awace-sha'awacenku ne suke yaƙi da juna a zukatanku ba?" 
James4:2 Kukan yi marmarin abu ku rasa, sai ku yi kisankai. Kukan yi kwaɗayi, ku kasa samu, sai ku yi husuma da faɗa. Kukan rasa don ba kwa addu'a ne." 
James4:3 Kukan yi addu'a ku rasa, don kun yi ta da mugun nufi ne, don ku ɓatar a kan nishaɗinku." 
James4:4 Maciya amana! Ashe, ba ku sani abuta da duniya gāba ce da Allah ba? Saboda haka, duk mai son abuta da duniya, yā mai da kansa mai gāba da Allah ke nan." 
James4:5 Ko kuna tsammani a banza ne Nassi ya ce, “Wannan ruhu da Allah ya sa a cikinmu yana tsaronmu ƙwarai”?" 
James4:6 Allah shi yake yin mayalwacin alheri. Domin haka Nassi ya ce, “Allah yana gāba da masu girmankai, amma yana yi wa masu tawali'u alheri.”" 
James4:7 Saboda haka, ku miƙa kanku ga Allah, ku yi tsayayya da Iblis, lalle kuwa zai guje muku." 
James4:8 Ku kusaci Allah, shi ma zai kusace ku. Ku tsarkake al'amuranku, ya ku masu zunubi. Ku kuma tsarkake zukattanku, ya ku masu zuciya biyu." 
James4:9 Ku yi nadama, ku yi baƙin ciki, ku yi ta kuka. Dariyarku tă zama baƙin ciki, murnarku tă koma ɓacin zuciya." 
James4:10 Ku ƙasƙantar da kanku ga Ubangiji, shi kuwa zai ɗaukaka ku." 
James4:11 Ya ku 'yan'uwana, kada ku kushe wa juna. Kowa ya kushe wa ɗan'uwansa, ko ya ɗora masa laifi, ya kushe wa shari'a ke nan, ya kuma ɗora mata laifi. In kuwa ka ɗora wa shari'a laifi, kai ba mai binta ba ne, mai ɗora mata laifi ne." 
James4:12 Mai ba da Shari'a ɗaya ne, shi ne kuma mai yinta, shi ne kuwa mai ikon ceto da hallakarwa. To, kai wane ne har da za ka ɗora wa ɗan'uwanka laifi?" 
James4:13 To, ina masu cewa, “Yau ko gobe za mu je gari kaza, mu shekara a can, mu yi ta ciniki, mu ci riba”?" 
James4:14 Alhali kuwa ba ku san abin da gobe za ta kawo ba. Wane iri ne ranku? Ai, kamar hazo yake, jim kaɗan sai ya ɓace." 
James4:15 Sai dai ya kamata ku ce, “In Ubangiji ya nufa, ya kai rai, ma yi kaza da kaza.”" 
James4:16 Amma ga shi, kuna fariya ta alfarmar banza da kuke yi. Duk irin wannan fariya kuwa muguwar aba ce." 
James4:17 Saboda haka, duk wanda ya san abin da ya kamata, ya kuwa kasa yi, ya yi zunubi ke nan." 
James5:1 To, ina masu arziki? Ku yi ta kuka da kururuwa saboda baƙin ciki iri iri da za su aukar muku." 
James5:2 Arzikinku mushe ne! Tufafinku kuma duk cin asu ne! 
James5:3 Zinariyarku da azurfarku sun ɓāci ƙwarai, ɓācin nan nasu kuwa zai zama shaida a kanku, yă ci naman jikinku kamar wuta! Kun dai jibge dukiya a zamanin ƙarshen nan!" 
James5:4 Ga shi kuwa, zaluncin da kuka yi na hakkin masu girbi a gonakinku yana ta ƙara, kukan masu girbin kuwa ya kai ga kunnen Ubangijin Runduna." 
James5:5 Kun yi zaman duniya da annashuwa da almubazzaranci, ashe, kiwata kanku kuka yi saboda ranar yanka!" 
James5:6 Kun hukunta mai adalci, kun kuma kashe shi, bai kuwa yi muku tsayayya ba." 
James5:7 Domin haka, sai ku yi haƙuri, 'yan'uwana, har ya zuwa ranar komowar Ubangiji. Ga shi, manomi yana sa rai ga samun amfanin gona mai albarka, yana kuwa haƙuri da samunsa, har a yi ruwan shuka da na kaka." 
James5:8 Ku ma sai ku yi haƙuri, ku tsai da zukatanku, domin ranar komowar Ubangiji ta yi kusa." 
James5:9 'Yan'uwa, kada ku yi wa juna gunaguni, don kada a hukunta ku. Ga mai shari'a a bakin ƙofa!" 
James5:10 A kan misalin shan wuya da haƙuri kuma, 'yan'uwa, ku dubi annabawa ma da suka yi magana da sunan Ubangiji." 
James5:11 Ga shi, mukan yaba wa waɗanda suka jure. Kun dai ji irin jimirin da Ayuba ya yi, kun kuma ga irin ƙarshen da Ubangiji ya yi masa, yadda Ubangiji yake mai yawan tausayi, mai jinƙai kuma." 
James5:12 Amma fiye da kome, 'yan'uwana, kada ku rantse sam, ko da sama, ko da ƙasa, ko da kowace irin rantsuwa ma. Sai dai in kun ce “I”, ya tsaya a kan “I” ɗin kawai, in kuwa kun ce “A'a”, ya tsaya a kan “A'a” ɗin kawai, don kada a hukunta ku." 
James5:13 In waninku yana shan wuya, to, sai ya yi addu'a, in kuma waninku yana murna, to, sai ya yi waƙar yabon Allah." 
James5:14 In waninku yana rashin lafiya, to, sai ya kira dattawan ikkilisiya su yi masa addu'a, suna shafa masa mai da sunan Ubangiji." 
James5:15 Addu'ar bangaskiya kuwa, za ta warkar da marar lafiya Ubangiji kuma zai tashe shi, in ma ya yi zunubi, za a gafarta masa." 
James5:16 Saboda haka, sai ku riƙa bayyana wa juna laifofinku, kuna yi wa juna addu'a, don a warkar da ku. Addu'ar mai adalci tana da ƙarfin aiki ƙwarai da gaske." 
James5:17 Iliya ɗan adam ne kamarmu, amma da ya nace da addu'a kada a yi ruwa, sai da aka shekara uku da wata shida ba a yi ruwa a ƙasar ba." 
James5:18 Da ya sāke yin addu'a kuwa, sai sama ta sako ruwa, ƙasa kuma ta ba da amfaninta." 
James5:19 Ya ku 'yan'uwana, in waninku ya bauɗe wa gaskiya, wani kuma ya komo da shi," 
James5:20 to, yă dai tabbata, kowa ya komo da mai zunubi a hanya daga bauɗewarsa, ya kuɓutar da ran mai zunubin nan ke nan daga mutuwa, ya kuma rufe ɗumbun zunubansa." 
1Peter1:1 Daga Bitrus, manzon Yesu Almasihu, zuwa ga zaɓaɓɓun Allah da suke bare, a warwatse a Fantas, da Galatiya, da Kafadokiya, da Asiya, da kuma Bitiniya," 
1Peter1:2 su da suke zaɓaɓɓu bisa ga rigyasanin Allah Uba, waɗanda Ruhu kuma ya tsarkake, domin su yi wa Yesu Almasihu biyayya, su kuma tsarkaka da jininsa. Alheri da salama su yawaita a gare ku." 
1Peter1:3 Godiya ta tabbata a gare shi, shi wanda yake Allah da Uba na Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, wanda ta wurin tsananin jinƙansa ya sāke haifuwarmu, domin mu yi rayayyen bege, ta wurin albarkacin tashin Yesu Almasihu daga matattu," 
1Peter1:4 mu kuma sami gādo marar lalacewa, marar ɓāci, marar ƙarewa kuma, wanda aka keɓe muku a Sama," 
1Peter1:5 wato, ku da ikon Allah yake kiyayewa ta wurin bangaskiyarku, domin samun ceton nan da aka shirya a bayyana a ƙarshen zamani." 
1Peter1:6 A kan wannan ne kuke da matuƙar farin ciki, ko da yake da ɗan lokaci kwa yi baƙin ciki ta dalilin gwaje-gwaje iri iri." 
1Peter1:7 Wannan kuwa domin a tabbatar da sahihancin bangaskiyarku ne (wadda ta fi zinariya daraja nesa, ita zinariya kuwa, ko da yake mai ƙarewa ce, akan jarraba ta da wuta), domin bangaskiyar nan taku tă jawo muku yabo da girma da ɗaukaka a bayyanar Yesu Almasihu." 
1Peter1:8 Ko da yake ba ku taɓa ganinsa ba, kuna ƙaunarsa. Ko da yake ba kwa ganinsa a yanzu, duk da haka kuna gaskatawa da shi, kuna farin ciki matuƙa, wanda ya fi gaban ambato," 
1Peter1:9 kuna samun ceton rayukanku, ta wurin sakamakon bangaskiyarku." 
1Peter1:10 Annabawan da suka yi annabci a kan alherin da zai zama naku, sun tsananta bin diddigi a kan wannan ceto," 
1Peter1:11 suna bincike ko wane ne, ko kuma wane lokaci ne, Ruhun Almasihu da yake a zuciyarsu yake ishara, sa'ad da ya yi faɗi a kan wuyar da Almasihu zai sha, da kuma ɗaukakar da take biye." 
1Peter1:12 An dai bayyana musu, cewa ba kansu suke bauta wa ba, ku suke bauta wa, a game da abubuwan da masu yi muku bishara, ta ikon Ruhu Mai Tsarki, wanda aka aiko daga sama suka samar da ku a yanzu. Su ne kuwa abubuwan da mala'iku suke ɗokin gani." 
1Peter1:13 Don haka, sai ku yi ɗamara, ku natsu, ku sa zuciyarku sosai a kan alherin da zai zo muku a bayyanan Yesu Almasihu." 
1Peter1:14 Ku yi zaman 'ya'ya masu biyayya. Kada ku biye wa muguwar sha'awarku ta dā, ta lokacin jahilcinku." 
1Peter1:15 Amma da yake wanda ya kira ku mai tsarki ne, ku ma kanku sai ku zama tsarkaka a cikin dukan al'amuranku." 
1Peter1:16 Domin a rubuce yake cewa, “Sai ku zama tsarkaka domin ni mai tsarki ne.”" 
1Peter1:17 Da yake kuna kiransa Uba a wajen addu'a, shi da yake yi wa kowa shari'a gwargwadon aikinsa, ba zaɓe, sai ku ƙarasa lokacin baƙuncinku, kuna tsoronsa." 
1Peter1:18 Domin kun sani an fanshe ku ne daga al'adunku na banza da wofi da kuka gāda, ba da abubuwa masu lalacewa kamar azurfa da zinariya ba," 
1Peter1:19 sai dai da jinin nan mai daraja na Almasihu, kamar na ɗan rago marar naƙasa, marar tabo." 
1Peter1:20 An rigyasaninsa a kan haka, tun ba a halicci duniya ba, amma saboda ku ne aka bayyana shi a zamanin ƙarshe." 
1Peter1:21 To gare shi ne kuka gaskata da Allah, wanda ya ta da shi daga matattu, ya kuma ɗaukaka shi, domin bangaskiyarku da begenku su kasance ga Allah." 
1Peter1:22 Da yake kun tsarkake ranku kuna yi wa gaskiya biyayya har kuna nuna sahihiyar ƙauna ga 'yan'uwa, sai ku himmantu ga ƙaunar juna da zuciya ɗaya." 
1Peter1:23 Gama sāke haifuwarku aka yi, ba ta iri mai lalacewa ba, sai dai marar lalacewa, wato, ta Maganar Allah rayayyiya dawwamammiya." 
1Peter1:24 Domin “Duk ɗan adam kamar ciyawa yake, Duk darajarsa kamar furen ciyawa take, Ciyawar takan bushe, furen yakan kaɗe," 
1Peter1:25 Maganar Ubangiji kuwa dawwamammiya ce,” Ita ce maganar bishara da aka yi muku." 
1Peter2:1 Saboda haka, sai ku yar da kowace irin ƙeta, da ha'inci, da munafunci, da hassada, da kuma kowane irin kushe." 
1Peter2:2 Kamar jariri sabon haihuwa, ku yi marmarin shan madara marar gami mai ruhu, domin ku girma da shi, har ya kai ku ga samun ceto," 
1Peter2:3 in dai kun ɗanɗana alherin Ubangiji. 
1Peter2:4 Ku zo a gare shi, rayayyen dutsen nan, hakika abin ƙi ne a gun mutane, amma zaɓaɓɓe, ɗaukakakke a gun Allah." 
1Peter2:5 Ku kuma, kamar rayayyun duwatsu, bari a gina gida mai ruhu da ku, domin ku zama tsattsarkar ƙungiyar firistoci, da nufin ku miƙa hadayu na ruhu, abin karɓa ga Allah, ta wurin Yesu Almasihu," 
1Peter2:6 Domin a tabbace yake a Nassi cewa, “Ga shi, na sa mafificin dutsen a gini a Sihiyona, zaɓaɓɓe, ɗaukakakke, Duk mai gaskatawa da shi kuwa, ba zai kunyata ba.”" 
1Peter2:7 A gare ku, ku da kuka ba da gaskiya kuwa, shi ɗaukakakke ne. Amma ga waɗanda suka ƙi gaskatawa, to, “Dutsen da magina suka ƙi, Shi ne ya zama mafificin dutsen gini,”" 
1Peter2:8 Da kuma, “Dutsen sa tuntuɓe, Da fā na sa faɗuwa.” Sun yi tuntuɓe ne da maganar, don sun ƙi biyayya da ita. Haka kuwa aka ƙaddaro musu." 
1Peter2:9 Amma ku kabila ce zaɓaɓɓiya, ƙungiyar firistocin babban Sarki, tsattsarkar al'umma, jama'ar mallakar Allah, domin ku sanar da mafifitan al'amuran wannan da ya kirawo ku daga cikin duhu, kuka shiga maɗaukakin haskensa." 
1Peter2:10 Dā ba jama'a ɗaya kuke ba, amma a yanzu, ku jama'ar Allah ce. Dā ba ku sadu da jinƙansa ba, amma a yanzu kun sadu da shi." 
1Peter2:11 Ya ƙaunatattuna, ina roƙonku don ku baƙi ne, bare kuma, ku guje wa mugayen sha'awace-sha'awace na halin mutuntaka waɗanda suke yaƙi da zuciyarku." 
1Peter2:12 Ku yi halin yabo a cikin al'ummai, don duk sa'ad da suke kushenku, cewa ku mugaye ne, sai su ga kyawawan ayyukanku, har su ɗaukaka Allah a ran da alheri ya sauko musu." 
1Peter2:13 Ku yi biyayya ga kowace hukumar mutane saboda Ubangiji, ko ga sarki, domin shi ne shugaba," 
1Peter2:14 ko kuwa ga mahukunta, domin su ne ya a'aika su hori mugaye, su kuma yabi masu kirki." 
1Peter2:15 Domin nufin Allah ne ku toshe jahilcin marasa azanci ta yin aiki nagari. 
1Peter2:16 Ku yi zaman 'yanci, sai dai kada ku fake a bayan 'yancin nan naku, ku yi mugunta. Amma ku yi zaman bayin Allah." 
1Peter2:17 Ku girmama kowa, ku ƙaunaci 'yan'uwa, ku ji tsoron Allah, ku girmama sarki." 
1Peter2:18 Ku barori, ku bi iyayen gidanku da matuƙar ladabi, ba sai na kirki da masu sanyin hali kaɗai ba, har ma da miskilai." 
1Peter2:19 Ai, abin karɓa ne, in saboda mutum yana sane da nufin Allah, ya jure wa wuyar da yake sha, ba da alhakinsa ba." 
1Peter2:20 To, ina abin taƙama don kun yi haƙuri in kun sha dūka a kan laifin da kuka yi? Amma, in kun yi aiki nagari kuka sha wuya a kansa, kuka kuma haƙura, to shi ne abin karɓa ga Allah." 
1Peter2:21 Domin a kan haka ne musamman aka kira ku. Gama Almasihu ma ya sha wuya dominku, ya bar muku gurbi ku bi hanyarsa." 
1Peter2:22 Bai taɓa yin laifi ba faufau, ba a kuwa taɓa jin yaudara a bakinsa ba." 
1Peter2:23 Da aka zage shi bai rama ba, da ya sha wuya kuma bai yi kashedi ba, sai dai ya dogara ga mai shari'ar adalci." 
1Peter2:24 Shi kansa ya ɗauke zunubanmu a jikinsa a kan gungume, domin mu yi zamanmu matattu ga zunubi, rayayyu kuma ga adalci. Da raunukansa ne aka warkar da ku." 
1Peter2:25 A dā kun ɓăce kamar tumaki, amma a yanzu kun dawo ga Makiyayi, wato mai kula da rayukanku." 
1Peter3:1 Haka kuma, ku matan aure, ku yi biyayya ga mazanku, don ko waɗansunsu ba su bi maganar Allah ba, halin matansu yă shawo kansu, ba tare da wata magana ba," 
1Peter3:2 don ganin tsarkakakken halinku da kuma ladabinku. 
1Peter3:3 Kada adonku ya zama na kwalliyar kitso, da kayan zinariya, ko tufafi masu ƙawa," 
1Peter3:4 sai dai ya zama na hali, da kuma kyan nan marar dushewa na tawali'u da natsuwa. Wannan kuwa abu ne mai martaba ƙwarai a gun Allah." 
1Peter3:5 Don dā ma haka tsarkakan mata masu dogara ga Allah suka yi ado, suka bi mazansu," 
1Peter3:6 kamar yadda Saratu ta bi Ibrahim, tana kiransa ubangijinta. Ku kuma 'ya'yanta ne muddin kuna aiki nagari, ba kwa yarda wani abu ya tsorata ku." 
1Peter3:7 Haka kuma, ku maza, ku yi zaman ɗa'a da matanku, kuna girmama su, da yake su ne raunana, gama ku abokan tarayya ne na Allah. Ku yi haka don kada wani abu ya hana ku yin addu'a tare." 
1Peter3:8 Daga ƙarshe kuma dukanku ku haɗa hankulanku, ku zama masu juyayi, masu ƙaunar 'yan'uwa, masu tausayi, da kuma masu tawali'u." 
1Peter3:9 Kada ku rama mugunta da mugunta, ko zagi da zagi, a maimakon haka, sai ku sa albarka. Domin a kan haka ne musamman aka kira ku, ku kuma gaji albarka." 
1Peter3:10 Domin, “Duk mai so ya more wa zamansa na duniya da alheri, Sai ya kame bakinsa daga ɓarna, Ya kuma hana shi maganar yaudara." 
1Peter3:11 Ya rabu da mugunta, ya kama nagarta, Ya himmantu ga zaman lafiya, ya kuma dimance ta." 
1Peter3:12 Gama Ubangiji yana lura da masu aikata adalci, Yana kuma sauraron roƙonsu. Amma Ubangiji yana gāba da masu aikata mugunta.”" 
1Peter3:13 To, wa zai cuce ku in kun himmantu a kan abin da yake nagari?" 
1Peter3:14 Amma ko da za ku sha wuya saboda aikata abin da yake daidai, ku masu albarka ne. Kada ku ji tsoronsu, kada kuma ku damu." 
1Peter3:15 Sai dai ku girmama Almasihu a zukatanku da hakikancewa, shi Ubangiji ne. Kullum ku zauna a shirye ku ba da amsa ga duk wanda ya tambaye ku dalilin begen nan naku, amma fa da tawali'u da bangirma." 
1Peter3:16 Ku kuma kasance da lamiri mai kyau, don in an zage ku, waɗanda suka kushe kyakkyawan halinku na bin Almasihu su kunyata." 
1Peter3:17 Zai fi kyau a sha wuya ga yin abin da yake nagari, in haka nufin Allah ne, da a sha don yin abin da ba daidai ba." 
1Peter3:18 Domin Almasihu ma ya mutu sau ɗaya tak ba ƙari, domin kawar da zunubanmu, mai adalci saboda marasa adalci, domin ya kai mu ga Allah. An kashe shi a jiki, amma an rayar da shi a ruhu." 
1Peter3:19 Da ruhun ne kuma ya je ya yi wa ruhohin da suke a kurkuku shela," 
1Peter3:20 wato, waɗanda dā ba su bi ba, sa'ad da Allah ya yi jira da haƙuri a zamanin Nuhu, a lokacin sassaƙar jirgin nan, wanda a cikinsa mutane kaɗan, wato takwas suka kuɓuta ta ruwa." 
1Peter3:21 Baftisma kuwa, wadda ita ce kwatancin wannan, ta cece ku a yanzu, ba ta fitar da dauɗa daga jiki ba, sai dai ta wurin roƙon Allah da lamiri mai kyau, ta wurin tashin Yesu Almasihu daga matattu," 
1Peter3:22 wanda ya tafi Sama, yake dama ga Allah kuma, mala'iku da manyan mala'iku da masu iko suna binsa." 
1Peter4:1 Tun da yake Almasihu ya sha wuya a jiki dominmu, sai ku ma ku ɗauki irin wannan ra'ayi. Ai, duk wanda ya sha wuya a jiki, ya daina aikata zunubi ke nan," 
1Peter4:2 domin a nan gaba yă ƙarasa sauran zamansa na jiki ba tare da biye wa muguwar sha'awar zuciya ba, sai dai nufin Allah." 
1Peter4:3 Lalle zaman da kuka yi na dā, irin wanda al'ummai suke son yi, ya isa haka nan, wato zaman fajirci, da mugayen sha'awace-sha'awace, da buguwa, da shashanci, da shaye-shaye, da kuma bautar gumaka, abar ƙyama." 
1Peter4:4 Suna mamaki da ba kwa haɗa kai da su a yanzu, kuna zarmewa, kuna aikata masha'a irin tasu, har suna zaginku." 
1Peter4:5 Amma lalle su ba da hujjojinsu ga wannan da yake a shirye ya yi wa rayayyu da matattu shari'a. 
1Peter4:6 Shi ya sa aka yi bishara har ga matattu ma, waɗanda ko da yake an yi musu hukunci a cikin jiki kamar mutane, su samu su rayu a ruhu kamar Allah." 
1Peter4:7 Ƙarshen dukan abubuwa ya gabato. Saboda haka, sai ku kanku, ku natsu, domin ku yi addu'a." 
1Peter4:8 Fiye da kome kuma, ku himmantu ga ƙaunar juna, domin ƙauna takan yafe laifofi masu ɗumbun yawa." 
1Peter4:9 Ku riƙa yi wa juna baƙunta, ba tare da ƙunƙuni ba." 
1Peter4:10 Duk baiwar da mutum ya samu, yă yi amfani da ita ga kyautata wa ɗan'uwansa, a kan amintaccen mai riƙon amanar alherin Allah iri iri ne." 
1Peter4:11 Duk mai wa'azi yă dai san faɗar Allah yake yi. Duk mai yin hidima, yă yi da ƙarfin da Allah ya ba shi, domin a cikin al'amura duka a ɗaukaka Allah ta wurin Yesu Almasihu. Ɗaukaka da mulki sun tabbata a gare shi har abada abadin. Amin! Amin!" 
1Peter4:12 Ya ƙaunatattuna, kada ku yi mamakin matsananciyar wahalar da ta same ku a kan gwaji, kamar wani baƙon abu ne yake faruwa a gare ku." 
1Peter4:13 Amma, muddin kuna tarayya da Almasihu a wajen shan wuyarsa, sai ku yi farin ciki, domin sa'ad da aka bayyana ɗaukakarsa, ku yi farin ciki da murna matuƙa." 
1Peter4:14 Albarka ta tabbata a gare ku in ana zaginku saboda sunan Almasihu, don Ruhun ɗaukaka, wato Ruhun Allah yā tabbata a gare ku." 
1Peter4:15 Sai dai kada shan wuyar ko ɗaya daga cikinku ya zama na horon laifin kisankai ne, ko na sata, ko na mugun aiki, ko kuma na shisshigi." 
1Peter4:16 Amma in wani ya sha wuya a kan shi Kirista ne, to, kada ya ji kunya, sai dai ya ɗaukaka Allah saboda wannan suna." 
1Peter4:17 Don lokaci ya yi da za a fara shari'a ta kan jama'ar Allah. In kuwa ta kanmu za a fara, to, me zai zama ƙarshen waɗanda ba su bi bisharar Allah ba?" 
1Peter4:18 “In adali da ƙyar ya kuɓuta, Me zai auku ga marar bin Allah da mai zunubi?”" 
1Peter4:19 Saboda haka, sai duk masu shan wuya bisa ga nufin Allah su danƙa ransu ga Mahalicci mai aminci suna aikata abin da yake daidai." 
1Peter5:1 Don haka, ku dattawan ikkilisiya da suke cikinku, ni da nike dattijon ikkilisiya, ɗan'uwanku, mashaidin shan wuyar Almasihu, mai samun rabo kuma a cikin ɗaukakar da za a bayyana, ina yi muku gargaɗi," 
1Peter5:2 ku yi kiwon garken Allah da yake tare da ku, ba a kan tilas ba, sai dai a kan yarda, ba ma don neman ribar banza ba, sai dai da himma." 
1Peter5:3 Kada ku nuna wa waɗanda suke hannunku iko, sai dai ku zama abin koyi ga garken nan." 
1Peter5:4 Sa'ad da kuma Sarkin Makiyaya ya bayyana, za ku sami kambin ɗaukaka marar dusashewa." 
1Peter5:5 Haka nan ku masu ƙuruciya, ku yi biyayya ga dattawan ikkilisiya. Dukanku ku yi wa kanku ɗamara da tawali'u, kuna bauta wa juna, gama “Allah yana gāba da masu girmankai, amma yana wa masu tawali'u alheri.”" 
1Peter5:6 Don haka, sai dai ku ƙasƙantar da kanku ga maɗaukakin ikon Allah, domin ya ɗaukakaku a kan kari." 
1Peter5:7 Ku jibga masa dukan taraddadinku, domin yana kula da ku." 
1Peter5:8 Ku natsu, ku kuma zauna a faɗake. Magabcinku Iblis yana zazzāgawa kamar zaki mai ruri, yana neman wanda zai lanƙwame." 
1Peter5:9 Ku yi tsayayya da shi, kuna dagewa a kan bangaskiyarku, da yake kun san 'yan'uwanku a duniya duka an ɗora musu irin wannan shan wuya." 
1Peter5:10 Bayan kun sha wuya kuma ta ɗan lokaci kaɗan, Allah mai alheri duka, wanda ya kira ku ga samun madawwamiyar ɗaukakarsa a cikin Almasihu, shi kansa zai kammala ku, ya kafa ku, ya kuma ƙarfafa ku." 
1Peter5:11 Mulki yā tabbata a gare shi har abada abadin. Amin! Amin! 
1Peter5:12 Na rubuto muku wasiƙar nan a taƙaice ta hannun Sila, ɗan'uwa mai aminci, a yadda na ɗauke shi, domin in yi muku gargaɗi, in kuma sanar da ku, cewa wannan shi ne alherin Allah na gaske, ku tsaya a gare shi da ƙarfi." 
1Peter5:13 Ita da take a Babila, wadda ita ma zaɓaɓɓiya ce, ta aiko muku da gaisuwa. Haka kuma, ɗana, Markus." 
1Peter5:13 Ita da take a Babila, wadda ita ma zaɓaɓɓiya ce, ta aiko muku da gaisuwa. Haka kuma, ɗana, Markus." 
1Peter5:14 Ku gai da juna da sumbar ƙauna. Salama tă tabbata a gare ku duka, ku na Almasihu." 
2Peter1:1 Daga Saminu Bitrus, bawan Yesu Almasihu, manzonsa kuma, zuwa ga waɗanda aka yi wa baiwar bangaskiya mai daraja iri ɗaya da tamu, albarkacin adalcin Allahnmu da Mai Cetonmu Yesu Almasihu." 
2Peter1:2 Alheri da salama su yawaita a gare ku, a wajen sanin Allah da Yesu Ubangijinmu" 
2Peter1:3 Allah da ikonsa yā yi mana baiwa da dukan abubuwan da suka wajaba ga rayuwa da kuma binsa, ta sanin wanda ya kira mu ga samun ɗaukakarsa da fifikonsa," 
2Peter1:4 waɗanda kuma ta wurinsu ya yi mana baiwa da manyan alkawaransa masu ɗaukaka ƙwarai, domin ta wurin waɗannan ku zama masu tarayya da Allah a wajen ɗabi'arsa, da yake kun tsira daga ɓācin nan dake a duniya da muguwar sha'awa take haifa." 
2Peter1:5 Saboda wannan dalili musamman, sai ku yi matuƙar himma, ku ƙara bangaskiyarku da halin kirki, halin kirki da sanin ya kamata," 
2Peter1:6 sanin ya kamata da kamunkai, kamunkai da jimiri, jimiri da bin Allah," 
2Peter1:7 bin Allah da son 'yan'uwa, son 'yan'uwa kuma da ƙauna." 
2Peter1:8 In kuwa halayen nan sun zama naku ne, har suna yalwata, za su sa ku kada ku yi zaman banza, ko marasa amfani a wajen sanin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu." 
2Peter1:9 Domin duk wanda ya rasa halayen nan, to, makaho ne ko kuwa ganinsa dishi-dishi ne, ya kuma mance an tsarkake shi daga zunubansa na dā." 
2Peter1:10 Saboda haka, ya ku 'yan'uwa, ku ƙara ba da himma ku tabbatar da kiranku da zaɓenku da aka yi. Domin in kun bi waɗannan halaye, ba za ku fādi ba har abada." 
2Peter1:11 Ta haka kuma, za a ba ku cikakken 'yancin shiga madawwamin mulki na Ubangijinmu Mai Cetonmu Yesu Almasihu." 
2Peter1:12 Don haka, lalle kullum ba zan fasa yi muku tunin waɗannan abubuwa ba, ko da yake kun san su, kun kuma kahu a kan gaskiyar nan da kuke da ita." 
2Peter1:13 A ganina daidai ne, muddin ina raye a cikin jikin nan, in riƙa faɗakar da ku ta hanyar tuni," 
2Peter1:14 da yake na sani na yi kusan rabuwa da jikin nan nawa, kamar yadda Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu ya yi mini ishara." 
2Peter1:15 Aniyata ce, a kowane lokaci ku iya tunawa da waɗannan abubuwa bayan ƙauracewata." 
2Peter1:16 Ai, ba tatsuniyoyi da aka ƙaga da wayo muka bi ba, sa'ad da muka sanar da ku ikon Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, da kuma bayyanarsa, ɗaukakarsa ce muka gani muraran." 
2Peter1:17 Domin sa'ad da Allah Uba ya girmama shi, ya kuma ɗaukaka shi, sai murya ta zo masa daga mafificiyar ɗaukaka cewa, “Wannan shi ne Ɗana ƙaunataccena, wanda nake farin ciki da shi ƙwarai,”" 
2Peter1:18 mu ne muka ji muryar nan da aka saukar daga sama, don muna tare da shi a kan tsattsarkan Dutsen nan." 
2Peter1:19 Har wa yau kuma, aka ƙara tabbatar mana da maganar annabcin nan, ya kuwa kyautu a gare ku, ku mai da hankali a gare ta, kamar fitila take mai haskakawa a wuri mai duhu har ya zuwa asubahin ranar nan, gamzaki kuma yă bayyana a zukatanku." 
2Peter1:20 Da farko dai, lalle ne ku fahimci wannan cewa, ba wani annabci a Littattafai da za a iya fassarawa ta ra'ayin mutum."

2Peter2:1 Amma fa annabawan ƙarya sun bayyana a cikin jama'a, kamar yadda za a sami malaman ƙarya a cikinku, waɗanda za su saɗaɗo da maɓarnacciyar fanɗarewa, har ma su ƙi Mamallakin da ya fanso su, suna jawo wa kansu hallaka farat ɗaya." 
2Peter2:2 Da yawa kuwa za su bi fajircinsu, har za a kushe hanyar gaskiya saboda su." 
2Peter2:3 Mahaɗantan malaman nan na ƙarya za su ribace ku da tsararrun labarunsu. An riga an yanke hukuncinsu tun dā, wanda zai hallaka su a shirye yake sosai." 
2Peter2:4 Da yake Allah bai rangwanta wa mala'iku ba sa'ad da suka yi zunubi, sai ya jefa su a Gidan Wuta, ya tura su a cikin ramummuka masu zurfi, masu baƙin duhu, a tsare su har ya zuwa ranar hukunci," 
2Peter2:5 tun da yake bai rangwanta wa mutanen tun can dā dā kuma ba, amma ya kiyaye Nuhu mai wa'azin adalci, da waɗansu mutum bakwai, sa'ad da ya aiko da Ruwan Tsufana zuwa a cikin duniyar nan ta marasa bin Allah," 
2Peter2:6 da yake kuma ya mai da biranen Saduma da Gwamrata toka, ya yi musu hukuncin hallaka, ya mai da su abin ishara ga marasa bin Allah," 
2Peter2:7 da yake kuma ya ceci Lutu adali, wanda fajircin kangararru ya baƙanta masa rai ƙwarai" 
2Peter2:8 (don kuwa abin da adalin nan ya yi, ya kuma gani, sa'ad da yake a cikinsu, sai kowace rana yakan ji ciwon aikinsu na kangara a zuciyarsa mai adalci)," 
2Peter2:9 ashe kuwa, Ubangiji ya san yadda zai kuɓutar da masu tsoronsa daga gwaje-gwaje, ya kuma tsare marasa adalci a kan jiran hukunci, har ya zuwa ranar shari'a," 
2Peter2:10 tun ba waɗanda suka dulmuya a cikin muguwar sha'awa mai ƙazantarwa ba, suke kuma raina mulki. Masu tsaurin ido ne su, masu taurin kai kuma, ba sa jin tsoron zagin masu ɗaukaka." 
2Peter2:11 Amma kuwa mala'iku, ko da yake sun fi su ƙarfi da iko, duk da haka, ba su ɗora musu laifi da zage-zage a gaban Ubangiji." 
2Peter2:12 Amma waɗannan mutane, kamar daddobi marasa hankali suke, masu bin abin da jikinsu ya ba su kawai, waɗanda aka haifa, don a kama a kashe, har suna kushen abubuwan da ba su fahinta ba, lalle kuwa za su hallaka a sanadin ɓacin nan nasu," 
2Peter2:13 suna shan sakamakon muguntarsu. Sun ɗauka a kan jin daɗi ne a yi annashuwa da rana kata. Sun baƙanta, sun zama abin kunya. Sun dulmuya ga ciye-ciye da shaye-shaye, suna ta nishaɗi a cikinku." 
2Peter2:14 Jarabar zina take a gare su, ba sa ƙoshi da yin zunubi. Suna yaudarar marasa kintsuwa. Sun ƙware da ƙwaɗayi. La'anannun iri!" 
2Peter2:15 Sun yar da miƙaƙƙiyar hanya, sun bauɗe, sun bi hanyar Bal'amu ɗan Beyor, wanda ya cika son samu ta hanyar mugunta." 
2Peter2:16 Amma an tsawata masa a kan laifinsa, har dabba marar baki ma ta yi magana kamar mutum, ta kwaɓi haukan annabin nan." 
2Peter2:17 Mutanen nan kamar mabubbugen ruwa wadanda suka kafe, ƙasashi ne da iska take kaɗawa. Su ne aka tanada wa matsanancin duhu." 
2Peter2:18 Ta surutai barkatai marasa kan gado na ruba, da halinsu na fasikanci sukan shammaci waɗanda da ƙyar suke kuɓucewa daga masu zaman saɓo," 
2Peter2:19 suna yi musu alkawarin 'yanci, ga shi kuwa, su da kansu bayin zamba ne. Don mutum bawa ne na duk abin da ya rinjaye shi." 
2Peter2:20 In kuwa bayan da suka tsere wa ƙazantar duniyar albarkacin sanin Ubangijinmu, Mai Cetonmu Yesu Almasihu, suka kuma sāke sarƙafewa a ciki, har aka rinjaye su, ƙarshen zamansu ya fi na fari lalacewa ke nan." 
2Peter2:21 Da ba su taɓa sanin hanyar adalci tun da fari ba, da ya fiye musu, bayan sun san ta, sa'an nan su juya ga barin umarnin nan mai tsarki." 
2Peter2:22 Ai kuwa, karin maganar nan na gaskiya ya dace da su cewa, “Kare ya cinye amansa,” da kuma, “Gursunar da aka yi wa wanka ta kome ga birgima cikin laka.”" 
2Peter3:1 Ya ƙaunatattuna, wannan ita ce wasiƙa ta biyu da na rubuto muku, a kowaccensu kuwa na faɗakar da sahihan zukatanku ta hanyar tuni." 
2Peter3:2 Ina so ku tuna da yin faɗin annabawa tsarkaka, da kuma umarnin Ubangiji Mai Ceto ta bakin manzannin da suka zo muku." 
2Peter3:3 Da farko dai lalle ne ku fahimci wannan, cewa a can zamanin ƙarshe masu ba'a za su zo suna ba'a, suna biye wa muguwar sha'awarsu," 
2Peter3:4 suna cewa, “To, ina alkawarin dawowarsa? Ai, tun a lokacin da kakannin kakanninmu suka ƙaura, dukan abubuwa suna tafe ne kamar dā, tun farkon halitta.”" 
2Peter3:5 Da gangan suke goce wa maganar nan, cewa tun dā dā ta wurin maganar Allah sammai suka kasance, aka kuma siffata ƙasa daga ruwa, tana kuma a tsakiyar ruwa." 
2Peter3:6 Ta haka ne kuma, duniyar wancan zamani, ruwa ya sha kanta, ta hallaka." 
2Peter3:7 Ta maganar Allah ne kuma sama da ƙasa da suke a nan a yanzu, aka tanada su ga wuta, ana ajiye su, har ya zuwa ranar nan da za a yi wa marasa bin Allah shari'a, a hallaka su." 
2Peter3:8 Amma ya ku ƙaunatattuna kada ku goce wa magana gudar nan, cewa ga Ubangiji kwana ɗaya kamar shekara dubu ne, shekara dubu kuma kamar kwana ɗaya ne." 
2Peter3:9 Ubangiji ba ya jinkirta alkawarinsa, yadda waɗansu suka ɗauki ma'anar jinkiri, amma mai haƙuri ne a gare ku, ba ya so kowa ya hallaka, sai dai kowa ya kai ga tuba." 
2Peter3:10 Duk da haka, ranar Ubangiji za ta zo kamar ɓarawo, sa'an nan sammai za su shuɗe da ƙara mai tsanani, dukkan abin da yake a cikinsu za su ƙone, su hallaka, ƙasa kuma da abubuwan da suke a kanta, duk za su ɓăce." 
2Peter3:11 Tun da yake duk abubuwan nan za a hallaka su haka, waɗanne irin mutane ya kamata ku zama? Ya kamata ku yi zaman tsarkaka masu ibada," 
2Peter3:12 kuna sauraron ranar Allah, kuna gaggauta zuwanta! Da zuwanta kuwa za a kunna wa sammai wuta, su hallaka, dukkan abubuwa kuma da suke a cikinsu, wuta za ta narkar da su." 
2Peter3:13 Amma bisa ga alkawarinsa muna jiran sababbin summai da sabuwar ƙasa a inda adalci zai yi zamansa. 
2Peter3:14 Saboda haka, ya ƙaunatattuna, tun da kuke jiran waɗannan abubuwa, ku himmantu ya same ku marasa tabo, marasa aibu, masu zaman salama." 
2Peter3:15 Ku ɗauki haƙurin Ubangijinmu, ceto ne. Haka ma, ƙaunataccen ɗan'uwanmu Bulus ya rubuto muku, bisa ga hikimar da aka ba shi," 
2Peter3:16 yana magana a kan wannan, kamar yadda yake yi a dukan wasiƙunsa, akwai waɗansu abubuwa a cikin masu wuyar fahinta, waɗanda jahilai da marasa kintsuwa suke juya ma'anarsu, kamar yadda suke juya sauren Littattafai, ta haka suke jawo wa kansu hallaka." 
2Peter3:17 Don haka, ya ku ƙaunatatuna, da yake kun riga kun san haka, ku kula kada bauɗewar kangararru ta tafi da ku, har ku fāɗi daga matsayinku." 
2Peter3:18 Amma ku ƙaru da alherin Ubangijinmu, Mai Cetonmu Yesu Almasihu da kuma saninsa. Ɗaukaka tă tabbata a gare shi a yanzu, da kuma har abada. Amin! Amin!"

1John3:1 Ku dubi irin ƙaunar da Uba ya nuna mana, har yake ce da mu 'ya'yan Allah, haka kuwa muke. Abin da ya sa duniya ba ta san mu ba, don ba ta san shi ba ne." 
1John3:1 Ku dubi irin ƙaunar da Uba ya nuna mana, har yake ce da mu 'ya'yan Allah, haka kuwa muke. Abin da ya sa duniya ba ta san mu ba, don ba ta san shi ba ne." 
1John3:2 Ya ku ƙaunatattuna, a yanzu mu 'ya'yan Allah ne, yadda za mu zama nan gaba kuwa, ba a bayyana ba tukuna, amma mun sani sa'ad da ya bayyana, za mu zama kamarsa, domin za mu gan shi kamar yadda yake."

Jude1:1 Daga Yahuza bawan Yesu Almasihu, ɗan'uwan Yakubu zuwa ga kirayayyu, ƙaunatattun Allah Uba, keɓaɓɓu ga Yesu Almasihu." 
Jude1:2 Jinƙai, da salama, da ƙauna su yawaita a gare ku." 
Jude1:3 Ya ku ƙaunatattuna, da yake dā ma ina ɗokin rubuto muku zancen ceton nan namu, mu duka, sai na ga wajibi ne in rubuto muku in gargaɗe ku, ku dage ƙwarai a kan bangaskiyar nan da aka danƙa wa tsarkaka sau ɗaya tak, ba ƙari." 
Jude1:4 Gama waɗansu mutane sun saɗaɗo a cikinku, waɗanda tun zamanin dā aka ƙaddara ga hukuncin nan, marasa bin Allah ne, masu mai da alherin Allah dalilin aikata fajirci, suna kuma ƙin makaɗaicin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu." 
Jude1:5 Sai dai ina so in tuna muku, ko da yake kun riga kun san kome sosai, cewa Ubangiji ya ceci jama'a daga ƙasar Masar, duk da haka daga baya ya hallaka waɗanda ba su ba da gaskiya ba." 
Jude1:6 Har ma mala'ikun da ba su kiyaye girmansu ba, amma suka bar ainihin mazauninsu, ya tsare su cikin sarƙa madawwamiya a baƙin duhu, har ya zuwa shari'ar babbar ranar nan." 
Jude1:7 Haka kuma Saduma da Gwamrata, da birane kewayensu, waɗanda su ma suka dulmuya cikin fasikanci da muguwar sha'awa ta jiki, an nuna su domin ishara, suna shan hukuncin madawwamiyar wuta." 
Jude1:8 Haka kuma masu mafarke-mafarken nan, sukan ƙazantar da jikinsu, su ƙi bin mulki, su kuma yi wa masu ɗaukaka baƙar magana." 
Jude1:9 Amma lokacin da babban mala'ika, Mika'ilu yake fama da Iblis, suna mūsu a kan gawar Musa, shi Mika'ilu bai yi garajen ɗora masa laifi da baƙar magana ba, sai dai ya ce, “Ubangiji yă tsawata maka.”" 
Jude1:10 Amma mutanen nan sukan kushe duk abin da ba su fahinta ba, saboda abubuwan da suka sani bisa ga jiki suna kamar dabbobi marasa hankali, su ne kuwa sanadin halakarsu." 
Jude1:11 Kaitonsu! Don sun bi halin Kayinu, sun ɗunguma cikin bauɗewar Bal'amu don kwaɗayi, sun kuma hallaka ta irin tawayen Kora." 
Jude1:12 Waɗannan mutane kamar aibobi ne a taronku na soyayya, suna ta shagulgulan ciye-ciye a cikinku, ba kunya ba tsoro, suna kula da kansu kawai. Su kamar holoƙon hadiri ne, wanda iska take korawa. Su kamar itatuwa ne, marasa 'ya'ya da kaka, matattu murus, tumɓukakku." 
Jude1:13 Su kamar raƙuman ruwan teku ne masu hauka, suna taƙama da kumfar kunyarsu. Su kamar taurari ne masu kai da kawowa, waɗanda aka tanada wa matsanancin duhu har abada." 
Jude1:14 Anuhu ma wanda yake na bakwai daga Adamu, shi ma ya yi annabci a kan waɗannan mutane cewa, “Ga shi, Ubangiji ya zo da dubban tsarkakansa," 
Jude1:15 don ya zartar da hukunci kan kowa, yă kuma tabbatar wa marasa bin Allah dukan aikinsu na rashin bin Allah, da suka aikata ta hanyar rashin bin Allah, da kuma baƙaƙen maganganu da masu zunubi marasa bin Allah suka yi game da shi.”" 
Jude1:16 Waɗannan su ne masu gunaguni, masu ƙunƙuni, masu biye wa muguwar sha'awa, marubata, masu yi wa mutane bambaɗanci don samun wata fa'ida." 
Jude1:17 Ya ku ƙaunatattuna, lalle ku tuna da maganar da manzannin Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu suka faɗa a dā," 
Jude1:18 da suka ce da ku, “A zamanin ƙarshe za a yi waɗansu mutane masu ba'a, masu biye wa muguwar sha'awarsu ta rashin bin Allah.”" 
Jude1:19 Waɗannan su ne masu raba tsakani, masu son zuciya, marasa Ruhu." 
Jude1:20 Amma ya ku ƙaunatattuna, ku riƙa inganta kanku ga bangaskiyarku mafi tsarki, kuna addu'a da ikon Ruhu Mai Tsarki." 
Jude1:21 Ku tsaya a kan ƙaunar da Allah yake yi mana, kuna sauraron jinƙan Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu mai kaiwa ga rai madawwami." 
Jude1:22 Ku ji tausayin waɗanda suke shakka," 
Jude1:23 kuna ceton waɗansu kuna fizgo su daga wuta. Waɗansu kuma ku ji tausayinsu, amma tare da tsoro kuna ƙyamar ko da tufafin da halinsu na mutuntaka ya ƙazantar." 
Jude1:24 Ga wanda yake da iko yă tsare ku daga faɗuwa, yă kuma miƙa ku marasa aibi a gaban ɗaukakarsa da matuƙar farin ciki," 
Jude1:25 ga Allah makaɗaici Mai Cetonmu ta wurin Yesu Almasihu Ubangijinmu, ɗaukaka, da fifiko, da mulki, da iko su tabbata gare shi, tun fil'azal, da yanzu, da kuma har abada abadin. Amin, amin." 
Revelation1:1 Wahayin Yesu Almasihu da Allah ya ba shi ya nuna wa bayinsa abin da lalle ne zai auku ba da daɗewa ba, ya kuwa bayyana shi ta wurin aiko da mala'ikansa zuwa gun bawansa Yahaya," 
Revelation1:2 wanda ya shaidi Maganar Allah, da kuma shaidar Yesu Almasihu, har da dukan abin da ya gani." 
Revelation1:3 Albarka tā tabbata ga mai karanta maganar nan ta annabci, ta kuma tabbata ga masu ji, waɗanda kuma suke kiyaye abin da yake a rubuce a ciki, domin lokaci ya gabato." 
Revelation1:4 Daga Yahaya zuwa ga ikilisiyoyin nan bakwai da suke a ƙasar Asiya. Alheri da salama su tabbata a gare ku daga wanda yake a yanzu, shi ne a dā, shi ne kuma a nan gaba, da kuma Ruhohin nan bakwai da suke a gaban kursiyinsa,"

Revelation1:6 ya mai da mu firistoci, mallakar Allah Ubansa. Amin."

Revelation1:12 Sai na juya in ga wanda yake yi mini magana, da juyawata kuwa, sai na ga fitilu bakwai na zinariya."

Revelation1:17 Da na gan shi, sai na fāɗi a gabansa kamar na mutu. Amma ya ɗora mini hannunsa na dama, ya ce, “Kada ka ji tsoro. Ni ne na Farko. Ni ne na Ƙarshe,"

Revelation1:19 To, ka rubuta abubuwan da ka gani, da abubuwan da suke a nan a yanzu, da abubuwan da suke shirin aukuwa bayan wannan."

Revelation2:15 Haka kai ma kake da waɗansu masu bin koyarwar Nikolatawa.

Revelation2:18 “Ka kuma rubuta wa mala'ikan ikkilisiyar da take a Tayatira haka, ‘Ga maganar Ɗan Allah, mai idanu kamar harshen wuta, mai ƙafafu kamar gogaggiyar tagulla." 
Revelation2:19 “ ‘Na san ayyukanka, da ƙaunarka, da bangaskiyarka, da ibadarka, da jimirinka, ayyukanka kuma na yanzu, sun fi na farkon." 
Revelation2:20 Amma ga laifinka, wato, ka haƙurce wa matar nan Yezebel, wadda take ce da kanta annabiya, take kuma koya wa bayina, tana yaudararsu, su yi fasikanci, su kuma ci abincin da aka yi wa gumaka hadaya." 
Revelation2:21 Na ba ta damar tuba, amma ta ƙi tuba da fasikancinta." 
Revelation2:22 To, ga shi, zan jefa ta a gado, masu yin fasikanci da ita kuma zan ɗora musu matsananciyar wahala, sai ko in sun tuba da irin aikinta." 
Revelation2:23 Zan kashe 'ya'yanta tashi ɗaya, dukan ikilisiyoyi kuma za su sani Ni ne mai fayyace birnin zuciya. Zan kuma saka wa kowannenku gwargwadon aikinsa."

Revelation2:25 Sai dai ku riƙi abin da kuke da shi kankan, har in zo."
